Accio_desc:
Summons a variety of objects and enemies to close range. Certain magical and heavy objects require sustained effort to pull close. When a summoned object reaches you, you will automatically cast Wingardium Leviosa to continue levitating and controlling it without the need for additional button inputs.
能够将各类物体与敌人拉至施法者面前。某些格外沉重或者是具备魔力的物体将需要持续施法才能够拉动。当将受影响目标拉至自身所处位置后，你将自动施放羽加迪姆·勒维奥萨，因此不要额外操作便能继续控制进入飘浮状态的目标。
Accio_gameplay_desc:
Summons a variety of objects and enemies to close range. Certain magical and heavy objects require sustained effort to pull close. When a summoned object reaches you, you will automatically cast Wingardium Leviosa to continue levitating and controlling it without the need for additional button inputs.
能够将各类物体与敌人拉至施法者面前。某些格外沉重或者是具备魔力的物体将需要持续施法才能够拉动。当将受影响目标拉至自身所处位置后，你将自动施放羽加迪姆·勒维奥萨，因此不要额外操作便能继续控制进入飘浮状态的目标。
AccioActivity_Desc:
Use Accio to summon the ball as close as you can to the edge without going over in order to score points.
使用“飞来咒”，在不越过的情况下，将球召唤至尽可能近的位置，进而得分。
AccioBall_Tie: SUMMONER'S COURT TIED|召唤对决平局
AcidPops_desc: A lollipop so sour it has been known to burn a hole in the tongue|酸到足以在舌头上烧个洞的棒棒糖
Acromantula_tip_one_desc:
This beast appears and behaves like other magical arachnids, though it's not technically a spider. Its powerful attacks will break Shield Charms. To combat this beast, it's best to dodge and strike quickly between its attacks. Patience and perseverance just might lead to victory.
这种野兽的外观和行为与其他魔法蛛形纲动物相似，虽然严格来讲它并不是蜘蛛。它们强大的攻击可破坏护盾魔咒。为了对抗这头野兽，最好在两次攻击之间快速闪避和攻击。耐心和毅力或许可迎来胜利。
ACS_01_01_LineComplete:
I cleaned out the spiders in Aranshire but was too late to save Mary Portman. She was a victim of her own avarice. I broke the news to Mr Dunne in Hogsmeade, and while he was heartbroken, I daresay he did not seem surprised.
我已经清理了在阿兰郡肆虐的蜘蛛，但对于玛丽·波特曼来说是为时已晚。现在她已经成为了自己的贪婪的牺牲品。返回霍格莫德之后，我把真相告诉了邓恩先生，虽然他知道十分伤心，但我能感觉得到他之前就已经预感到会有这样的结果。
ACS_01_01_LineCompleteA:
I rid Aranshire of its spider infestation, but unfortunately Mary Portman didn’t make it. She died along with her secrets. My heart goes out to poor Mr Dunne who was clearly fond of Mary. I couldn’t bring myself to tell him the infestation was all Mary’s fault. What’s done is done – no need to tarnish Mr Dunne’s memories of his friend.
我设法摆脱了阿兰郡的蜘蛛侵扰，但不幸的是玛丽·波特曼没有成功。她和她的秘密一起死去了。我很同情可怜的邓恩先生，他显然很喜欢玛丽。我无法让自己告诉他，此次感染都是玛丽的错。毕竟木已成舟，没有必要玷污邓恩先生对好友的记忆了。
ACS_01_01_LineCompleteA|SWITCH:
I rid Aranshire of its spider infestation, but unfortunately Mary Portman didn’t make it. She died along with her secrets. My heart goes out to poor Mr Dunne who was clearly fond of Mary. I couldn’t bring myself to tell him the infestation was all Mary’s fault. What’s done is done – no need to tarnish Mr Dunne’s memories of his friend.
我设法摆脱了阿兰郡的蜘蛛侵扰，但不幸的是玛丽·波特曼没有成功。她和她的秘密一起死去了。我很同情可怜的邓恩先生，他显然很喜欢玛丽。我无法让自己告诉他，此次感染都是玛丽的错。毕竟木已成舟，没有必要玷污邓恩先生对好友的记忆了。
ACS_01_01_QuestJournal:
While in Hogsmeade, I met a merchant named Crispin Dunne in the Three Broomsticks. He's lost contact with a close friend named Mary Portman who lives in the village of Aranshire and asked if I would check on her – Aranshire has been troubled by spiders of late and he’s concerned for Mary’s welfare. The village is to the South of Hogsmeade, directly across the lake from Hogwarts.
在霍格莫德，我在三把扫帚中遇到了一位名叫克里斯平·邓恩的旅行商人。他与住在阿兰郡一位名叫玛丽·波特曼的密友失去了联系。他问我是否愿意去村里看看他的好友…阿兰郡最近受到蜘蛛的困扰，而他很担心玛丽的安危。村庄位于霍格莫德南部，与霍格沃茨隔湖相望。
ACS_01_01_QuestJournal|SWITCH:
While in Hogsmeade, I met a merchant named Crispin Dunne in the Three Broomsticks. He's lost contact with a close friend named Mary Portman who lives in the village of Aranshire and asked if I would check on her – Aranshire has been troubled by spiders of late and he’s concerned for Mary’s welfare. The village is to the South of Hogsmeade, directly across the lake from Hogwarts.
在霍格莫德，我在三把扫帚中遇到了一位名叫克里斯平·邓恩的旅行商人。他与住在阿兰郡一位名叫玛丽·波特曼的密友失去了联系。他问我是否愿意去村里看看他的好友…阿兰郡最近受到蜘蛛的困扰，而他很担心玛丽的安危。村庄位于霍格莫德南部，与霍格沃茨隔湖相望。
ACS_01_01_QuestStepJournal1:
I told Crispin Dunne that I would travel to Aranshire and check on his friend Mary.
我告诉克里斯平·邓恩，我会去阿兰郡看看他的好友玛丽。
ACS_01_01_QuestStepJournal2:
Aranshire is under attack – I need to destroy the spiders and protect the village!
阿兰郡受到攻击，我需要消灭蜘蛛并保护村庄！
ACS_01_01_QuestStepJournal2a: I need to find Mary to make sure she's unharmed.|我需要找到玛丽以确保她没有受伤。
ACS_01_01_QuestStepJournal3:
Crispin Dunne was right. Aranshire is infested! Spiders in such large numbers means a nest is nearby. I need to root it out before the village is overrun.
克里斯平·邓恩没有夸张。阿兰郡确实遇到了大麻烦！现在村庄里面随处可见成群结队的蜘蛛，说明附近肯定有它们的巢穴。我必须赶在村庄被彻底毁灭之前将这些害虫斩草除根。
ACS_01_01_QuestStepJournal4:
The dank cellar air stirs palpably and reeks of decay. This must be the way. I need to be on guard!
阴暗地窖中弥漫着骚动与腐朽的气息。一定是这条路。我得提高警惕才行！
ACS_01_01_QuestStepJournal5:
This is no doubt the heart of the nest. I must destroy all these egg sacs before they can hatch.
这无疑是巢穴的核心。我必须在它们孵化之前，摧毁所有这些卵囊。
ACS_01_01_QuestStepJournal6:
Those eggs did not lay themselves. A mother is around here somewhere. I need to deal with her to put an end to this infestation.
那些蛋不是自己下的。这附近有蜘蛛之母。我需要处理它，以结束这种侵扰。
ACS_01_01_QuestStepJournal7:
I found the source of the spider infestation. Now I need to kill the mother without getting myself poisoned and eaten!
我找到了蜘蛛出没的源头。现在我需要杀死蜘蛛之母，并不让自己中毒或被吃掉！
ACS_01_01_QuestStepJournal8:
I defeated the mother spider, ending the infestation. Now I need to find Mary to make sure she’s unharmed.
我打败了蜘蛛之母，结束了侵扰。现在我需要找到玛丽以确保她没有受伤。
ACS_01_01_QuestStepJournal9:
I need to find Mr Dunne in Hogsmeade and inform him of Mary’s fate. Should I tell him that Mary is to blame for the infestation, or should I protect his memory of her? 
我得在霍格莫德找到邓恩先生，并告诉他玛丽的命运。我该告诉他玛丽是感染的罪魁祸首吗？还是要保护他对她的记忆呢？
ACS_01_01_QuestStepJournal9|SWITCH:
I need to find Mr Dunne in Hogsmeade and inform him of Mary’s fate. Should I tell him that Mary is to blame for the infestation, or should I protect his memory of her? 
我得在霍格莫德找到邓恩先生，并告诉他玛丽的命运。我该告诉他玛丽是感染的罪魁祸首吗？还是要保护他对她的记忆呢？

ACS_01_01_QuestTask7: Defeat The Insatiable Spider|打败暴食蜘蛛
ACS_01_01_QuestTask9: Return to Crispin Dunne in Hogsmeade|回霍格莫德找克里斯平·邓恩
ACS_01_01_QuestTask9|SWITCH: Return to Crispin Dunne in Hogsmeade|回霍格莫德找克里斯平·邓恩
ACS_01_QuestAvailable_Journal:
Crispin Dunne in the Three Broomsticks is looking for someone to check on a friend.
三把扫帚中的克里斯平·邓恩正在找人寻找好友。
ACS_01_QuestAvailable_Task: Talk to Crispin Dunne|与克里斯平·邓恩交谈
ACS_01_QuestAvailable_Task|SWITCH: Talk to Crispin Dunne|与克里斯平·邓恩交谈

AilsaTravers_desc:
Considered to be particularly close friends with Victor Rookwood, Ailsa Travers is all too good at her job as an Ashwinder. Travers has been one of Rookwood's most devoted followers from the beginning and helped Rookwood gain critical footing within Hogsmeade.
外界普遍认为艾莉萨·特拉弗斯与维克托·卢克伍德是关系亲近的好友，在火灰蛇党内部她也是一位出类拔萃的干部。特拉弗斯从最初的开始便是卢克伍德最为忠诚的追随者之一，并且在卢克伍德的势力渗透霍格莫德时贡献了莫大的功劳。
AlexandraRicketts: Alexandra Ricketts|亚利桑德拉·里基茨
Alohomora_desc:
Grants access to a variety of locked rooms and containers throughout the world, but requires magical prowess to perform successfully. Cast with {Interact} when prompted near a valid lock.
这种咒语能够帮助你打开遍布世界各地的上锁容器或者是房间，但是你将需要拥有足够的魔法技艺才能打开它们。靠近锁具后根据提示按施放。
Alohomora_gameplay_desc:
Grants access to a variety of locked rooms and containers throughout the world, but requires magical prowess to perform successfully. Cast with {Interact} when prompted near a valid lock.

AncientMagic_desc: A small area surging with ancient magic|充斥着古代魔法的一小块区域
AncientMagicCast_gameplay_desc:
When at least one segment of your Ancient Magic Meter is full, you can cast devastating Ancient Magic attacks that deal massive damage and break Shield Charms. Cast with {UMGLeftShoulder} + {CM_Gamepad_RightShoulder} when you see the prompt over an enemy's head.
当你的古代魔法计量至少有一段已满时，你就可以施放毁灭性的古代魔法攻击，造成巨大伤害并打破护盾魔咒。当你看到敌人头上出现提示时，使用 + 来施法。
AncientMagicCast_MKB_gameplay_desc:
When at least one segment of your Ancient Magic Meter is full, you can cast devastating Ancient Magic attacks that deal massive damage and break Shield Charms. Cast with {AM_CriticalFinisher} when you see the prompt over an enemy's head.
当你的古代魔法计量至少有一段已满时，你就可以施放毁灭性的古代魔法攻击，造成巨大伤害并打破护盾魔咒。当你看到敌人头上出现提示时，使用来施法。
ancientmagiccollected: Ancient Magic Collected|古代魔法收藏
AncientMagicSingular: Ancient Magic Hotspot|古代魔法热点
AncientMagicThrow_gameplay_desc:
Summons and then throws special environmental objects at the targeted enemy. Particularly useful for breaking through Shield Charms. Cast with {OppugnoButton} when that prompt is hovering over an object.
召唤特殊的环境物体，并向目标敌人投掷。这种攻击能够轻松击溃护盾魔咒。当目标上方出现提示标记后按施放。
Architecture_Identity_Ceiling_Mzoo_desc: A lavish and sophisticated eclectic ceiling|华丽而又精致的多元式天花板
Armchair_01_DWIZ_desc: A gothic-style armchair for a dark mood|阴郁氛围的哥特风格扶手椅
ArmChair_01_Hbgst_desc: A cosy armchair that smells faintly of lilacs|舒适的扶手椅，散发着淡淡的丁香花香
ArmChair_01_Mzoo_desc: An eclectic-looking armchair |造型多元式的扶手椅
Armchair_01_POTNR_desc: A scientific-looking armchair |科技式氛围的扶手椅
ArrestoMomentum_desc: Slows both objects and enemies, giving you extra time to plan your next move|这种咒语能够对物体与敌人起效，能够给你提供思考下一步计划的喘息时间
ArrestoMomentum_gameplay_desc: Slows both objects and enemies, giving you extra time to plan your next move|这种咒语能够对物体与敌人起效，能够给你提供思考下一步计划的喘息时间
AshwinderEggs_desc:
Hot to the touch, one clutch of these is an ingredient for Edurus Potion. Ashwinders rise from the dying embers of magical fires and then slither off to dark corners to lay their eggs. Though usually found in dwellings, some seem to have risen from abandoned campfires and left clutches of eggs in nearby rocky areas.
摸起来很热，而其中一个是“艾德鲁斯魔药”的成分。火灰蛇从魔法火焰的余烬中诞生，然后滑到黑暗的角落产卵。虽然通常在住宅中发现，但有些火灰蛇似乎是从废弃的营火中诞生，并在附近的岩石区域留下一窝蛋。
AstoriaCrickett: Astoria Crickett|阿斯托利亚·克里奇特
Astronomy_Desc:
Stone slabs, set up across the countryside, that are ideal for studying constellations near and far
散布在田野间的神秘石板，能够用来研究天边远近不一的复杂星座
AudioCueHelp_desc: These are the icons used by the Audio Visualiser|可视化音频中使用的图标
AudioCueOpacity_desc: Controls the transparency of the Audio Visualiser icons|调整可视化音频图标的透明度
AudioCueScale_desc: Controls the size of the Audio Visualiser icons|调整可视化音频图标的尺寸
AudioVisualizer_desc:
Activates or deactivates the Audio Visualiser, which uses onscreen icons to indicate audio events
激活或停用音频可视化仪，使用屏幕上的图标来指示音频事件
AutoDamagePotion_desc: Creates a storm around the drinker which will stun and damage nearby enemies|服用后将在自身周围创造一道风暴，晕眩并伤害周遭敌人
Avadakedavra_Desc: Kills enemies instantly|瞬间击杀敌人
AvadaKedavra_gameplay_desc: Kills enemies instantly|瞬间击杀敌人
AVM_02_QuestFail_Reason: You left the dragon egg behind|你并没有救出龙蛋
AVM_02_QuestFail_Warning: Don't forget the egg|不要忘记龙蛋
AVM_FireandVice_QuestActive_Journal:
While spying on the poachers in Hogsmeade, Poppy learned that their recent activities have been focused in this area, but she doesn't know what those activities are. She wants to look around and see if we can discover what the poachers are doing in this neck of the woods.
通过监视霍格莫德中的盗猎者，帕比观察到他们最近在当地十分活跃，但目前帕比还不确定这其中的具体原因。帕比想要调查这一块，也许我们能查清楚盗猎来这里的真正目的。
AVM_FireandVice_QuestActive_StepJournal0: Poppy is waiting in the area to the far north of Hogwarts, as the broom flies.|帕比正在霍格沃茨北面等着我，那里是只有通过骑乘扫帚才能到达的偏远区域。
The trail went cold for Poppy in this area.|帕比在这一块追寻着的线索断了。

I stumbled across some interesting evidence. I should let Poppy know what I found. 
我偶然发现了一些有意思的证据。我应该让帕比知道我发现了什么。

We picked up the poachers' trail. They've definitely been in this area, just like we suspected. 
我们找到了盗猎者的踪迹。正如我们所怀疑的一样，他们肯定去过这个地区。
The poachers are up to something. We can start by searching the tent. |盗猎者不怀好意，我们可以从搜索帐篷开始。

The poachers are running an illegal dragon fighting ring out of this enchanted tent. They call it 'Horntail Hall.' Poppy thinks more dragons are being kept here and wants to investigate further. We'll need to sneak past the crowd.
盗猎者们正在这座魔法帐篷中举办非法斗龙赌博。他们给里面的斗龙场起了“树蜂厅”的名字。帕比认为这里肯定关押着更多的龙，因此想要继续调查。我们需要设法悄无声息地穿过围观的人群。

A captured dragon is being held in the arena below. We need to make our way down there if we're going to free it. 
有条被捕获的龙被关押在下方的竞技场中。若要释放它，我们就得先前往该处

The poachers are in possession of a dragon egg. From everything we've seen of this place, we can't allow them to keep it. 
盗猎者拥有一颗龙蛋。有鉴于在此处所看到的一切，我们不能让他们保留这颗龙蛋。
AVM_FireandVice_QuestActive_StepJournal1:
These poachers plan to force the dragon to fight for its life in the ring so they can bet on the winner. And they're stealing eggs from the mothers, likely to raise replacement fighters. This dastardly business must be stopped.
这些盗猎者计划要强迫龙在擂台上为自己的生命而战，这样他们就可以押注赢家。他们还从母亲那里偷走蛋，以培养出替代的斗士。必须停止这种卑鄙的行径。

If we pull the release mechanism with enough force, it will free the dragon from its restraints.
如果能够施加足够大的力量，我们应该就可以拉动控制机关，释放被囚禁起来的龙。
AVM_FireandVice_QuestActive_TaskObj01: Meet Poppy Sweeting|与帕比·斯威汀会面
AVM_FireandVice_QuestActive_TaskObj02: Search for signs of poachers|寻找盗猎者的迹象
AVM_FireandVice_QuestActive_TaskObj08: Reach the captive dragon|找到被俘虏的龙
AVM_FireandVice_QuestActive_TaskObj09: Collect the dragon egg|收集龙蛋
AVM_FireandVice_QuestAvailable_Journal:
Poppy has been looking into the strange presence of poachers in Hogsmeade. She's learned something and wants to discuss it. I'm to meet her in the area just north of Hogwarts. 
帕比一直在调查霍格莫德盗猎者的奇怪行径。她发现一些事情并且想要讨论。我要在霍格沃茨北方一处与她会面。
AVM_FireAndVice_QuestAvailable_ProgressS: I need to progress in my studies before meeting Poppy north of Hogwarts.|现在我得先把精力放在学习上，之后才能去霍格沃茨北方的地方找帕比。
AVM_FireandVice_QuestComplete_Journal:
Poppy and I uncovered the poachers' best kept secret: a dragon fighting ring hidden in plain sight. We freed a captive dragon, took possession of a dragon egg, and fought our way out. Unfortunately, the egg we have belongs to the dragon we just set free. 
帕比和我发现了盗猎者一直以来掩饰的秘密：他们就在光天化日之下举办着非法斗龙活动。我们奋勇战斗，不仅解救了一头被拘禁的龙，还在离开的路上找到了一枚龙蛋。只是很可惜，后来我们才意识到龙蛋属于之前被我们放走的那头龙。
Azkaban_Dungeon_desc:
Azkaban is the brutal wizarding prison guarded by the fearsome Dementors on a rocky island in the middle of the sea. Many of the inmates do not survive the harsh conditions, and those that do rarely emerge with their sanity. 
阿兹卡班是一座位于海中孤岛之上的残酷巫师监狱，里面的狱卒皆是让人闻风丧胆的摄魂怪。监狱中的恶劣环境使得许多囚犯还没来得及度过刑期便一命呜呼，而那些幸存者们的心智也大多已经千疮百孔。
BabySpidersKL_desc:
These deal light damage, but that can add up quickly when a swarm of them attack relentlessly.

These are easily defeated by almost any attack and will even die when they strike a simple Shield Charm.
虽然单一小蜘蛛无法造成过多伤害，但是成群结队出动的小蜘蛛将带来巨大的威胁。

几乎所有攻击都能够轻松解决这些野兽。甚至是当它们攻击护盾魔咒时也会因为反弹力量而一命呜呼。
BabyThestral_desc: An orphaned baby Thestral found by Archie Bickle|阿尔奇·比科尔发现的夜骐宝宝孤儿

BEA_01:
I spoke with the vendor in Aranshire, Edgar Adley, about a missing heirloom pocket watch left behind in an Acromantula Cave. He and his friend Milo had gone there to procure venom from a live Acromantula, ‘The Absconder’. But The Absconder proved to be too much for Milo and poisoned him. His final wish was that Edgar take his watch to give to Milo’s daughter, but Edgar fled in fear. I should try and retrieve this heirloom. The Absconder’s Cave is in the Forbidden Forest, to the northwest of Hogsmeade. I should make sure I’m well prepared before I go.
之前我见到了阿兰郡的商人埃德加·艾德里，他提到了被遗落在八眼巨蛛洞穴中的一块传家宝怀表的事情。之前艾德里与他的朋友麦洛一起去了洞穴，想要从居住在那里的八眼巨蛛“逃贼”身上提取毒液。但麦洛并没能压制住强大的逃贼，反正还因此中了致命剧毒。在临终之际，麦洛希望埃德加能够将自己身上的怀表带给女儿，但当时惊慌失措的埃德加还没来得及拿上怀表就逃了出去。我应该试着帮助他们取回这份传家宝。逃贼洞窟位于霍格莫德西北面的禁林之中。出发去那里之前，我一定要确保自己已经做好了万全准备。
BEA_01_BeastsClass_Journal: I am to learn about different magical beasts in Beasts class.|野兽学课程将能教会我有关不同野兽的知识。
BEA_01_BeastsClass_QuestActive_StepJourn:
Professor Howin has asked me to brush Gerald the Puffskein. I should use the Beast Petting Brush that Poppy gave me.
皓莺教授要求我刷一下蒲绒绒杰拉德。我应该使用帕比给我的野兽抚刷。

Now I need to give Gerald the Puffskein some food. Poppy has given me some Beast Feed for him. 
现在我需要给蒲绒绒杰拉德喂点吃的。帕比为此给我提供了一些野兽饲料。

Now that I've finished with Gerald, it's time to move on to the Kneazles. I need to use the Beast Feed and Beast Petting Brush to feed and groom the Kneazles. 
现在杰拉德已经吃饱喝足，是时候把注意力转向猫狸子了。野兽饲料与野兽毛梳将允许我喂养以及打理猫狸子。
Now that class has ended, Professor Howin would like a word with me.|野兽学的课暂告一段落，皓莺教授好像有话要告诉我。
Poppy is calling me over. I should see what she wants. |帕比叫我过去。我应该看看她想要什么。

Poppy wants to show me something she says she hasn’t shown anyone else. I wonder what it could be – I should follow her.
帕比想要带我去看“某种东西”，还说从来没有带其他人去过。不知道到底是什么东西，还是先跟着她吧。

Poppy introduced me to a Hippogriff called Highwing. Now that I've bowed to show her respect, I should feed and brush her to show her I'm a friend. I better be careful of that beak, though. 
帕比带我认识了一头名叫“疾翼”的鹰马翼兽。我已经通过鞠躬表达了对她的尊重，现在我需要喂食和打理疾翼，让她明白我是她的朋友。不过最好还是要小心她的喙。
BEA_01_BeastsClass_QuestActive_TaskObj01: Brush the Puffskein |替蒲绒绒刷毛
BEA_01_BeastsClass_QuestActive_TaskObj03: Brush a Kneazle|替猫狸子刷毛
BEA_01_BeastsClass_QuestActive_TaskObj05: Speak with Professor Howin |与皓莺教授交谈
BEA_01_BeastsClass_QuestAvailable_Journa:
Professor Howin is teaching today’s class how to feed and care for magical beasts.
皓莺教授今天将会在课上指导大家喂食与照料魔法野兽。
BEA_01_BeastsClass_QuestAvailable_StepJo: I need to attend Beasts class, taught by Professor Howin.|我需要去参加皓莺教授负责的野兽学课程。
BEA_01_BeastsClass_QuestAvailable_TaskOb: Go to Beasts class|前往野兽学课程
BEA_01_BeastsClass_QuestComplete_Journal:
Today I attended Beasts class taught by Professor Howin where I learned to care for Puffskeins and Kneazles. Then I got to talking with Poppy Sweeting and together we prevented some unsavoury students from hurting the Kneazles. I must have gained Poppy's trust, because she led me to a nearby glade and introduced me to a Hippogriff named Highwing. I think I made two new friends today. 
今天在皓莺教授负责的野兽学课上，我学会了照顾蒲绒绒与猫狸子的方法。之后我跟帕比·斯威汀聊了几句，我们还一起阻止了几个想要伤害猫狸子的坏心眼学生。看来帕比已经信任我了，她带我去了附近的一处林地，还帮助我认识了一头名叫“疾翼”的鹰马翼兽。看来我今天多了“两位”新朋友。

BelgruffTheBludgeoner_desc:
Now known for his militant approach to goblin rights, Belgruff the Bludgeoner was once a peaceful member of the goblin rights movement. It is said that the taste of power he got being around Ranrok convinced him to change his ways.
虽然现在作为一名不惜付诸暴力的激进分子而臭名昭著，但棒槌贝格拉夫原本其实只是妖精权利运动中的一位温和派成员。据说是兰洛克让他品尝到了权利的滋味，才让贝格拉夫的心境发生了这种天翻地覆的改变。
Belladonna_desc:
Belladonna is a poisonous plant that is a common ingredient in potion-making. It is also known as Deadly Nightshade, as its berries and foliage are fatally toxic.
颠茄是一种剧毒植物，同时也是魔药制作过程中的一味常见原料。颠茄还被称为龙葵，这种植物的果实与叶片皆含有致命毒性。
Billywig_desc:
The Billywig is a bright blue insect with a sting that causes curious side effects.
比利威格是一种亮蓝色的昆虫，它的刺会引起奇妙的副作用。

BroomAeromancer_desc: A smooth ride that cuts through the air like a potioneer slicing ingredients |如同切割原料的魔药师一般游刃有余地划破天际
BroomBrightSpark_desc: Fly among the stars with a broom that celebrates them.|与星辰共舞的扫帚。
BroomDarkWizard1: Lavender Borealis Broom|熏衣草北极星扫帚
BroomDarkWizard1_desc:
A beautifully crafted broom that glides on the wind like rivers of light in the twilit northern sky
一把制作精美的扫帚，于风中滑行时，犹如北方暮色天空的光之河流
BroomDarkWizard2: Dark Lightning Broom|黑暗闪电扫帚
BroomDarkWizard2_desc:
A sleek, superior broom designed to celebrate those who dare to dabble in the Dark Arts
一把时尚且高级的扫帚，专为敢于涉猎黑魔法的人所设计
BroomEmberDash: Ember Dash Broom|余烬冲刺扫帚
BroomEmberDash_desc: The perfect broom for those with a fiery temperament|适合暴脾气的完美扫帚
BroomFamilyAntique: Family Antique Broom|家族古董扫帚
BroomFamilyAntique_desc: This heirloom broom has been passed down for generations.|这把传家宝扫帚经过了世代相传。
BroomFlyingClass1_desc: An old but reliable school broom|老旧却可靠的公用扫帚
BroomHouse: Hogwarts House Broom|霍格沃茨家用扫帚
BroomHouse_desc: A broom enchanted to celebrate your particular Hogwarts house pride|专为表达对你所在学院的自豪之情而制的魔法扫帚
BroomLicketySwift_desc: Designed with aerodynamics in mind, this broom will make travel a breeze.|设计时考虑到空气动力学，这把扫帚将使旅行变得轻而易举。
BroomMoonTrimmer_desc: Finely crafted from ash, this broom is built for stability.|这把扫帚由白蜡木精制而成，强调稳定性。
BROOMNIGHTDANCER: Night Dancer Broom|夜之舞者扫帚
BroomNightDancer_desc: A nimble broom with an impressive style|灵活的扫帚，有着令人印象深刻的风格
BroomPlatform_desc: Land your broom atop one of the landing platforms.|操纵扫帚降落在这些着陆平台上。
BroomRace_TimePenalty_Popup: {0} Missed Rings – {1}s Penalty| 错失{0}环- {1}秒惩罚
BroomRace_TimePenaltyHeader: Ring Missed Penalty x {0}|错失圆环惩罚 x
BroomSilverArrow: Silver Arrow Broom|白银之箭扫帚
BroomSilverArrow_desc:
Designed by the famous broom-maker Leonard Jewkes, this broom is perfect for handling the competition.
这把扫帚由著名的扫帚匠伦纳德·朱克斯所设计，非常适合应对比赛。
BroomSkinReward: Broom Appearance Reward|扫帚外观奖励
BroomSkyScythe: Sky Scythe Broom|天空之镰扫帚
BroomSkyScythe_desc:
An agile broom for the flyer who wants to look impressive when demonstrating their myriad skills
为那些想要在高空之上潇洒表演卓越技巧之人准备的灵活扫帚
BroomWildFire_desc: A broom that captures an untamed nature with a little spark|用一簇火花体现出自然之美的扫帚
BroomWindWisp_desc: A stylish broom with a light touch – quite literally|一款时尚且轻巧的扫帚
BroomYewWeaver: Yew Weaver Broom|紫杉编织扫帚
BroomYewWeaver_desc: A comfortable and speedy broom with a unique woven design|采用独特编织设计的扫帚，兼顾速度与舒适性
BRR_01: Quidditch Pitch Broom Trial|魁地奇球场扫帚试炼
BRR_02: Hogwarts South Broom Trial|霍格沃茨南方扫帚试炼
BRR_03: Coastal Broom Trial|沿海扫帚试炼
BRR_TimeTrials_NewBestTime: New Best Time|新的最佳时间
Bubotuber_Byproduct_desc:
Bubotuber pus is a thick, foul-smelling liquid extracted from a Bubotuber plant. The pus can cause skin irritations if mishandled.
巴波块茎脓水是一种从巴波块茎植物中提取的浓稠且恶臭的液体。如果处理不当，脓汁会引起皮肤刺激。
Butterflies_desc: A kaleidoscope of butterflies to follow|一群绚丽色彩的翩翩蝴蝶，你可以跟着走
Cairn_Dungeon_13_desc: An overgrown garden where Fwoopers tend to roost|经常受到恶婆鸟青睐的蔓生园林
Cairn_Dungeon_2_desc:
A tomb in the northwest Highlands near a giant rock face, close to a small hamlet
位于高地西北区域的一座墓穴，入口靠近那里的小村庄附近的高耸岩壁
Cairn_Dungeon_3: Feldcroft Catacomb|费德罗特地下墓穴
Cairn_Dungeon_3_desc: A catacomb full of secrets near Feldcroft|费德罗特附近的一处墓穴，里面隐藏着无数的秘密
Cairn_Dungeon_5: Dale Family Tomb|戴尔家族墓穴
Cairn_Dungeon_5_desc: Samantha Dale's family tomb located south of Hogwarts overlooking the water|萨曼莎·山姆的家族的墓穴，位于霍格沃茨以南俯视湖水之地
Cairn_Dungeon_8: The Collector’s Cave|收藏家的洞穴
Cairn_Dungeon_8_desc:
A cave containing the tomb of a witch known for collecting things that don't belong to her
潜藏在洞穴之中的，是一位生前喜欢搜刮不属于自己的东西的女巫的墓穴
CapturedCreature_desc: A rescued magical beast|获救的魔法野兽
CaptureDevice_desc: A charmed bag that can be used to rescue and hold beasts|一个可以用来拯救和容纳野兽的魔法袋子
CassiusWillardsey: Cassius Willardsey|卡西乌斯·威莱尔德西
CastBottomSpell: Use Bottom Action|使用下方动作
Castle_Dungeon_10: Henrietta's Hideaway|亨丽艾塔的藏身点
Castle_Dungeon_10_desc:
An old, abandoned home full of traps set by the previous owner to protect her wealth
一处早已被废弃的家园，里面全是许久以前的主人为了保护自己的财富而设下的致命陷阱
Castle_Dungeon_19_desc: An old, abandoned refuge|一处早已荒废的陈旧庇护所
Castle_Dungeon_1_desc: The ruins of an old castle in which goblins seem to have settled|一座古老城堡的废墟，现在已经成了妖精们的据点
CastLeftSpell: Use Left Action|使用左侧动作
CastRightSpell: Use Right Action|使用右侧动作
CastTopSpell: Use Top Action|使用上方动作
Category_Beast_desc: Magical beasts found in Beast Dens throughout the Highlands. Beasts can be rescued and then nurtured in the Room of Requirement once you unlock the nab-sack. 在遍布高地的野兽巢穴 ㉿ 中发现的魔法野兽。解锁“拿袋”后，可以在“有求必应屋”中解救野兽并进行培育。
Category_Beast_Subtitle: Magical and non-magical beasts|魔法和非魔法野兽
Category_Beasts_desc: Rescuable beasts you have encountered|你遇到的可解救的野兽
Category_Broom_desc:
Cosmetic alterations applied to your broom via the Gear Menu. Brooms can be earned in challenges, purchased in Hogsmeade, or bought from travelling vendors.
通过装备菜单对扫帚进行外观上的改造。扫帚可以在各种挑战中获得、在霍格莫德购买或从旅行商人处购买。
Category_Brooms_desc: Brooms you have collected|你已收集的扫帚
Category_CapturedCreatures_desc: Beasts you have rescued|你所拯救的野兽
Category_Character_desc: View your character and change your outfit and appearance|查看你的角色并更改你的服装与外观
Category_Completed_desc: Finalise your wand|完成你的魔杖
Category_Conjuration_desc: Decorations and gameplay stations conjured in the Room of Requirement. Conjuration spellcrafts can be found in collection chests and purchased in Hogsmeade. Some are also hidden near butterflies and in Vivariums. “有求必应屋”中的装饰性物件和可交互工作台。变幻幻术配方可以在收藏箱中找到，也可以在霍格莫德购买。有些还隐藏在蝴蝶附近 ㉿ 以及饲养所里。
Category_Conjurations_desc: Conjurations you have collected|你所收集的变幻
Category_coreoptions: Wand Core Options|魔杖杖芯选项
Category_Curriculum_desc: View your progress in your classes while at Hogwarts|查看你在霍格沃茨的课程进度
Category_Dungeons_desc: Explorable locations in the world|世界各地可探索的地点
Category_Enemies_desc: Enemies you have encountered|曾遭遇到的敌人
Category_Enemy_desc: Adversaries met during your adventures, or found in Enemy Lairs and Bandit Camps throughout the Highlands. Most enemies have hidden weaknesses against specific spells in your arsenal. 在冒险的途中你会遇到各种敌人，或在高地的各处发现敌人巢穴 ㉿ 及强盗营地 ㉿。大多数敌人对你招式中的特定法术都有隐藏的弱点。
Category_EnergyHealth: Energy and Health|能量和生命值
Category_Exploration_desc:
Field Guide Pages discovered with Revelio, that reveal interesting facts about the world around you. Revelio pages can be found in Hogwarts, Hogsmeade, and special Highlands locations.
使用“原形立现”所发现的实战指南书页，可揭示有关你周围世界的有趣事件。“原形立现”页面可以在霍格沃茨、霍格莫德和高地中某些特殊的地点找到。
Category_Explorations_desc: Field Guide Pages collected with Revelio|使用“原形立现”收集的实战指南书页
Category_Final: Name Your Character|为你的角色命名
Category_Gear_desc: Cosmetic alterations applied to gear via the Change Appearance option in the Gear Menu. Appearances in this list are rewards for special accomplishments such as challenges and quests. 通过“装备菜单”中的“更改外观”选项 ㉿，查看应用于装备的外观。该列表中的外观来自挑战和任务等特殊成就的奖励。
Category_Gears_desc: Appearances you have collected|你所收集的外观
Category_Hogsmeade_desc: The lore and locations of Hogsmeade|霍格莫德的典故及地点
Category_Hogwarts_desc: The lore and locations of Hogwarts|霍格沃茨的典故及地点
Category_Inventory_desc: The items you are carrying|你所携带的物品
Category_Overland_desc: The area surrounding Hogsmeade and Hogwarts|霍格莫德和霍格沃茨周围的地区
Category_Potion_desc:
Potions and magical plants that can be assigned to your Tool Wheel {ItemMenuButton}. Tools can be crafted at potion stations and potting tables after purchasing potion recipes and seed packets in Hogsmeade. Tools can also be purchased from vendors.
可将魔药和魔法植物分配至工具轮 。在霍格莫德购买魔药配方和种子包后，可在魔药台和园艺工作台制作工具。也可以从商人处购买。
Category_Potions_desc: Potions and magical plants you have collected|你所收集的魔药和魔法植物
Category_QuestItem_desc: Unique items collected on adventures|在冒险中所收集的独特物品
Category_saveload: Save/Load and Exit|保存/读取并退出
Category_Seed_desc:
Plants, forageables, and enemy drops primarily used to brew potions. Ingredients can be acquired by foraging, growing plants, and defeating enemies. Ingredients can also be purchased from vendors.
主要用于调制魔药的植物、可采集物和敌人掉落物。原料可以通过采集、种植植物和击败敌人来获得。也可以从商人处购买。
Category_Seeds_desc: Ingredients you have collected|你已收集的原料
Category_Trait_desc: Special attributes that may be applied to gear once the Loom is unlocked in the Room of Requirement. Traits can be found in collection chests at Bandit Camps throughout the Highlands. 在“有求必应屋”中解锁织布机后，可应用于装备的特殊属性。“特质”可以在遍布高地的强盗营地 ㉿ 的收藏箱中找到。
Category_Traits_desc: Traits you have collected|你所收集的特质
Category_Tutorial_desc: Learn basic skills and methods|学习基础技能及方法
Category_WandCore_desc: The rare material used as a wand core|构成魔杖核心的稀有材料
Category_WandFinalize_desc: Finalise Wand Selection|确认魔杖选择
Category_WandLength_desc:
Wand length is but one element to consider in wand composition. Longer wands, for example, might be a good fit for taller wizards, but tend to be drawn to those with a more dramatic style of magic.
魔杖长度只是构成的所有要素中要考虑的一个衡量标准。较长的魔杖可能适合高个子的巫师，但往往会被更戏剧化的魔法风格的人所吸引。
Category_Wands_desc: Wand handles you have collected|你已收集的魔杖握柄
Category_WandStyle_desc:
Cosmetic alterations applied to your wand via the Gear Menu. Wand handles are primarily found in collection chests throughout the world.
通过“装备菜单”对魔杖进行外观的改动。魔杖握柄主要出现在世界各地的收藏箱中。
Category_WoodType_desc: The type of wood composing the wand|组成魔杖的木材类型
CatrinHaggarty_desc:
Estranged from her brother Pádraic, a local shopkeeper, Catrin Haggarty turned to a life of petty thievery and tricks years ago. It wasn't until recently that she abandoned small scams for a chance at a bigger fortune with the Ashwinders.
在多年以前与经营店铺的兄弟帕德里克·海嘉缇决裂之后，凯特琳便走上了坑蒙拐骗的生涯。但是最近她已经放弃了原先的小打小闹，转而投向了火灰蛇党的怀抱。
CatrinHaggerty_desc:
Estranged from her brother Pádraic, a local shopkeeper, Catrin Haggarty turned to a life of petty thievery and tricks years ago. It wasn't until recently that she abandoned small scams for a chance at a bigger fortune with the Ashwinders.
在多年以前与经营店铺的兄弟帕德里克·海嘉缇决裂之后，凯特琳便走上了坑蒙拐骗的生涯。但是最近她已经放弃了原先的小打小闹，转而投向了火灰蛇党的怀抱。
Cauldron1_desc: A cauldron used to brew basic potions|炼药锅可用来调制基础魔药
Cauldron_Copper_Desc: A cauldron made from copper with a slow brewing time|使用红铜打造的炼药锅，调配时间较为漫长
Cauldron_Pewter_Desc:
A cauldron with a slow brewing time, recommended for first-year potions students
推荐刚接触魔药学的一年级生使用的炼药锅，调配魔药的速度较慢
Cav_Dungeon_03_desc: A cave in the Forbidden Forest that is teeming with arachnids|禁林中一处蜘蛛滋生的洞穴
Cav_Dungeon_05_desc: An abandoned mine near an overlook with an extraordinary number of spider webs|一座高台附近的废弃矿井，里面遍布着无数蛛网
Cav_Dungeon_06_desc: A cavern in an old goblin mine where a phoenix is rumoured to have been spotted|位于古老妖精矿井内部的洞穴，据说曾有人在这里目睹过凤凰的身姿
Cav_Dungeon_12_desc: A cavern in which one may harvest a good number of Horklumps|能够采摘到大量霍克拉普的洞穴
CAV_DUNGEON_12_EXIT: Horklump Hollow Exit|霍克拉普空心洞出口
Cavern_Dungeon_21: Mary Portman's Cellar|玛丽·波特曼家的地窖
Cavern_Dungeon_21_desc: A spider infested cellar below the home of Mary Portman|玛丽·波特曼的屋子的地下室，里面蜘蛛泛滥成灾
CAVERN_DUNGEON_26: The Rookwood Cellar|卢克伍德地下室
Cavern_Dungeon_26_desc: The cellar beneath Rookwood Castle|卢克伍德城堡的地下空间
Challenge_Combat_desc: Face dangerous foes and learn how to defend yourself against them|面对危险的敌人并学习如何保护自己免受其伤害
Challenge_Exploration_desc: Explore the world and discover its secrets|探索世界，发现其中的秘密
Challenge_LostPages_desc: Discover Field Guide Pages around the world |寻找世界各地的实战指南书页
Challenge_Quests_desc: Complete Quests to advance the story and make your mark on the world|完成任务以推进故事，并在世界留下自己的印记
Challenge_Sanctuary_desc: Cultivate your magical abilities in the Room of Requirement|通过在有求必应屋中培养你的魔法技能
CharlesRookwoodsMemories: Charles Rookwood's memories|查尔斯·卢克伍德的回忆
Charms_Desc:
Magic used to conjure various effects from the end of a wand or alter the properties of an object or individual
用于从魔杖末端变出各种效果或改变物体或个人属性的魔法
CharmsClass_desc: The class at Hogwarts focusing on the study of spells and charms|霍格沃茨这门课程主要研究咒语和魔咒
Chocolate_Frogs_desc: Chocolate moulded and enchanted to look and behave like a frog |由巧克力塑造并被施法，使其无论看起来还是行为上都像是一只青蛙
ChompingCabbage_Byproduct: Chinese Chomping Cabbage|中国咬人甘蓝
ChompingCabbage_Byproduct_desc:
Formidable chomping cabbages that when released attack nearby enemies. Chomping cabbage seeds can be purchased at Dogweed & Deathcap. Must be grown in medium or large pots.
极其生猛的咬人甘蓝，释放后将立即攻击附近的敌人。可以在“茱萸和毒菇”购买咬人甘蓝种子。只能在中型或大型花盆中种植。
ChompingCabbage_Plant: Chinese Chomping Cabbage|中国咬人甘蓝
ChompingCabbage_Plant_Desc:
Formidable chomping cabbages that when released attack nearby enemies. Chomping cabbage seeds can be purchased at Dogweed & Deathcap. Must be grown in medium or large pots.
极其生猛的咬人甘蓝，释放后将立即攻击附近的敌人。可以在“茱萸和毒菇”购买咬人甘蓝种子。只能在中型或大型花盆中种植。
ChompingCabbage_Seed: Chinese Chomping Cabbage Seed|中国咬人甘蓝种子
ChompingCabbage_Seed_Desc: Unlocks the ability to grow Chinese Chomping Cabbages in medium pots|解锁在中型花盆中种植中国咬人甘蓝的能力
ChompingCabbage_Vul: Vulnerable to Chinese Chomping Cabbages|无力抵抗中国咬人甘蓝
CillianHawksworth: Cillian Hawksworth|希里安·霍克斯沃斯
ClementineWillardsey: Clementine Willardsey|克莱蒙汀·威莱尔德西
CliffordCromwell: Clifford Cromwell|克利福德·克罗威尔
CNF_01: Depth of the Undercroft|地穴的深度
CNF_01_DepthoftheUndercroft_Progress_Jou:
I need to progress in my studies before meeting Sebastian near the Defence Against the Dark Arts Classroom
现在我得先把注意力放在学习上，之后才能去黑魔法防御术教室那里找塞巴斯蒂安。
CNF_01_DepthoftheUndercroft_QuestActive_:
Sebastian knows of a safe space in Hogwarts to practise unsanctioned spells, away from prying eyes. After he took the fall for me in the library, I'm glad to see he's all right.
塞巴斯蒂安说自己知道霍格沃茨中有一个隐蔽的地方，能够让我们在不被打扰的情况下练习“学校不教的咒语”。之前他在图书馆帮我背了黑锅，很高兴知道塞巴斯蒂安现在没事。

I can probably find Sebastian at his usual spot near the Defence Against the Dark Arts classroom.
我该去黑魔法防御术教室了，塞巴斯蒂安平常一直在那里。
Sebastian knows about a secret room where we can discuss things privately.|塞巴斯蒂安说自己知道一个秘密房间，我们可以在里面安心交流。
This room looks long-forgotten. I wonder what it was originally used for.|这个房间看起来早已被遗忘。我想知道它最初的用途是什么。
I wonder how Ominis found this place. Let’s see what Sebastian says.|我想知道奥米尼斯当初如何找到这个地方。来看看塞巴斯蒂安怎么说。

What a brilliant place to practise the Blasting Curse that Sebastian taught me. I'm glad he trusted me with this secret.
这个地方真是太适合用来练习塞巴斯蒂安教我的爆炸诅咒。我很高兴他愿意告诉我这个秘密。
Now that I've mastered Confringo, I should check back in with Sebastian.|现在我已经掌握了“霹雳爆炸”，该回去找塞巴斯蒂安了。

Sebastian said I can use the Undercroft any time I'd like, but I should be going for now – it's getting late.
塞巴斯蒂安说以后如果有需要我可以随时去玄廊，不过这次就算了吧，看着天色有点晚了。
Meet Sebastian|与塞巴斯蒂安会面
Enter the secret room|进入密室
Talk to Sebastian|与塞巴斯蒂安交谈
Practise casting Confringo|练习施展“霹雳爆炸”
Check back with Sebastian|返回塞巴斯蒂安那边
CNF_01_DepthoftheUndercroft_QuestAvailab:
I should find Sebastian and learn what happened after he was caught by the librarian the night we sneaked into the Restricted Section. He covered for me and I hope the consequences weren't severe.
我得设法找到塞巴斯蒂安，之前潜入禁书区的那晚，不知道他被图书管理员抓住后发生了什么。他是为了我才会被逮到的，希望不会因此受到严厉惩罚。

I need to follow up with Sebastian and find out what happened in the Restricted Section.
我得找塞巴斯蒂安跟进一下，不知道后来禁书区里面到底发生了什么。

I need to progress in my studies before meeting Sebastian near the Defence Against the Dark Arts Classroom
现在我得先把注意力放在学习上，之后才能去黑魔法防御术教室那里找塞巴斯蒂安。
CNF_01_DepthoftheUndercroft_QuestComplet:
Sebastian showed me a hidden room called 'the Undercroft' where we could talk privately and I shared with him a bit of information about my ancient magic abilities. I'm still unsure how much to trust him. Sebastian also taught me the Blasting Curse, Confringo. The Undercroft is a great place to practise spells. I can see why Sebastian wants to keep it a secret. 
塞巴斯蒂安向我展示了一个名为“地穴”的密室，而我们可以在那里私下交谈，我与他分享了一些关于我古代魔法技能的内容。我仍然不确定能够多信任他。塞巴斯蒂安还教我爆炸诅咒“霹雳爆炸”。地穴是练习咒语的好地方。我能理解塞巴斯蒂安想把这个地方当作秘密的原因。

Sebastian showed me a hidden room called ‘the Undercroft’ where we could talk privately. I finally told him the truth about my ability to see traces of ancient magic. In return, Sebastian taught me the Blasting Curse, Confringo. The Undercroft is a great place to practise spells; I can see why Sebastian wants to keep it a secret.
塞巴斯蒂安带我去了一个被称作“玄廊”的秘密房间，在里面我们可以不被打扰的安心交流。在玄廊里，我终于决定将自己能够看见古代魔法踪迹一事告诉了塞巴斯蒂安。塞巴斯蒂安也“礼尚往来”，教会了我爆炸诅咒“霹雳爆炸”。玄廊确实是安心练习咒语的绝佳选择，难怪塞巴斯蒂安之前搞得那么神秘。
CNF_01_InTheShadowOfTheUndercroft_QuestT: In the Shadow of the Undercroft|地穴的暗影
CNF_01_LighthouseSubGoal: Learn a curse with Sebastian|向塞巴斯蒂安学习一种诅咒
CoastalRegion_desc:
The coastline is defined by its proximity to the rocky sea. Once home to a prominent wizarding family and industry, the coastline has seen a steady decline since the family's mysterious disappearance. River trolls and Dugbogs are known to inhabit the coastline.
海岸线的定义是指其与多岩石之海的距离。这曾经是一个著名的巫师家庭和行业的所在地，但自从这个家庭神秘失踪以来，海岸线就一直在逐步下降。众所皆知，河流巨怪和泥怪栖息在海岸线上。
Colorblind_HighContrast: High Contrast Gameplay|高对比游戏性
ColorblindHighContrast: Colour Blind High Contrast |色盲高对比度
COM_01_BraggingRights_Journal01:
I should search the grounds around the Herbology wing for the entrance to the Hidden Herbology Corridor.
草药学暗廊的入口应该就在草药学厅附近，我得仔细搜索一下那一块的庭院。
COM_01_BraggingRights_Journal02:
I need to find something from the Hidden Herbology Corridor that Duncan can use to make him look brave to his classmates.
我需要拿到草药学暗廊确实存在的“证据”，好帮助邓肯竖立起他在同学们眼中的勇敢形象。
COM_01_BraggingRights_Journal03:
A leaf from that giant Venomous Tentacula should make Duncan look brave enough. Now to collect it without losing a limb.
巨大毒触手的一片叶子应该能让邓肯看起来够勇敢。现在，在不失去肢体的前提下收集它。
COM_01_BraggingRights_Journal04:
I should return to Duncan and see how he reacts to this Venomous Tentacula leaf. It was trouble to collect it, so I’m not entirely sure I want to give it to him.
我应该回到邓肯那里，看看他对这片毒触手叶子有何反应。费了好大番功夫才拿到，所以我并不确定是否真的想把叶子给他。
COM_01_BraggingRights_QuestAvailable_Jou:
Duncan Hobhouse seems to have a Puffskein problem. I wonder If I can help him out.
邓肯·霍博豪斯好像遇到蒲绒绒问题。我在想是否能帮助他。
COM_01_BraggingRights_QuestAvailable_Tas: Talk to Duncan Hobhouse|与邓肯·霍博豪斯交谈
COM_01_BraggingRights_QuestComplete_Jour:
I gave Duncan Hobhouse the Venomous Tentacula leaf that I collected, but I doubt it will convince his classmates of his bravery. Duncan needs to face his fears. Once he does, he’ll learn the lesson Professor Hecat was teaching with the Boggart.
我把收集到的毒触手叶子交给了邓肯·霍博豪斯，但我怀疑这会让他的同学相信他很勇敢。邓肯需要面对自己的恐惧。只要这样做了，他就能学会赫卡特教授利用博格特所教授的课程。

I decided not to give the Venomous Tentacula leaf to Duncan Hobhouse. I didn’t feel right enabling his lie. Duncan needs to face his fears. Once he does, he’ll learn the lesson Professor Hecat was teaching with the Boggart.
我决定不要把收集到的毒触手叶子交给邓肯·霍博豪斯。我不想帮他撒谎。邓肯需要面对自己的恐惧。只要这样做了，他就能学会赫卡特教授利用博格特所教授的课程。
COM_01_BraggingRights_TaskObj01: Find and enter the Hidden Herbology Corridor|找到隐藏草药学暗廊并进入其中
COM_01_BraggingRights_TaskObj02: Obtain Proof for Duncan|为邓肯取得证据
COM_01_BraggingRights_TaskObj03: Collect a Giant Venomous Tentacula leaf|收集一片巨大毒触手叶子
COM_01_BraggingRights_TaskObj04: Return to Duncan|返回邓肯那边
Com_01_Location_HiddenCorridor: This room looks long-forgotten. I wonder what it was originally used for.|这个房间看上去已经彻底荒废。不知道以前是用来做什么的地方。
COM_01_MissionJournal:
While learning to repel Boggarts in Professor Hecat’s class, Duncan Hobhouse became a laughingstock when his turned into a Puffskein. To save face, he lied and claimed he’s been in a hidden corridor in the Herbology wing that is overgrown with dangerous magical plants – and now his classmates want proof. He’s asked if I would venture inside and bring back something that will support his claim and make him appear brave.
在赫卡特教授的课堂上学习击退博格特时，邓肯·霍博豪斯因将其变成蒲绒绒而成了笑柄。为了挽回面子，他撒谎并声称曾前往草药学区的一座隐藏走廊，且那里长满了危险的魔法植物。现在他的同学想要证据。他问我是否愿意冒险进入其中，并带回一些东西来支持他的主张并让他显得勇敢。
COM_02_01_MissionComplete_LenoraConceal_:
I told Lenora that I solved the mystery of the empty painting, but, to her ire, I chose not to tell her how I did it. I thought she'd rather figure it out herself. I suspect more of these paintings may be in the castle so I should keep my eyes open.
我告诉里诺拉我解开了那幅空画的谜团，但令她愤怒的是，我选择不告诉她我是怎么做到的。我以为她宁愿自己想出答案。我猜城堡里可能有更多这类型的画，因此我得睁大眼睛。
COM_02_01_MissionComplete_LenoraReveal_J:
I spoke to Lenora and told her how I solved the mystery of the empty painting. She was disappointed that she didn’t work it out herself, but was glad the puzzle was solved. I suspect more of these paintings may be in the castle so I should keep my eyes open.
我和里诺拉交谈，并告诉她我是如何解开这幅空画之谜。她很失望并不是自己找出答案，但很高兴这个难题获得解决。我猜城堡里可能有更多这类型的画，因此我得睁大眼睛。
COM_02_01_StepJournal:
Lenora mentioned that the painting revealed a clue when she cast Lumos near it. Perhaps I should try that myself.
里诺拉提到，她在这幅画附近施展“荧光闪烁”时，画并揭露了一道线索。也许我应该自己试试。
COM_02_01_StepTask: Discover the painting’s secret|发现画的秘密
COM_02_01a_StepJournal:
Lenora mentioned a mysterious painting to me. Perhaps I should investigate it and see if I can discover any clues.
里诺拉提到了一份神秘的绘画。也许我该去调查一番，说不定能找到什么线索。
COM_02_01b_StepJournal:
Lenora mentioned that the painting revealed a clue when she cast Lumos near it. Perhaps I should try that myself.
里诺拉提到说“荧光闪烁”能够揭示绘画的线索。也许我该效仿她的做法。
COM_02_02_StepJournal:
The painting revealed an image of what appears to be a location in the Central Hall. I should search the area to see if I can find it.
这幅画展示了一幅似乎是主厅的图像。我应该搜索该地区，看看我能不能找到它。
COM_02_02_StepTask: Find the location depicted in the painting|找到画中描绘的位置
COM_02_03_StepJournal:
I believe I have found the location depicted in the painting. Strangely enough, a moth that looks strikingly like the ones carved into the picture frame is embedded in the wall here. I wonder if there’s a way to dislodge it and bring it back to the painting.
我认为已找到画中描绘的位置。奇怪的是，这里的墙壁上嵌着一只飞蛾，与雕刻在画框上的飞蛾极为相似。我想知道是否有办法将它移开并将其带回绘画中。
COM_02_03_StepTask: Return the moth to the painting|将飞蛾带回画
COM_02_04_StepJournal:
I should let Lenora Everleigh know that I’ve solved the mystery of the painting.
我应该把自己已经解开空画框之谜的消息带给里诺拉·艾弗利。
COM_02_04_StepTask: Talk to Lenora Everleigh|与里诺拉·艾弗利交谈
COM_02_05_StepJournal:
Lenora Everleigh appears to be looking for a clue. Perhaps I can help her investigate.
里诺拉·艾弗利似乎在寻找某种“线索”。也许我可以帮助她一起调查。
COM_02_FrameOfMind_01__QuestAvailable_Ta: Speak with Lenora Everleigh|与里诺拉·艾弗利交谈
COM_02_FrameOfMind_01_QuestAvailableJour:
Lenora Everleigh appears to be looking for a clue. Perhaps I can help her investigate.
里诺拉·艾弗利似乎正在寻找线索。或许我可以帮她调查一下。
COM_02_LikeAMothtoaFrame_QuestTitle: Like a Moth to a Frame|飞蛾扑了个框
COM_02a_QuestActive_Journal:
Lenora mentioned a mysterious painting to me. Perhaps I should investigate it and see if I can discover any clues.
里诺拉提到了一份神秘的绘画。也许我该去调查一番，说不定能找到什么线索。
COM_02b_QuestActive_Journal:
Lenora mentioned that the painting revealed a clue when she cast Lumos near it. Perhaps I should try that myself.
里诺拉提到说“荧光闪烁”能够揭示绘画的线索。也许我该效仿她的做法。
COM_03_CacheInTheCastle_QuestTitle: Cache in the Castle|城堡中的贮藏
COM_03_MissionJournal:
I saw Arthur Plummly outside of Charms class studying two treasure maps he’d found. Arthur's an avid history student and is excited to uncover any Hogwarts secrets. He asked if I'd care to have a look at one of the maps. I told him I'd see what I can find.
我看到亚瑟·普拉姆利在魔咒学教室外研究他发现的两张藏宝图。亚瑟是一名狂热的历史学生，且很兴奋揭开霍格沃茨的任何秘密。他问我是否愿意看看其中一张地图。我告诉他，我会看看能找到些什么。
COM_03_TreasureHunt_Journal01:
The first clue shows a rhinoceros skeleton on display. I know I must have walked by that at least a dozen times. Now if only I could remember where it is.
第一道线索显示出一个犀牛骨架。我铁定经过它至少十几次。要是我现在能想起来确切位置就好了。
COM_03_TreasureHunt_Journal02:
It looks as if I’m supposed to find a dragon fountain. The tree in the background makes me think that it’s in a courtyard. A door behind it has been circled.
看样子我应该找到一个龙泉。背景中的树让我觉得它会在院子里。它后面的一扇门被圈起来了。
COM_03_TreasureHunt_Journal03:
It seems from Arthur's Treasure Map that once I’ve exited the courtyard, I should look for a stairwell going up.
从亚瑟的宝藏地图上看，我在走出院子后，应该寻找一个向上的楼梯间。
COM_03_TreasureHunt_Journal04:
The final clue shows a painting with a ring at the top. I should search the area; I have a feeling it's nearby.
最后一道线索显示一幅顶端有环的画。我应该搜索该地区；我感觉它就在附近。
COM_03_TreasureHunt_Journal05:
This painting is hiding something. Arthur's Treasure Map suggests a bit of magic may be needed to reveal its secret.
这幅画里面绝对藏着秘密。根据亚瑟找到的藏宝图，也许需要利用魔法的帮助才能让其中的秘密“现身”。
COM_03_TreasureHunt_Journal06: I should let Arthur know that I solved the secret of the treasure map.|我已经解开了藏宝图的秘密，现在我需要回去把这个消息告诉亚瑟。
COM_03_TreasureHunt_Journal08:
I saw Arthur Plummly studying two treasure maps he had found. I should see if he needs any help.
我无意间瞥见亚瑟·普拉姆利在研究自己找到的两份藏宝图。也许他会需要帮助。
COM_03_TreasureHunt_QuestAvailable_Journ:
I saw Arthur Plummly studying two treasure maps he had found. I should see if he needs any help.
我无意间瞥见亚瑟·普拉姆利在研究自己找到的两份藏宝图。也许他会需要帮助。
COM_03_TreasureHunt_QuestAvailable_TaskO: Talk to Arthur Plummly|和亚瑟·普拉姆利交谈
COM_03_TreasureHunt_QuestComplete_Journa:
I followed the clues on Arthur's Treasure Map to a secret alcove camouflaged as a painting. I opened it with Accio. Hogwarts contains a seemingly infinite supply of surprises and mysteries waiting to be discovered. I hope I uncover more of them during my time here.
我顺着亚瑟藏宝图上的线索来到一个伪装成画作的秘密壁龛。我用飞来咒打开它。霍格沃茨似乎有无穷无尽的惊喜和谜团等待被发现。我希望我在这里的时间能发现更多。
COM_03_TreasureHunt_TaskObj01: Find the first landmark from Arthur's Treasure Map|找到亚瑟的宝藏地图中的第一个地标
COM_03_TreasureHunt_TaskObj02: Find the second landmark from Arthur's Treasure Map|找到亚瑟的宝藏地图中的第二个地标
COM_03_TreasureHunt_TaskObj03: Find the third landmark from Arthur's Treasure Map|找到亚瑟的宝藏地图中的第三个地标
COM_03_TreasureHunt_TaskObj04: Find the painting from Arthur's Treasure Map|找到亚瑟的宝藏地图中的画
COM_03_TreasureHunt_TaskObj05: Discover the painting’s secret|发现画的秘密
COM_03_TreasureHunt_TaskObj06: Return to Arthur Plummly|返回亚瑟·普拉姆利那边
COM_04_04_StepJournal_01:
Cressida’s books, including her diary, are flying around the library. I need to collect all five of them for her.
奎西达的书，包括她的日记，都在图书馆里飞来飞去。我需要为她取回所有五本。
COM_04_04_StepJournal_02:
I’ve collected all of Cressida Blume’s flying books. I should return them to her in the Central Hall.
我取回了奎西达·布鲁姆所有飞行的书。我应该在主厅把它们还给她。
COM_04_BookIt_CollectBooks_Task: Collect Cressida's flying books from the library ({0}/{1})|在图书馆收集奎西达的“飞天书本”
COM_04_BookIt_Journal:
Cressida Blume was attempting a new charm to make her books easier to carry, but she used the Latin word for ‘bird’ instead of ‘feather’ and now her books have taken flight in the library. She's already in hot water with Madam Scribner and needs someone less conspicuous to recover her flying books.
奎西达·布鲁姆当初在尝试一种新的魔咒，想让她的书更容易携带，但她用了拉丁语中的“鸟”而不是“羽毛”，而现在她的书在图书馆里飞来飞去。她和史克里布纳夫人的关系已经不怎么好，因此需要一个不那么引人注目的人来取回她的飞行书。
COM_04_BookIt_MissionComplete_Journal:
I was able to retrieve Cressida Blume’s errant books using Accio. Fortunately, plenty of other objects were flying around the library, so I don’t think Madam Scribner noticed them. Cressida was happy to have them back and has vowed to find a safer place to practise her experimental magic.
我成功使用“飞来咒”取回奎西达·布鲁姆乱飘的书籍。很幸运，图书馆周围有很多其他物品飞来飞去，所以我认为史克里布纳夫人没有注意到。奎西达很高兴能把书拿回来，并誓言要找到一个更安全的地方来练习她的实验魔法。
COM_04_BookIt_QuestAvailable_Journal: Cressida Blume has a lofty problem with her literature.|奎西达·布鲁姆似乎难以“驾驭”自己手上的文学作品。
COM_04_BookIt_ReturnBooks_Task: Return the books to Cressida|将书本还给奎西达
COM_04_BookIt_TalktoCressida_task: Talk to Cressida|与奎西达交谈
COM_04_FlyingOfftheShelves_QuestTitle: Flying off the Shelves|飞离书架
COM_05_01_StepJournal:
Students have hidden Zenobia Noke's Gobstones out of her reach around the castle. She needs help retrieving them.
其他学生把詹诺比亚·诺克的高布石藏在了城堡各处。她一个人没办法够到那些石头，所以需要我的帮助。
COM_05_01_StepTask: Find Zenobia's Gobstones ({0}/{1})|找到詹诺比亚的高布石
COM_05_01_StepTitle: I found all of Zenobia's Gobstones. I should return to her.|我找到了詹诺比亚所有的高布石。我应该回到她那边。
COM_05_02_StepJournal: Return to Zenobia Noke.|回去找詹诺比亚·诺克。
COM_05_02_StepTask:
I spoke with Zenobia Noke and she wants me to retrieve her stolen Gobstones for her
和詹诺比亚·诺克交谈过后，她表示希望我帮忙找回失窃的高布石
COM_05_02_StepTitle:
Now that I’ve retrieved her Gobstones, I should return to Zenobia. She was last near the Defence Against the Dark Arts classroom.
我已经取回了所有高布石，是时候回去找詹诺比亚了。记得上一次看见她是在黑魔法防御术教室附近。
COM_05_GobsofGobstones_QuestActive_Journ:
I encountered a precocious Zenobia Noke near the stairs to the Defence Against the Dark Arts class. Apparently, she brought her prized Gobstone collection to school and managed to make a big enough stink that her housemates took the Gobstones and hid them around the castle out of her reach. She asked if I would retrieve them for her and I said that I would – if nothing else, it gives me an excuse to explore more of Hogwarts.
我在通往黑魔法防御术教室的楼梯旁见到了早熟的詹诺比亚·诺克。据詹诺比亚自己所说，她之前将自己珍藏的高布石带来了学校，只是高布石喷洒出的难闻臭汁使得其他同学苦不堪言，最后甚至不惜抢走了詹诺比亚的高布石，并且藏在了城堡里她够不到的高处。现在詹诺比亚希望我来帮她把高布石找回来，我答应了她的请求，不管怎么说，我正好可以借着这机会探索霍格沃茨的其他地方。
COM_05_GobsofGobstones_QuestActive_StepJ:
Zenobia’s Gobstones are hidden around the castle. She said that the other students hid them out of her reach. They must have used magic to do it.
詹诺比亚的高布石被藏在了城堡各个角落。她说其他学生把高布石藏在了“够不到的高处”。想必一定是借助了魔法的力量。

Now that I’ve retrieved her Gobstones, I should return to Zenobia. She was last near the Defence Against the Dark Arts classroom. 
现在我已经取回了她的高布石，我应该返回詹诺比亚那边。她上次是在黑魔法防御术教室的附近。
COM_05_GobsofGobstones_QuestActive_TaskO: Find Zenobia's Gobstones ({0}/{1})|找到詹诺比亚的高布石
Return to Zenobia|返回詹诺比亚那边
COM_05_GobsofGobstones_QuestAvailable_St: Zenobia Noke is fretting over her missing Gobstones.|詹诺比亚·诺克因为自己的高布石失踪而忧心忡忡。
COM_05_GobsofGobstones_QuestAvailable_Ta: Talk to Zenobia Noke|与詹诺比亚·诺克交谈
COM_05_GobsofGobstones_QuestComplete_Kee:
I'd intended to return Zenobia Noke’s Gobstones to her, but at the last moment I realised that doing so wouldn't exactly put me in favour with potential new friends at Hogwarts. Her housemates went to a lot of effort to hide those Gobstones, so they must have been angry with her. If I return them and there are further issues, I’ll be the one they blame.
虽然原本打算将高布石还给詹诺比亚·诺克，但是在最后一刻我改变了主意：如果这么做，也许会和詹诺比亚一样招致我在霍格沃茨的“潜在新朋友们”的嫌弃。考虑到她的学院同学们为了藏起这些高布石所做出的努力，他们肯定是对詹诺比亚有着很大的怨气。要是把石头还回去之后又惹出了新的麻烦，他们肯定会把气撒到我的头上。
COM_05_GobsofGobstones_QuestComplete_Ret:
I managed to find all of Zenobia Noke’s Gobstones and returned them to her. She was grateful enough, but I’m suddenly wondering if giving them back to her was a good idea. If her housemates were angry enough to hide her Gobstones, they might not be so happy with me for giving them back. Perhaps I should have minded my own business.
我成功找到了詹诺比亚的所有高布石，并且将它们还给了她。她对我十分感激，就是不知道让这些石头“物归原主”是不是正确的决定。如果她的行为让学院的其他同学气到不惜把她的高布石藏起来，那有可能他们也会对找回石头的我有所不满。考虑到这一点，也许我就不应该多管闲事。
COM_05_LeviosoPuzzles_Journal01: Zenobia Noke is fretting over her missing Gobstones.|詹诺比亚·诺克因为自己的高布石失踪而忧心忡忡。
COM_05_LeviosoPuzzles_Journal02: Talk to Zenobia Noke.|与詹诺比亚·诺克交谈。
COM_05_LeviosoPuzzles_QuestAvailable_Jou: Zenobia Noke is fretting over her missing Gobstones.|詹诺比亚·诺克因为自己的高布石失踪而忧心忡忡。
COM_05_LeviosoPuzzles_QuestComplete_Jour:
I encountered a precocious girl called Zenobia Noke near the stairs to the Defence Against the Dark Arts classroom. Apparently, she brought her prized Gobstone collection to school and managed to make such a scene that her housemates took the Gobstones and hid them all around the castle out of her reach. She's asked if I'd retrieve them. I said I might. If nothing else, it gives me an excuse to explore more of Hogwarts.
我在通往黑魔法防御术教室的楼梯旁见到了老气横秋的女孩詹诺比亚·诺克。据詹诺比亚自己所说，她之前将自己珍藏的高布石带来了学校，只是高布石喷洒出的难闻臭汁使得其他同学苦不堪言，最后甚至不惜抢走了詹诺比亚的高布石，并且藏在了城堡里她够不到的高处。詹诺比亚问我愿不愿意帮忙寻找自己的石头。我表示自己会考虑。无论如何，至少我可以借着这种机会探索霍格沃茨的其他地方。

I'd intended to return Zenobia Noke’s Gobstones to her, but at the last moment I realised that doing so wouldn't exactly put me in favour with potential new friends at Hogwarts. Her housemates went to a lot of effort to hide those Gobstones, so they must have been angry with her. If I return them and there are further issues, I’ll be the one they blame.
虽然原本打算将高布石还给詹诺比亚·诺克，但是在最后一刻我改变了主意：如果这么做，也许会和詹诺比亚一样招致我在霍格沃茨的“潜在新朋友们”的嫌弃。考虑到她的学院同学们为了藏起这些高布石所做出的努力，他们肯定是对詹诺比亚有着很大的怨气。要是把石头还回去之后又惹出了新的麻烦，他们肯定会把气撒到我的头上。
COM_05_MissionJournal:
I encountered a precocious girl called Zenobia Noke near the stairs to the Defence Against the Dark Arts classroom. Apparently, she brought her prized Gobstone collection to school and managed to make such a scene that her housemates took the Gobstones and hid them all around the castle out of her reach. She's asked if I'd retrieve them. I said I might. If nothing else, it gives me an excuse to explore more of Hogwarts.
我在通往黑魔法防御术教室的楼梯旁见到了老气横秋的女孩詹诺比亚·诺克。据詹诺比亚自己所说，她之前将自己珍藏的高布石带来了学校，只是高布石喷洒出的难闻臭汁使得其他同学苦不堪言，最后甚至不惜抢走了詹诺比亚的高布石，并且藏在了城堡里她够不到的高处。詹诺比亚问我愿不愿意帮忙寻找自己的石头。我表示自己会考虑。无论如何，至少我可以借着这种机会探索霍格沃茨的其他地方。
COM_07_01_PubDreams_Complete_Journal_Opt:
After far more time than I'd bargained for, I brought Billywig stings from Honeydukes’s cellar to Garreth. He was more than elated and promised to share with me his next batch of brew as a thank you. While this was more work than I had thought initially, I was able to explore a secret passageway to Hogsmeade, collect a few things along the way, and keep Garreth out of trouble.
费了好大功夫之后，我终于帮加雷斯拿到了蜂蜜公爵地窖中存放的比利威格蛰刺。欢欣鼓舞的加雷斯允诺说作为谢礼，他将第一时间与我分享自己的下一批“成果”。虽然几经周折，我也算是找到了一条从学校直达霍格莫德的密道，而且我不光是在这期间找到了一些有用的东西，我还帮忙解决了加雷斯的烦恼。

Gathering Billywig stings from Honeydukes’s cellar for Garreth took more effort than he'd let on, so I required payment before handing them over. To my surprise, Garreth was happy to oblige and promised to share with me his next batch of brew as a thank you. While this was more work than I'd anticipated, I was able to explore a secret passageway to Hogsmeade, collect a few things along the way, and keep Garreth out of trouble.
加雷斯之前并没有说明为了拿到蜂蜜公爵地窖里面的比利威格蛰刺需要经历多少麻烦，所以我决定在把蛰刺交出去之前先要求他支付相应的报酬。让我没想到的是，加雷斯答应了我的条件，并且允诺说作为谢礼，他将第一时间与我分享自己的下一批“成果”。虽然几经周折，我也算是找到了一条从学校直达霍格莫德的密道，而且不光是在这期间找到了一些有用的东西，我还帮忙解决了加雷斯的烦恼。

COM_07_01_PubDreams_FollowPassage_Task3: Explore the secret passage|探索秘密通道
COM_07_01_PubDreams_GrabCandyReturn_Task: Find a way out of the secret passage|找到秘密通道的出路
COM_07_01_PubDreams_Password_Task2b: Open the one-eyed witch statue|开启独眼女巫雕像
COM_07_01_PubDreams_Return_Task6: Return to Garreth|返回加雷斯那边
COM_07_01_PubDreams_TalkToGarreth_Task1: Talk to Garreth Weasley|与加雷斯·韦斯莱交谈
COM_07_01_PubDreams_Whizzbees_Task5: Find the Billywig stings|找到比利威格螫针
COM_07_PubDreams_JournalUpdate_Task2:
Garreth mentioned the statue of the one-eyed witch is in the third-floor corridor.
加雷斯提到的独眼女巫雕像就在三楼走廊。
COM_07_PubDreams_JournalUpdate_Task2b:
Garreth said that I needed to tap the statue with my wand and say, ‘Dissendium.’
加雷斯说我需要用魔杖叩击雕像并说出“左右分离”四个字。
COM_07_PubDreams_JournalUpdate_Task3:
I’ve managed to enter the passageway behind the one-eyed witch statue. Now to see where it leads.
我设法进入了独眼女巫雕像后面的通道。现在看看这通往哪里。
COM_07_PubDreams_JournalUpdate_Task4:
I’ve reached what appears to be a dead end in the secret passage. There must be a way through.
密道的尽头看似死路一条。不可能，肯定还有过去的方法。
COM_07_PubDreams_JournalUpdate_Task5:
I worked out how to open the hidden door from the secret passage to Honeydukes’s cellar. Now to find those Billywig stings.
我设法打开了密道里的暗门，可以自由进入蜂蜜公爵的地窖了。现在只需要找到那些比利威格蛰刺即可。
COM_07_PubDreams_JournalUpdate_Task6:
I managed to find the Billywig stings that Garreth mentioned were in Honeydukes’s cellar. Now to bring them to him.
我在蜂蜜公爵的地窖里面成功找到了加雷斯需要的比利威格蛰刺。现在是时候回去找他了。
COM_07_PubDreams_MissionJournal:
Garreth Weasley needs Billywig stings for his next brew but his aunt, Professor Weasley, won’t let him go to Hogsmeade since she’s convinced he's neglecting his studies. He suggested I collect what he needs from Honeydukes's cellar, which I can access via a secret passageway behind a statue of a one-eyed witch in the third-floor corridor. To open the statue, I’m supposed to tap it with my wand and say, ‘Dissendium.' This does seem an excellent opportunity to explore Hogwarts.
加雷斯·韦斯莱的下一批饮料需要用到比利威格蛰刺，但是作为他的姑姑，韦斯莱教授不允许加雷斯前往霍格莫德，因为她认为这会使得加雷斯无法专心学习。因为这个原因，加雷斯希望我能够帮忙前往蜂蜜公爵的地窖寻找他需要的东西，他还跟我说，三楼走廊的一尊独眼女巫雕像背后隐藏着直通蜂蜜公爵的秘密通道。为了开启密道，我需要用魔杖叩击雕像并说出“左右分离”四个字。也许这是个探索霍格沃茨的好机会。
COM_07_PubDreams_QuestAvailable_Journal: It appears that Garreth Weasley wants to speak with me.|加雷斯·韦斯莱似乎在找我。
COM_08_AFriendInDeed_QuestTitle: A Friend In Deed|真正的朋友
COM_08_ItTakesAVillage_Journal01:
I need to travel to Upper Hogsfield and speak with Dorothy Sprottle about her Horklump needs and ask her about Sirona's box of letters. I believe I can find her in the hamlet north of Hogsmeade.
我需要前往上霍格米村，并与桃乐丝·史波拉特谈谈她对霍克拉普的需求，以及询问她关于希罗纳信件盒的事情。我认为能在霍格莫德以北的小村庄找到她。
COM_08_ItTakesAVillage_Journal02:
I need to find the entrance to the cavern Mrs Sprottle mentioned. It looks like it may be in the hills southwest of Upper Hogsfield.
我需要找到史波拉特夫人提到的洞穴入口。看起来可能位于上霍格米村西南方的山丘上。
COM_08_ItTakesAVillage_Journal03:
I found the cavern Mrs Sprottle mentioned. I now need to search for Horklumps, which I think resemble fleshy pink mushrooms covered in black bristles, and Sirona's box of letters. 
我找到了史波拉特夫人提到的洞穴。希罗纳的信件盒应该就在里面，除此以外我还需要留意那些外形像是长满黑毛的肥硕粉菌的霍克拉普。
COM_08_ItTakesAVillage_Journal04:
After finding the cavern Mrs Sprottle mentioned, I now need to search for Sirona's box of letters.
找到史波拉特夫人提到的洞穴后，我现在需要寻找希罗纳的信件盒。
COM_08_ItTakesAVillage_Journal05:
Getting past that cave troll was no easy task, but I managed to get the box of letters. Now I can return them to Sirona.
越过那个洞穴巨怪并非易事，但我设法拿到了那盒信。现在我可以把它们还给希罗纳了。
COM_08_ItTakesAVillage_QuestAvailable_Jo:
Sirona, the proprietress of the Three Broomsticks in Hogsmeade, sent me an owl requesting I meet with her at my earliest convenience. I should find out what she needs.
希罗纳是霍格莫德中三把扫帚酒馆的老板，她给我寄了封猫头鹰信，想要我尽快去找她。看来我需要找机会和希罗纳见上一面。

Sirona, the proprietress of the Three Broomsticks in Hogsmeade, sent me an owl requesting I meet with her at my earliest convenience.
希罗纳是霍格莫德中三把扫帚酒馆的老板，她给我寄了封猫头鹰信，想要我尽快去找她。
COM_08_ItTakesAVillage_QuestAvailable_Ta: Talk to Sirona Ryan in the Three Broomsticks|去三把扫帚酒吧与希罗纳·瑞安交谈
COM_08_ItTakesAVillage_QuestComplete_Jou:
I restocked Dorothy Sprottle’s supply of Horklumps and collected Sirona's box of letters – which would have been a much easier task if a troll hadn’t taken up residency in the cavern. He gave me a bit of trouble, but I managed to sort it out. Now Mrs Sprottle can get back to brewing potions to help keep the local vendors safe, and Sirona can have the letters the Sprottles were sending her.
我补充了桃乐丝·史波拉特的霍克拉普供给，并取得了希罗纳的信件盒箱（如果巨怪没有住在洞穴里的话，这会是一项容易许多的任务。）他给我添了一些麻烦，但我设法解决了。现在史波拉特夫人可以回去调制魔药来协助保护当地商家的安全，而希罗纳可以拿到史波拉特家寄给她的信件。

Per Sirona Ryan's request, I retrieved Horklumps for Dorothy Sprottle in Upper Hogsfield so she could brew Wiggenweld Potion to help the travelling vendors. It was difficult to obtain the Horklumps and I felt I need to ask for an increased reward amount.
根据希罗纳·瑞安的要求，我替上霍格米村的桃乐丝·史波拉特找回了霍克拉普，这样她就可以调制振奋魔药来协助旅行商人。获得霍克拉普实属不易，我觉得我得要求增加奖励额度。
COM_08_ItTakesAVillage_TaskObj01: Speak to Dorothy Sprottle in Upper Hogsfield|在上霍格米村与桃乐丝·史波拉特交谈
COM_08_ItTakesAVillage_TaskObj02: Find and enter the cavern|找到大洞穴并进入其中
COM_08_ItTakesAVillage_TaskObj03a: Collect Sirona's Letters ({0}/{1})|收集希罗纳的信件
COM_08_ItTakesAVillage_TaskObj03b: Collect Sirona's letter box|收集希罗纳的信件盒
COM_08_ItTakesAVillage_TaskObj04: Return to Dorothy Sprottle in Upper Hogsfield|返回上霍格米村的桃乐丝·史波拉特那边
COM_08_ItTakesAVillage_TaskObj05: Return the box of letters to Sirona|将信件盒归还给希罗纳
COM_08_MissionJournal:
Sirona at the Three Broomsticks has asked me to aid her friend Dorothy Sprottle of Upper Hogsfield. It seems Mrs Sprottle provides the travelling merchants in the area with Wiggenweld Potion and needs harvesting Horklumps for her potion from a nearby cavern. Sirona is also hoping I can bring her back a box of letters the Sprottles were sending to her when Mr Sprottle took ill.
三把扫帚的希罗纳请我帮助她来自上霍格米村的朋友桃乐丝·史波拉特。史波拉特夫人似乎在为该地区的旅行商家提供振奋魔药，并需要从附近的洞穴中采收霍克拉普来调制。希罗纳还希望我能带回一盒史波拉特家在史波拉特先生病时所寄给她的信。
COM_08_QuestTitle: A Friend In Deed|真正的朋友
COM_09_01_Task1: Find the goblin encampment|找到妖精营地
COM_09_01_Task2: Clear the goblin encampments ({0}/{1})|清除妖精营地
COM_09_BreakingCamp_Journal01:
I spoke with Claire Beaumont and she needs someone to clear out a couple goblin encampments up the road. with these encampments disrupted, trading can resume in Upper Hogsfield.
我和克莱拉·比约蒙特谈过，她需要有人来清理路上的几个妖精营地。随着这些营地被中断，上霍格米村可以恢复交易。
COM_09_BreakingCamp_Journal02:
I've taken out both goblin encampments near Upper Hogsfield. I should tell Claire Beaumont so she can open her shop again.
我把上霍格米村附近的两个妖精营地都搞定了。我应该告诉克莱拉·比约蒙特，这样她就能重新开店。
COM_09_BreakingCamp_QuestAvailable_Journ:
The local vendor in Upper Hogsfield, Claire Beaumont, seems worried about something. I should ask her what's wrong.
上霍格米村的当地商家克莱拉·比约蒙特似乎在操心某事。我应该问她怎么了。
COM_09_BreakingCamp_QuestAvailable_TaskO: Talk to Claire Beaumont|与克莱拉·比约蒙特交谈
COM_09_BreakingCamp_ReturnClaire_TaskObj: Return to Claire Beaumont|返回克莱拉·比约蒙特那边
COM_09_MissionComplete:
I eliminated the goblin encampment near Upper Hogsfield, clearing local trade routes. Claire Beaumont can now reopen her shop.
我消灭了上霍格米村附近的妖精营地，清理了当地的贸易路线。克莱拉·比约蒙特现在可以重新开店了。
COM_09_MissionDesc:
Claire Beaumont is distraught that a local encampment of Ranrok's Loyalists has prevented the trade routes around Upper Hogsfield from remaining open. She’s hoping someone can clear them so she can get back to business.
克莱拉·比约蒙特心烦意乱，兰洛克的追随者在当地的营地阻止了上霍格米村周围的贸易路线保持开放。她希望有人可以清除它们，以便她可以重新开业。
COM_10_00_StepTask: Talk to Dorothy Sprottle|与桃乐丝·史波拉特交谈
COM_10_01_MissionCompleteHideTrue:
In the end I couldn’t tell Claire Beaumont the truth about Bardolph. I made up a flimsy story about him joining the Ashwinders and never wanting to return. I left her heartbroken and confused, but at least she doesn’t know the true horror of what Bardolph had become.
最终，我无法告诉克莱拉·比约蒙特关于巴多尔芬的真相。我编造了一个关于他加入火灰蛇并且再也不想回来的浅薄故事。我让她心碎和困惑，但至少她不知道巴多尔芬的真正可怕之处。
COM_10_01_MissionCompleteRevealTrue:
I broke the news to Claire Beaumont that her brother had become an Inferius. She was horrified, as anyone would be. The only solace was that I was able to put an end to Bardolph’s fate, which truly was worse than death. I know I did the right thing, but I fear this event will forever haunt me.
我向克莱拉·比约蒙特透露了她的兄弟已变成阴尸的消息。她吓坏了，任何人都会有这样的反应。唯一的安慰是我能够终结巴多尔芬比死亡还糟糕的命运。我知道这是正确的决定，但还是担心会被这件事永远困扰着。
COM_10_01_StepJournal:
I need to find out what happened to Claire Beaumont's brother Bardolph. He was last seen in his wool jumper, practising curses with Ashwinders near the Forest.
我需要找出克莱拉·比约蒙特的兄弟巴多尔芬发生了什么事。他最后一次出现时服装羊毛套头衫，在森林附近和搭配火灰蛇练习诅咒。
COM_10_01_StepTitle: Investigate the Disappearance|调查失踪事件
COM_10_02_StepJournal:
I found the spot where I believe Bardolph was last seen. Perhaps he’s being held against his will somewhere inside.
我找到了我认为巴多尔芬最后一次出现的地方。也许他被监禁在里面的某处。
COM_10_BrothersKeeper_Journal01:
Claire Beaumont’s brother is missing. I should talk to her in Upper Hogsfield and get more details.
克莱拉·比约蒙特的兄弟失踪了。我应该在上霍格米村和她谈谈，以了解更多细节。
COM_10_BrothersKeeper_Journal02:
Bardolph allegedly practised Dark Magic near the Forest. I should start my search there.
据称，巴多尔芬在森林附近练习了黑魔法。我应该从那里开始搜索。
COM_10_BrothersKeeper_Journal03:
I need to return to Upper Hogsfield to tell Claire Beaumont about her brother Bardolph’s fate. But how do I tell her that he’d become an Inferius? And, even worse, that I had to destroy him? This is going to be difficult.
我需要回到上霍格米村，并告诉克莱拉·比约蒙特她兄弟巴多尔芬的命运。但我要如何跟她说他已变成阴尸？而且更糟糕的是，我不得不摧毁了他。这真是一件困难的事。
COM_10_BrothersKeeper_QuestAvailable_Jou:
Dorothy Sprottle is concerned about a missing person. Perhaps I can help track them down.
桃乐丝·史波拉特担心失踪的人。也许我可以帮助追踪他们。
COM_10_BrothersKeeper_QuestAvailable_Tas: Speak with Dorothy Sprottle|与桃乐丝·史波拉特交谈
COM_10_BrothersKeeper_TaskObj01: Speak to Claire Beaumont about her missing brother|与克莱拉·比约蒙特谈谈她失踪的兄弟
COM_10_BrothersKeeper_TaskObj02: Discover what happened to Bardolph Beaumont|了解巴多尔芬·比约蒙特的遭遇
COM_10_BrothersKeeper_TaskObj03: Report back to Claire Beaumont|向克莱拉·比约蒙特回报
COM_10_MissionJournal:
Dorothy Sprottle informed me that Claire Beaumont’s brother Bardolph has gone missing. He’s been trying to impress Viktor Rookwood’s gang with displays of Dark Magic. Bardolph is known to frequent the ruins at the edge of the Forest north of Upper Hogsfield and was last seen wearing a woollen jumper that his sister knitted. I’m going to investigate his disappearance.
桃乐丝·史波拉特告诉我克莱拉·比约蒙特的兄弟巴多尔芬失踪了。他一直试图通过展示黑魔法来让维克托·卢克伍德帮印象深刻。众所皆知，巴多尔芬经常出现在上霍格米村北部森林边境的废墟中，最后一次被人看到时服装他姐妹所织的羊毛套头衫。我要调查他的失踪。
COM_11_ButterfliesInMyStomach_QuestActiv:
I spoke with Clementine Willardsey in the Three Broomsticks. She was musing about a swarm of butterflies she’s encountered more than once just inside the entrance to the Forbidden Forest. She’s terrified of the Forest but is curious about where they fly off to. She’s hoping someone brave enough to enter the Forest might follow the butterflies and satisfy her curiosity.
我在三把扫帚中克莱蒙汀·威莱尔德西交谈过。她在沉思于禁林入口内遇到不止一次的一群蝴蝶。她害怕森林，但好奇蝴蝶飞到哪里。她希望有人能勇敢地进入森林，并跟随蝴蝶来满足她的好奇心。

Miss Willardsey mentioned that the butterflies are just across the bridge inside of the Forbidden Forest. I should search there.
威莱尔德西小姐提到蝴蝶就在禁林内的桥对面。我应该搜索那边。

Miss Willardsey’s information was accurate. I encountered the butterflies just inside the Forbidden Forest. Now to follow them deeper.
威莱尔德西小姐的资讯准确。我在禁林里遇到了蝴蝶。现在要更深入地跟随它们。
The butterflies revealed a treasure chest to me.|蝴蝶向我展示了一个宝箱。

The butterflies revealed a treasure chest to me. I retrieved the treasure and now need to update Miss Willardsey.
蝴蝶向我展示了一个宝箱。我取回了宝藏，而现在需要告知威莱尔德西小姐。
Find the butterflies in the Forbidden Forest|在禁林中寻找蝴蝶
Find out where the butterflies are going|找出蝴蝶要去哪里
Collect your reward|收集你的奖励
Return to Miss Willardsey|返回威莱尔德西小姐那边
COM_11_ButterfliesInMyStomach_QuestAvail:
I overheard Clementine Willardsey talking to herself in the Three Broomsticks. She mentioned something about a swarm of butterflies.
我无意中听到克莱蒙汀·威莱尔德西在三把扫帚里自言自语。她提到了关于一群蝴蝶的事情。
Talk to Clementine Willardsey|与克莱蒙汀·威莱尔德西交谈
COM_11_ButterfliesInMyStomach_QuestCompl:
I was able to find and follow the butterflies Clementine Willardsey mentioned seeing just inside the Forbidden Forest. They led me to a chest with a reward inside. I didn't want Miss Willardsey to feel that she’d missed out on anything so I've mentioned nothing of what I found.
我找到并跟随克莱蒙汀·威莱尔德西提到在禁林中看到的蝴蝶。它们带我找到了一个藏有奖励的盒子。我不想让威莱尔德西小姐觉得她错过了什么，所以我没有提到我所发现的任何东西。

I was able to find and follow the butterflies Clementine Willardsey mentioned seeing just inside the Forbidden Forest. They led me to a chest with a reward inside. I told Miss Willardsey and she was thrilled for me. I wonder if there are more of these somewhere.
我找到并跟随克莱蒙汀·威莱尔德西提到在禁林中看到的蝴蝶。它们把我带到一个藏在树根下的盒子。我对树施展啦唯啊萨，在下方找到布满根的盒子。它里面有一个独特的幻术配方。我告诉了威莱尔德西小姐，她替我感到兴奋。我想知道这些地方是否还有更多盒子。
COM_12_01_QuestAvailable_Journal: Grace Pinch-Smedley has something to tell me. I should find her.|格蕾丝·平斯-史麦德莱有话要告诉我。我应该去找她。
COM_12_01_QuestAvailable_LevelUp_Task1: Speak with Grace Pinch-Smedley|与格蕾丝·平斯-史麦德莱交谈
COM_12_02_StepJournal: Now that I've found the astrolabe, I should tell Grace.|现在我找到了星盘，我应该告诉格蕾丝。
COM_12_02_StepTask: Return to Grace|返回格蕾丝那边
COM_12_BottomoftheLake_QuestActive_Journ:
I spoke with Grace Pinch-Smedley as she stood on a dock near Lower Hogsfield staring out at the Black Lake. She was wondering how to retrieve an astrolabe lost when a ship carrying her grandfather and grandmother on a star-gazing cruise sank – never to be seen again. Grace is forbidden by her father to swim in the Black Lake, so is hoping someone can use the coordinates she triangulated to dive down and retrieve the lost heirloom. In turn, she can bring some happiness back to her family.
我与格蕾丝·平斯-史麦德莱交谈时，她站在下霍格米村附近的一个码头上，并凝视着黑湖。她想知道如何找回当那艘载着她祖父母的观星游轮沉没时，再也看不到的遗失星盘。格蕾丝的父亲禁止她在黑湖游泳，因此她希望有人能利用她三角测量的坐标潜入水下并找回遗失的传家宝。同时，她也可以给家人带回一些喜乐。
COM_12_BottomoftheLake_QuestActive_StepJ:
According to Grace’s research, the astrolabe would have sunk about a furlong northeast of the dock. I should swim out there.
根据格蕾丝的研究，星盘应该沉没在码头东北方两百米的地方。我应该游去那里。
I found the lost astrolabe Grace was talking about. Now to return to her.|我找到了格蕾丝所说的遗失星盘。现在要回到她那边。
COM_12_BottomoftheLake_QuestActive_TaskO: Dive in the Black Lake and find the astrolabe|潜入黑湖并找到星盘
Return to Grace|返回格蕾丝那边
COM_12_BottomoftheLake_QuestAvailable_Jo:
A student outside Lower Hogsfield is staring longingly out over the waters of the Black Lake. I wonder what’s on her mind.
下霍格米村郊外的一名学生渴望地凝视着黑湖的水域。我想知道她在想什么。
COM_12_BottomoftheLake_QuestAvailable_Ta: Speak with the student on the dock|与码头上的学生交谈
COM_12_BottomoftheLake_QuestComplete_Jou:
I managed to find and return Grace’s grandfather’s lost astrolabe to her. Along with the astrolabe, I found some Wiggenweld Potion which, while useful, did not justify the risk I took in procuring her heirloom. I requested payment in exchange for the item, and she happily obliged. I’m pleased I could help bring her family a bit of closure around the fate of her grandparents.
我设法找到了格蕾丝祖父遗失的星盘并将其归还给她。除了星盘，我还发现了一些振奋魔药。这虽然实用，但并不足以补偿我为她取回传家宝所冒的风险。我要求获得报酬来交换物品，而她很开心地答应了。我很高兴我能协助她的家人对她祖父母的命运有所了结。

I managed to find Grace’s grandfather’s lost astrolabe. Along with the astrolabe, I found some Wiggenweld Potion which, while useful, did not justify the risk I took in procuring her heirloom and so I decided to keep the astrolabe. Grace was not happy, but I hope she finds some solace in knowing it will be in good hands.
我设法找到了格蕾丝祖父遗失的星盘。除了星盘，我还发现了一些振奋魔药。这虽然实用，但并不足以补偿我为她取回传家宝所冒的风险，所以我决定保留星盘。格蕾丝并不高兴，但我希望她能理解星盘会获得妥善处理并感到一丝安慰。

I managed to find and return Grace’s grandfather’s lost astrolabe to her. Along with the astrolabe, I found some Wiggenweld Potion which, while not treasure themselves, should be useful. I’m pleased I could help bring her family a bit of closure around the fate of her grandparents.
我设法找到了格蕾丝祖父遗失的星盘并将其归还给她。除了星盘，我还发现了一些振奋魔药。这虽然不是宝藏但也很实用。我很高兴我能协助她的家人对她祖父母的命运有所了结。
COM_14_CartedAway_QuestActive_Journal:
I spoke with the goblin vendor, Arn, outside Lower Hogsfield. He was beaten and robbed by Ranrok’s Loyalists. His carts were taken to a nearby encampment south of the hamlet. Without his carts, he cannot continue selling his wares and loses his entire livelihood. Somewhat of an artist, he's also especially sad to have lost his paints. I should investigate.
我和下霍格米村郊外的妖精商贩阿恩交谈。他被兰洛克的追随者殴打和抢劫。他的手推车被带到小村庄以南附近的一个营地。没有推车，他就无法继续贩卖商品，并失去全部的生计。基于艺术家的心态，他对于失去画作感到特别伤心。我应该调查一下。
COM_14_CartedAway_QuestActive_Journal01:
Arn mentioned his carts were taken by Ranrok’s Loyalists to an encampment to the south of Lower Hogsfield. I should try the road heading south out of the hamlet.
阿恩提到他的手推车被兰洛克的追随者带到了下霍格米村南部的一个营地。我应该试试从小村庄往南走的路。
COM_14_CartedAway_QuestActive_Journal03:
Arn's lost carts appear to be locked behind a gate – and getting to them won't be easy with all these goblin Loyalists about.
阿恩遗失的手推车似乎被锁在了大门后面。而在所有这些妖精追随者的存在下，要靠近它们并不容易。
COM_14_CartedAway_QuestActive_Journal04:
I was able to free the carts from the encampment and they are travelling back to Arn. I should return to Lower Hogsfield to update him.
我成功将手推车从营地中释放出来，而它们正返回阿恩那边。我应该回到下霍格米村告知他。
COM_14_CartedAway_QuestActive_TaskObj01: Go to the Goblin Camp|前往妖精营地
COM_14_CartedAway_QuestActive_TaskObj03: Free the carts from the encampment|释放营地中的手推车
COM_14_CartedAway_QuestActive_TaskObj04: Return to Arn|返回阿恩那边
COM_14_CartedAway_QuestAvailable_Journal:
A goblin outside Lower Hogsfield seems distraught over his missing cart. He doesn’t seem to be aligned with Ranrok’s Loyalists. Perhaps I should investigate.
下霍格米村外的一个妖精似乎对他失去的手推车感到心烦意乱。他似乎不是兰洛克追随者的那一方。也许我应该调查一下。
COM_14_CartedAway_QuestAvailable_TaskObj: Talk to the goblin outside Lower Hogsfield|与下霍格米村外的妖精交谈
COM_14_CartedAway_QuestComplete_Journal:
I was able to liberate and return Arn’s carts to him in Lower Hogsfield. He should be able to return to his travelling life, selling his wares on the road. He was delighted with my news and even mentioned he might paint a piece as a tribute to all that is good between goblins and wizardkind. I’m happy I could help Arn and will watch for him on the road as I travel.
我成功在下霍格米村释放阿恩的手推车，并将其归还给他。他应该可以回归旅行生活，并在路上贩卖商品。他听到消息很高兴，甚至提到可能会画一幅作品来向妖精和巫师之间的友好致敬。我很高兴能帮助阿恩，并会在旅行的路上留意他。
COM_15_MurkyDepths_QuestActive_Journal:
Nerida Roberts has a deep interest in Mermish culture – she would even like to be a liaison to merpeople at the Ministry one day – and recently left the merpeople of the lake a gift. In return, they left an artefact for her in an underwater cave. The problem is that Nerida can't swim, and so she would like me to retrieve the artefact for her.
奈里达·罗伯茨对人鱼文化有浓厚的兴趣，甚至希望有一天能成为魔法部的人鱼联络员，而且最近还为湖中的人鱼留下一份礼物。作为回报，他们在水下洞穴中为她留了一件制品。问题是奈里达不会游泳，所以她想希望我能帮她取回这件制品。
COM_15_MurkyDepths_QuestActive_StepJourn:
Nerida mentioned the caves can be found in the lake west of the Hogwarts Boathouse. It sounds like I’ll have to swim there.
奈里达提到，这些洞穴位于霍格沃茨船屋以西的湖中。听起来我得去那里游泳。
I made it into the Leaky Caves. Now I just need to find this Mermish artefact. |我进入了漏水洞穴。现在我只需要找到这个人鱼制品。

I found the Mermish artefact, the gift that the merpeople left for Nerida. Now I need to return it to her. 
我找到了人鱼制品，这是人鱼留给奈里达的礼物。现在我需要把它交还给她。
COM_15_MurkyDepths_QuestActive_TaskObj01: Find the Leaky Caves|找到漏水洞穴
COM_15_MurkyDepths_QuestActive_TaskObj02: Find and collect Mermish artefact|寻找并收集人鱼制品
COM_15_MurkyDepths_QuestActive_TaskObj03: Return to Nerida|返回奈里达那边
COM_15_MurkyDepths_QuestAvailable_StepJo:
Nerida Roberts is sitting on the docks by the Hogwarts boathouse. I should go speak with her. 
奈里达·罗伯茨正坐在霍格沃茨船屋的码头旁若有所思。也许我该去跟她谈一谈。
COM_15_MurkyDepths_QuestAvailable_TaskOb: Talk to Nerida Roberts|与奈里达·罗伯茨交谈
COM_15_MurkyDepths_QuestComplete_Journal:
What a soggy adventure! I retrieved a Mermish artefact from under the lake for Nerida. But it was no easy task. If she'd wanted the artefact so badly, she would have gone after it herself. I think I can put this artefact to good use, so I decided to keep it.
多么湿漉漉的冒险！我为奈里达从湖底取回了一个人鱼制品。但这绝非易事。如果她真的想要这个制品，她会自己去拿。我想我可以好好利用这件制品，所以我决定保留它。

What a soggy adventure! I retrieved a Mermish artefact from under the lake for Nerida. She's beyond thrilled and says it will help her in her goal to strengthen relations between wizards and merpeople. I was happy to help her.
多么湿漉漉的冒险！我为奈里达从湖底取回了一个人鱼制品。她非常兴奋，并说这有助于实现加强巫师和人鱼之间关系的目标。我很开心能够帮到她。
COM_16_TrollControl_QuestActive_StepJour:
I’ve spoken with Alexandra Ricketts, who requested I dispatch a troll she’s been unsuccessfully training. It can be found south of Brocburrow.
我和亚利桑德拉·里基茨谈话过，她要求我解决一个她训练失败的巨怪。我可以在布洛克巴罗以南找到它。

I’ve found Alexandra’s Troll’s den to the south of Brocburrow. This troll seems more formidable than other trolls. I should be careful.
我在布洛克巴罗的南边找到了亚利桑德拉的巨怪巢穴。这个巨怪似乎比其他巨怪更强大。我得小心点。

I’ve taken care of Alexandra’s Troll problem. This wasn’t an easy task. I should report back to her.
我解决了亚利桑德拉的巨怪问题。这不是一件容易的事。我应该向她回报。
COM_16_TrollControl_QuestActive_TaskObj0: Go to the Troll’s Den|前往巨怪的巢穴
Dispatch Alexandra’s Troll|解决亚利桑德拉的巨怪
Return to Alexandra|返回亚利桑德拉那边
COM_16_TrollControl_QuestAvailable_Journ:
Alexandra Ricketts of Brocburrow has been unsuccessfully attempting to train a security troll for the hamlet. The hamlet residents are upset as it's a threat and want something done. They’ve asked Alexandra to take care of it. She’s now requesting that I dispatch said troll, as she’s too attached. The troll’s den is south of Brocburrow.
布洛克巴罗的亚利桑德拉·里基茨想要为当地村庄培训一头充当保镖的巨怪，只是一直没有成功。巨怪的存在搞得村庄里面人心惶惶。村民们已经要求亚利桑德拉去处理这个问题。亚利桑德拉不忍心下手，因此希望我能代为处理那头巨怪。巨怪的巢穴就在布洛克巴罗南面。

Upon approaching Brocburrow, I overheard a woman talking about a problem with a troll. I should speak with her.
朝着布洛克巴罗进发时，我无意间听见一名女子提到了巨怪的问题。我应该跟她谈一谈。
COM_16_TrollControl_QuestAvailable_TaskO: Talk to Alexandra Rickett|与亚利桑德拉·里基茨交谈
COM_16_TrollControl_QuestComplete_Journa:
I was able to dispatch the troll south of Brocburrow that Alexandra Ricketts was attempting unsuccessfully to train as a security troll. Instead of protecting the hamlet, the troll nearly trampled it. While the news of the troll’s demise was bittersweet for Alexandra, she was grateful for my help, as was the hamlet. From now on, the residents of Brocburrow shall refer to me as the ‘Troll Slayer.’
我成功解决了布洛克巴罗南部的巨怪，亚利桑德拉·里基茨曾试图将其训练为守卫巨怪却没有成功。巨怪没有保护小村庄，反而差点践踏了它。虽然巨怪死亡的消息对亚利桑德拉来说是喜忧参半，但她对我的协助表示感谢，小村庄也是如此。从今以后，布洛克巴罗的居民都称我为“巨怪杀手”。
