COM_17_BestDefence_QuestActive_Journal:
Eddie Thistlewood has enlisted me to help recover shipments of Chinese Chomping Cabbages stolen by Rookwood's Ashwinders and Ranrok’s Loyalists. I need to secure the cabbages and transport them safely to Bernard Ndiaye in Feldcroft.
艾迪·西索伍德邀请我帮助追回被卢克伍德的火灰蛇和兰洛克的追随者偷走的中国咬人甘蓝货物。我需要把甘蓝固定好，然后安全地运到费德罗特的伯纳德·恩迪亚耶那边。
COM_17_BestDefence_QuestActive_StepJourn:
Mr Thistlewood mentioned the first crate of cabbages was last spotted in an Ashwinder camp southwest of Brocburrow across the river.
西索伍德先生提到，第一箱甘蓝最后一次被发现是在河对岸布洛克巴罗西南的一个火灰蛇营地。

I’ve found the location of the Ashwinder encampment. Now to find those pesky cabbages.
我找到了火灰蛇营地的位置。现在要去找那些麻烦的甘蓝。

I found the first stolen crate in the Ashwinder encampments Mr Thistlewood mentioned. Now to find the second stolen crate. It's reportedly in a Loyalist camp south of Feldcroft.
我在西索伍德先生提到的火灰蛇营地中，发现了第一个被盗的箱子。现在要找到第二个被盗的箱子。据称，它位于费德罗特南部的一个追随者营地。

I’ve found the location the Loyalist encampment south of Feldcroft. Now to find those cabbages.
我在费德罗特以南找到了追随者营地的位置。现在要去找那些甘蓝。

I’ve found both crates of Chinese Chomping Cabbages and must now deliver them to Bernard Ndiaye in Feldcroft.
我把两箱中国咬人甘蓝都找到了，现在必须把它们送到费德罗特的伯纳德·恩迪亚耶那边。
COM_17_BestDefence_QuestActive_TaskObj01: Go to where the first crate was spotted|前往发现第一个箱子的地方
COM_17_BestDefence_QuestActive_TaskObj03: Go to where the second crate was spotted|前往发现第二个箱子的地方
COM_17_BestDefence_QuestActive_TaskObj05: Deliver 4 Chinese Chomping Cabbages to Bernard Ndiaye in Feldcroft|为费德罗特的伯纳德·恩迪亚耶提供 4 份中国咬人甘蓝
COM_17_BestDefence_QuestAvailable_Journa:
I spoke with Eddie Thistlewood in Brocburrow. He sent two crates of Chinese Chomping Cabbages to his friend Bernard Ndiaye in Feldcroft to be used as a defence against the encroaching Loyalists who’ve been harassing hamlet residents. Unfortunately, the shipments were intercepted by Rookwood's Ashwinders and Ranrok’s Loyalists en route to Feldcroft. Eddie hopes someone can recover them at their last known locations and deliver them to Mr Ndiaye.
我与布洛克巴罗的艾迪·西索伍德进行了交谈。之前艾迪给自己在费德罗特的朋友伯纳德·恩迪亚耶寄了两箱中国咬人甘蓝，想要那里的村民用这些植物抵御来犯的追随者妖精。不幸的是，装载着甘蓝的箱子在去往费德罗特的路上被卢克伍德的火灰蛇党与兰洛克的追随者们给劫走了。现在艾迪希望有人能够前往事发地点寻找装有中国咬人甘蓝的货箱，并将之送到恩迪亚耶先生的手上。

Eddie Thistlewood in Brocburrow seems to have an urgent matter involving Chinese Chomping Cabbages that needs attending. I should speak with him.
布洛克巴罗的艾迪·西索伍德似乎有一件涉及中国咬人甘蓝的紧急事项需要处理。我应该和他谈谈。
COM_17_BestDefence_QuestAvailable_TaskOb: Talk with Eddie Thistlewood in Brocburrow|与布洛克巴罗的艾迪·西索伍德交谈
COM_17_BestDefence_QuestComplete_Journal:
I delivered the Chinese Chomping Cabbages to Mr Ndiaye in Feldcroft. He was more than relieved to see them, as the Loyalist and Rookwood presence around the hamlet had increased lately. Hopefully these can be used to defend the hamlet from any unwanted visitors.
我把中国咬人甘蓝送到了费德罗特特的恩迪亚耶先生那边。他在看到甘蓝后松了口气，因为最近小村庄周围的追随者和卢克伍德的人数有所增加。希望这些可以用来保护小村庄免受任何不受欢迎之访客的侵害。
COM_18_MissionActive_Task: Talk to Althea Twiddle|与艾尔西亚·图维迪尔交谈
COM_18_PiecingitTogether_QuestActive_Jou:
While visiting Irondale, I spoke with Althea Twiddle, whose late husband Greville was fascinated with a strange statue near some ruins southwest of the hamlet. He suspected a correlation between it and a series of vases in and around the ruins. Madam Twiddle would love to know what it all means, in memory of her husband and his love of puzzles. If I could uncover the connection between the statue and vases, it might bring her some peace.
在造访艾恩代尔时，我与艾尔西亚·图维迪尔交谈，她已故的丈夫格雷维尔对村庄西南一些废墟附近的一尊奇怪雕像着迷。他怀疑它与废墟内及周围一系列花瓶之间存在关联。图维迪尔夫人很想知道这一切意味着什么，以纪念她的丈夫和他对谜题的热爱。如果我能发现雕像和花瓶之间的联系，这可能会为她带来一些平静。
COM_18_PiecingitTogether_QuestActive_Ste:
Madam Twiddle mentioned the statue Greville spoke of is southwest of Irondale near some ruins. I should look there.
图维迪尔夫人说格雷维尔提到的雕像位于艾恩代尔西南的一些废墟附近。我应该去那里找找。

Madam Twiddle mentioned her husband believed there to be a correlation between the vases around the ruins and the statue itself. Surely they wouldn’t be missed if I were to break them.
图维迪尔夫人提到她的丈夫认为废墟周围的花瓶和雕像本身之间存在关联。如果我加以打破，肯定不会错过它们。

Apparently, destroying all the vases activated the statue. I should return to Madam Twiddle and confirm her husband’s suspicions.
显然，摧毁所有的花瓶启动了雕像。我应该回到图维迪尔夫人那里，并确认她丈夫的推论。
COM_18_PiecingitTogether_QuestActive_Tas: Find Madam Twiddle’s mysterious statue|找到图维迪尔夫人的神秘雕像
Return to Althea Twiddle|返回艾尔西亚·图维迪尔那边
COM_18_PiecingitTogether_QuestAvailable_:
While visiting Irondale, I overheard a woman speaking to herself about something 'fascinating'. I should talk with her.
在造访艾恩代尔时，我无意中听到一位女士自言自语地谈论着一些“令人着迷”的事情。我应该和她谈谈。
Talk to the woman in Irondale|与艾恩代尔的女士交谈
COM_18_PiecingitTogether_QuestComplete_J:
I confirmed that the late Mr Twiddle was correct in assuming there was a correlation between the mysterious statue to the southwest of Irondale and the vases lying around the ruins nearby. Destroying the vases activated the statue – and I believe approaching it will allow someone to walk through it to a new place. Delivering this news to Madam Twiddle brought her some joy after the untimely death of her husband.
我确认已故的图维迪尔先生认为艾恩代尔西南的神秘雕像与附近废墟周围的花瓶之间存在关联是正确的。摧毁花瓶启动了雕像，而我相信靠近它可让人加以穿越并抵达新的地方。在丈夫英年早逝后，图维迪尔夫人对于获知这份消息感到些许欣慰。
COM_19_01_QuestAvailable_Journal: Nellie Oggspire has something to tell me. I should find her.|奈利·奥格斯派尔有话要告诉我。我应该去找她。
COM_19_01_QuestAvailable_LevelUp_Task1: Talk to Nellie Oggspire|与奈利·奥格斯派尔交谈
COM_19_01_StepJournal:
Nellie said that if I see a Daedalian Key flying around I should follow it to find some sort of reward.
奈里说如果我看到“巧妙钥匙”飞来飞去，我应该跟着它寻找某种奖励。
COM_19_04_StepTask: Find House Chest and insert the House Token|找到学院宝箱并插入学院标志
COM_19_DaedalianKeysHouseChallenge_Quest:
According to Nellie Oggspire, a set of enchanted keys – the Daedalian keys – recently appeared in Hogwarts for the first time in a while. Apparently, a prior headmistress bewitched them to guard a series of cabinets and Nellie says that if I can catch a key, I may be able to open the cabinet and access whatever's inside. She has thus far been unable to get past the first cabinet, so she enlisted my help.
根据奈利·奥格斯派尔的说法，一组魔法钥匙“巧妙钥匙”最近一段时间首次出现在霍格沃茨。显然，以前的女校长施了魔法，使其看守一系列橱柜。奈利说，如果我能抓住钥匙，我就可以开启橱柜并取得里面的任何东西。到目前为止，她一直无法通过第一个橱柜，所以她寻求我的帮助。

Nellie mentioned hearing a Daedalian key in the Astronomy Tower. I'm sure I can find it if I look around and listen.
奈利提到天文塔里有一把“巧妙钥匙”，距离够近让她可以听到。我如果环顾四周，肯定就能找到。

I found a Daedalian Key and it flew off, trying to reunite with the cabinet to which it belongs. I should try and find it.
我找到了主厅“巧妙钥匙”，但它却飞走了，试图与所属的橱柜重聚。它似乎穿过了主厅庭院。我应该去那里看看。
I found the cabinet that the Daedalian Key led to. Now to try and open it.|我找到了“巧妙钥匙”通向的橱柜。现在要尝试加以开启。

Opening the cabinet with the Daedalian Key revealed a token with my house insignia on it. I should show this to Nellie.
用“巧妙钥匙”钥匙开启橱柜，里面有个印有我学院佩章的标志。我应该把这个拿给奈利看。

Nellie said my House Chest should be in my house common room. I should search there.
奈利说我应该能够在自己的公共休息室找到对应的学院宝箱。等有机会了我应该在里面好好寻找一番。

It looks like my House Chest has room for more Tokens. I should look for more Daedalian Keys around Hogwarts.
看样子我的学院宝箱有空间容纳更多标志。我应该在霍格沃茨附近寻找更多的“巧妙钥匙”。

I've managed to find all sixteen house tokens. I must remember to deposit them into my house chest to see what's inside! 
我设法找到了所有十六个学院标志。我可要记得把它们放入我的学院宝箱里，来看看里面会有什么！

Now that I've opened the house chest, I should share what I've learned with Nellie.
现在我已经打开了学院宝箱，我应该和奈利分享我学到的东西。
Find the Daedalian key in the Astronomy Tower|找到天文塔的“巧妙钥匙”
Find the Daedalian key's cabinet|找到“巧妙钥匙”的橱柜
Open the Daedalian lock|开启“巧妙钥匙”的锁。
Return to Nellie with the token|带着标志返回奈利那边
Insert the house token into your house chest|将学院标志插入你的学院宝箱
Find the remaining house tokens that are around Hogwarts ({0}/{1})|找到霍格沃茨周围其余的学院标志
Return to my house chest to deposit tokens |返回我的学院宝箱以放入标志
Speak with Nellie|与奈利交谈

Nellie Oggspire is in the Transfiguration Courtyard and seems elated about something. I'm interested to learn what's so exciting.
奈利·奥格斯派尔在变形学庭院，且似乎对某事感到很高兴。我很想知道是什么事如此令人兴奋。
Speak with Nellie Oggspire|与奈利·奥格斯派尔交谈

I learned from Nellie Oggspire that the flying keys which occasionally appear in Hogwarts are the Daedalian keys, a holdover from some enchantments that a prior headmistress once set. It took some ardent searching, but I managed to find all of the keys and used them to open my house chest, revealing a marvellous house costume.
我从奈利·奥格斯派尔那里了解到，偶尔出现在霍格沃茨的飞行钥匙是“巧妙钥匙”，这是前任校长曾经设置的一些魔法遗留物。我费了一番周折，但设法找到了所有的钥匙，并用它们开启了我的学院宝箱，其中藏有一件奇妙的学院服饰。
The Daedalian Keys|巧妙钥匙
COM_19_MissionJournal:
Enchanted keys have begun flying around the school. Nellie Oggspire explained that they are part of the 'Daedalian Keys House Challenge,' implemented by a previous Headmaster. Completion of the challenge promises some sort of reward.
被施法的钥匙已开始在学校周围飞来飞去。奈利·奥格斯派尔解释说，它们是由前任校长实施的‘巧妙钥匙学院挑战’的一部分。完成挑战可获得某种奖励。
COM_20_AllsWellThatEndsBell_QuestActive_:
I spoke with Evangeline Bardsley in the Astronomy Wing, who told me that Professor Black had the bells in the Bell Tower removed. She was working with her friend Adelaide to put them back, but Adelaide got cold feet. Evangeline cannot tell which bell goes where and needs help. It seems like restoring the bells would be an act of preservation as well as a way to annoy Professor Black.
我在天文学区与伊凡吉琳·巴德斯利交谈，她告诉我布莱克教授已拆除钟塔的钟。她要和朋友阿德莱德一起把它们放回去，但阿德莱德却退缩了。伊凡吉琳不知道各个铃须放置何处，且需要帮助。看样子恢复钟声是一种保护举动，也是一种惹恼布莱克教授的方式。

Evangeline told me that the bells to be restored are in the Bell Tower above the Music Room. I should go there first.
伊凡吉琳告诉我，要修复的钟在音乐室上方的钟塔里。我应该先去那里。

I’ve located the Music Room. It looks like the tower bells are above it. I should ascend the stairs to find them.
我找到了音乐室。看样子塔钟在它上方。我应该上楼梯去找找。
It looks like two bells are missing. I should look for them within the tower.|好像少了两个钟。我应该在塔内寻找。

I was able to locate the missing bells within the tower and restore them, preserving a bit of Hogwarts history. I should let Evangeline know.
我成功在塔内找到遗失的钟并加以修复，进而保留了一些霍格沃茨的历史。我应该让伊凡吉琳知道。
Go to the Music Room|前往音乐室
Find the tower bells|找到塔钟
Return the missing bells to the tower ({0}/{1})|将遗失的钟送回塔楼
Return to Evangeline|返回伊凡吉琳那边
COM_20_AllsWellThatEndsBell_QuestAvailab:
I overheard a Hufflepuff student in the Astronomy Wing talking about bells. Not sure what she needs. Perhaps I can help.
我无意中听到天文学区的一个赫奇帕奇学生在谈论钟。不确定她需要什么。也许我可以帮忙。

A Hufflepuff in the Astronomy Wing seems upset about something. Perhaps I can help.
天文学区的一名赫奇帕奇学生似乎对某事感到不安。或许我可以帮忙。
Speak to the Hufflepuff in the Astronomy Wing|与天文学区的赫奇帕奇学生交谈
COM_20_AllsWellThatEndsBell_QuestComplet:
I located the bells missing from the Bell Tower and restored them to their proper place, preserving a bit of Hogwarts history. Evangeline was delighted and is convinced future generations will benefit from my actions.
我找到了钟塔遗失的钟，并将它们复原到正确的位置，进而保留了一些霍格沃茨的历史。伊凡吉琳很高兴，并相信后代将从我的行动中受益。
COM_20_AllsWellThatEndsBell_QuestTitle: All's Well That Ends Bell|钟声响起来
COM_22_04_Task: Return to Ackley Barnes|返回阿克利·巴恩斯那边
COM_22_DodgeyDealingss_SpeakwithAckley_T: Speak with Ackley Barnes|与阿克利·巴恩斯交谈。
COM_22_DodgyDealings_QuestActive_Journal:
The man behind the Three Broomsticks was Ackley Barnes, a local Hogsmeade resident of ill-repute. He fell out with his Herbology supply business ex-partner, Alfred Lawley, and seeks vengeance. But he’s under the watchful eye of Officer Singer so has asked me to sneak into Mr Lawley’s cellar down the street to retrieve a special Venomous Tentacula. He hopes to cripple Lawley’s business by taking his prized plant while giving himself a head start in his new business. While there, I should poke around for anything else that might be worth snatching.
在三把扫帚后方的男子是阿克利·巴恩斯，他是当地声名狼藉的霍格莫德居民。他与草药供应业务前合伙人阿尔弗雷德·洛莱闹翻，并寻求报复。但他现在处于辛格警官的监视下，因此要求我偷偷溜进对街劳利先生的地窖，以取回一个特殊的毒触手。他希望通过夺取其珍贵的工厂来削弱劳利的业务，同时让自己在新业务中抢占先机。在那里，我应该四处寻找任何可能值得抢夺的东西。
COM_22_DodgyDealings_QuestActive_StepJou:
The cellar Ackley Barnes spoke of should be just down the street from the Three Broomsticks.
阿克利·巴恩斯所说的地窖应该就在三把扫帚的对街。

Mr Barnes would be happy with any Tentacula I have in order to get his business off the ground.
巴恩斯先生会对我拥有的任何毒触手感到满意，以便让他的生意起步。
I’ve found the cellar. Now I need to take a peek inside.|我找到了地窖。现在我需要一窥其中。

I’ve found the cellar. Now to poke around and see what I can find. I should be careful not to be noticed.
我找到了地窖。现在四处逛逛，看看我能找到什么。我应该小心不要被注意到。
I’ve found the Tentacula. Now to make my way back to Mr Barnes to update him.|我找到了毒触手。现在要回到巴恩斯先生那里告知他资讯。
COM_22_DodgyDealings_QuestActive_TaskObj: Find Alfred Lawley's Cellar|阿尔弗雷德·洛莱的地窖
Bring Ackley Barnes a Venomous Tentacula |把毒触手带给阿克利·巴恩斯
Find Lawley’s Venomous Tentacula|找到劳利的毒触手
Return to Ackley Barnes|返回阿克利·巴恩斯那边
COM_22_DodgyDealings_QuestAvailable_Step:
A man is standing behind the Three Broomsticks, muttering angrily to himself. Should I engage? 
有名男子站在三把扫帚后方，气呼呼地自言自语。我应该涉入吗？
COM_22_DodgyDealings_QuestAvailable_Task: Talk to the muttering man behind the Three Broomsticks|与在三把扫帚后方喃喃自语的男子交谈
COM_22_DodgyDealings_QuestComplete_Journ:
After meeting a man named Ackley Barnes outside the Three Broomsticks, I learned that he wanted to sabotage his ex-business partner, Alfred Lawley, by stealing his Venomous Tentacula. He asked if I would do it for him. I sneaked into Lawley's cellar and retrieved the Venomous Tentacula. This task proved to be more difficult than I thought, so I asked Mr Barnes to compensate me extra for my efforts.
在三把扫帚外遇到一个名叫阿克利·巴恩斯的人后，我得知他想通过偷走前商业伙伴阿尔弗雷德·洛莱的毒触手来加以破坏。他问我是否愿意为他做这件事。我偷偷溜进了劳利的地窖，取得了毒触手。事实证明，这项任务比我想象的要困难得多，所以我请巴恩斯先生为我的努力提供额外的补偿。

After meeting a man named Ackley Barnes outside the Three Broomsticks, I learned that he wanted to sabotage his ex-business partner, Alfred Lawley, by stealing his Venomous Tentacula. He asked if I would do it for him. I didn't want to steal from a Hogsmeade resident, however, so I found a Venomous Tentacula elsewhere and gave that to him instead. He was perfectly happy with it and gave me the reward he had promised in return.
在三把扫帚外遇到一个名叫阿克利·巴恩斯的人后，我得知他想通过偷走前商业伙伴阿尔弗雷德·洛莱的毒触手来加以破坏。他问我是否愿意为他做这件事。然而，我不想从霍格莫德居民那里偷东西，所以我在别处找到了一个毒触手，然后把它交给他。他对此非常满意，并给了我承诺的奖励。

After meeting a man named Ackley Barnes outside the Three Broomsticks, I learned that he wanted to sabotage his ex-business partner, Alfred Lawley, by stealing his Venomous Tentacula. He asked if I would do it for him. I didn't want to steal from a Hogsmeade resident, however, so I found a Venomous Tentacula elsewhere and gave that to him instead. The task proved to be more difficult than I thought, so I asked Ackley to compensate me extra for my efforts.
在三把扫帚外遇到一个名叫阿克利·巴恩斯的人后，我得知他想通过偷走前商业伙伴阿尔弗雷德·洛莱的毒触手来加以破坏。他问我是否愿意为他做这件事。然而，我不想从霍格莫德居民那里偷东西，所以我在别处找到了一个毒触手，然后把它交给他。这项任务比我想象的要困难得多，所以我请巴恩斯先生为我的努力提供额外的补偿。

After meeting a man named Ackley Barnes outside the Three Broomsticks, I learned that he wanted to sabotage his ex-business partner, Alfred Lawley, by stealing his Venomous Tentacula. He asked if I would do it for him. I sneaked into Lawley's cellar and retrieved the Venomous Tentacula and gave it to him for the compensation promised.
在三把扫帚外遇到一个名叫阿克利·巴恩斯的人后，我得知他想通过偷走前商业伙伴阿尔弗雷德·洛莱的毒触手来加以破坏。他问我是否愿意为他做这件事。我偷偷溜进了劳利的地窖并取得了毒触手，然后把它交给他并获得承诺的奖励。
COM_22_QuestFail_Caught: You were caught by Alfred Lawley|你被阿尔弗雷德·洛莱发现了
COM_23_TakingTheBiscuit_QuestActive_Jour:
I spoke with Garnuff, a goblin sulking below the western bridge in Hogsmeade. Apparently, Rookwood’s Poacher Pack took Garnuff’s beloved Mooncalf, Biscuit, and are holding her captive in one of their camps north of Hogsmeade. He’s desperate to get Biscuit back before they sell her – or worse.
我和加纳夫交谈过，它是一个在霍格莫德西部桥下闷闷不乐的妖精。显然卢克伍德的盗猎者帮夺走了加纳夫心爱的月痴兽“饼干”，并将其俘虏在霍格莫德以北的一个营地。他迫切希望在他们卖掉饼干 (甚至更糟) 之前把它抢回来。
COM_23_TakingTheBiscuit_QuestActive_Step:
Garnuff said the Poacher camp was north of Hogsmeade. I should start looking there.
加纳夫说盗猎者营地位于霍格莫德以北。我应该从那里开始寻找。

I found Biscuit in a large pen containing other Mooncalves the Poachers have captured. I just need to unlock the cage then rescue her.
我在一个大围栏里找到了饼干，里面装着盗猎者抓获的其他月痴兽。我只需要开启笼子然后拯救它。

I was able to free Biscuit from the Poacher camp north of Hogsmeade. Now to return to Garnuff in Hogsmeade to let him know.
我成功从霍格莫德以北的盗猎者营地救出饼干。现在要回到霍格莫德告诉加纳夫。
COM_23_TakingTheBiscuit_QuestActive_Task: Find the Poacher Camp where Biscuit is held|找到饼干被挟持的盗猎者营地
Return to Garnuff|返回加纳夫那边
COM_23_TakingTheBiscuit_QuestAvailable_S:
I noticed a goblin near the western bridge in Hogsmeade lamenting about a ‘biscuit’. This piqued my curiosity, and I should chat with him when I have time.
在靠近霍格莫德西桥的位置，有一名妖精正在忧伤地嘀咕着“小饼干”几个字。这勾起了我的好奇心，等有时间了我应该考虑与他谈一谈。
COM_23_TakingTheBiscuit_QuestAvailable_T: Talk to the goblin in Hogsmeade|与霍格莫德的妖精交谈
COM_23_TakingTheBiscuit_QuestComplete_Jo:
A goblin named Garnuff had his pet Mooncalf, Biscuit, brutally stolen from him by a group of Poachers. Luckily, I was able to rescue her before anything happened to her. I decided it would be best I kept Biscuit for now. The safest place she could be is my Vivarium. Garnuff does not agree and hopes we never cross paths again.
有一群盗猎者残忍抢走了妖精加纳夫的宠物月痴兽“小饼干”。幸运的是，我赶在一切为时已晚之前成功救出了小饼干。我决定暂时还是由我自己来照料小饼干。有求必应屋的饲养所对她来说是最安全的地方。加纳夫并不认可我的决定，并表示今后再也不想与我扯上关系。

A goblin named Garnuff had his pet Mooncalf, Biscuit, brutally stolen from him by a group of Poachers. Luckily, I was able to rescue her before anything happened to her. It did take a bit more work than I'd thought, so I asked for a reward which Garnuff happily paid me. It's clear Garnuff and Biscuit have a special connection and I'm glad I could reunite them.
有个名叫加纳夫的妖精，它的宠物月痴兽“饼干”被一群盗猎者残忍地偷走了。幸运的是，我成功在它发生任何事情之前救出它。这确实比我想象的还要费工夫，所以我要求加纳夫给予我奖励，而它也很高兴地这么做了。加纳夫和饼干很明显有着特殊的联系，而我很高兴能让它们团聚。
COM_24_HallOfHerodonia_QuestActive_Journ:
Sophronia Franklin told me about a hidden Accio training hall in the school. She hasn't learned how to cast Accio yet, so she can't go in herself. But if I solve the puzzles inside, I can find a unique outfit which she's dying to see. The entrance to the Hall of Herodiana is at the base of the Defence Against the Dark Arts Tower.
索夫罗尼娅·富兰克林告诉我学校里有一个隐藏的飞来咒训练礼堂。她还没有学会如何施放飞来咒，所以她不能自己进去。但是如果我解决了里面的谜题，我可以找到她渴望看到的独特服装。希罗狄安礼堂的入口在黑魔法防御术塔的底部。
COM_24_HallOfHerodonia_QuestActive_StepJ:
Sophronia mentioned the Hall could be found at the base of the Defence Against the Dark Arts Tower.
索菲洛尼亚提到礼堂可以在黑魔法防御塔的底部找到。

I’ve found what I believe to be the entrance to the Hall of Herodiana. It was built for practising Depulso. Perhaps that will get me inside.
我似乎找到了希罗狄安礼堂的入口。这是为练习“统统飞走”而建造。也许这能让我进去。

I’ve made my way inside the Hall of Herodiana. Now to make my way through and find the signature outfit Sophronia mentioned.
我已进入希罗狄安礼堂。现在要通过并找到索菲洛尼亚提到的特色服装。

I was able to complete the Hall of Herodiana and retrieve Herodiana’s signature outfit. I should return to Sophronia to let her know.
我成功完成希罗狄安礼堂并取得希罗狄安的特色服装。我应该回到索菲洛尼亚边并告知她。
COM_24_HallOfHerodonia_QuestActive_TaskO: Find the entrance to the Hall of Herodiana|找到希罗狄安礼堂的入口
Enter the Hall of Herodiana|进入希罗狄安礼堂
Solve Herodiana’s Puzzles ({0}/{1})|解决希罗狄安的谜题
Return to Sophronia|返回索菲洛尼亚那边
COM_24_HallOfHerodonia_QuestAvailable_St:
Sophronia Franklin seems like she could use my help. She’s near Charms class in the lounge.
索夫罗尼娅·富兰克林似乎需要我的帮助。她应该就在魔咒教室附近。
COM_24_HallOfHerodonia_QuestAvailable_Ta: Talk to Sophronia Franklin|与索夫罗尼娅·富兰克林交谈
COM_24_HallOfHerodonia_QuestComplete_Jou:
I solved the puzzles in the Hall of Herodiana and was rewarded with a unique outfit. I showed it to Sophronia Franklin, as promised. She was thrilled.
我解决了希罗狄安礼堂中的谜题，并获得了一套独特的服装。我按照承诺，将其展示给索夫罗尼娅·富兰克林。她很兴奋。

I solved the puzzles in the Hall of Herodiana and was rewarded with a unique outfit. Sophronia Franklin wanted me to show it to her, but I refused. She was not happy and told me as much. She needs to learn to go after what she wants herself. 
我解决了希罗狄安礼堂中的谜题，并获得了一套独特的服装。索夫罗尼娅·富兰克林想要我展示给她看，但我拒绝了。她对我表达不满。她需要学会自己追求想要的东西。
COM_24_TheHallofHerodiana_QuestTitle: The Hall of Herodiana|希罗狄安礼堂
COM_25_BirdsofaFeather_QuestActive_Journ:
I spoke with Marianne Moffett in Marunweem about an albino Diricawl she calls 'Gwyneira'. Marianne wants to use Gwyneira’s unique feathers as fashion accessories but hasn’t been able to capture the crafty Diricawl. She mentioned Gwyneira could be found at the Diricawl Den west of Marunweem across the lake, and that she only appears at night. Such a rare creature would be a valuable target for Rookwood’s lot, so rescuing it beforehand might be prudent.
我在马伦威姆与玛丽安娜·墨菲特谈过她称之为“格薇妮拉”的白化症球遁鸟。玛丽安想将格薇妮拉独特的羽毛用作时尚饰品，但未能捕捉到这只狡猾的球遁鸟。她提到格薇妮拉可在湖对面马伦威姆以西的球遁鸟巢找到，且只在晚上出现。如此稀有的生物会是卢克伍德的宝贵目标，因此事先将其救出或许是谨慎的做法。
COM_25_BirdsofaFeather_QuestActive_StepJ:
Miss Moffett pointed me to the location of the Diricawl Den, but Gwyneira only appears at night.
墨菲特小姐告诉了我该去哪里寻找球遁鸟的巢穴，但格薇妮拉只会在夜间出没。

After nightfall, I arrived at the Diricawl Den that Marianne Moffett spoke of. Investigating the location, now that it's dark, should reveal the albino Diricawl, Gwyneira.
夜幕降临后，我到达了玛丽安娜·墨菲特所说的球遁鸟巢。调查该地点，现在天色已黑，应该可发现白化症的球遁鸟“格薇妮拉”。

I was able to rescue Gwyneira the albino Diricawl. Now to return to Marianne Moffett in Marunweem to let her know.
我成功救出白化症球遁鸟格薇妮拉。现在要回到马伦威姆的玛丽安娜·墨菲特那边，并告诉她。
COM_25_BirdsofaFeather_QuestActive_TaskO: Go to the Diricawl Den at night|在夜晚前往球遁鸟巢
Return to Marianne Moffett|返回玛丽安娜·墨菲特那边
COM_25_BirdsofaFeather_QuestAvailable_Jo:
When strolling through the hamlet of Marunweem, I overheard a woman talking about saving a Diricawl. Sounds intriguing. I should investigate. 
在马伦威姆村庄中，我无意间听见一名女子正在谈论解救球遁鸟的事情。听起来有点意思。我也许该去调查一下。
COM_25_BirdsofaFeather_QuestAvailable_Ta: Speak with the woman in Marunweem |与马伦威姆的女子交谈
COM_25_BirdsofaFeather_QuestComplete_Jou:
I located and rescued Gwyneira, an albino Diricawl, whose den was west of Marunweem. Marianne Moffett wanted to care for the Diricawl and in exchange use its rare feathers for fashion accessories. I returned the Diricawl to her as I believe she will keep it safe from Rookwood’s lot. But my efforts weren’t free. I demanded Miss Moffett pay me for the task, which she did.
我找到并救了格薇妮拉这只白化症球遁鸟，其巢穴位于马伦威姆以西。玛丽安娜·墨菲特想要照顾球遁鸟，并用其稀有的羽毛制作时尚饰品。我把球遁鸟还给她，因为我相信她会保护它远离卢克伍德。但我的努力并非免费。我要求墨菲特小姐为这项任务给予我报酬，而她照做了。

I located and rescued Gwyneira, an albino Diricawl, whose den was west of Marunweem. Marianne Moffett wanted to care for the Diricawl and in exchange use its rare feathers for fashion accessories. Using such a rare specimen for the luxury of fashion seemed cruel, so I decided to keep the Diricawl myself, away from both Rookwood’s lot and the exploitative Miss Moffett, who was not happy.
我找到并救了格薇妮拉这只白化症球遁鸟，其巢穴位于马伦威姆以西。玛丽安娜·墨菲特想要照顾球遁鸟，并用其稀有的羽毛制作时尚饰品。将如此稀有的种类用在奢华的时尚似乎很残忍，所以我决定自己保留球遁鸟，使其远离卢克伍德以及墨菲特小姐的剥削，而后者并不高兴。

I located and rescued Gwyneira, an albino Diricawl, whose den was west of Marunweem. Marianne Moffett wanted to care for the Diricawl and in exchange use its rare feathers for fashion accessories. I returned the Diricawl to her as I believe she will keep it safe from Rookwood’s lot.
我找到并救了格薇妮拉这只白化症球遁鸟，其巢穴位于马伦威姆以西。玛丽安娜·墨菲特想要照顾球遁鸟，并用其稀有的羽毛制作时尚饰品。我把球遁鸟还给她，因为我相信她会保护它远离卢克伍德。
COM_25_BirdsofaFeather_QuestTitle: Birds of a Feather|丰羽之鸟
COM_27_RococoComeHome_QuestActive_Journa:
Agnes Coffey, a vendor in Bainburgh, has lost her beloved Niffler, Rococo, who became distracted by something shiny near ‘Henrietta’s Hideaway’ and took off after it. Miss Coffey is desperate to be reunited with her Niffler, noting that she would track Rococo down herself if not for the Ashwinders in and around the castle – not to mention the traps throughout the castle to hide Henrietta’s treasure.
班伯格的小贩艾格尼丝·科菲失去了她心爱的嗅嗅洛可可，它被“亨丽艾塔的藏身处”附近闪亮的东西分散了注意力，然后就为了追随而离开了。科菲小姐迫切希望与她的嗅嗅重聚，并指出要不是城堡里边和周围的火灰蛇，她会自己去追踪洛可可，更不用说城堡各处所设下用来隐藏亨丽艾塔财宝的陷阱了。
COM_27_RococoComeHome_QuestActive_StepJo:
To find Rococo, I need to find the castle belonging to the late Henrietta. Miss Coffey noted it’s south of Bainburgh.
为了找到洛可可，我需要找到属于已故亨丽艾塔的城堡。科菲小姐说该城堡位于班伯格以南。
I’ve found Henrietta’s Hideaway. Now to find a way in. |我终于找到了亨丽艾塔的藏身点。现在得先办法进去。

I’m sure Rococo has been here. There are coin piles littered about. Now to find where he is.
我敢肯定洛可可曾经在这里。到处都是硬币堆。现在要找到它在哪里。

Rococo managed to find a secret treasure room that even the Ashwinders couldn’t reach. Clever Niffler! Now to rescue him.
洛可可设法找到了一个连火灰蛇都无法到达的秘密宝藏室。聪明的嗅嗅！现在来救它。
I have Rococo. Now to leave the castle and return to Miss Coffey in Bainburgh.|我找到了洛可可。现在要离开城堡，并回到班伯格去找科菲小姐。
COM_27_RococoComeHome_QuestActive_TaskOb: Find Henrietta's Hideaway|找到亨丽艾塔的藏身处
Enter Henrietta's Hideaway|进入亨丽艾塔的藏身处
Return to Agnes Coffey|返回艾格尼丝·科菲那边
COM_27_RococoComeHome_QuestAvailable_Ste:
The vendor in Bainburgh seems to be worried about 'her poor boy'. It sounds like she needs help.
班伯格的小贩似乎很担心“她的可怜小男孩”。听起来她需要帮助。
COM_27_RococoComeHome_QuestAvailable_Tas: Speak with the vendor in Bainburgh|与班伯格的商贩交谈
COM_27_RococoComeHome_QuestComplete_Jour:
While visiting the hamlet of Bainburgh, I met Agnes Coffey who was distressed over losing her pet Niffler, Rococo. I tracked the clever creature to a castle called ‘Henrietta's Hideaway’, where I found him holed up in a secret treasure room. I brought Rococo back to Miss Coffey, but as Rococo had taken a liking to me, I decided to keep him. Miss Coffey was miffed and vowed to never sell to me again.
在造访班伯格的小村庄时，我遇到了艾格尼丝·科菲，她因失去宠物嗅嗅洛可可而痛苦不已。我追踪这个聪明的生物到了一座名为“亨丽艾塔的藏身处”的城堡，在那里我发现它躲在一个秘密的宝藏室里。我把洛可可带回给科菲小姐，但由于洛可可喜欢我，我决定留下它。科菲小姐很生气，并发誓再也不卖物品给我了。

I brought Rococo back to Miss Coffey, who was overjoyed to be reunited with her pet. I'm happy to have been able to help.

COM_28: The Hippogriff Marks the Spot|鹰马翼兽标记点
COM_28_01_MissionActive_Journal:
I've discovered a map that leads to a mysterious location. I should follow it and find out what lies at the end. 
我发现了一张通往神秘地点的地图。我应该追随它，并找出尽头的真相。
COM_28_01_MissionActive_Task: Use Henrietta's Map to find the treasure|使用亨丽艾塔的地图寻找宝藏
COM_28_01_MissionComplete: I successfully followed the mystery map which led me to its secrets. |我成功地跟随了神秘地图，它把我带至其秘密。
COM_28_HenriettasHideaway_QuestActive_Jo:
I deftly nabbed the rolled parchment from the table in Poidsear Castle, which looks to be a treasure map that describes castle ruins on a peninsula. A final image shows a hippogriff surrounded by flames. I believe the map might lead to a treasure of sorts. I should look out for such ruins.
在波德希尔城堡，我巧妙地拿走了摆放在桌上的一卷羊皮纸，展开之后我才发现那好像是一份藏宝图，上面描绘着某处半岛地形上的城堡废墟。最后的图画则是一只被火焰包裹着的鹰马翼兽。这张地图应该能带我找到某种宝物。我需要留意类似的废墟。
COM_28_HenriettasHideaway_QuestActive_St:
Henrietta's Map portrays castle ruins on a peninsula. A hippogriff surrounded by flames is also etched onto it.
亨丽艾塔的地图描绘了位于某处半岛地形上的城堡废墟。除此以外，地图上还蚀刻着被火焰包裹的鹰马翼兽的图案。
COM_28_HenriettasHideaway_QuestActive_Ta: Use Henrietta's Map to find the treasure|使用亨丽艾塔的地图找到宝藏
COM_28_HenriettasHideaway_QuestAvailable:
While exploring Poidsear Castle in the Southern Coast, I noticed an important-looking rolled parchment resting on a table within the castle grounds.
在探索南部海岸的波德希尔城堡时，我注意到城堡内的一张桌子上，放着一张看起来很重要的羊皮纸。
Retrieve the rolled parchment from the table in Poidsear Castle|从波德希尔城堡的桌子上取回卷起的羊皮纸
COM_28_HenriettasHideaway_QuestComplete_:
The infamous Henrietta’s Hideaway was home to the treasure alluded to in the map. I needed to light and extinguish the correct combination of flames surrounding a hippogriff statue to obtain the treasure. Something tells me this isn’t the only thing hidden in these old ruins.
原来臭名昭著的“亨丽艾塔的藏身点”便是藏宝图指向的位置。只有按照正确的组合点燃并熄灭鹰马翼兽雕像周围的火焰，我才能够拿到宝藏。但是我下意识地觉得，潜藏在这些古老废墟之中的远不止那么简单。
COM_28_HenriettasHideaway_QuestTitle: The Hippogriff Marks the Spot|鹰马翼兽标记点
COM_28_MissionAvailable_Journal: I may have found a treasure map that could lead to undiscovered treasures.|我似乎找到了一张藏宝图，或许能找到未被发现的宝藏。
COM_28_TheHippogriffMarkstheSpot_QuestTi: The Hippogriff Marks the Spot|鹰马翼兽标记点
COM_28_Title: The Hippogriff Marks the Spot|鹰马翼兽标记点
COM_29_ThickAsThieves_Journal01:
Selwyn is held up with other Ashwinders in the Clagmar Castle ruins, which are in the South Coast, to the south of Cragcroft. 
塞尔温与其他火灰蛇被困在位于克罗夫特南部南海岸的克雷格摩尔城堡废墟中。
COM_29_ThickAsThieves_Journal02:
I’ve located the Ashwinder camp in the Clagmar Castle ruins. Now to find Silvanus and dispatch him for this bounty. 
我在克雷格摩尔城堡废墟中找到了火灰蛇营地。现在要去找希尔维诺斯，并捉拿他来获得赏金。
COM_29_ThickAsThieves_Journal03:
Silvanus Selwyn, the local leader of the South Coast Ashwinders, has been dispatched. It wasn’t an easy task, so I hope the bounty Madam Olivier offers is worth my efforts.
南海岸火灰蛇的当地领导者斯尔瓦努斯·塞尔温已被捉拿。这不是件容易的事，所以我希望奥莉薇亚夫人提供的赏金能匹配我付出的劳力。
COM_29_ThickAsThieves_MissionJournal:
I spoke with Hyacinth Olivier in Cragcroft about a band of Ashwinders that have set up camp nearby in the ruins of old Clagmar Castle. She mentioned they were about to leave the area until their new leader, Silvanus Selwyn, arrived. Since then, their attacks have become more frequent, disrupting trade. Madam Olivier said she’s offering a bounty to anyone who can rid the camp of Selwyn, as she believes the rest of his crew will disband after that. The Clagmar Castle ruins can be found south of Cragcroft, on the South Coast.
我在克罗夫特与海辛斯·奥莉薇亚谈过一队火灰蛇，他们在附近的旧克雷格摩尔城堡废墟中设置营地。她提到他们即将离开该地区，直到他们的新领导者斯尔瓦努斯·塞尔温到达。从那以后，他们的袭击变得更加频繁，并扰乱了贸易。奥莉薇亚夫人说，她将悬赏任何能够摆脱塞尔温营地的人，因为她相信他的其他船员将在那之后解散。克雷格摩尔城堡遗址位于南海岸的克罗夫特以南。
COM_29_ThickAsThieves_QuestAvailable_Jou: It seems Cragcroft has a problem with Ashwinders.|克罗夫特似乎遇到跟火灰蛇有关的问题。
COM_29_ThickAsThieves_QuestAvailable_Tas: Talk to Hyacinth Olivier|与海辛斯·奥莉薇亚交谈
COM_29_ThickAsThieves_QuestComplete_Exto:
I dealt with the Ashwinder Silvanus Selwyn, whose band was terrorising the locals in Cragcroft. As I had to sneak into the camp and dispatch both him and his gang, I convinced Madam Olivier to raise the bounty she had offered, lest Selwyn find out who had offered it. She was not happy, but paid me.
我对付了火灰蛇斯尔瓦努斯·塞尔温，他的帮派在克罗夫特恐吓当地人。由于我必须潜入营地并把他和其帮派赶走，因此我说服奥莉薇亚夫人提高她提供的赏金，以免塞尔温发现提供者。她不怎么高兴，但还是把钱付给我。
COM_29_ThickAsThieves_QuestComplete_Take:
I dealt with the Ashwinder Silvanus Selwyn, whose band was terrorising the locals in Cragcroft. Hopefully the ongoing threats to the villagers in and around Cragcroft will lessen or vanish completely. Hyacinth Olivier offered a generous bounty and was more than elated to know that Selwyn had been dispatched.
我对付了火灰蛇斯尔瓦努斯·塞尔温，他的帮派在克罗夫特恐吓当地人。希望克罗夫特及其周边村民所受到的长期威胁能够减少或完全消失。海辛斯·奥莉薇亚提供十分慷慨的赏金，且十分高兴得知塞尔温已被捉拿。
COM_29_ThickAsThieves_TaskObj01: Find Silvanus Selwyn’s Hideout|找到斯尔瓦努斯·塞尔温的藏身处
COM_29_ThickAsThieves_TaskObj02: Defeat Silvanus Selwyn|击败斯尔瓦努斯·塞尔温
COM_29_ThickAsThieves_TaskObj03: Return to Hyacinth Olivier|返回海辛斯·奥莉薇亚那边
COM_30_Arachnophobia_QuestActive_Journal:
The vendor in Aranshire, Edgar Adley, told me about an heirloom pocket watch left behind in a cave where he and his friend Milo went to procure venom from a live Acromantula, ‘The Absconder’. Milo was poisoned by the beast, and his final wish was that Edgar take his watch to give to Milo’s daughter. I should try and retrieve it.
跟阿兰郡的商人埃德加·艾德里交谈过后，我得知了遗落在某处洞窟中的传家宝怀表一事，原来之前艾德里和他的朋友麦洛因为想要从活的八眼巨蛛“逃贼”身上提取毒液而冒险进入了那个洞窟。麦洛在这过程中不幸中了蜘蛛的致命毒素，临终之际，麦洛希望埃德加能够将自己身上的怀表带给女儿。我应该试着帮助他们取回怀表。
COM_30_Arachnophobia_QuestAvailable_Jour: A vendor in Aranshire seems to need help with something.|阿兰郡的一位商人似乎需要帮忙。
COM_30_Arachnophobia_QuestAvailable_Task: Talk with Edgar Adley|与埃德加·艾德里交谈
COM_30_Arachnophobia_QuestComplete_Journ:
After battling the Acromantula ‘The Absconder’, I found and returned Milo’s heirloom pocket watch to Mr Adley in Aranshire. I was happy to know that he had closure and could give Milo’s daughter the heirloom that was meant for her.
在与八眼巨蛛“潜逃者”战斗后，我找到了麦洛的传家宝怀表，并将其归还给阿兰郡的艾德里先生。我很高兴知道事情已结束，而他可以将属于麦洛女儿的传家宝给她了。

After battling the Acromantula ‘The Absconder’, I found and returned Milo’s heirloom pocket watch to Mr Adley in Aranshire. It took a bit more work than Mr Adley had let on, so I asked him to make it worth my efforts. His offer of payment fell short, so after some deft negotiation, I procured more payment from him. 
在与八眼巨蛛“潜逃者”战斗后，我找到了麦洛的传家宝怀表，并将其归还给阿兰郡的艾德里先生。这比艾德里先生当初所说的还要困难，所以我要求他给予相应的补偿。他所提议的款项并没有兑现，因此在经过一些巧妙的谈判后，我从他那里获得了更多的款项。

After battling the Acromantula ‘The Absconder’, I was able to find and return Milo’s heirloom pocket watch to Edgar Adley in Aranshire. It took a bit more work than Edgar had let on, so I asked him to make it worth my efforts. When he said he'd promised to pay for the supplies Milo's daughter would need to attend Hogwarts one day, I couldn't take his money and returned the heirloom. I am glad that Milo’s daughter will be able to have an heirloom to remind her of her father.
在与八眼巨蛛“潜逃者”战斗后，我找到了麦洛的传家宝怀表，并将其归还给阿兰郡的埃德加·艾德里。这比埃德加当初所说的还要困难，所以我要求他给予相应的补偿。当他说他承诺支付麦洛的女儿有天去霍格沃茨上学所需的用品时，我无法拿他的钱，并归还了传家宝。我很高兴麦洛的女儿能够拥有一件传家宝，能让她想起她的父亲。
COM_30_Arachnophobia_StepJournal01:
I need to find the Absconder’s Cave. It should be in the Forbidden Forest to the northwest of Hogsmeade.
我需要找到潜逃者的洞穴。它应该在霍格莫德西北方的禁林中。
COM_30_Arachnophobia_StepJournal02:
I’ve located the cave of the Absconder. I should dispatch of the Absconder before attempting to look for Milo’s heirloom.
我找到了潜逃者的洞穴。在寻找麦洛的传家宝之前，我应该先迅速了结潜逃者。
COM_30_Arachnophobia_StepJournal03:
I’ve defeated the Absconder, which wasn’t an easy task. Now to search around its cave for Milo’s body and the heirloom pocket watch he had on him.
我打败了潜逃者，而这不是件容易的事。现在，得在它的山洞里寻找麦洛的尸首和他身上的传家宝怀表。
COM_30_Arachnophobia_StepJournal04:
I can’t believe the pocket watch was retrievable. Now to head back to Aranshire to give it to Edgar.
我不敢相信居然能取回怀表。现在要回阿兰郡把它交给艾德格。
COM_30_Arachnophobia_TaskObj01: Find The Absconder's Cave|找到潜逃者的洞穴
COM_30_Arachnophobia_TaskObj03: Find the heirloom Milo left behind|找到麦洛留下的传家宝
COM_30_Arachnophobia_TaskObj04: Return the heirloom to Edgar|将传家宝还给艾德格
COM_31_SpotRemoval_QuestActive_Journal:
Sacharissa Tugwood, a slightly condescending Hufflepuff, is developing a beauty cream to help our classmates with less than perfect skin. The key ingredient is Bubotuber pus, and she's willing to pay someone to collect Bubotubers for her from the Forbidden Forest north of Hogsmeade.
萨查莉莎·塔格伍德是名有点高傲的赫奇帕奇学生，且正在开发一种美容霜，以协助肌肤较不完美的同学。关键成分是巴波块茎脓水，她愿意花钱请人从霍格莫德北部的禁林中为她收集巴波块茎。
COM_31_SpotRemoval_QuestActive_StepJourn:
Sacharissa told me where I should expect to find some Bubotubers in the Forbidden Forest. I should start my search there.
萨查莉莎告诉我能在禁林中找到巴波块茎的位置。我应该在那里展开我的搜索。

I’ve located the spot in the Forbidden Forest where the Bubotubers should be found. I should carefully search around for them to bring them back to Sacharissa.
我找到了能在禁林中发现巴波块茎的位置。我应该仔细四处加以寻找，并将其带回给萨查莉莎。

I was able to find and collect the Bubotubers for Sacharissa. Now to return to her in Hogsmeade.
我成功为萨查莉莎找到并收集了巴波块茎。现在要回到霍格莫德找她。
COM_31_SpotRemoval_QuestActive_TaskObj01: Go to the Forbidden Forest north of Hogsmeade|前往霍格莫德以北的禁林
COM_31_SpotRemoval_QuestActive_TaskObj03: Return to Sacharissa Tugwood|返回萨查莉莎·塔格伍德那边
COM_31_SpotRemoval_QuestAvailable_Journa:
I spotted a Hufflepuff outside Dogweed and Deathcap. She seemed to want my help with something. Perhaps I should speak with her.
我在“茱萸和毒菇”外面发现一个赫奇帕奇学生。她似乎想要我帮忙做点什么。也许我应该和她谈谈。
COM_31_SpotRemoval_QuestAvailable_StepJo:
A Hufflepuff near Dogweed and Deathcap seems to need a favour. I should see what she wants.
“茱萸和毒菇”附近的赫奇帕奇学生似乎需要协助。我应该看看她想要什么。
COM_31_SpotRemoval_QuestAvailable_TaskOb: Speak with the Hufflepuff next to Dogweed and Deathcap|与“茱萸和毒菇”旁边的赫奇帕奇学生交谈
COM_31_SpotRemoval_QuestComplete_Journal:
I harvested Bubotubers from the Forbidden Forest for Sacharissa Tugwood to use in her beauty cream. I had to battle a troll to obtain them, so I asked her to pay me more for my trouble. She agreed, and seemed delighted to be able to help our 'poor, pimply peers.' She may have a knack for this. It will be interesting to see if her concoction works.
我从禁林中采摘了巴波块茎给萨查莉莎·塔格伍德用于她的美容霜。我必须与巨怪战斗才能获得它们，所以我要求她为我的劳力支付更多费用。她同意了，且似乎很高兴能够帮助“长痘痘的可怜同侪”。她可能有这方面的诀窍。让我们拭目以待她的混合物是否有效。

I harvested Bubotubers from the Forbidden Forest for Sacharissa Tugwood to use in her beauty cream. She paid me as promised, and seemed delighted to be able to help our 'poor, pimply peers.' She may have a knack for this. It will be interesting to see if her concoction works.
我从禁林中采摘了巴波块茎给萨查莉莎·塔格伍德用于她的美容霜。她支付所允诺的款项，且似乎很高兴能够帮助“长痘痘的可怜同侪”。她可能有这方面的诀窍。让我们拭目以待她的混合物是否有效。
COM_32_FlightTest_QuestActive_Journal:
Albie Weekes is working on upgrades that will enhance the performance of any broom. He suggests I visit Imelda Reyes and participate in her timed trials. If I beat Imelda's time, and report back to Albie with how my broom performed, it will help him perfect his designs.
艾尔比·威克斯正在研究能够提升任意款式扫帚性能的“升级”。现在他希望我去拜访伊梅尔达·莱耶斯，并参加莱耶斯主持的竞速挑战。如果我能打破伊梅尔达的记录，我需要将自己扫帚的性能报告带给艾尔比，这将能够帮助他完善自己的设计。
COM_32_FlightTest_QuestActive_StepJourna:
After completing my broom flight training in Madam Kogawa’s Flying class, Everett mentioned checking in with Albie Weekes at Spintwitches to get a broom.
在我完成了古川夫人的飞行课上的扫帚飞行训练之后，埃弗雷特建议我去旋转女巫店一趟，那里的老板艾尔比·威克斯是飞天扫帚方面的专家。

I spoke with the salty Imelda Reyes about participating in her broom trial at the Quidditch Pitch. After enduring several insults, I’m setting out to beat her best time.
我找到了桀骜不驯的伊梅尔达·莱耶斯，并表示自己想要参加她在魁地奇球场主持的扫帚试炼。忍受了她的出言不逊之后，我下定决心要打破她在飞行赛道设下的记录。

I purchased a broom from Mr Weekes and he advised I speak with Imelda Reyes at the Quidditch Pitch. She's running timed trials which are sure to be the perfect flight tests.
我向威克斯先生购买了一把飞天扫帚，他建议我前往魁地奇球场并与伊梅尔达·莱耶斯谈一谈。莱耶斯主持的竞速挑战绝对是当下最完美的飞行测试机会。

Imelda was shocked that I had bested her broom trial time on the Quidditch Pitch course. She insisted it was a fluke and that future courses will show that she’s the superior broom flier. In any case, I should update Mr Weekes on the results of the broom trial.
伊梅尔达对我在魁地奇球场上胜过了她的扫帚试炼纪录感到震惊。她坚信这是侥幸，未来的课程会证明她是最优秀的扫帚飞行者。无论如何，我应该向威克斯先生通报扫帚试炼的结果。
COM_32_FlightTest_QuestActive_TaskObj01: Speak with Imelda Reyes at the Quidditch pitch|在魁地奇球场上与伊梅尔达·莱耶斯交谈
COM_32_FlightTest_QuestActive_TaskObj02: Place in the Quidditch pitch Broom Trial|魁地奇球场扫帚试炼的排行
COM_32_FlightTest_QuestActive_TaskObj03: Report back to Imelda|向伊梅尔达回报
COM_32_FlightTest_QuestActive_TaskObj04: Return to Albie Weekes|返回艾尔比·威克斯那边
COM_32_FlightTest_QuestAvailable_Journal:
I completed broom flight training in Madam Kogawa’s Flying class. Afterwards, Everett Clopton recommended I visit Albie Weekes at Spintwitches in Hogsmeade. He mentioned that Mr Weekes is often looking to test out his broom enhancements and that I should be able to obtain my first broom from him.
我在古川夫人的飞行课上完成了扫帚飞行训练。之后埃弗雷特·克洛普顿推荐我去拜访霍格莫德中的旋转女巫店老板“艾尔比·威克斯”。埃弗雷特表示威克斯先生一直在找人帮忙测试自己的扫帚魔咒，而且我也能在他那里买到属于自己的第一把飞天扫帚。
COM_32_FlightTest_QuestAvailable_TaskObj: Purchase a broom at Spintwitches|在旋转女巫店购买扫帚
COM_32_FlightTest_QuestComplete_Journal:
After purchasing my first broom from Albie Weekes in Spintwitches, I was asked to test it out and return the flight data from a broom trial administered by Imelda Reyes. Imelda had set the course record and was sure I wouldn’t be able to beat it, but I surprised both myself and her with my time. I returned the data to Mr Weekes so that he can use it to create even better brooms. He mentioned being in touch when his newest creations are ready. I look forward to it.
在旋转女巫店向艾尔比·威克斯买了我的第一把扫帚后，他要求我加以测试，并从伊梅尔达·莱耶斯管理的扫帚试炼中传回飞行资料。伊梅尔达创下了课程最佳纪录，且确信我无法超越，但我的纪录让我自己和她都感到惊讶。我将资料传回给威克斯先生，让他可加以利用并制造更好的扫帚。他说会在最新作品准备好时与我联系。我十分期待。
COM_33_SweepingtheCompetition_QuestActiv:
I was able to get Albie Weekes’s latest broom enhancement. He’s eager to collect data on my broom’s handling with this enhancement so that he can create even better enhancements. He suggested finding Imelda Reyes south of Hogwarts, as she’s always setting up Broom Trials.
我获得艾尔比·威克斯最新的扫帚增强功能。他渴望通过此增强功能来收集有关我的扫帚处理资料，以便他打造更好的增强功能。他建议在霍格沃茨以南找到伊梅尔达·莱耶斯，因为她总是在安排扫帚试炼。

Albie mentioned that Imelda can be found south of Hogwarts. To get the data he wants, I must participate in her Broom Trial.
艾尔比提到可以在霍格沃茨以南找到伊梅尔达。为了得到他想要的资料，我必须参加她的扫帚试炼。

Imelda is committed to joining a professional Quidditch team and creates Broom Trials to improve her flying skills. She thinks I could pose a real challenge and should attempt to beat her record.
伊梅尔达致力于加入一支专业的魁地奇球队，并打造了扫帚试炼来提高她的飞行技能。她认为我可以与她一较高下，且应该尝试打破她的纪录。

I was able to beat Imelda’s record on her latest Broom Trial. The information I glean from the trial will allow Albie to develop a new broom upgrade. I should return to him as soon as possible.
我在伊梅尔达最新的扫帚试炼中，打破了伊梅尔达的纪录。我从试炼中收集的资料可让艾尔比开发新的扫帚强化。我应该尽快回到他那边。
Speak with Imelda Reyes|与伊梅尔达·莱耶斯交谈
Place in the Hogwarts South Broom Trial|霍格沃茨南方扫帚试炼的排行
Return to Albie Weekes|返回艾尔比·威克斯那边
COM_33_SweepingtheCompetition_QuestAvail:
Albie Weekes of Spintwitches Sporting Needs in Hogsmeade sent me an owl to let me know he has a new broom enhancement available. This enhancement should increase the speed and acceleration of my broom and give me an edge anytime I need to race. I should investigate it when I can.
霍格莫德旋转女巫体育必需品的艾尔比·威克斯寄来一只猫头鹰，让我知道他有新的扫帚增强功能可用。这种增强应该会提高我扫帚的速度和加速度，并在需要比赛的时候让我取得优势。我应该在有空时查看它。

Look into a new broom enhancement with Albie Weekes in Spintwitches Sporting Needs.
在旋转女巫体育必需品中与艾尔比·威克斯一起研究新的扫帚增强功能。
Purchase a broom enhancement from Albie Weekes|在艾尔比·威克斯那里购买一项扫帚魔咒
COM_33_SweepingtheCompetition_QuestCompl:
After I got a new broom enhancement from Albie Weekes at Spintwitches, I agreed to gather data for Albie on how my enhanced broom performed by seeking out Imelda Reyes. She challenged me to a Broom Trial to see if I could beat her record. I ended up beating her time! I returned the results to Albie, who was duly impressed. He promised to let me know when he has a new upgrade available.
在我从旋转女巫店的艾尔比·威克斯那里获得新的扫帚增强功能后，我同意通过寻找伊梅尔达·莱耶斯来为艾尔比收集有关增强扫帚性能的资料。她向我挑战扫帚试炼，看看我是否能打破她的纪录。我最终打败了她！我将成果传回给艾尔比，而他对此印象深刻。他承诺有新的升级可用时会通知我。
COM_34_01_StepJournal:
Albie mentioned that Imelda can be found south of Hogwarts. To get the data he wants, I must participate in her Broom Trial.
艾尔比提到可以在霍格沃茨以南找到伊梅尔达。为了得到他想要的资料，我必须参加她的扫帚试炼。
COM_34_TheSkyIsTheLimit_QuestActive_Jour:
I was able to purchase Albie Weekes’s latest broom upgrade. He’s eager to collect data on my broom’s handling with this upgrade so that he can create even better upgrades from it. He suggested finding Imelda Reyes near the coast far to the southeast of Hogwarts, as she has yet another Broom Flight Trial to participate in.
我成功购买艾尔比·威克斯最新的扫帚强化。他渴望通过这次升级收集关于我的扫帚处理的资料，以便他可以从中打造更好的升级。他建议在霍格沃茨东南部很远的海岸附近找到伊梅尔达·莱耶斯，因为她还有另一个扫帚飞行试炼可参加。
COM_34_TheSkyIsTheLimit_QuestActive_Step:
Albie mentioned that Imelda can be found far to the southeast of Hogwarts, along the Coast. In order to get the data he wants, I’m going to have to participate in her next Broom Flight Trial.
艾尔比提到可以在霍格沃茨东南部的海岸边找到伊梅尔达。为了得到他想要的资料，我必须参加她下一次的扫帚飞行试炼。

Imelda is committed to joining a professional Quidditch team, and creates these Broom Trials to improve her flying skills. She suggests I could pose a real challenge and should attempt to beat her record.
伊梅尔达致力于加入一支专业的魁地奇球队，并打造了扫帚试炼来提高她的飞行技能。她建议我可以与她一较高下，且应该尝试打破她的纪录。

I was able to beat Imelda’s record on her latest Broom Flight Trial. The flight data from the race will allow Albie to research and develop a new broom upgrade. I should return this to him as soon as possible.
我在伊梅尔达最新的扫帚飞行试炼中，打破了伊梅尔达的纪录。比赛的飞行资料可让艾尔比研究并开发新的扫帚强化。我应该尽快将资料传回到他那边。
COM_34_TheSkyIsTheLimit_QuestActive_Task: Speak with Imelda Reyes|与伊梅尔达·莱耶斯交谈

COM_34_TheSkyIsTheLimit_QuestAvailable_J:
Albie Weekes of Spintwitches Sporting Needs in Hogsmeade sent me an owl to let me know he has a broom upgrade available for purchase. This upgrade should improve the attributes of any broom I'm flying. I should check in with him when I have the chance.
艾尔比·威克斯是霍格莫德中的旋转女巫体育必需品的老板，我收到了他寄来的猫头鹰信：他现在推出了一款全新的扫帚强化。按照威斯克先生的说法，这种升级能够改善任意飞天扫帚的表现。有机会我该去店里找他。
COM_34_TheSkyIsTheLimit_QuestAvailable_S:
I should check in with Albie Weekes to learn about his recent broom upgrade available for purchase. He can be found in Spintwitches Sporting Needs in Hogsmeade.
我应该与艾尔比·威克斯联系，以了解最新可供购买的扫帚强化。我可以在霍格莫德旋转女巫体育必需品中找到他。

COM_34_TheSkyIsTheLimit_QuestComplete_Jo:
After I got my new broom upgrade from Albie Weekes at Spintwitches, I agreed to gather data for Albie on how my enhanced broom performed by seeking out Imelda Reyes. She challenged me to another Broom Trial to see if I could beat her new record. I ended up beating her time yet again and returned the results to Albie. He promised to let me know when he has a new upgrade available.
在我从旋转女巫店的艾尔比·威克斯那里获得新的扫帚强化后，我同意通过寻找伊梅尔达·莱耶斯来为艾尔比收集有关增强扫帚性能的资料。她向我挑战另一场扫帚试炼，看看我是否能打破她的新纪录。我最终又再次打败了她，并将成果传回给艾尔比。他承诺有新的升级可用时会通知我。
COM_34_TheSkyIsTheLimit_QuestTitle: The Sky Is the Limit|天空才是极限
COM_34_TheSkysTheLimit_Journal01:
Imelda is committed to joining a professional Quidditch team and creates Broom Trials to improve her flying skills. She thinks I could pose a real challenge and should attempt to beat her record.
伊梅尔达致力于加入一支专业的魁地奇球队，并打造了扫帚试炼来提高她的飞行技能。她认为我可以与她一较高下，且应该尝试打破她的纪录。
COM_34_TheSkysTheLimit_Journal02:
I was able to beat Imelda’s record on her latest Broom Trial. The information I glean from the trial will allow Albie to develop a new broom upgrade. I should return to him as soon as possible.
我成功在最新的扫帚试炼中打破了伊梅尔达的记录。艾尔比将能够依靠我从中获得的数据来开发全新的扫帚强化。我需要尽快回去找他。
COM_34_TheSkysTheLimit_Journal03: With my new race time I should have collected enough data to bring to Albie.|有了新的比赛时间，我应该能收集够多的资料给艾尔比。

COM_36_AThiefintheNight_QuestTitle: A Thief in the Night|夜贼
COM_36_FamilyJewels_QuestActive_Journal:
While visiting Irondale and speaking with the local vendor, Pádraic Haggarty, I learned that his sister Catrin left the hamlet to join up with Rookwood and become a thief. Recently, the hamlet has seen a string of burglaries, including the theft of a Haggarty family heirloom. Mr Haggarty is convinced Catrin is behind the burglaries; he wants her caught and sent to Azkaban.
在造访艾恩代尔并与当地供应商帕德里克·海嘉缇交谈时，我知悉他的妹妹凯特琳离开了小村庄，加入卢克伍德并成了小偷。最近，这个小村庄发生了一系列盗窃案，包括盗窃海格尔提家族的传家宝。海格尔提确信凯特琳是盗窃案的幕后黑手；他希望她被逮捕并送往阿兹卡班。
COM_36_FamilyJewels_QuestActive_StepJour:
Mr Haggarty mentioned that the thief always comes at night. I should return to Irondale then.
海格尔提先生提到小偷总是在晚上来。那我应该回到艾恩代尔。
Since the thief comes at night, I should check around Irondale for clues.|既然小偷晚上来，我应该在艾恩代尔附近寻找线索。

I found a trail of gold coins leading just outside the hamlet. It looks like the thief took more than they could carry. I should follow the trail.
我在小村庄外面发现了一串金币。看起来小偷有点不自量力。我应该跟着小径走。

The trail of coins led me to a Niffler Den. I should capture this Niffler as proof. But where is the Haggarty family heirloom?
硬币的踪迹把我带到了一个嗅嗅巢。我应该抓住这个嗅嗅作为证据。但海格尔提家族的传家宝在哪里？

I caught the culprit, a wily Niffler with a keen sense for valuables. Now to return to Mr Haggarty to show him that it was not Catrin who was thieving after all.
我抓住了罪魁祸首，一个对贵重物品有敏锐感知的狡猾嗅嗅。现在要回到海格尔提先生那里，向他表明偷窃者根本不是凯特琳。
COM_36_FamilyJewels_QuestActive_TaskObj0: Return to the scene in Irondale at night|在夜晚返回艾恩代尔的现场
Look for clues at the scene|在现场寻找线索
Follow the trail of coins |跟随硬币踪迹
Return to Pádraic Haggarty|返回帕德里克·海嘉缇那边
COM_36_FamilyJewels_QuestAvailable_Journ:
The vendor in Irondale seems to be upset about something. I should introduce myself and see what the matter is. 
艾恩代尔的商贩似乎对某事感到不安。我应该自我介绍一下，看看是怎么回事。
COM_36_FamilyJewels_QuestAvailable_TaskO: Speak with the Irondale vendor |与艾恩代尔的商贩交谈
COM_36_FamilyJewels_QuestComplete_Journa:
While visiting Irondale, I met a man named Pádraic Haggarty who told me of a recent string of burglaries in Irondale and that among the stolen items was a family heirloom of his. This distressed him, as his sister Catrin had recently run off to join Rookwood and he suspects she is the thief. I agreed to help him find the burglar. Following the clues led me not to Rookwood but to a Niffler den. I captured the sticky-fingered Niffler, recovered the heirloom, and brought them both back to show Mr Haggarty. He was relieved to know his sister wasn't the thief and grateful to be reunited with his heirloom. I think this will finally give him closure.
在前往艾恩代尔时，我遇见了一个名叫帕德里克·海嘉缇的人，他告诉我最近在艾恩代尔发生了一系列盗窃案，被盗物品中包括他的传家宝。这让他很苦恼，因为他的妹妹凯特琳最近跑去加入卢克伍德，他怀疑她就是小偷。我同意帮助他找到窃贼。而线索并未引导我至卢克伍德，而是来到一个嗅嗅巢。我抓住了爱偷窃的嗅嗅，找回了海格尔提的传家宝，并把这两样都带回来给海嘉缇看。得知他的妹妹不是小偷后，海嘉缇松了一口气，并且非常感激能与他的传家宝团聚。我认为这终于让他了却一桩心事。

While visiting Irondale, I met a man named Pádraic Haggarty who told me of a recent string of burglaries in Irondale and that among the stolen items was a family heirloom of his. This distressed him, as his sister Catrin had recently run off to join Rookwood and he suspects she is the thief. I agreed to help him find the burglar. Following the clues led me not to Rookwood but to a Niffler den. I captured the sticky-fingered Niffler, although I wasn't able to find the missing heirloom. When I showed the Niffler to Mr Haggarty, he was relieved to know his sister wasn't the thief. Even though he wasn't reunited with his heirloom, I think he was still somewhat satisfied.
在前往艾恩代尔时，我遇见了一个名叫帕德里克·海嘉缇的人，他告诉我最近在艾恩代尔发生了一系列盗窃案，被盗物品中包括他的传家宝。这让他很苦恼，因为他的妹妹凯特琳最近跑去加入卢克伍德，他怀疑她就是小偷。我同意帮助他找到窃贼。而线索并未引导我至卢克伍德，而是来到一个嗅嗅巢。我抓住了爱偷窃的嗅嗅，然而却未能找到遗失的传家宝。当我向海嘉缇展示嗅嗅时，他在得知妹妹不是小偷后松了一口气。虽然他没有与传家宝团聚，但我想他还是已经满足了。
COM_37_ADisillusionmentDispute_QuestActi:
Mr Pippin wants me to deliver 3 Invisibility Potions to Fatimah Lawang in Keenbridge, to the south of Hogwarts. He mentioned that Madam Lawang has grown frustrated with the quality of his recent potions and he claims it is because he's been struggling with an increase in demand. 
皮聘先生想要我前往霍格沃茨南面的村庄肯桥，并给居住在那里的法蒂玛·拉旺带去 3 份隐形魔药。皮聘先生提到拉旺夫人最近对他家的魔药品质极为不满，不过皮聘先生认为这是因为供不应求导致的问题。

Fatimah Lawang lives in Keenbridge, to the south of Hogwarts. Hopefully it'll be easy enough to find her there. 
法蒂玛·拉旺住在霍格沃茨南部的肯桥。希望在那里很容易找到她。

Madam Lawang is a tad apprehensive about the brew quality of Mr Pippin's latest potions. She wants me to demonstrate their efficacy before finalising her purchase. 
拉旺夫人对皮聘先生提供的新一批魔药质量略有怀疑。在决定付款之前，她希望“我”来亲自示范这些魔药的效果。

The potions have been tested and Fatimah Lawang's fears have been assuaged. I can now deliver the potions to her in Keenbridge, to the south of Hogwarts. 
魔药测试有效，法蒂玛·拉旺之前的担忧随即烟消云散。我现在可以去霍格沃茨南面的肯桥运送隐身魔药了。

I have managed to deliver the potions to Fatimah Lawang and should now return to Mr Pippin.
法蒂玛·拉旺已经收到了魔药，我可以回去找皮聘先生了。

Parry Pippin of J. Pippin's Potions in Hogsmeade sent me an owl regarding a delivery. I should speak with him if I'm looking for some simple work.
佩利·皮聘是霍格莫德中的J·皮聘魔药店的老板，他给我寄了封猫头鹰信，希望我帮忙送货。听上去是个赚零花钱的好机会，有时间就去找他谈一谈吧。

COM_38_SolvedbytheBell_QuestTitle: Solved by the Bell|由钟声解决
COM_38_TheRingingBells_FindTheTreasure_T: Follow the Musical Map |跟着音乐地图
COM_38_TheRingingBells_Journal01:
While exploring Henrietta’s Hideaway, I encountered an interesting map. The Musical Map displays an image of a series of bells along with what looks like sheet music and a map location. I should use this map to find what its hiding.
在探索亨丽艾塔的藏身处时，我发现了一张有趣的地图。这张音乐地图显示一系列钟声的图像，以及看起来像乐谱的内容和地图位置。我应该使用这张地图来找到所隐藏的东西。
COM_38_TheRingingBells_QuestAvailable_Jo: There is a valuable item at Henrietta's Hideaway. I should find out what it is.|亨丽艾塔的藏身处有一件贵重物品。我应该找出是什么。
COM_38_TheRIngingBells_QuestComplete_Jou:
I was able to solve the riddle of the Treasure Map I found in Henrietta’s Hideaway, which involved ringing the bells in a particular order. Doing so elicited a beautiful song, which seemed to be magically enchanted. When the song ended, a treasure chest magically appeared near my feet! I should keep an eye out for more of these maps.
我解开了在亨丽艾塔的藏身处找到的藏宝图之谜，其中包括按特定顺序敲钟。这样做会引出一首优美且似乎施有魔法的歌曲。当歌曲结束时，一个宝箱神奇地出现在我的脚边！我应该留意更多这些地图。
COM_38_TheRingingBells_StepTask_Journal:
The valuable item in Henrietta’s Hideaway was a Musical Map. I should seek its treasure.
亨丽艾塔的藏身处中的珍贵物品是一张音乐地图。我应该寻找它的宝藏。
COM_38_TheRingingBells_TaskObj02: Use the Musical Map to find the treasure|使用音乐地图寻找宝藏
COM_40_The_Unique_Unicorn_QuestActive_Jo:
Betty Bugbrooke is terribly worried about her unicorn friend Hazel who was injured protecting her from wolves. It seems Betty often visits Hazel in the Forbidden Forest to brush her and bring her treats. She is concerned for Hazel's safety due to increasing poacher presence and Hazel's injury. She’s hopeful someone can find and take Hazel somewhere safe to heal. I should be able to identify her by her beautifully bright and shiny coat.
贝蒂·柏布鲁克非常担心她的独角兽朋友“黑兹尔”，它为了保护她免受狼的伤害而受伤。贝蒂似乎经常去禁林里拜访黑兹尔，给它刷牙并给它带零食。由于盗猎者的增多和黑兹尔受伤，她很担心黑兹尔的安全。她希望有人能找到黑兹尔并将它带到安全的地方治疗。我应该能够通过它美丽而闪亮的皮毛认出它。
COM_40_The_Unique_Unicorn_QuestActive_St:
Mrs Bugbrooke noted that Hazel can be found north of Hogsmeade in a unicorn den in the Forbidden Forest. I should look there if I’m to have a chance of finding her.
柏布鲁克夫人指出，黑兹尔可以在霍格莫德北部禁林的一个独角兽巢穴中找到。如果我有机会找到它，我应该去那里看看。

I’ve found an area in the Forbidden Forest with a unicorn den. Now to keep my eye out for Hazel.
我在禁林中发现了一个有独角兽巢穴的区域。现在让我留意黑兹尔。

I was able to rescue Hazel the unicorn. Now to return to Mrs Bugbrooke in Hogsmeade to give her the good news.
我成功拯救独角兽黑兹尔。现在要回到霍格莫德的柏布鲁克夫人那里，并告诉她这个好消息。
COM_40_The_Unique_Unicorn_QuestActive_Ta: Find the unicorn den|找到独角兽巢
Find and rescue Hazel the unicorn|寻找并拯救独角兽黑兹尔
Tell Mrs Bugbrooke that her unicorn is safe|告诉柏布鲁克夫人她的独角兽安全无虞
COM_40_The_Unique_Unicorn_QuestAvailable:
I spotted an elderly woman in Hogsmeade Square. She seemed to want my help with something. Perhaps I should speak with her.
我在霍格莫德广场看见了一位老妇人。她似乎需要我的帮助。也许我该上前与她谈一谈。

Betty Bugbrooke is terribly worried about her unicorn friend Hazel who was injured protecting her from wolves. It seems Betty often visits Hazel in the Forbidden Forest to brush her and bring her treats. She is concerned for Hazel's safety due to increasing poacher presence and Hazel's injury. She’s hopeful someone can find and take Hazel somewhere safe to heal. I should be able to identify her by her beautifully bright and shiny coat.
贝蒂·柏布鲁克非常担心她的独角兽朋友“黑兹尔”，它为了保护她免受狼的伤害而受伤。贝蒂似乎经常去禁林里拜访黑兹尔，给它刷牙并给它带零食。由于盗猎者的增多和黑兹尔受伤，她很担心黑兹尔的安全。她希望有人能找到黑兹尔并将它带到安全的地方治疗。我应该能够通过它美丽而闪亮的皮毛认出它。
Speak with the woman in Hogsmeade Square|与霍格莫德广场上的老妇人交谈
COM_40_The_Unique_Unicorn_QuestComplete_:
I was able to rescue Hazel the unicorn from the Forbidden Forest. I gave the news to Mrs Bugbrooke in Hogsmeade and told her I would keep Hazel safe, but that I would need some money to help care for her. She was relieved and grateful and happily paid me, noting that it was worth almost any amount of Galleons to make sure her 'dear girl' would be cared for.
我成功从禁林中救出独角兽黑兹尔。我把这个消息告诉了霍格莫德的柏布鲁克夫人，并跟她说我会保护黑兹尔的安全，但需要一些钱来帮助照顾它。她如释重负、心存感激，并高兴地付钱给我，且表示几乎任何数量的加隆都值得，以确保她的“亲爱的女孩”得到照顾。

I was able to rescue Hazel the unicorn from the Forbidden Forest. I gave the news to Mrs Bugbrooke in Hogsmeade and told her I would keep Hazel safe. She was relieved and grateful. She thanked me for my kind heart and asked me to give Hazel a nice brushing for her.
我成功从禁林中救出独角兽黑兹尔。我把这个消息告诉了霍格莫德的柏布鲁克太太，并跟她说我会保护黑兹尔的安全。她如释重负、感激不尽。她感谢我的好心，并请我好好刷一下黑兹尔。
COM_40_TheUniqueUnicorn_QuestTitle: The Unique Unicorn|独特的独角兽

Confringo_Desc:
A long-range bolt that deals damage on impact. Enemies hit with fire-based attacks will continue to take damage for a few seconds, during which time collisions will result in incendiary bursts.
命中后造成伤害的远距离火焰弹。遭到火属性攻击命中的敌人将会在几秒内持续承受伤害，在此期间如果遭受剧烈撞击还将引发火焰迸发。

CourtshipCave_desc:
A small cave frequented by young couples of the past due to its seclusion and romantic ambiance
过去的年轻伴侣经常光顾的一个小洞穴，因其具有隐蔽和浪漫的氛围
CreatureAttribute_Aggressive_desc: These beasts are likely to attack anything nearby.|这些野兽很可能会攻击附近的任何东西。
CreatureAttribute_Alert_desc: These beasts are likely to flee or attack much sooner than others.|这些野兽很可能比其他野兽更快地逃跑或攻击。
CreatureAttribute_Evasive_desc: These beasts are much harder to hit directly with spells.|这些野兽更难被咒语直接击中。
CreatureAttribute_Fast_desc: These beasts are faster than others, and are much harder to keep up with.|这些野兽比其他野兽更快，而且更难跟上。
CreatureAttribute_Flying_desc: These beasts are able to negate the effects of levitation-based spells.|这些野兽能够抵消悬浮咒语的效果。
CreatureAttribute_Graphorn_desc:
These beasts are able to negate the effects of most spells because of their thick and magically resistant skin.
这些野兽能够抵消大多数咒语的效果，因为其皮肤厚且具有魔法抗性。
CreatureAttribute_LargeBeasts_desc: These beasts are more resistant to spells that move them.|这些野兽对移动它们的咒语更有抵抗力。
CreatureAttribute_Nocturnal_desc: These beasts only roam at night.|这些野兽只在夜间漫游
CreatureFeed_desc: Food to feed beasts|用来喂养野兽的食物
CreaturePettingBrush_desc: A brush that can be used to groom beasts|用来打理野兽的梳子
CriticalDamage_Buff: Critical Damage Buff|暴击伤害增益
CriticalDamage_Buff_desc: Your critical strike damage is increased|你的暴击伤害增加

Crucio_desc:
Causes most enemies to writhe in pain as they take damage over time. Also curses the victim – and cursed enemies take extra damage.
持续性伤害效果将使绝大多数敌人在痛苦中挣扎。除此以外还将使受害者被诅咒并承受额外伤害。
Crucio_gameplay_desc:
Causes most enemies to writhe in pain as they take damage over time. Also curses the victim – and cursed enemies take extra damage.
持续性伤害效果将使绝大多数敌人在痛苦中挣扎。除此以外还将使受害者被诅咒并承受额外伤害。

DAC_CurseReflect1_desc: Dealing damage to a cursed target inflicts damage to all cursed targets.|对一个受诅咒的目标造成伤害后，将对所有受诅咒的目标造成伤害。

DeathMinion_desc:
These agents of Death attack mercilessly but will fall quickly to the power of a particular wand.
这些死神的部下将会对敌人发动无情攻击，但他们无法匹敌那根特殊魔杖的威力。

Are you sure you would like to permanently delete this character profile and all associated game progress? This action cannot be undone.
确定要永久删除该角色档案和所有相关的游戏进度吗？该操作无法撤消。

Depulso_desc:
Repels many types of objects and enemies with considerable force. Although it deals no direct damage to foes, enemies and objects alike can be launched into each other with destructive results. Also useful for pushing and spinning objects for a variety of purposes.
能够用巨大的力量击退各类物体与敌人。虽然不会造成任何直接伤害，但是敌人与物体相互碰撞时将会产生毁灭性的后果。除此以外，这种咒语还能够用来随心所欲地推开或者是旋转物体。
Depulso_gameplay_desc:
Repels many types of objects and enemies with considerable force. Although it deals no direct damage to foes, enemies and objects alike can be launched into each other with destructive results. Also useful for pushing and spinning objects for a variety of purposes.
能够用巨大的力量击退各类物体与敌人。虽然不会造成任何直接伤害，但是敌人与物体相互碰撞时将会产生毁灭性的后果。除此以外，这种咒语还能够用来随心所欲地推开或者是旋转物体。
Descendo_desc:
Deals no direct damage, but objects and enemies that are slammed to the ground will suffer considerable impact damage. Airborne enemies will take even greater damage upon hitting the ground.
虽然不会造成任何直接伤害，但是狠狠砸向地面的物体与敌人将会承受大量撞击伤害。也正是因为这个原因，在空中的敌人坠落时将会承受更大的伤害。
Descendo_gameplay_desc:

Diricawl_AlbinoByproduct: Albino Diricawl Feather|白化球遁鸟羽毛
Diricawl_AlbinoByproduct_desc: A feather dropped by a rare albino Diricawl|罕见的白化病球遁鸟褪下的羽毛
Diricawl_Byproduct_Desc:
The feathers are shed by the flightless and elusive Diricawls typically inhabiting forested areas. Diricawl feathers can be used to upgrade and assign traits to gear.
球遁鸟虽然无法飞行但依旧神出鬼没，这些野兽通常居住在森林地区。球遁鸟的羽毛可用于强化装备和为其分配特质。
Diricawl_Desc:
Diricawls are plump, fluffy birds incapable of flight. They have the unique ability to vanish and reappear to escape danger. Muggles were aware of these birds at one time and called them Dodos. However, Muggles now believe them to be extinct.
球遁鸟是无法飞行且丰满蓬松的鸟类。它们具有独特的能力，可消失并重新出现以逃避危险。麻瓜们曾一度注意到这些鸟，并称它们为渡渡鸟。然而，麻瓜们现在相信它们已经灭绝了。
DiricawlDen_desc: A den inhabited by Diricawls|球遁鸟居住的巢穴
DiricawlOffspring_desc: A newly born Diricawl|一只新生的球遁鸟
Disillusionment_Desc:
Causes you to blend into your surroundings, making it more difficult for others to perceive you. Perfect for sneaking or approaching enemies undetected to be able to cast Petrificus Totalus.
这种咒语将使你与周遭环境融为一体，因此将更难被其他人发现。最适合用于悄无声息地秘密潜入，或者是在神不知鬼不觉地接近敌人后使用统统石化。
Disillusionment_gameplay_desc:

Dittany_Byproduct_Desc:
Due to their healing properties, these leaves are a key ingredient in Wiggenweld Potion. Dittany seeds can be purchased at The Magic Neep. Can be grown in pots of any size.
这些具有治疗效果的叶片是振奋魔药中的重要原料。可以在神奇萝卜购买白鲜种子。可在任何大小的花盆中种植。
Dittany_desc:
The leaves of this medicinal herb are used in Wiggenweld Potion. Dittany seeds can be purchased at The Magic Neep and can be grown in pots of any size.
这种药用植物的叶片，可以用于制作振奋魔药。可以在神奇萝卜购买白鲜种子。可在任何大小的花盆中种植。
Dittany_Seed_Desc: Unlocks the ability to grow dittany in small pots|解锁使用小型花盆种植白鲜的能力
DittanyPlant_Desc:
Dittany is a strong healing herb and key ingredient in Wiggenweld Potion. It can be grown in the Room of Requirement. Requires a small, medium, or large pot to grow. The seeds can be purchased at The Magic Neep.
白鲜是一种强效的疗伤草药，同时也是振奋魔药中的关键原料。能够在有求必应屋中进行种植。可以在小型、中型或者是大型花盆中种植。可以在神奇萝卜购买白鲜种子。

DMS_01_01_Task: Return {1} Demiguise moons to Gladwin Moon ({0}/{1})|将{1}个隐形兽月亮归还给格拉德温·莫恩
DMS_01_02_Task: Return {1} Demiguise moons to Gladwin Moon ({0}/{1})|将{1}个隐形兽月亮归还给格拉德温·莫恩
DMS_01_TheManBehindtheMoons_QuestActive_:
After teaching me the Unlocking Charm, Alohomora, Gladwin Moon told me of his fear of the elusive Demiguise, and that someone has been placing Demiguise Statues around the castle and the Highlands. In exchange for finding these and returning the moons held by the statues he will teach me more advanced levels of Alohomora. The catch? They must be found and collected at night. 
在教我解锁咒语“阿拉霍洞开”之后，格拉德温·莫恩告诉我，他对难以捉摸的隐形兽感到恐惧，且有人一直在城堡和高地周围放置隐形兽雕像。作为对找到这些并归还雕像所持有之月亮的交换，他会教我更高级的“阿拉霍洞开”。困难点是什么呢？就是必须在晚上找到并收集它们。

Mr Moon will teach me a more advanced form of Alohomora once I find all the Demiguise statues. I should search Hogwarts, Hogsmeade and any hamlets for the statues. I can only collect the moons from the statues at night.
等我找到所有的隐形兽雕像后，莫恩先生会教我更高级的“阿拉霍洞开”形式。我应该在霍格沃茨、霍格莫德和任何小村庄寻找雕像。我只能在晚上从雕像上收集月亮。

Mr Moon will teach me a more advanced form of Alohomora once I find all the Demiguise statues. I should search Hogwarts, Hogsmeade and any hamlets for the statues. I can only collect the moons from the statues at night.
等我找到所有的隐形兽雕像后，莫恩先生会教我更高级的“阿拉霍洞开”形式。我应该在霍格沃茨、霍格莫德和任何小村庄寻找雕像。我只能在晚上从雕像上收集月亮。

I’ve been able to collect all of the moons that Mr Moon requested, but he’s still no closer to knowing who is responsible. He’s asked that I wait to hear back from him.
我已收集莫恩先生要求的所有月亮，但他仍然不知道是谁做的。他要求我等待他的回音。

I received an Owl Mail from a Mr Piers Pemberton who is frustrated that I’ve been taking the moons from the Demiguise Statues. I should pay this man a visit in Hogsmeade.
我收到了来自皮尔斯·彭伯顿先生的猫头鹰邮件，他对我一直在从隐形兽雕像获取月亮感到沮丧。我应该去霍格莫德拜访这个人。

I spoke with Mr Pemberton in Hogsmeade. He was an old schoolmate of Mr Moon’s, and was bullied by him when both were younger. He put these statues in place as a way to get back at Mr Moon. I should update him.
我在霍格莫德与彭伯顿先生交谈。他是莫恩先生的老同学，小时候被他欺负过。他把这些雕像放在适当的位置，作为报复莫恩先生的一种方式。我应该通知他。
Return Demiguise Moons to Gladwin Moon ({0}/{1})|将隐形兽月亮带给格拉德温·莫恩
Return Demiguise Moons to Gladwin Moon ({0}/{1})|将隐形兽月亮带给格拉德温·莫恩
Wait to hear from Gladwin Moon|等待格拉德温·莫恩的消息
Talk to Piers Pemberton |与皮尔斯·彭伯顿交谈
Talk to Gladwin Moon|与格拉德温·莫恩交谈
DMS_01_TheManBehindtheMoons_QuestComplet:
I was able to retrieve all of the Demiguise Moons Mr Moon asked me to find so that he would teach me two advanced versions of Alohomora. I should be able to unlock any locks that require the spell now. In addition, Mr Moon mentioned there may be more statues that I should look for. Ultimately, I discovered found the culprit behind the prank – a Mr Piers Pemberton, an old classmate of Mr Moon’s who was repaying him for bullying when they were young.
我找回了莫恩先生要求我找到的所有隐形兽月亮，以便他教我两个高级版本的“阿拉霍洞开”。我现在应该可以解开任何需要咒语的锁了。此外，莫恩先生提到可能还有更多我应该寻找的雕像。最终，我发现了恶作剧背后的罪魁祸首：皮尔斯·彭伯顿先生，他是莫恩先生的老同学，因年轻时曾被欺凌而想报复。
DMS_01_TheManBehindtheMoons_QuestTitle: The Man Behind the Moons|月亮背后的男人

DUEL_Deflect1_desc:
Blocking a spell with Perfect Protego will send two projectiles back at enemies.
用完美的“盔甲护身”阻挡咒语，将会向敌人反弹两枚飞行物。
DUEL_Deflect1_requirements: Must be able to cast Protego to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：学习使用盔甲护身
Dugbog_Coast_desc:
These camouflaged beasts will often blend in with the environment to avoid detection until their prey is close enough to attack. Revelio can help you find them when exploring their habitats!

While recovering from their attack lunge, they are vulnerable to Force spells that will flip or force their bodies in various directions.

When its mouth is wide open, Levioso can be used on its fleshy tongue to hoist it into the air.
这些善于伪装的野兽往往会与周遭环境融为一体，等到猎物靠近后才会发动凶猛攻击。“原形立现”可帮助你在探索这些野兽的栖息地时发现它们！

发动飞扑过后，泥怪将处于毫无防备的恢复期，会因为强力咒语而导致翻转或强制身体各种转向。

当它们张开大嘴之后，可对其硕大的舌头使用“啦唯啊萨”，以将其甩到半空。
Dugbog_desc:
A swamp-dwelling beast that can easily be mistaken for a hunk of dead wood floating in the water
通常寄宿于沼泽之中的野兽，往往会被人误认为是飘浮在水中的一块浮木

DugBog_Pellet_desc:
Organ gathered from the mouths of Dugbogs. This ingredient is used in the Focus Potion.
从泥怪的口腔中采集到的器官。专注魔药的原料之一。

DugbogKL_desc:
A swamp-dwelling beast who will attack anyone and anything that encroaches on its territory
栖息于沼泽的野兽，会攻击任何侵犯其领土的人事物
DugbogLair_desc: A den inhabited by Dugbogs|泥怪居住的巢穴
DumfreyWestland: Dumfrey Westland|顿弗里·威斯特兰德
DunstanTrinity_desc:
A proficient pickpocket, Dunstan has always enjoyed the art of thieving. In fact, it was his light-fingeredness that led him to a friendless existence at Hogwarts.
作为一名老练的扒手，顿斯坦从小便皈依了偷窃的艺术。正是因为这种手脚不干净的秉性，才使得他当年在霍格沃茨受尽唾弃。
DW_Extortionist_CaptainKL_desc:
Among the quicker of Rookwood's agents, these witches will surprise their opponents with back-to-back attacks.

Their powerful Reductor Curse cannot be blocked by Shield Charms, but interrupting that cast with a Severing Charm will spin them to the point of losing control and hitting one of their own gang.
作为卢克伍德麾下身手更为敏捷的爪牙，这些巫师将会使用密不透风的连续攻击让对手们猝不及防。

护盾魔咒无法抵挡强力粉碎诅咒。但如果在对手施法时对其使用切割魔咒，就能使他们失去控制并攻击自己的同伙。
DW_Extortionist_GruntKL_desc:
These unscrupulous wizards have not mastered Shield Charms, so they are vulnerable to all sorts of attacks.
这些魔法世界中的不法之徒尚未精通护盾魔咒，因此无法有效抵挡各类攻击。
DW_Extortionist_Mage_desc:
Some of the most evil witches alive, these secretive members of Rookwood's organisation have spent years turning the peaceful dead into an army of their own Inferi.

They can summon Inferi to do their bidding at a moment's notice, often surprising their foes as the animated corpses emerge. Best to prevent them from calling forth their Inferi at all, but if all else fails, fire will defeat the undead.

Interrupting their Reductor Curse with a Banishing Charm will cause them to lose control of their spell cast and hit one of their own gang.
这些卢克伍德麾下的秘密爪牙个个都是当世女巫中的大奸大恶之徒，多年来一直在将沉睡着的死者们扭曲转化成自己的阴尸大军。

他们可以随时召唤行尸来为他们效力，当行尸突然出现时，常常会让敌人们吓得措手不及。最好完全阻止他们召唤行尸，如果实在无计可施的话，火焰将会是你面对凶恶阴尸时的最佳帮手。

使用驱逐魔咒干扰他们的粉碎诅咒便可使这些敌人失去控制并攻击自己的同伙。
DW_Extortionist_Sniper_desc:
These witches have mastered the Full Body-Bind Curse in order to capture and terrorise their victims.

Since they prefer to avoid the heart of a battle, pulling them close with Accio is an effective way to disrupt their plans.

A Stunning Spell is often enough to knock them totally unconscious, but cleverness and skill are required to successfully cast it at them.
这些女巫是全身束缚诅咒方面的专家，能够活捉并折磨自己的牺牲品。

在战斗中，这些敌人倾向于远离激烈胶着的中心地点，因此你需要反其道而行之，使用“飞来咒”拉近距离并借此打乱他们的计划。

虽然通常一记昏迷咒语便足以让他们不省人事，但首先你得学会看准时机，凭借熟练的技巧成功命中敌人。
DW_Extortionist_SoldierKL_desc:
These wizards are skilled at deflecting simple attacks, so their Shield Charms must be broken first in order to defeat them.

As they warm up their Expulso Curse, levitating them with Levioso will cause them to lose control of the spell and hit one of their own gang.
这些巫师擅长反弹简单的攻击，因此必须先设法突破护盾魔咒才能打败他们。

当他们准备发动飞沙走石诅咒时，一记恰到好处的飘浮咒语“啦唯啊萨”将能使他们失去控制并攻击自己的同伙。
DW_Extortionist_Tank_desc:
These wizards have mastered the ability to create localised lightning bolts to strike down their opponents.

Disarming them with Expelliarmus as they prepare to cast their lightning spell will cause them to lose control of the spell with self-destructive effects.

Slowing down these wizards with Arresto Momentum while they are conjuring lightning will keep that lightning striking longer, providing an opportunity to launch enemies into that lightning with shocking results.
这些巫师能够熟练地召唤闪电矢打击敌人。

如果在这些敌人施放闪电咒语期间使用“除你武器”将其缴械，这将使他们的咒语失去控制并带来致命的自毁效果。

在他们变幻闪电时对其使用迟缓魔咒“减震止速”将延长闪电打击的持续时间。之后只需要设法让其他敌人落至闪电位置就能让他们自食其果。
DW_Poacher_CaptainKL_desc:
Among the quicker agents of Rookwood, these witches will surprise their opponents with back-to-back attacks.

Their powerful Reductor Curse cannot be blocked by Shield Charms, but interrupting that cast with a Severing Charm will spin them to the point of losing control and hitting one of their own gang.
作为卢克伍德麾下身手更为敏捷的爪牙，这些巫师将会使用密不透风的连续攻击让对手们猝不及防。

护盾魔咒无法抵挡强力粉碎诅咒。但如果在对手施法时对其使用切割魔咒，就能使他们失去控制并攻击自己的同伙。
DW_Poacher_GruntKL_desc:
These unscrupulous wizards have not mastered Shield Charms, so they are vulnerable to all sorts of attacks. Watch out for their counterattacks; they can catch you off guard by casting spells as they recover from being knocked down.
这些魔法世界中的不法之徒尚未精通护盾魔咒，因此无法有效抵挡各类攻击。但是要小心他们的反击，被击倒后，他们能够在起身过程中出其不意地对敌人们迅速施放咒语。
DW_Poacher_Mage: Poacher Animagus|盗猎者阿尼玛格斯
DW_Poacher_Mage_desc:
Some poachers in Rookwood's organisation have become Animagi who can transform into the same animal: a ravenous wolf.

When in their Animagus form, they must be weakened and forced back into human form before they can be properly defeated. The Transformation spell, however, can catch them off guard and revert them in an instant.

Interrupting their Reductor Curse with a Banishing Charm will cause them to lose control of their spell cast and hit one of their own gang.
卢克伍德的组织不乏拥有阿尼玛格斯身份的盗猎者。他们都能变身为同一种动物：贪婪嗜血的恶狼。

当他们处于阿尼玛格斯形态时，你必须设法削弱并逼其回到人类形态，之后才可以彻底击败这些敌人。不过，“变形魔咒”倒是可以让他们措手不及，并在瞬间将他们恢复原状。

使用驱逐魔咒干扰他们的粉碎诅咒便可使这些敌人失去控制并攻击自己的同伙。
DW_Poacher_Mage_INST_B: Poacher Animagus|盗猎者阿尼玛格斯
DW_Poacher_Sniper_desc:
These witches have mastered the Levitation Spell as a means of catching the beasts that they hunt. They use it skilfully in duels and battles against anyone who tries to stop them.

Since they prefer to avoid the heart of a battle, pulling them in close with Accio is an effective way to disrupt their plans.

A Stunning Spell is often enough to knock them totally unconscious, but cleverness and skill are required to successfully cast it at them.
这些女巫是飘浮咒语方面的专家，能够轻松抓捕自己盯上的野兽。在决斗时，她们也会毫不犹豫地运用这些魔咒去对付与自己作对之人。

在战斗中，这些敌人倾向于远离激烈胶着的中心地点，因此你需要反其道而行之，通过“飞来咒”拉近距离并借此打乱他们的计划。

虽然通常一记昏迷咒语便足以让他们不省人事，但首先你得学会看准时机，凭借熟练的技巧成功命中敌人。
DW_Poacher_SoldierKL_desc:
These wizards are skilled at deflecting simple attacks, so their Shield Charms must be broken first in order to defeat them.

As they warm up their Blasting Curse, freezing them with Glacius will have a devastating effect.
这些巫师擅长反弹简单的攻击，因此必须先设法突破护盾魔咒才能打败他们。

当他们在准备爆炸诅咒期间，冰冻魔咒“寒冰冻结”将能够带来毁灭性的效果。
DW_Poacher_Tank_desc:
These wizards have mastered the ability to conjure huge columns of fire to incinerate threats, but it is as dangerous to their own gang as it is to their opponents.

Disarming them with Expelliarmus as they prepare to cast their fire spell will cause them to lose control of the spell with self-destructive effects.

Slowing down these wizards with Arresto Momentum while they are conjuring fire will keep that fire raging longer, providing an opportunity to launch enemies into it with devastating results.
这些技艺娴熟的巫师能够变幻出冲天火柱焚烧敌人，但这种咒语同样也会威胁到他们自己的同伙。

如果在这些敌人施放火焰咒语期间，使用“除你武器”将其缴械，这将使他们的咒语失去控制并带来致命的自毁效果。

恰到好处的迟缓魔咒“减震止速”将会延长这些巫师变幻的火焰持续时间，使你有机会将其他敌人击入火柱中并引发毁灭性的后果。
DW_TheophilusHarlow: Theophilus Harlow|修菲利乌斯·哈罗尔
ear_Armor_Wolf_3_desc: Decreased damage taken from wolves|降低来自狼的伤害
EdmundArcher: Edmund Hawkwright|埃德蒙德·霍克赖特
Edurus_desc:
A potion that enhances the drinker's defence by covering them with a durable rocky skin
一种魔药，可通过坚固的岩石外表来增强饮用者的防御能力
EdurusPotion_desc: Enhances a drinker's defence by covering them with a durable rocky skin|将使服用者周围覆满犹如磐石的坚硬皮肤，并借此提高防御能力
ElevenAndAHalf: Eleven and a half inches|十一又二分之一英寸
ElevenAndAQuarter: Eleven and a quarter inches|十一又四分之一英寸
ElevenAndThreeQuarters: Eleven and three-quarters inches|十一又四分之三英寸
Empty_Back_desc: Choose a robe to wear|选择要穿的长袍

EVC_01_DepthOfAnEstate_QuestActive_Journ:
I hope to discover more about what's happening in Feldcroft – especially more to do with Sebastian's sister, Anne. She lives with their uncle, Solomon Sallow. Long ago, Anne was cursed by Loyalists who have set up camp both at Rookwood Castle and in Feldcroft. They have continued to raid and excavate the area. Searching the hamlet is sure to unveil more.
希望我能够进一步了解费德罗特的事，尤其是塞巴斯蒂安的妹妹安妮现在的情况。安妮现在和自己的叔叔所罗门·萨鲁住在一起。很久以前，驻扎在卢克伍德城堡以及费德罗特周遭的追随者妖精们诅咒了安妮。时至今日，那些恶棍依旧在当地劫掠与开采。调查村庄肯定能带来更多的信息。
EVC_01_DepthOfAnEstate_QuestActive_StepJ:
Sebastian thinks that meeting me will cheer his sister up. I hope he’s right. I should follow him to their home in Feldcroft.
塞巴斯蒂安认为见到我会让他的妹妹振作起来。我希望他是对的。我应该跟着他前往他们在费德罗特的家。
I suppose I should step inside. I hope that I’m not arriving unannounced.|我想我应该走进去。希望我不是非请自来。

Sebastian needs time alone after arguing with his uncle over his sister’s condition. Anne suffered a bout of pain from her curse and it is distressing for the entire family. I should talk to Solomon and Anne. Perhaps there’s something that I can do to help.
塞巴斯蒂安在与叔叔就妹妹的病情发生争执后需要时间独处。安妮因诅咒而痛苦不堪，整个家庭都很痛苦。我应该和所罗门和安妮谈谈。也许我可以做些什么来提供帮助。

I should check on Sebastian. The situation with his sister and uncle has put a great strain on him.
我应该看一下塞巴斯蒂安。他的妹妹和叔叔的情况给他带来了很大的压力。
Sebastian wants me to follow him to the site where his sister was attacked.|塞巴斯蒂安想让我跟着他到他妹妹被袭击的地方。

A troop of Ranrok’s Loyalists have setup an excavation at the site where Sebastian’s sister was cursed. Their presence here cannot be a coincidence. We must defend Feldcroft.
一群兰洛克的追随者在塞巴斯蒂安的妹妹被诅咒的地方展开了挖掘。他们的出现不可能是巧合。我们必须保卫费德罗特。
That was a fight – I’d better talk to Sebastian and make sure he’s unharmed.|那是一场战斗，我最好和塞巴斯蒂安谈谈，确保他没有受伤。

Sebastian told me the story of how Anne was cursed by Ranrok’s Loyalists at this location. This estate seems to be important to them – they are clearly searching for something. I should see what I can find.
塞巴斯蒂安告诉我安妮在此处被兰洛克的追随者诅咒的过程。这个庄园对他们来说似乎很重要，他们显然正在寻找一些东西。我应该看看我能找到什么。

I seem to have discovered a hidden cellar. Perhaps it holds what the goblins have been searching for. I should look.
我似乎发现了一个隐藏的地窖。也许它拥有妖精一直在寻找的东西。我应该看看。

I found more crystallised stone and another passageway in this cellar. I should tell Sebastian that it’s here. The goblins couldn’t see it, which is why it eluded them.
我在这个地窖里发现了更多的结晶石和另一个通道。我应该告诉塞巴斯蒂安它就在这里。妖精们看不到它，这就是它得以闪避它们视线的原因。

I wonder if this passage works like the others I’ve seen. I should lead the way since Sebastian cannot see what I can.
我想知道这个通道章是否像我见过的其他通道一样有效。我应该带路，因为塞巴斯蒂安看不到我能看到的东西。

The triptych contained a scrap of parchment with runes and symbols scrawled on it. They are like ones I’ve seen during the Keepers’ trials.
三联画包含一张羊皮纸，上面潦草地写着符文和符号。他们就像我在守护者试炼中看到的一样。

This piece of parchment may be connected to the Keepers. I should show it to Sebastian and tell him more of what I know.
这张羊皮纸可能与守护者有关。我应该把它展示给塞巴斯蒂安，并告诉他更多我所知道的事。

EVC_01_DepthOfAnEstate_QuestAvailable_Jo:
Sebastian invited me to visit his family’s home in Feldcroft. I’m looking forward to meeting his sister Anne, as he’s told me so much about her. Hopefully his uncle won’t mind a visitor.
塞巴斯蒂安邀请我参观他在费德罗特的家。我很期待见到他的妹妹安妮，因为他告诉了我很多关于她的事。希望他的叔叔不会介意访客。

I promised Sebastian I would meet him Feldcroft. He hopes meeting a new student will bring some cheer to his sister Anne. But there's something ominous happening in Feldcroft.
我答应了塞巴斯蒂安会去费德罗特找他。塞巴斯蒂安希望像我这样的新面孔能够激励自己的妹妹安妮。但现在不祥的气息已经笼罩了费德罗特。
EVC_01_DepthOfAnEstate_QuestAvailable_Pr:
I need to progress in my studies before meeting Sebastian at his home in Feldcroft.
现在我得把精力先放在学习上，之后才能去费德罗特的萨鲁宅邸与塞巴斯蒂安见面。

EVC_01_DepthOfAnEstate_QuestAvailable_Ta: Meet Sebastian in Feldcroft|与塞巴斯蒂安在费德罗特会面
EVC_01_DepthOfAnEstate_QuestComplete_Jou:
Sebastian and I went to visit his twin, Anne, who was cursed by goblins and lives at home. But he and his uncle Solomon argued over Anne’s condition. Sebastian wants to find a cure and Solomon thinks his obsession does more harm than good. Sebastian and I then went where Anne was cursed and defeated a troop of Ranrok’s Loyalists who were digging for something. I found a passage behind crystallised stone that led to the Undercroft. There, we discovered a bit of parchment with runes and symbols. I told Sebastian about the Pensieve memories I viewed and how one Keeper thought ancient magic could transfigure more than the physical world. Now Sebastian thinks it could be used to help his sister.
塞巴斯蒂安和我一起去看望他的双胞胎妹妹安妮，安妮被妖精诅咒，现在住在家里。但塞巴斯蒂安和他的叔叔所罗门就安妮的病情发生了争执。塞巴斯蒂安想找到治疗他妹妹的方法，而所罗门认为塞巴斯蒂安对治疗的痴迷对安妮的伤害多于益处。塞巴斯蒂安带我去了安妮被诅咒的地方，我们击败了一群正在挖掘东西的兰洛克追随者。我在结晶石后面找到了一条通往地穴的通道。在那里，我们发现了一块带有符文和符号的羊皮纸。我告诉塞巴斯蒂安我看到的冥想盆记忆，以及有位守护者认为古代魔法可用来改变物理世界以外的东西。现在塞巴斯蒂安认为它可以用来帮助他的妹妹。

We've found a dead end in the Overlook Mine. This can't be though! There must be something more here we aren't seeing.
我们在俯眺矿坑发现了一条死巷。但这不可能！一定还有更多我们没有看到的东西。

EVJ_01_MissionActive_Journal:
Sebastian and I need to get into the cave to find the portrait half, but there are Ranrok's Loyalists everywhere. We'll have to find a way past them to get what we came for.
塞巴斯蒂安和我需要进入洞穴找到一半的肖像，但到处都是兰洛克的追随者。我们必须想办法绕过他们，才能得到我们想要的东西。
EVJ_01_Overlook_CP5_Journal01:
We found another portrait piece that might fit into the triptych inside the Undercroft.
我们在地穴内发现了另一幅或许可放进三联画的肖像作品。
EVJ_01_Overlook_PlacePortrait_TaskObj01: Place the portrait into the triptych|将画像放置在三联画中
EVJ_01_QuestTitle: In the Shadow of the Mine|矿场的阴影下
EVJ_DepthofaMine_QuestActive_StepJournal:
Sebastian is waiting near the entrance to the Overlook Mine to the northeast of Upper Hogsfield.
塞巴斯蒂安正在上霍格米村东北部的俯眺矿坑入口附近等候。

We need to get inside the mine. It looks like our choices are to attack the goblins head-on or try to sneak by them.
我们需要进入矿场。看来我们只能选择正面攻击妖精，或是试图从它们身边偷偷溜走。

Now that we’ve made it inside, we should look for anything that might be connected to the triptych. Our only clues are the runes scrawled on the torn parchment we found.
我们成功进入了，现在应该寻找任何可能与三联画有关的东西。我们唯一的线索是所发现的残破羊皮纸上潦草的符文。

This place is crawling with Loyalists and spiders. We must defeat them if we have any chance of making it out of here.
这个地方到处都是追随者和蜘蛛。如果我们有任何机会能离开这里，就必须得打败它们。

The door in this room appears to be magically sealed. But I can see runes on the walls that seem to match the ones on the note from the triptych. I should clear these webs away and see if the runes can be used to unlock the door.
这个房间的门似乎被魔法封印了。但我可以看到墙上的符文似乎与三联画上的符文相匹配。我应该把这些网清理掉，看看符文能不能用来开门。

Activating the runes in the proper order unlocked the door. Now to see what secrets are held inside the chamber beyond.
以正确的顺序启动符文得以将门解锁。现在看看以外的房间里有什么秘密。

I found a bit of canvas inside an old chest. I should check in with Sebastian to get his thoughts on what this all means.
我在一个旧盒子里发现了一块画布。我应该与塞巴斯蒂安核实一下，了解他对这一切意味着什么的看法。

I see another of those crystallised stone walls like the one we found in Feldcroft. We can use it to get back to Hogwarts. I just need to lead the way.
我看到了另一堵结晶石墙，就像我们在费德罗特发现的那样。我们可以用它回到霍格沃茨。我只需要带路。

We should place the canvas into the triptych and see if it reveals another clue.
我们应该将画布放入三联画中，看看它是否揭示了另一条线索。

Once we placed the canvas we found into the triptych, Sebastian said we might be in for more trouble. I need to ask him what he means by that.
我们将找到的画布放入三联画后，塞巴斯蒂安说我们可能会遇到更多麻烦。我得问他这是什么意思。

EVJ_DepthofaMine_QuestActive_TaskObj02: Reach the entrance to the mine |到达矿场入口
