EVJ_DepthofaMine_QuestAvailable_Journal:
I met Sebastian near the entrance to the Overlook Mine just outside Upper Hogsfield. He recognised the location from the vista painted on the triptych. He scouted the area and discovered the place is crawling with Ranrok’s Loyalists who seem to be searching for something. We need to enter to the mine and investigate.
我在上霍格米村外的俯眺矿坑入口附近遇到了塞巴斯蒂安。他从三联画上的远景中认出了这个位置。他侦察了这片区域，发现那里到处都是兰洛克的追随者，他们似乎在寻找什么。我们需要进入矿场展开调查。
EVJ_DepthofaMine_QuestAvailable_StepJour: Sebastian is waiting near the entrance to the Overlook Mine.|塞巴斯蒂安正在俯眺矿坑入口附近等候。
EVJ_DepthofaMine_QuestComplete_Journal:
Sebastian met me at the Overlook Mine. He realised it's the location depicted in the triptych. We had to fight our way through the mine, past spiders and Loyalists, until we found a room with a sealed chamber. Once we cleared the webs, we discovered runes on the wall that matched the note from the triptych, as well as a journal entry and another canvas. I told Sebastian that I'd been working with Lodgok. He was enraged, unable to see that not all goblins are like the ones that cursed Anne. I'm afraid I must continue without his help.
塞巴斯蒂安在俯眺矿坑与我会面。他意识到这是三联画中描绘的位置。我们得在矿场中奋战、穿越蜘蛛和追随者，直到我们找到一个带有密封室的房间。清理完网后，我们在墙上发现了与三联画中的笔记相匹配的符文，以及日记条目和另一幅画布。我告诉塞巴斯蒂安，我一直在与罗德高克合作。他被激怒了，且无法理解并非所有的妖精都像诅咒安妮的妖精一样。我恐怕得在没有他帮助的情况下继续下去。
EVJ_DepthofaMine_QuestTitle: In the Shadow of the Mine|矿场的阴影下
EVJ_IntheShadowoftheMine_QuestTitle: In the Shadow of the Mine|矿场的阴影下
EVL_01: In the Shadow of the Study|书房的阴影下
EVL_01_02_StepTwo_Task: Open Slytherin's door|打开斯莱特林的门
EVL_01_03_OpenThirdDoor_Journal:
I was able to solve the serpentine puzzle Slytherin laid within his maze. However, we've been met with another door that depicts faces contorted in agony. Ominis thinks in order to open the door we must use the Cruciatus Curse on another person. Ominis has done enough already. Sebastian and I are going choose who will use the curse on the other.
我成功解开了斯莱特林在自己的迷宫中布下的蛇之谜题。但之后又有一扇门堵住了我们的去路，门板上有多张处于痛苦扭曲的面孔。奥米尼斯认为这意味着有人成为钻心诅咒的牺牲品才能开启大门。为了带我们来这里，奥米尼斯已经付出了许多。接下来就靠塞巴斯蒂安和我来选择谁会成为诅咒的目标。
EVL_01_DepthofStudy_QuestActive_Journal:
Sebastian is convinced there is something in Salazar Slytherin's secret scriptorium that can help cure his sister, Anne. To access it, we need a member of the Gaunt household. Ominis is reticent about anything to do with the Dark Arts, but, with any luck, the effort to reach it will be well worth the risk.
塞巴斯蒂安坚信萨拉查·斯莱特林的秘密书房中存在着治好他妹妹安妮的方法。但是为了开启书房的大门，我们需要一位“冈特家族”的成员。奥米尼斯极度厌恶一切与黑魔法有关之事，但为了治好安妮，无论风险再大我们也在所不辞。
EVL_01_DepthofStudy_QuestActive_StepJour:
I think I may be able to convince Ominis to help us find Slytherin’s Scriptorium. Sebastian knows where he is. I should follow him.
我想我或许可以说服奥米尼斯帮助我们找到斯莱特林的藏经楼。塞巴斯蒂安知道他在哪里。我应该跟着他。

We need to get through this first door. Ominis said it has something to do with threes and the braziers.
我们需要通过这第一道门。奥米尼斯说这与三和火盆有关。

We were able to find the hidden entrance to Slytherin's Scriptorium with Ominis's help. Now to see what lies ahead.
在奥米尼斯的帮助下，我们找到了斯莱特林藏经楼的隐藏入口。现在看看前方会发生什么事。

We've come to another locked door blocking our path. We should look for any clues that may help us.
我们来到了另一扇锁着的门，挡住了我们的去路。我们应该寻找任何可能对我们有帮助的线索。

After I repaired the relief on the wall, I heard low hissing. I should talk to Ominis about this.
在我修好墙上的浮雕后，我听到了低沉的嘶嘶声。我应该和奥米尼斯谈谈这件事。

Ominis is a Parselmouth and so can understand snakes. He needs to use that ability to open the door.
奥米尼斯是蛇佬腔，所以可以理解蛇。他需要使用这种技能来打开门。

Ominis was able to open the door using Parseltongue. Now to go through it and see what lies beyond.
奥米尼斯能够使用蛇佬腔打开门。现在要通过它，看看后面有什么。
The Serpent Door closed behind us, so there's no turning back now. |蛇门在我们身后关闭，所以现在没有回头路了。
I found a diary entry from Noctua Gaunt, Ominis's aunt.|我找到了奥米尼斯的姑姑诺可妥·冈特留下的一份日记

It seems the Cruciatus Curse is our only way forward. I need to talk to Ominis about this. Perhaps he can cast it for us.
钻心诅咒似乎是我们前进的唯一出路。我需要和奥米尼斯谈谈这件事。也许他可以为我们施展它。

It seems the Cruciatus Curse is our only way forward. Sebastian needs to convince Ominis to cast the curse.
钻心诅咒似乎是我们前进的唯一出路。塞巴斯蒂安需要说服奥米尼斯施展诅咒。

Ominis refused to cast the curse. I need to discuss with Sebastian what to do next.
奥米尼斯拒绝施放诅咒。我需要和塞巴斯蒂安讨论下一步该怎么做。

We used the Cruciatus Curse to open the door, finally making it inside. Now, it's time to search this place.
我们用钻心诅咒打开了门，终于进去了。现在，该搜索这个地方了。

I found a mysterious book in Slytherin's Scriptorium. It may hold the answers that Sebastian is looking for. I should give it to him.
我在斯莱特林的书房里发现了一本神秘的书。它可能包含塞巴斯蒂安正在寻找的答案。我应该给他。

I gave the book to Sebastian and he seems hopeful. We got what we came for, now it's time to leave.
我把书给了塞巴斯蒂安，他似乎充满希望。我们得到了我们想要的，现在该离开了。

Now that we've left the Scriptorium, Ominis seems determined to stop Sebastian from going further down this path and asked him never to do this sort of thing again.
现在我们已经离开了藏经楼，奥米尼斯似乎决心阻止塞巴斯蒂安在这条路上走得更远，并要求他不要再做这种事情了。
EVL_01_DepthofStudy_QuestActive_TaskObj0: Go with Sebastian to meet Ominis|和塞巴斯蒂安一起去见奥米尼斯
Open Slytherin's door|打开斯莱特林的门
Explore beyond the doorway|探索门外
Figure out how to progress|弄清楚如何有进展
Speak with Ominis about the hissing|与奥米尼斯谈谈嘶嘶声
Wait for Ominis to open the door|等待奥米尼斯开门
Explore beyond the Serpent Door|探索蛇门之外
Find a way through|找到可通过的道路
Talk to Sebastian|与塞巴斯蒂安交谈
EVL_01_DepthofStudy_QuestActive_TaskObj1: Talk to Ominis about Crucio|与奥米尼斯谈谈钻心剜骨
Wait for Sebastian to talk to Ominis|等待塞巴斯蒂安与奥米尼斯交谈

Listen to what Ominis has to say|听听奥米尼斯怎么说
EVL_01_DepthofStudy_QuestAvailable_Journ:
Sebastian wants to find Slytherin's Scriptorium, rumoured to be hidden in Hogwarts, because he thinks it could help him find a cure for Anne. Ominis thinks it will involve the Dark Arts and he has had awful first-hand experience with them. Sebastian won't change his mind, but needs a Gaunt to reveal the entrance to the room. He wants to meet outside the Slytherin common room in the dungeons.
塞巴斯蒂安想要找到据说藏在霍格沃茨的斯莱特林藏经楼，因为他认为这可以帮助他找到治疗安妮的方法。奥米尼斯认为这将涉及黑魔法，且他对它们有过糟糕的第一手经验。塞巴斯蒂安不会改变心意，但需要冈特来显示房间的入口。他想在地牢的斯莱特林公共休息室外面见面。
EVL_01_DepthofStudy_QuestAvailable_StepJ:
Sebastian wants to meet outside the Slytherin common room to talk to me about Slytherin's Scriptorium.
塞巴斯蒂安希望跟我在斯莱特林公共休息室外见面，和我谈谈斯特莱林的藏经楼。
EVL_01_DepthofStudy_QuestAvailable_TaskO: Meet Sebastian outside the Slytherin common room|在斯莱特林公共休息室外与塞巴斯蒂安会面
EVL_01_DepthofStudy_QuestComplete_Journa:
I convinced Ominis to help Sebastian and me enter Slytherin's Scriptorium. We had to wind our way through foreboding corridors, overcoming multiple barriers. Eventually, we came to a door that would only open if one would cast Crucio on another. Now we know why Noctua Gaunt failed to make it through: she went on this journey alone. Ominis refused to cast it. Sebastian taught me the curse, however, and agreed to let me cast it on him. I'm not sure how I feel about performing that bit of Dark Magic. We finally reached the Scriptorium, where I found an old spellbook of Salazar Slytherin’s. I gave it to Sebastian, who hopes it holds some answers for him. Only time will tell.
我说服奥米尼斯帮助我和塞巴斯蒂安进入斯莱特林的藏经楼。我们得蜿蜒穿过不祥的走廊、克服多重障碍。最终，我们来到了一扇门，只有在一个人将钻心剜骨施展到另一个人身上时它才会打开。现在我们知道为什么诺可妥·冈特未能成功：她独自踏上了这段旅程。奥米尼斯拒绝施放它。然而，塞巴斯蒂安教我诅咒，并同意让我把它施在他身上。我不确定我对施展该黑魔法有何感受。我们终于到了藏经楼，在那里我找到了一本萨拉查·斯莱特林的旧咒语书。我把它给了塞巴斯蒂安，他希望这能为他提供一些答案。只有时间证明一切。

I convinced Ominis to help Sebastian and me enter Slytherin's Scriptorium. We had to wind our way through foreboding corridors, overcoming multiple barriers. Eventually, we came to a door that would only open if one would cast Crucio on another. Now we know why Noctua Gaunt failed to make it through: she went on this journey alone. Ominis refused to cast it. However, I agreed to let Sebastian cast Crucio on me. I hope I never experience such pain again. We finally reached the Scriptorium, where I found an old spellbook of Salazar Slytherin’s. I gave it to Sebastian, who hopes it holds some answers for him. Only time will tell.
我说服奥米尼斯帮助我和塞巴斯蒂安进入斯莱特林的藏经楼。我们得蜿蜒穿过不祥的走廊、克服多重障碍。最终，我们来到了一扇门，只有在一个人将钻心剜骨施展到另一个人身上时它才会打开。现在我们知道为什么诺可妥·冈特未能成功：她独自踏上了这段旅程。奥米尼斯拒绝施放它。但是，我同意让塞巴斯蒂安对我施放钻心剜骨。我希望我再也不会经历这样的痛苦。我们终于到了藏经楼，在那里我找到了一本萨拉查·斯莱特林的旧咒语书。我把它给了塞巴斯蒂安，他希望这能为他提供一些答案。只有时间证明一切。
EVL_01_DepthofStudy_QuestTitle: In the Shadow of the Study|书房的阴影下
EVL_01_IntheShadowoftheStudy_QuestTitle: In the Shadow of the Study|书房的阴影下
EVL_01_LineCompletePlayer_Journal:
After opening a series of doors and suffering the effects of the Cruciatus Curse, I found Salazar Slytherin's spellbook in his hidden scriptorium within Hogwarts. I was then able to convince a reluctant Ominis to allow Sebastian to borrow it. Sebastian is ecstatic about finding the spellbook and intends to read it cover to cover in pursuit of the author's advice. He truly believes the Dark Arts provide the only path to reversing Anne's curse.
在克服了重重挑战并亲眼体验了钻心诅咒的折磨过后，我终于在萨拉查·斯莱特林于霍格沃茨内部的秘密书房中找到了他的咒语书。之后我设法说服了奥米尼斯放下成见，允许塞巴斯蒂安借用咒语书。成功找到咒语书让塞巴斯蒂安欣喜若狂，他准备接下来好好研读以寻求作者留在其中的建议。在塞巴斯蒂安看来，黑魔法就是扭转安妮承受的诅咒效果的唯一方法。
EVL_01_LineCompleteSebastian_Journal:
After opening a series of doors and suffering the effects of the Cruciatus Curse, I found Salazar Slytherin's spellbook in his hidden scriptorium within Hogwarts. I was then able to convince a reluctant Ominis to allow Sebastian to borrow it. Sebastian is ecstatic about finding the spellbook and intends to read it cover to cover in pursuit of the author's advice. He truly believes the Dark Arts provide the only path to reversing Anne's curse.
在克服了重重挑战并亲眼体验了钻心诅咒的折磨过后，我终于在萨拉查·斯莱特林于霍格沃茨内部的秘密书房中找到了他的咒语书。之后我设法说服了奥米尼斯放下成见，允许塞巴斯蒂安借用咒语书。成功找到咒语书让塞巴斯蒂安欣喜若狂，他准备接下来好好研读以寻求作者留在其中的建议。在塞巴斯蒂安看来，黑魔法就是扭转安妮承受的诅咒效果的唯一方法。
EVL_02: In the Shadow of Time|时间的阴影下
EVL_02_DepthofTime_QuestActive_Journal:
Sebastian was adamant we not involve Ominis in this next part of our quest. He said he came across a report on a nearby catacomb from one of Slytherin’s students – one skilled in Charms and the study of ancient runes. The description of the tomb mentions a relic which may reverse a curse. Either way, Sebastian wants to visit Anne soon. I can't help but wonder why Slytherin would leave the relic here.
塞巴斯蒂安坚持不让奥米尼斯参与我们接下来的任务。他说他从斯莱特林一名精通魔咒和古代符文研究的学生那里，看到了一份关于附近地下墓穴的报告。坟墓的相关描述提到可逆转诅咒的文物。无论如何，塞巴斯蒂安都想尽快造访安妮。我不禁想知道为什么斯莱特林会把文物留在这里。
EVL_02_DepthofTime_QuestActive_StepJourn:
We need to explore the catacomb to find the relic that Slytherin’s student wrote about.
我们需要探索地下墓穴以找到斯莱特林的学生所写的文物。
Now that we're inside, we should search for the relic.|我们已在里面，该开始寻找文物。

I found a note written by the student who first wrote about the relic. Whoever they were used bones to somehow barricade the way forward. I should tell Sebastian about this.
我找到了首位描写文物的学生所写的笔记。不论他们是谁，都用骨头挡住了前进的道路。我应该告诉塞巴斯蒂安这件事。

The student mentioned that bones would be the key to getting past this barricade. In an ancient catacomb like this, I'm sure I can find plenty of bones to use.
学生提到骨头会是通过这个路障的关键。在这般古老的地下墓穴中，我确信能找到大量的骨头来使用。

I cleared away the barricades using the bones, just like I thought. Now to keep searching for the relic.
就像我想的那样，我用骨头清除了路障。现在继续寻找文物。

There are runes on the door and walls at this barricade. I wonder if I get past this one the same way I did before.
这个路障的门和墙上都有符文。我想知道我是否像以前一样通过了这关。

We still haven't found the relic, but it must be close. We need to keep searching.
我们还没有找到文物，但它一定很近。我们得继续寻找。

This room is crawling with spiders! We need to defeat them, unless we want our bones added to the collection here.
这个房间里爬满了蜘蛛！我们得打败它们，否则这里会多了我们的尸骨。

Now that we've got past the spiders, we're closer than ever to finding the relic.
现在我们已经越过了蜘蛛，且比以往任何时候都更接近找到文物。

At long last, we found the relic! But we found another note alongside it, and the writings here are ominous. I need to speak with Sebastian about this. 
终于，我们找到了文物！但我们在旁边发现了另一个笔记，且其中的文字不详。我需要和塞巴斯蒂安谈谈这件事。

Sebastian decided to take the relic with him. Now we need to get to Feldcroft and show Anne what we found. But first, we have to get out of the catacomb. 
塞巴斯蒂安决定随身携带文物。现在我们需要去费德罗特向安妮展示我们的发现。但首先，我们必须走出地下墓穴。

It turns out Ominis followed us into the catacombs and has been tracking us this whole time. He overheard everything we said about him. Tensions are running high; I need to wait for Sebastian and Ominis to get this sorted out between them. 
原来奥米尼斯跟着我们进入了地下墓穴，且一路跟踪我们。他无意中听到了我们所说关于他的一切。紧张局势高涨；我需要等待塞巴斯蒂安和奥米尼斯解决他俩的问题。

Ominis says that there's no way he can let us leave here with the relic. I have to find some way to persuade him. 
奥米尼斯说他不可能让我们带着文物离开这里。我得想办法说服他。

I didn't want to learn Imperio from Sebastian before, but now I think it may be our best course of action. I should go speak with him and have him teach the curse to me. 
以前我不想向塞巴斯蒂安学习魂魄出窍，但现在我认为这可能是最好的做法。我应该去和他谈谈，让他教我诅咒。
Now that we've parted ways with Ominis, we need to get out of here. |我们已和奥米尼斯分道扬镳了，现在得离开这里。
It's time to return to Feldcroft to check on Anne. |该返回费德罗特看看安妮了。

As we approached Feldcroft, Sebastian and I saw smoke billowing from the hamlet. We hurried there to find it was under attack by Ranrok's Loyalists. We need to help defend the hamlet! 
靠近费德罗特的时候，我和塞巴斯蒂安注意到村庄上空浓烟滚滚。等我们赶到现场，才发现是那里遭到了兰洛克的追随者们的袭击。我们必须帮助守护村庄！

We managed to thwart the Loyalist attack and save Feldcroft. But in the process, Sebastian used the Imperius Curse on a goblin. His uncle was furious and banished Sebastian from ever returning to Feldcroft. I should talk to Solomon and see if I can smooth things over. 
我们成功抑制追随者的进攻并拯救了费德罗特。但在过程中，塞巴斯蒂安对一个妖精使用了夺魂诅咒。他的叔叔很生气，并把塞巴斯蒂安放逐到费德罗特。我应该和所罗门谈谈，看看能不能让事情平息。
EVL_02_DepthofTime_QuestActive_TaskObj01: Enter the catacomb|进入地下墓穴
EVL_02_DepthofTime_QuestActive_TaskObj03: Speak with Sebastian about the note|与塞巴斯蒂安谈谈笔记
EVL_02_DepthofTime_QuestActive_TaskObj04: Find a way through the barricade|找到通过路障的方法
EVL_02_DepthofTime_QuestActive_TaskObj06: Find a way through the barricade|找到通过路障的方法
EVL_02_DepthofTime_QuestActive_TaskObj10: Speak with Sebastian about the relic|与塞巴斯蒂安谈谈文物
EVL_02_DepthofTime_QuestActive_TaskObj11: Leave the catacomb|离开地下墓穴
EVL_02_DepthofTime_QuestActive_TaskObj12: Wait for Sebastian and Ominis to finish talking|等待塞巴斯蒂安和奥米尼斯把事情说完
EVL_02_DepthofTime_QuestActive_TaskObj13: Learn Imperio from Sebastian |向塞巴斯蒂安学习魂魄出窍
EVL_02_DepthofTime_QuestActive_TaskObj14: Leave the catacombs |离开地下墓穴
EVL_02_DepthofTime_QuestActive_TaskObj15: Return to Feldcroft |返回费德罗特
EVL_02_DepthofTime_QuestActive_TaskObj16: Defend Feldcroft from Ranrok's Loyalists |从兰洛克的追随者手中保卫费德罗特
EVL_02_DepthofTime_QuestActive_TaskObj17: Talk to Solomon Sallow |与所罗门·萨鲁交谈
EVL_02_DepthOfTime_QuestAvailable_Journa:
Sebastian and I need to search the Feldcroft Catacomb. A relic was referenced in Slytherin's spellbook and Sebastian hopes that this relic may help Anne.
塞巴斯蒂安和我需要搜索费德罗特地下墓穴。斯莱特林的咒语书中提到了一件文物，塞巴斯蒂安希望这件文物可以帮助安妮。
EVL_02_DepthofTime_QuestAvailable_Journa:
Sebastian is fixated on studying Slytherin's spellbook to find a way to reverse Anne's curse. He found mention of a relic that could supposedly reverse curses. Sebastian wants me to meet him outside Feldcroft, near the catacomb.
塞巴斯蒂安专注于研究斯莱特林的魔法书，以找到扭转安妮诅咒的方法。他发现其中提到一个据说可以逆转诅咒的文物。塞巴斯蒂安要我在费德罗特外面的地下墓穴附近与他会面。
EVL_02_DepthofTime_QuestAvailable_StepJo:
I received an owl from Sebastian telling me he has a lead on the relic that could help Anne.
我从塞巴斯蒂安那里收到一只猫头鹰，说他找到了可帮助安妮的文物线索。
EVL_02_DepthofTime_QuestAvailable_TaskOb: Meet Sebastian at the catacomb|在地下墓穴与塞巴斯蒂安会面
EVL_02_DepthofTime_QuestComplete_Journal:
Sebastian and I explored the catacomb near Feldcroft and found the relic that could possibly heal Anne. Eventually, we realised Ominis had followed us and he confronted us, refusing to let us leave with the relic. I had Sebastian teach me Imperio, and then with Ominis's consent, I used Imperio on him and he stepped aside. Sebastian and I then returned to Feldcroft to find it under attack – Ranrok's Loyalists were laying siege, so we helped defend the hamlet. During the attack, Sebastian used Imperio on a goblin. His uncle was horrified and banished Sebastian from returning or seeing Anne again.
我和塞巴斯蒂安探索了费德罗特附近的地下墓穴，发现了可以治愈安妮的文物。最终，我们意识到奥米尼斯跟着我们，他与我们对质，拒绝让我们带着文物离开。塞巴斯蒂安教了我魂魄出窍，然后在奥米尼斯的同意下，我对他使用了魂魄出窍，我对他使用了魂魄出窍，他退到一边。塞巴斯蒂安和我随后回到费德罗特，发现它受到了攻击，兰洛克的追随者正加以围攻，所以我们帮助保卫了这个小村庄。在攻击过程中，塞巴斯蒂安对一个妖精使用了魂魄出窍。他的叔叔吓坏了，且不准塞巴斯蒂安再次归来或见安妮。

Sebastian and I explored the catacomb near Feldcroft and found the relic that could possibly heal Anne. Eventually, we realised Ominis had followed us and he confronted us, refusing to let us leave with the relic. I persuaded Ominis to step aside. Sebastian and I then returned to Feldcroft to find it under attack – Ranrok's Loyalists were laying siege, so we helped defend the hamlet. During the attack, Sebastian used Imperio on a goblin. His uncle was horrified by this and banished Sebastian from returning or seeing Anne again.
我和塞巴斯蒂安探索了费德罗特附近的地下墓穴，发现了可以治愈安妮的文物。最终，我们意识到奥米尼斯跟着我们，他与我们对质，拒绝让我们带着文物离开。赛我说服奥米尼斯让开。塞巴斯蒂安和我随后回到费德罗特，发现它受到了攻击，兰洛克的追随者正加以围攻，所以我们帮助保卫了这个小村庄。在攻击过程中，塞巴斯蒂安对一个妖精使用了魂魄出窍。他的叔叔对此吓坏了，且不准塞巴斯蒂安再次归来或见安妮。
EVL_02_DepthofTime_QuestTitle: In the Shadow of Time|时间的阴影下
EVL_02_DepthOfTime_SpeakToSebastian_Task: Speak with Sebastian|与塞巴斯蒂安交谈
EVL_02_IntheShadowofTime_QuestTitle: In the Shadow of Time|时间的阴影下
EVL_03: In the Shadow of the Relic|文物的阴影下
EVL_03_DepthOfARelic_Journal01a: There are Inferi in the catacomb. We must defeat them.|地下墓穴中有阴尸。我们必须打败它们。
EVL_03_DepthOfARelic_Journal02b:
Something tragic has happened. Sebastian is beside himself and is fleeing the catacomb. He used Avada Kedavra on his uncle. I need to follow Sebastian.
悲剧发生了。塞巴斯蒂安惊魂未定，并正在逃离地下墓穴。他在他的叔叔身上使用了阿瓦达索命咒。我需要跟随塞巴斯蒂安。
EVL_03_DepthOfARelic_QuestActive_Journal:
Ominis sent me an owl telling me he’s worried about Sebastian. I met him at the catacomb outside Feldcroft. Anne is here and seems distraught over what Sebastian has decided to do.
奥米尼斯传给我一只猫头鹰，说他很担心塞巴斯蒂安。我在费德罗特外面的地下墓穴遇见了他。安妮在这里，似乎对塞巴斯蒂安决定做的事情心烦意乱。
EVL_03_DepthOfARelic_QuestActive_StepJou:
Ominis told me that Sebastian was behaving strangely. I'm worried – I need to find Sebastian as soon as possible.
奥米尼斯告诉我塞巴斯蒂安的行为很奇怪。我很担心，我需要尽快找到塞巴斯蒂安。

The catacomb is swarming with Inferi. Could this be Sebastian's doing? I've got to defeat them.
地下墓穴里挤满了阴尸。这可能是塞巴斯蒂安的所作所为吗？我必须打败它们。

Now that I got past the Inferi, I need to find Sebastian before it's too late. Ominis told me that Anne went to get help. He is going to talk to the Headmaster.
现在我已通过阴尸，得在为时已晚之前找到塞巴斯蒂安。奥米尼斯告诉我安妮去寻求帮助。他要去和校长谈谈。

I found Sebastian surrounded by another crowd of Inferi – he seems somehow able to control them. I've got to try to reason with him.
我发现塞巴斯蒂安被另一群阴尸包围着，他似乎能够以某种方式控制它们。我得试着跟他讲道理。

Inside the catacomb, I found Sebastian. It seems the Inferi are somehow connected to the relic. But then Solomon arrived and destroyed the relic. He's furious – we must defend ourselves against him.
在地下墓穴里，我找到了塞巴斯蒂安。阴尸似乎与文物有某种联系。但随后所罗门到达并摧毁了文物。他很生气，我们必须保护自己免受他的伤害。

I can't believe my eyes – Sebastian killed his uncle with Avada Kedavra. Anne arrived just after, defeated the Inferi, and Disapparated with Solomon's body. Sebastian is distraught. I need to follow him. 
我简直不敢相信自己的眼睛，塞巴斯蒂安用阿瓦达索命咒杀死了他的叔叔。安妮紧随其后、击败了阴尸，并带着所罗门的尸首使出幻影移形。塞巴斯蒂安心烦意乱。我需要跟着他。

We left the catacombs, but Sebastian appears completely unhinged. I need to talk to him. 
我们离开了地下墓穴，但塞巴斯蒂安似乎完全精神错乱。我需要和他谈谈。
EVL_03_DepthOfARelic_QuestActive_TaskObj: Find Sebastian at the catacombs |在地下墓穴找到塞巴斯蒂安
Talk to Sebastian |与塞巴斯蒂安交谈
Defend yourself against Solomon|针对所罗门自我防御
Talk to Sebastian|与塞巴斯蒂安交谈
EVL_03_DepthOfARelic_QuestAvailable_Jour:
Ominis sent me an owl about Sebastian and the relic. Sebastian asked Anne to meet him at the catacomb alone, but Anne is worried about Sebastian's plan to perform a 'Dark sacrifice' and asked Ominis to come along. I should meet all three of them at the Feldcroft catacomb.
奥米尼斯寄给我一只关于塞巴斯蒂安和文物的猫头鹰。塞巴斯蒂安让安妮单独在地下墓穴与他见面，但安妮担心塞巴斯蒂安执行“黑暗祭祀”的计划，并要求奥米尼斯一起来。我应该在费德罗特地下墓穴与他们三个会面。
EVL_03_DepthOfARelic_QuestAvailable_Step:
I received an owl from Ominis saying he's gravely concerned about Sebastian. I should meet him and Anne at the catacomb.
奥米尼斯寄给我一只猫头鹰，说他非常关心塞巴斯蒂安。我应该在地下墓穴见他和安妮。
EVL_03_DepthOfARelic_QuestAvailable_Task: Talk to Ominis at the catacomb|在地下墓穴与奥米尼斯交谈
EVL_03_DepthOfARelic_QuestComplete_Journ:
Sebastian is willing to do more than I realised to save his sister. Ominis and Anne found him in the catacomb surrounded by Inferi. Anne left to get help, and Ominis went to speak with the Headmaster. I fought off hordes of Inferi until I found Sebastian, who seemed convinced the relic could reverse Anne's curse. Solomon arrived and destroyed the relic, enraging Sebastian. Sebastian cast Avada Kedavra, killing him instantly. Then Anne arrived, cleared away the Inferi, and Disapparated with Solomon's body. Sebastian was devastated. We discussed the value in knowing how to cast the Killing Curse, and I said I didn't want to learn it now. Sebastian told me to find him later in the Undercroft.
为了拯救他的妹妹，塞巴斯蒂安愿意做的比我想象的还要多。奥米尼斯和安妮在被阴尸包围的地下墓穴中找到了他。安妮离开去寻求帮助，奥米尼斯去和校长谈话。我一路上击退了成群的阴尸找到了塞巴斯蒂安。他似乎相信这件文物可以逆转安妮的诅咒。所罗门到达并摧毁了文物，这激怒了塞巴斯蒂安。塞巴斯蒂安施展阿瓦达索命咒，立即杀死了他。然后安妮到来清理了阴尸，并带着所罗门的尸首使出幻影移形。塞巴斯蒂安彻底崩溃了。我们讨论了知道如何施放杀戮诅咒的价值，然后我告诉他我现在不想学。塞巴斯蒂安让我稍后在地穴找他。

Sebastian is willing to do more than I realised to save his sister. Ominis and Anne found him in the catacomb surrounded by Inferi. Anne left to get help, and Ominis went to speak with the Headmaster. I fought off hordes of Inferi until I found Sebastian, who seemed convinced the relic could reverse Anne's curse. Solomon arrived and destroyed the relic, enraging Sebastian. Sebastian cast Avada Kedavra, killing him instantly. Then Anne arrived, cleared away the Inferi, and Disapparated with Solomon's body. Sebastian was devastated. We discussed the value in knowing how to cast the Killing Curse, and I asked him to teach me, which he did. Sebastian told me to find him later in the Undercroft.
为了拯救他的妹妹，塞巴斯蒂安愿意做的比我想象的还要多。奥米尼斯和安妮在被阴尸包围的地下墓穴中找到了他。安妮离开去寻求帮助，奥米尼斯去和校长谈话。我一路上击退了成群的阴尸找到了塞巴斯蒂安。他似乎相信这件文物可以逆转安妮的诅咒。所罗门到达并摧毁了文物，这激怒了塞巴斯蒂安。塞巴斯蒂安施展阿瓦达索命咒，立即杀死了他。然后安妮到来清理了阴尸，并带着所罗门的尸首使出幻影移形。塞巴斯蒂安彻底崩溃了。我们讨论了知道如何施放杀戮诅咒的价值，我请他教我，他照做了。塞巴斯蒂安让我稍后在地穴找他。

Sebastian is willing to do more than I realised to save his sister. Ominis and Anne found him in the catacomb surrounded by Inferi. Anne left to get help, and Ominis went to speak with the Headmaster. I fought off hordes of Inferi until I found Sebastian, who seemed convinced the relic could reverse Anne's curse. Solomon arrived and destroyed the relic, enraging Sebastian. Sebastian cast Avada Kedavra, killing him instantly. Then Anne arrived, cleared away the Inferi, and Disapparated with Solomon's body. Sebastian was devastated. We discussed the value in knowing how to cast the Killing Curse, and I said I didn't want to learn it now. Sebastian told me to find him later in the Undercroft.
为了拯救他的妹妹，塞巴斯蒂安愿意做的比我想象的还要多。奥米尼斯和安妮在被阴尸包围的地下墓穴中找到了他。安妮离开去寻求帮助，奥米尼斯去和校长谈话。我一路上击退了成群的阴尸找到了塞巴斯蒂安。他似乎相信这件文物可以逆转安妮的诅咒。所罗门到达并摧毁了文物，这激怒了塞巴斯蒂安。塞巴斯蒂安施展阿瓦达索命咒，立即杀死了他。然后安妮到来清理了阴尸，并带着所罗门的尸首使出幻影移形。塞巴斯蒂安彻底崩溃了。我们讨论了知道如何施放杀戮诅咒的价值，然后我告诉他我现在不想学。塞巴斯蒂安让我稍后在地穴找他。
EVL_03_DepthOfARelic_TalkToSebastian_Tas: Talk to Sebastian|与塞巴斯蒂安交谈
EVL_03_IntheShadowoftheRelic_QuestTitle: In the Shadow of the Relic|文物的阴影下
EVL_Conv_02: In the Shadow of the Bloodline|血脉的阴影下
EVL_CONV_02_DepthofaDescendent_QuestAvai:
Sebastian will do anything to find a cure for his cursed twin, Anne. I saw the extent of his drive when we visited Feldcroft, fought off the Loyalists, and found a passage to the Undercroft behind crystallised stone. Now it seems that Sebastian and Ominis are arguing over something. I should find out what's going on.
塞巴斯蒂安会不惜一切代价为他被诅咒的双胞胎安妮找到治愈方法。当我们拜访费德罗特、击退追随者并在结晶石后面找到通往地穴的通道时，我看到了他的动力。现在看来，塞巴斯蒂安和奥米尼斯正在争论些什么。我应该弄清楚发生了什么事。

Sebastian and Ominis were seen arguing in the Great Hall. I should find out what this is about.
有人看到塞巴斯蒂安和奥米尼斯在礼堂里争吵。我应该弄清楚这是怎么回事。
Speak with Sebastian|与塞巴斯蒂安交谈
EVL_CONV_02_DepthofaDescendent_QuestComp:
After seeing Sebastian and Ominis arguing, I went to find out what happened. Sebastian told me that evidently Salazar Slytherin had a secret Scriptorium here at Hogwarts and that Ominis knows where to enter. Ominis flatly refuses to help; he has had an aversion to the Dark Arts since his parents demonstrated their skill with Crucio on Muggles and demanded Ominis do the same. When he refused, his parents turned the curse on him instead. I understand Ominis's plight, but Sebastian is determined to get into the Scriptorium, insisting that it might hold answers as to how to heal Anne. He told me he'll be in touch with more information soon.
在看到塞巴斯蒂安和奥米尼斯吵架后，我去查明发生了什么。塞巴斯蒂安告诉我，萨拉查·斯莱特林显然在霍格沃茨有一个秘密的藏经楼，而且奥米尼斯知道从哪里进去。奥米尼斯断然拒绝提供帮助。自从他的父母对麻瓜使用钻心剜骨来展示技巧，并要求奥米尼斯做同样的事情后，他就对黑魔法产生了反感。当他拒绝时，他的父母反而把诅咒转给了他。我理解奥米尼斯的困境，但塞巴斯蒂安决心进入藏经楼，坚持认为它可能掌握如何治愈安妮的答案。他跟我说会尽快与我联系以获取更多资讯。
EVL_CONV_02_DepthofaDescendent_QuestTitl: In the Shadow of the Bloodline|血脉的阴影下
EVL_Conv_02_IntheShadowoftheBloodline_Qu: In the Shadow of the Bloodline|血脉的阴影下
EVL_CONV_04_DepthofScrutiny_QuestActive_:
Sebastian has been studying the spellbook we found in the Scriptorium and may have found a promising lead. Some information in the book has pointed him to a catacomb outside Feldcroft and he wants to go there next. However, he’s adamant that we do not tell Ominis about our plans. He’ll send me an owl when he's ready to go.
塞巴斯蒂安一直在研究我们在藏经楼中找到的咒语书，并且可能找到了一个很有希望的线索。书中的一些资讯将他指向了费德罗特外面的一个地下墓穴，他接下来想去那里。然而，他坚持不要告诉奥米尼斯我们的计划。他准备好的时候会传给我一只猫头鹰。

Unbeknownst to Sebastian and me, Ominis arrived in the Undercroft and overheard our entire conversation. Ominis is furious. Perhaps I should try to reason with him.
让塞巴斯蒂安和我没有料到的是，奥米尼斯也抵达了玄廊，并且在无意间听到了我们两人之间的对话。现在奥米尼斯已是出离愤怒。也许我能够设法安抚他。
Talk with Ominis after he finishes with Sebastian|等奥米尼斯离开塞巴斯蒂安身边后找奥米尼斯单独谈谈。
EVL_CONV_04_DepthofScrutiny_QuestAvailab:
When Sebastian and I explored Slytherin's Scriptorium, we found an old spellbook that Sebastian thought might provide answers as to how to heal Anne. Since then, he's been studying the book and may have found something interesting; he sent me an owl telling me to meet him in the Undercroft.
当塞巴斯蒂安和我探索斯莱特林的藏经楼时，我们发现了一本古老的咒语书。塞巴斯蒂安认为这可能会为如何治愈安妮提供答案。从那以后，他一直在研究这本书，并可能发现了一些有趣的东西；他寄给我一只猫头鹰，要我去地穴见他。

Sebastian sent me an owl saying he found something interesting in the book from the Scriptorium and he wants to discuss it in the Undercroft.
塞巴斯蒂安传给我一只猫头鹰，说他在藏经楼的书中发现了一些有趣的东西，他想在地穴讨论它。
Speak with Sebastian in the Undercroft|在玄廊与塞巴斯蒂安交谈
EVL_CONV_04_DepthofScrutiny_QuestComplet:
Salazar Slytherin's spellbook contains references to a lost relic which, from what Sebastian can tell, grants the holder the power to reverse Dark Magic curses. Sebastian's determined to search for this relic but doesn't want Ominis involved. Ominis overheard everything and warned against searching for such a relic. I doubt Sebastian will leave something this promising unexplored.
萨拉查·斯莱特林的咒语书中提到了一件遗失的文物，据塞巴斯蒂安所知，该文物赋予持有者逆转黑魔法诅咒的力量。塞巴斯蒂安决心寻找这件文物，但不希望奥米尼斯参与其中。奥米尼斯听到了一切，并警告不要寻找这样的文物。但我不认为塞巴斯蒂安会放弃如此有潜力的线索。
EVL_CONV_04_DepthofScrutiny_QuestTitle: In the Shadow of Discovery|探索的阴影下
EVL_Conv_04_IntheShadowofDiscovery_Quest: In the Shadow of Discovery|探索的阴影下
EVL_Conv_05: In the Shadow of Distance|距离的阴影下
EVL_CONV_05_DepthofDistance_QuestAvailab:
Sebastian is focused on finding a way to reverse the curse on his twin, Anne. In Slytherin's spellbook, he read about an ancient relic that could supposedly reverse a curse and I helped him retrieve it from a catacomb. Afterwards, we found Feldcroft under attack by Loyalists and joined the fight. To save his sister, Sebastian cast Imperio on a goblin. His uncle Solomon, horrified, banished him from Feldcroft forever. I tried to smooth things over with Solomon, but he warned that he would report us to the Headmaster if we continued down this path. I need to meet Sebastian in the Undercroft.
塞巴斯蒂安专注于寻找方法来扭转他双胞胎安妮所受到的诅咒。在斯莱特林的咒语书中，他读到了据说可以逆转诅咒的古代文物，我帮他从地下墓穴中取回了它。之后，我们发现费德罗特受到追随者的攻击，并加入战斗。为了拯救他的妹妹，塞巴斯蒂安将魂魄出窍施展在一个妖精身上。他的叔叔所罗门惊恐万分，将他永远驱逐出费德罗特。我试图安抚所罗门，但他警告说，如果我们继续走上这条路，他会把我们报告给校长知道。我需要在地穴与塞巴斯蒂安会面。

After the troubling events that transpired in Feldcroft, Sebastian wants to meet with me in the Undercroft.
在费德罗特发生令人不安的事件之后，塞巴斯蒂安想在地穴与我见面。
Speak with Sebastian in the Undercroft|在地穴与塞巴斯蒂安交谈
EVL_CONV_05_DepthofDistance_QuestComplet:
Sebastian is desperate to talk to Anne now, but since he has been banished, he must find a way to do it without Solomon knowing. He devised a plan to send her a message along with a crest she gave him as a child, so she'll know it's from him. He says that he'll be in touch soon.
塞巴斯蒂安现在很想和安妮谈谈，但他已被放逐，因此必须想办法在所罗门不知情的情况下做到这一点。他设计了一个计划，向她发送信息以及她小时候给他的徽章，这样她就会知道是他。他说会尽快与我联系。
EVL_CONV_05_DepthofDistance_QuestTitle: In the Shadow of Distance|距离的阴影下
EVL_Conv_05_IntheShadowofDistance_QuestT: In the Shadow of Distance|距离的阴影下
EVL_CONV_06_DepthOfHope_QuestActive_Step:
After Sebastian talked with Anne about his plans, Anne left and she seemed distressed. I need to talk to Sebastian and find out what he's going to do next.
塞巴斯蒂安与安妮谈论他的计划后，安妮离开了，她似乎很苦恼。我需要和塞巴斯蒂安谈谈，看看他接下来要做什么。
EVL_CONV_06_DepthOfHope_QuestActive_Task: Speak with Sebastian|与塞巴斯蒂安交谈
EVL_CONV_06_DepthofHope_QuestAvailable_J:
After exploring the catacomb and finding the relic, Sebastian is more convinced than ever that he can use the relic to heal Anne. But now, because Solomon banished him from Feldcroft, he needs to meet with Anne away from the hamlet to talk about their course of action.
在探索地下墓穴并找到文物后，塞巴斯蒂安比以往任何时候都更加确信他可以使用文物治愈安妮。但是现在，由于所罗门将他从费德罗特驱逐出去，他需要在远离小村庄的地方与安妮会面，以讨论他们的行动方针。
EVL_CONV_06_DepthofHope_QuestAvailable_S:
Sebastian has a plan to talk to Anne without Solomon knowing and wants to meet me outside the hamlet.
塞巴斯蒂安知道该怎么能够在所罗门不知晓的情况下与安妮取得联系，并且想要我去村庄外面找他。
EVL_CONV_06_DepthOfHope_QuestAvailable_T: Meet Sebastian and Anne outside Feldcroft|在费德罗特外会见塞巴斯蒂安和安妮
EVL_CONV_06_DepthOfHope_QuestComplete_Jo:
Sebastian convinced Anne that the relic has the potential to reverse her curse, but at a cost. A Dark sacrifice must be made. This concerns Anne and she was adamant that Sebastian consult with Ominis. Only with Ominis present will she meet Sebastian at the catacomb to realise the relic's potential. Sebastian hopes that by curing Anne, Solomon will be appeased and let him come home. He said he’ll be in touch soon.
塞巴斯蒂安说服安妮，这件文物有可能扭转她的诅咒，但要付出代价。必须做出黑暗的牺牲。这与安妮有关，她坚持让塞巴斯蒂安与奥米尼斯协商。只有奥米尼斯在场，她才能在地下墓穴与塞巴斯蒂安会面，以实现文物的潜力。塞巴斯蒂安希望通过治愈安妮，所罗门能被安抚并让他回家。他说会尽快与我联系。
EVL_Conv_06_IntheShadowofHope_QuestTitle: In the Shadow of Hope|希望的阴影下
EVL_CONV_07_DepthOfFate_QuestActive_Jour:
Sebastian told me to meet him in the Undercroft and I arrived to overhear him talking with Ominis about Anne turning Sebastian in. I talked to Sebastian and he was humbled by the realisation that Ominis and I have been here for him through it all. Now I need to talk to Ominis.
塞巴斯蒂安要我在地穴见他，我赶到时无意中听到他和奥米尼斯谈论安妮把塞巴斯蒂安交出来的事情。我和塞巴斯蒂安谈过话，他意识到奥米尼斯和我一路陪着他，因而感到谦卑。现在我需要和奥米尼斯谈谈。
EVL_CONV_07_DepthOfFate_QuestActive_Step: Ominis wants to speak with me about something important.|奥米尼斯想和我谈谈一些重要的事情。
EVL_CONV_07_DepthOfFate_QuestActive_Task: Speak with Ominis|与奥米尼斯交谈
EVL_CONV_07_DepthOfFate_QuestAvailable_J:
After the events in the catacomb – Sebastian controlling the Inferi and killing his uncle – he seemed truly beside himself with grief. He told me to meet him later in the Undercroft. I need to find him and make sure he's all right.
在地下墓穴中控制了阴尸并杀死了他的叔叔之后，塞巴斯蒂安似乎真的悲痛欲绝。他要我稍后在地穴见他。我需要找到他并确保他没事。
EVL_CONV_07_DepthOfFate_QuestAvailable_S:
Sebastian wants me to meet him in the Undercroft after the events that took place in the catacomb.
经历了墓穴中的一系列事件过后，塞巴斯蒂安想要我到玄廊和他见一面。
EVL_CONV_07_DepthOfFate_QuestAvailable_T: Meet Sebastian in the Undercroft|与塞巴斯蒂安在地穴会面
EVL_CONV_07_DepthOfFate_QuestComplete_Jo:
Sebastian is distraught over all that has happened – the Dark Magic he has performed, the murder of his uncle, Anne's anger with him. I've never seen him like this. I spoke with Ominis, who has smoothed things over with the Headmaster. He said that he and Anne can't decide whether to turn Sebastian in or not. He asked for my advice. My mind is made up: Sebastian can't run from what he did. We must turn him in. Ominis agreed.
塞巴斯蒂安对所发生的一切感到心烦意乱：他施展的黑魔法、他叔叔的谋杀，安妮对他的愤怒。我从没见过他这样。我与奥米尼斯交谈，而他已与校长达成共识。他说他和安妮无法决定是否要交出塞巴斯蒂安。他征求我的意见。我下定了决心：塞巴斯蒂安不能逃避他所做的事情。我们必须交出他。奥米尼斯同意了。

Sebastian is distraught over all that has happened – the Dark Magic he has performed, the murder of his uncle, Anne's anger with him. I've never seen him like this. I spoke with Ominis, who has smoothed things over with the Headmaster. He said that he and Anne can't decide whether to turn Sebastian in or not. He asked for my advice. I know why Sebastian did the things he did. I don't think we should turn him in. I told Ominis and he agreed.
塞巴斯蒂安对所发生的一切感到心烦意乱：他施展的黑魔法、他叔叔的谋杀，安妮对他的愤怒。我从没见过他这样。我与奥米尼斯交谈，而他已与校长达成共识。他说他和安妮无法决定是否要交出塞巴斯蒂安。他征求我的意见。我知道塞巴斯蒂安为什么会做出这些事情来。我认为不应该交出他。我告诉奥米尼斯，而他同意了。
EVL_Conv_07_IntheShadowofFate_QuestTitle: In the Shadow of Fate|在命运的阴影下
EVL_CONV_08_IntheShadowofFriendship_Ques:
Sebastian asked to speak with me in the Undercroft. After all that's happened, I wonder what news he has to share.
塞巴斯蒂安要求在地穴与我交谈。在这一切发生之后，我不知道他有什么消息要分享。

Ominis asked to speak with me in the Undercroft. After all that's happened, I wonder what news he has to share.
奥米尼斯要求在地穴与我交谈。在这一切发生之后，我不知道他有什么消息要分享。

Now that some time has passed since the events at the Feldcroft catacomb, I should see how Sebastian is faring. Thankfully, we have the Undercroft to speak privately.
自从费德罗特地下墓穴中的事件结束已经过去了一段时间，我应该去检查一下塞巴斯蒂安的情况。幸运的是，在玄廊里面我们就不用担心会被外人听见。

Now that some time has passed since the events at the Feldcroft catacomb, I should see how Ominis is faring. Thankfully, we have the Undercroft to speak privately.
自从费德罗特地下墓穴中的事件结束已经过去了一段时间，我应该去检查一下奥米尼斯的情况。幸运的是，在玄廊里面我们就不用担心会被外人听见。
Speak with Sebastian|与塞巴斯蒂安交谈
Speak with Ominis|与奥米尼斯交谈

Sebastian and I set out to find Salazar Slytherin's scriptorium. and there, in an old spellbook, Sebastian found references to a catacomb where Slytherin's students must have studied sarcophagi. A student gifted in Charms hid a forgotten relic behind enchantments to do with the catacomb's bones. They believed the relic held the power to reverse curses. We searched the catacomb and found the relic. Sebastian used it to raise Inferi and unfortunately, when his uncle Solomon arrived, a battle between them ensued. Sebastian killed his uncle. Ominis and I decided it was best not to turn Sebastian in. I hope we did the right thing.
塞巴斯蒂安和我开始寻找萨拉查·斯莱特林的藏经楼。在那里，塞巴斯蒂安从一本古老的咒语书中发现了斯莱特林的学生肯定在其中研究过石棺的地下墓穴。一位在魔咒方面有天赋的学生，将一个被遗忘的文物藏在了和地下墓穴的骨头相关联的魔法后面。他们认为这件文物具有逆转诅咒的力量。我们搜索了地下墓穴并找到了文物。塞巴斯蒂安用它来唤起了阴尸，不幸的是，当他的叔叔所罗门到达时，他们之间发生了一场战斗。塞巴斯蒂安最终杀死了他的叔叔。奥米尼斯和我决定最好不要供出塞巴斯蒂安。我希望我们的这个决定是对的。

Sebastian and I set out to find Salazar Slytherin's scriptorium. and there, in an old spellbook, Sebastian found references to a catacomb where Slytherin's students must have studied sarcophagi. A student gifted in Charms hid a forgotten relic behind enchantments to do with the catacomb's bones. They believed the relic held the power to reverse curses. We searched the catacomb and found the relic. Sebastian used it to raise Inferi and unfortunately, when his uncle Solomon arrived, a battle between them ensued. Sebastian killed his uncle. Ominis and I decided to turn Sebastian in and now he is with the Headmaster and will soon face trial with the Ministry. I hope we did the right thing.
塞巴斯蒂安和我开始寻找萨拉查·斯莱特林的藏经楼。在那里，塞巴斯蒂安从一本古老的咒语书中发现了斯莱特林的学生肯定在其中研究过石棺的地下墓穴。一位在魔咒方面有天赋的学生，将一个被遗忘的文物藏在了和地下墓穴的骨头相关联的魔法后面。他们认为这件文物具有逆转诅咒的力量。我们搜索了地下墓穴并找到了文物。塞巴斯蒂安用它来唤起了阴尸，不幸的是，当他的叔叔所罗门到达时，他们之间发生了一场战斗。塞巴斯蒂安最终杀死了他的叔叔。奥米尼斯和我决定最好供出塞巴斯蒂安，他现在和校长在一起并且不久将会面临魔法部的审判。我希望我们的这个决定是对的。
In the Shadow of Friendship|友谊的阴影下
EVL_CONV_09_CurseConvo_QuestAvailable_Ta: Find Sebastian in the Undercroft and ask about Unforgivable Curses|在地穴找到塞巴斯蒂安并询问关于不可饶恕诅咒的事
EVL_CONV_09_CurseConvo_QuestComplete_Jou:
I learned an Unforgivable Curse from Sebastian. He said if I want to learn more regarding the Dark side of magic, I can usually find him in the Undercroft. 
我从塞巴斯蒂安那里学会了不可饶恕诅咒。他说如果我想更了解魔法的黑暗面，我通常可以在地穴找到他。
EVL_Conv_09_InTheShadowOfTheCurse_QuestT: In the Shadow of the Curse|诅咒的阴影下
evl_conv_depthofscrutiny_questtitle: In the Shadow of Discovery|探索的阴影下
EVL_CONVO_09_CurseConvo_QuestTitle: In the Shadow of the Curse|诅咒的阴影下
EVT_01:
At long last, we found the relic! But we found another note alongside it, and the writings here are ominous. I need to speak with Sebastian about this.
终于，我们找到了文物！但我们在旁边发现了另一个笔记，且其中的文字不详。我需要和塞巴斯蒂安谈谈这件事。
EVT_01_01_CompleteJournal:
Sebastian decided to take the relic with him. Now we need to get to Feldcroft and show Anne what we found. But first, we must get out of the catacomb.
塞巴斯蒂安决定随身携带文物。现在我们需要去费德罗特向安妮展示我们的发现。但首先，我们必须走出地下墓穴。
EVT_01_03_CompleteJournal:
Sebastian and I found the final piece to the triptych and that triggered a Pensieve to appear in the Undercroft. 
塞巴斯蒂安和我找到了三联画的最后一块，这触使冥想盆在地穴出现。
EVT_01_CONV_LighthouseSubGoal: Talk with Sebastian|与塞巴斯蒂安交谈
EVT_01_DepthOfAMountain_QuestActive_Step:
The entrance to the caverns is at the top of the switchbacks leading up the mountain. Sebastian saw a large number of Ranrok’s Loyalists guarding the pass. We’ll need to be careful.
洞穴的入口位于通往山上的折返处的顶部。塞巴斯蒂安看到一大批兰洛克的追随者守在关口。我们得小心。

We’re going to need to get past all these goblins to reach the entrance to the cavern. Sebastian seems to be relishing the fight.
我们需要绕过所有这些妖精才能到达洞穴的入口。塞巴斯蒂安似乎很享受这场战斗。
We managed to take care of all the goblins, now to continue our journey up.|我们设法解决了所有的妖精，现在要继续旅程。
These guards are blocking the entrance. We'll need to defeat them to get in.|这些守卫堵住了入口。我们需要打败他们才能进入。

We need to enter the cavern and continue our search for the final piece of the triptych.
我们需要进入洞穴，并继续寻找三联画的最终碎片。

This cavern has winding corridors much like the Overlook Mine, but much bigger. We should keep our eyes open for more runes like the ones we found there.
这个洞穴有蜿蜒的走廊，很像俯眺矿坑，但要大得多。我们应该睁大眼睛寻找更多像我们在那里发现的符文。
We need to defeat all of the spiders to continue our search.|我们需要击败所有蜘蛛才能继续搜索。

These runes are identical to those drawn on the note from the triptych. I need to figure out the order in which to activate them.
这些符文与三联画上的符文相同。我需要弄清楚启动它们的顺序。

I’ve unlocked the Rune Door. We should continue searching for the triptych's missing canvas.
我已经解锁了符文之门。我们应该继续寻找三联画遗失的画布。
I should focus on not letting this troll kill Sebastian and me.|我应该专注于不让这个巨怪杀死塞巴斯蒂安和我。

Now that the troll is out of the way, we should continue searching for the triptych's missing canvas.
现在巨怪已经不在了，我们应该继续寻找三联画遗失的画布。

We’ve encountered another Rune Door. I need to activate the Runes in the proper order.
我们遇到了另一个符文之门。我需要以正确的顺序启动符文。

I unlocked the Rune Door. Hopefully the missing canvas is in the chamber beyond.
我打开了符文之门。希望遗失的画布在远处的房间里。

There’s more crystallised stone and another passageway back to Hogwarts. Now that we’ve found the triptych segment, we can take it back to the Undercroft. I wonder what it will reveal.
有更多的结晶石和另一个返回霍格沃茨的通道。现在我们已经找到了三联画部分，我们可以把它带回地穴。我想知道它会揭示什么。

I need to place the final bit of canvas into the triptych and see what it reveals.
我需要将最后一块画布放入三联画中，看看它揭示了什么。
EVT_01_DepthOfAMountain_QuestActive_Task: Travel up the switchbacks|走上折返处
Defeat all the enemies|击败所有敌人
Continue up the mountain|继续上山
Defeat all of the enemies|击败所有敌人
Unlock the Rune Door|解锁符文之门
Search for the triptych segment|搜索三联画段
Search for the triptych segment|搜索三联画段
Unlock the Rune Door|解锁符文之门
Use the magic passageway|使用魔法通道
Place the canvas into the triptych|将画布放入三联画中
EVT_01_DepthOfAMountain_QuestAvailable_J:
I received an owl from Sebastian. It seems, despite our earlier disagreement, he would like to resume our search for the final piece of the triptych. He’s apparently found a lead on its location and wants to meet along the coast to the southeast.
我从塞巴斯蒂安那里收到了一只猫头鹰。看来，尽管我们早些时候存在分歧，但他仍希望我们继续寻找三联画的最后一块。他显然找到其位置的线索，并想在东南沿海会面。

I need to meet Sebastian along the coast to continue our search for the final piece of the triptych.
我得去海岸区域找到塞巴斯蒂安，并和他一起寻找三联画的最后一部分。
EVT_01_DepthOfAMountain_QuestAvailable_T: Meet Sebastian along the coast|与塞巴斯蒂安在沿海会面
EVT_01_DepthOfAMountain_QuestComplete_Jo:
Sebastian discovered more of Ranrok’s Loyalists swarming around another cavern. We decided to fight our way past them and find out what they were looking for. In our search we discovered more runes like the ones on the note from the triptych. We then battled a troll and a nasty infestation of spiders before finding the final piece to the triptych and another passageway back to the Undercroft. We returned and placed the final canvas in the triptych, unlocking a Pensieve memory. We watched it and learned that ancient magic has healing potential. Sebastian believes we can use this power to cure Anne.
塞巴斯蒂安发现更多兰洛克的追随者在另一个洞穴周围蜂拥而至。我们决定与他们搏斗，并了解他们在寻找什么。在搜索中，我们发现了更多的符文，例如三联画笔记上的符文。然后，我们与巨怪和令人讨厌的蜘蛛斗争，且找到了三联画的最后一块和返回地穴的另一条通道。我们返回并将最后的画布放在三联画中，进而解锁了冥想盆的记忆。我们观看并了解到古代魔法具有治疗潜力。塞巴斯蒂安相信我们可以利用这种力量治愈安妮。
EVT_01_DepthofMountain_QuestAvailable_Re: Learn Bombarda from Professor Howin|向皓莺教授学习大爆爆
EVT_01_LighthouseSubGoal: Meet Sebastian at the southern coast|与塞巴斯蒂安在南部海岸会面
EVT_01_PityTheLiving_CP4_Journal01:
This is it! The final piece to the triptych. I wonder what will happen once we put it inside.
就是这个！三联画的最后一块。我想知道把它放进去后会发生什么事。
EVT_IntheShadowoftheMountain_QuestTitle: In the Shadow of the Mountain|山的阴影下
EVT_MissionJournal:
I was surprised to get an owl from Sebastian, but he's willing to meet at the coast to search for the final triptych piece. 
我很惊讶从塞巴斯蒂安那里收到一只猫头鹰，但他想要在海岸会面，以寻找最后的三联画作品。
EVT_MissionTitle: In the Shadow of the Mountain|山的阴影下
EVZ_IntheShadowofRevelation_QuestAvailab:
I need to speak with Sebastian and tell him what I've learned about Victor Rookwood.
我需要跟塞巴斯蒂安谈谈，得让他知道维克托·卢克伍德的事。

I need to speak with Ominis and tell him what I've learned about Victor Rookwood.
我需要跟奥米尼斯谈谈，得让他知道维克托·卢克伍德的事。

Sebastian wants to speak with me. I've decided to tell him about my encounter with Victor Rookwood. He deserves to know the truth about Anne. It wasn't Ranrok nor his Loyalists who cursed her after all. It was Rookwood himself.
塞巴斯蒂安想要跟我谈谈。我决定借着这个机会，把之前遇到维克托·卢克伍德的事情告诉他。他有权利知道安妮当年所受诅咒的真相。其实并不是兰洛克或者是他追随者的追随者施加毒手。从头到尾都是卢克伍德一个人的所作所为。

Ominis wants to speak with me. I've decided to tell him about my encounter with Victor Rookwood. He and Sebastian deserve to know the truth about Anne. It wasn't Ranrok nor his Loyalists who cursed her after all. It was Rookwood himself. I hope Ominis will be able to get word to Sebastian.
奥米尼斯想要跟我谈谈。我决定借着这个机会，把之前遇到维克托·卢克伍德的事情告诉他。他和塞巴斯蒂安都有权利知道安妮当年受到诅咒的真相。其实并不是兰洛克或者是他追随者的追随者施加毒手。从头到尾都是卢克伍德一个人的所作所为。希望奥米尼斯听了之后能够把这个消息转达给塞巴斯蒂安。
Speak with Sebastian|与塞巴斯蒂安交谈
Speak with Ominis|与奥米尼斯交谈
EVZ_IntheShadowofRevelation_QuestComplet:
After the confrontation between Victor Rookwood, I found out that he was the one who cursed Anne. It was not Ranrok nor one of Ranrok's Loyalists. I told Sebastian the news and although he was shocked, he then realised why it all made sense. He said he needs time. He is still processing all that has happened.
在与维克托·卢克伍德对峙之后，我发现他就是那个诅咒安妮的人。不是兰洛克，也不是兰洛克的追随者。我把这个消息告诉塞巴斯蒂安，虽然他很震惊，但随后就意识到为什么这一切都有所道理。他说需要点时间，因为仍在处理所有发生的事情。

After the confrontation between Victor Rookwood, I found out that he was the one who cursed Anne. It was not Ranrok nor one of Ranrok's Loyalists. I told Ominis the news and although he was shocked, he then realised why it all made sense. He asked me to meet him later in the Undercroft. He wants to discuss what happened to Sebastian after we decided to turn him in to the Headmaster for what he did to his uncle Solomon.
在与维克托·卢克伍德对峙之后，我发现他就是那个诅咒安妮的人。不是兰洛克，也不是兰洛克的追随者。我把这个消息告诉奥米尼斯，虽然他很震惊，但随后就意识到为什么这一切都有所道理。他要我稍后在地穴会面。在我们决定将塞巴斯蒂安交给校长处理他对其叔叔所罗门的所作所为之后，他想讨论塞巴斯蒂安的遭遇。
EVZ_IntheShadowofRevelation_QuestTitle: In the Shadow of Revelation|揭示的阴影下
ExittoMainMenu: Exit to Main Menu|退回主菜单
ExitToMainMenu_desc: Return from your current menu to the Main Menu|从当前界面返回至主菜单
Expelliarmus_desc:
Disarms wands and weapons from most enemies who wield them. Also deals damage to all enemies, even if they do not carry a weapon.
能够缴除绝大多数敌人使用的魔杖与武器。就算没有携带任何形式的武器，也能够对所有敌人造成伤害。
Expelliarmus_gameplay_desc:
Disarms wands and weapons from most enemies who wield them. Also deals damage to all enemies, even if they do not carry a weapon.
能够缴除绝大多数敌人使用的魔杖与武器。就算没有携带任何形式的武器，也能够对所有敌人造成伤害。
Expelliarmus_Vul: Vulnerable to Expelliarmus|无力抵抗“除你武器”
Expelliarmus_Vul_desc: Goblins carrying items are easily disarmed using Expelliarmus.|使用“除你武器”可轻易让带有物品的妖精缴械。
Expulso_desc:
Deals heavy damage on impact, accompanied by an explosion that can destroy heavy obstacles and hit surrounding enemies
命中时造成大量伤害，随后引发的爆炸能够摧毁大型障碍物并伤害周遭敌人
Extortionist_Captain_tip_one_desc:
Among the quicker of Rookwood's agents, these witches will surprise their opponents with back-to-back attacks.
作为卢克伍德麾下身手更为敏捷的爪牙，这些巫师将会使用密不透风的连续攻击让对手们猝不及防。
Extortionist_Captain_tip_three_desc:
Their powerful Reductor Curse cannot be blocked by Shield Charms, but interrupting that cast with a Severing Charm will spin them to the point of losing control and hitting one of their own gang.
护盾魔咒无法抵挡强力粉碎诅咒。但如果在对手施法时对其使用切割魔咒，就能使他们失去控制并攻击自己的同伙。
Extortionist_Captain_tip_two_desc:
Impacting their Shield Charm with a Stunning Spell will make them retaliate with a Reductor Curse.
如果他们的护盾魔咒遭到昏迷咒语攻击，这些女巫将会立刻使用粉碎诅咒发动反击。
Extortionist_Grunt_tip_one_desc:
These unscrupulous wizards have not mastered Shield Charms, so they are quite vulnerable to all sorts of attacks.
这些魔法世界中的不法之徒尚未精通护盾魔咒，因此无法有效抵挡各类攻击。
Extortionist_Grunt_tip_two_desc:
Watch out for counterattacks from these shifty wizards. They can catch you off guard by casting spells as they recover from being knocked down.
小心这些狡猾巫师的反击。他们被击倒后，能够在起身过程中出其不意地对敌人迅速施放咒语
Extortionist_mage_tip_one_desc:
Some of the most evil witches alive, these secretive members of Rookwood's organisation have spent years turning the peaceful dead into an army of their own Inferi.
这些卢克伍德麾下的秘密爪牙个个都是当世女巫中的大奸大恶之徒，多年来一直在将沉睡着的死者们扭曲转化成自己的阴尸大军。
Extortionist_mage_tip_three_desc:
Interrupting their Reductor Curse with a Banishing Charm will cause them to lose control of their spell cast and hit one of their own gang.
使用驱逐魔咒干扰他们的粉碎诅咒便可使这些敌人失去控制并攻击自己的同伙。
Extortionist_mage_tip_two_desc:
They can summon Inferi to do their bidding at a moment's notice, often surprising their foes as the animated corpses emerge. Best to prevent them from calling forth their Inferi at all, but if all else fails, fire will defeat the undead.
他们可以随时召唤行尸来为他们效力，当行尸突然出现时，常常会让敌人们吓得措手不及。最好完全阻止他们召唤行尸，如果实在无计可施的话，火焰将会是你面对凶恶阴尸时的最佳帮手。
Extortionist_Sniper_tip_one_desc:
These witches have mastered the Full Body-Bind Curse in order to capture and terrorise their victims.
这些女巫是全身束缚诅咒方面的专家，能够活捉并折磨自己的牺牲品。
Extortionist_Sniper_tip_three_desc:
A Stunning Spell is often enough to knock them totally unconscious, but cleverness and skill are required to successfully cast it at them.
虽然通常一记昏迷咒语便足以让他们不省人事，但首先你得学会看准时机，凭借熟练的技巧成功命中敌人。
Extortionist_Sniper_tip_two_desc:
Since they prefer to avoid the heart of a battle, pulling them close with Accio is an effective way to disrupt their plans.
在战斗中，这些敌人倾向于远离激烈胶着的中心地点，因此你需要反其道而行之，使用“飞来咒”拉近距离并借此打乱他们的计划。
Extortionist_Soldier_tip_one_desc:
These wizards are skilled at deflecting simple attacks, so their Shield Charms must be broken first in order to defeat them.
这些巫师擅长反弹简单的攻击，因此必须先设法突破护盾魔咒才能打败他们。
Extortionist_Soldier_tip_two_desc:
As they warm up their Expulso Curse, levitating them with Levioso will cause them to lose control of the spell and hit one of their own gang.
当他们准备发动飞沙走石诅咒时，一记恰到好处的飘浮咒语“啦唯啊萨”将能使他们失去控制并攻击自己的同伙。
Extortionist_Soldier_tip_two_desc|SWITCH:
As they warm up their Expulso Curse, levitating them with Levioso will cause them to lose control of the spell and hit one of their own gang.
当他们准备发动飞沙走石诅咒时，一记恰到好处的飘浮咒语“啦唯啊萨”将能使他们失去控制并攻击自己的同伙。
Extortionist_Tank_tip_one_desc:
These wizards have mastered the ability to create localised lightning bolts to strike down their opponents.
这些巫师能够熟练地召唤闪电矢打击敌人。
Extortionist_Tank_tip_three_desc:
Slowing down these wizards with Arresto Momentum while they are conjuring lightning will keep that lightning striking longer, providing an opportunity to launch enemies into that lightning with shocking results.
在他们变幻闪电时对其使用迟缓魔咒“减震止速”将延长闪电打击的持续时间。之后只需要设法让其他敌人落至闪电位置就能让他们自食其果。
Extortionist_Tank_tip_two_desc:
Disarming them with Expelliarmus as they prepare to cast their lightning spell will cause them to lose control of the spell with self-destructive effects.
如果在这些敌人施放闪电咒语期间使用“除你武器”将其缴械，这将使他们的咒语失去控制并带来致命的自毁效果。
ExtortionistAssassin_tip_one_desc:
These witches and wizards are masters of Shield Charms and will deflect most attacks back at their opponents. Persistent Protego parries and counterattacks are the key to breaking through their defences and providing an opening to follow up with powerful spell combinations.
这些巫师与女巫精通护盾魔咒，因此能够反弹对手发动的绝大多数攻击。沉着冷静地通过盔甲护身持续招架与反击突破他们的防御，并利用空档机会发动强力咒语连招。
ExtortionistAssassin_tip_two_desc:
The most destructively powerful among their faction, these Dark witches and wizards will surprise their opponents with a variety of spells, some of which cannot be deflected with Shield Charms. The right defensive manoeuvres will undermine their attacks, allowing opponents to break their defences and follow up with powerful spell combinations.
这些黑巫师是各自所属派系之中最为强大而且致命的成员，他们能够使用一系列强力咒语来奇袭对手，有些咒语甚至无法使用护盾魔咒反弹。只有正确的防御战术才能见招拆招。看准时机突破他们的防御，并立刻发动强力咒语连招。
ExtortionistMage_tip_one_desc:
These witches and wizards are adept with Shield Charms and will successfully defend against most attacks. Surprising them by suddenly Apparating next to them will catch them off guard, giving providing time to follow up with additional attacks.
这些女巫与巫师擅长护盾魔咒，因此能够抵挡绝大多数攻击。如果想要突破他们的牢固防御，可以通过现影术迅速传送至他们身旁，并趁着他们来不及反应，争取时间发动后续攻击。
ExtortionistMage_tip_two_desc:
Some of the most evil wizards and witches alive, these secretive members of Rookwood's organisation have spent years turning the peaceful dead into an army of their own Inferi. They can summon them to do their bidding at a moment's notice, often surprising their foes as the animated corpses emerge. The wise opponent will watch closely and prevent them from calling forth their Inferi at all. But if all else fails, fire can defeat the undead.
这些卢克伍德麾下的秘密爪牙个个都是当世巫师与女巫中的大奸大恶之徒，多年来一直在将沉睡着的死者们扭曲转化成自己的阴尸大军。他们可以立即召唤阴尸，并指挥这些行尸走肉让敌人们措手不及。聪明的对手会格外小心，绝不能让他们有机会召唤阴尸。但如果无法及时阻止，火焰将会帮你击败这些阴尸。

FGB_01_07_StepTask: Complete the trial of the Stone|完成石头的试炼
FGB_01_Hallows_FailWarning: You're straying too far from the Headmaster's office|你离校长办公室太远了
FGB_01_Hallows_Journal01:
Now that I have the password to the Headmaster's office, I need to go in and speak to Niamh's portrait.
现在我有了校长办公室的密码，我需要进去和尼欧弗的肖像说话。
FGB_01_Hallows_Journal01b:
The first step of Niamh Fitzgerald's trial is to find a book in the Headmaster's office.
尼欧弗·菲兹杰拉德试炼的第一步，是在校长办公室找到一本书。
FGB_01_Hallows_Journal02:
I've been given a cloak that will protect me from death as I make my way to Niamh.
在寻找尼欧弗的路上，我得到了一件神奇的斗篷，这将保护我免受死神侵扰。
FGB_01_Hallows_Journal02b:
I'm to find Niamh among the ruins of this strange town, but where is she? Has she avoided death?
我要在这个陌生小镇的废墟中找到尼欧弗，但她在哪里？她逃过了死亡吗？
FGB_01_Hallows_Journal04:
I found a group mourning Niamh. A stone will help raise her so I can speak to her again.
我发现一群人在哀悼尼欧弗。有块石头可帮助她崛起，这样我就可以再次和她说话了。
FGB_01_Hallows_Journal05:
Niamh led me to her Pensieve, where I'm to witness the next memory the Keepers left for me.
尼欧弗指引我找到了她的冥想盆，我在其中见证了守护者留下的另一段回忆。
FGB_01_Hallows_MissionFail: You strayed too far from the Headmaster's office|你离校长办公室太远了
FGB_01_Hallows_QuestActive_Journal:
Professor Fitzgerald revealed that the location of the next trial is to be found in the Headmaster's office. Remarkably, Professor Fig's cunning plan to learn the password from the house-elf Scrope worked like a charm. Now it's up to me to enter the office and see what the Keepers have in store.
菲兹杰拉德教授说出了真相；原来下一场试炼的地点就在校长办公室中。让我没有想到的是，菲戈教授的“巧妙计划”真的成功了，我轻松从家养小精灵斯科洛普那里要到了口令。现在只需要进入校长办公室，我就能开始守护者们的下一轮试炼了。
FGB_01_Hallows_QuestAvailable_Journal:
Professor Fitzgerald has a new challenge waiting for me in the Headmaster's office.
菲兹杰拉德教授在校长办公室里面为我准备了新一轮的挑战。
FGB_01_Hallows_QuestComplete_Journal:
I spoke to Professor Fitzgerald and saw her memory. I returned to the Map Chamber and met the next Keeper – San Bakar.
我和菲兹杰拉德教授交谈，并看到了她的记忆。我回到地图密室，并遇到了下一位守护者：森·巴卡尔。
FGB_01_Hallows_QuestTitle: Niamh Fitzgerald's Trial|尼欧弗·菲兹杰拉德的试炼

FGD_01_CONV_HeadmistressSpeaks_QuestActi:
The portrait of Professor Niamh Fitzgerald has appeared in the Map Chamber. I should go there and speak with her.
尼欧弗·菲兹杰拉德教授的肖像已出现在地图密室中。我应该去那里和她谈谈。

According to Professor Fitzgerald, the next step of the trial leads to the Headmaster’s office. I need to talk to Professor Fig about this right away.
根据菲兹杰拉德教授的说法，试炼的下一步是校长办公室。我需要马上和菲戈教授谈谈这件事。

Now that the Polyjuice Potion has taken effect, I need to find Scrope and convince him to give me the password to the Headmaster's office.
现在复方汤剂已经生效了，我需要找到斯科洛普，说服他把校长办公室的密码给我。

The Polyjuice Potion is beginning to wear off – I need to get out of sight quickly!
复方汤剂开始失效了，我得快点躲开视线！
Speak to the portrait of Professor Fitzgerald|与菲兹杰拉德教授的肖像交谈
Consult with Professor Fig|询问菲戈教授的意见
Speak to Madam Kogawa about Scrope|与古川夫人谈论斯科洛普的事
Learn the password from Scrope|向斯科洛普询问口令
Exit the Great Hall|离开礼堂
FGD_01_CONV_HeadmistressSpeaks_QuestAvai:
It's time for me to speak with Professor Fitzgerald and to learn the location of my next trial.
是时候向菲兹杰拉德教授询问下一次试炼的地点了。

The portrait of Professor Fitzgerald in the Map Chamber is ready to speak to me.
菲兹杰拉德教授在地图密室里的画像已经准备好与我交谈。
FGD_01_CONV_HeadmistressSpeaks_QuestComp:
Professor Fitzgerald, once Headmistress of Hogwarts, told me the location of my next trial: Professor Black's office. Professor Fig said he happened to have Polyjuice Potion to turn into Professor Black, and I used it to assume Black’s appearance and convince Scrope the house-elf to give me the password to the Headmaster's office. Now I need to get inside and find the next trial without getting caught.
曾是霍格沃茨校长的菲兹杰拉德教授告诉我下一次试炼的地点：布莱克教授的办公室。菲戈教授说他碰巧有复方汤剂可变成布莱克教授，我用它假装了布莱克的样子，并说服了家养小精灵斯科洛普将校长办公室的密码给我。现在我得进去寻找下个试炼且不被抓到。
FGD_01_CONV_LighthouseSubGoal: Find the location of the third Keeper trial|找到第三个守护者试炼的位置
FGD_01_CONV_Niamh_Journal01: The Keepers will want to know about what I've learned of Ranrok's plan.|我应该把兰洛克的计划告诉守护者。
FGD_01_CONV_Niamh_QuestComplete_Journal:
I spoke to Professor Fitzgerald in the Map Chamber. She's directed me to the next trial, in the Headmaster's office. Professor Fig will know what to do next.
我在地图密室与菲兹杰拉德教授交谈。她指示我去校长办公室进行下一次试炼。菲戈教授会知道下一步该怎么做。
FGD_01_CONV_Niamh_TaskObj01: Speak to the portrait of Professor Niamh Fitzgerald in the Map Chamber|与地图密室中的尼欧弗·菲兹杰拉德教授的肖像交谈
FGD_01_HeadmistressSpeaks_QuestActive_Jo:
I witnessed troubling news with Amit when we investigated a mine for Lodgok. Ranrok and his Loyalists are building powerful drills. Surely it's time to embark on the trial laid before me by the newest Keeper to appear in the Map Chamber – Professor Niamh Fitzgerald. She was headmistress in her time at Hogwarts. I'm certain she has the wisdom to reveal what's next on this path.
和阿米特一起帮助罗德高克调查矿井的时候，我掌握到了令人不安的情报。兰洛克和他追随者的追随者妖精正在建造威力强劲的钻头。地图密室中又来了一位新的守护者，尼欧弗·菲兹杰拉德教授已经为我准备好了下一场试炼。尼欧弗教授当年曾经担任过霍格沃茨的校长一职。相信她一定能够凭借自己的智慧指引我完成下一轮的挑战。
FGD_01_LighthouseSubGoal: Figure out a way to get into the Headmaster's office|设法进入校长办公室
FGD_01_LineComplete_Journal:
I spoke to Professor Fitzgerald in the Map Chamber. She's directed me to the next trial, in the Headmaster's office. Professor Fig will know what to do next.

I've taken the Polyjuice Potion, and now I need to find Madam Kogawa. She may know more about the Headmaster's house-elf, named Scrope.
我已经喝下了复方汤剂，现在该去找古川夫人聊聊了。她说不定知道校长的家养小精灵斯科洛普的去向。

I need to speak to the Headmaster's house-elf, Scrope, to learn the password into his office.
我需要和校长的家养小精灵斯科洛普谈谈，才能知道进入办公室的密码。
FGD_01_Polyjuice_Journal04: I need to get away from the crowd as the Polyjuice Potion wears off.|复方汤剂的效果开始退去了，我需要赶紧找一个隐蔽的地方。

I need to speak to Professor Fig about how to get into the Headmaster's office. The Keepers have something planned for me there.
我需要和菲戈教授谈谈如何进入校长办公室。守护者在那里为我准备了一些东西。
FGD_01_Polyjuice_QuestComplete_Journal:
I found out the password to the Headmaster's office. Now to get in there and see what Professor Fitzgerald has planned for me.
我找到了校长办公室的密码。现在进去看看菲兹杰拉德教授为我准备了什么。

FGH_01_01_StepDesc:
I've found the book's missing pages in a mysterious cave. I need to bring them to Professor Fig.
我在一个神秘的山洞里找到了这本书的缺页。我需要把它们带给菲戈教授。
FGH_01_01_StepTask: Return the pages to Professor Fig|将页面归还给菲戈教授
FGH_01_02_MissionComplete: Professor Fig and I activated the Map Chamber|菲戈教授和我启动了地图密室
FGH_01_02_StepDesc:
Professor Fig said the book mentioned a ‘Map Chamber’ and thinks it could be the room I found in the cave.
菲戈教授说这本书提到了一个“地图密室”，并认为它可能是我在洞穴中找到的房间。
FGH_01_02_StepTask: Go to the Map Chamber with Fig|与菲戈教授前往地图密室
FGH_01_02_StepTask02: Speak to Percival Rackham|与波西瓦尔·拉克汉姆交谈
FGH_01_02_StepTitle: Echoes of the Past|过往的回声
FGH_01_03_StepTask: Study the map on the floor of the Map Chamber with Professor Fig|与菲戈教授一起研究地图密室地板上的地图
FGH_01_Haven_Journal01:
I found the pages that were missing from the book. I need to return them to Professor Fig.
我找到了书中缺少的页面。我需要把它们还给菲戈教授。
FGH_01_Haven_Journal02:
Now that the book is complete, Professor Fig and I need to take it to the Map Chamber.
现在这本书已经完成了，我和菲戈教授需要把它带到地图密室。
FGH_01_Haven_Journal03: The portrait of Percival Rackham wants to tell me what's next.|波西瓦尔·拉克汉姆的肖像想告诉我接下来会发生什么事。
FGH_01_Haven_Journal04: Professor Rackham has revealed a map on the floor of the Map Chamber.|拉克汉姆教授在地图密室的地板上展示了一张地图。
FGH_01_Haven_QuestComplete_Journal:
I took Professor Fig to the Map Chamber and introduced him to the portrait of Professor Rackham. We placed the book on a pedestal and it brought to life an extraordinary map of Hogwarts and the surrounding areas. Professor Rackham explained that the map will show us the first of four trials that I must complete. Professor Fig is going to scout ahead to see what could be waiting for us. I must admit, I'm both excited and apprehensive for what lies ahead. 
我带着菲戈教授来到地图密室，向他介绍了拉克汉姆教授的肖像。我们把这本书放在一个基座上，它为霍格沃茨和周边地区带来了一幅非凡的地图。拉克汉姆教授解释说，这张地图将向我们展示我必须完成的四项试炼中的第一项。菲戈教授将在前方侦察，看看有什么事在等着我们。我必须承认，我对即将发生的事情既兴奋又担心。
FGH_01_Haven_TaskObj01: Return the pages to Professor Fig|将页面归还给菲戈教授
FGH_01_Haven_TaskObj02: Show Professor Fig the Map Chamber|向菲戈教授展示地图密室
FGH_01_Haven_TaskObj03: Speak to the portrait|与肖像交谈
FGH_01_LighthouseSubGoal: Tell Professor Fig about the Map Chamber|告诉菲戈教授关于地图密室的事
FGH_01_TheMapChamber_QuestActive_StepJou:
Now that Professor Fig has returned, I’m excited to show him the missing pages and the secret map chamber I found below the school. 
现在菲戈教授回来了，我很高兴向他展示我在学校下面找到的遗失的页面和秘密地图密室。

The entrance to the Map Chamber is just down the spiral staircase, hidden in the floor of a disused stone room.
地图密室的入口就在螺旋楼梯的下方，隐藏在一间废弃石室的地板下。

It’s time to introduce Professor Fig to the portrait of Professor Rackham and let him know we’ve brought the book from the Library.
该向菲戈教授介绍拉克汉姆教授的肖像，并让他知道我们从图书馆带来了这本书。

The portrait of Professor Rackham would like another word before I set off to find the first trial.
在出发寻找第一场试炼之前，拉克汉姆教授的画像似乎还有些话要跟我说。
FGH_01_TheMapChamber_QuestActive_TaskObj: Report to Professor Fig |向菲戈教授报告
Enter the Map Chamber |进入地图密室
Speak to the portrait of Professor Rackham|与拉克汉姆教授的肖像交谈
Speak to the Portrait |与肖像交谈
FGH_01_TheMapChamber_QuestAvailable_Jour:
Professor Fig has returned. I need to update him about Richard Jackdaw and how I found the missing pages, as well as my discovery of the hidden Map Chamber and the portrait of Professor Rackham. 
菲戈教授回来了。我需要把找到理查德·捷克道尔以及失踪书页的事情，还有秘密地图密室以及拉克汉姆教授的肖像的消息告诉他。

FGM_01_04_Cave_Journal:
The missing pages from the book I found for Professor Fig may not be lost after all.

FGM_01_GRY_TheHuntfortheMissingPages_Que: The Hunt for the Missing Pages|寻找遗失的书页
FGM_01_GRY_TheMissingPages_QuestActive_S:
Sir Nicholas says he has information about the missing pages from the book – it seems that the ghosts of Hogwarts spend much of their time eavesdropping. He says he’s willing to help me, but first he wants me to do him a favour.
尼古拉斯爵士说他掌握了书中缺失页面的资讯：霍格沃茨的幽灵似乎大部分时间都在窃听。他说愿意帮助我，但首先希望我帮他一个忙。

I need to ‘tickle’ the pear in the painting so I can get into the kitchen and retrieve some rotten roast beef for Sir Nicholas. Apparently, the foul smell of rotting food allows ghosts to remember what it once tasted like.
我需要为画中的梨“呵痒”，这样才能进入厨房，并为尼古拉斯爵士取得一些烂烤牛肉。显然，腐烂食物的恶臭可让幽灵想起它曾经的味道。

This rotten roast beef is disgusting. I should get it back to Sir Nicholas before I pass out from the stench.
这烂烤牛肉真恶心。在我从恶臭中晕倒之前，得把它拿给尼古拉斯爵士。

The ghost of Richard Jackdaw is said to be playing a game nearby with the Headless Hunt. I should look for them.
据说理查德·捷克道尔的幽灵正在附近与无头猎手们一起玩游戏。我应该去找他们。

The Headless Hunt is using Jackdaw’s head in their game. If I can find it five times among the pumpkins then they’ll let me speak to him.
无头猎手在他们的游戏中使用捷克道尔的头。如果我能在南瓜中找到他的头五次，他们就会让我和他说话。

Now that the game is over, I can finally speak to Richard Jackdaw’s ghost. I hope he can tell me where to find the missing pages.
现在游戏结束了，我终于可以和理查德·捷克道尔的幽灵对话了。我希望他能告诉我在哪里可以找到遗失的页面。
FGM_01_GRY_TheMissingPages_QuestActive_T: Follow Sir Nicholas|跟随尼古拉斯爵士
Obtain rotten roast beef|获得烂烤牛肉
Return to Sir Nicholas|返回尼古拉斯爵士那边
Find Richard Jackdaw|找到理查德·捷克道尔

Speak to Richard Jackdaw|与理查德·捷克道尔交谈
FGM_01_GRY_TheMissingPages_QuestAvailabl:
Sir Nicholas de Mimsy-Porpington, the Gryffindor house ghost, has been asking around about the new fifth-year student in Gryffindor. He’s been seen floating around near the entrance to the Great Hall. 
格兰芬多学院的幽灵，即尼古拉斯·德·敏西-波平顿爵士，一直在四处打听格兰芬多的新五年级学生。有人看到他在礼堂入口附近漂浮。
Nearly Headless Nick may have information regarding the missing pages I seek.|差点没头的尼克似乎知道我需要的那些失踪书页的事。
Speak to Nearly Headless Nick |与差点没头的尼克交谈
FGM_01_GRY_TheMissingPages_QuestComplete:
Nearly Headless Nick helped connect me to Richard Jackdaw’s ghost. To do so, I had to help Nick pilfer some rotten roast beef from the Hogwarts kitchen. He hoped to use it to gain favour with Sir Patrick and be accepted to the Headless Hunt, but, unfortunately, he still doesn’t qualify since he was never fully decapitated. I finally spoke to the ghost of Richard Jackdaw and he’s agreed to show me where he died. He says the missing pages should be on top of his remains.
差点没头的尼克帮助我与理查德·捷克道尔的幽灵联系。为此，我必须帮助尼克从霍格沃茨的厨房里偷走一些烂烤牛肉。他希望藉此博得派屈克爵士的好感，并被无头猎手接纳。但不幸的是，他仍然没有资格，因为他从未被完全斩首。我终于和理查德·捷克道尔的幽灵交谈了，他同意跟我说他的死亡地点。他说遗失的页面应该就在他的遗体之上。
FGM_01_GRYFF_Journal01:
Sir Nicholas says he knows something about the missing pages. I'll hear him out, but where is he leading me?
尼古拉斯爵士说他对遗失的页面有所了解。我会听他说，但他要带我去向哪里？
FGM_01_GRYFF_Journal02:
Sir Nicholas needs rotten roast beef from the kitchen in order to get me one step closer to those missing pages.
尼古拉斯爵士需要厨房里的烂烤牛肉，才能让我离那些缺失的页面更近一步。
FGM_01_GRYFF_Journal03:
Feenky gave me some rotten roast beef. Now to find Sir Nicholas and get on with his plan.
芬琪给了我一些烂烤牛肉。现在要去找尼古拉斯爵士，继续他的计划。
FGM_01_GRYFF_Journal04:
The ghost of Richard Jackdaw can help me with the missing pages. His head is being used in a game somewhere near The Magic Neep.
理查德·捷克道尔的幽灵可以帮助我处理遗失的页面。他的头正在神奇萝卜附近的某个游戏中使用。
FGM_01_GRYFF_Journal05:
I need to destroy a few pumpkins in order to find Richard Jackdaw's head. The Stunning Spell should make quick work of this little game.
我需要摧毁几个南瓜才能找到理查德·捷克道尔的头。昏迷咒语应该可以快速完成这个小游戏。

FGM_01_GRYFF_QuestComplete_Journal:
Sir Nicholas led me to the Headless Hunt. I played a game with them and met Richard Jackdaw. He told me where the missing pages can be found, and agreed to meet me near the Forbidden Forest.
尼古拉斯爵士带我去无头猎手。我和他们玩了一场游戏，并遇到了理查德·捷克道尔。他告诉我在哪里可以找到遗失的页面，并同意在禁林附近与我会面。

FGM_01_HUFF_TheMissingPages_QuestActive_:
The portrait of Eldritch Diggory in the Hufflepuff Common Room would like to speak to me. I should see what he needs.
挂在赫奇帕奇公共休息室的埃德里奇·迪戈里画像想要跟我谈一谈。我应该去和他见一面。

Eldritch Diggory wants me to travel to Upper Hogsfield and speak to Helen Thistlewood, his great-niece and a retired Auror. The hamlet is some distance from Hogwarts – I wonder if I should follow the road or go by way of Hogsmeade.
埃德里奇·迪戈里希望我去上霍格米村找海伦·西索伍德，即他的侄孙女暨退休的傲罗谈谈。小村庄离霍格沃茨有一段距离，我想知道该沿着这条路走，还是走霍格莫德？
This looks like Upper Hogsfield. Now I just need to find Helen Thistlewood.|这里看起来像上霍格米村。现在我只需要找到海伦·西索伍德。

I see what Helen meant by a wave of despair. Everyone has heard the stories about Azkaban, but now that I’m here it’s much worse than I could ever have imagined. What an awful place. We need to talk with Anne and get out of here as quickly as we can.
我明白海伦所说的绝望浪潮是什么意思。每个人都听说过关于阿兹卡班的故事，但现在我在这里，而情况比我想象的要糟糕得多。多么可怕的地方。我们需要和安妮谈谈，并尽快离开这里。

If I understood Anne correctly, there is a cave with a vault in it just outside Upper Hogsfield. She mentioned a knave meandering to a cave. Could Jackdaw’s remains be there? I should investigate.
如果我对安妮的理解正确的话，就在上霍格米村外面有一个洞穴，里面有一个秘库。她提到了一个流浪到山洞的无赖。捷克道尔的遗体会在那里吗？我应该调查一下。

This must be the vault Anne spoke of. She mentioned a knave meandering to a cave. Could Jackdaw’s remains be here? I should investigate.
这一定是安妮所说的秘库。她提到了一个流浪到山洞的无赖。捷克道尔的遗体会在这里吗？我应该调查一下。

I found a note to Anne from Richard Jackdaw inviting her to explore a cave with him, but it didn’t provide the location. It doesn’t look like this is the place. I wonder where it could be.
我找到了理查德·捷克道尔给安妮的一个笔记，邀请她与他一起探索洞穴，但没有指出位置。看起来不是这个地方。我想知道它可能在哪里。
Travel to Upper Hogsfield|前往上霍格米村
Talk to Helen Thistlewood|与海伦·西索伍德交谈
Find the cave near Upper Hogsfield|找到上霍格米村附近的洞穴
FGM_01_HUFF_TheMissingPages_QuestAvailab:
The portrait of Eldritch Diggory hangs just inside of the Hufflepuff common room. I should speak to him and find out what he wants.
埃德里奇·迪戈里的肖像挂在赫奇帕奇公共休息室内。我应该和他谈谈，看看他想要什么。

The portrait of Eldritch Diggory, former Minister for Magic, may have some information for me.
前魔法部部长埃德里奇·迪戈里的画像似乎掌握着一些我需要的情报。
Speak to the portrait of Eldritch Diggory|与埃德里奇·迪戈里的肖像交谈
FGM_01_HUFF_TheMissingPages_QuestComplet:
The portrait of Eldritch Diggory in my Common Room put me in touch with a retired Auror named Helen Thistlewood. She believed the missing pages were connected to the disappearance of a student named Richard Jackdaw. Helen took me to Azkaban, where I met the supposed perpetrator of Jackdaw's disappearance, a prisoner named Anne Thisbe. She attacked Helen and we escaped, but I figured out a clue from Anne's ramblings. I followed the clue and met Jackdaw's ghost. He's agreed to show me where the pages can be found.
一直挂在我的学院公共休息室墙上的埃德里奇·迪戈里画像指引我找到了名叫海伦·西索伍德的退休傲罗。海伦认为我在寻找的失踪书页与许多年前一位名叫“理查德·捷克道尔”的学生失踪一案有关。海伦带我去了阿兹卡班，我在那里见到来了捷克道尔失踪一案的“凶手”安妮·西斯比。身为囚犯的安妮袭击了海伦，之后我们设法逃走，我还成功从安妮的胡言乱语中拼凑出了一条线索。遵循着线索的指引，我找到了捷克道尔的幽灵。他同意带我去寻找那些书页。
FGM_01_LighthouseSubGoal: Follow your lead to the book's missing pages|跟随你的线索找到这本书的缺失页面
FGM_01_LineComplete_Journal:
I found out about the cave where the lost pages to Professor Fig's book are located.
我发现菲戈教授的书遗失页面所在的洞穴。
FGM_01_Pre_HUF_Task: Speak to the portrait of Eldritch Diggory|与埃德里奇·迪戈里的肖像交谈
FGM_01_RAV_MissionFail: You strayed too far from the Owlery|你已经远离猫头鹰屋
FGM_01_RAV_MissionWarning: You're about to leave the Owlery|你即将离开猫头鹰屋
FGM_01_RAV_OllivandersHeirloom_QuestTitl: Ollivander's Heirloom|奥利凡德的传家宝
FGM_01_RAV_TheMissingPages_QuestActive_S:
Mr Ollivander, the wandmaker in Hogsmeade, wants to see me about something. I should pay him a visit.
霍格莫德的魔杖制作人奥利凡德先生似乎有事相求。我应该抽空去拜访他。

Mr Ollivander believes that the Hogwarts Owlery contains a clue to the disappearance of Richard Jackdaw. The Owlery is in the tower just to the South of the castle.
奥利凡德先生认为，霍格沃茨猫头鹰屋藏有理查德·捷克道尔失踪的线索。猫头鹰屋就在城堡南边的高塔里。

In the Owlery I found sculptures of birds, just as Mr Ollivander described. I need to find them all and return them to their perches.
在猫头鹰屋中，我找到了奥利凡德先生描述的鸟类雕塑。现在我需要找齐所有雕像，并让它们回到对应的位置。
FGM_01_RAV_TheMissingPages_QuestActive_T: Investigate the Owlery|调查猫头鹰屋
Return the bird sculptures to their perches|帮助鸟类雕塑回到对应的位置
FGM_01_RAV_TheMissingPages_QuestAvailabl:
I received an owl from Mr Ollivander who runs the wand shop in Hogsmeade. Apparently, Professor Fig told him about how I found the book in the Restricted Section and Mr Ollivander would like me to help him recover a family heirloom.
我从在霍格莫德经营魔杖店的奥利凡德先生那里收到一只猫头鹰。显然，菲戈教授告诉他，我是如何在禁书区找到这本书的，而奥利凡德先生希望我帮助他找回传家宝。
Mr Ollivander thinks I may be able to help him with something.|奥利凡德先生似乎需要我的帮助。
Visit Mr Ollivander in Hogsmeade|前往霍格莫德拜访奥利凡德先生
FGM_01_RAV_TheMissingPages_QuestComplete:
Professor Fig told Mr Ollivander about my resourcefulness in locating the book in the Restricted Section. Impressed by my work, Mr Ollivander asked me to do some detective work for him. He’s searching for a wand that disappeared from his shop. A student named Richard Jackdaw was suspected of stealing it, but he disappeared at the same time as the wand. I investigated the Owlery and discovered a puzzle involving jackdaw statues. After solving the puzzle, the ghost of Richard Jackdaw appeared. Jackdaw believes the wand and the missing pages I seek are with his remains in the cave where he died. He told me to meet him at the edge of the Forbidden Forest and he’ll show me the location of the cave entrance.
菲戈教授向奥利凡德先生讲述我如何足智多谋地在禁书区找到这本书。奥利凡德先生对我的表现印象深刻，并要我为他执行一些侦探工作。他在寻找从他的商店消失的魔杖。一个名叫理查德·捷克道尔的学生疑似偷走了它，但他和魔杖同时消失了。我调查了猫头鹰屋，发现一个涉及寒鸦雕像的谜题。解开谜题后，理查德·捷克道尔的幽灵出现了。捷克道尔认为我寻找的魔杖和遗失的页面，都和他的遗体一样在他死去的山洞里。他要我在禁林边缘与他会面，而他会告诉我洞穴入口的位置。

Professor Fig told Mr Ollivander about my resourcefulness in locating the book in the Restricted Section. Impressed by my work, Mr Ollivander asked me to do some detective work for him. He’s searching for a wand that disappeared from his shop. A student named Richard Jackdaw was suspected of stealing it, but he disappeared at the same time as the wand. I investigated the Owlery and discovered a puzzle involving jackdaw statues. After solving the puzzle, the ghost of Richard Jackdaw appeared. Jackdaw believes the wand and the missing pages I seek are with his remains in the cave where he died. He told me to meet him at the edge of the Forbidden Forest and he’ll show me the location of the cave entrance.
