FGM_01_SLY_ScropesLastHope_QuestTitle: Scrope's Last Hope|斯科洛普的最后希望
FGM_01_SLY_TheMissingPages_QuestActive_S:
Scrope has left another note for me among the circle of rocks just beyond the bridge to the South Exit.
斯科洛普在桥对面南出口的一圈岩石中，留下了另一张笔记给我。

There’s a small cottage with a pumpkin patch on the way to Lower Hogsfield. I’m certain it’s the place Scrope is referring to in his note.
在前往下霍格米村的路上，有一座带南瓜地的小屋。我确定这是斯科洛普在其笔记中提到的地方。
Scrope's note says to meet him at the water’s edge near the broken docks.|斯科洛普在笔记中说要在破损码头附近的水边会面。

Scrope says the grotto is just down the shore. Hopefully the missing pages are somewhere inside.
斯科洛普说石窟就在岸边。希望遗失的页面在其中的某处。

I met the ghost of Richard Jackdaw. He told me where to find the missing pages, and that the ring Scrope wants is gone forever. Now to break the news to the poor fellow.
我遇到了理查德·捷克道尔的幽灵。他告诉我可以找到遗失页面的地方，而斯科洛普想要的戒指已永远消失了。现在得把这个消息告诉那个可怜的家伙。
FGM_01_SLY_TheMissingPages_QuestActive_T: Search for the next note|寻找下一个笔记
Search the pumpkin patch for another note|在南瓜田中搜索另一个笔记
Meet Scrope at the water’s edge|与斯科洛普在水边会面
Return to Scrope|返回斯科洛普那边
FGM_01_SLY_TheMissingPages_QuestAvailabl:
I received an owl from a house-elf named Scrope claiming he knows about the missing pages from the book I found in the Restricted Section. His letter is cryptic, and he requests that I tell no one about it, especially Professor Black. Scrope says to look for a note that he’s left for me in the courtyard beyond the Clock Tower.
我收到了家养小精灵斯科洛普的猫头鹰信，他似乎知道我在禁书区找到的那本书缺失书页一事。只是信中的内容模棱两可，斯科洛普还希望我不要将这事告诉任何人，尤其是布莱克教授。斯科洛普表示在时钟塔后的庭院里给我留下了字条。

A house-elf may have a clue to the missing pages I seek. I should find out more.
有一位家养小精灵似乎掌握着关于我在寻找的那些失踪书页的线索。我需要对此作进一步调查。
Find Scrope's note in the courtyard|在庭院中找到斯科洛普的字条
FGM_01_SLY_TheMissingPages_QuestComplete:
A house-elf named Scrope contacted me about the missing pages. He recalls his previous mistress Apollonia Black speaking of pages being ripped from a book. He thinks she took them to her private grotto and believes a family ring will be found inside. He wants to give the ring to Professor Black to earn his favour. I also met the ghost of Richard Jackdaw. He told me that when he was alive, he tried to impress Apollonia Black by stealing a secret map from Peeves for her, but she didn’t care. He decided that if Apollonia wasn’t interested in the map, perhaps it would lead him to something that would intrigue her. So, he followed the map to his demise. Jackdaw has promised to meet me at the edge of the Forbidden Forest and show me where he died. The pages should still be with his remains.
家养小精灵斯科洛普联系到了我，他似乎知道那些失踪书页的事情。斯科洛普记得自己以前的女主人阿波罗尼亚·布莱克曾经提到了从某本书上被撕下的“书页”。斯科洛普认为阿波罗尼亚当年将书页带去了自己的私人洞窟，斯科洛普还觉得我能够在里面找到一枚布莱克家族的戒指。他认为那枚戒指能够帮助自己赢得布莱克教授的好感。除此以外，我还遇到了理查德·捷克道尔的幽灵。捷克道尔说自己还活着的时候，他曾经想要通过偷走皮皮鬼手上的秘密地图来打动阿波罗尼亚·布莱克的心，但阿波罗尼亚最后不为所动。意识到阿波罗尼亚对地图本身不感兴趣之后，捷克道尔心想也许地图指向的宝箱能够打动她。之后，他便在追寻地图指向的宝箱时“人头落地”。捷克道尔答应会在禁林的边缘等我，到时候还会带我去他死亡的地方。现在书页应该还在捷克道尔的遗体身上。
FGM_01_TheMissingPages_QuestActive_Journ:
Professor Fig took the book I found on his trip to London. He's there to meet with the Ministry about Mr Osric's death. While he's away, there must be something I can do to find the missing pages. Who tore them out, and why? They may be important to understanding what I've seen in the Pensieves.
菲戈教授带着我找到的书去了伦敦。他计划与魔法部的相关人士商讨奥斯里克先生遇难一事。在教授离开的这段时间里，我应该想办法找到那些失踪的书页。到底是谁出于什么原因扯下了那几页内容？说不定那些书页能够帮助我理解之前在冥想盆中看见的那些画面。
FGM_02_02_enterhaven_Task: Investigate the cave where Jackdaw died|调查捷克道尔遇难的那个洞穴
FGM_02_02_Task: Follow Jackdaw through the Forbidden Forest|跟随捷克道尔穿越禁林
FGM_02_04_hotspot_Task: Investigate the mysterious force|调查神秘能量
FGM_02_Jackdaw_Journal01:
I met Richard Jackdaw near the Forbidden Forest and he showed me the way to the cave where he died. I need to use a password to get inside.
我在禁林附近见到了理查德·捷克道尔，之后他告诉了我该如何找到他当初不幸身亡的洞穴。我需要知道口令才能进入其中。
FGM_02_Jackdaw_Journal02:
The pages are on Jackdaw's body somewhere in this cave. Things are beginning to look very familiar.
在这座洞穴的某个位置，我需要的书页就在捷克道尔的遗体身上。不知为什么，我突然有了一种熟悉的感觉。
FGM_02_Jackdaw_Journal03:
There are traces of ancient magic in this cave. Where will they lead me this time?
我在洞穴里面见到了古代魔法的踪迹。这次它们又会带我走向哪里？
FGM_02_Jackdaw_Journal03c:
I found a room at the end of the cave where Jackdaw died. I need to talk to the portrait here.
在捷克道尔的遗体所在的洞穴最深处，我找到了一个神秘的房间。我需要与挂在这里的画像交谈。
FGM_02_Jackdaw_Journal04:
I retrieved the pages from Richard Jackdaw's corpse and talked to Professor Rackham, but where am I?
我从理查德·捷克道尔的遗体身上找到了书页，并且也见过了拉克汉姆教授，但现在的问题是……我在哪？
FGM_02_Jackdaw_Journal05:
I've found my way out of the Map Chamber, so now I need to get back to Hogwarts.
我成功找到了离开地图密室的路线，现在我需要返回霍格沃茨。
FGM_02_Jackdaw_QuestAvailable_Journal:
The pages to the book I found are tucked away with the corpse of a ghost I met named Richard Jackdaw. He's meeting me near the Forbidden Forest to show me where they can be found.
我之前找到的书本中缺少了一些内容，此刻那些书页就在一位名叫理查德·捷克道尔的幽灵的遗体身上。捷克道尔希望我能去禁林附近找他，还说到时候会告诉我如何找到书页和他的遗体。
FGM_02_Jackdaw_QuestComplete_Journal:
The search for the missing pages led me to an ornate room where I met the portrait of Percival Rackham. Professor Fig will be excited to hear about all I've learned.
循着失踪的书页，我发现了一处气势恢宏的奇特房间，并且在里面见到了波西瓦尔·拉克汉姆的画像。等菲戈教授知道了我这次的经历，他肯定会万分激动。
FGM_02_Jackdaw_TaskObj: Meet Richard Jackdaw at the Forbidden Forest|前往禁林边缘与理查德·捷克道尔见面
FGM_02_Jackdaw_TaskObj01: Find the cave where Richard Jackdaw died|找到理查德·捷克道尔最后去过的洞穴
FGM_02_Jackdaw_TaskObj01a: Defeat Ranrok's Loyalists|击败兰洛克的追随者
FGM_02_Jackdaw_TaskObj02: Find the missing pages|找到失踪的书页
FGM_02_Jackdaw_TaskObj03: Investigate the traces of ancient magic|调查古代魔法的踪迹
FGM_02_Jackdaw_TaskObj03b: Defend yourself against the Ancient Defenders|抵挡古代守卫的攻击
FGM_02_Jackdaw_TaskObj03c: Speak to the portrait|与肖像交谈
FGM_02_Jackdaw_TaskObj04: Exit the Map Chamber|离开地图密室
FGM_02_JackdawsRest_QuestActive_Journal:
I met the ghost of Richard Jackdaw. He mangled the book after he stole it from Peeves the poltergeist decades ago. Jackdaw said he can help me find the missing pages, but it won't be as simple as a walk in the woods.
我见到了理查德·捷克道尔的幽灵。数十年前，就是他从“调皮捣蛋鬼”皮皮鬼手中偷走了那本书，之后又扯下了其中的书页。现在捷克道尔表示自己可以帮助我找到失踪的书页，但恐怕过程中会遇到一些意想不到的麻烦。
FGM_02_JackdawsRest_QuestActive_StepJour:
According to Jackdaw, the cave is not too far inside the Forbidden Forest. He said I should look for a stone birdbath. When I find it, I’m to speak the password, ‘intra muros.’
按照捷克道尔的说法，书页所在的那个洞穴就在禁林内部不远的地方。他说我需要“留意一处石头鸟盆”。找到鸟盆之后，我需要说出口令“墙扉洞开”。

The password worked, so it looks like this is the right place. Now I just need to search the cave for Jackdaw’s remains and avoid whatever it was that he lost his head over.
口令起作用了，看来就是这里。现在我需要在洞穴内部寻找捷克道尔的遗体，同时还要提防让他变成现在这样“身首分离”的危险。

This cavern seems massive. I wonder how far in Jackdaw made it. Too bad he wouldn’t come along as it would be much easier to find the pages with his help.
没想到这里别有洞天。不知道捷克道尔当年到达了深处的什么位置。可惜他不愿意陪我一起进来，不然肯定很轻松就能找到书页。

I found Jackdaw’s remains. But it also looks like I’ve found what killed him. I had better defend myself if don’t want to share his fate. I like my head exactly where it is!
我找到了捷克道尔的遗体。不过看上去我好像也发现了当年夺走他性命的“元凶”。如果不想加入无头猎手的行列，我必须保护自己。我可不想和捷克道尔一样“人头落地”！

I see traces of ancient magic in this chamber. I should follow them and see where they lead.
我在这个房间里发现了古代魔法的踪迹。不知道这些踪迹能够引领我走向哪里。

A stately figure in the large portrait on the wall looks like he wishes to speak to me.
耸立在墙上的威严肖像似乎想要与我交谈。
Find the exit to the chamber.|寻找出口。
FGM_02_JackdawsRest_QuestActive_TaskObj0: Find the cave where Richard Jackdaw died|找到理查德·捷克道尔最后去过的洞穴
Search the cave for Richard Jackdaw’s remains|在洞穴中寻找理查德·捷克道尔的遗体
Find the missing pages|找到失踪的书页
Follow the traces of ancient magic|跟随古代魔法的踪迹
Speak to the figure in the portrait|与画像交谈
FGM_02_JackdawsRest_QuestActive_TaskObj1: Whisper the password|低声说出口令
FGM_02_JackdawsRest_QuestAvailable_Journ:
The ghost of Richard Jackdaw is going to meet me at the edge of the Forbidden Forest. He said he'll show me how to get to the cave where he died. He's certain the missing pages are still there with his decapitated remains.
理查德·捷克道尔的幽灵打算在禁林边和我见面。他会告诉我如何去那个导致他遇害的洞穴。他确信那个遗失的书页依旧在那里，和他被斩首的遗体一起。
Richard Jackdaw is waiting for me near the Forbidden Forest.|理查德·捷克道尔正在禁林附近等我。
FGM_02_JackdawsRest_QuestAvailable_StepJ:
I need to learn the Disarming Charm before I can follow Richard Jackdaw's ghost into the Forbidden Forest
学会缴械魔咒之后，我才能够跟随理查德·捷克道尔的幽灵一同进入禁林
FGM_02_JackdawsRest_QuestAvailable_Task1: You must learn Expelliarmus, the Disarming Charm, to continue this story|学会缴械魔咒“除你武器”后才能推进这段故事
FGM_02_JackdawsRest_QuestAvailable_TaskO: Meet Richard Jackdaw’s ghost at the edge of the Forbidden Forest|前往禁林边缘与理查德·捷克道尔的幽灵见面
FGM_02_JackdawsRest_QuestComplete_Journa:
I met with Richard Jackdaw at the edge of the Forbidden Forest and he showed me where the cave is in which he died. I searched the cave and fought lots of spiders along the way. Finally I found Jackdaw’s remains and retrieved the missing pages. I thought I was out of there scot-free until I realised I woke up giant armoured statues. Luckily, unlike Jackdaw, I was able to destroy them. From there I discovered a Map Chamber underneath Hogwarts where I spoke to a portrait of Professor Rackham. He wants me to bring the book from the Restricted Section to him. I should tell Fig about this.
在禁林边缘与理查德·捷克道尔见面之后，他带我去了自己当年不幸身亡的那座洞窟。在调查洞穴的过程中，我与无数蜘蛛进行了搏斗。最后我终于找到了捷克道的遗体并取回了失踪的书页。我原以为终于能够逃离此地，没想到自己却阴差阳错唤醒了巨大的铠甲雕像。不过幸运的是，我成功打败了这些敌人，避免了与捷克道尔落入同样的下场。在那里，我发现了一座位于霍格沃茨底下的地图密室，并在那里见到了拉克汉姆教授的画像。拉克汉姆教授希望我能把在禁书区找到的那本书带给他。我得赶紧去告诉菲戈。
FGM_02_LevelUp_Task1: Complete Professor Hecat's assignment|完成赫卡特教授的作业任务
FGM_02_LighthouseSubGoal: Find the book's missing pages|找到失踪的书页
FGM_02_MissionFail: You strayed too far from the path|你已经偏离路线
FGM_02_MissionWarning: You're about to stray too far from the path|你即将偏离路线
FGS_01_Dungeon_Journal01:
I've completed the wand and now I need to learn what the Keepers would have Professor Fig and me do next.
魔杖到手，现在我需要向守护者询问我跟菲戈教授接下来该做什么。
FGS_01_Dungeon_Journal03:
Professor Fig and I are descending the caverns beneath Hogwarts together in order to stop Ranrok.
菲戈教授和我一起降至霍格沃茨地下的洞穴，以阻止兰洛克。
FGS_01_Dungeon_Journal04:
Professor Fig and I are descending the caverns beneath Hogwarts together in order to stop Ranrok.
菲戈教授和我一起降至霍格沃茨地下的洞穴，以阻止兰洛克。
FGS_01_Dungeon_Journal05:
Professor Fig and I are descending the caverns beneath Hogwarts together in order to stop Ranrok.
菲戈教授和我一起降至霍格沃茨地下的洞穴，以阻止兰洛克。
FGS_01_Dungeon_Journal06:
Professor Fig and I are descending the caverns beneath Hogwarts together in order to stop Ranrok.
菲戈教授和我一起降至霍格沃茨地下的洞穴，以阻止兰洛克。
FGS_01_Dungeon_TaskObj01: Talk to Professor Fig|与菲戈教授交谈
FGS_01_LighthouseSubGoal: Defend Hogwarts from Ranrok|保卫霍格沃茨免遭兰洛克的侵害
FGS_BeneathHogwarts_MissionCompleteA: Hogwarts has been saved from Ranrok and his Loyalists|兰洛克与追随者妖精攻陷霍格沃茨的阴谋失败了
FGS_BeneathHogwarts_MissionCompleteA_jou:
The professors and I defeated Ranrok, but not before he broke open the Repository and exploited its power. Professor Fig sacrificed his life to help me repair the Repository and contain its contents.
虽然我和教授们齐心协力打败了兰洛克，但还是没能及时阻止他破坏秘库并吸收了其中蕴含的力量。为了帮助我修复秘库并控制散溢的力量，菲戈教授选择了牺牲自己的生命。
FGS_BeneathHogwarts_MissionCompleteB: Hogwarts has been saved from Ranrok and his Loyalists|兰洛克与追随者妖精攻陷霍格沃茨的阴谋失败了
FGS_BeneathHogwarts_MissionCompleteB_jou:
I defeated Ranrok, but not before he killed Professor Fig and exploited the power of the Repository. I repaired the Repository to contain its contents, although I will not soon forget what it was like even briefly to taste its extraordinary power.
虽然我最终打败了兰洛克，但还是没能来得及阻止他杀死菲戈教授并吸取秘库的力量。之后我设法修复了秘库并控制住了散溢的力量，但在那过程中感受到的无与伦比的力量让我难以忘怀。
FGS_BeneathHogwarts_QuestActive_StepJour:
The Keepers have revealed the entry to the Repository through the floor of the Map Chamber. Professor Fig and I need to get there before Ranrok.
守护者们打开了地图密室的地板，原来房间之下便是通往秘库的入口。菲戈教授和我需要赶在兰洛克之前进入秘库。

The Keepers have revealed the entry to the Repository through the floor of the Map Chamber. Professor Fig and I need to get there before Ranrok.
守护者们打开了地图密室的地板，原来房间之下便是通往秘库的入口。菲戈教授和我需要赶在兰洛克之前进入秘库。

Ranrok's Loyalists have broken through the caverns below the school. Professor Fig and I must stop them.
兰洛克的追随者已经突破了位于学校地下的洞窟网络。我和菲戈教授必须想办法阻止他们。
Ranrok is here too. We need to get to the Repository before he takes its power.|兰洛克也来了。我们绝不能让他吸收秘库之力的阴谋得逞。

Professor Fig and I must defeat the goblin Loyalists and their trolls before Ranrok finds the Repository.
我和菲戈教授必须打败妖精追随者与他们的巨怪，绝不能让兰洛克先找到秘库。

The path ahead appears to be blocked, but we can't let this stop us from finding the Repository before Ranrok.
前方的道路似乎被封死了，但是我们无论如何都要赶在兰洛克之前找到秘库。

Now that we've found a way forward, we must continue our search for the Repository below Hogwarts.
前进的道路终于打开了，我们必须继续寻找位于霍格沃茨地下的秘库。

More of Ranrok's Loyalists have found us, but we can't let them stop us. Hogwarts must be saved.
又遇到了更多的追随者妖精，但是我们绝不会让这些兰洛克的追随者阻止我们。哪怕不惜一切代价，我们也要守护霍格沃茨的安全。

We've got to reach the Repository before Ranrok can exploit its power for himself.
我们必须赶在兰洛克将秘库的力量据为己有之前阻止他。
Professors have arrived to help us clear a path to the Repository.|其他教授们赶到了，他们将帮助我们开辟一条通往秘库的路线。

With the Professors' help, one final push against Ranrok's Loyalists should get Professor Fig and me through to the Repository once and for all.
在各位教授的帮助下，我们将放手一搏，希望这样能够允许我和菲戈教授突破兰洛克麾下追随者对秘库的封锁。

Ranrok broke open the Repository and seems to have used some of the power it contained to conjure a dragon. I must defeat it to save Hogwarts.
兰洛克已经破坏了秘库，而且似乎还利用其中蕴含的部分力量变幻出了一头巨龙。为了霍格沃茨，我必须打败他们。
I must defeat Ranrok's conjured dragon to save Hogwarts.|只有打败兰洛克变幻的巨龙，我才能有机会拯救霍格沃茨。

I've been able to damage Ranrok's conjured dragon, but the battle's not over yet.
我成功击退了兰洛克变幻出来的巨龙，但是战斗还远没有结束。

I've got Ranrok's dragon on the ground. Time to put an end to him and his foolish plans once and for all.
兰洛克的巨龙已经被我击落。是时候彻底终结兰洛克和他那些不切实际的狂妄幻想了。

FGS_BeneathHogwarts_QuestAvailable_Journ:
Mr Ollivander fashioned a wand from the Keepers' artefacts. Now to return with it to the Map Chamber.
奥利凡德先生利用各位守护者们的法器打造出了一根独特的魔杖。是时候把成品带回地图密室了。

Professor Fig was waiting for me in the Map Chamber to find out how the Keepers would have us proceed.
菲戈教授一直在地图密室等着我，他也已经迫不及待想要知道守护者的下一步指示。
FGS_BeneathHogwarts_QuestAvailable_StepJ:
I need to progress in my studies before returning with the wand to the Map Chamber.
现在我需要先把精力放在学业上，之后才能带着魔杖返回地图密室。
FGS_BeneathHogwarts_QuestAvailable_TaskO: Return to the Map Chamber|返回地图密室
FGT_01_MissionAvailable_LevelUp_Task1: You must be level 11 to continue this story|你必须达到等级11才能继续这个故事
FGT_01_PercivalRackhamsTrial_QuestTitle: Percival Rackham's Trial|波西瓦尔·拉克汉姆的试炼
FGT_01_TheTower_QuestActive_StepJournal0: I need to meet Professor Fig outside the tower.|我需要在高塔外与菲戈教授会面。

It can’t possibly be a coincidence that goblins are here. What do they know about the tower? I need to look for evidence to explain why the goblins are here.
妖精的出现不可能是巧合。他们对高塔了解多少？我需要寻找证据来解释妖精为什么会在这里。
One way or another, I’m going to need to get past these goblins to get inside.|无论如何，我需要越过这些妖精才能进入。

It doesn’t seem possible that the goblins know about Professor Rackham's trials, but they are clearly aware that the tower holds some significance. I should search inside and see what I can find. I suspect I’ll need my ability to see traces of ancient magic.
妖精似乎不太可能知道拉克汉姆教授的试炼，但它们清楚知道这座高塔具有某种意义。我应该在里面搜索，看看能找到什么。我猜想我得用上能看到古代魔法痕迹的技能。

The entrance to the first trial must be somewhere in the tower. Now that I’m alone, I must focus on spotting traces of ancient magic.
第一次试炼的入口，一定是在高塔内的某个地方。现在只有我一个人，我必须专注于寻找古代魔法的痕迹。
Let’s find out what Professor Rackham's trial has in store for me.|让我们看看拉克汉姆教授的试炼为我准备了什么。

This chamber is familiar. It reminds me of Gringotts and the area below the library. I need to be on guard and remember everything I’ve learned.
这个房间很眼熟。它让我想起了古灵阁和图书馆下方的区域。我需要保持警惕，并记住所了解到的一切。

I hope this is the final test. I should try to disarm these guards with Expelliarmus. They seem to be most vulnerable when they don’t have their weapons.
我希望这是最后的考验。我应该尝试用“除你武器”解除这些守卫的武装。当他们没有武器时，似乎最为脆弱。

I've defeated all the guards. Now I need to learn what exactly they've been protecting all this time.
我打败了所有的守卫。现在我需要了解他们一直以来到底在保护什么。

I’ve completed the trial. I need to return to the Map Chamber and discuss what I’ve learned with Professor Fig and Professor Rackham.
我已完成了试炼。我需要回到地图密室，与菲戈教授和拉克汉姆教授讨论我了解到的东西。
FGT_01_TheTower_QuestActive_StepJournal1:
Now that I'm back in the Map Chamber, I need to speak to the subject of the portrait that just appeared: Charles Rookwood.
现在我回到了地图密室，我需要谈谈刚刚出现的肖像主题：查尔斯·路克伍德。

FGT_01_TheTower_QuestAvailable_Journal:
Professor Fig has gone ahead to scout the location of the first trial. It's time to see what secrets this tower has in store for me.
菲戈教授已经前去探查第一次试炼的地点。该看看这座高塔为我准备了什么秘密。
FGT_01_TheTower_QuestAvailable_JournalRo: I need to meet Professor Fig at the tower.|我需要前往高塔与菲戈教授会面。
FGT_01_TheTower_QuestComplete_Journal:
Professor Fig and I had to run off goblins we found at the tower. They clearly suspect the tower has some significance. My ability to see traces of ancient magic allowed me to discover the entrance to the first trial. I completed the trial and fended off the ancient guards protecting a Pensieve memory. The Pensieve revealed a story about Isidora becoming a professor at Hogwarts and trying to use ancient magic to take away pain. From there, I returned to the Map Chamber and discovered that another Keeper’s portrait had been revealed. This one belongs to Professor Charles Rookwood. He told me to watch for swirling traces of ancient magic throughout the world. Professor Fig wants to find out what Ranrok knows.
菲戈教授和我赶走了在高塔发现的妖精。它们显然怀疑这座高塔有某种意义。我能看到古代魔法痕迹的技能，让我发现了第一次试炼的入口。我成功完成了试炼，并击退了保护冥想盆记忆的古代守卫。冥想盆揭示了关于伊丝朵拉成为霍格沃茨教授，并试图使用古代魔法消除痛苦的故事。我从那里回到了地图密室，发现另一个守护者的肖像已被揭露，其属于查尔斯·路克伍德教授。他告诉我要注意世界各地旋转的古代魔法痕迹。菲戈教授想找出兰洛克知道些什么。
fgt_percivalrackhamstrial_questtitle: Percival Rackham's Trial|波西瓦尔·拉克汉姆的试炼

I need to tell Professor Fig about the troll attack in Hogsmeade, and I'd like to find out if he's learned more about the locket we found in Gringotts.
我需要告诉菲戈教授霍格莫德发生的巨怪袭击事件，我想知道他是否了解更多关于我们在古灵阁发现的匣子的资讯。
Fig_01_CONV_MapFound_QuestAvailable_Jour: So much has happened since I saw Professor Fig. I should pay him a visit.|自从我见到菲戈教授以来发生了很多事情。我应该去拜访他。
Fig_01_CONV_MapFound_QuestComplete_Journ:
Professor Fig found a map that leads to something in the Restricted Section. He wants me to visit Professor Hecat before we go any further.
菲戈教授在禁书区发现了一张地图，其通向某处。他要我在继续调查前，先去拜访赫卡特教授。
Fig_01_CONV_MapFound_TaskObj01: Talk to Professor Fig|与菲戈教授交谈

FIG_01_Tomes_Journal08:
I found an ancient book deep within the Restricted Section, and saw another memory in a Pensieve. Professor Fig will be excited to hear all I've done.
我在禁书区深处发现了一本古代典籍，并且在那里的冥想盆中看见了另外一段回忆。等菲戈教授知道了我这次的经历，他肯定会万分激动。
FIG_01_Tomes_QuestComplete_Journal:
I found a mysterious book deep beneath the Restricted Section. Sebastian was caught by the librarian and took the fall for me. I owe him one.
我在禁书区的地下区域中发现了一本神秘书籍。塞巴斯蒂安被图书管理员发现了，他帮我承担了所有指责。我欠他一个人情。
FIG_01_Tomes_TaskObj: Return to Professor Fig's classroom|回菲戈教授的教室
FIG_01_Tomes_TaskObj05: Enter the Restricted Section|进入禁书区
FIG_01_Tomes_TaskObj06: Search for the secret hidden in the Restricted Section|调查隐藏在禁书区的秘密
FIG_01_Tomes_TaskObj08: Take the book to Professor Fig|将书籍带给菲戈教授
FIG_01_TomesandTribulations_QuestActive_:
Professor Fig was going to escort me to the Restricted Section, but now the Headmaster has waylaid him. It sounds like he’s going to be tied up for some time. I know he’d rather I wait, but I have a sense that I’m the only one who can discover the secret of the locket. Sebastian Sallow boasted about getting into the Restricted Section – perhaps he can show me a way inside.
原本菲戈教授打算领着我一起去禁书区，但还没来得及出发就被校长给拦下了。看来教授暂时是分身乏术。按照菲戈教授的脾气，他肯定会建议我耐心等待，但我下意识地觉得，我一定能够弄清楚匣子的秘密。塞巴斯蒂安·萨鲁之前提到过溜进禁书区的事，说不定他能带我进去。

I should report back to Professor Fig and let him know that I’ve learned Incendio.
我已经学会了火焰熊熊，是时候回去向菲戈教授报告了。

To get into the Restricted Section, I’m going to need to convince Sebastian Sallow to tell me how. He’s never far from the Defence Against the Dark Arts classroom. I should look for him there.
为了进入禁书区，首先我需要设法说服塞巴斯蒂安·萨鲁提供帮助。他平常都在黑魔法防御术教室附近。我该去那里找他。
Sebastian told me to meet him tonight outside the library in the Central Hall.|塞巴斯蒂安约我今晚在主厅的图书馆门外碰头。

Sebastian is going to cause a distraction so that I can get the key that will allow access to the Restricted Section. 
塞巴斯蒂安准备制造混乱吸引所有人的注意，好让我有机会拿到禁书区的钥匙。

I need to use the Disillusionment Charm that Sebastian taught me and then sneak past the Prefects without them noticing me. I must remember that I’m not completely invisible to them – I’m just harder to see.
我需要使用塞巴斯蒂安之前教我的幻身咒，然后在不被发现的情况下避开巡逻的级长们。我得记住幻身咒并不能达到百分百的“完全隐身”，只是单纯更难被发现而已。

Sebastian says the librarian keeps a key to the Restricted Section in her desk. He’s going to distract her so that I can retrieve it.
塞巴斯蒂安说图书管理员的书桌上放着一把禁书区的钥匙。接下来塞巴斯蒂安会去吸引她的注意，好给我创造机会。

Now that I’ve got the key, I need to meet Sebastian at the doors to the Restricted Section.
我已经拿到钥匙了，现在我需要去禁书区门外找塞巴斯蒂安。

Somewhere in the Restricted Section has to be a clue to the locket’s secret. I need to look around and see if I can spot something unusual. 
禁书区里面一定有能够帮助我解开匣子之谜的线索。我得留意四周，也许会有不寻常的发现。

This door looks like it leads to somewhere special. The fact that I had to use Ancient Magic to access it just reinforces the feeling that whatever is on the other side is waiting especially for me. 
这扇门似乎通往某个不一样的地方。考虑到只有利用古代魔法才能进来，我感觉另一侧仿佛有专门为我准备的东西。

I don’t know what this place is, but it sure doesn’t feel like I’m in the Library any longer – this has to be where the traces of Ancient Magic were pointing to on the map.
我不知道这是什么地方，但我感觉自己已经不在图书股里了。地图上的古代魔法踪迹肯定就是指向了这里。

I need to find Sebastian. I hope he was able to stop Peeves from telling on us. 
我需要找到塞巴斯蒂安。希望他能够阻止皮皮鬼告密。

FIG_01_TomesandTribulations_QuestAvailab:
Professor Fig discovered a map of Hogwarts hidden within the locket. I noticed traces of ancient magic on the map leading to the Restricted Section of the library. Professor Fig will need to get us past the librarian.
菲戈教授发现了原本藏在匣子中的一张霍格沃茨地图。我注意到地图上存在古代魔法的踪迹，而且就指向图书馆中的禁书区。接下来就靠菲戈教授来应付图书管理员的问题了。

Now that I've learned Incendio, I should check in with Professor Fig in his office. Perhaps he will have discovered something more about the locket.
现在我已经学会“火焰熊熊”，是时候去菲戈教授的办公室找他了。说不定他已经对匣子有了进一步的了解。

I need to complete Professor Hecat’s assignment before I can continue with this quest
我需要先完成赫卡特教授布置的作业，之后才能继续推进这项任务
FIG_01_TomesandTribulations_QuestComplet:
Professor Fig was called away by the Headmaster, so I convinced Sebastian to help me sneak into the Restricted Section of the library. It was lucky I asked for his help too because he taught me the Disillusionment Charm which helped me sneak past the Prefects and the librarian. Once in the Restricted Section, I discovered an ancient magic portal that led me to a hidden antechamber. In the antechamber, I was attacked by Pensieve Paladins, but I managed to destroy them all! Then I found what looks like an ancient tome. I'm sure Professor Fig will know what it is. Sebastian, on the other hand, got caught by the librarian after Peeves gave us away – but he didn't turn me in. I'm thinking Sebastian is going to be a good and loyal friend.
菲戈教授被校长叫走了，我只好说服塞巴斯蒂安帮助我潜入图书馆禁书区。很幸运有他的帮助，因为他教我如何使用“幻身咒”，帮我悄无声息地绕过了级长以及图书管理员。在禁书区里面，我找到了一处古代魔法传送门并来到了一处秘密的前厅。在那里，我遭到了一群守护着冥想盆的雕塑卫士的攻击，但我成功打败了他们！之后我找到了一本看上去历史悠久的典籍。菲戈教授肯定知道这是什么东西。与此同时，因为皮皮鬼捣乱，塞巴斯蒂安不幸被图书管理员抓了个正着，但是他并没有把我供出来。我觉得塞巴斯蒂安将会是一位忠诚的挚友。
FIG_01_TomesandTribulations_QuestTitle: Secrets of the Restricted Section|禁书区的秘密
FIG_01b_01_CompleteJournal:
I gave Professor Fig the book, but he was called away by the Headmaster. There are pages missing. Where could they be?
我把书交给了菲戈教授，但他旋即就被校长给叫走了。书里面似乎少了好几页内容。不知在哪才能找到失踪的书页？
FIG_01b_01_StepJournal: I need to give the strange book to Professor Fig.|我得把那本奇怪的书带给菲戈教授。
FIG_01b_LighthouseSubGoal: Return the book to Professor Fig|把书还给菲戈教授
FIG_07_01_TheFinalPensieve_SearchForClue: Search for clues to open San Bakar's Pensieve room|寻找开启森·巴卡尔的冥想盆室的线索
FIG_07_CONV_LighthouseSubGoal: Tell the Keepers of Ranrok's plan|将兰洛克的计划告诉守护者
FIG_07_CONV_MissionAvailable_Journal:
Professor San Bakar, the newest Keeper in the Map Chamber, will share the location of the final trial.
地图密室中新来的守护者森·巴卡尔教授将告诉你最后一处试炼的地点。
FIG_07_CONV_TheFinalPensieve_QuestActive:
It's time to share with the Keepers what I've learned about Ranrok and his plans.
是时候把关于兰洛克还有他的阴谋的情报告诉守护者了。

I need to tell the Keepers about Ranrok and the enormous repository of magic that he’s planning to break into.
我需要把兰洛克意图夺取储存着魔法能量的巨大秘库一事告诉各位守护者。
Go to the Map Chamber|前往地图密室
Speak with Professor Fig|与菲戈教授交谈
FIG_07_CONV_TheFinalPensieve_QuestAvaila:
Professor San Bakar has appeared in the Map Chamber. I need to speak to him about the location of the Keepers’ final trial. 
森·巴卡尔教授来到了地图密室。我需要与他交谈，并了解最后一处守护者试炼的确切位置。
I need to speak with the Keepers in the Map Chamber.|我需要与地图密室中的守护者们谈谈。
FIG_07_CONV_TheFinalPensieve_QuestComple:
I went to the Map Chamber and told the Keepers what I learned of Ranrok's plan. Professor Bakar revealed the location of the final trial and his Pensieve memory. Now, I need to go there and look for a face of stone and tendrils – whatever that means. Professor Fig will meet me there.
我去了地图密室，并把兰洛克的计划告诉了守护者们。巴卡尔教授将最后一场试炼与他的冥想盆回忆的确切位置告诉了我。现在我需要去那里寻找“石头与触须的面容”……估计到时候就能明白这是什么意思了。菲戈教授表示将会在那里等我。
FIG_07_CONV_TheFinalPensieve_Title: San Bakar's Trial|森·巴卡尔的试炼
FIG_07_LighthouseSubGoal: Complete the final Keeper trial|完成最后的守护者试炼
FIG_07_SanBakarsTrial_QuestTitle: San Bakar's Trial|森·巴卡尔的试炼
FIG_07_TheFinalPensieve_Journal: Professor Fig and I have discovered the Pensieve room of the final Keeper.|我和菲戈教授找到了最后一位守护者的冥想盆室。
FIG_07_TheFinalPensieve_MissionAvailable:
I need to meet Professor Fig at the location of the Keeper San Bakar's Pensieve room.
我需要前往守护者森·巴卡尔的冥想盆室与菲戈教授见面。
Meet Professor Fig at San Bakar's Pensieve room entrance|在森·巴卡尔的冥想盆室入口与菲戈教授见面
FIG_07_TheFinalPensieve_QuestActive_Step:
Professor Fig will meet me at the location of the final Pensieve as revealed by Professor Bakar. According to the Field Guide, it’s beyond the Shoreline Mine to the south.
巴卡尔教授说出了最后一处冥想盆的位置，我需要那里去菲戈教授碰头。按照实战指南上的指引，试炼地点应该在穿过南面的海岸矿井的地方。

We found the location of Professor Bakar’s Pensieve chamber. There must be a clue hidden here.
我们找到了巴卡尔教授的冥想盆室。那里肯定藏着某种线索。

I should speak to Professor Fig and see if he has any ideas on how to open the chamber.
我应该跟菲戈教授聊一聊，也许他知道如何打开密室。

The Graphorn known as the ‘Lord of the Shore’ is said to have a den to the south along the water. I should search in that direction.
据说在这里南面的岸旁，有一处被称为“滨海之王”的紫角兽的巢穴。我应该往那个方向搜索。

I’ve found what looks to be the den of the Graphorn. I should be careful. I don't want to end up as his next meal.
我似乎已经找到了紫角兽的巢穴。接下来一定要提高警惕。我可不想成为“那位”的晚餐。

What a magnificent yet terrifying beast! I’m going to need to throw everything I’ve got at it in hopes of wearing it down before it can kill me.
真是一头壮观又可怕的野兽！现在我需要拼尽全力，只有靠持久战才能设法制服他。

I’ve done it! I’ve tamed the Graphorn! What a glorious beast. Now I need to bring it to the entrance of the Pensieve chamber. Hopefully the Graphorn will know what to do.
我成功了！我已经驯服了紫角兽！真是一头尊贵的野兽。现在我需要把它带回冥想盆室的入口。希望紫角兽会知道该怎么做。

There is a rune on the floor in front of the entrance to the chamber. I should try to position the Graphorn on it and see what happens.
冥想盆室入口前方的地面上有一处符文。我应该试着让紫角兽踩上去，看看会发生什么。

That did it. The Graphorn unlocked the chamber. He clearly won’t fit through the entrance though, so I must enter on foot.
起作用了。紫角兽成功解开了冥想盆室的大门。只是他的身形过于庞大无法进入，接下来只能靠徒步了。

This is it, the final Pensieve! I need to view Professor Bakar’s memory and learn what he has to show me.
我终于找到了最后一处冥想盆！现在我需要查看巴卡尔教授的回忆，弄清楚他给我留下了什么知识。

There is another magical passageway here. It appears it will take me directly back to the Map Chamber below Hogwarts.
我在这里发现了另一条魔法通道。应该可以顺着通道直接返回位于霍格沃茨地下的地图密室。

Now that I've arrived back in the Map Chamber, I need to speak with the Keepers and tell them what I learned.
我已经回到了地图密室，现在我需要把自己了解到的信息告诉守护者们。
FIG_07_TheFinalPensieve_QuestActive_Task: Meet Professor Fig at San Bakar's Pensieve chamber|在森·巴卡尔的冥想盆室与菲戈教授见面
Find the clue to open the Pensieve chamber|寻找开启冥想盆室的线索
Speak with Professor Fig|与菲戈教授交谈
Search for the Lord of the Shore|寻找“滨海之王”
Enter the Graphorn's den|进入紫角兽的巢穴
Subdue the Lord of the Shore|制服滨海之王
Return with the Graphorn to the Pensieve chamber|骑紫角兽返回冥想盆室
Use the Graphorn to unlock the chamber|利用紫角兽打开密室
Dismount and enter|解除骑乘并进入
Witness the Pensieve memory|见证冥想盆中的回忆
Use the magical passageway|使用魔法通道
Speak with the Keepers|与守护者交谈
FIG_07_TheFinalPensieve_QuestComplete_Jo:
I met Fig at the location revealed to us by Professor Bakar's portrait. We deduced that only a Graphorn could open the passage to the Pensieve chamber. I found a Graphorn called the ‘Lord of the Shore’ and tamed the terrifying beast. I rode it to the chamber and its presence unlocked the door. Inside, San Bakar's Pensieve memory revealed the terrible truth: Isidora was experimenting on Hogwarts students. The Keepers confronted her and the resulting battle killed her. I returned to the Map Chamber and the Keepers said I have the materials to build a unique wand that will open the final repository. I am to ask Mr Ollivander to construct the wand. Is this the beginning of the end?
在巴卡尔教授的画像告诉我们的那个位置，我与菲戈见面了。抵达现场后，我们推测只有借助一头紫角兽的帮助才能打开冥想盆密室的大门。我找到了一个被称为“滨海之王”的紫角兽，并成功驯服了这只可怕的野兽。之后我骑着它重新回到了冥想盆密室并开启了大门。我在密室里见证了巴卡尔教授留在冥想盆中的回忆，得知了一个可怕的真相：当年伊西多拉一直在对霍格沃茨的学生进行着实验。东窗事发之后，伊西多拉死于与守护者们之间的搏斗中。等我回到地图密室之后，守护者们表示凭借目前收集到的材料，我将能够打造出一把独特的魔杖，并借此开启最后的秘库。现在我需要去找奥利凡德先生，并请他帮忙制作特殊魔杖。也许这一切马上都要结束了？
FIG_07_TheFinalPensieve_Title: San Bakar's Trial|森·巴卡尔的试炼
FIG_1B_EpilogueToAdventure_QuestAvailabl:
With Sebastian’s help, I found an old tome deep beneath the Restricted Section of the library. Unfortunately I can't seem to make sense of it. I’m sure that Professor Fig will be able to decipher its meaning. I should bring it to his office.
在塞巴斯蒂安的帮助下，我找到了尘封于图书馆禁书区中的古老典籍。不幸的是，里面的内容让人摸不着头脑。不过我想菲戈教授肯定能够破译其中的含义。我得赶紧把书带去他的办公室。

Fig will be interested to see the book I found below the Restricted Section. I should take it to him.
菲戈肯定会对我在禁书区地底下找到的书籍感兴趣。我得赶紧把书带给他。
Take the book to Professor Fig|将书籍带给菲戈教授
FIG_1B_EpilogueToAdventure_QuestComplete:
I brought the book that I found below the Restricted Section to Professor Fig. He was impressed, but disappointed to find that several pages were missing. He wants to study the book and see if he can glean any information from it. I think we are going to need those pages.
我把在禁书区地底下找到的那本书带给了菲戈教授。他看到书大喜过望，但是惊喜很快又变成了失望：原来书中还缺少了好几页内容。菲戈教授认为完整的内容一定能够为我们提供关键信息。看来得想办法寻找那些书页了。
Flexibility_SurprisinglySwishy: Surprisingly Swishy|出人意料地易于挥动
Flipendo_desc:
Flips objects and enemies upwards and backwards. With its short cooldown, it is excellent for setting up and extending juggles. Its ability to flip objects instantly is useful for solving puzzles and exploiting certain enemies’ weaknesses.
可以使物体与敌人上下翻飞。因为冷却时间较短，这种咒语最适合用来实现各种别出心裁的“抛接游戏”。立刻翻转物体的能力极其适合用来破解谜题，或者是利用特定敌人的弱点。
Flipendo_gameplay_desc:
Flips objects and enemies upwards and backwards. With its short cooldown, it is excellent for setting up and extending juggles. Its ability to flip objects instantly is useful for solving puzzles and exploiting certain enemies’ weaknesses.
可以使物体与敌人上下翻飞。因为冷却时间较短，这种咒语最适合用来实现各种别出心裁的“抛接游戏”。立刻翻转物体的能力极其适合用来破解谜题，或者是利用特定敌人的弱点。
Fluxweed_Byproduct_desc:
Flexible stems used in the Focus Potion. Fluxweed seeds can be purchased from The Magic Neep. Must be grown in large pots.
能够用于制作专注魔药的柔韧茎干。可以在神奇萝卜购买流液草种子。只能在大型花盆中种植。
Fluxweed_desc:
A tall plant that produces stems used in the Focus Potion. Fluxweed seeds can be purchased from The Magic Neep. Must be grown in large pots.
这种高大植物的茎干能够用于制作专注魔药。神奇萝卜可以购买流液草种子。只能使用大型花盆种植。
Fluxweed_Seed_desc: Unlocks the ability to grow Fluxweed in large pots|解锁使用大型花盆种植流液草的能力
FLY_01_04_ReturnToEverett_Journal: Now that Flying class has ended, I should go and see Everett Clopton.|现在飞行课暂告一段落，我该去找埃弗雷特·克洛普顿了。
FLY_01_04_ReturnToEverett_Task1: Return to Everett Clopton|返回埃弗雷特·克洛普顿那边
FLY_01_FarFromEverett_Warning: Too far from Everett|距离埃弗雷特过远
FLY_01_FlyingClass_QuestActive_StepJourn: Madam Kogawa wants us to fly our brooms through each of the elevated rings.|古川夫人希望我们让扫帚飞过每个架高的环。

Now we’re supposed to fly through the rings around the castle grounds. I’ve never noticed them before. I reckon Madam Kogawa conjured them up just for the class.
现在我们得飞过城堡周围的环。我以前从未注意到它们。我认为古川夫人是为了上课才把它们变幻出来。

Everett Clopton wants to go on a bit of a detour around the school. This is exhilarating, but I hope we don’t get in trouble with Madam Kogawa.
埃弗雷特·克洛普顿想沿着学校多绕绕。这很令人振奋，但我希望不要因此让古川夫人不满。
It’s time to head back to class before we’re missed.|是时候该回去了，可不能让古川夫人意识到我们不见了。

I simply need to bring the broom down to ground level and dismount. Let’s hope I can do this without breaking something.
我只需要把扫帚带到地面并解除坐骑。希望我能做到这一点，且不会破坏任何东西。
FLY_01_FlyingClass_QuestActive_TaskObj02: Fly through the rings around the grounds|飞过场地周围的环
FLY_01_FlyingClass_QuestActive_TaskObj03: Follow Everett Clopton|跟随埃弗雷特·克洛普顿
FLY_01_FlyingClass_QuestActive_TaskObj04: Return to the Courtyard|返回庭院
FLY_01_FlyingClass_QuestActive_TaskObj05: Land and dismount|着陆并解除坐骑
FLY_01_FlyingClass_QuestAvailable_Journa:
In today’s Flying class, Madam Kogawa is reviewing basic broom flight and manoeuvrability.
在今天的飞行课上，古川夫人将会给大家复习基础飞行以及操控能力。
I need to attend Flying class, taught by Madam Kogawa.|我需要抓紧时间去参加古川夫人负责的飞行课。
FLY_01_FlyingClass_QuestAvailable_StepJo: I need to progress in my studies before I can attend Flying Class.|我需要先精进学业才能参加飞行课。
FLY_01_FlyingClass_QuestComplete_Journal:
I learned to fly a broom today in Madam Kogawa’s class. It took a bit of getting used to, but soon I got a feel for it and was racing around the castle with Everett Clopton. We got a little carried away though and flew too far out of bounds. The Professor wasn’t happy with us and gave us a dressing down after class. Still, I think she was impressed with my flying skills. Now I just need to save up to buy a broom of my own. I should visit Spintwitches next time I’m in Hogsmeade and see what they have on offer.
我今天在古川夫人的课上学会了飞行扫帚。这需要一点时间来适应，但我很快就渐渐上手，并和埃弗雷特·克洛普顿一起在城堡里竞赛。不过，我们有点得意忘形，飞得太远了。教授对我们很不满意，并在下课后训斥我们一番。不过，我认为她对我的飞行技巧印象深刻。现在我只需要存钱买自己的扫帚。下次我在霍格莫德时，我应该去旋转女巫店看看他们提供什么。
FLY_01_LighthouseSubGoal: Attend Flying Class|参加飞行学课程
FLY_01_MissedRing_Warning: You missed a ring|错过了一处圆环
FLY_01_MissionAvailable_Proximity_Task: Go to Flying class|前往飞行课
FLY_01_OffCourse_Warning: You are off course|已偏离路线
FLY_01_QuestActive_Journal:
Madam Kogawa has a full array of flying manoeuvres I'll need to learn in order to progress as a fifth-year. From the basics to her advanced lessons, these skills are certain to prove useful.
古川夫人教导着各式各样的飞行动作，那些都是我作为五年级学生的必需能力。无论是基础还是进阶课程，其中蕴含的技巧知识都能让我受益无穷。
FLY_01_RequirementTask_StepJournal: I need to progress in my studies before I can attend Flying Class.|我需要先精进学业才能参加飞行课。
FocusReward: Ancient Magic Power Reward|古代魔法力量奖励
ForbiddenForest_Desc: A dark forest on the edge of Hogwarts, home to a variety of dangerous creatures|霍格沃茨边缘的黑暗森林，是各种危险生物的家园
Forest_Region_desc:
The woodlands are defined by the amount of woods and forests that cover this area. It is a frequent destination for magical bird-watchers, who can expect to see Jobberknolls, Diricawls, Fwoopers and other birds.
林地由覆盖该区域的树林和森林的数量来定义。这是魔法鸟类观察者常去的地方，他们可预期看到绝音鸟、球遁鸟、恶婆鸟及其他鸟类。
ForestTroll_tip_one_desc:
The troll's forehand-backhand club swing pattern attacks will break through common Shield Charms. Dodging is the safest defence.
巨怪挥舞大棒时的正手与反手动作足以摧毁普通的护盾魔咒。闪躲是最佳的防御选择。
ForestTroll_tip_three_desc:
After the troll slams its club on the ground with both hands, flipping it upward with Flipendo will provide greater leverage than usual, sending the club into the troll's face for a powerful blow.
当巨怪使用双手对着地面狠砸大棒之后，用“退敌三尺”使其上下翻转将发挥奇效，受到魔咒影响的大棒将反过来痛击巨怪的脑袋。
ForestTroll_tip_two_desc:
Distance will not protect against an angry troll, as it will ferociously charge at its targets.
愤怒的巨怪将会不顾一切地朝目标发起冲锋，因此一味地后退并无法幸免于难。

GDW_01_Gladwin_Title: The Caretaker's Lunar Lament|管理员的月之哀歌
GDW_01_HelpingTheCaretaker_QuestActive_S: Gladwin wants me to remove the moon from the Demiguise statue.|格拉德温要我从隐形兽雕像上取下月亮。

Gladwin Moon has more details he wishes to share. I should follow him and listen as we walk.
格拉德温·莫恩有更多他想分享的细节。我应该跟着他，边走边听。

This is a tale that the caretaker is spinning. I should hear him out and learn precisely what he wants me to do for him.
这是管理员在诉说的故事。我应该听取他的说发，并准确了解他希望我为他做什么。

Gladwin taught me Alohomora, which he now wants me to use to unlock the door to the Faculty Tower.
格拉德温教我“阿拉霍洞开”，他现在想让我用它来打开学院塔的门。

According to the Caretaker, there is a Demiguise statue in the Prefects’ Bathroom and another one in the hospital wing. He wants me to use Disillusionment to sneak into the Faculty Tower and retrieve them. I need to be careful not to get caught.
根据管理员的说法，级长盥洗室里有一尊隐形兽雕像，校医院里还有一尊。他要我使用幻身潜入学院塔并取回它们。我需要小心不要被抓住。

Now that I’ve collected the moons from the Demiguise statues, I need to return them to Gladwin Moon back at the entrance to the Faculty Tower.
现在我已从隐形兽雕像收集了月亮，我需要将它们送回学院塔入口处格拉德温·莫恩那里。
GDW_01_HelpingTheCaretaker_QuestActive_T: Remove the moon from the statue|从雕像上移除月亮
Listen to Gladwin Moon|聆听格拉德温·莫恩
Unlock the Faculty Tower door with Alohomora|使用“阿拉霍洞开”打开学院塔的门
Collect the moon from the Demiguise statue in the Prefects’ Bathroom|从级长的盥洗室中的隐形兽雕像上收集月亮
Collect the moon from the Demiguise statue in the hospital wing|从校医院中的隐形兽雕像上收集月亮
Return to Gladwin Moon|返回格拉德温·莫恩那边
GDW_01_HelpingTheCaretaker_QuestAvailabl: Gladwin Moon is weary and troubled.|格拉德温·莫恩疲倦且烦恼。

The Hogwarts caretaker, Gladwin Moon, believes there is a plot against him. He’s requesting my assistance in foiling it.
霍格沃茨的管理员格拉德温·莫恩认为有一个针对他的阴谋。他请求我协助挫败它。
Speak with Gladwin Moon|与格拉德温·莫恩交谈
GDW_01_HelpingTheCaretaker_QuestComplete:
I met with the Caretaker, Gladwin Moon, and he believes there’s a plot to torment him with Demiguise statues placed all over Hogwarts and Hogsmeade. The Caretaker wants me to collect the moons from these statues which will make them disappear. He's a bit of an irrational fellow and seems overly fearful of these statues. He’s asking for my help. He says he’ll teach me additional techniques with Alohomora if I bring him more moons. It's important that I remember that I can only collect them at night.
我会见了管理员格拉德温·莫恩，他认为有项阴谋，要在霍格沃茨和霍格莫德到处放着隐形兽雕像来折磨他。管理员要我从这些雕像上收集月亮，这会使它们消失。他有点不理智，且似乎对这些雕像过于恐惧。他寻求我的帮助。他说如果我为他带来更多月亮，他就会教我更多关于“阿拉霍洞开”的技巧。重要的是，我得记得只能在晚上收集它们。
GDW_01_LighthouseSubGoal: Find out what Gladwin Moon wants|弄明白格拉德温·莫恩想要什么
GDW_01_QuestAvailable_Journal:
Gladwin Moon, the Hogwarts caretaker, wishes to speak with me about something. I should find him near the Reception Hall.
霍格沃茨的管理员格拉德温·莫恩似乎有事相求。我可以去接待厅附近找他。
GDW_01_QuestAvailable_LevelUp_Task2: Talk to Gladwin Moon|与格拉德温·莫恩交谈

Goblin_Mage_tip_one_desc:
Masters of both offensive and defensive magic, these Ranrok Loyalists can go toe-to-toe with the most powerful witches and wizards.
作为精通攻防魔法的专家，这些兰洛克的追随者能够与最为强大的女巫或巫师们齐头并进。
Goblin_Mage_tip_three_desc:
While they are building up magic to imbue into their companions, Bombarda can disrupt and unleash it in a devastating eruption.
当他们在施法强化自己的同伴时，“大爆爆”将能够扰乱魔法并引发毁灭性的爆炸。
Goblin_Mage_tip_two_desc:
These Ranrok Loyalists can use corrupted ancient magic to increase the strength of all nearby goblins.
这些兰洛克的追随者能够使用腐化的古代魔法来强化周遭妖精的力量。
GoblinAssassin_desc:
These Ranrok Loyalists have manipulated corrupted ancient magic to grant themselves unnatural speed.

Their magical speed enables them to escape combos unless they are slowed down with Arresto Momentum first.

These Ranrok Loyalists' blade dash attacks will penetrate common Shield Charms, so opponents must dodge out of the way and counterattack.
这些兰洛克的追随者们已经通过被腐化的古代魔法获取了不可思议的速度。

这些敌人拥有难以想象的速度，使其能够逃脱连击，除非先用“减震止速”将其减速。

这些兰洛克的追随者们将能够通过手中剑刃的冲刺攻击突破普通的护盾魔咒，所以与他们对战时你必须灵活利用闪躲与反击。
GoblinAssassin_tip_one_desc:
These Ranrok Loyalists have manipulated corrupted ancient magic to grant themselves unnatural speed.
这些兰洛克的追随者们已经通过被腐化的古代魔法获取了不可思议的速度。
GoblinAssassin_tip_three_desc:
These Ranrok Loyalists' blade dash attacks will penetrate common Shield Charms, so opponents must dodge out of the way and counterattack.
这些兰洛克的追随者们将能够通过手中剑刃的冲刺攻击突破普通的护盾魔咒，所以与他们对战时你必须灵活利用闪躲与反击。
GoblinAssassin_tip_two_desc:
Their magical speed enables them to escape combos unless they are slowed down with Arresto Momentum first.
这些敌人拥有难以想象的速度，使其能够逃脱连击，除非先用“减震止速”将其减速。
GoblinCaster_tip_one_desc:
Masters of both offensive and defensive magic, these Ranrok Loyalists can go toe-to-toe with the most powerful witches and wizards. Persistent Protego parries and counterattacks are the key to breaking through their defences to further attack them with powerful spell combinations.
作为精通攻防魔法的专家，这些兰洛克的追随者能够与最为强大的女巫或巫师们齐头并进。沉着冷静地通过盔甲护身持续招架与反击突破他们的防御，并利用空档机会发动强力咒语连招。
GoblinCaster_tip_two_desc:
These Ranrok Loyalists wield powerful destructive magic to unleash projectile spells or use as protection as they lunge toward foes. These magically-imbued lunges will penetrate common Shield Charms, so opponents must dodge and counterattack.
这些兰洛克的追随者能够使用威力强大的毁灭性魔法，除了发动远程投射咒语外，他们也能够利用这种魔法在冲击敌人时保护自身。这种魔力冲击将能够穿透普通的护盾魔咒，因此与他们作战时对手必须学会灵活利用闪躲与反击。
GoblinChieftain_desc:
A high-ranking goblin leader who strike powerfully with their close-range hammers. Look out because they apparition for surprise attacks.
一名位高权重的妖精领袖，会使用手中的大锤对近距离范围内的敌人发动强力攻击。他们会利用现影术发动奇袭，因此一定要多加留意。
GoblinChieftainKL_desc:
These goblins wield hammers with impressive skill, often attacking in rapid succession.

While leaping, they are particularly vulnerable to being slammed with Descendo.

They also use ancient magic blasts that smash their targets from afar.
这些妖精能够熟练运用手中的锤子发动让人眼花缭乱的快速攻击。

在发动飞跃时，他们十分容易被“应声落地”砸落。

这些妖精还会使用古代魔法从远处攻击自己的目标。
GoblinMage_desc:
A goblin with dangerous direct attacks. They keep their distance and unleash powerful spells.
能够发动致命的直接打击的妖精。他们会与目标保持距离，然后施放强力咒语。
GoblinMageKL_desc:
Masters of both offensive and defensive magic, these Ranrok Loyalists can go toe-to-toe with the most powerful witches and wizards.

These Ranrok Loyalists can use corrupted ancient magic to increase the strength of all nearby goblins.

While they are building up magic to imbue into their companions, Bombarda can disrupt and unleash it in a devastating eruption.
作为精通攻防魔法的专家，这些兰洛克的追随者能够与最为强大的女巫或巫师们齐头并进。

这些兰洛克的追随者能够使用腐化的古代魔法来强化周遭妖精的力量。

当他们在施法强化自己的同伴时，“大爆爆”将能够扰乱魔法并引发毁灭性的爆炸。
GoblinMelee_desc:
A versatile goblin warrior. A master of both up-close and ranged attacks in combat.
多才多艺的妖精战士。精通各种距离内的作战技巧。
GoblinMelee_tip_one_desc:
Though heavy goblin weaponry is quite dangerous, Expelliarmus will make quick work of anything they are holding in their hands, leaving them with only their weakest options.
尽管妖精们的重型武器极其致命，所幸“除你武器”依旧能够轻松剥夺他们手中的武器，使其只能选择相对无力的攻击手段。
GoblinMeleeKL_desc:
Though heavy goblin weaponry is quite dangerous, Expelliarmus will make quick work of anything they are holding in their hands, leaving them with only their weakest options.
尽管妖精们的重型武器极其致命，所幸“除你武器”依旧能够轻松剥夺他们手中的武器，使其只能选择相对无力的攻击手段。
GoblinSniper_desc:
These Ranrok Loyalists try to keep as far away from their targets as possible and use their crossbows to launch bolts imbued with Ancient Magic.

While they are preparing to fire, their bolt can be snatched away and launched back with Ancient Magic Throw for a devastating attack.
这些兰洛克的追随者们会尽可能与目标保持距离，并用手上的十字弩发射蕴含古代魔法的弩箭。

在他们准备攻击的间隙，你可以使用魔法夺走他们的弩箭，并通过“古代魔法投掷”以其人之道还治其人之身。
GoblinSniper_tip_one_desc:
These Ranrok Loyalists try to keep as far away from their targets as possible and use their crossbows to launch bolts imbued with Ancient Magic.
这些兰洛克的追随者们会尽可能与目标保持距离，并用手上的十字弩发射蕴含古代魔法的弩箭。
GoblinSniper_tip_two_desc:
While they are preparing to fire, their bolt can be snatched away and launched back with Ancient Magic Throw for a devastating attack.
在他们准备攻击的间隙，你可以使用魔法夺走他们的弩箭，并通过“古代魔法投掷”以其人之道还治其人之身。
GoblinWarrior_tip_two_desc:
A Loyalist Warrior will block most attacks if it wields a magical shield, so an opponent must surprise the goblin to break through its defences long enough for follow-up attacks. Sudden Apparition next to the goblin should do the trick.
追随者战士将会使用手上的魔法盾牌格挡绝大多数攻击，所以对手必须学会利用意想不到的方法突破此类妖精的防御，为后续的攻击创造机会。善于利用现影术将能够让敌人猝不及防。
Gobmine_Dungeon_06_desc: An enormous goblin mine along the shoreline|毗邻海岸线的巨型妖精矿井
Gobmine_dungeon_07_desc: A goblin mine |一处妖精矿井
GraceWaldegrave: Grace Pinch-Smedley|格蕾丝·平斯-史麦德莱
GrandStaircaseTower: Grand Staircase Tower|大理石楼梯高塔
Graphorn_Byproduct_Desc:
The horn shed by the fierce and aggressive Graphorns. A Graphorn horn can be used to upgrade and assign traits to gear.
凶猛好斗的紫角兽褪下的犄角。紫角兽犄角可用于强化装备和为其分配特质。
Graphorn_Desc:
Graphorns are large mountain-dwelling beasts that have a tough hide and two sharp horns. The tentacle-like appendages on Graphorns' faces are used for capturing food and tending to their young. Graphorns are known for their aggressive nature; however, a witch or wizard has been known to befriend one in rare circumstances.
紫角兽是大型的山地野兽，有着坚硬的皮毛和两个锋利的角。紫角兽脸上的触手状附属物用于捕捉食物和照料它们的幼兽。紫角兽以其侵略性而闻名。然而，众所皆知，有名女巫或巫师在极稀有的情况下，与其中一只成为好友。
GraphornDen_desc: A den inhabited by Graphorns|紫角兽居住的巢穴
GraphornMount_desc: Though oft-thought untameable, this fearsome beast answers to your command|虽然普遍被认为无法驯服，但这头凶猛的野兽会服帖地顺从你的命令
GraphornOffspring_desc: A newly born Graphorn|一头新生的紫角兽
Gryffindor_desc: Gryffindor house, known for daring, bravery, and chivalry|以胆量、勇敢与正直而著称的格兰芬多学院
GT01_01_01_TheSilverHelm_Journal:
A goblin named Lodgok has asked me to retrieve a helm for him. He claims that it is goblin property, forged by his people long ago.
一个名叫罗德高克的妖精要我为它取回一顶头盔。它声称这是妖精的财产，很久以前由它的人民铸造。
GT01_01_03_ReturnTheHelm__ReturnToLodgok: Return the helmet to Lodgok|将头盔归还罗德高克
GT01_01_FailWarning: You're about to stray too far from Lodgok|你快要离罗德高克太远了
GT01_01_LighthouseSubGoal: Find Lodgok the goblin|找到妖精罗德高克
GT01_01_MissionFail: You've strayed too far from Lodgok|你离罗德高克太远了
GT01_AGoblinsTreasure_QuestActive_Journa:
Lodgok needs my help in retrieving a sacred goblin relic from a witch’s tomb. If I can obtain the Helmet of Urtkot for him, he will use it to try to repair the rift between himself and Ranrok.
罗德高克需要我的帮助，才能从女巫的坟墓中找回神圣的妖精文物。如果我能为他取得乌尔特科特的头盔，他会用它来尝试修复他和兰洛克之间的裂痕。
GT01_AGoblinsTreasure_QuestActive_StepJo:
I need to travel to Hogsmeade. I should be able to find Sirona inside the Three Broomsticks. 
我需要前往霍格莫德。我应该能在三把扫帚里找到希罗纳。

Sirona said that the goblin I’m looking for is named Lodgok – he’s known to frequent the Hog's Head Inn. Sirona personally vouched for him and told me to tell Lodgok that she sent me.
希罗纳说我要找的妖精名叫罗德高克，众人皆知它经常光顾猪头酒吧。希罗纳亲自为他担保，并要我告诉罗德高克是她派我来的。

Lodgok asked me to meet him on the outskirts of Hogsmeade. From there he will show me the way to the witch’s tomb.
罗德高克要我在霍格莫德郊区与他会面。在那里他会告诉我去女巫坟墓的路。

Lodgok knows the way to the witch’s tomb – I need to follow him to the entrance.
罗德高克知道去女巫坟墓的路，而我需要跟着他到入口。

According to rumour, the Helmet of Urtkot should be in the sarcophagus of the deceased witch. Hopefully it’s not guarded by something horrible – seems like every time I walk into a cave there is something ghastly waiting inside.
据传闻，乌尔特科特的头盔应该在死去女巫的石棺里。希望它没有被可怕的东西守卫着…似乎每次我走进一个山洞时，里面都有可怕的东西在等着我。

Unfortunately, it looks like Ashwinders got to the tomb before I did and made off with the relic. I need to get back to Lodgok and let him know the helmet is gone.
不幸的是，火灰蛇似乎比我先到了坟墓，并偷走了遗物。我需要回到罗德高克那边，让他知道头盔不见了。

Unfortunately, it looks like Ashwinders got to the tomb before I did and made off with the relic. I need to get back to Lodgok and let him know the helmet is gone.
不幸的是，火灰蛇似乎比我先到了坟墓，并偷走了遗物。我需要回到罗德高克那边，让他知道头盔不见了。

From the evidence in the tomb, the relic was stolen by Ashwinders. They are known to have an encampment nearby in the Forbidden Forest. I need to find it and get the helmet from them.
从墓中的证据来看，这件文物被火灰蛇偷走了。众人皆知，他们在禁林附近有一个营地。我需要找到该处，并从他们那里得到头盔。

I managed to retrieve the Helmet of Urtkot from the Ashwinders. Now I need to bring it to Lodgok at the entrance of the witch’s tomb. 
我设法从火灰蛇那里取回了乌尔特科特的头盔。现在我需要把它带到女巫坟墓入口处罗德高克那边。
GT01_AGoblinsTreasure_QuestActive_TaskOb: Speak to Sirona in the Three Broomsticks|在三把扫帚中与希罗纳交谈
Look for Lodgok at the Hog's Head Inn|在猪头酒吧寻找罗德高克
Meet Lodgok near the witch's tomb|在女巫的坟墓附近与罗德高克会面
Follow Lodgok to the tomb's entrance |跟随罗德高克到坟墓的入口
Search the tomb for the helmet |在坟墓中寻找头盔
Return to Lodgok |返回罗德高克那边
Recover the helmet from the thieves|从盗贼手中夺回头盔
Return the helmet to Lodgok |将头盔归还罗德高克
GT01_AGoblinsTreasure_QuestAvailable_Jou:
Sirona Ryan is the proprietress of the Three Broomsticks. She was speaking to a goblin in the pub the day of the troll attack. I should talk to her.
希罗纳·瑞安是三把扫帚的现任主人。巨怪袭击霍格莫德的那天，我注意到希罗纳在与一位妖精交谈。也许我该去找她谈一谈。
GT01_AGoblinsTreasure_QuestAvailable_Ste:
Sirona Ryan, the proprietress of the Three Broomsticks, was speaking to a goblin in the pub the day of the troll attack. I should talk to her.
希罗纳·瑞安是三把扫帚的现任主人。巨怪袭击霍格莫德的那天，我注意到她在与一位妖精交谈。也许我该去找她谈一谈。
GT01_AGoblinsTreasure_QuestComplete_Jour:
After I managed to track down the goblin named Lodgok in the Hog's Head Inn, he told me that he wants to retrieve a sacred goblin relic stolen years ago by a witch. Rumour had it that the relic was in the witch's tomb. Unfortunately for Lodgok, the tomb is only accessible by wizardkind. Lodgok believed that retrieving the relic could repair the rift between himself and Ranrok. I searched the witch's tomb, but the helmet wasn't there – Ashwinders took it. Lodgok knew of an Ashwinder camp nearby, so I went there and retrieved the helmet, then returned it to Lodgok, who was very grateful. Now it's up to him to see what if he can calm Ranrok's ire.
在我设法在猪头酒吧找到名为罗德高克的妖精后，他告诉我想找回多年前被女巫偷走的神圣妖精文物。有传言说文物在女巫的坟墓里。对罗德高克来说不幸的是，只有巫师才能进入坟墓。罗德高克相信取回文物可以修复他和兰洛克之间的裂痕。我搜查了女巫的坟墓，但头盔不在那里，火灰蛇党拿走了它。罗德高克知道附近有一个火灰蛇营地，所以我去那里取回了头盔，然后把它还给了罗德高克，他非常感激。现在就看他能否平息兰洛克的怒火了。
GT01_AGoblinsTreasure_QuestObjectives_02: Learn Depulso from Professor Sharp|向夏普教授学习统统飞走
GT01_AGoblinsTreasure_QuestTitle: The Helm of Urtkot|乌尔特科特的头盔
GT01_AGoblinsTreasure_RequirementTask_St:
I need to progress in my studies and complete Professor Sharp's Assignment to earn Depulso before continuing on with this.
现在我需要先将注意力放在学习上面，完成夏普教授布置的统统飞走作业之后才能推进此事。
GT01_TheHelmofUrtkot_QuestTitle: The Helm of Urtkot|乌尔特科特的头盔
GT02_GoblinMine_Journal05: Lodgok will want to know what Amit and I discovered in the mine.|罗德高克想知道我和阿米特在矿场中发现了什么。
GT02_GoblinMine_TaskObj01: Speak to Amit|与阿米特交谈
GT02_GoblinMine_TaskObj04b: Speak with Amit|与阿米特交谈
GT02_GoblinMine_TaskObj05: Speak to Lodgok|与罗德高克交谈
GT02_ItsAllGbbledegook_RequirementTask_S:
Lodgok has asked me to meet him at a goblin mine south of Hogwarts and asked that I bring someone who speaks Gobbledegook.
罗德高克希望我去霍格沃茨南面的一处妖精矿井找他，还希望我带一位“懂得妖精语的人”过去。
GT02_LighthouseSubGoal: Speak to Amit about Gobbledegook|与阿米特谈谈妖精语
GT02_TheGoblinMine_QuestActive_StepJourn:
The mine that Lodgok discovered is located to the south of Hogwarts on the other side of the lake. Amit will join us there.
罗德高克发现的矿场位于霍格沃茨以南的湖对岸。阿米特将在那里加入我们。

We can’t risk Lodgok being seen entering the mine with us – it’s too dangerous for him. So now it’s up to Amit and me to search the mine and figure out what Ranrok is up to.
我们不能冒险看到罗德高克和我们一起进入矿场，这对他来说太危险了。所以现在由阿米特和我来搜索矿场，并弄清楚兰洛克在做什么。

We need to determine what Ranrok and his goblins are doing in this mine. I hope Amit’s knowledge of the goblin language will be enough to help us figure it out.
我们需要确定兰洛克和他的妖精在这个矿场里做什么。我希望阿米特对妖精语言的了解，足以帮助我们弄清楚。

Amit was able to decipher Ranrok’s plans. We need to return to Lodgok and tell him what we discovered.
阿米特能够破译兰洛克的计划。我们需要回到罗德高克，告诉他我们的发现。
GT02_TheGoblinMine_QuestActive_TaskObj01: Meet Lodgok near the mine entrance|在矿场入口附近与罗德高克会面
GT02_TheGoblinMine_QuestActive_TaskObj02: Enter the goblin mine|进入妖精矿场
GT02_TheGoblinMine_QuestActive_TaskObj03: Search for evidence of Ranrok's plan|寻找兰洛克计划的证据
GT02_TheGoblinMine_QuestAvailable_Journa:
Lodgok has asked me to meet him near the entrance to a goblin mine to the southeast of Hogwarts. He wants me to investigate the mine and search for evidence of Ranrok’s plans. It’s too dangerous for Lodgok to go with me, so I’ve asked Amit Thakkar to join me – his fluency in Gobbledegook will be useful.
罗德高克让我在霍格沃茨东南部的妖精矿洞入口附近与他会面。他要我调查矿场，寻找兰洛克计划的证据。罗德高克跟我一起去太危险了，所以我请阿米特·萨卡哈和我一起去，他的流利妖精语会很有用。
GT02_TheGoblinMine_QuestAvailable_StepJo: Lodgok is waiting near the entrance to the goblin mine.|罗德高克在妖精矿场的入口附近等候。
GT02_TheGoblinMine_QuestComplete_Journal:
The mystery deepens. Today, I took Amit with me to meet Lodgok at the goblin mine in the southeast. Lodgok told me about Bragbor, an ancestor of Ranrok, who was commissioned to build fortified repositories made of goblin metal by a group of witches and wizards. Ranrok is searching for these repositories and the power they contain – he wants to take it for all goblin-kind. In the mine, Amit and I discovered that the Loyalists are building enormous drills, presumably to search for the repositories. According to Lodgok, Ranrok has already discovered one of them and the power inside has changed him. He fears that if Ranrok finds the largest repository, it could mean a great war for us all.
谜团加深。今天，我带着阿米特去东南部的妖精矿去见罗德高克。罗德高克告诉我有关兰洛克的祖先布拉格博的事，他被一群巫师委托建造由妖精金属制成的坚固储藏处。兰洛克正在寻找这些储藏处以及它们所包含的力量，他想为所有妖精类加以取得。在矿场中，阿米特和我发现追随者正在建造巨大的钻头，大概是为了搜索储藏处。根据罗德高克的说法，兰洛克已经发现了其中一个，且里面的力量已改变了他。他担心，如果兰洛克找到了最大的储藏处，这对我们所有人来说可能意味着一场大战。
GT03_LighthouseSubGoal: Work with Lodgok to stop Ranrok's plans|与罗德高克合作阻止兰洛克的计划
GT03_LodgoksLoyalty_QuestTitle: Lodgok's Loyalty|罗德高克的忠诚度
GT03_TheGoblinDevice_QuestActive_StepJou:
I have located the entrance to the mine. There’s no sign of Lodgok – he must have gone inside.
我已经找到了矿场的入口。没有罗德高克的迹象，他一定是进去了。
I need to locate Lodgok. He must be somewhere in this mine.|我得找到罗德高克。他一定在这个矿场的某处。

I need to locate Lodgok. He must be somewhere in this mine. But the place appears to be full of Ranrok’s loyalists. I’ll need to be careful.
我需要找到罗德高克。他一定在这个矿场的某个地方。但这个地方似乎到处都是兰洛克的追随者。我需要小心。

That drill must be destroyed, but I will need to get through Ranrok's loyalists first.
必须摧毁那个钻头，但我需要先搞定兰洛克的追随者。

I destroyed one of Ranrok's drills, but he has Bragbor's final journal. I need to get out of the goblin mine.
我毁掉了兰洛克的一个钻头，但他有布拉格博的最后一本日记。我需要离开妖精矿场。

Now to destroy the drill. Perhaps collapsing those pillars will bring the cavern down on it.
现在来破坏钻头。也许弄倒这些柱子可以使洞穴倒塌。
GT03_TheGoblinDevice_QuestActive_TaskObj: Find the entrance to the mine|找到矿场的入口
Search for Lodgok|寻找罗德高克
Defeat all enemies|打败所有敌人
Collapse all pillars to destroy the drill ({0}/{1})|摧毁所有柱子，以破坏钻头
GT03_TheGoblinDevice_QuestAvailable_Jour:
Lodgok has located another of Ranrok’s mining operations. He has taken it upon himself to infiltrate the mine alone. I’m worried that he’s walking into a trap and putting himself in grave danger. I should go there immediately and help him.
罗德高克找到了兰洛克的另一个矿场作业。他独自一人潜入了矿场。我担心他会走入陷阱，让自身陷入严重的危险之中。我应该立即去那里帮助他。
Lodgok is attempting to infiltrate the Coastal Mine alone. I need to find him.|罗德高克计划独自潜入海岸矿井。我得找到他。
GT03_TheGoblinDevice_QuestComplete_Journ:
I was worried about Lodgok, so I went to the Coastal Mine to find him. There, I discovered a subterranean drill, built by Ranrok's Loyalists, that they intended to use to drill into the repositories. I triggered a cave-in that took the drill out of commission. In the mine, Lodgok confronted Ranrok and I learned the truth: the two goblins were brothers. I'm still reeling from what happened next – Ranrok killed Lodgok when he learned that Lodgok was bringing me the last of Bragbor’s journals. I barely managed to escape the mine before it caved in. Now I must deal with the loss of my goblin friend and the fact that Ranrok knows from Bragbor’s journal the location of the final repository.
我很担心罗德高克，所以我去海岸矿井找他。在那里，我发现了兰洛克的追随者建造的地下钻头。他们打算用它来钻取储藏处。我触发了塌陷，使钻头无法使用。在矿场里，罗德高克与兰洛克对峙，我得知真相：这两个妖精是兄弟。我依旧对接下来发生的事情感到震惊，当他得知罗德高克将布拉格博的最后一篇日记带给我时，兰洛克杀死了罗德高克。在矿场坍塌之前，我侥幸逃出。现在我必须应付我的妖精朋友离世，以及兰洛克现在从布拉格博的日记中知道最终储藏处位置的事实。
GT03_TheGoblinDevice_QuestTitle: Lodgok's Loyalty|罗德高克的忠诚度

Hamlet_Aranshire_Journal_1: Notice of Temporary Vacation|临时度假公告
Hamlet_Aranshire_Journal_1_desc:
A hasty journal entry letting its reader know that the writer had temporarily vacated the premises
宣告主人已暂时迁出的日志，上面的字迹十分潦草
Hamlet_Aranshire_Journal_2_desc:
A journal entry letting its reader know that the writer had permanently left their home for the city

An agonised letter written by an anonymous author to let any who find it know of the fate of Aranshire

Hamlet_Aranshire_Journal_4: The Tale of Aranshire|阿兰郡的故事
Hamlet_Aranshire_Journal_4_desc:

Hamlet_Bainburgh_desc:
Bainburgh is a working hamlet on the coastline. This hamlet was named for the prominent house and family that lived nearby. Over the years, the house employed many of the hamlet's inhabitants and later became a manor. The manor has since been abandoned.
班伯格是一座位于海岸线上的劳工村庄。“班伯格”这个名字最初的由来源于居住在附近的显赫家族与他们拥有的宅邸。随着村庄中受雇的众多居民的不断努力，那个家族的宅邸逐渐转变为了一座大气恢宏的庄园。但是自那之后，庄园就因为不明原因荒废了。
Hamlet_Bainburgh_GaspardJournal: A Diary Entry by a Member of the Ashwinders|某位火灰蛇党的日记
Hamlet_Bainburgh_GaspardJournal_desc:
A diary entry by a member of Victor Rookwood's lot bemoaning the fact that he's been stationed in this eerie manor for too long and his mind is not his own
属于维克托·卢克伍德的某位手下的一页日记，作者抱怨自己在诡异宅邸中逗留过久，而且认为自己的神智已经受到了影响
Hamlet_Bainburgh_MercuryPotion: A Letter from Harriet to Loen|哈莉特寄给洛恩的信
Hamlet_Bainburgh_MercuryPotion_desc:
A letter from Harriet to her brother Loen worrying that his wife's experiments using liquid mercury in potion-making are dangerous
哈莉特寄给自己的兄弟洛恩的信件，她在信件里表露了对洛恩妻子使用液态水银进行魔药实验的安全性的担忧
Hamlet_Bainburgh_SpookyRevealing: An Odd Letter from Loen to Harriet|洛恩寄给哈莉特的奇怪信件
Hamlet_Bainburgh_SpookyRevealing_desc:
A worrying letter from Loen to his sister Harriet indicating that things are not going well in the house and indicating some delirium
洛恩寄给自己的姐妹哈莉特的奇怪信件，根据里面令人不安的内容，大屋内很有可能已经出现了危险，而且洛恩本人也处于神志不清的状态
Hamlet_Brocburrow_BernardNote: A Letter from Bernard Ndiaye to Eddie Thistlewood|伯纳德·恩迪亚耶寄给艾迪·西索伍德的信件
Hamlet_Brocburrow_BernardNote_desc:
A letter from Bernard Ndiaye to his friend Eddie Thistlewood asking for help defending Feldcroft from recent goblin Loyalist attacks
伯纳德·恩迪亚耶寄给自己的朋友艾迪·西索伍德的一封信，她在信中恳请艾迪帮助费德罗特抵御妖精追随者接二连三的攻击
Hamlet_Brocburrow_Desc:
Brocburrow is a community located in the countryside. Famed Auror Helen Thistlewood is among the notable witches and wizards to hail from this hamlet. 
布洛克巴罗是一个位于乡村的社区。著名的傲罗海伦·西索伍德是其中一名来自这个小村庄的知名巫师。
Hamlet_Brocburrow_HelenNote: A Letter from Helen Thistlewood to her Brother Eddie|海伦·西索伍德寄给自己的兄弟艾迪·西索伍德的信
Hamlet_Brocburrow_HelenNote_desc:
A letter from Helen Thistlewood to her brother Eddie letting him know she will be retiring as an Auror and returning home soon to settle in nearby Upper Hogsfield
海伦·西索伍德写给自己的兄弟艾迪的一封信，她在里面提到说自己将从傲罗的岗位上退休，并将尽快返乡在上霍格米村附近定居
Hamlet_Cragcroft_desc:
Cragcroft, located on the coast, is the southernmost wizarding settlement in the entire region. This village is plagued by Stoneback Dugbogs, and for that reason the inhabitants of this village are a tight-knit community. 
克罗夫特位于海岸边，是整个地区最南端的巫师聚居地。这个村子被石背泥怪所困扰，也因此整个村子的居民成了紧密结合的社区。
Hamlet_Cragcroft_DugbogSighting_desc: A warning regarding a dangerous Dugbog in the area|有关在附近出没的凶残泥怪的警告标识
Hamlet_Cragcroft_LoveLetter: Cragcroft Love Letter|克罗夫特的情书
Hamlet_Cragcroft_LoveLetter_desc:
A love letter from William to Susan extolling the virtues of Cragcroft and her mother's treacle tarts
威廉写给苏珊的情书，他在信中对克罗夫特的美景与自己母亲的拿手糖浆馅饼赞不绝口
Hamlet_Feldcroft_AnneToSeb: A Letter from Anne Sallow to Sebastian Sallow|安妮·萨鲁写给塞巴斯蒂安·萨鲁的信
Hamlet_Feldcroft_AnneToSeb_desc: A letter from Anne Sallow to her twin brother Sebastian|安妮·萨鲁写给自己的双胞胎哥哥塞巴斯蒂安的信
Hamlet_Feldcroft_desc:
Feldcroft is a quaint village in the countryside. On the far side of the mountain, Feldcroft is surrounded by fields and the ruins of an ancient castle.
费德罗特是乡下的一个古朴的村庄。在山的另一边，费德罗特被田野和一座古城堡的废墟所环绕。
Hamlet_Feldcroft_Gob_01: Goblin Loyalist Correspondence|妖精追随者往来通讯
Hamlet_Feldcroft_Gob_01_desc:
A note from one of Ranrok's Loyalists to another indicating that they are searching for something
兰洛克麾下的追随者妖精们之间的往来信件，里面提到他们正在搜寻某物
Hamlet_Feldcroft_Gob_02: Goblin Loyalist Correspondence|妖精追随者往来通讯
Hamlet_Feldcroft_Gob_02_desc: A note from one of Ranrok's Loyalists to another|兰洛克麾下的追随者妖精之间的往来信件
Hamlet_Feldcroft_SebToAnne: A Letter from Sebastian Sallow to his Sister Anne|塞巴斯蒂安·萨鲁写给他的妹妹安妮的信件
Hamlet_Feldcroft_SebToAnne_desc: A letter from Sebastian Sallow to his twin sister, Anne, wishing her well|塞巴斯蒂安·萨鲁写给自己的双胞胎妹妹安妮的信件，他在信里祝妹妹一切安好
Hamlet_Feltcroft_Desc:
Feldcroft is a quaint village in the countryside. On the far side of the mountain, Feldcroft is surrounded by fields and the ruins of an ancient castle.
费德罗特是乡下的一个古朴的村庄。在山的另一边，费德罗特被田野和一座古城堡的废墟所环绕。
Hamlet_Greenock_desc:
Pitt-upon-Ford is the southmost hamlet in the woodlands. This hamlet was founded when hyphenated names with 'upon' were very fashionable; thus, the founders settled on 'Pitt-upon-Ford' which means 'place by a shallow river.' 
匹于河是林地最南端的小村庄。在这个小村庄成立之际，当时很流行在名称中插入“于”字；因此，创始人选择了“匹于河”，意思是“靠近浅河之处”。
Hamlet_Halkirk_desc:
Bainburgh is a working hamlet on the coastline. This hamlet was named for the prominent house and family that lived nearby. Over the years, the house employed many of the hamlet's inhabitants and later became a manor. The manor has since been abandoned.
班伯格是一座位于海岸线上的劳工村庄。“班伯格”这个名字最初的由来源于居住在附近的显赫家族与他们拥有的宅邸。随着村庄中受雇的众多居民的不断努力，那个家族的宅邸逐渐转变为了一座大气恢宏的庄园。但是自那之后，庄园就因为不明原因荒废了。
Hamlet_Hearth_Desc: What a lovely hamlet this is.|这里真是座美不胜收的村庄。
Hamlet_Helmsdale_desc:
Cragcroft, located on the coast, is the southernmost wizarding settlement in the entire region. This village is plagued by Stoneback Dugbogs, and for that reason the inhabitants of this village are a tight-knit community. 
克罗夫特位于海岸边，是整个地区最南端的巫师聚居地。这个村子被石背泥怪所困扰，也因此整个村子的居民成了紧密结合的社区。
Hamlet_Inverness_desc:
Irondale is a wizarding settlement in the countryside. Originally founded by goblins to mine iron, the goblins were pushed out when the hamlet became famous for its ironworks. The new inhabitants changed the hamlet's name from its original Gobbledegook to Irondale. Now, the hamlet is entirely made up of witches and wizards. 
艾恩代尔是乡村的一个巫师聚居地。最初由妖精创建作为开采铁矿之用，当小村庄以其炼铁厂而闻名时，妖精便被赶走了。新居民将小村庄的名称从原来的“夭不得懂”改为“艾恩代尔”。现在，这个小村庄完全由女巫和巫师组成。
Hamlet_Irondale_Desc:
Irondale is a wizarding settlement in the countryside. Originally founded by goblins to mine iron, the goblins were pushed out when the hamlet became famous for its ironworks. The new inhabitants changed the hamlet's name from its original Gobbledegook to Irondale. Now, the hamlet is entirely made up of witches and wizards. 
艾恩代尔是一处位于乡间的巫师社区。这里最初的创始人是在周边开采铁矿的妖精，但是在村庄因为铁器工艺打响名气之后，原本的居民们就被统统赶走了。新迁入的女巫与巫师们将村庄原本的妖精语名字改成了现在的“艾恩代尔”。时至今日，这座村庄的村民们已经完全由女巫与巫师组成。
Hamlet_Irondale_Ranrak: Goblin Loyalist Letter|妖精追随者信件
Hamlet_Irondale_Ranrak_desc:
A letter from a goblin Loyalist to another regarding Ranrok's ongoing search of nearby hamlets
两名妖精追随者之间的往来信件，里面提到兰洛克正在坚持不懈地搜寻周遭村庄
Hamlet_Keenbridge_DadNote: Letter from Dermot to Beatrice|德莫特寄给碧翠斯的信件
Hamlet_Keenbridge_DadNote_desc:
A letter from Dermot to his wife Beatrice informing her that he's gone to search for their son Arnold who left to find food – despite concerns about beast affected by Dark Magic
德莫特寄给妻子碧翠斯的信件，他在里面提到说将去寻找外出寻找食物未归的儿子阿诺德，并表示自己并不相信附近野兽受到黑魔法影响的传闻
Hamlet_KeenBridge_Desc:
Keenbridge is a community in the swamplands located next to a large lake. It is said that Keenbridge received its name from a large, magical bridge that was said to bring you to your love. However, there is no such bridge in the region.
肯桥是沼泽地中的一个社区，毗邻一个大湖。据说，肯桥的名字来源为一座巨大的魔法桥梁，传言可将你带到你的爱人身边。但该地区并无这样的桥梁。
Hamlet_Keenbridge_SonNote: A Letter from a Son to his Parents|一位儿子的家书
Hamlet_Keenbridge_SonNote_desc:
A letter from a son to his parents promising to return with meat despite their worries about beasts possessed by Dark Magic
某人写给父母的信，他在里面保证说自己一定会带着肉食回来，并且希望父母不要担心附近野兽受到黑魔法影响的传闻
Hamlet_Kinloch_desc:
Feldcroft is a quaint village in the countryside. On the far side of the mountain, Feldcroft is surrounded by fields and the ruins of an ancient castle.
费德罗特是乡下的一个古朴的村庄。在山的另一边，费德罗特被田野和一座古城堡的废墟所环绕。
Hamlet_Larkhall_desc:
Lower Hogsfield is located in the countryside and is the closest hamlet to Hogwarts. In reverence to the school that taught them all, the inhabitants decided on the name 'Hogsfield'. However, around the same time, the villagers of Upper Hogsfield also opted for the name 'Hogsfield', after Hogsmeade. Thus, an unhappy compromise was decided upon and each village added a qualifier to their name.
下霍格米村位于乡村，是离霍格沃茨最近的小村庄。出于对教导他们所有人之学校的敬意，居民们决定将其命名为“霍格米村”。然而，大约在同一时间，上霍格米村的村民也选择依据霍格莫德以“霍格米村”命名。于是便产生了令人不快的妥协，两个村庄都在他们的名字各加上一个限定词。
Hamlet_LowerHogsfield_4: Archie Bickle Diary Entry 4 of 4|阿尔奇·比科尔的日记（4/4）
Hamlet_LowerHogsfield_4_desc: The last page of Archie Bickle's diary |阿尔奇·比科尔的日记最后一页
Hamlet_LowerHogsfield_Desc:
Lower Hogsfield is located in the countryside and is the closest hamlet to Hogwarts. In reverence to the school that taught them all, the inhabitants decided on the name 'Hogsfield'. However, around the same time, the villagers of Upper Hogsfield also opted for the name 'Hogsfield', after Hogsmeade. Thus, an unhappy compromise was decided upon and each village added a qualifier to their name.
下霍格米村位于乡村，是离霍格沃茨最近的小村庄。出于对教导他们所有人之学校的敬意，居民们决定将其命名为“霍格米村”。然而，大约在同一时间，上霍格米村的村民也选择依据霍格莫德以“霍格米村”命名。于是便产生了令人不快的妥协，两个村庄都在他们的名字各加上一个限定词。
Hamlet_Marunweem_AdaJournal: A Young Woman's Diary Entry|年轻女子的日记
Hamlet_Marunweem_AdaJournal_desc:
A diary entry by a young woman who is with child and plans to elope with her love, Tarek, to Norway
某位刚怀上孩子的年轻妈妈的日记，她在其中提到准备与爱人塔雷克一起私奔去挪威
Hamlet_Marunweem_desc:
Marunweem is a peaceful fishing hamlet, situated next to a lake. Lately they've come into a spot of trouble with many Poachers setting up camp in the area. 
马伦威姆是傍湖而立的平静渔村。最近突然开始在当地四处安营扎寨的盗猎者们让村民们苦不堪言。
Hamlet_Marunweem_TarekFirstLetter: Letter from Tarek to Ada 1 of 2|塔雷克写给艾达的信（1/2）
Hamlet_Marunweem_TarekFirstLetter_desc:
A letter from a young man named Tarek to his love Ada worrying about the goblin Loyalists and hoping she will meet with him secretly
年轻男子塔雷克写给自己的爱人艾达的信件，他在里面提到了自己担心妖精追随者袭击，并希望艾达能够与自己去秘密地点幽会
Hamlet_Marunweem_TarekSecondLetter: Letter from Tarek to Ada 2 of 2|塔雷克写给艾达的信（2/2）
Hamlet_Marunweem_TarekSecondLetter_desc:
A letter from a young man named Tarek to his love Ada worrying about the goblin Loyalists and hoping she will elope with him
年轻男子塔雷克写给自己的爱人艾达的信件，他在里面提到了自己担心妖精追随者袭击，并希望艾达能够与自己一同私奔
Hamlet_MirrorLake_desc:
Keenbridge is a community in the swamplands located next to a large lake. It is said that Keenbridge received its name from a large, magical bridge that was said to bring you to your love. However, there is no such bridge in the region.
肯桥是沼泽地中的一个社区，毗邻一个大湖。据说，肯桥的名字来源为一座巨大的魔法桥梁，传言可将你带到你的爱人身边。但该地区并无这样的桥梁。
Hamlet_Motherwell_desc:
Brocburrow is a community located in the countryside. Famed Auror Helen Thistlewood is among the notable witches and wizards to hail from this hamlet. 
布洛克巴罗是一个位于乡村的社区。著名的傲罗海伦·西索伍德是其中一名来自这个小村庄的知名巫师。
Hamlet_Murenweem_Desc:
A small hamlet by the coastline, situated near a crystalline lake. It is named for the caverns nearby.
海岸线上的一个小村庄，位于水晶湖附近。因附近的洞穴而得名。
Hamlet_Pitt-Upon_desc:
Pitt-upon-Ford is the southmost hamlet in the woodlands. 'Pitt-upon-Ford' which means 'place by a shallow river.' 
匹于河是林地地区中地理位置最靠南的村庄。村庄的名字“Pitt-upon-Ford”转换成通俗易懂的语言便是“浅水河畔之地”。
Hamlet_Pitt-Upon_Ford_Desc:
Pitt-upon-Ford is the southmost hamlet in the woodlands. This hamlet was founded when hyphenated names with 'upon' were very fashionable; thus, the founders settled on 'Pitt-upon-Ford' which means 'place by a shallow river.' 
匹于河是林地最南端的小村庄。在这个小村庄成立之际，当时很流行在名称中插入“于”字；因此，创始人选择了“匹于河”，意思是“靠近浅河之处”。
Hamlet_Pittuponford_AliveDugbog: Warning of Rampant Dugbog|狂暴泥怪警告
Hamlet_Pittuponford_AliveDugbog_desc:
A warning from a concerned neighbour to avoid what looks like driftwood but may very well be a Dugbog terrorising the hamlet of Pitt-upon-Ford
来自某位忧心忡忡的邻居的警告，这位邻居希望大家尽可能避开形似浮木的物体，因为那很有可能是最近肆虐匹于河的狂暴泥怪
Hamlet_Pittuponford_DeadDugbog: Note Celebrating Defeat of Rampant Dugbog|狂暴泥怪覆灭的庆祝信
Hamlet_Pittuponford_DeadDugbog_desc:
A note celebrating the defeat of a Dugbog that had been terrorising the hamlet of Pitt-upon-Ford
庆祝肆虐匹于河的泥怪覆灭的信件
Hamlet_Stirling_desc:
Upper Hogsfield is located in the countryside and is the closest hamlet to Hogsmeade. Because of it's proximity to Hogsmeade, the inhabitants dubbed themselves 'Hogsfield'. However, around the same time, Lower Hogsfield also opted for the name 'Hogsfield', after Hogwarts. Thus, an unhappy compromise was decided upon and each village added a qualifier to their name. 
上霍格米村位于乡村，是离霍格莫德最近的小村庄。由于靠近霍格莫德，当地居民称自己为“霍格米村”。然而，大约在同一时间，下霍格米村也选择依据霍格沃茨以“霍格米村”命名。于是便产生了令人不快的妥协，两个村庄都在他们的名字各加上一个限定词。
Hamlet_UpperHogsfield_Desc:
Upper Hogsfield is located in the countryside and is the closest hamlet to Hogsmeade. Because of it's proximity to Hogsmeade, the inhabitants dubbed themselves 'Hogsfield'. However, around the same time, Lower Hogsfield also opted for the name 'Hogsfield', after Hogwarts. Thus, an unhappy compromise was decided upon and each village added a qualifier to their name. 
上霍格米村位于乡村，是离霍格莫德最近的小村庄。由于靠近霍格莫德，当地居民称自己为“霍格米村”。然而，大约在同一时间，下霍格米村也选择依据霍格沃茨以“霍格米村”命名。于是便产生了令人不快的妥协，两个村庄都在他们的名字各加上一个限定词。
Hamlet_UpperHogsfield_EddieNote: Letter from Eddie Thistlewood|来自艾迪·西索伍德的信
Hamlet_UpperHogsfield_EddieNote_desc: A letter from Helen Thistlewood's brother|海伦·西索伍德的兄弟寄的信件
HAMLET_UPPERHOGSFIELD_HELENNOTE_01: The Thistle and the Badge, Part 1 of 3|《西索伍德与警徽》，1之3
Hamlet_UpperHogsfield_HelenNote_01_desc: The first of a series of reflections by retired Auror Helen Thistlewood|退休傲罗海伦·西索伍德所著回忆录的第一部分
Hamlet_UpperHogsfield_HelenNote_02: The Thistle and the Badge, Part 2 of 3|《西索伍德与警徽》，2之3
Hamlet_UpperHogsfield_HelenNote_02_desc: The second of a series of reflections by retired Auror Helen Thistlewood|退休傲罗海伦·西索伍德所著回忆录的第二部分
HAMLET_UPPERHOGSFIELD_HELENNOTE_03: The Thistle and the Badge, Part 3 of 3|《西索伍德与警徽》，3之3
Hamlet_UpperHogsfield_HelenNote_03_desc: The third of a series of reflections by retired Auror Helen Thistlewood|退休傲罗海伦·西索伍德所著回忆录的第三部分
HamletShopCrail: Cromwell's Hamlet Shop|克伦威尔的小村庄商店
HamletShopCrail_desc:
This small hamlet shop is run by local villager Clifford Cromwell. His shop frequently stocks seeds and plants.
这家小村庄商店由当地村民克利福德·克罗威尔经营。他的商店经常出售种子和植物。
HamletShopDumfries: Wood's Hamlet Shop|伍德的小村庄商店
HamletShopDumfries_desc:
This small hamlet shop is run by local villager Cypress Wood. His shop frequently stocks various beast byproducts and spider fangs.
这家小村庄商店由当地村民赛佩斯·伍德经营。他的店里经常出售各种野兽副产品和蜘蛛尖牙。
HamletShopGreenock: Coffey's Hamlet Shop|科菲的小村庄商店
HamletShopGreenock_desc:
This small hamlet shop is run by local villager Agnes Coffey. Her shop frequently stocks clothing.
这家小村庄商店由当地村民艾格尼丝·科菲经营。她的商店经常出售衣物。
HamletShopHalkirk: Wolff's Hamlet Shop|沃尔夫的小村庄商店
HamletShopHalkirk_desc:
This small hamlet shop is run by local villager Indira Wolff. Her shop frequently stocks magical beast-related items. 
这家小村庄商店由当地村民英迪拉·沃尔夫经营。她的商店经常出售与魔法野兽相关的物品。
HamletShopHelmsdale: Navarro's Hamlet Shop|纳瓦洛的小村庄商店
HamletShopHelmsdale_desc:
This small hamlet shop is run by local villager Bella Navarro. Her shop frequently stocks Wiggenweld Potion and clothing. 
这间村庄小店由当地村民贝拉·纳瓦罗负责经营。她的店里能够买到充足的振奋魔药与衣物。
HamletShopInverness: Ndiaye's Hamlet Shop|恩迪亚耶的村庄店铺
HamletShopInverness_desc:
A small hamlet shop run by local villager Bernard Ndiaye. His shop stocks items from magical beasts.
当地村民伯纳德·恩迪亚耶经营的一间村庄小店。店里售卖各类魔法野兽副产品。
HamletShopKinloch: Travers's Hamlet Shop|特拉弗斯的村庄店铺
HamletShopKinloch_desc:
A small hamlet shop run by local villager Chrysanthemum Travers. Her shop stocks plant seeds.
当地村民克丽姗·特拉弗斯经营的一间村庄小店。店里售卖各类植物种子。
HamletShopLarkhall: Sehmi's Hamlet Shop|赛赫米的村庄店铺
HamletShopLarkhall_desc:
A small hamlet shop run by local villager Jalal Sehmi. His shop stocks potions. 
当地村民贾拉·赛赫米经营的一间村庄小店。店里售卖各类魔药。
HamletShopMirrorLake: Lawang's Hamlet Shop|拉旺的村庄店铺
HamletShopMirrorLake_desc:
A small hamlet shop run by local villager Fatimah Lawang. Her shop stocks many different types of potions.
当地村民法蒂玛·拉旺经营的一间村庄小店。店里售卖各式各样的魔药。
HamletShopMotherwell: Thistlewood's Hamlet Shop|西索伍德的村庄店铺
HamletShopMotherwell_desc:
A small hamlet shop run by local villager Eddie Thistlewood. His shop sells an assortment of items.
当地村民艾迪·西索伍德经营的一间村庄小店。店里售卖各类杂物。
HamletShopShandwick: Adley's Hamlet Shop|艾德里的村庄店铺
HamletShopShandwick_desc:
A small hamlet shop run by local villager Edgar Adley. His shop stocks various types of clothing. 
当地村民埃德加·艾德里经营的一间村庄小店。店里售卖各种不同类型的服饰。
HamletShopStirling: Beaumont's Hamlet Shop|比约蒙特的村庄店铺
HamletShopStirling_desc:
A small hamlet shop run by local villager Claire Beaumont. Her shop frequently stocks items from dangerous beasts such as wolves.
当地村民克莱拉·比约蒙特经营的一间村庄小店。店里售卖狼等危险野兽产出的副产品。

HCP_TheHouseCup_QuestActive_StepJournal0: I should attend the end-of-year feast in the Great Hall.|我应该参加礼堂的学年结束宴会。
HCP_TheHouseCup_QuestActive_TaskObj01: Go to the Great Hall|前往礼堂
HCP_TheHouseCup_QuestAvailable_Journal:
A grand feast is being held in the Great Hall to celebrate the end of the school year and announce the winner of the House Cup.
礼堂正举行盛大的宴会，庆祝学年结束并宣布学院杯的赢家。
HCP_TheHouseCup_QuestAvailable_JournalRo: The end-of-year feast is being held in the Great Hall. I should go there.|礼堂正在举办年终宴席。我应该去那里看一眼。
HCP_TheHouseCup_QuestComplete_Journal:
This evening, I went to the Great Hall to attend the end-of-year feast. Although I'm still reeling from the events that took place beneath Hogwarts, I wanted to be around my friends. The Headmaster gave a short speech about the virtues of each house and, after some last-minute awarding of points to me at Professor Weasley's suggestion, my house won the House Cup! All my friends were there, cheering me on. It was a night to remember. Hogwarts is my home.
我今晚前往礼堂参加学年结束宴会。虽然我仍对在霍格沃茨地下发生的事件感到震惊，但我想和我的朋友们在一起。校长就每个学院的优点发表了简短的演讲，在最后一刻根据韦斯莱教授的建议为我加分后，我的学院赢得了学院杯！我所有的朋友都在那里，为我加油。这是一个值得纪念的夜晚。霍格沃茨是我的家。
HDR_Calibration_HGIG_Info:
To achieve the best HDR experience in Hogwarts Legacy, disable 'dynamic tone mapping' and/or enable 'HGIG' mode on your display if available.
要在霍格沃茨之遗中获得最佳的HDR体验，请在显示设备上停用“动态色调映射”和/或启用“HGIG”模式（如果有）。
HDR_Calibration_Tip1: Modify the user interface brightness so the text on screen remains readable.|修改界面亮度，使屏幕上的文本保持可读。
HDR_Calibration_Tip2: Make sure not to lose detail in the shadow areas of the image.|确保不要丢失图像阴影区域的细节。
HDR_Calibration_Tip3: Be careful not to over brighten the image causing loss of detail|小心不要使图像过亮而导致细节丢失
