HEDGEMAZE_desc: Will you be able to find the treasures that lie within?|你能否找到埋藏于最深处的宝藏？
HER_01_LostandAlone_QuestActive_Journal:
We spoke with Johanna Bickle, the wife of the man who was being harassed by Harlow and his men. She had just returned home to find her husband dead. Mrs Bickle believes that Harlow killed him for challenging him. To make matters worse, Mrs Bickle’s son, Archie, has also gone missing. His satchel is gone, and she hopes he’s simply wandered off. But she fears that he may have witnessed the murder and fled, or worse, that the Ashwinders may have taken him. Mrs Bickle mentioned that Archie has a hideout up the hill just south of the hamlet. We should check there for leads.
我们询问了乔安娜·比科尔，那名被哈罗尔和他的手下所骚扰的男人的妻子。她刚回到家，就发现丈夫已经死了。比科尔夫人认为哈罗尔是因为挑战他而将其杀死。更糟糕的是，比科尔夫人的儿子阿尔奇也失踪了。他的书包不见了，她希望他只是简单地走丢了。但她担心儿子可能目睹了谋杀并逃跑了，或者更糟的是，火灰蛇可能带走了他。比科尔太太提到阿尔奇在小村庄南边的山上有个藏身处。我们应该在那里找找线索。
HER_01_LostandAlone_QuestActive_StepJour:
It appears that something has happened to Mr Bickle. I should speak with Mrs Bickle to find out the details.
比科尔先生似乎出事了。我应该和比科尔夫人谈谈以了解详情。

Mrs Bickle’s son Archie is missing. She mentioned that he has a hideout south of the hamlet. We should look there.
比科尔夫人的儿子阿尔奇失踪了。她提到他在小村庄的南边有一个藏身处。我们应该去那里看看。

Natty and I found what appears to be Archie's hideout – but it looks as though it's been ransacked. Revelio should help us find him.
娜娜和我发现了似乎是阿尔奇的藏身之处——但它看起来好像被洗劫一空了。“原形立现”应该能帮助我们找到他。

Natty and I found what appears to be Archie's hideout – but it looks as though it's been ransacked. Revelio should help us find him.
娜娜和我发现了似乎是阿尔奇的藏身之处——但它看起来好像被洗劫一空了。“原形立现”应该能帮助我们找到他。

Using Revelio, we were able to uncover a series of children’s footsteps. We should follow them to see where they lead.
使用“原形立现”，我们能够发现一串儿童的足迹。我们应该跟随这些足迹，看看它们将走向何处。

Natty and I encountered a pack of wolves while following Archie’s footsteps. They are blocking our way through. We’re going to need to deal with them.
娜娜和我在追随阿尔奇的足迹时遇到了一群狼，它们挡住了我们的去路。我们必须得将其解决。

We found what we believe is the location where Archie was abducted. We need to follow the trail.
我们找到了认为是阿尔奇被绑架的地点。我们需要跟随线索继续前进。

There are signs here of disturbance in the area. We should look for any clue that Archie was here.
该地区有骚乱的迹象。我们应该寻找阿尔奇曾在这里的任何线索。

Natty and I found Archie’s satchel in the area. He must have dropped it or left it behind for some reason.
娜娜和我在附近找到了阿尔奇的书包，他一定是因为某种原因把它丢了或者落在了身后。

We found multiple sets of footprints and signs of distress. Archie could be in trouble! We need to follow the trail.
我们发现了多组脚印以及挣扎的迹象。阿尔奇可能有麻烦了！我们需要跟随线索继续前进。

All trails led Natty and me to an Ashwinder tent. I hope that Archie can be found inside and that it’s not too late.
所有的线索把我和娜娜带到了一个火灰蛇帐篷前。我希望可以在里面找到阿尔奇，而且希望为时不晚。

We've reached the interior of the Ashwinder tent. There are plenty of Ashwinders inside. We'll need to be careful while we search for Archie.
我们已经进入了火灰蛇帐篷的内部。里面有很多火灰蛇。我们在寻找阿尔奇时需要小心。

Natty and I found Archie Bickle. Luckily, he seems unharmed, but he is being held in a cage in the lower level of the Ashwinder tent. We must unlock it to free him.
娜娜和我找到了阿尔奇·比科尔。幸运的是，他似乎安然无恙，但他被关在火灰蛇帐篷下层的笼子里。我们必须开锁以将他释放。
We’ve unlocked Archie’s cage. Now to speak with him about how he got here.|我们已经打开了阿尔奇笼子的锁，现在得问问他是如何来到这里的。

Archie was being held captive by the Ashwinders. He was present when Harlow killed his father, and he fled, only to be captured shortly thereafter. But he's safe now. Time to get him back to his mother.
阿尔奇被火灰蛇俘虏了。当哈罗尔杀死他的父亲时他在场，然后他逃跑了，但不久后被抓获。不过他现在安全了。是时候让他回到妈妈身边了。

We’ve brought Archie home safely. His mother will be relieved. We need to speak with her.
我们已经把阿尔奇安全带回家了，他的妈妈终于可以放心了。我们需要和她谈谈。
HER_01_LostandAlone_QuestActive_TaskObj0: Speak with Mrs Bickle|与比科尔夫人交谈
Find Archie's hideout|找到阿尔奇的藏身处
Search Archie's hideout|搜索阿尔奇的藏身处
Track Archie by casting Revelio|通过施放“原形立现”追踪阿尔奇
Follow Archie's trail|跟随阿尔奇的踪迹
HER_01_LostandAlone_QuestActive_TaskObj1: Enter the Ashwinders' charmed tent|进入火灰蛇的魔法帐篷
Find Archie Bickle|找到阿尔奇·比科尔
Unlock the cage|打开笼子的锁
Speak with Archie|与阿尔奇交谈
Escape with Archie|与阿尔奇一起逃离
Speak with Mrs Bickle|与比科尔夫人交谈
HER_01_LostandAlone_QuestAvailable_Journ:
Natty Onai is determined not to allow the type of men who forced her mother to leave Matabeleland to ruin her new home here at Hogwarts. Victor Rookwood’s Ashwinders and poachers have been extorting, poaching and murdering around the countryside. That they are in league with Ranrok makes matters even more urgent. If we can find a way to take down Theophilus Harlow, who runs Rookwood’s day-to-day operations, Natty believes that we can cripple the entire organisation. She has found a wizard in Lower Hogsfield whom Harlow’s men have been harassing. She wants to meet him to learn more.
娜娜·欧奈下决心不会让那些强迫她母亲离开马塔贝莱兰的人毁了她在霍格沃茨的新家。维克托·卢克伍德的火灰蛇和盗猎者一直在乡下敲诈、偷猎和谋杀。他们与兰洛克结盟的事实使事情变得更加紧迫。如果我们能找到一种方法来推翻操控卢克伍德日常运营的修菲利乌斯·哈罗尔，娜娜相信我们就可以削弱整个组织。她在下霍格米村找到了一个巫师，而哈罗尔的手下一直在骚扰他。她想见见这名巫师以了解更多情况。

Natty has learned of a wizard in Lower Hogsfield who is being harassed by Theophilus Harlow, Rookwood’s right-hand man. I should meet her there to investigate.
娜娜得知下霍格米村的一名巫师正受到卢克伍德的得力助手修菲利乌斯·哈罗尔的骚扰。我应该在那里和她会面以展开调查。
HER_01_LostandAlone_QuestAvailable_Task: Meet Natty in Lower Hogsfield|在下霍格米村与娜娜碰面
HER_01_LostandAlone_QuestComplete_Journa:
Natty and I were able to track a missing boy, Archie Bickle, to an Ashwinder encampment where he was being held captive. We rescued him and returned him to his mother in Lower Hogsfield. Archie’s father had been killed by Harlow for looking into his business dealings. While this isn’t typically a matter for students to handle, I believe Natty is right. Harlow is a serious threat, and taking him out will cripple Rookwood’s organisation. It seems that Officer Singer is incapable of handling this threat on her own. Perhaps we can help.
娜娜和我尝试找寻一个失踪的男孩，名叫阿尔奇·比科尔，并一路追到囚禁他的火灰蛇营地。随后我们救了他，并把他送回了下霍格米村的母亲身边。阿尔奇的父亲因调查他的商业交易而被哈罗尔杀害。虽然这通常不是学生要处理的问题，但我相信娜娜是对的。哈罗尔是一个严重的威胁，而解决他将会削弱卢克伍德的组织。看起来辛格警官无法独自应对这种威胁，也许我们可以提供帮助。
HER_02_01_MissionFail2: You were spotted by the Ashwinders|你被火灰蛇党发现了
HER_02_ABasisforBlackmail_QuestActive_Jo:
I spoke with Natty outside Hogsmeade. She insists that we must gather information from the late Mr Bickle’s friends to find out what evidence Mr Bickle had against Harlow, or what evidence they themselves may have. In an attempt to avoid her mother's eye, Natty is going to search around the Hog’s Head Inn, where she is certain her mother would never go. She has heard that Rookwood's lot spends a fair amount of time there. I need to speak with Daisy Rabe (the wife of Isko Rabe), Agabus Philbert and Otto Dibble, who works at Gladrags. Once I’ve met with each of them, I’m to return to our meeting place outside Hogsmeade to compare notes and formulate a plan.
我在霍格莫德外面和娜娜谈过。她坚持认为，我们必须从已故的比科尔先生的朋友那里收集信息，以找出比科尔先生与哈罗尔产生了冲突的证据，或者他们自己可能有的证据。为了避开她母亲的视线，娜娜打算在猪头酒吧四处找找，她确信她的母亲永远不会去那里。她听说卢克伍德的大部分时间都在那里度过。我需要与在“风雅牌”工作的黛西·拉贝（伊斯科·拉贝的妻子）、阿格巴斯·菲利伯特和奥托·迪博尔谈谈。与他们每个人见面后，我将返回霍格莫德郊外的会面地点，整合笔记并制定计划。
HER_02_ABasisforBlackmail_QuestActive_St:
Natty wants me to speak with the late Mr Bickle’s associates to see what information they have on Harlow. I should be able to find them in Hogsmeade.
娜娜想让我和已故的比科尔先生的同事谈谈，看看他们有什么关于哈罗尔的信息。我应该能在霍格莫德找到他们。

I was able to speak with Otto Dibble, Agabus Philbert and Daisy Rabe, the wife of Isko Rabe, as Mr Rabe has gone missing. Each of them is being extorted by Harlow. I need to update Natty at our meeting place outside Hogsmeade.
由于拉贝先生失踪，我得以与奥托·迪博尔、阿格巴斯·菲利伯特和伊斯科·拉贝的妻子黛西·拉贝交谈。他们每个人都被哈罗尔勒索过。我需要在霍格莫德郊外的集合地点通知娜娜。

I returned to the meeting place to update Natty on what I learned from Mr Bickle's associates who Harlow's been extorting. She wasn’t there, which is concerning as she’s never late. I’ve decided to try the Hog’s Head Inn.
我回到会面地点，向娜娜汇报了我从比科尔先生的朋友那里了解到的情况，哈罗尔一直在勒索他们。但她不在那里，这很令人担忧，因为她从不迟到的。我决定去猪头酒吧试试。

I searched around the Hog’s Head Inn for Natty but didn’t find her. I only found signs of a struggle and Natty’s wand. Beginning at the wand, there's a trail that goes around the inn. It’s my only lead, so I need to follow it.
我在猪头酒吧四处寻找娜娜，但没有找到。我只发现了挣扎的迹象和娜娜的魔杖。从魔杖的位置沿着旅馆周围有一条踪迹，这是我唯一的线索，所以我必须要跟随它。

The trail I followed that began at Natty's wand led me to a pair of cellar doors beneath the Hog’s Head Inn. Natty's in trouble! This is exactly why Professor Onai didn’t want her coming to Hogsmeade. I need to enter the cellar and find her.
我沿着从娜娜魔杖开始的踪迹走到了猪头酒吧下面的一扇地窖门。娜娜有麻烦了！这正是欧奈教授不希望她来霍格莫德的原因。我需要进入地窖找到她。

I entered the cellar beneath the Hog's Head Inn and found only a series of oak barrels. There must be a clue here, as there’s no sign of Natty. Where could they have taken her? I need to investigate.
我进入猪头酒吧下面的地窖，发现只有一堆橡木桶。这里一定有线索，因为娜娜的踪迹消失了。他们能把她带到哪里去呢？我需要调查一下。

I was able to find and open a secret door in the cellar beneath the Hog's Head Inn which led to a larger, underground collection of rooms. Could this be a secret Ashwinder hideout? I must look for Natty.
我找到并打开了猪头酒吧地下室的一扇暗门，而这将通向一个更大的地下区域。这会是一个火灰蛇的秘密藏身处吗？我必须去找到娜娜。

When I found Natty beneath the Hog's Head Inn, I also found Daisy Rabe's missing husband, Isko. They are both being held in cells that I cannot unlock. Natty wants me to speak with Mr Rabe first.
当我在猪头酒吧下面找到娜娜时，我还找到了黛西·拉贝失踪的丈夫伊斯科，他们都被关在我无法开锁的牢房里。娜娜要我先和拉贝先生谈谈。

I spoke with Isko Rabe, who has been captured and imprisoned by Rookwood’s Ashwinders, along with Natty. The cells that he and Natty are being held in are cursed, and he must have his wand in order to break the curse. He senses that it is nearby – somewhere in this room. I must find it quickly.
我与被卢克伍德的火灰蛇俘虏并囚禁的伊斯科·拉贝和娜娜进行了交谈。他和娜娜被关押的牢房都被施了诅咒，他必须拥有魔杖才能打破诅咒。他感觉到魔杖就在附近——在这个房间的某个地方。我必须尽快找到它。

I spoke with Isko Rabe, who has been captured and imprisoned by Rookwood’s Ashwinders, along with Natty. The cells that he and Natty are being held in are cursed, and he must have his wand in order to break the curse. He senses that it is nearby – somewhere in this room. I must find it quickly.
我与被卢克伍德的火灰蛇俘虏并囚禁的伊斯科·拉贝和娜娜进行了交谈。他和娜娜被关押的牢房都被施了诅咒，他必须拥有魔杖才能打破诅咒。他感觉到魔杖就在附近——在这个房间的某个地方。我必须尽快找到它。

I found Mr Rabe’s wand and returned it to him. With it, he should be able to break the curse on his and Natty's cells.
我找到了拉贝先生的魔杖，并把它还给了他。有了这个，他应该能够打破他和娜娜牢房的诅咒了。

Mr Rabe was able to remove the curse from his and Natty’s cells and to free himself and Natty. He thought he might be strong enough to Disapparate with us from the hideout, but we told him to go without us. While he finds Officer Singer, we need to make our way out of this place on our own.
拉贝先生成功地从他和娜娜的牢房中消除了诅咒，并释放了自己和娜娜。他认为自己足够强大，可以从藏身处和我们一起进行“幻影移形”，但我们还是告诉他不要和我们一起走。当他找到辛格警官时，我们需要自己走出这个地方。

Natty and I managed to escape the Ashwinder hideout beneath the Hog’s Head Inn. Before we do anything else, we should inform Officer Singer of what has happened and we've uncovered. She should be on her way here if Mr Rabe managed to find her.
娜娜和我设法逃离了猪头酒吧下面的火灰蛇藏身处。在我们进行任何其他行动之前，我们应该通知辛格警官发生了什么事以及我们的发现。如果拉贝先生已成功找到了她，那么她应该就在路上了。

Speak with Daisy Rabe|与黛西·拉贝交谈

Speak with Isko Rabe|与伊斯科·拉贝交谈

Wait for Mr Rabe to dispel the curses|等待拉贝先生解除诅咒

Speak with Officer Singer|与辛格警官交谈
HER_02_ABasisforBlackmail_QuestAvailable:
Natty has been prohibited by her mother, Professor Onai, from travelling outside school grounds. But Natty is confident that she can sneak away from Hogwarts without her mother knowing. She has sent me an owl requesting I meet her outside Hogsmeade. I hope we don’t get caught.
娜娜被她的母亲欧奈教授禁止在校外旅行。但娜娜有信心在妈妈不知情的情况下偷偷溜出霍格沃茨。她给我派来一只猫头鹰，要我在霍格莫德郊外与她见面。我只希望我们不要被抓住。

Natty sent me another owl saying that she can sneak away without her mother knowing. I’m to meet her outside Hogsmeade.
娜娜给我派来另一只猫头鹰，说她可以在妈妈不知情的情况下偷偷溜走。我得去霍格莫德郊外与她见面。
Speak with Natty outside of Hogsmeade|在霍格莫德郊外与娜娜交谈
HER_02_ABasisforBlackmail_QuestComplete_:
Natty wants to know more about Mr Bickle’s associates and what information they had on Rookwood’s right-hand-man, Theophilus Harlow. Daisy Rabe, Otto Dibble, and Agabus Philbert shed light on the intimidation, coercion and violence that Harlow has been using to keep the residents in Hogsmeade under his thumb. I returned to update Natty and found that she was missing. Searching for her led me to a secret Ashwinder hideout beneath the Hog's Head Inn, where I found not only Natty, but the missing Isko Rabe. Natty and I reported our findings to Officer Singer, who seemed more concerned with our safety than doing something about this threat. I should speak with Natty to see how she’s doing.
娜娜想从比科尔先生的同伙那里了解更多，以及他们掌握了卢克伍德的得力助手修菲利乌斯·哈罗尔的哪些信息。奥托·迪博尔，阿格巴斯·菲利伯特与黛西·拉贝，揭示了哈罗尔一直在使用恐吓、胁迫和暴力来控制着霍格莫德的居民。我回来与娜娜碰头，但发现她不见了。在寻找她的过程中，我来到了猪头酒吧下面的一个火灰蛇秘密藏身处，在那里我不仅找到了娜娜，还找到了失踪的伊斯科·拉贝。娜娜和我向辛格警官报告了我们的发现，她似乎更关心我们的安全，而不是对这种威胁所该采取的行动。我应该和娜娜谈谈，看看她的想法。
HER_02_ABasisforBlackmail_QuestTitle: A Basis for Blackmail|敲诈的依据
HER_03: Harlow's Last Stand|哈罗尔的背水一战
HER_03_FinalVictim_QuestActive_Journal:
I spoke with Natty near Manor Cape. We suspect that the letter she received from ‘Mrs Bickle’ actually came from Theophilus Harlow, who hopes to catch us unsuspecting. But if that's the case, he just lost the element of surprise. It's time to find and take care of Harlow, once and for all.
我在庄园海岬附近和娜娜谈过。我们怀疑她从“比科尔夫人”收到的信，实际是出自修菲利乌斯·哈罗尔之手，他希望让我们毫无戒心并将我们抓住。如果真的让他得逞了，那他可就失去了一份惊喜呢。是时候找上哈罗尔并将其一波带走了。
HER_03_FinalVictim_QuestActive_StepJourn:
We believe Harlow plans on ambushing us at the manor. We're not afraid, because we have the upper hand, as he's unaware that we've uncovered his trickery. I’ll follow Natty there.
我们相信哈罗尔计划在庄园伏击我们。我们不害怕，因为我们占了上风，他不知道我们已经发现了他的诡计。接下来我会跟着娜娜前往那里。

We've reached the manor. It's eerily quiet. We should search around as carefully as possible.
我们到了庄园，这里出奇的安静。我们应该尽可能仔细地四处寻找。

It was indeed an Ashwinder trap! There’s no sign of Harlow yet, but he'll be here soon, no doubt. Until then, we have plenty of his lot to deal with.
这的确是个火灰蛇陷阱！目前还没有哈罗尔的踪迹，但毫无疑问，他很快就会来。在那之前，我们有很多事情要处理。

After we had dispatched many of his followers at the manor, the cowardly Harlow finally came out of hiding to face us. Now to take him down for good.
在我们将庄园中他的许多追随者都打发掉之后，胆小的哈罗尔终于从藏身处出来面对我们了。而现在必须把他确确实实地打倒。
HER_03_FinalVictim_QuestActive_TaskObj01: Travel to Manor Cape with Natty|和娜娜一起前往庄园海岬
HER_03_FinalVictim_QuestActive_TaskObj02: Search for signs of Harlow|寻找哈罗尔的踪迹
HER_03_FinalVictim_QuestActive_TaskObj03: Defeat the Ashwinders at the manor|在庄园击败火灰蛇
HER_03_FinalVictim_QuestActive_TaskObj04: Defeat Theophilus Harlow|击败修菲利乌斯·哈罗尔
HER_03_FinalVictim_QuestAvailable_Journa:
I’m to meet Natty near Manor Cape. She says she received a letter from Mrs Bickle about Harlow, and she’ll explain more when we meet. I need to go there and speak with her.
我去庄园海岬附近与娜娜见面。她说她收到了比科尔夫人关于哈罗尔的一封信，我们见面时她会详细地解释。我需要去那里和她谈谈。
HER_03_FinalVictim_QuestAvailable_StepJo:
Natty sent me an owl requesting I meet her near Manor Cape. That’s a distance from Hogwarts. She must have a good lead on Harlow. I should prepare before meeting her.
娜娜给我派来一只猫头鹰，要我在庄园海岬附近与她见面，那里距离霍格沃茨有一段距离。她一定拥有对付哈罗尔压倒的优势。我应该在见到她之前做好准备。
HER_03_FinalVictim_QuestAvailable_TaskOb: Speak with Natty near Manor Cape|与庄园海岬附近的娜娜交谈
HER_03_FinalVictim_QuestComplete_Journal:
Natty and I were able to defeat Theophilus Harlow once and for all at Manor Cape. His plan to ambush us was unsuccessful, but tragically, Natty was injured while trying to protect me. I feel rather guilty over it. I need to visit her in the hospital wing.
娜娜和我在庄园海岬彻底击败了修菲利乌斯·哈罗尔。他伏击我们的计划没有成功，但不幸的是，娜娜在试图保护我时受伤了。我对此感到相当内疚，我需要去校医院看望她。
HER_03_FinalVictim_QuestTitle: Harlow's Last Stand|哈罗尔的背水一战
HER_03_HarlowsLastStand_QuestTitle: Harlow's Last Stand|哈罗尔的背水一战
HER_03_MissionAvailable_Journal:
Natty has heard about another of the Ashwinders' victims and wants to talk to them. I need to check in with her.
娜娜了解到又出现了一位惨遭火灰蛇党荼毒的受害者，她想要去跟进取证。我需要去看一下她的情况。
HER_03_TheNailintheCoffin_QuestTitle: Harlow's Last Stand|哈罗尔的背水一战
HER_Conv_01_GirlFromCharmsClass_QuestTit: The Girl from Uagadou|来自瓦加度的女孩
HER_Conv_01_TheGirlFromCharmsClass_Quest:
Natty Onai has asked me to meet her at a hamlet called Lower Hogsfield, just south of Hogwarts. I should see what she wants.
娜娜·欧奈让我在霍格沃茨以南的一个叫做下霍格米村的小村庄与她见面。我应该去看看她想要做什么。
Use the nearby Floo Flames to select a companion|使用附近的飞路之焰选择同伴

I received an owl from Natty Onai asking me to meet her at a hamlet called Lower Hogsfield, just south of Hogwarts. According to the Field Guide map, it is just down the hill to the south of the castle. I can leave through the South Exit beyond the Clock Tower. I don't know what she wants or why we’re meeting there, but it’s a good opportunity to explore beyond the castle.
我收到了娜娜·欧奈派来的一只猫头鹰，要我在霍格沃茨以南的一个叫做下霍格米村的小村庄与她会面。根据实战指南地图，它就在城堡南面的山下。我可以选择从钟楼外的南出口离开。我不知道她想要什么，也不知道我们为什么需要在那里见面，但这是探索城堡之外的好机会。
Meet Natty Onai in Lower Hogsfield|在下霍格米村与娜娜·欧奈见面

I met Natty Onai in Lower Hogsfield, where I discovered Floo Flames. Now I can travel directly between Lower Hogsfield and Hogwarts, which will be convenient. Natty has concerns about Ranrok and Rookwood pursuing me. She wants to come up with a strategy to help.
我在下霍格米村遇到了娜娜·欧奈，并且我在那里发现了飞路之焰。现在我可以在下霍格米村和霍格沃茨之间直接往返了，这将会很方便。娜娜担心兰洛克和卢克伍德会跟着我。她希望能想出一个策略来提供帮助。
HER_Conv_01_TheGirlfromUagadou_QuestTitl: The Girl from Uagadou|来自瓦加度的女孩
HER_Conv_04_MumsTheWord_QuestAvailable_J:
Natty believes that her mother, Professor Onai, may have discovered what we've been up to. She is hopeful that her mother will go easier on her if I am there when they speak. I should meet her and then perhaps we can determine our next steps for dealing with Harlow.
娜娜相信她的母亲欧奈教授可能已经发现了我们的所作所为。如果他们说话时我也在场，她希望母亲能对她好一些。我应该见她，然后也许我们可以确定下一步对付哈罗尔的计划。
HER_CONV_04_MumsTheWord_QuestAvailable_J:
Natty believes that her mother, Professor Onai, may have discovered what we've been up to. She hopes that her mother will go easier on her if I am there when they speak.
娜娜相信她的母亲欧奈教授可能已经发现了我们的所作所为。她希望如果他们说话时我也在场，她母亲能对她好一些。
HER_Conv_04_MumsTheWord_QuestAvailable_T: Speak with Natty outside the Divination Classroom|在占卜课教室外与娜娜交谈
HER_Conv_04_MumsTheWord_QuestComplete_Jo:
Natty requested that I be there with her when she spoke with her mother, believing that she may go easier on her if that were the case. After Professor Onai told Natty that she doesn't want her leaving the castle, I learned that Natty is an Animagus! Specifically, a gazelle, and she has been using this ability to investigate Rookwood and Harlow’s activities.
娜娜要求我在她和她母亲谈话时陪在她身边，她相信如果是这样的话，母亲可能会对她更好一些。在欧奈教授告诉娜娜不想让她离开城堡后，我得知了娜娜是阿尼玛格斯！具体来说，是一只瞪羚，而她一直在使用这种能力调查卢克伍德和哈罗尔的活动。
HER_CONV_05_GriefandVengeance_QuestAvail:
I wonder how Natty is holding up since I helped her and Mr Rabe escape the Ashwinders. I should check in with my new friend.
在帮助娜娜和拉贝先生逃离了火灰蛇党之后，我想知道她近来可好。我应该和我的这位新朋友联系一下。

I should ask Natty how she’s been doing since I helped her and Mr Rabe escape the Ashwinders' hideout.
我应该问问娜娜，自从我帮助她和拉贝先生逃离了火灰蛇的藏身处后，她过得怎么样。
HER_CONV_05_GriefandVengeance_QuestCompl:
When we spoke in the Great Hall, Natty told me how she lost her father, who was also an Animagus. He gave his life to save her from bandits in Matabeleland, and Natty blames herself for his death. She sees similarities between Rookwood and Harlow and the men who killed her father. I admire Natty’s determination to seek justice. I await her next owl.
当我们在礼堂交谈时，娜娜告诉我她是如何失去父亲的，她的父亲也是一个阿尼玛格斯。他牺牲了自己的生命来将她从马塔贝莱兰的土匪手中救出来。娜娜一直为他父亲的死感到内疚。她认为卢克伍德和哈罗尔以及杀害她父亲的人之间有很多相似之处。我钦佩娜娜寻找正义的决心。我等待着她的下一只猫头鹰信。
HER_Conv_06: Undermine the Rookwood Gang|大破卢克伍德帮
HER_Conv_06_FixedFocus_QuestAvailable_Jo:
Natty sent me an owl, saying that she’s come upon a difficult time and would like to talk. She may be struggling with the guilt she feels over her father giving his life to save her. I should meet her in the Great Hall.
娜娜给我派来一只猫头鹰，说她遇到了困难，想和我谈谈。她可能还在为父亲救她而献出生命的事感到内疚而苦苦挣扎。我需要去礼堂见她。

I received an owl from Natty requesting that I speak with her. I haven't heard much from her in the way of next steps for taking down Harlow. She wants me to meet with her in the Great Hall.
我从娜娜那里收到一只猫头鹰，她想和我谈谈。关于拿下哈罗尔的下一步行动，我仍没有从她那里听到太多消息。她要我在礼堂见她。
HER_Conv_06_FixedFocus_QuestAvailable_Ta: Speak with Natty in the Great Hall|在礼堂与娜娜交谈
HER_Conv_06_FixedFocus_QuestComplete_Jou:
I spoke with Natty in the Great Hall. She has been thinking about her father’s death and feels guilty that he died saving her life. Natty confided in me that this guilt is something she must deal with, but she also believes she has a solution. She believes that defeating Harlow may help her to correct the wrongs of her past, in a sense. She has vowed to stop him and to keep others from facing the fate her father did.
我在礼堂与娜娜进行了交谈。她一直在思考着父亲的死，并为他因救她而死感到内疚。娜娜向我吐露，这种内疚是她必须面对的，但她也相信自己有解决办法。她认为，在某种意义上，击败哈罗尔可能会帮助她纠正过去的错误。她发誓要阻止他，让其他人不再面对她父亲的那种命运。
HER_Conv_07_ActingOnInstinct_QuestAvaila:
Natty was seriously injured by a spell that Theophilus Harlow cast at me while we were duelling with him at the manor. I feel responsible, as I’ve encouraged her to pursue Harlow. Fortunately, she is now recovering in the hospital wing. I plan to meet with her to catch up. We’ve been through a lot together. In light of how she lost her father, I am hopeful that having Harlow sent to Azkaban will finally give her some much-needed peace.
当我们在庄园与他决斗时，修菲利乌斯·哈罗尔对我施了一个咒语，而娜娜受了重伤。我感到自责，因为是我鼓励她去追查哈罗尔的。幸运的是，她现在正在校医院进行康复。我想与她见个面聊一聊。我们一起经历了很多，鉴于她是如何失去父亲的，我希望将哈罗尔送到阿兹卡班的这个结果，能带给她一些安慰。

I need to visit Natty in the hospital wing and thank her for leaping in front of Theophilus Harlow's attack to save me.
我需要去校医院看望娜娜，感谢她在修菲利乌斯·哈罗尔的袭击前挺身而出救了我。
Visit Natty in the Hospital Wing|拜访校医院的娜娜
HER_Conv_07_ActingOnInstinct_QuestComple:
I visited Natty in the hospital wing and was encouraged to see that she is in good spirits as she recovers from her injuries. She realised that she is no more to blame for her father’s death than I am to blame for her injury. She has a lot of her father in her, as she saved me without hesitation. Taking down Harlow has left Rookwood's enterprise in disarray. We’ve managed to overcome some daunting obstacles together, and I’m grateful for it as I’ve found a best friend along the way.
我在校医院拜访了娜娜，看到她从伤病中恢复时精神状态良好，我深受鼓舞。她意识到她不应该为父亲的死而过于内疚，就像我不应该为她的受伤而内疚一样。她很像她的父亲，因为她毫不犹豫地救了我。打倒哈罗尔让卢克伍德的组织陷入混乱，而我们已经设法共同克服了那些令人生畏的障碍，我很感激，因为我在途中找到了一个最好的朋友。
Herbology_Forgotten_Dungeon_desc:
A lost corridor in Hogwarts rumoured to contain a former Herbology professor's dangerous magical plants
传闻霍格沃茨中有一条失落的走廊，藏有一位前草药学教授的危险魔法植物
Herbology_Sub_Large: Large Potting Tables|大型园艺工作台
Herbology_Sub_Medium: Medium Potting Tables|中型园艺工作台
Herbology_Sub_Small: Small Potting Tables|小型园艺工作台
HerbologyCategory_desc: Items used to grow plants|用于种植植物的物品
HerbologyStation_Classroom: Potting Table Unlocked|园艺工作台已解锁
HighContrastMode_desc: Adjust the contrast of the game|调整游戏对比
HigherQualityWildHarvests_desc:
In the company of this individual, there is a greater chance of receiving high-quality byproducts.
在其陪同下，有更高几率获得高品质的副产品。
Hint_AccioReminder_desc: Accio can be used to pull objects with an Accio Ring towards you|“飞来咒”可将带有飞来咒圆环的目标拉向你
Hint_AlmostNewLevel:
You are close to gaining a new Wizarding Level. Complete Field Guide Challenges to close the gap.
你即将达到新的巫师等级。完成实战指南挑战以加快进度。
Hint_AMHotspot: Complete challenges to increase your Ancient Magic Meter 完成㉿挑战以增加你的古代魔法计量
Hint_AMPickups: Perform a 10 hit combo to begin spawning Ancient Magic Powerups.|进行10次连击，以开始产生古代魔法充能。
Hint_AssignNewSpells: Assign New Spells|分配新的咒语
Hint_BadGear:
Equip gear that you have found, purchased, or upgraded at a loom to improve your combat efficacy.
穿上那些找到的、购买来的或用织布机升级的装备，以提高你的战斗效率。
Hint_BreakShields: Dispel enemy shields with matching colour spells|用相应颜色的咒语驱散敌人的护盾
Hint_castdisillusionment: Remember to cast the Disillusionment Charm|记得施放“幻身”魔咒
Hint_CCAnimalGuide: You are not currently tracking anything|目前没有追踪任何目标
Hint_CCSpells: Control spells break Yellow Shield Charms|控制咒语能够击溃黄色的护盾魔咒
Hint_ChompingCabbageLimitReached: You cannot place any more Chinese Chomping Cabbages at this time.|你现在已经不能放置更多的中国咬人甘蓝了。
Hint_CraftOptions:
Unlock permanent crafting options for your {ItemMenuButton} Tool Wheel by purchasing recipes and seeds in Hogsmeade
通过在霍格莫德购买配方和种子，为你的工具轮解锁永久的制作选项
Hint_Demiguise: Return Demiguise Moons to Gladwin Moon to upgrade the Alohomora spell|将隐形兽月亮归还给格拉德温·莫恩，以升级咒语“阿拉霍洞开”
Hint_Dismount: You must dismount before continuing|退出骑乘状态后才能继续
Hint_DistractionShot: Use {AM_AimMode} and {Stupefy} to lure unsuspecting enemies.|使用和来引诱毫无戒心的敌人。
Hint_DodgeUnblockables: Press {DodgeAndBlinkButton} to dodge unblockable attacks|按闪躲无法格挡的攻击
Hint_EarnXP: Increase your Wizarding Level by earning XP in Field Guide Challenges|通过在实战指南挑战中获得经验值，来提高你的巫师等级
Hint_EVL_Snakepuzzle:
Use {Generic_ParseltongueMinigame_Top} to rotate the top dial and {Generic_ParseltongueMinigame_Bottom} to rotate the bottom dial.
使用旋转顶部刻度盘，使用旋转底部刻度盘。
Hint_ExcessTalentPoints: You have unused Talent Points awaiting you in your Field Guide|实战指南中有尚未使用的天赋点
Hint_GearMismatch: You cannot use this gear at your current level.|当前等级无法使用此装备。
Hint_HasRewardsToCollect: You have uncollected rewards available in the Challenges Menu.|前往挑战菜单收集尚未领取的奖励。
Hint_Incendio: Use Heavy damage Spells like Incendio to make short work of enemies|使用诸如“火焰熊熊”这样的高伤害咒语，来快速搞定敌人
Hint_IncendioVines: Incendio can burn through webs and vines|“火焰熊熊”可以烧穿网和藤木
Hint_InteractDuringCombat: Action unavailable while detected by an enemy|被敌人发现时，无法采取动作
Hint_IntroObjective: Review your objectives to reveal the way forward. 查看你的目标㉿以揭示前方的道路。
Hint_IntroObjective|SWITCH: Review your objectives to reveal the way forward. 查看你的目标㉿以揭示前方的道路。
Hint_InventoryAlmost:
Your gear slots are nearly full. Between missions is the perfect time to sell excess gear or stock up on supplies.
你的装备栏即将装满。学会在任务间隙出售多余装备或者购置补给。
Hint_InventoryFull:
Your gear slots are full. Sell or discard excess gear or earn new gear slots via Merlin Trial challenges.
你的装备栏已满。出售或者清理多余装备，除此以外你还可以通过梅林试炼获取更多装备栏位。
Hint_Leviosobreakingshield: Try using Levioso to break through an enemy's shield|尝试使用“啦唯啊萨”来击穿敌人的护盾
Hint_NewContent: New content is available to view in your Collections.|新内容可用，请前往你的收藏界面查看。
Hint_OpenObjNoPath: No path available for open quest objectives.|无可用路径来开启任务目标。
Hint_PNP_AccioPlatforms: Accio can be used to pull enchanted platforms|“飞来咒”可将被施法的平台拉过来
Hint_PNP_RedBlueGate:
Passing through an Ancient Magic Gate reveals a different version of the room around you.
穿过古代魔法大门，会使你所处的房间变成另一幅面貌。
Hint_QuestTracking: Quests can be tracked from the Map or Quest Screen|任务可从地图或任务界面进行追踪
Hint_RanrokBossFight: Destroy the sources of corruption feeding Ranrok to make him more vulnerable|摧毁兰洛克正在吸收的腐化力量源头，使其失去防备
Hint_RememberToFly: (Hold) {ItemMenuButton} + {UMGGadgetWheelMountSlot3} Equip Broom|（按住） +  装备扫帚
Hint_reparo_desc: Reparo can be used to repair broken items in the environment|“修复如初”可用于修复环境中的破损物品
Hint_ReparoReminder_desc: Reparo can repair broken items in the environment|“修复如初”可用于修复环境中的破损物品
Hint_RevelioLostPages_desc: Use Revelio to find the guide pages.|使用“原形立现”来找到指南书页。
Hint_stealthtakedown: Take down isolated enemies with Petrificus Totalus|利用统统石化解决落单的敌人
Hint_TalentPoints: You have unused Talent Points|你有可用天赋点
Hint_Telescope_Day: Astronomy Tables can only be interacted with at night|天文台只能在晚上进行互动
Hint_VenomousTentaculaLimitReached: You cannot place any more Venomous Tentaculas at this time.|你现在已经不能放置更多的毒触手了。
HintAlohomora:
Return additional moons to Gladwin Moon in order to learn higher levels of the Alohomora spell
为格拉德温·莫恩带去更多月亮以学习更高等级的阿拉霍洞开咒语
HintWrongSpell: Break shields with matching spell|使用对应的咒语打破护盾
Hippogriff_Byproduct_desc:
The feathers are shed by the fearsome and regal Hippogriffs typically inhabiting mountainous landscapes. A Hippogriff feather can be used to upgrade and assign traits to gear.
盘踞山峦之间的威严鹰马翼兽褪下的羽毛。鹰马翼兽的羽毛可用于强化装备和为其分配特质。
Hippogriff_desc:
The Hippogriff is a majestic beast with the front half of an eagle and the back half of a horse. The Hippogriff can soar great distances and commands the respect of anyone who dares to approach it.
鹰马翼兽是一头雄伟的野兽，前半身是鹰，后半身是马。鹰马翼兽可以翱翔很远的距离，并赢得任何敢于接近它的人的尊重。
HippogriffDen_desc: A den inhabited by Hippogriffs|鹰马翼兽居住的巢穴
HippogriffMount_desc:
Poppy's friend Highwing is a fiercely loyal and dependable Hippogriff. Highwing trusts you and will allow you to soar the skies on her back.
疾翼是帕比的好伙伴，也是一头忠诚而且可靠的鹰马翼兽。出于对你的信任，疾翼将允许你骑在她背上一同翱翔天空。
HippogriffOffspring_desc: A newly born Hippogriff|一头新生的鹰马翼兽
HiveMindJiraSave: Platform Reporting Information|平台报告信息
HM_3BroomsBar_desc:
A popular pub and inn renowned for its Butterbeers and warm atmosphere. A favourite among Hogwarts students.
一家受欢迎的酒吧及旅店，以其黄油啤酒和温暖的氛围而闻名。是霍格沃茨学生的最爱。
HM_AlbieWeekes: Spintwitches Sporting Needs|旋转女巫体育必需品
HM_AugustusHill: Gladrags Wizardwear|风雅牌巫师服装店
HM_BeastShop_desc: A beast supply shop stocked with the latest and greatest in beast byproducts|能够买到最新鲜最齐全的货物的野兽副产品店
HM_CalliopeSnelling: Madam Snelling's Tress Emporium|史奈林夫人的秀发商店
HM_CeridwensCauldrons: Ceridwen's Cauldrons|凯丽德温的炼药锅
HM_DervishnBanges: Dervish and Banges|德维斯和班斯
HM_DogweednDeathcap_desc: A plant shop for all sorts magical flora and seeds|出售各种魔法植物和种子的植物商店
HM_ExtortionistHideout_Dungeon_desc:
The primary gathering place for Rookwood's infamous band of nefarious extortionists
卢克伍德麾下臭名昭著的勒索犯们主要的碰头地点
HM_GladragsWizardwear: Gladrags Wizardwear|风雅牌巫师服装店
HM_GladragsWizardwear_desc:
A clothing shop for both the elegant and eccentric wizard. It has two additional locations in London and Paris.
优雅又古怪的巫师服装店。它在伦敦和巴黎有两个额外的地点。
HM_GladragsWizardwear|SWITCH: Gladrags Wizardwear|风雅牌巫师服装店
HM_HairdressingSalon: Madam Snelling's Tress Emporium|史奈林夫人的秀发商店
HM_HairdressingSalon_desc: A hairdressing salon run by Calliope Snelling that offers the latest hairstyles|由卡莉欧碧·斯奈林经营的美发沙龙，提供最新的发型
HM_Hogshead_desc: A pub and inn known for its unsavoury patrons and general uncleanliness|一家以讨厌的顾客和普遍的脏乱而闻名的酒吧及旅店
HM_Honeydukes_desc:
A sweet shop stocked with a variety of wizarding confections, but is known best for its fudge. It is, naturally, very popular with Hogwarts students.
一家出售各种魔法糖果的甜品店，但以软糖闻名。它自然很受霍格沃茨学生的欢迎。
HM_JPippensPotions_desc: An apothecary that carries a wide selection of potions and potions ingredients|携带各种魔药及魔药原料的药剂商
HM_MadamPuddifootsTea: Steepley and Sons|斯蒂普利父子
HM_MadamPuddifootsTea_desc:
Hogsmeade's local tea shop. It offers a wide selection of fine teas and confections.
霍格莫德当地的茶馆。店内售卖各类上等好茶与甜品。
HM_MagicNeep_desc: Hogsmeade's supplier of fresh produce, seeds and fertiliser|霍格莫德中新鲜农产品，种子与肥料的首选供应商
HM_Ollivanders_desc:
A branch of the renowned wand shop owned and operated by the Ollivander wandmaking family since 382 B.C.
自公元前382年起由奥利凡德魔杖制作家族拥有和经营的著名魔杖店的一家分店。
HM_PlayerShop: Hogsmeade shop location only for PlayStation® Consoles|仅适用于PlayStation®主机的霍格莫德商店位置
HM_PlayerShop_desc: The newest shop in Hogsmeade |霍格莫德最新的商店
HM_PostOffice: Hogsmeade Post Office|霍格莫德邮局
HM_QUIDDITCH: Spintwitches Sporting Needs|旋转女巫体育必需品
HM_ScrivenshaftsQuillShop: Scrivenshaft's Quill Shop|斯克里文舍夫的羽毛笔店
HM_ScrivenshaftsQuillShop_desc:
A quill shop with a selection of quills ranging from the very basic to the extravagant and charmed
一家羽毛笔店，提供各种羽毛笔，从最基本到最奢华迷人的都有
HM_Spintwitches: Spintwitches Sporting Needs|旋转女巫体育必需品
HM_Spintwitches_desc: A sporting goods shop that sells a variety of brooms|一家体育用品商店，出售各种扫帚
HM_TheGraveyard_desc: Where Hogsmeade residents who have passed are buried|去世的霍格莫德居民被埋葬的地方
HM_TheOldFool_desc: An abandoned old building in Hogsmeade|霍格莫德一座废弃的老建筑
HM_ThePlaza_desc: The central square in Hogsmeade|霍格莫德的中央广场
HM_ThreeBroomsticks_desc:
The Three Broomsticks Inn is the most esteemed pub in Hogsmeade, where conversation and Butterbeer flow freely.
三把扫帚是霍格莫德最受推崇的酒吧，在这里大家可以恣意畅谈、畅饮黄油啤酒。
HM_TomesnScrolls_desc: A specialty bookshop with wares that fulfil the promise of its name |名副其实的特色书店
HM_Zonkos_desc:
A joke and trick shop with a selection of pranking delights that include Biting Teacups, Inflatable Tongues and Dungbombs
一间玩笑与把戏商店，提供各种恶作剧乐趣，包括会咬人的茶杯、膨胀舌和粪弹
HOG_AstronomyTower_Desc:
The tallest tower in Hogwarts and the location where Astronomy class are conducted
霍格沃茨最高的塔和进行天文学课程的地点
HOG_ASTRONOMYTOWER_ROOMOFREQ: The Room of Requirement|有求必应屋
HOG_ASTRONOMYTOWER_ROOMOFREQ_desc:
A secret room suited to the seeker's needs – where a student can hone their Potion-Making, Herbology and Care of Beasts skills
能够回应有求之人的秘密房间，学生将可以在其中潜心磨砺魔药学、草药学以及野兽学方面的技能
HOG_AstronomyWingKL_desc:
The wing of Hogwarts comprising the Astronomy tower, the highest spire in Hogwarts, the Defence against the Dark Arts tower and the Transfiguration courtyard
霍格沃茨的侧区包括天文塔、霍格沃茨最高的尖塔、黑魔法防御术塔和变形学庭院
HOG_BellTowers_Desc: The large double towers|巨大的双塔
HOG_Boathouse_Desc:
The old wooden building used to store the boats that carry the first-years across the lake to the castle
一栋旧木屋，初来乍到的一年级新生们会乘坐着存放在里面的小船前往湖对岸的城堡。
HOG_BoathouseStairway_Desc: The stairway that leads to the Boathouse|通往船屋的楼梯
HOG_CentralTower_Desc: The tower that overlooks much of Hogwarts|俯瞰霍格沃茨大部分地区的塔
HOG_Class_Alchemy_desc: The classroom where students learn Alchemy|学生们学习炼金术的教室
HOG_Class_Arithmancy_desc: The classroom where students learn Arithmancy|学生们学习算术占卜的教室
HOG_Class_Astronomy_desc: The classroom where students learn about the many wonders of the stars above|学生了解天上繁星奇观的教室
HOG_Class_Charms_desc: The classroom where students learn to harness the power of Charms|学生学习利用魔咒力量的教室
HOG_Class_DADA: Defence Against the Dark Arts|黑魔法防御术
HOG_Class_DADA_Desc: The classroom where students learn Defence against the Dark Arts|学生们学习黑魔法防御术的教室
HOG_Class_Detention_Desc:
The dreary place where students are sent to serve out their punishment for breaking the rules
学生因违反规定而受到惩罚的沉闷地方
HOG_Class_Divination_Desc: The classroom where Divination students meet|占卜课的学生进行会面的教室
HOG_Class_Flying_desc: The classroom where students learn about Flying|学生们学习飞行的教室
HOG_Class_HistoryofMagic_desc: The classroom where students learn about the vast history of the magical world|学习魔法世界浩瀚历史的教室
HOG_Class_MagicalCreatures_desc:
The classroom where students learn about magical beasts and their various properties
学生们学习魔法野兽和它们各种习性的教室
HOG_Class_MuggleStudies_desc: The classroom where students learn about the history and lifestyles of Muggles|学生了解麻瓜历史和生活方式的教室
HOG_Class_Music_desc: The classroom where students attend Music class|学生上音乐课的教室
HOG_Class_Potions_desc: The classroom where students learn to brew magical mixtures|学生学习调制魔法混合物的教室
HOG_Class_Transfiguration_desc: The classroom where students hone their skills in Transfiguration|供学生们研习变形学的教室
HOG_ClockTower_Desc:
One of the oldest and most recognisable towers of Hogwarts, notable for its signature clock
霍格沃茨最古老知名的其中一座高塔，以其标志性的时钟而闻名
HOG_ClockTowerCourtyard_Desc: The courtyard under the shadow of the Clock Tower|钟楼阴影下的庭院
HOG_DADATower: Defence Against the Dark Arts Tower|黑魔法防御术塔
HOG_DADATower_Desc: The tower where the Defence Against the Dark Arts class is held|黑魔法防御术授课所在的塔楼
HOG_EntranceHall_Desc: The elegant entrance hall of Hogwarts|霍格沃茨优雅的礼堂入口
HOG_EntranceWingKL_desc:
The Bell Tower Wing of Hogwarts, comprising the Bell Tower Entrance Hall, the Bell Towers and the North Hall
霍格沃茨钟塔区，包括钟塔门厅、钟塔和北厅
HOG_FacultyTower_Desc: The tower reserved for professors|为教授保留的塔
HOG_Garden_Desc: The enchanting garden of Hogwarts|霍格沃茨迷人的花园
HOG_GRANDSTAIRCASEKL: The Grand Staircase Tower|大理石楼梯塔楼
HOG_GrandstaircaseKL_desc:
The area of Hogwarts featuring the Grand Staircase, the Quad Courtyard, Ravenclaw Tower and the Slytherin Dungeons
霍格沃茨中涵盖大理石楼梯、群塔庭院、拉文克劳塔楼以及斯莱特林地牢的区域
HOG_GrandStaircaseTower_Desc: The large, main staircase of Hogwarts|霍格沃茨的大型主要阶梯
HOG_GreatHall_Desc: The magnificent hall where students gather to eat meals and socialise|学生们聚在一起吃饭和社交的宏伟礼堂
HOG_GreatHall_Gryffindor_Desc: The table where members of Gryffindor house eat|供格兰芬多学院的学生们就餐的长桌
HOG_GreatHall_Hufflepuff_Desc: The table where members of Hufflepuff house eat|供赫奇帕奇学院的学生们就餐的长桌
HOG_GreatHall_Ravenclaw_Desc: The table where members of Ravenclaw house eat|供拉文克劳学院的学生们就餐的长桌
HOG_GreatHall_Slytherin_Desc: The table where members of Slytherin house eat|供斯莱特林学院的学生们就餐的长桌
HOG_GreatHallKL_desc:
The magnificent hall where students gather to eat meals and socialise. The area also comprises the boathouse, viaduct courtyard and Hufflepuff common room.
供学生们享用美食与社交的宏伟厅堂。该区域同时包含了船屋、拱桥庭院以及赫奇帕奇公共休息室。
HOG_Greenhouses_Desc: Home to a variety of magical plants and Herbology classes|各种魔法植物及草药学课程的所在地
HOG_GroundsQ_desc: The grounds surrounding Hogwarts|霍格沃茨周围的场地
Hog_Gryffindor_CommonRoom: Gryffindor Common Room|格兰芬多公共休息室
Hog_Gryffindor_CommonRoom_desc: The room where the members of Gryffindor gather and socialise|格兰芬多成员聚集和社交的地方
HOG_GryffindorLowerHallway: Gryffindor Lower Hallway|格兰芬多下部走廊
HOG_GryffindorTower_Desc: The tower that houses Gryffindor students|格兰芬多学生的高塔
HOG_HospitalWing_Desc: The school wing where sick and injured students are treated|治疗生病和受伤学生的校区
Hog_Hufflepuff_CommonRoom: Hufflepuff Common Room|赫奇帕奇公共休息室
Hog_Hufflepuff_CommonRoom_desc: The room where the members of Hufflepuff gather and socialise|赫奇帕奇成员聚集和社交的地方
HOG_HufflepuffBasement_Desc: The basement that houses Hufflepuff students|赫奇帕奇学生的地下室
HOG_Kitchens_Desc: The large room where house-elves prepare every meal|家养小精灵准备每一餐的大场所
HOG_Library_Desc:
The place that contains information on every conceivable subject in the wizarding world
这里包含魔法世界中所有可想到之主题的资讯
HOG_Library_MainDesk: Librarian's Desk|图书管理员的办公桌
HOG_Library_MainDesk_Desc: The desk that belongs to the Librarian|属于图书管理员的办公桌
HOG_Library_Restricted_desc:
The part of the library that is forbidden to students because it contains books on subjects too dangerous to be taught at Hogwarts.
图书馆中禁止学生进入的区域，因为其中包含的书籍过于危险，无法在霍格沃茨教导。
HOG_LIBRARYANNEXKL: The Library Annex|图书馆附属楼
HOG_LibraryAnnexKL_desc:
The Hogwarts library contains information on nearly every conceivable subject in the wizarding world. This area also incudes the greenhouses, the viaduct bridge, and the viaduct entrance.
霍格沃茨图书馆中能够找到有关魔法世界中几乎所有已知领域的信息。该区域同时包含了温室、拱桥以及拱桥入口。
HOG_LibraryStorage: Library Storage Room|图书馆储藏间
HOG_LibraryStorage_desc: A storage room for library materials and supplies|用于存放各类图书馆材料与用具的储藏间
HOG_MagicalCreatures_Desc: The classroom where students attend Beasts class|学生上野兽学课程的教室
HOG_Map_Ravenclaw_GirlStairs: Ravenclaw Girls' Dormitory Stairs|拉文克劳女子宿舍阶梯
HOG_MAP_RAVENCLAW_MAINSTAIRS: Ravenclaw Main Stairs|拉文克劳主楼梯
HOG_NorthHall_Desc: The north hallway of Hogwarts|霍格沃茨北走廊
HOG_NorthTower_Desc: One of the smaller towers of Hogwarts|霍格沃茨较小的其中一个塔
HOG_Office_AbrahamRonen: Professor Ronen's Office|罗南教授的办公室
HOG_Office_AbrahamRonen_Desc: The office and study of Professor Ronen|罗南教授的办公室和研究室
HOG_Office_AesopSharp: Professor Sharp's Office|夏普教授的办公室
HOG_Office_AesopSharp_Desc: The office and study of Professor Sharp|夏普教授的办公室和研究室
HOG_Office_BaiHowin: Professor Howin's Office|皓莺教授的办公室
HOG_Office_BaiHowin_Desc: The office and study of Professor Howin|皓莺教授的办公室和研究室
HOG_Office_CuthbertBinns: Professor Binns's Office|芮斯教授的办公室
HOG_Office_CuthbertBinns_Desc: The office and study of Professor Binns|芮斯教授的办公室和研究室
HOG_Office_DinahHecat: Professor Hecat's Office|赫卡特教授的办公室
HOG_Office_DinahHecat_Desc: The office and study of Professor Hecat|赫卡特教授的办公室和研究室
HOG_Office_ElizaMokuwa: Madam Kogawa's Office|古川夫人的办公室
HOG_Office_ElizaMokuwa_Desc: The office and study of Madam Kogawa|古川夫人的办公室兼书房

HOG_Office_Fig_Desc: The office and study of Professor Fig|菲戈教授的办公室和研究室
HOG_Office_FigCin: The office and study of Professor Fig|菲戈教授的办公室兼书房

HOG_Office_IrisAlhambra_Desc: The office and study of Professor Hecat|赫卡特教授的办公室兼书房
HOG_Office_MariAsuka: Madam Kogawa's Office|古川夫人的办公室
HOG_Office_MariAsuka_Desc: The office and study of Madam Kogawa|古川夫人的办公室兼书房
HOG_Office_MatildaWeasley: Professor Weasley's Office|韦斯莱教授的办公室
HOG_Office_MatildaWeasley_Desc: The office and study of Professor Weasley|韦斯莱教授的办公室和研究室
HOG_Office_MirabelGarlick: Professor Garlick's Office|加里克教授的办公室
HOG_Office_MirabelGarlick_Desc: The office and study of Professor Garlick|加里克教授的办公室和研究室
HOG_Office_MudiwaOnai: Professor Onai's Office|欧奈教授的办公室
HOG_Office_MudiwaOnai_Desc: The office and study of Professor Onai|欧奈教授的办公室和研究室
HOG_Office_PhineasBlack_Desc: The office of the Headmaster of Hogwarts|霍格沃茨校长办公室
HOG_Office_PhineasBlackEntrance: Headmaster's Office Entrance|校长办公室的入口
HOG_Office_PhineasBlackEntrance_desc: The entrance to the Headmaster's office|校长办公室的入口
HOG_Office_SamirShaw: Professor Shah's Office|沙阿教授的办公室
HOG_Office_SamirShaw_Desc: The office and study of Professor Shah|沙阿教授的办公室和研究室
HOG_OwlCorridor_desc: A secret corridor|一处秘密回廊
HOG_Owlery_Desc: The room where the school's owls and students' owls live|供学校公用的与学生自己的猫头鹰们居住的房间
HOG_Owlery_SecretRoom_desc: The room that Richard Jackdaw used during his time at Hogwarts|理查德·捷克道尔在霍格沃茨期间使用的房间
HOG_PIP_FrameLibrary_desc: An old library|一座老图书馆
HOG_PondDock_desc: The dock leading to the pond|通往池塘的码头
HOG_PotionsClassroom_Desc: The shadowy dungeon where Potions is held|充当魔药学教室的阴暗地牢
HOG_QuadEastHall_Desc: The East hallway that leads to the Quad Courtyard|通往方庭的东走廊
HOG_QuadNorthHall_Desc: The North hallway that leads to the Quad Courtyard|通往方庭的北走廊
HOG_QuadSouthHall_Desc: The south hallway that leads to the Quad Courtyard|通往方庭的南走廊
HOG_Ravenclaw_CommonRoom: Ravenclaw Common Room|拉文克劳公共休息室
HOG_Ravenclaw_CommonRoom_Desc: The room where the members of Ravenclaw gather and socialise|拉文克劳成员聚集和社交的地方
HOG_RavenclawTower_Desc: The tower that serves as the home of Ravenclaw house|拉文克劳学院所在的塔楼
HOG_RoomofReqHidden_Desc: The hidden room that can only be opened if there is a need|只会向心怀所求之人敞开的秘密房间
HOG_Sanctum_Desc: The large ornate cavern formed by mysterious forces|由神秘力量形成的华丽大洞穴
HOG_Sanctum_Guardian1: Percival Rackham|波西瓦尔·拉克汉姆
HOG_Sanctum_Guardian1_desc:
Percival Rackham recognised the problems that would arise from the wizarding world having access to powerful magic and gathered a team to address them.
波西瓦尔·拉克汉姆认识到具有强大法力的魔法世界可能会产生的麻烦，并召集了一支团队来解决这些问题。
HOG_Sanctum_Guardian2_desc: Charles Rookwood was a Keeper|查尔斯·卢克伍德是一名守护者
HOG_Sanctum_Guardian3_desc:
Twig was an adept student at Hogwarts who was enlisted by Percival Rackham to help address the problem of ancient powerful magic.
嫩枝是一名优秀的霍格沃茨的学生，受到珀西瓦尔·拉克汉征募来协助解决古代强大魔法的问题。
HOG_Sanctum_Guardian4_desc:
San Bakar was a pilgrim who ended up at Hogwarts, and was enlisted by Percival Rackham to help address the problem of ancient powerful magic.
森·巴卡尔是一名前来霍格沃茨的朝圣者，并受到波西瓦尔·拉克汉姆征募来协助解决古代强大魔法的问题。
HOG_Sanctum_Guardian5: Isidora the Bold|胆大的伊西多拉
HOG_Sanctum_Guardian5_desc:
Isidora is a fierce and powerful witch who was enlisted by Percival Rackham to help address the problem of ancient powerful magic.
伊西多拉是一名凶猛强大的女巫，受到珀西瓦尔·拉克汉征募来协助解决古代强大魔法的问题。
HOG_SanctumEntrance_Hog: Map Chamber Entrance|地图密室入口
HOG_SanctumEntrance_Hog_Desc: The entrance to the Map Chamber|地图密室的入口
HOG_SanctumEntrance_OL_Desc: A mysterious entryway accessible only via the push of a hidden brick|神秘的入口通道，只能通过推动隐藏的砖块进入
HOG_Slytherin_CommonRoom: Slytherin Common Room|斯莱特林公共休息室
HOG_SuspensionBridge_Desc: The suspension bridge of Hogwarts|霍格沃茨的吊桥
HOG_TrophyRoom_desc:
The Hogwarts trophy room, where memorialised accomplishments from throughout the ages can be seen on display
霍格沃茨奖杯室，可以看到各个时代事迹的纪念品
HOG_UndergroundHarbor_Desc: The place where the first-years arrive via boat to Hogwarts|一年级新生乘船抵达霍格沃茨的地点
HOG_ViaductBridge_Desc: The large stone bridge that spans a large chasm|横跨大深坑的大石桥
HOG_ViaductCourtyard_Desc: The entrance courtyard of Hogwarts|霍格沃茨的入口庭院
HOG_ViaductEntrance_Desc: The entrance to the Viaduct|拱桥的入口
Hogsmeade_Desc: The only all-wizarding village in Britain|英国唯一的全巫师村
Hogsmeade_Dungeon_01: The Tomb of the Villager|村民之墓
Hogsmeade_Dungeon_01_desc:
A tomb belonging to a Hogsmeade villager that seems to have attracted the attention of some of Rookwood's lot
原本属于某位霍格莫德居民的墓穴，不知道为何却吸引了卢克伍德手下的注意
Hogsmeade_dungeon_02_desc:
Alfred Lawley's cellar, rumoured to contain a prized Venomous Tentacula and various Herbological supplies
阿尔弗雷德·洛莱家的地窖，据说里面有洛莱珍藏的毒触手以及大量植被药草。

Hogwarts_DadaTower_FigOfficeNoteSpavin: Letter to Fig from the Minister|魔法部长给菲戈的信
Hogwarts_DadaTower_FigOfficeNoteSpavin_d: A letter to Professor Fig from Minister for Magic Spavin|魔法部部长斯帕文寄给菲戈教授的信
Hogwarts_DadaTower_HecatOfficeNote: Note from Madam Kogawa|古川夫人的字条
Hogwarts_DadaTower_HecatOfficeNote_desc: A note to Professor Hecat from Madam Kogawa|古川夫人留给赫卡特教授的字条
Hogwarts_DadaTower_Notice: Faculty Gathering Notice|教职工聚会通知
Hogwarts_DadaTower_Notice_desc: A notice from Professor Black about a faculty gathering|布莱克教授关于组织教职工聚会的通知
Hogwarts_DadaTower_RonenOfficeNote_desc: A lesson plan written by Professor Ronen|罗南教授撰写的教案

Hogwarts_DadaTower_ShahPersonalNote1_des: A letter to Professor Shah from M. P. N. Carneirus|M. P. N. 卡奈鲁斯寄给萨哈教授的信

HogwartsProtector_desc:
These statues have been animated to protect things of great value, but adept witches and wizards might be able to overcome them.
这些被魔法唤醒的雕像保护着重要之物，但是能力过人的女巫与巫师们也许能够找到战胜这些敌人的方法。
HorklumpJuice_desc:
Small creatures that resemble mushrooms. Their juice is used in Wiggenweld Potion. They tend to hide underground.
外形酷似蘑菇的小型生物。它们的汁水能够用于调配振奋魔药。霍普拉肯平常喜欢躲在阴暗的地下。
HouseElves_Desc:
House-elves are magical beings that are seemingly devoted to wizarding masters or mistresses.
家养小精灵是一种会永远忠心耿耿服务主人的魔法生物。
housetoken_desc: A token specific to each house.|对应每个学院的特殊硬币。

HST_01_01_Castlebreaking_FollowNatty_Jou:
Now that we are past the gate, Natty is heading for the castle keep. I should follow her.
现在我们已经过了大门，娜娜正向城堡要塞走去。我应该跟着她。
HST_01_Castlebreaking_MissionAvailable_T: Meet Natty near Falbarton Castle|在法尔巴顿城堡附近与娜娜见面
HST_01_Castlebreaking_QuestActive_StepJo:
I need to complete Professor Garlick's assignment before I can continue with this quest.
我需要先完成加里克教授布置的作业，之后才能继续推进这项任务。

The main gate is locked. I should look for a way to climb the walls of the battlements and enter the Gatehouse.
正门是锁着的。我得想办法爬上城垛的墙壁，进入门房。

I need to find a way into the Gatehouse without attracting attention. Hopefully I can then find a way to let Natty inside.
我需要在不引起注意的情况下找到进入门房的方法。希望我能找到并让娜娜进去。

I need to open the gate long enough for Natty to get inside. Perhaps it can be manipulated with a spell.
我需要把门打开足够长的时间让娜娜进去。也许它可以用咒语来操纵。

I was able to get the gate open long enough for Natty to slip inside. I should follow her lead. I just hope she knows what she’s doing.
我让门打开了足够长的时间并让娜娜溜了进去。我应该跟随她的指引。我只希望她知道自己在做什么。

I can’t believe I missed my chance to slip through the doors with Natty. I’ll need to find another way inside and try to make my way to the roof.
我不敢相信我错过了和娜娜一起溜进大门的机会。我得另找条路进去，然后试着爬上屋顶。

This is amazing! What a magnificent creature! This is quite different than flying on a broom. I should probably pay attention to what I’m doing before I fall off.
这真是太了不起了！多么壮丽的生物！这与乘坐扫帚飞行完全不同。在我跌落之前，我看来得多加注意自己的所作所为。
HST_01_Castlebreaking_QuestActive_TaskOb: Open the main gate|打开正门
Get to the roof|抵达屋顶
Follow Natty on Highwing |在疾翼上跟随娜娜
HST_01_Castlebreaking_QuestAvailable_Jou:
I received an owl from Natty Onai asking that I meet her near the castle ruins leading into the Forest and not tell anyone. I wonder what she wants.
我从娜娜·欧奈那里收到一只猫头鹰，要我在通往森林的城堡废墟附近与她会面，并且不要告诉任何人。我很想知道她要说什么。
HST_01_Castlebreaking_QuestAvailable_Req: You must learn Wingardium Leviosa before you can start this quest|你必须先学习“羽加迪姆·勒维奥萨”，然后才能开始此任务
HST_01_Castlebreaking_QuestAvailable_Ste: Natty is waiting for me near a castle ruin.|娜娜正在城堡废墟附近等我。
HST_01_Castlebreaking_QuestComplete_Jour:
What an adventure! It began when I met Natty near some old castle ruins. She told me how she had followed Theophilus Harlow to the Hog's Head and noticed him reading a letter bearing Rookwood’s seal. She wanted to get that letter to bring to Officer Singer as proof of Harlow and Rookwood's collusion, so she followed Harlow to Falbarton Castle. On our way inside, we saw that the poachers had captured Highwing and another Hippogriff. Together, Natty and I rescued the Hippogriffs from the poachers and got away with the incriminating letter, which Natty plans to deliver to the Officer Singer and bring Rookwood and Harlow to justice.
多么精彩的一次冒险！当我在某个古老的城堡废墟附近遇到娜娜时，事情就开始了。她告诉了我她是如何跟着修菲利乌斯·哈罗尔来到猪头酒吧，并注意到他当时正在阅读一封带有卢克伍德印章的信。她想把那封信带给辛格警官，作为哈罗尔和卢克伍德勾结的证据，所以她跟着哈罗尔去了法尔巴顿城堡。在我们尝试进去的时候，我们看到盗猎者已经抓获了疾翼和另一只鹰马翼兽。娜娜和我一起从盗猎者手中救出了鹰马翼兽，并拿到了那封写有罪证的信，娜娜计划将这封信交给辛格警官，并将卢克伍德和哈罗尔绳之以法。

Imperio_desc:
Temporarily forces enemies to fight as if they were your companion. While under your control, they take reduced damage from other enemies to prolong their allegiance to you. Also curses the victim – and cursed enemies take extra damage.
暂时强迫敌人像同伴一样为你而战。其他敌人将对受你控制的目标造成更少伤害，这将使其能够更长久地“效忠”于你。除此以外还将使受害者被诅咒并承受额外伤害。
Imperio_gameplay_desc:

Incendio_desc:
Its range is short and requires you to be close to the target. This spell deals significant damage and lights certain objects on fire. Enemies hit with fire-based attacks will continue to take damage for a few seconds, during which time collisions will result in incendiary bursts.
较短的射程使得施放时需要与目标保持较近距离。这种咒语能够造成大量伤害，并且能够点燃特定物体。遭到火属性攻击命中的敌人将会在几秒内持续承受伤害，在此期间如果遭受剧烈撞击还将引发火焰迸发。

InferiKL_desc:
An Inferius is a corpse that has been reanimated and is controlled by a Dark wizard
阴尸是一具复活的尸体，由黑巫师控制
InferiLair_desc: A den inhabited by Inferi|阴尸居住的巢穴
Inferius_desc:
Though invulnerable to most types of damage, Inferi cannot abide warmth and light and are therefore susceptible to fire.

After an Inferius has been burned, other damaging attacks will have full effect, providing a few more options to destroy these abominations.

A burning Inferius's impending attack provides the perfect opportunity to capitalise on the explosive power of Bombarda.
虽然能够轻松抵御绝大多数类型的伤害，光芒与温暖却是阴尸的天敌，因此它们极其怕火。

在阴尸着火后，其他类型的攻击就能够对其造成完整伤害，通过这种方式，你在摧毁这些畸形造物时也将拥有多种选择。

燃烧的阴尸即将发动的攻击，为利用“大爆爆”的爆炸力提供了绝佳机会。
Inferius_tip_four_desc:

INT_01_BasicCastStatues_TaskObj: Tap {Stupefy} to destroy statues with Basic Cast|点击，以使用基础施法摧毁雕像
INT_01_CP1_Intro_Journal01:
Professor Fig and I have travelled via Portkey to a remote cliffside in the Scottish Highlands. We need to explore the mysterious ruins that we suspect the Portkey was meant to lead us to.
菲戈教授和我已通过“门钥匙”抵达了一个偏远的悬崖边，似乎位于苏格兰高地。我们需要探索“门钥匙”引导我们前往的神秘遗迹。
INT_01_CP1_Intro_Task1: Follow Professor Fig|跟随菲戈教授
INT_01_CP1_Intro_Task2: Destroy the magical barrier|摧毁魔法屏障
INT_01_CP1_Intro_Task3: Follow Professor Fig|跟随菲戈教授
INT_01_CP2_Intro_ContinueFurther_TaskObj: Continue further into the vault|继续进入秘库
INT_01_CP2_Intro_FollowFig_TaskObj02a: Follow Professor Fig|跟随菲戈教授
INT_01_CP2_Intro_Journal02:
While searching through a ruined castle in the Scottish Highlands, I happened upon a strange glowing doorway made of crystallised stone. Suddenly Professor Fig and I found ourselves in an ornate vestibule. We remain unsure of what we will find.
在苏格兰高地的废墟中搜索时，我偶然发现了一个由水晶石制成的奇怪玄关，似乎在微微发着光。突然，菲戈教授和我发现我们身处一个华丽的庭室之中。我们仍不确定我们来这里能找到什么。
INT_01_CP2_Intro_Task6: Follow Professor Fig|跟随菲戈教授
INT_01_CP2_Intro_Task9: Proceed into the vault|进入秘库
INT_01_CP3_Intro_AMHotSpot_TaskObj03b: Connect with ancient magic|感应古代魔法
INT_01_CP3_Intro_FollowFig_TaskObj03a: Follow Professor Fig|跟随菲戈教授
INT_01_CP3_Intro_Journal03:
After entering the vault, we quickly realised that it was empty. I saw a glowing symbol on a hidden door – the same symbol from the Portkey container. When we tried to open the door, we suddenly found ourselves transported to a vast expanse of darkness. We believe we're still in Gringotts, but this is certainly no ordinary vault.
进入秘库后，我们很快意识到它是空的。我在隐藏门上看到了一个发光的符号——与门钥匙匣子中相同的符号。当我们试图打开门时，我们突然发现自己被传送到了一片广阔的黑暗中。我们相信自己仍然在古灵阁中，但这肯定不是普通的秘库。
INT_01_CP3_Intro_Task10: Stay Close to Professor Fig|跟在菲戈教授身边
INT_01_CP3_Intro_Task12: Determine how to proceed|确定如何进行
INT_01_CP3_Intro_Task14: Discover the statue's secret|发现雕像的秘密
INT_01_CP4_Intro_Journal04:
While searching through the darkness, we came upon a statue whose reflection was only visible to me. When I aligned the statue with its reflection, it attacked. 
在黑暗中寻找时，我们发现了一尊雕像，它的倒影只有我能看见。当我将雕像与它的倒影对齐时，它发起了攻击。
INT_01_CP4_Intro_Task15: Cast and hold Lumos|施展并维持“荧光闪烁”
INT_01_CP4_Intro_Task16: Align the statue with its reflection|将雕像与其倒影对齐
INT_01_CP4_Intro_Task18: Find Professor Fig|找到菲戈教授
INT_01_CP5_Intro_Journal05:
After the statues attacked us, the debris that was left behind began swirling about. In the chaos, I somehow became separated from Professor Fig. I've no idea where he is – or where I am, for that matter.
在雕像袭击了我们之后，地上的碎片开始飞舞。在混乱中，我不知何故与菲戈教授分开了。我不知道他在哪里——或者说，我在哪里。
INT_01_CP5_Intro_Task21: Find Professor Fig |找到菲戈教授
INT_01_Intro_AncientPath: The Path to Hogwarts|霍格沃茨之途
INT_01_Intro_QuestAvailable_Journal:
Our journey to Hogwarts was interrupted by a dragon that destroyed our carriage. Professor Fig saved us by grabbing hold of the Portkey that I had just discovered. We suddenly found ourselves in a curious location that begged to be explored.
有条龙摧毁了我们的马车，并打断我们前往霍格沃茨的旅程。菲戈教授抓住我刚刚发现的门钥匙并救了我们。我们赫然发现自己身处一个奇异且需要探索的地方。
INT_01_Intro_QuestAvailable_TaskFail_Rea: You abandoned Professor Fig|你抛弃了菲戈教授
INT_01_Intro_QuestAvailable_TaskFail_War: Don't stray too far from Professor Fig|不要离菲戈教授太远
INT_01_Intro_QuestComplete_Journal:
After a dragon attacked our carriage to Hogwarts, Professor Fig and I happened upon a private entrance to Gringotts Wizarding Bank that was only visible to me. In one of the bank's oldest vaults, we witnessed a Pensieve memory, left behind by an ancient wizard called Percival Rackham, who could see the same sorts of magic that I see. A goblin called Ranrok tried to take the locket we'd found, but we narrowly escaped with it and our lives. It seems the fate of the entire wizarding world may rest on my shoulders. I have much to learn at Hogwarts, and not much time to do it.
在一条龙袭击了我们前往霍格沃茨的马车后，我和菲戈教授碰巧来到了只有我能看到的古灵阁巫师银行的一处私人入口。在银行其中一个极古老的金库中，我们目睹了冥想盆的记忆，由一位名叫波西瓦尔·拉克汉姆的古代巫师所留下，他可以看到与我所见相同的魔法。一个名叫兰洛克的妖精试图夺走我们找到的匣子，但我们侥幸逃过一劫。看来整个巫师世界的命运都落在了我的肩上。我在霍格沃茨有很多东西要学，且时间有限。
INT_01_ProtegoCast_TaskObj: Protego {Protego} incoming enemy attacks ({0}/{1})|用“盔甲护身”抵御来袭的攻击
INT_01_StupefyCast_TaskObj: Hold Protego {Protego} to Stupefy counter enemies ({0}/{1})|按住“盔甲护身”来发动“昏昏倒地”，反击敌人
INT_02_CP1_Intro_Journal01:
After I interacted with a wall of crystallised stone in ruins overlooking the sea, Professor Fig and I have suddenly found ourselves in an opulent vestibule. Perhaps I should explore.
在俯瞰汪洋的废墟之中，我找到了一面由奇怪晶石构成的墙体，接触之后，我和菲戈教授就发现自己来到了一处宏伟华丽的庭室之中。也许我该好好调查一下这个地方。
INT_02_CP1_Intro_Journal02:
Professor Fig and I found ourselves in a private entrance to Gringotts. A goblin banker escorted us to vault number 12 and locked us inside. We'll have to move through it to find our way out.
菲戈教授和我发现我们自己来到了古灵阁的一处私人入口。一位妖精银行家领着我们来到了12号金库，并把我们锁在了里面。我们只能自己想办法出去了。

InvisibilityPotion_Desc:
The drinker turns invisible, causing enemies to immediately lose sight of them – the drinker is then imperceptible for a period of time
服下后将隐身并立刻使敌人无法看见自身，之后服用者将在魔药作用时间内处于无法被察觉的状态
IonaMorgan_desc:
After graduating Hogwarts, Iona Morgan was turned out by her emotionally abusive family. Looking to her old friends from school, she found a new family and home in the Poacher Pack.
从霍格沃茨毕业之后，艾欧娜·摩根便选择了逃离让自己受尽情感压抑与折磨的家庭。投靠原来在学校里认识的旧友之后，盗猎者就成了她的新家。
IsidoraMorganachsMemories: Isidora Morganach's memories|伊西多拉·莫佳娜的回忆
Item_InventoryFull: Your tool wheel slots are full!|你的工具轮栏位已满！
Jobberknoll_Byproduct_desc:
The feathers are shed by the blue speckled Jobberknolls inhabiting the area near Hogwarts. Jobberknoll feathers can be used to upgrade and assign traits to gear.
从居住在霍格沃茨附近的蓝斑绝音鸟身上褪下的羽毛。绝音鸟的羽毛可用于强化装备和为其分配特质。
Jobberknoll_desc:
A Jobberknoll is a small speckled bluebird, which never makes any noise until the moment of its death.
绝音鸟是一种小型且有斑点的蓝鸟，直到它死亡的那一刻才会发出声音。
JobberknollDen_desc: A den inhabited by Jobberknolls|绝音鸟居住的巢穴
JobberknollOffspring_desc: A newly born Jobberknoll|一只新生的绝音鸟
JonathanEldridge: Jonathan Eldridge|乔纳森·埃尔德里奇
Kestrel_desc: A Kestrel is a common bird of prey.|红隼是一种常见的猛禽。
KEYOFADMITTANCE: The Key of Admittance|准入之钥
KeyOfAdmittance_desc: A key engraved with the symbols of a book and quill|表面刻着书与羽毛笔符号的钥匙
Kneazle_Byproduct_desc:
The fur is shed by the magical and keen Kneazles typically inhabiting mountainous landscapes. Kneazle fur can be used to upgrade and assign traits to gear.
猫狸子毛，这些敏锐的魔法野兽通常居住于山间。猫狸子毛可用于强化装备和为其分配特质。
Kneazle_Desc:
Kneazles are cat-like beasts that have large ears and a plumed tail. They can be aggressive, but if they like a witch or wizard, they make exceptional pets. Kneazles are highly intelligent and have an ability to detect suspicious or distrustful people.
猫狸子是一种形似家猫的野兽，它们长着大大的耳朵与毛茸茸的尾巴。虽然存在攻击性，但如果看好哪位女巫或者是巫师，猫狸子便能成为绝佳的宠物。猫狸子拥有高度智慧，而且能够一眼分辨出可疑或者是不值得信任之人。
KneazleOffspring_desc: A newly born Kneazle|一只刚出生的猫狸子
KniezelDen_desc: A den inhabited by Kneazles|猫狸子居住的巢穴
Knotgrass_Byproduct_Desc:
Sprigs used in the Invisibility Potion. Knotgrass seeds can be purchased at The Magic Neep. Can be grown in pots of any size.
用于制作隐形魔药的细枝。可以在神奇萝卜购买两耳草种子。可在任何大小的花盆中种植。
Knotgrass_Desc:
A magical herb that produces sprigs used in the Invisibility Potion. Knotgrass seeds can be purchased at The Magic Neep. Can be grown in pots of any size.
这种魔法药草的细枝能够用于调配隐形魔药。可以在神奇萝卜购买两耳草种子。可在任何大小的花盆中种植。
Knotgrass_Seed_Desc: Unlocks the ability to grow Knotgrass in small pots|解锁使用小型花盆种植两耳草的能力
KnotgrassPlant_Desc:
This bright green plant is used in various potions but is most widely known for being an essential ingredient in the Polyjuice Potion. It can also be brewed with honey to make a rich and sweet Knotgrass Mead.
这种亮绿色植物能够用于制作多种魔药，但其中最广为人知的用途还是调配复方汤剂。与蜂蜜一同烹煮后便能获得味道浓郁香甜的两耳草蜜酒。
Knuts_desc: Bronze wizard currency|青铜材质的魔法世界货币
LacewingFlies_desc: Delicate wings used in the Focus Potion. They're commonly found in open fields.|拥有纤细翅膀的飞虫，能够用于制作专注魔药。常见于开阔原野。
LeapingToadstool_Byproduct_desc:
Mushrooms that leap serendipitously and are used in the Invisibility Potion. They are commonly found in forested area.
一种时不时会跃动起来的蘑菇，能够用于制作隐形魔药。常见于森林区域。
LeapingToadstool_desc: A Leaping Toadstool is a small, magical mushroom that is able to hop around|跳跳伞菌是一种能够跳来跳去的魔法小蘑菇
LearnToApparate_desc: Learn how to disappear from one location and reappear in another|学习如何从一处消失，并在另一处重新现身
LeechJuice_desc:
Leech juice is used in both the Maxima Potion and Thunderbrew. This can be found near waterfronts. 
用于调配终极魔药与雷酿的蚂蟥汁。可以在靠近水边的地方找到

Legend_Alter_floor: Apply / (HOLD) Apply to all Floors|应用/（按住）应用至所有地板
Legend_Alter_wall: Apply / (HOLD) Apply to All Walls and Bookshelves|应用/（按住）应用至所有墙壁和书架
Legend_Alter_window: Apply / (HOLD) Apply to all Windows|应用/（按住）应用至所有窗户

Legend_EnableMenuReader: Enable Menu Reader|启用菜单阅读器
Legend_ExitFieldGuide: Exit Field Guide|退出实战指南

Legend_GoBackToDungeonMap: Go back to Dungeon Map|返回地牢地图
Legend_GoToDungeonMap: Go to Dungeon Map|前往地牢地图

Legend_MapGoToQuestLog: Open Quest Log|打开任务日志

Legend_MoveRedSpark: Move Red Spark|移动红色火星

Legend_RotateUpperDial: Rotate Upper Dial|旋转上方刻度盘
LEGEND_SAVEGAME_DELETE: Delete Saved Game|删除已保存的游戏
LEGEND_SAVEGAME_NEWSLOT: Save Game to New Slot|保存游戏至新栏位
LEGEND_SAVEGAME_OVERWRITE: Overwrite Saved Game|覆盖已保存的游戏
Legend_TravelClosest: Fast Travel to the closest location for the current hovered quest on map|快速穿梭至地图上最近的地点，以进行当前接下的任务
Legend_ViewCreatureDetails: View beast details|查看野兽详情
LeopoldBabcocke: Leopold Babcocke|里奥波特·巴卜卡克
Levioso_desc:
Levitates objects and enemies. Useful for solving puzzles and surprising enemies alike.
使物体与敌人处于飘浮状态。适合用来破解谜题，或者在战斗中出奇制胜。
Levioso_gameplay_desc:
Levitates objects and enemies. Useful for solving puzzles and surprising enemies alike.
使物体与敌人处于飘浮状态。适合用来破解谜题，或者在战斗中出奇制胜。
lifeathogwarts: Life At Hogwarts|霍格沃茨的生活
Lighthouse_01: Attend your first day at Hogwarts|参与在霍格沃茨的首日
Lighthouse_02: Regroup with Professor Fig|与菲戈教授重新汇合
Lighthouse_03: Find the secret in the Restricted Section|在禁书区发现秘密
Lighthouse_04: Live as a student until Professor Fig returns|像学生一样生活直到菲戈教授回来
Lighthouse_05: Tell Professor Fig about the Map Chamber|告诉菲戈教授关于地图密室的事
Lighthouse_06: Complete the first Keeper trial|完成首场守护者试炼
Lighthouse_07: Improve your magical abilities to access the next trial|精进你的魔法能力以访问下个试炼
Lighthouse_08: Prepare for your search for the next Keeper|准备寻找下一名守护者
Lighthouse_08|SWITCH: Complete the first Keeper trial|完成首场守护者试炼
Lighthouse_09: Prepare for your search for the final Keeper|准备寻找最后一名守护者
Lighthouse_09|SWITCH:
Improve your magical abilities to access the next trial
精进你的魔法能力以访问下个试炼
Lighthouse_10: Stop Ranrok and Rookwood|阻止兰洛克及卢克伍德
Lighthouse_11: Prepare for your O.W.L.s|准备你的普通巫师等级考试
Lighthouse_13: Prepare for your O.W.L.s|准备你的普通巫师等级考试
LinkHPFCInfo: Link Harry Potter Fan Club Info|关联哈利·波特粉丝俱乐部的资讯
LoadingScreen_CannotConnect: Cannot Connect to Online Services…|无法连接到在线服务…
LoadingScreen_Classes1:
Professor Ronen will teach you Reparo once you have completed his extra assignments.
一旦你完成了罗南教授的额外作业，他便会教授你“修复如初”。
LoadingScreen_Classes2: Professor Hecat will teach the Disarming Charm, Expelliarmus , once you have completed her extra assignments.  一旦你完成了赫卡特教授的额外作业，她便会教授你缴械魔咒“除你武器”㉿。
LoadingScreen_Classes3:
Professor Garlick will teach the Knockback Jinx, Flipendo, once you have completed her extra assignments.
一旦你完成了加里克教授的额外作业，她便会教授你击退恶咒“退敌三尺”。
LoadingScreen_Classes4: Professor Sharp will teach the Severing Charm, Diffindo , once you have completed his extra assignments. 一旦你完成了夏普教授的额外作业，他便会教授你切割魔咒“四分五裂”㉿。
LoadingScreen_Classes5: Madam Kogawa will teach the Slowing Charm, Arresto Momentum , once you have completed her extra assignments. 一旦你完成了古川女士的额外作业，她便会教授你减速魔咒“减震止速”㉿。
LoadingScreen_Classes6: Professor Howin will teach you the exploding Charm, Bombarda , once you have completed her extra assignments. 一旦你完成了皓莺教授的额外作业，她便会教授你爆炸魔咒“大爆爆”㉿。
LoadingScreen_Classes7:
Professor Onai will teach you Descendo once you have completed her extra assignments.
一旦你完成了欧奈教授的额外作业，她便会教授你“应声落地”。
LoadingScreen_Classes8:
Astronomy Tables can be found throughout the world, but they can only be used at night.
天文台在世界各地随处可见，但只能在晚上使用。
LoadingScreen_Combat1:
Enemies use different cues to signal blockable and unblockable attacks. Mastering the difference is critical to mastering combat.
敌人会通过不同的线索来释出可格挡和不可格挡的攻击信号。掌握这些差异对于精通战斗至关重要。
LoadingScreen_Combat11: Enemy Shield Charms can be broken by a variety of techniques including matching colour spells, Ancient Magic attacks, deflected projectiles, and Unforgivable Curses. Stupefy also breaks shields, except on Hard difficulty. 敌人的护盾魔咒可以通过多种方式来破坏，包括颜色匹配的咒语、古代魔法攻击、反弹的飞行物以及不可饶恕诅咒。“昏昏倒地”㉿也能破坏护盾，除了在困难难度以外。
LoadingScreen_Combat12: Your health will regenerate automatically when you are safely away from combat.|当你安全地离开战斗时，你的生命值会自动恢复。
LoadingScreen_Combat2: {Protego} will protect you from incoming blockable attacks, and holding {Protego} will follow up with a Stupefy counter-attack that temporarily stuns certain opponents and breaks Shield Charms (except on Hard difficulty). 可保护你免受袭来的可格挡攻击。按住来施展一次“昏昏倒地”㉿反击，可暂时眩晕某些对手并打破护盾魔咒（困难难度除外）。
LoadingScreen_Combat3:
Force and Control spells help you juggle smaller enemies. With practice, you can even manipulate spell cooldowns to juggle enemies indefinitely.
强力和控制咒语可以帮助你对付较小的敌人。通过练习，你甚至可以操纵咒语冷却时间来不间断地控制住敌人。
LoadingScreen_Combat4:
Some spells will hold an enemy at bay temporarily, allowing you to focus on combatting other foes with fewer distractions.
有些咒语会暂时定住敌人，让你专注于与其他敌人作战，减少分心。
LoadingScreen_Combat5:
Remember the {ItemMenuButton} Tool Wheel in difficult combat scenarios. Plants and potions are very powerful, and often the only way to complete certain Combat Challenges.
记得在困难的战斗场景中使用工具轮。植物和魔药非常强大，且通常是完成某些战斗挑战的唯一方法。
LoadingScreen_Combat6:
Remember to spend your Talent Points! Talents can significantly improve the power of your favourite spells and abilities, allowing you to swing the tide of combat greatly in your favour.
记得花费你的天赋点数。天赋可以显著提高你最喜欢的咒语和技能的威力，让你在战斗中取得优势。
LoadingScreen_Combat7:
Don't forget to use Wiggenweld Potion to restore your health when you're close to defeat. If taken wisely, they can be the key to outlasting your foes.
当你快要战败时，不要忘记使用振奋魔药来恢复你的生命值。如果使用得当，它们可能是战胜敌人的关键。
LoadingScreen_Combat8:
{LockOn} Target Lock is an effective tool against any enemy you want to combo, or otherwise find difficult to track.
使用进行目标锁定，来对付任何你想要进行连击或难以追踪的敌人。
LoadingScreen_Combat9:
Knowledge is power. Refer to your Field Guide to remind yourself of the strategies and special techniques that will help you overcome each of the different enemies you'll encounter.
知识就是力量。参阅你的实战指南，找到可以帮助自己克服每种不同敌人的策略和战术。
LoadingScreen_CombatAimMode:
A white outline indicates your active target. Aim Mode {AM_AimMode} reveals additional secondary targets, and a reticle for greater targeting precision.
白色轮廓表示你当前的目标。瞄准模式可显示额外的次要目标，以及用于提高精准度的标线。
LoadingScreen_CombatComboMeter:
A high combo count will increase your Ancient Magic Meter fill rate. Land consecutive hits and dodge sparingly to maintain it.
高连击计数可以加快你的古代魔法充能速度。连续命中并谨慎闪避来加以维持。
LoadingScreen_CombatDifficulty:
If combat is consistently too easy or too difficult, consider adjusting your difficulty setting in the Settings Menu.
如果战斗总是太容易或太难，请考虑在“设置”菜单中调整你的难度设置。
LoadingScreen_CombatGear:
If combat seems too slow or difficult, check your gear. Equipping and upgrading gear that matches your level is a critical part of combat.
当战斗看起来太慢或太困难时，请检查你的装备。使用并强化与你的等级相配的装备对战斗至关重要。
LoadingScreen_CombatLoadout:
Keeping one Force, one Control, and one Damage spell in your Spell Set will prepare you for most combat scenarios.
在你的咒语组中保留一个强力、一个控制和一个伤害咒语，可让自己为大多数的战斗场景做好应对的准备。
LoadingScreen_CombatTargeting:
Enemy and object targets are determined by the {Generic_Move} direction you press.
敌人和物体目标可由你按下的方向决定。
LoadingScreen_Day0PatchMissing:
Congratulations on beginning your adventure in Hogwarts Legacy. Please connect online and download the latest patch to continue.
恭喜你展开了在《霍格沃茨之遗》中的冒险。请在线连接并下载最新补丁以继续。
LoadingScreen_FieldGuide1:
Field Guide Challenges are the only way to earn Experience Points and Levels. New challenges will be discovered as you advance quests and explore the world!
实战指南挑战是获得经验值与提升等级的唯一途径。在推进任务和探索世界的同时，发现新的挑战吧！
LoadingScreen_FieldGuide2:
Your Field Guide measures your academic progress. Be sure to fill it out by completing challenges and obtaining collections.
实战指南可衡量你的学业进度。你需要通过完成挑战并获得收藏来加以填充。
LoadingScreen_FieldGuide3:
Some enemies are vulnerable to certain spells and techniques in your arsenal. Visit the Collections Menu to discover hidden enemy weaknesses!
敌人对你招式中的某些咒语和技巧有特殊的弱点。访问收藏菜单来加以了解隐藏的敌人弱点。
LoadingScreen_FieldGuide4:
Some entries in the Field Guide have a locate feature. The Locate button can be used to highlight discovered enemies, beasts, plants, and more.
实战指南中的某些条目具有定位功能。使用定位按钮，标注所发现的敌人、野兽、植物等等。
LoadingScreen_FieldGuide5:
Hold {ItemMenuButton} to inspect crafting requirements for plants and potions in your Tool Wheel. Requirements are also listed in your Collections Menu, as well as Potions Stations and Potting Tables.
按住以检查工具轮中植物和魔药的制作要求。这些要求也会列在你的收藏菜单，以及魔药台与园艺工作台中。
LoadingScreen_FieldGuide6: Travelling merchants can be located using the Field Guide|可以通过实战指南来定位旅行商人。
LoadingScreen_FieldGuide7:
Conjurations exist to play with, auto-feed, and breed magical beasts – a dung composter will even generate plant fertiliser that can be used to increase the yield of plants at Potting Tables.
变幻可用来跟魔法野兽玩耍、自动喂食并加以繁殖的物件。粪便堆肥装置甚至可产生植物肥料，可用于增加园艺工作台植物的产量。
LoadingScreen_FieldGuide8:
Revelio is a good way to unveil gameplay opportunities as you fly through the Highlands.
“原形立现”是在你飞越高地时发现各种玩法的好方法。
LoadingScreen_FieldGuideChallenges1:
Special rewards will unlock as you progress Field Guide Challenges. Visit the Challenges Menu to review your challenge progress and collect tier rewards that you have unlocked!
特殊奖励会随着实战指南挑战的进度而解锁。访问挑战菜单以查看你的挑战进度并领取已解锁的等级奖励！
LoadingScreen_FieldGuideChallenges2:
Opportunities to investigate Ancient Magic have appeared on your map! Completing their associated challenges is the only way to increase your Ancient Magic meter.
地图上已出现调查古代魔法的机会，完成这些相关挑战是增加古代魔法计量的唯一方法。
LoadingScreen_FieldGuideCharScreen: The appearance of any gear can be altered in the Gear Menu to look like any other basic gear you have looted, or unique appearances you have collected. 任何装备的㉿外观都可以在装备菜单中进行更改，使其看起来像你所拾取的任何其他基本装备，或你所收集的独特外观。
LoadingScreen_FieldGuideCollections:
If you are having trouble finding ingredients, the Collections Menu can track them down, and any ingredient can be purchased from the right vendor for a price.
如果你找不到某种原料，收藏菜单可以帮助你追踪它们，也可以花钱向合适的商贩购买。
LoadingScreen_FieldGuideInventory:
Between quests is a good time to identify new gear, sell excess to vendors, and increase your gear capacity by completing Merlin Trial challenges.
任务与任务之间的时间适合用来寻找新装备，向商贩出售多余的装备，并通过完成“梅林的试炼”来增加你的装备容量。
LoadingScreen_FieldGuideMap1:
Track undiscovered Floo Flames to unlock permanent Fast Travel locations and shorten the time it takes to reach new activities and locations.
追踪未发现的“飞路之焰”以解锁永久快速穿梭地点，并缩短到达新活动和地点所需的时间。
LoadingScreen_FieldGuideMap2:
Use {UMGMapZoomOut}{UMGMapZoomIn} zoom on the Highland map to focus on different activities that matter. Zooming out will provide you with a view of every region, its recommended level, and its progress.
使用移动到高地地图以聚焦不同的重要活动。缩小将为你提供每个区域、其推荐等级以及进度。
LoadingScreen_FieldGuideMap3:
Remember the tools that exist to help you navigate objectives. The {AM_Navigation} Charmed Compass and Minimap can work together to help you reach any objective you track.
记住工具可协助你导航目标。魔法罗盘和小地图可协助你抵达所追踪的任何目标。
LoadingScreen_FieldGuideMap4:
Use {UMGMapZoomOut}{UMGMapZoomIn} zoom on the Highland map to focus on different activities that matter. Zooming in will give you a better view of bandit camps, dens, and lairs, and provide further detail on cursor-over.
使用移动到高地地图以聚焦不同的重要活动。放大将提供对敌方营地和巢穴的更佳视野。将光标停留在其上方以查看更多详情。
LoadingScreen_FieldGuideMap5:
Look for Floo Flames on the path to your objective. Consider Fast Travel if they are unlocked, or use it as an opportunity to pick up a Fast Travel point for later.
在通往目标的道路上寻找“飞路之焰”。如果其已解锁，请考虑快速穿梭。或是把它当作获得快速穿梭点供之后使用的机会。
LoadingScreen_FieldGuideMap5|SWITCH:
Look for Floo Flames on the path to your objective. Consider Fast Travel if they are unlocked, or use it as an opportunity to pick up a Fast Travel point for later.
在通往目标的道路上寻找“飞路之焰”。如果其已解锁，请考虑快速穿梭。或是把它当作获得快速穿梭点供之后使用的机会。
LoadingScreen_FieldGuideMap6:
Hogwarts regions can be selected by flag or by menu. Gain information about Fast Travel and exploration opportunities simply by hovering over them with your cursor.
霍格沃茨区域可以通过标志或菜单选择。将光标停留在快速穿梭和探索机会上，以获取有关快速穿梭和探索机会的信息。
LoadingScreen_FieldGuideMap6|SWITCH:
Hogwarts regions can be selected by flag or by menu. Gain information about Fast Travel and exploration opportunities simply by hovering over them with your cursor.
霍格沃茨区域可以通过标志或菜单选择。将光标停留在快速穿梭和探索机会上，以获取有关快速穿梭和探索机会的信息。
LoadingScreen_FieldGuideQuests1:
Many quests have spell or level requirements. Visit your quest log to review quest requirements and track professor assignments to learn required spells.
许多任务都有咒语或等级要求。访问你的任务日志以查看任务要求，并追踪教授的作业以学习所需的咒语。
LoadingScreen_FieldGuideQuests2:
Some quests feature rewards like new spells or Collection items. Consult the quest log to help you decide which quest to complete next!
某些任务会奖励新的咒语或收藏物品。查阅任务日志以协助你决定接下来要完成的任务！
LoadingScreen_FieldGuideQuests3:
Assignments are the best ways to earn new spells. Track assignments to view the tasks your professors have prepared, and look for opportunities to complete them during other activities.
作业是获得新咒语的最佳方式。追踪作业以查看教授所准备的任务，并在其他活动中寻找加以完成的机会。
LoadingScreen_Hogsmeade:
Most shops are open during the day (6:00-21:59). The Three Broomsticks is open at all hours.
大多数商店在白天 (6:00-21:59)营业，三把扫帚则是全天开放。
LoadingScreen_HogsmeadeVendor:
A Hogsmeade vendor is looking to find beasts a good home, and offers coin for any you bring to her. Consider her offer when your Vivarium or inventory is full!
一个霍格莫德商贩正在为野兽寻找合适的家，并会为你带给她的任何东西提供硬币。当你的饲养所库存已满时，请考虑她的提议。
LoadingScreen_Hogwarts1:
Some Hogwarts secrets require greater magical prowess to uncover. Revisit old passages with new spells and abilities to discover everything hidden within its halls!
一些霍格沃茨的秘密需要更强大的魔法技艺才能揭开。使用新的咒语和能力重温过去的场景，来发现隐藏在其中的一切。
LoadingScreen_Hogwarts10: Probably best not to upset Peeves.|最好不要让皮皮鬼生气。
LoadingScreen_Hogwarts11:
Some magical paintings have their own secrets, so keep an eye open. Perhaps you'll be able to shed light on some of their mysteries – especially the dark ones.
某些带有魔法的画作会有自己的秘密，所以要睁大眼睛。也许你将能揭示其中的奥秘——尤其是黑暗的奥秘。
LoadingScreen_Hogwarts12:
Field Guide Pages – with the exception of Revelio Pages – can be found exclusively in Hogwarts, Hogsmeade, and hamlets.
实战指南书页 - 原形立现书页除外 - 都可以在霍格沃茨、霍格莫德和小村庄找到。
LoadingScreen_Hogwarts14: It never hurts to help out a friend – or a stranger.|帮助朋友或陌生人，永远不会有坏处。
LoadingScreen_Hogwarts15: Never tickle a sleeping dragon. Or one that's awake, for that matter.|永远不要惊扰一只睡梦中的龙。醒着的也一样。
LoadingScreen_Hogwarts16: Beware the giant squid.|当心巨乌贼。
LoadingScreen_Hogwarts17:
Refrain from duelling or using magic in the halls. If you must do so, don't get caught.
避免在礼堂内决斗或使用魔法。如果必须这样做，请不要被逮到。
LoadingScreen_Hogwarts18:
Hogwarts is home to over one hundred house-elves. They may be difficult to spot, however, as they can be quite shy.
霍格沃茨是一百多个家养小精灵的家园。然而你可能很难发现它们，因为它们非常害羞。
LoadingScreen_Hogwarts19: Looks like a great day to fly a kite.|像是个放风筝的好日子。
LoadingScreen_Hogwarts2:
As a witch's or wizard's power grows, so does their ability to discover the unknown and reveal what was once hidden.
随着女巫或巫师力量的增长，他们发现未知事物并揭示其曾经所隐藏信息的能力也会增强。
LoadingScreen_Hogwarts20: If you pick a snowball fight with a snowman, don't expect to win.|如果你选择和雪人打雪仗，不要指望会赢。
LoadingScreen_Hogwarts21: Wouldn't follow the spiders. But butterflies? You could follow them. |不要跟随蜘蛛。但是蝴蝶呢？你可以跟着它们。
LoadingScreen_Hogwarts22:
If you ever receive a Howler in the mail, be sure not to hide it under your pillow.
如果你在邮件中收到过吼叫信，请确保不要将其藏在枕头下。
LoadingScreen_Hogwarts23: Sometimes even the dead have a reason to celebrate. Ghosts love a good party.|有时，即使是亡者也有理由庆祝。幽灵喜欢热闹的派对。
LoadingScreen_Hogwarts24:
Everyone knows you shouldn't tap on aquarium glass, and definitely shouldn't insult the aquatic wildlife.
众人皆知不可敲击水族箱玻璃，且绝对不能侮辱水生野生动物。
LoadingScreen_Hogwarts25: Fireflies are known to be particularly susceptible to a wide variety of spells|众所周知，萤火虫特别容易受到各种咒语的影响
LoadingScreen_Hogwarts3:
Students have reported colourful chests for years at Hogwarts. No one has been able to open them yet though.
多年来，学生们一直都在报告霍格沃茨的彩色宝箱。不过，还没有人能够打开它们。
LoadingScreen_Hogwarts4: Check the Field Guide to see your progress on the Regions of Hogwarts|查看实战指南，了解你在霍格沃茨地区的进展情况
LoadingScreen_Hogwarts5:
Hogwarts is a stronghold of Ancient Magic, which still permeates its very halls.
霍格沃茨是古代魔法的据点，其仍然渗透在礼堂里。
LoadingScreen_Hogwarts6:
Hogwarts has many secrets, some of which students have used to serve their own goals. 
霍格沃茨拥有很多秘密，其中一些已被某些学生习惯拿来为自己的目标服务。
LoadingScreen_Hogwarts7:
Don't forget to check containers every few days. You never know if other students may have misplaced things in them.
不要忘记每隔几天检查一次容器。你永远不知道其他学生是否可能在其中放错了东西。
LoadingScreen_Hogwarts9:
Hogwarts has many secrets, some known to only the most intrepid students. Be sure to keep an eye out for shortcuts or secret rooms, both on the beaten path and off.
霍格沃茨有很多秘密，而有些秘密只有最勇敢的学生才知道。一定要留意人迹罕至的小路、偏僻的捷径或秘密房间。
LoadingScreen_InventoryGear: Try looting vaults or purchasing gear from vendors when you need to fill gaps in your gear progression. 当你需要填补你的装备进度时，试着搜刮秘库㉿或是向商贩㉿购买装备。
LoadingScreen_MechanicsBroom1:
Brooms are most effective near the ground, but Hogsmeade's broom vendor believes he might have a way around this limitation.
扫帚在地面附近最有效，但霍格莫德的扫帚商贩认为他可能有办法绕过这个限制。
LoadingScreen_MechanicsBroom2: The icon means either you cannot mount in your location or you are already mounted and cannot dismount. ㉿图标代表无法在你身处的位置骑乘，或者你已骑乘且无法解除坐骑。
LoadingScreen_Overland2:
{RevelioButton} Revelio can sometimes help reveal the solution to a difficult magic puzzle.
 “原形立现”有时可协助找出困难谜题的解法。
LoadingScreen_Overland3:
You can use Arresto Momentum on moving puzzle parts to give yourself more control.
你可以对移动的谜题部分使用“减震止速”，让自己有更多的控制权。
LoadingScreen_Overland4: If you cannot get into a vault, try coming back to it later with new spells.|如果你无法进入秘库，请尝试之后使用新的咒语来解决。
LoadingScreen_Overland6:
Enemies with levels much higher than your own are meant to be tackled later. Zoom out on the map to see the recommended level for each region.
等级比你高许多的敌人意味着你现阶段很难对付。缩小地图以查看每个区域的推荐等级。
LoadingScreen_Overland7:
The world is always changing; come back to the same areas later to see new things.
世界总是在变化。稍后返回相同的区域以查看新事物。
LoadingScreen_Progression1: Starting at Level 10, each level you gain will grant you a Talent point.|从10级开始，你获得的每个等级都会授予你一个天赋点。
LoadingScreen_Progression2: Wand, conjuration, and gear trait chests contain special Collection rewards and are the only chests that appear on your Minimap. 魔杖、变幻和装备特质宝箱包含特殊的收藏奖励，而且是仅有的会出现在你小地图上的宝箱 ㉿。
LoadingScreen_Progression3:
Many activities will give you experience towards a new level, so be sure to try everything.
许多活动都会让你的体验达到一个新的水平，所以一定要多多尝试。
LoadingScreen_Sanctuary1:
Want to give the Room of Requirement a more 'organic' look? Hold {Transfig_FreePlacement} in Conjuration mode to disable snapping.
想让有求必应屋看起来更“有机”吗？在变幻模式下按住  可停用快照。
LoadingScreen_Sanctuary10:
Vanishing an item reimburses its moonstone cost. Feel free to experiment when decorating your space.
消失一件物品会返还其月石消耗。请随心所欲的尝试装饰你的空间。
LoadingScreen_Sanctuary11:
Have you fully explored your vivariums? Each of them has three hidden chests with a unique conjuration spellcraft.
你是否已充分探索你的饲养所？每一间都有三个隐藏的宝箱，而里面有特殊的变幻幻术配方奖励。
LoadingScreen_Sanctuary2:
Complete Room of Requirement quests to unlock new spells, conjurations, expansions, and spaces for magical beasts.
完成“有求必应屋”任务，为魔法野兽解锁新的咒语、变幻、扩张和空间。
LoadingScreen_Sanctuary3:
Tomes and Scrolls in Hogsmeade has a wide selection of spellcrafts in stock. Stop by and see if anything inspires your in inner home decorator.
霍格莫德的“巨著与卷轴”店的库存里有多种幻术配方的选择。路过的话，可以停下来看看是否有什么能激发你的室内装饰灵感。
LoadingScreen_Sanctuary4:
Have you purchased the Toybox conjuration spellcraft yet? Different species like playing with different toys, so try them all!
你已购买了玩具箱的变幻幻术配方了吗？不同物种喜欢不同的玩具，所以全都试一下吧！
LoadingScreen_Sanctuary5:
Come back often to feed and brush your beasts. They will pay you back with byproducts you can use to enhance your clothing.
经常回来喂食和打理你的野兽。他们会用你可以用来增强你衣服的副产品来回报你。
LoadingScreen_Sanctuary6:
Send your unoccupied beasts on Scavenger Hunts so they can bring back materials for you. Remember you can access the Scavenger Hunts menu by talking to Deek.
将你空闲的野兽派往寻宝，这样它们就可以为你带回材料。请记住，你可以通过与迪科交谈来访问“寻宝”菜单。
LoadingScreen_Sanctuary8:
Do not limit yourself to one station in the Room of Requirement. Conjuring more Potions Stations and Potting Tables will increase your production.
不要将自己限制在“有求必应屋”中的某一个工作台。变幻更多的魔药台和园艺工作台可增加你的产量。
LoadingScreen_Sanctuary9:
Each vivarium can hold up to four beasts of different species and up to twelve beasts in total.
每个饲养所最多可以容纳四只不同物种的野兽，总共最多十二只野兽。
LoadingScreen_Spells1:
Many objects in the environment can be manipulated by magic spells. When faced with a puzzle or challenge, dig deep into your repertoire to come up with a solution.
环境中的许多物体都可以通过咒语来操纵。当面临难题或挑战时，请深入研究你所学到一切，来找出解决方案。
LoadingScreen_Spells2:
{RevelioButton} Revelio will clearly highlight nearby enemies, interactive elements, and containers - even through walls! It will also hint at the location of nearby Revelio pages.
 “原形立现”会清晰高亮显示附近的敌人、互动元素和容器，甚至是墙壁。“原形立现”还可以提示附近原形立现书页的位置。
LoadingScreen_Spells3:
Four spells can be assigned to your Spell Set. Three additional Spell Sets may be purchased with Talent Points.
可将四个咒语分配给你的一个咒语组，还可以用天赋点数购买额外三个咒语组。
LoadingScreen_ToolUnlocks:
New potions and plants can be unlocked for your Tool Wheel by purchasing recipes from J. Pippin's Potions and seeds at Dogweed and Deathcap. Ingredient seeds are available at The Magic Neep.
你可通过在“J·皮聘魔药店”购买配方，以及在“茱萸和毒菇”购买种子，以解锁工具轮中新的魔药和植物。“神奇萝卜”则提供魔药原料的种子。
LoadingScreen_Vendors1: Merchants restock their shops every 3 days, so check back often!|商家每三天补货一次，因此请经常查看！
LoadingScreent_CannotConnect: Cannot Connect to Online Services|无法连接到在线服务
LockItem_Nurture_Item_MoonBallToy_desc: Unlock a ball with lowered gravity for the Toy Box|为玩具盒解锁一颗重力降低的球
LockItem_Nurture_Item_NifflerBallToy_des: Unlock a ball made from pure gold for the Toy Box|为玩具盒解锁一颗纯金制成的球
LockItem_Nurture_Item_PuffskeinBallToy_d: Unlock a slimy ball made from bogeys for the Toy Box|为玩具盒解锁一颗用鼻涕制成的黏球
LockItem_Nurture_Item_QuaffleBallToy_des: Unlock a ball used in the wizarding game of Quidditch for the Toy Box|解锁在魔法游戏魁地奇中所使用的球
LockItem_Nurture_Item_TwigBallToy_desc: Unlock a tumbleweed toy for the Toy Box|为玩具盒解锁风滚草玩具
LockItem_Nurture_Item_WeebleToy_desc: Unlock a self-righting dummy of a Dark wizard for the Toy Box|为玩具盒解锁一个带自动复位功能的黑巫师假人
