LockItem_Nurture_Item_YarnBallToy_desc: Unlock a ball made from yarn for the Toy Box|为玩具盒解锁一个用毛线制成的球
LockItem_Transfiguration_Sanc_BiomeLands: Conjuration: Biome Landscape Painting|变幻：生态景观画
A painting of a biome landscape that may be conjured in the Room of Requirement|能够在有求必应屋中变幻的生态景观画
LockItem_Transfiguration_Sanc_FrogChoir: Conjuration: Frog Choir Stand|变幻：青蛙合唱团站台
LockItem_Transfiguration_Sanc_FrogChoir_: A stand for a choir of frogs that may be conjured in the Room of Requirement|能够在有求必应屋中变幻的青蛙合唱团站台
LockItem_Transfiguration_Sanc_JobbStatue: Conjuration: Jobberknoll Statue|变幻：绝音鸟雕像
A statue of a Jobberknoll that may be conjured in the Room of Requirement|能够在有求必应屋中变幻的绝音鸟雕像
LockItem_Transfiguration_Sanc_Landscape_:
A collection of landscape paintings that may be conjured in the Room of Requirement
能够在有求必应屋中变幻的一系列景观画
LockItem_Transfiguration_Sanc_MagicChest: Conjuration: Magic Chest|变幻：魔法宝箱
A chest in which to store your valuables in the Room of Requirement|能够在有求必应屋中召唤的宝箱，能够在其中存放各种贵重品
LockItem_Transfiguration_Sanc_MediumTabl: Conjuration: Medium Table|变幻：中型桌子
A medium-sized table that may be conjured in the Room of Requirement|能够在有求必应屋中变幻的中型尺寸的桌子
LockItem_Transfiguration_Sanc_QuidditchE: Conjuration: Quidditch Equipment|变幻：魁地奇用具

A shelf packed with Quidditch equipment that may be conjured in the Room of Requirement
装满魁地奇器材的架子，能够在有求必应屋中变幻
LodgokNote: Thief's Note to Lodgok|盗贼留给罗德高克的字条
LodgokNote_desc: A taunting message from the thieves who stole Lodgok's helm|偷走罗德高克头盔的盗贼们留下的字条，上面写满了嘲讽的内容
LodgoksHelmet: Ancient Goblin Helmet|古代妖精头盔
Loom_NoDiscoveredTraits: No Discovered Traits|没有已发现的特质
Loom_NoUndiscoveredTraits: No Undiscovered Traits|已发现所有特质
Loom_TraitRarityMessage: This Trait is too powerful for this item|特质过于强大，无法添加至该物品
LOOM_TRAITSLOTLEVEL: Trait Slot Level|特质栏位等级
Loom_UndiscoveredTraits_desc: Gear traits yet to be discovered|装备特质尚未被发现
Loot_GT01_signet_desc: A signet ring belonging to the Rookwood Gang|属于卢克伍德帮的图章戒指
LORE_3Broom_Broomsticks_desc:
Currently run by Sirona Ryan, and allegedly as old as Hogsmeade itself, the Three Broomsticks is the longstanding gathering spot for villagers and Hogwarts students who want to enjoy a Butterbeer or Firewhisky.
据说三把扫帚最初的历史可以追溯至霍格莫德的创立，现在这间酒馆由希罗纳·瑞安在负责打理。一直以来，酒馆一直是村里的居民与霍格沃茨学生们享受热火威士忌或者是黄油啤酒的不二选择。
LORE_3Broom_MeetingArea: Three Broomsticks Private Room|三把扫帚私室
LORE_3Broom_MeetingArea_desc:
The Three Broomsticks Private Room is a secluded space off the main room of the pub. Hogwarts professors appreciate having a separate area in which to gather to avoid encountering students. Perhaps unsurprisingly, the students appreciate their professors having a separate area as well.
三把扫帚的包厢是远离酒馆喧嚣主厅的静谧空间。为了避免与学生们共处一室的不便，霍格沃茨的教授们都会选择在这个单独的区域中交流聚会。其实学生们也很赞同这种与教授们分开相处的安排，不过想想也是情理之中。
LORE_3Broom_TapBarrels_desc:
These barrels contain the popular wizarding drink, Butterbeer. It is served both cold and hot and has a slight alcoholic content that seems to impact house-elves much more than humans.
这些木桶中装着一种魔法世界中流行的饮品：黄油啤酒。黄油啤酒中包含少量酒精成分，不管是冰镇还是加热都美味爽口，除此以外，与人类相比，家养小精灵们似乎更容易喝醉。
LORE_AstronomyTower_BarnabasTapestry: Tapestry of Barnabas the Barmy|巴拿巴斯的挂毯
LORE_AstronomyTower_BarnabasTapestry_des:
This tapestry depicts the wizard Barnabas the Barmy's foolish attempt to train trolls for the ballet. One can only imagine the impact on the arts had he succeeded.
这张壁毯记录了过去的一位巫师巴拿巴斯妄图训练巨怪跳芭蕾舞的愚蠢行径。如果巴拿巴斯当时成功了，那恐怕这幅画作描绘的就是另外一种光景吧。
LORE_AstronomyTower_Telescope_desc:
This telescope is the finest stargazing instrument of its kind, perfect for viewing the moon and the stars and anything else one might find in the night sky.
当下最顶尖的望远镜型号，能够清晰明了地观察到月亮、星辰已经其他高挂在夜空之上的存在。
LORE_AstronomyWing_Desk_desc:
This partially Transfigured teacup – likely the soon-to-be-reversed error of a second-year – serves as a cautionary tale for those students who do not take seriously the complexities and dangers of Transfiguration.
这个部分变形的茶杯，可能是某个二年级学生犯下的错误。对于那些不认真对待变形魔法的复杂性和危险性的学生而言，是一个警示。
LORE_Baruffio: Portrait of Baruffio|巴鲁费奥的肖像
LORE_Baruffio_desc:
This portrait depicts the wizard Baruffio, famed for his Brain Elixir and as an example of what happens when incantations are improperly spoken: he once said 's' instead of 'f' and found himself on the floor with a buffalo on his chest.
这幅画像描绘的是巫师巴鲁费奥，此人以发明醒脑剂而出名，除此以外也是错误念诵咒文的惨烈教训之一：就因为把“f”念成了“s”，他就被一头沉重的水牛给压倒在了地上。
LORE_BellTowers_BrokenBroom_desc:
This broken broom belonged to Selene Wartnaby and is rumoured to be all that remains after she insisted on demonstrating her experimental 'Lunar Apparition Charm' to fellow third-years. No one knows if she succeeded.
赛琳娜·沃特纳比的残破扫帚。据说当年她执意要给其他三年级同学展示自己发明的试验型咒语“月面现影术魔咒”，这把扫帚就是当时唯一留下来的证据。迄今为止，没有人知道她的咒语到底有没有成功。
LORE_BellTowers_FlattenedArmor_desc:
This set of armour belonged to Sir Scagglethorpe the Heedless who unwisely challenged a mountain troll to a game of musical chairs.
漫不经心的斯卡格索普爵士的护甲，他曾不明智地向山地巨怪发起了一场抢椅游戏的挑战。
LORE_BellTowers_GoblinArtifact_desc:
Horns like this were used by goblins during the 1612 Goblin Rebellion to rally troops and generally annoy witches and wizards. This horn was discovered in the aftermath of the rebellion behind the Hog's Head Inn, with a wedge of gorgonzola stuffed inside – presumably to mute it.
在1612年妖精叛乱期间，叛乱妖精们会使用类似这样的号角来召集部队，除此以外他们也会故意用这种工具来骚扰酣睡的女巫与巫师。当年的叛乱平息后，人们在猪头酒吧后面找到了这个号角，被发现时号角内部已被戈贡佐拉奶酪堵得严严实实，据推测这种做法是为了不让其继续“危害四方”。
Lore_Belltowers_Plaque_desc:
The Three Sisters Bells are said to be a tribute to three similarly named, beautiful steep ridges that rise majestically over a glen in Argyllshire. It is rumoured that one can hear them ring in the glen, way across the Highlands, when they are rung in the castle. Locals have been baffled by the mysterious ringing for years.
据说三姐妹钟是向三个名称相似的美丽陡峭山脊的致敬，这些山脊雄伟地耸立在阿盖尔郡的峡谷上。有传言说，当钟声在城堡里响起时，人们也可以听到其在山谷中响起，并穿过高地。多年来，当地人一直对这神秘的钟声感到困惑。
LORE_BellTowers_ScorchMark_desc:
Allegedly the location of the first known instance of an arguably successful casting of Bombarda. Date unknown, caster unidentifiable.
据说是魔法世界中有史以来第一次“成功”施放“大爆爆”的确切地点。只是具体的日期不甚明了，施法者的身份也不得而知。
LORE_BellTowers_Skull_desc:
This is the skull of famed tailor Grimbald Weft, whose skilled needlework repaired countless witches’ and wizards’ coats during the Goblin Rebellion of 1752 – thus preventing them from taking ill during battle.
青史留名的裁缝格林包德·维福特的骷髅，1752年妖精叛乱期间，正是此人出类拔萃的针线活及时修补了无数女巫与巫师的大衣，并避免了人们在战斗期间不幸患上风寒。
LORE_BellTowers_ToadChoir_desc:
Here perch the slimy yet symphonic frogs that comprise the Hogwarts Frog Choir. These magical amphibians can sing in six-part harmony and hold a pitch better than most humans.
霍格沃茨青蛙合唱团的黏滑又动听的“乐手们”。这些魔法两栖生物能够“六口同声”地唱出美妙音符，而且说实话唱功远超绝大多数人类。
LORE_BellTowers_WavingKnight_desc:
This set of armour belonged to Sir Affpuddle of the Cheerful Countenance, a legendarily friendly knight who supposedly won every battle before it was fought by virtue of his amiable negotiating tactics. Some attribute his success to an overly potent Cheering Charm he cast upon himself.
热忱爵士阿福帕多身后留下的铠甲，据说这位热情好客的传奇骑士正是靠自己激情四射的谈判战术在战场上“战”无不胜。不过也有人说，爵士的光辉战绩其实是来源于他给自身施加的强大到不可思议的快乐魔咒。
LORE_BellTowers_Windows: History of Magic Windows|魔法史窗户
LORE_BellTowers_Windows_desc:
This set of stained-glass windows features Merlin, the four Hogwarts founders, and various other witches and wizards of the ages.
一系列美轮美奂的彩绘玻璃窗，上面描绘了梅林、霍格沃茨四大创始人以及各个时代的杰出女巫与巫师。
LORE_BellTowers_WoodenCat_desc:
This wooden statue bears the likeness of Pangur Donn, fearless feline mouse hunter and devoted study companion.
做工精美的木雕，原型是勇敢无畏的老鼠猎人与忠心不二的学伴“潘谷尔·多恩”。
LORE_Boathouse_BlackLake_desc:
The Black Lake or Great Lake (the sitting Headmaster vainly prefers the prior) is an expanse of fresh water south of the castle. The lake's murky depths are home to merpeople, Grindylows, and other magical, aquatic beasts and beings, including the giant squid – a surprisingly friendly cephalopod with a fondness for toast.
黑湖或者说霍格沃茨大湖（现任校长更偏好前者，据说是因为更为“亲切”）是坐落于城堡南面的一座广阔淡水湖。深不见底的湖水中居住着人鱼、格林迪洛以及其他水中魔法野兽与生物，巨乌贼也是这些居民中的一员：据说那位友善的软体动物尤其喜欢吐司。
LORE_Boathouse_Boats_desc:
Located deep beneath the viaduct courtyard is the landing for boats delivering first-year students across the Black Lake to Hogwarts.
渡船码头位于拱桥庭院正下方，每年开学时一年级新生都会乘船跨过黑湖并前往霍格沃茨。
LORE_Cauldrons_Stack: Ceridwen's Precarious Cauldrons|凯丽德温的惊险坩埚店
LORE_Cauldrons_Stack_desc:
This precariously stacked set of cauldrons outside Ceridwen's advertises the shop's wares. It should be noted that stacking cauldrons in this fashion, while admittedly eye-catching, is ill-advised for anyone wishing to brew a potion of any intended effect.
门外一大叠堆得摇摇欲坠的炼药锅正在展示着凯丽德温坩埚店的商品。请注意，如果想要有效精准地调配出正确的魔药效果，请勿模仿此方法堆叠炼药锅。
LORE_CentralTower_ArithmancyClass_desc:
This classroom is where students learn about the magical properties of numbers and numerology – though a great many opt instead to spend the period 'counting Mooncalves' whilst nodding off at their desks.
学生们会在这间教室中学习数字与数字占卜术蕴含的魔法本质，不过很可惜，绝大多数学生都会选择令自己在课上昏昏欲睡的“数月痴兽”。
LORE_CentralTower_Fountain_desc:
This ornate fountain features intricately carved statues of denizens of the magical world, including a set of stone sirens encircling the fountain's base.
这座富丽堂皇的喷泉展示着一系列魔法世界居民的栩栩如生的雕像，这其中便包括了环绕喷泉底座的一组塞壬石像。
LORE_Clocktower_Pendulum_desc:
While the moving gears of the clock tower's inner mechanics serve as a deterrent to many, others find the privacy offered by the cogs and wheels appealing.
虽然钟塔内部繁复变幻的齿轮与滚轴让许多人望而生怯，对某些人来说却是最不用担心被人打扰的隐秘之地。
LORE_Clocktower_PumpkinPatch_desc:
Rumour has it that anything planted in this pumpkin patch will grow to an extraordinary size, making the gourds produced here especially suitable for decorating a room the size of the Great Hall.
据说在这块南瓜田中种下的种子都会长成不可思议的庞然大物，如果属实，那么这里栽培出来的瓜果也许是用来装饰类似校内礼堂这样的硕大空间的最佳选择。
LORE_Clocktower_Well: The Well of Four Beasts|四兽之井
LORE_Clocktower_Well_desc:
Some students believe that a wish made over the Well of Four Beasts – whether near the Thestral, griffin, Chimaera, or Hippogriff – will come true for one who has gained the trust of any of the four.
按照某些学生间流传的说法，不管是在夜骐、狮身鹰首兽、奇美拉或者是鹰马翼兽之井，当你成功获得任意一种野兽的信任之后，对着四兽井中的任意一处许愿都必定愿望成真。
LORE_CursedBathroom_desc:
Unless in dire straits, it is probably best to avoid this particular toilet as it is allegedly one of Peeves’s favourite pranking spots. 
据说这里是皮皮鬼最喜欢的恶作剧目标之一，因此只要不是什么生死存亡的“大事”，还是尽可能避开为好。
LORE_DADA_AugurySkeleton_desc:
This is a skeleton of an Irish phoenix or Augurey – an intensely shy bird who can forecast the coming of rain and whose mournful cry was once believed to foretell death.
一具爱尔兰凤凰或者是卜鸟的骷髅，卜鸟是一种能够预测降雨的魔法野兽，生性怕人，以前人们还认为它们的悲鸣意味着死亡来临。
LORE_DADA_BoggartCloset_desc:
This old cupboard is said to have once contained a powerful Boggart that five professors working together could barely repel as it shifted among werewolf, tornado, a plate of haggis, a Hungarian Horntail and someone’s mother-in-law.
据说这个陈旧橱柜中曾经关押着一头异常强大的博格特，当年五名教授齐心协力才勉强将在狼人、龙卷风、一盘苏格兰哈吉斯、一头匈牙利树蜂以及某人的岳母之间来回变换的博格特驱逐出去。
LORE_DADA_Cell: Dark Tower Cell|黑暗高塔牢房
LORE_DADA_Cell_desc:
It is said that, centuries ago, a Charms professor kept a troll here on which students could practise particularly challenging spells. Shocking, to be sure, but perhaps unsurprising during a time when Quidditch involved the use of live Snidgets. One can only wonder what it may be used for in the future.
据说，在几个世纪前，一位魔咒学教授在这里养了一个巨怪，学生们可以对其练习特别具有挑战性的咒语。这当然令人震惊。但在魁地奇还在涉及使用活生生的金飞侠的时期，这也许并不令人惊讶。人们只能猜测它将来可能用于什么。
LORE_DADA_DragonSkeleton: Hebridean Black Skeleton|赫布底里黑骷髅
LORE_DADA_DragonSkeleton_desc:
This large dragon skeleton that hangs in the Defence Against the Dark Arts classroom is allegedly a trophy taken by Professor Hecat after she single-handedly defeated one of the largest poaching rings in Eastern Wales during the Great Poacher Raid of 1878.
据说这具悬挂在黑魔法防御术教室顶部的硕大龙骷髅是赫卡特教授当年的战利品之一，在1878年的搜捕盗猎者行动期间，她曾经单枪匹马捣毁了当时东威尔士规模最为庞大的盗猎团伙之一，而龙骷髅正是出自那里。
LORE_DADA_IllyiusPortrait: Painting of Illyius |伊利厄斯之画
LORE_DADA_IllyiusPortrait_desc:
This painting depicts the young orphan wizard Illyius, who famously saved his entire village from an army of Dementors and the Dark wizard Raczidian by conjuring a mouse Patronus.
这幅画描绘了年轻的孤儿巫师伊利厄斯的故事，他凭借自己变幻而来的老鼠守护神击败了黑巫师拉奇迪恩与他麾下的摄魂怪大军，并因此成为了拯救整座村庄的英雄。
LORE_DADA_WaterfallWindow_desc:
Although Slytherins like to think this window is somehow a tribute to their house founder, it is actually a serpentine beast coiled around a tree that extends from the mouth of the legendary Green Man.
虽然斯莱特林认为这扇窗户是为了向他们的创始人致敬，但它实际上是一只盘绕在一棵从传说中的绿人嘴里伸出的树上的蛇形野兽。
LORE_Dervish_Sneakoscope_desc:
A Sneakoscope is a type of Dark Detector and will spin, whistle, and light up when it detects someone untrustworthy nearby. It should be used with caution, however, as it will alert the untrustworthy to the user's presence almost instantly.
窥镜是一种黑暗探测器，如果检测到周遭存在不值得相信之人，窥镜将会立刻旋转、吹哨并发光。应该谨慎使用它，因为它几乎会立即提醒用户不值得信任的人存在。
LORE_Dogweed_Tree: The Dogweed and Deathcap Tree|“茱萸和毒菇”大树
LORE_Dogweed_Tree_desc: This large tree with winding branches supports the shop Dogweed and Deathcap.|这棵蜿蜒盘缠的大树支撑着顶部的“茱萸和毒菇”。
LORE_EntranceHall_AurorBadge: Professor Sharp's Auror Badge|夏普教授的傲罗徽章
LORE_EntranceHall_AurorBadge_desc:
Aurors comprise the Ministry’s magical law enforcement and protect the wizarding world from all sorts of threats – particularly those posed by Dark Magic. This Auror badge belongs to Professor Sharp.
作为魔法部麾下的执法部门，傲罗肩负着保护整个魔法世界的重要责任，尤其是那些各种黑魔法的威胁。这枚傲罗徽章是夏普教授的所有物。
LORE_EntranceHall_MedusaPainting_desc:
An oil painting of a beautiful gorgon and her suitor, whose eyes are wisely averted as he bends to kiss her hand. It is said that the artist who painted this accidentally gazed at his subject when he delivered the painting and is now forever a sculpture in a garden in Greece.
描绘着美丽戈耳工与她的追求者的油画，聪明的追求者在俯身亲吻戈耳工的手时选择了挪开视线。只是据说这幅画的作者本人却没有那么好运，他在运送画作时不小心瞥了一眼自己的模特，于是就变成了直至今日依旧矗立在一处希腊花园中的石像。
LORE_EntranceHall_UrnOfAshes_desc:
This particular urn is rumoured to have once borne the inscription: 'Pioneer in Dragon Taming. Should not have started with the Hungarian Horntail.'
据说这个特别的骨灰瓮上曾经带着一段铭文：“驯龙技术的开创者。只是不该先挑匈牙利树蜂下手。”
LORE_EntranceHall_UrnOfAshes_desc|SWITCH:
This particular urn is rumoured to have once borne the inscription: 'Pioneer in Dragon Taming. Should not have started with the Hungarian Horntail.'
据说这个特别的骨灰瓮上曾经带着一段铭文：“驯龙技术的开创者。只是不该先挑匈牙利树蜂下手。”
LORE_EVL_Scriptorium: Salazar Slytherin's Scriptorium|萨拉查·斯莱特林的藏经楼
LORE_EVL_Scriptorium_desc:
A secret and well-protected room beneath Hogwarts where Salazar Slytherin appears to have spent time making various long-term plans with respect to the student population and reflecting on disagreements he had with the other founders
霍格沃茨地下的一个保护良好的密室，萨拉查·斯莱特林似乎在这里花了很多时间为学生制定了各种长期计划，并在这里思考着他与其他创始人的分歧
LORE_FacultyTower_ArgllshireMap: Map of Argyllshire|阿盖尔郡地图
LORE_FacultyTower_ArgllshireMap_desc:
This map depicts Argyllshire, a region in Scotland which contains the Hebrides – native home of the Hebridean Black dragon.
这张地图描绘了苏格兰阿盖尔郡地区的赫布底里群岛，赫布底里黑龙最初便来源于该地区。
LORE_FacultyTower_BorisStatue_desc:
This statue of a lost-looking wizard known as Boris the Bewildered has perplexed students for ages. Is he coming or going? Is he at the beginning of a journey or the end? Perhaps we shall never know.
千百年来，这尊神色茫然的糊涂波里斯雕像让无数学生们伤透了脑筋。他到底是想要离去还是刚到此地？他的旅途已经结束，还是刚刚开始？也许我们永远无法知道答案。
LORE_FacultyTower_Lachlan_desc:
This statue depicts the wizard Lachlan the Lanky – a tall, slender wizard who appears quite proud of himself. For what precisely, no one knows.
巫师瘦子拉克伦的雕像，一位身材高大苗条的巫师，看上去非常自豪。究竟是因为什么，没人知道。
LORE_FacultyTower_Locksley: Adventure Novel Set|冒险小说合集
LORE_FacultyTower_Locksley_desc:
Sketched inside the cover of this old, slightly worn set of serialised adventure novels is what looks like a gazelle. Perhaps the novels were a gift to Professor Onai or her daughter Natsai.
这本略显破旧的连载冒险小说的封面里描绘的是一只看起来像瞪羚的动物。也许这些小说正是送给欧奈教授或她的女儿纳察的礼物。
LORE_FacultyTower_MermaidMural_desc:
The Prefects' bathroom features a swimming-pool-sized bathtub that can be filled with enchanted soap and colourful bubbles, as well as a beautiful painted mural depicting a mermaid.
级长盥洗室中有一个游泳池规模的浴缸，里面能够放入带有魔法的肥皂与五颜六色的洗浴泡泡，除此以还有一扇描绘着人鱼的美丽彩绘壁画。
LORE_FacultyTower_SecretPassage3_desc:
Hidden behind the statue of a one-eyed witch is a secret passageway from Hogwarts to the cellar at Honeydukes. It can only be accessed using a particular charm.
这条连通霍格沃茨与蜂蜜公爵地窖的秘密通道就隐藏在某位独眼女巫的雕像背后。只有使用一道特定的魔咒才能开启。
LORE_FacultyTower_TortoiseShell: Jewel-Encrusted Tortoise Shell|镶嵌宝石的龟壳
LORE_FacultyTower_TortoiseShell_desc:
Many assume this to be the shell of a Fire Crab, native to Fiji. However, those in the know swear it’s a bejewelled tortoise shell created by a mad wizard near Versailles. When his chateau was overrun by Nifflers, the dazzling shell was carried off to be discovered years later by a Hogwarts professor on holiday in the Ardennes.
在很多人眼里，这是源自斐济的魔法野兽火螃蟹的甲壳。不过只有少数人才知道真相：这其实是一位疯狂巫师在凡尔赛宫旁创造出来的珠宝乌龟壳。后来那位巫师的宅邸遭到了一群嗅嗅洗劫，多年之后的一位霍格沃茨教授在阿登高地度假时才无意间发现了这块五光十色的贝壳。
LORE_Garden: Hogsmeade Community Garden|霍格莫德社区花园
LORE_Garden_desc:
This small community garden in the heart of the village is the perfect spot for growing various herbs and peaceful magical plants.
位于村庄中心的小型社区花园，居民们在这里种植者各类草药与人畜无害的魔法植物。
LORE_Gladrags_Mannequins: Gladrags Mannequin|风雅牌服装店人偶
LORE_Gladrags_Mannequins_desc:
Unlike the enchanted mannequins favoured by students for duelling practice, the mannequins at Gladrags serve only as a means to display the latest in wizarding fashion.
和学生喜欢用于决斗练习的魔法人偶不同，风雅牌巫师服装店的人偶仅用于展示最新的巫师时尚潮流服饰。
LORE_Gladrags_Shop: Gladrags Wizardwear|风雅牌巫师服装店
LORE_Gladrags_Shop_desc:
Founded in 1750 and with locations in Paris, London, and Hogsmeade, Gladrags offers a variety of wizarding garments and accessories. Mr Augustus Hill and his associate Otto Dibble happily help all those who wander into the shop – enjoying, in particular, the challenge of the customer with less fashion sense than most.
风雅牌服装店最初创立于1750年，现如今在巴黎、伦敦与霍格莫德皆设有多家分店，向魔法世界的居民们提供着各式各样的时尚衣物与饰品。奥古斯都·希尔先生与他的助手奥托·迪博尔永远会热情接待走进店铺的客人们，同时也享受着为那些“不拘一格”之人找到合适装扮的挑战。
LORE_Grandstaircase_BookAndQuill: Quill of Acceptance and Book of Admittance|接纳之笔和准入之书
LORE_Grandstaircase_BookAndQuill_desc:
The Quill of Acceptance and Book of Admittance were placed here by the founders and have not been touched since. They record the name of every prospective Hogwarts student the moment they first show signs of magic – although the quill is more lenient than the book, which will sometimes snap shut before a name is written if the evidence of magic is not dramatic enough.
自当初被创始人们放置于此，接纳之笔与准入之书便再也没有离开过。当具有潜力的霍格沃茨学生们初次展现出魔法迹象后，笔与书便会如实记录这些潜在新生的名字，不过说实话笔要比书显得大度许多，如果学生的魔法迹象并不够强烈明显，书有时候就会猛地用力合上，不给笔有记录的机会。
LORE_Grandstaircase_CentaurArmour_desc:
This unique set of armour was created as a misguided peace-offering to a centaur leader. The gift was spurned and the messenger shot through the leg with an arrow. The armour itself, battered with hoofmarks, was later recovered and refurbished.
作为献给马人领袖的求和礼物而被创造出来的独特盔甲。只是因为误会而好心办了坏事：马人拒绝了这份礼物，并且送礼的使者也被一箭射穿了大腿。被人们重新找到的时候，铠甲表面已经布满了坑坑洼洼的蹄印，所幸之后又被重新修复填补完整。
LORE_Grandstaircase_FloatingStairs_desc:
The savvy student is wise to keep an eye on the stairs, as they will change position without notice. While certain students may not mind being late for class, they may very well regret being late to dinner.
走在楼梯上时一定要多留个心眼，因为这些阶梯经常会突如其来地移动至完全不同的位置。虽然这种迟到理由对某些学生来说并非坏事，但要是因此耽搁了晚餐那就不好了。
LORE_Grandstaircase_Gargoyle: Headmaster's Office Gargoyle|校长办公室的石像鬼
LORE_Grandstaircase_Gargoyle_desc:
The staircase that leads to the Headmaster's office is guarded by an enchanted gargoyle that will let only those who know the password enter. Though, anyone choosing to visit the current occupant of the office is difficult to fathom.
一尊魔法石像鬼守护者通往校长办公室的楼梯，只有知道正确口令才能让其放行。不过难以想象为什么会有人想要拜访这间办公室当前的主人。
LORE_Grandstaircase_GobletofFire: Goblet of Fire Casket|火焰杯之匣
LORE_Grandstaircase_GobletofFire_desc:
The Goblet of Fire rests within this ancient, jewel-encrusted chest. The Goblet has served as a means of selecting champions for the Triwizard Tournament since the contest's establishment in the late 13th century.
火焰杯就沉睡在这口珠光宝气的古老宝匣之中。自从三强争霸赛于十三世纪末期正式设立，火焰杯就一直承担着挑选能够参与争霸赛的勇士的职责。
LORE_Grandstaircase_HerbTrophy_desc:
This trophy was awarded to a student in the Autumn of 1757 for growing a pumpkin that nearly outweighed a Mountain Troll. Some suspected an Engorgement Charm was the secret, while others fully assumed so, noting with exasperation that Hogwarts is a school of witchcraft and wizardry, after all.
这个奖杯最初被赠予给了于1757年秋季培育出重量超过一只山地巨怪的南瓜的杰出学生。虽然有人怀疑获奖者秘密使用了膨胀魔咒，但是其他评论者也表示不能忘记霍格沃茨本身就是一座魔法学校的事实。
LORE_Grandstaircase_HouseElfArmour_desc:
This set of armour for a house-elf is rumoured to have been made by a cruel wizard who wanted his elf to protect him in battle. Happily, the wizard was too dense to realise that armour could, in fact, be considered clothing. The moment the elf donned it, he Disapparated right out of it, never to be seen again.
一套为家养小精灵量身打造的铠甲，据说最初是一位残忍的巫师想要小精灵在战斗中保护自己而选择了这种策略。巫师满心欢喜地以为这个计划天衣无缝，只是他并没有意识到，“盔甲”其实本质上也是一种“衣服”。穿上铠甲之后，小精灵便立刻使用幻影移形离开，之后就再也没有出现过。
LORE_Grandstaircase_ServiceAward_desc:
This rarely awarded trophy is given for outstanding services to the school. Phineas Nigellus Black attempted to award it to himself shortly after his appointment as Headmaster. The ever-diplomatic Professor Weasley, however, was able convince him that such a gesture would be in poor taste.
仅授予为霍格沃茨做出杰出贡献之人的罕见奖章。被任命为校长之后，菲尼亚斯·奈杰勒斯·布莱克曾试图为自己“颁发”这种奖章。所幸韦斯莱教授当下巧言快语，说服布莱克相信这种举动恐怕有失公允。
LORE_Grandstaircase_SleepingPortrait_des:
Not all headmasters and headmistresses enjoy reliving the day-to-day challenges of running a school of witchcraft and wizardry. Some prefer to enjoy a well-earned nap when possible.
并非所有校长都喜欢重新回忆起日复一日管理魔法学校的挑战。有几位就喜欢在闲暇时间稍稍打个盹。
LORE_Grandstaircase_SortingHat_desc:
This enchanted hat was created by the four founders of Hogwarts as the means by which students would be placed into one of the four school houses. Skilled at Legilimency, the Sorting Hat can ‘see’ into the wearer’s head, allowing it to determine their thoughts and abilities. 
霍格沃茨四位创始人共同创造的魔力之帽，千百年来的所有学生都是通过它找到了最合适自己的学院。分院帽精通摄神取念，能够轻松“看穿”佩戴者脑海中的想法，并通过这种方式分析新生们的思绪与能力。
LORE_Grandstaircase_TrollArmour_desc:
This unusual suit of armour was crafted for a troll. That it has survived at all is astonishing since trolls do not ordinarily wear armour and would understandably be prone to smashing it in confusion or anger.
专为巨怪打造的铠甲，极为罕见。其实盔甲本身能幸存下来更是足以让人咂舌的奇事，这是因为巨怪们并没有“穿戴铠甲”的概念，最多只会因为困惑或者是暴躁而将铠甲砸个稀巴烂。
LORE_Grandstaircase_Trophy_desc:
This room contains the House Cup, Quidditch trophies, duelling trophies, and other awards given at the school. Students who step out of line can be found polishing the silver here, by hand, as a reminder of the value of hard work. 
这个房间中存放着学院杯、魁地奇奖杯、决斗奖杯以及其他各式各样的霍格沃茨奖章。顽皮捣蛋的学生偶尔会被罚来为房间里的银器抛光，这么做旨在通过不借助魔法的徒手工作让学生们明白认真学习的重要性。
LORE_GreatHall_ArchitectStatue: The Hogwarts Architect|霍格沃茨建筑师
LORE_GreatHall_ArchitectStatue_desc:
The Hogwarts Architect, shown here surrounded by the four house mascots, designed and oversaw the construction of Hogwarts castle alongside founder Rowena Ravenclaw, who is credited with creating its ever-changing floorplan.
被四学院吉祥物所围绕的“霍格沃茨缔造者”，便是最初与创始人罗伊纳·拉文克劳一同设计监督霍格沃茨城堡的兴建，以及创造出变幻莫测的各楼层的作者。
LORE_GreatHall_Ceiling: The Great Hall Ceiling|礼堂天花板
LORE_GreatHall_Ceiling_desc:
The ceiling of the Great Hall has been bewitched to mimic the sky above the castle.
礼堂的天花板被施过魔法，能够完美模拟出城堡之上的天空的样子。
LORE_GreatHall_Chimney: The Yawning Gargoyle|打哈欠的石像鬼
LORE_GreatHall_Chimney_desc:
Although this smoke-breathing gargoyle might appear to be enchanted, it is actually the Hufflepuff common room chimney.
虽然这尊吞云吐雾的石像鬼雕像看上去像是某种魔法的产品，但这其实只是赫奇帕奇公共休息室的烟囱。
LORE_GreatHall_Crest_desc:
The Hogwarts coat of arms includes a lion, snake, eagle, and badger, representing each of the four houses, along with the school motto: 'Draco dormiens nunquam titillandus', which means ‘never tickle a sleeping dragon.’
霍格沃茨校徽包含对应四个学院的狮、蛇、鹰与獾，以及拉丁语校训：“Draco dormiens nunquam titillandus”，翻译过来的意思是“眠龙勿扰。”。
LORE_GreatHall_HourGlasses: House Point Hourglasses|学院分数沙漏
LORE_GreatHall_HourGlasses_desc:
These large, ornate hourglasses containing rubies, diamond, sapphires, and emeralds are enchanted to keep count of house points for Gryffindor, Hufflepuff, Ravenclaw, and Slytherin, respectively.
这些庞大瑰丽的沙漏中的红宝石、钻石、蓝宝石以及绿宝石分别对应着格兰芬多、赫奇帕奇、拉文克劳以及斯莱特林学院当前的学院分。
LORE_GreatHall_OwlPodium_desc:
This enchanted lectern serves as the spot from which the great headmistresses and headmasters of Hogwarts – as well as Professor Black – address the school.
霍格沃茨世世代代的伟大校长，“以及”布莱克教授都会站在这座蕴含魔力的讲台上向全校师生致意。
LORE_Greenhouse_CentralTree_desc:
Situated at the centre of a Hogwarts greenhouse, this giant tree has a system of roots as deep-reaching and convoluted as the school's dungeons.
坐落于霍格沃茨温室中央，这棵参天大树错综复杂的根须遍布底下，直抵学校地牢。
LORE_Greenhouse_DirigiblePlum_desc:
This orange, radish-like fruit floats upside-down as it grows. Some believe it can enhance one's ability to accept the extraordinary.
这种形似萝卜的橙色水果在成长过程中会一直保持上下颠倒的飘浮状态。有人认为这些果实能够强化一个人接纳不可思议之事的能力。
LORE_Grounds_BloodyMeat_desc:
At first glance, one might be inclined to alert the authorities regarding this sight. Rest assured, however, that it is merely bloody meat used to feed the Thestrals.
乍一看确实会被误以为是某种需要立刻告知执法人员的恐怖证据。但是不用担心，因为这不过是用于用来喂食夜骐的带血肉块。
LORE_Grounds_CagedBathtub_desc:
This bathtub has been kept behind lock and key for as long as anyone can remember. Rumour has it that the tub was enchanted to chase after students decades ago who were too obsessed with their studies to care much for personal hygiene.
一直以来被重重门锁严加看管的浴缸。据说数十年前，这个浴缸曾经被施加过特殊的魔法，会盯着那些因此学习过度而忘记个人卫生问题的学生们穷追不舍。
LORE_Grounds_Carriage_desc:
These carriages are pulled by Thestrals to transport second- through seventh-years to Hogwarts from Hogsmeade Station. The sitting Headmaster or Headmistress may also use them for journeys ill-suited to Apparition. The Thestrals themselves live in the Forbidden Forest. 
霍格沃茨的二年级至七年级学生在离开霍格莫德车站后，都会乘坐着这些由夜骐拉动的马车前往霍格沃茨。除此以外，现任校长也偶尔会乘着马车前往不适合使用现影术的地点。不拉车的时候，夜骐们就会在禁林之中繁衍生息。
LORE_Grounds_Chizperfles_desc:
Glumbumbles are magical flying insects that produce a treacle which will cause melancholy if consumed. They feed on nettles and nest in dark and secluded places. Unfortunately, they are known to infest beehives, having a devastating effect on the honey therein.
伤心虫是一种魔法飞虫，服下它们生产的糖蜜便会陷入难以自制的忧郁之中。伤心虫会以荨麻为食，喜欢在黑暗安静的位置中筑巢。不幸的是，伤心虫也会有入侵蜂巢的恶习，这种做法会对蜜蜂们产生的蜂蜜产生严重的负面影响。
LORE_Grounds_Chizperfles_desc|SWITCH:
Glumbumbles are magical flying insects that produce a treacle which will cause melancholy if consumed. They feed on nettles and nest in dark and secluded places. Unfortunately, they are known to infest beehives, having a devastating effect on the honey therein.
伤心虫是一种魔法飞虫，服下它们生产的糖蜜便会陷入难以自制的忧郁之中。伤心虫会以荨麻为食，喜欢在黑暗安静的位置中筑巢。不幸的是，伤心虫也会有入侵蜂巢的恶习，这种做法会对蜜蜂们产生的蜂蜜产生严重的负面影响。
LORE_Grounds_DefensiveWall_desc:
Along with powerful protective enchantments, these defensive ramparts have safeguarded Hogwarts castle for centuries. The ancient rooms and corridors along the ramparts might be worth exploring, as they harbour mysteries of their own.
千百年来，这些固若金汤的城墙与强大的保护魔法共同守护着霍格沃茨城堡的安全。城墙边林立的古代厅堂与走廊也是绝佳的探索目标，谁知道里面潜藏着什么样的秘密。
LORE_Grounds_Owls_desc:
School owls and owls owned by students can be found in the Hogwarts Owlery. One is advised to explore carefully, keeping an eye out for owl droppings and regurgitated mouse skeletons.
学校公用的与学生自己的猫头鹰都居住在霍格沃茨猫头鹰屋中。在这里探索时，千万要留意头顶落下的猫头鹰“炸弹”以及它们反刍出来的老鼠骨头。
LORE_Grounds_QuidditchHoops_desc:
The Hogwarts Quidditch pitch is the site of intense house rivalries, as Chasers, Beaters, Keepers, and Seekers take to the skies in pursuit of the Quidditch Cup. That is, of course, when the favourite sport of the wizarding world has not been cancelled for the year by an exceptionally oblivious headmaster.
霍格沃茨魁地奇球场向来是各学院的激烈角逐之地，为了争夺魁地奇杯，无数的追球手、击球手、守门员与找球手都会在天空中你追我赶，拼搏竞争。当然，这指的是那位对师生们此起彼伏的不满意见充耳不闻的校长还未取消这一魔法世界中最受欢迎的体育竞技运动之前的事情了。
LORE_GryffTower_Gregory: Statue of Gregory the Smarmy|马屁精格雷戈里的雕像
LORE_GryffTower_Gregory_desc:
This statue with an ingratiating grin depicts the medieval wizard Gregory the Smarmy, the wizard famous for inventing Gregory's Unctuous Unction, a potion that makes the drinker believe whoever gave them the potion is their best friend.
这尊挂着谄媚奸笑的雕像描绘的是中世纪巫师马屁精格雷戈里，此人以发明格雷戈里奉承剂而闻名于世，只要让对方饮下这种魔药，饮用者便会将提供魔药之人视作自己这辈子最要好的朋友。
LORE_GryffTower_Staircase: Gryffindor Dormitory Staircase|格兰芬多的宿舍楼梯
LORE_GryffTower_Staircase_desc:
This staircase in the Gryffindor common room leads to the girls' dormitory. Due to arguably antiquated notions, the stairs immediately turn into a slide if any boy tries to climb them.
格兰芬多公共休息室的这段楼梯通往女生寝室。因为某种守旧的思想，楼梯在察觉到男生踏上时便会立即变为一道滑坡。
LORE_GryffTower_StuffedLion_desc:
This stuffed replica of the Gryffindor mascot is ferociously adorable in its little knitted red sweater.
格兰芬多吉祥物的填充玩具，穿着小小红毛衣的勇猛狮子显得格外可爱。
LORE_HogsHead_Docks: Hog's Head Docks|猪头酒吧码头
LORE_HogsHead_Docks_desc:
These docks outside the Hog's Head Inn offer a pleasant place to sit and relax, if one can do so whilst only a stone's throw from whatever nefarious goings-on may be occurring in the notoriously shady inn.
猪头酒吧外的码头给客人们提供了坐下放松的好位置，只是身后一墙之隔便是臭名昭著的酒吧内部，能否在乌烟瘴气的环境之中安心休息实在是有待商榷。
LORE_HogsHead_MountedHog: Mounted Hog's Head|架设好的猪头酒吧
LORE_HogsHead_MountedHog_desc:
This mounted hog's head rolls its eyes and snuffles its nose as it oversees the seedy atmosphere and decidedly interesting clientele of the Hog's Head. 
墙上翻着白眼耸着鼻子的大猪头永远在监视着乌烟瘴气的酒馆与其不同寻常的客人们。
LORE_Honeydukes_Bonbons_desc:
These treats explode when eaten. Although they are unlikely to cause serious injury, one is advised to chew carefully.
吃下后会在嘴里爆炸的零食。虽然基本不会造成严重的伤势，但建议还是要小心咀嚼。
LORE_Honeydukes_Shop_desc:
Honeydukes sweet shop sells a variety of magical sweets – from Fizzing Whizzbees to Exploding Bonbons. Customers would be wise to know precisely what effect they may experience before sampling this shop’s wares.
蜂蜜公爵点心铺专售各类魔法糖果：从滋滋蜜蜂糖到爆炸夹心糖应有尽有。建议顾客们在品尝店里的样品之前，一定要先确保自己已经明确了解这些糖果的实际效果。
LORE_Honeydukes_Whizzbees_desc:
These delicious sweets, rumoured to contain Billywig stings, are small sherbet balls that when consumed will levitate one a few inches off the ground.
据说这些美味雪芭球中含有比利威格蛰刺成分，吃下后会让食用者暂时飘浮在离地数英寸的高度上。
LORE_HospitalWing_UnicornFountain_desc:
The majestic unicorn fountain gives an air of serenity and calm to the hospital wing at Hogwarts.
庄严的独角兽喷泉为霍格沃茨的校医院带来了一丝静谧与平和。
LORE_HuffBasement_Barrels_desc:
To enter the Hufflepuff common room, one must tap the barrel two from the bottom, middle of the second row, in the rhythm of ‘Helga Hufflepuff.’ An errant tap will result in being denied access and doused in vinegar.
如果想要开启赫奇帕奇公共休息室的大门，进去之前一定要敲击木桶，从上往下倒数第二行第二排的中间位置，敲的时候要按照“赫尔加赫奇帕奇”的节奏敲。一旦敲错，等待着你的不光是被拒之门外，还要被泼一身醋。
LORE_HuffBasement_MatchingTables_desc:
When Hogwarts house-elves place prepared food on these tables, it is magically transferred to the tables in the Great Hall directly above.
放置在这些桌子上之后，霍格沃茨家养小精灵烹饪的美食便会被神奇地直接传送至礼堂中对应的餐桌正上方。
LORE_HuffBasement_PearPortrait_desc:
If one tickles the pear in this still-life painting of a bowl of fruit, it will giggle before turning into a doorknob to allow entry to the Hogwarts kitchens.
如果有人轻挠这副水果静物画中的梨子，它就会咯咯直笑并转变成开启霍格沃茨厨房的门把手。
LORE_HuffBasement_SmallDoor: House-elf Living Quarters|家养小精灵生活区
LORE_HuffBasement_SmallDoor_desc:
Ever practical and creative, the Hogwarts house-elves have created a cosy village-like home for themselves among these barrels in the Hogwarts kitchens. Of course, one cannot presume to know what they're really like inside, as house-elves have an extraordinary magic of their own.
霍格沃茨家养小精灵实际且富有创意，他们在霍格沃茨厨房的这些木桶中为自己打造了一个舒适的村庄式小窝。当然，没人知道他们内心的真实情况，因为家养小精灵拥有他们自己非凡的魔力。
LORE_HuffBasement_Staircase: Hufflepuff Dormitory Staircase|赫奇帕奇宿舍楼梯
LORE_HuffBasement_Staircase_desc:
This staircase in the Hufflepuff common room leads to the girls' dormitory. Due to arguably antiquated notions, the stairs immediately turn into a slide if any boy tries to climb them.
赫奇帕奇公共休息室的这段楼梯通往女生寝室。因为某种守旧的思想，楼梯在察觉到男生踏上时便会立即变为一道滑坡。
LORE_HuffBasement_Stairwell: House-Elf Recipe Book|家养小精灵菜谱
LORE_HuffBasement_Stairwell_desc:
Rumoured to contain some of Helga Hufflepuff's original creations, this book holds a collection of Hogwarts students' favourite recipes over the centuries. Some dishes, like pickled Dirigible Plums, are likely an acquired taste. 
数百年来受到霍格沃茨学生们青睐的美味菜谱合集。据说里面包含了赫尔加·赫奇帕奇本人的一部分创意。其中也不乏类似“腌渍飞艇李”这种较为独特的菜品。
LORE_Library_LibrarianPortrait: The Old Librarian|初代图书管理员
LORE_Library_LibrarianPortrait_desc:
One of the first librarians of Hogwarts is depicted here. Rumour is that he had no tolerance whatsoever for noisy students and was known for his liberal use of the Silencing Charm at the slightest sneeze.
画中描绘着的是霍格沃茨有史以来的首批图书管理员之一。据说此人在职期间从不容忍学生们的吵闹行为，哪怕是最轻微的一声喷嚏，也会立刻被施上禁声魔咒。
LORE_Library_ViolentBooks_desc:
Best to avoid these books if possible – due not as much to their tendency to fly from one’s hands as to their content being spectacular drivel of no educational value whatsoever.
如无必要，建议尽可能远离这些书：不光光是因为它们喜欢到处乱飞，还因为里面的内容都是毫无教育价值的胡言乱语。
LORE_LibraryAnnex_DivinationObject_desc:
This standing model of a hand is demarcated to help students in the practice of palmistry. Depending upon the angle at which this model is read, it either has a considerable life line or is likely to die in a fortnight.
为了帮助学生们更好地理解手相术，这个直立摆放的手部模型表面还被仔细刻上了标注。根据阅读手相时的角度不同，这只手要么长命百岁，要么两周之内就会暴毙身亡。
LORE_LibraryAnnex_ZZT_Book: Book on Intermediate Transfiguration|《中级变形术》
LORE_LibraryAnnex_ZZT_Book_desc:
This book is designed to help guide the student who wishes to pursue more complicated types of Transfiguration. Professor Weasley often recommends it to her advanced students as a bit of light reading.
这本教科书将能够为那些想要学习变形学中更深奥部分的学生们提供帮助。韦斯莱教授经常会给班上的尖子生们推荐这本书作为课后读物。
LORE_MapChamber_Portraits: Map Chamber Portraits|地图密室群像
LORE_MapChamber_Portraits_desc:
This wall of towering portraits sits in a long-forgotten room beneath Hogwarts. One might ask what secrets they keep.
在霍格沃茨之下，一个早已被遗忘的房间里面，整整一面墙上都挂满了威严耸立的画像。这不禁让人好奇，他们到底守护着什么样的秘密。
LORE_Meet_NamedDugbogCoastal1:
Trapped by local villagers, this strange Dugbog has been on an unusually violent rampage of late.
被当地居民们困住之后，这只奇怪的泥怪就一直在大搞破坏。
LORE_Meet_NamedDugbogMarsh1:
An ancient, regal creature that lies deep within the bog. The locals speak of the Queen of the Swamp with reverence and fear.
古老而又尊贵的生物，一直以来都居住在沼泽最深处。一提到“沼泽女王”，当地人的脸上便会浮现起畏惧与崇敬的表情。
LORE_Meet_NamedDWExtortionistCaptain1:
Thought to be shadow incarnate, Ashwinder Aster Leigh's presence is unknown to anyone unless she wants it so.
作为人们眼中的阴影化身，只要不想被人发现，火灰蛇党艾斯特·莉莲就能神不知鬼不觉地进入一切地方。
LORE_Meet_NamedDWExtortionistMage1:
Charming, swift, and deadly, Gaspard Bovary is held in high esteem amongst the Ashwinders
魅力四射、身手不凡而且心狠手辣都是加斯帕德·波瓦利的形容词，此人在火灰蛇党中间也是备受推崇
LORE_Meet_NamedDWExtortionistSoldier1:
One of the informants for the Ashwinders, Gwendolyn Zhou is known for her creative problem-solving and incredible stealth.
作为火灰蛇党的其中一名线人，格温多琳·周素来以自己随机应变的灵活变通能力与不可思议的潜行技巧而出名。
LORE_Meet_NamedDWPoacherCaptain1:
The right-hand of Rookwood when it comes to the Poacher Pack, Tempeste Thorne is a force to be reckoned with. 
作为卢克伍德在打理盗猎者事务时的青睐副手，坦帕斯特·索恩绝对不容小觑。
LORE_Meet_NamedDWPoacherMage1:
Perseus Flint is allegedly set to inherit the title of head of the Flint family. Long suspected of criminal ties, Perseus does little to reign in his voracious criminal appetite. 
据说珀修斯·弗林特是继承弗林特家族族长之位的首席候选人。虽然早就被人怀疑与犯罪分子勾结，珀修斯却从来没有去掩饰过自己在犯罪生涯上的狼子野心。
LORE_Meet_NamedDWPoacherSoldier1: Iona Morgan is a young, scrappy, and up-and-coming member of the Poacher Pack. |艾欧娜·摩根虽然年纪轻轻但是好勇斗狠，现在已经成了盗猎者中的后起之秀。
LORE_Meet_NamedDWThiefCaptain1:
The charming and extravagant Silvanus Selwyn is known by all as a distinguished thief. Rumour has it that the family name and wealth keep any proof of wrongdoing from ever coming to trial.
斯尔瓦努斯·塞尔温放荡不羁而且出手阔绰，此人是一位远近闻名的“绅士大盗”。据说正是因为塞尔温家族的显赫名声与财富才使得斯尔瓦努斯一直以来免于承受牢狱之灾。
LORE_Meet_NamedDWThiefMage1:
A proficient pickpocket, Dunstan has always enjoyed the art of thieving. In fact, it was his light-fingeredness that led him to a friendless existence at Hogwarts. 
作为一名老练的扒手，顿斯坦从小便皈依了偷窃的艺术。正是因为这种手脚不干净的秉性，才使得他当年在霍格沃茨受尽唾弃。
LORE_Meet_NamedDWThiefSoldier1:
One of Rookwood's many thieves, Catrin Haggarty specialises in scams and fraud. She is an embarrassment to her brother, a local hamlet resident.
作为卢克伍德麾下众多盗匪之一，凯特琳·海嘉缇的专长在于欺诈与行骗。在她居住在本地村庄中的兄弟眼中，凯特琳就是家族的耻辱。
LORE_Meet_NamedGoblinChieftain1: Pergit is a goblin rebel who tenaciously fights under Ranrok's banner.|佩吉特是兰洛克麾下的一名叛乱妖精。
LORE_Meet_NamedGoblinChieftain2:
Belgruff the Bludgeoner is a fierce goblin rebel and activist bent on taking down wizardkind
棒槌贝格拉夫是一名凶狠的叛乱妖精与激进分子，一心想要毁灭所有巫师与女巫
LORE_Meet_NamedGoblinSorcerer1:
Grodbik is one of the mine sentries for Ranrok's cause. He takes his job seriously.
戈罗德比克是追随兰洛克的号召而叛乱的矿井工头之一。他十分重视自己的这份工作。
LORE_Meet_NamedGoblinSorcerer2: Ogbert the Odd is one of Ranrok's Loyalists|怪胎奥格波特是兰洛克麾下的一名追随者妖精
LORE_Meet_NamedInferius1:
Rumour has it that Bardolph Beaumont's jumper-clad reanimated corpse wanders somewhere near Hogsmeade. 
据说巴多尔芬·比约蒙特被复活的尸体就在霍格莫德附近徘徊游荡着，而且还穿着生前的那件套头毛衫。
LORE_Meet_NamedInferius2: This Inferius is the reanimated corpse of an unknown and unfortunate soul.|某位不知名的不幸逝者复活而成的阴尸。
LORE_Meet_NamedSpiderAcromantula1:
Native to the dense jungles of Southeast Asia, a beast like this is unheard of in the Highlands. It is likely this Acromantula escaped a foolhardy smuggler.
原产于东南亚茂密的丛林，这样的野兽在高地是闻所未闻的。这只八眼巨蛛很可能是从一个鲁莽的走私者手里逃出来的。
LORE_Meet_NamedSpiderLuminousTank1:
The mother of the terrible infestation has taken residence in the abandoned manor. 
导致宅邸荒废无人问津的可怕滋生的蛛母。
LORE_Meet_NamedSpiderVenomousEggsac1: A future infestation in the making|即将破壳而出的蜘蛛大军
LORE_Meet_NamedSpiderVenomousTank1:
It seems the father of the terrible infestation has taken residence in an abandoned manor. 
导致宅邸荒废无人问津的可怕滋生的蛛父。
LORE_Meet_NamedSpiderWoodlouseEggsac1: A future infestation in the making|即将破壳而出的蜘蛛大军
LORE_Meet_NamedSpiderWoodlouseTank1:
A horrific, giant arachnid living underneath Mary Portman's cottage in Aranshire
让人不寒而栗的庞然大物，这只巨型蜘蛛一直在阿兰郡的玛丽·波特曼宅邸地窖中徘徊
LORE_Meet_NamedTrollForest1: A forest troll with a penchant for theft|偷盗成性的森林巨怪
LORE_Meet_NamedTrollMountain1: A troll who, bafflingly, has chosen to live in a train tunnel|令人费解地选择在火车隧道中安家的巨怪
LORE_Meet_NamedTrollRiver1: A river troll that lives near a hamlet|居住在一座村庄附近的河流巨怪
LORE_Meet_NamedWolf1: It is known as a terrible, if not deadly, omen to those who encounter it.|遭遇这头野兽之人都将其认为是可怕而且致命的凶兆。
LORE_Neep_Cart: The Magic Neep Cart|神奇萝卜推车
LORE_Neep_Cart_desc:
This cart belongs to Timothy Teasdale, who runs The Magic Neep. He enjoys being in the ‘thick of things’ and engaging with customers outside the shop.
神奇萝卜老板提摩西·缇斯代尔的推车。缇斯代尔推崇“身临其境”的经营理念，因此经常会在店铺之外招待客人们。
LORE_NorthHall_AlchemyClass_desc:
An arcane subject offered to older students on the rare occasion when demand suffices, Alchemy focuses on the four natural elements and the science of transmutation.
偶尔如果有足够多数量的高年级学生感兴趣，学校便会酌情开设炼金术课程，这种玄奥神秘的学科研究的是大自然中的四种元素以及物质转换中蕴含的学问。
LORE_NorthHall_MuggleArtifact: Important Muggle Artefact|重要的麻瓜法器
LORE_NorthHall_MuggleArtifact_desc:
This misunderstood artefact is supposedly important to Muggle warfare, though most of wizardkind find the prospect of wielding such a hefty – weapon? – utterly head-scratching.
一种被误解的麻瓜法器。据说是麻瓜内战中会用到的“神兵利器”，不过绝大多数巫师都认为使用这种沉甸甸的玩意作为武器太过不切实际。
LORE_NorthHall_SleepingDragon_desc:
The Hogwarts motto 'Draco Dormiens Nunquam Titillandus' means ‘Never Tickle a Sleeping Dragon.’ Fortunately, this particular sleeping dragon is made of stone and will never awaken. It may be tickled to absolutely no effect.
霍格沃茨的校训为“Draco dormiens nunquam titillandus”，翻译过来的意思是“眠龙勿扰。”。幸运的是，这条“眠龙”真的只是一尊石头雕塑，因此并不会真的被惊醒。真的，就算使劲挠它痒痒也不会理你的。
LORE_NorthHall_Sphinx_desc:
The sphinx, a beast with a human head on a lion’s body, has been used by witches and wizards for centuries to guard valuables and secret hideaways due to its intelligence and affinity for puzzles and riddles.
斯芬克司是一种长着人头狮身的魔法野兽，无数个世纪以来，女巫与巫师都会利用具有高度智慧而且擅长谜题与谜语的斯芬克司来守护宝物或者是秘密通道。
LORE_NorthHall_WerewolfTapestry: Werewolf Saga Tapestries|狼人传奇挂毯
LORE_NorthHall_WerewolfTapestry_desc:
This set of tapestries tells the tragic tale of a witch bitten by a werewolf. She chose to flee from her home to protect her infant daughter and husband. Rumour has it that her daughter fell asleep to the howl of a wolf for years thereafter.
这套壁毯上的图案讲述了被狼人啃咬的女巫的悲剧传说。为了保护自己的丈夫与年幼的女儿，被咬的女巫被迫离开了自己的家。据说在那之后的岁月里，女巫的女儿们都会听着屋外的狼嚎入睡。
LORE_OldFool_Abandoned_desc:
The proprietor of this abandoned shop is said to have used a Shrinking Charm to aid in storing his inventory. However, a slight miscalculation ended up – for all intents and purposes – vanishing it. 
据说这间废弃商铺的前一任主人在整理库存时想要借助收缩魔咒帮忙。但也不知是有意无意，因为施法时计算失误，一不小心让所有商品都彻底消失了。
LORE_Ollivanders_WandBoxes: Ollivanders Wand Shop|奥利凡德魔杖店
LORE_Ollivanders_WandBoxes_desc:
Wands of a variety of woods and all manner of flexibility, each possessing one of three magical cores, choose their owners in this cosy, cluttered shop run by the amiable and knowledgeable Gerbold Ollivander. In the profession of wandcraft since 382 BC, the Ollivander family are considered the best wandmakers in Britain, if not the world.
各种木材和灵活性的魔杖，都拥有三个魔法核心其中之一，在这家由和蔼可亲且知识渊博的格尔博得·奥利凡德经营的舒适但杂乱的商店中选择自己的主人。自公元前 382 年以来，在魔杖制造行业中，奥利凡德家族被认为是英国乃至世界上最好的魔杖制造商。
Lore_Overland_AcromantulaCage_desc:
It seems someone has been collecting Acromantula parts for profit. Lucrative, perhaps, if one is willing to risk one's life to obtain the required inventory.
似乎有人想要靠出售八眼巨蛛的身体部位获利。虽然这是一本万利的生意，但前提是愿意拿命去“进货”。
Lore_Overland_Beehives_desc: The wizarding world needs honey for their tea as much as the Muggle world does.|和麻瓜们一样，魔法世界的居民们泡茶时也会用到蜂蜜。
Lore_Overland_BigTree_desc:
This gorgeous tree has served as a home to countless Bowtruckles, fairies, and even, rumour has it, an Augurey or two. Many simply enjoy it for its shade.
这棵枝繁叶茂的大树是无数护树罗锅的家园，除此以外偶尔还能看见仙女，据说有人还在上面亲眼看见过一两只卜鸟身影。不过对于大多数人来说，大树投下的阴影就是绝佳的避暑之地。
Lore_Overland_Binoculars: Broken Binoculars|坏掉的双筒望远镜
Lore_Overland_Binoculars_desc:
These broken binoculars were left here by Muggles attempting to track what they suspected was an odd-looking bear but what was likely a Demiguise. They could not for the life of them understand how something could seem to disappear so quickly.
想要追查“神秘怪熊”的麻瓜们留下的破损望远镜，不过他们要找的很有可能只是一只隐形兽。估计麻瓜们怎么也想不到，竟然存在瞬间就能消失得无影无踪的生物存在。
LORE_Overland_BrokenBothy_desc:
This broken-down old bothy used to shelter travelling witches and wizards from the elements. Over time, however, the surrounding bog began to reclaim the bothy. These days, it only plays host to the odd Dugbog or two.
曾经为过路的女巫与巫师们遮风挡雨的破旧茅屋。只是随着岁月变迁，周围的沼泽逐渐压垮了小小的茅屋。现在这里已经成为了偶尔的一两个泥怪的巢穴。
Lore_Overland_CaretakersTools_desc:
One might surmise that this set of tools could be enchanted to create all sorts of furnishings for a cosy hut – as large as the occupant may need.
一套似乎是带着魔力的工具，如果有需要应该能够帮助住户创造出各式各样装点惬意小屋的物件。
Lore_Overland_ChocolateFrogs_desc:
Likely left behind by a Hogwarts student visiting Hogsmeade, these enchanted confections hop around like real frogs and each comes with a collectible card featuring a famous witch or wizard.
很有可能是哪位霍格沃茨的学生拜访霍格莫德时无意间落下的东西，这些带着魔力的糖果会像有生命的真青蛙一样跳来跳去，而且每一份的包装里面都包含了一张著名巫师或者是女巫的可收藏卡片。
Lore_Overland_CinnamonBark_desc:
It seems that at least one goblin finds the food at this encampment at bit bland and has taken to adding cinnamon bark to their stew to liven it up.
似乎不止一名妖精觉得营地里供应的餐食过于寡淡无味，所以就开始往炖菜里添加了能够提供额外风味的肉桂树树皮。
Lore_Overland_Compass_desc:
Unfortunately, the fact that this antique Muggle compass was dropped here means the Muggle who dropped it is probably wandering through Wales by now.
不幸的是，这块古董麻瓜罗盘出现在这里的事实，意味着它原本的主人可能已因迷失方向而进入了威尔士。
Lore_Overland_Doily_desc:
The locals say that this doily was left as tribute to a beloved house-elf who dreamed of one day wearing it.
据说这块垫布是献给某位广受爱戴的家养小精灵的吊唁礼物，那位小精灵生前一直梦想着有一天能够戴上。
Lore_Overland_DoxyEgg_desc:
Stolen by poachers for use in potions, these black eggs come from a Doxy – a magical beast sometimes mistaken for a fairy. 
表面乌黑一片的狐媚子蛋，这种魔法野兽偶尔会被人误认为是仙子，这些蛋则是盗猎者偷来制作魔药的原料。
Lore_Overland_Dummies_desc:
The residents of Feldcroft sometimes use these to practise their spell-casting – especially in light of recent goblin attacks.
费德罗特的居民们偶尔会利用这些假人练习咒语，鉴于最近妖精袭击事件不断，也算是明智之举。
Lore_Overland_Fudge_desc:
Made with the leaves of the Alihotsy tree, this fudge is a delightful confection that causes uncontrollable laughter.
使用鬣狗树的叶片制作的软糖，吃下后会让人不受控制地大笑。
Lore_Overland_Ginger_desc:
The barkeep in Keenbridge keeps a stock of ginger root handy to fend off his customers' nausea – and keep them imbibing a bit longer.
肯桥的酒保经常会储备大量的姜根，除了能够随手帮助酒客们止吐外，还能促进他们继续享受酒精的快乐。
Lore_Overland_HebrideanBlackScale: Hebridean Black Scale|赫布底里群岛黑龙鳞片
Lore_Overland_HebrideanBlackScale_desc:
The Hebridean Black is a large dragon that can grow to over nine metres in length. A large, rough scale, originally belonging to one of these beasts, is one of the prized possessions that Archie Bickle keeps in his hideout.
赫布底里群岛黑龙是能够成长到超过九米长的巨大龙种。这块原本属于其中一头黑龙的巨大且坚硬的鳞片是阿尔奇·比科尔最珍贵的宝物之一，他平常都会将这块大鳞片放在自己的藏身点保管。
Lore_Overland_HogsmeadeStation: Hogsmeade Station Ticket Office|霍格莫德车站售票厅
Lore_Overland_HogsmeadeStation_desc:
This station has stood here since the early 1800s when Minister for Magic Ottaline Gambol acquired a steam engine train to transport students to Hogwarts. The station appeared in Hogsmeade virtually overnight just after the train did. The operation involved using a lot of Memory Charms on Muggle workers and the largest mass Concealment Charm ever performed in Britain.
在1800年代初期，时任魔法部部长的奥塔莱恩·甘伯专门弄来了一台蒸汽火车负责运送学生们前往霍格沃茨，于是这处站点也一同应运而生。当列车抵达霍格莫德后，这座车站几乎是一夜之间便拔地而起。这项建筑学上的壮举涉及到了针对众多麻瓜劳工的遗忘魔咒，以及迄今为止全不列颠群岛最大规模的群体性隐匿魔咒。
Lore_Overland_Horn_desc:
This oddly-shaped horn was used centuries ago by a Muggle boatman to keep ‘monsters’ in the water at bay as travellers crossed by boat. Of course, it did no such thing, as no magical water beast would be repelled by a horn. More likely, the boatman was simply lucky – until he wasn’t.
数百年前，一位麻瓜船夫便是使用这个奇形怪状的号角驱散水中栖息的“怪物”并保护过往的渡船。当然这只是麻瓜们的幻想，毕竟世上没有任何一种水生魔法野兽会惧怕号角的声响。很有可能那位船夫只是纯粹运气好……直到最后。
Lore_Overland_JeweledBrooch_desc:
The gorgeous brooch depicts a magical bird of some sort. Which particular magical bird is unclear, but some believe it’s meant to represent one of medieval Irish druidess Cliodna’s birds who sang the sick to sleep.
描绘了某种魔法飞鸟的华丽胸针。虽然不确定上面的魔法飞鸟种类，但有人认为这代表着中世纪的爱尔兰德鲁依特女教徒克丽奥娜豢养的飞鸟，据说那些鸟儿能够安抚病患者们入睡。
Lore_Overland_Lovage_desc:
This memorial serves as a grim reminder of the power of magical beasts. Years ago, a young witch was killed here by a Graphorn as she awaited her true love. That love now returns to this spot to remember her and leave a bouquet of lovage, her favourite plant. 
向世人警示着魔法野兽的危险性的阴郁纪念碑。多年以来，一位在这里等待着真爱归来的女巫成为了紫角兽的牺牲品。现在那位幸存的爱人会定期来这里故地重游，每次还会留下一束女巫生前最喜欢的独活草。
Lore_Overland_MurtlapTentacles_desc:
Murtlap tentacles are a rare potion ingredient known to raise resistance to certain Dark charms and contain healing properties. An overdose, however, can cause purple ear-hair.
莫特拉鼠胡须是一种稀有魔药原料，除了拥有治疗作用外还能提高针对特定黑魔法的抗性。不过要注意的是，过量使用将导致耳朵里生长出紫色的毛发。
Lore_Overland_OilLamp_desc:
This oil lamp may have been left here by a wayward Muggle traveller – or, perhaps more likely, by a witch or wizard who dropped it in frustration after misplacing their wand and being unable to cast Lumos. 
有可能某位迷途的麻瓜旅行者留下来的油灯，不过也很有可能是哪位女巫或巫师因为落下魔杖无法施放“荧光闪烁”时气急败坏的备用选择。
Lore_Overland_Onion_desc:
Pungous Onion is a particularly powerful onion used in some potions, including the Cure for Boils. It’s best not to touch it with bare hands.
潘古斯葱是一种能够用于包括治疗疥疮魔药在内的多种魔药的刺激洋葱。处理这种洋葱时一定要戴好手套。
Lore_Overland_PeruvianDarkness: Peruvian Instant Darkness Powder|秘鲁隐身烟雾弹
Lore_Overland_PeruvianDarkness_desc:
When thrown in the air, this powder from Peru creates an impenetrable darkness resistant to most light-creation spells. The Ashwinders have been using it to steal from surrounding areas without detection.
这种源自秘鲁的粉末被洒向空中后便会立刻创造出一道几乎密不透风的黑暗，足以抵消绝大多数咒语创造出来的光芒。这附近的火灰蛇党一直在利用这种粉末悄无声息地行窃。
Lore_Overland_PumpkinFizz_desc:
Pumpkin Fizz is a fashionable carbonated drink with a pumpkin flavour. It has yet to become as popular here as Butterbeer, but one never knows.
南瓜汽水是一种带有南瓜味的时尚碳酸饮料。它在这里还没有像黄油啤酒一样受欢迎，但人们永远不知道。
Lore_Overland_RootCottage_desc:
This idyllic country cottage belongs to an elderly Squib who chose to live in the wizarding world rather than try to integrate with Muggles like some Squibs do. He is content to farm his land non-magically and supply local hamlets with fresh fruits and vegetables, although he will accept the occasional Engorgement Charm on a gourd or two.
这座富有田园气息的乡间小屋属于一位年迈哑炮，他并没有像部分哑炮一样融入麻瓜社会，而是选择了继续在魔法世界中居住。现在他通过非魔法手段平静地耕耘着自己的田地，并且为当地的村庄提供着各类新鲜蔬菜瓜果，不过也会很乐意接受偶尔路过的人们给菜地施加的膨胀魔咒。
Lore_Overland_RunespoorEgg_desc:
Produced via the mouth of the three-headed snake, Runespoor eggs are known to enhance mental agility and as such are often used in potions.
长着三个脑袋的如尼纹蛇会从自己的嘴里产出蛋，如尼纹蛇蛋拥有着提高智慧的能力，因此经常会被用于魔药之中。
Lore_Overland_Scarecrow_desc:
This mischievous-looking scarecrow was long ago enchanted to watch over the garden and ward off crows but now simply harasses gardeners by shouting insults at them while they work.
很久以前，人们为这个坏笑的稻草人施了魔法想让它帮助照料田地并赶跑偷吃的乌鸦，但现在这家伙变得只会在园丁们辛勤工作时咒骂骚扰他们。
Lore_Overland_Skeleton_desc:
This dragon skeleton may have been here for years – or it could be the result of recent poaching activity. Be wary.
这具龙类的骷髅很有可能已经在这里沉睡了许多，不过也有可能是最近猖狂盗猎行为的产物。千万要小心。
Lore_Overland_SpiderSign_desc:
Evidently a spider infestation has made this area particularly treacherous. One wonders how many areas could use a sign like this.
看来这块区域已经成为了蜘蛛滋生的危险之地。谁知道还有多少地方遇到了类似的困扰。
Lore_Overland_TiltedHouse_desc:
The locals call this the Tilted House due to the odd angle at which it sits wrapped in the roots of the overhanging tree.
之所以被当地人冠以“歪倒之屋”的名字，是因为这间房子以奇怪的角度依靠在了头顶高耸大树的巨大树根之上。
Lore_Overland_Venom_desc:
Both extremely valuable and extremely poisonous, this venom is secreted from the pincers of the carnivorous Acromantula. For obvious reasons, it is much easier to harvest the venom from a dead spider than a living one.
极其珍贵而又无比致命，这种毒液是来源于八眼巨蛛的毒钳的分泌物。众所周知，与活的蜘蛛相比，死蜘蛛才是采集毒液时更为方便而且安全的选择。
Lore_Overland_Well: The Feldcroft Well|费德罗特水井
Lore_Overland_Well_desc:
The well in Feldcroft ran dry some four hundred years ago during a great drought. Sadly, many perished as a result, including at least one young boy whose father refused to speak for years thereafter. Legend says that all was saved when a group of benevolent witches and wizards used a never-before-seen powerful magic to restore water to the region.
自从距今四百多年前的一次严重旱灾过后，费德罗特的水井就再也没有流淌过。当年的天灾夺走了无数人的性命，其中就包括了一名小男孩，在之后的许多年里，痛失爱子的父亲再也没有开口说过话。传说当时是一群善良的女巫与巫师们运用了前所未有的强大魔法，才让当地的人们重新获得了生存所需的水源。
LORE_PinkFatLady_desc:
This portrait guards the Gryffindor common room, requiring a password from any who wish to enter. She and her friend Violet are known to wander among the other portraits, periodically helping themselves to vats of wine therein.
守护着格兰芬多公共休息室的画像，只有知道正确的口令才能进入。胖夫人和她的好朋友维奥莱特经常会去其他画框中“串门”，并通过这种方式用其他画像中的美酒犒劳自己。
LORE_Pippins_Brewing_desc:
J. Pippin’s Potions, established in 1753, is the apothecary in Hogsmeade where proprietor Parry Pippin sells a wide variety of potions and their ingredients.
始建于1753年的J·皮聘魔药店是霍格莫德的专属药店，店主佩利·皮聘售卖着各式各样的魔药与原料。
LORE_Plaza_Hengist: Hengist of Woodcroft|伍德克夫特的汉吉斯
LORE_Plaza_Hengist_desc:
This statue is of Hufflepuff Hengist of Woodcroft, believed to be the founder of the village of Hogsmeade after having been driven from his home by Muggle persecutors.
来自赫奇帕奇学院的“伍德克夫特的汉吉斯”的雕像。他是被麻瓜迫害者赶出的家门之后，才创建的霍格莫德。
LORE_Plaza_Hengist_desc|SWITCH:
This statue is of Hufflepuff Hengist of Woodcroft, believed to be the founder of the village of Hogsmeade after having been driven from his home by Muggle persecutors.
来自赫奇帕奇学院的“伍德克夫特的汉吉斯”的雕像。他是被麻瓜迫害者赶出的家门之后，才创建的霍格莫德。
LORE_Plaza_Hengist|SWITCH: Hengist of Woodcroft|伍德克夫特的汉吉斯
LORE_PostOffice_SortedMail_desc:
These chutes in the Post Office magically sort various bits of mail. The Post Office itself houses over 200 owls, colour-coded based on how quickly a particular letter or parcel needs to be delivered. 
邮局中的这些滑道会通过魔法之力将经过的邮件分门归类。根据投递信件与包裹的速度及能力，邮局会对居住其中的两百多只猫头鹰按颜色区分管理。
Lore_PunpkinFizz_desc:
Pumpkin Fizz is a fashionable carbonated drink with a pumpkin flavour. It has yet to become as popular here as Butterbeer, but one never knows.
南瓜汽水是一种含有真正南瓜汁的新潮碳酸饮料。虽然目前还没有达到黄油啤酒一样风靡各地，但前途无量。
LORE_RavTower_Bust_desc:
This bust created in honour of Ravenclaw house resides in the lofty Ravenclaw Tower.
向拉文克劳塔楼学院致敬的雕像，坐落于拉文克劳塔楼之内。
LORE_RavTower_Doorknocker_desc:
To gain entrance to the Ravenclaw common room, one must solve a rather esoteric riddle, using logic and reasoning, posed by the eagle doorknocker.
如果想要被批准进入拉文克劳公共休息室，学生们必须先利用逻辑与推理解开老鹰门环提出的晦涩谜语。
Lore_RunespoorEgg_desc:
This is the egg of the magical, three-headed snake known as the Runespoor. Each of the Runespoor's heads allegedly serves a different function: the left head is the planner, the middle is the dreamer and the right is the critic. Runespoor eggs are a rare and valuable ingredient in potions to stimulate mental agility.
被称为如尼纹蛇的三头魔法大蛇产下的蛋。据说如尼纹蛇的每一个脑袋都对应着不同的功能：左侧的脑袋负责规划，中间的脑袋负责梦想，而右侧的则负责批判。如尼纹蛇的蛋具有提高智慧的能力，因此成为了罕见而且宝贵的魔药原料。
LORE_Scrivenshaft_Cats: Scrivenshaft Cats|斯克里文舍夫的猫咪们
LORE_Scrivenshaft_Cats_desc:
These cats seem to stay close to Scrivenshaft’s quill shop. Perhaps it’s the feather quills that entice them – or perhaps it’s the treats the owner often leaves for them.
这些猫一直在斯克里文舍夫的羽毛笔店外面徘徊。它们也许是把羽毛笔当成了玩具，或者也有可能是因为店主经常会放在外面的美味小零食。
LORE_SlyDungeons_DeathDayDun: Deathday Party Room|忌辰晚会房间
LORE_SlyDungeons_DeathDayDun_desc:
This gloomy, spacious chamber in the lower dungeons of Hogwarts is perfect for occasional Deathday party celebrated here by the castle ghosts. Most mortals will want to avoid such festivities, as the food served is frequently rotting so the ghosts can detect its aroma.
霍格沃茨下部地牢中的这个房间格外宽敞阴郁，最适合承办为城堡中幽灵们准备的忌辰晚会。只是绝大多数生者都对这种庆典避犹不及，这是因为幽灵们只能够勉强“感应”到食物的气味，因此宴席上供应的“美食”皆是恶臭至极的腐败物。
LORE_SlyDungeons_KelpieStatue_desc:
This statue depicts the Kelpie, a shapeshifting water demon native to Ireland and Great Britain, which usually takes the form of a long-maned horse. The largest Kelpie ever reported is the Loch Ness monster in Scotland.
一尊水妖雕像，这种拥有变形能力的水怪源自爱尔兰与大不列颠地区，通常会以长毛骏马的形象显现在人们的面前。苏格兰的“尼斯湖水怪”是有史以来被人记录到的最为庞大的水妖。
LORE_SlyDungeons_Sink_desc:
Scratched into one of the copper taps on this seemingly ordinary sink in the girls’ toilets is a small snake. No one knows what it means.
女生盥洗室中的一座普通水池，其中一处铜制水龙头上雕刻着小蛇的图案。迄今为止，还没有人知道那其中的含义。
LORE_SlyDungeons_Staircase: Slytherin Dormitory Staircase |斯莱特林的宿舍楼梯
LORE_SlyDungeons_Staircase_desc:
This staircase in the Slytherin common room leads to the girls' dormitory. Due to arguably antiquated notions, the stairs immediately turn into a slide if any boy tries to climb them.
斯莱特林公共休息室的这段楼梯通往女生寝室。因为某种守旧的思想，楼梯在察觉到男生踏上时便会立即变为一道滑坡。
LORE_Spintwitches_Quidditch: Spintwitches Sporting Needs |旋转女巫体育必需品
LORE_Spintwitches_Quidditch_desc:
Run by the amiable Albie Weekes, this shop sells all manner of wizarding sporting goods, including the latest broom models. Gossip around town is that Albie himself is working on a number of broom enhancements.
这间由和蔼可亲的艾尔比·威克斯打理的店铺专门出售各类魔法体育运动用品，其中包括最新款式的飞天扫帚。据说艾尔比本人正在研制一系列针对飞天扫帚的新型魔法。
LORE_TeaShop_Decor_desc:
Reflective of proprietor Mrs Steepley's taste, this tea shop is awash in the colour pink and frills. A cheery, tinkly bell chimes whenever a customer enters.
这间茶馆被打造成了符合斯蒂普莱夫人的品味的浓郁粉色与荷叶边。有顾客来访时，门前的欢快铃铛便会叮当作响。
LORE_TomesnScrolls_Staircase_desc:
This enchanted staircase in Tomes and Scrolls reveals itself when a particular book is moved. The proprietor here, Thomas Brown, sells a variety of written products, including spellcrafts – handy for conjuration.
魔典与卷轴中一段带有魔力的阶梯，当有人拿起特定书籍后便会显现。店主托马斯出售着包括变幻需要的幻术配方等各类文书制品。
LORE_TransCourtyard_Fountain_desc:
This fountain in the Transfiguration Courtyard has a likeness of a wyvern on top and serves as a relaxing place for students to gather. Despite rumours to the contrary, possibly started by Sir Cadogan, this is most assuredly not meant to be the Wyvern of Wye, slain by the lively knight in spite of himself.
变形学庭院中的喷泉，顶部是飞龙盘踞的形象，这里是学生休闲聚会的场所。尽管可能由卡多根爵士发起的谣言与此相反，但这绝对不是那条被精力充沛的骑士不顾一切杀死的怀伊飞龙。
LORE_Viaducts_DetentionRoom_desc:
This chamber allegedly served as the school's preferred location for punishing students. Though physical torture is no longer utilised during detention, the aura of such horrific practices lingers.
据说在当年，屡教不改的学生都会被关进这个房间惩罚。尽管当代的关禁闭处理已经不再涉及体罚，但时至今日，这里仿佛依旧能够听见那种皮开肉绽的痛苦哭喊。
LORE_Viaducts_HeadlessHuntTapestry: Headless Hunt Tapestry|无头猎手挂毯
LORE_Viaducts_HeadlessHuntTapestry_desc:
This tapestry depicts the headless hunt, a group of headless ghosts organised by Sir Patrick Delaney-Podmore to play various headless games. They are notorious for refusing to admit Gryffindor house ghost Sir Nicholas de Mimsy-Porpington to their ranks as he is not entirely headless.
这块壁毯上描绘着的是无头猎手，由帕特里克·德波魔先生组织起来的这个无头幽灵俱乐部经常会聚在一起玩各种“无头”游戏。除此以外，几乎所有人都知道他们屡屡以“未彻底人头落地”为由拒绝格兰芬多学院幽灵尼古拉斯·德·敏西-波平顿爵士加入的恶劣行径。
LORE_Viaducts_PungentPassageway_desc:
This passage is relatively non-descript as far as passages go. However, the mishandling of a crop of Mimbulus mimbletonia in the sixteenth century – and the accompanying tsunami of Stinksap – left it with a rancid odour that even the strongest Scouring Charm cannot seem to eradicate.
作为一条通道而言，这里可以说是平淡无奇。但是在十六世纪发生的一桩不幸事件却让这里变得“臭名昭著”起来：当时有人错误处理了大片米布米宝田地，随之而来的滔天臭汁让这里永远留下了让人难以忍受的刺鼻恶臭，无论多么强效的除垢魔咒都无法将那股味道彻底清除。
LORE_Viaducts_SirCadogan: Portrait of Sir Cadogan|卡多根爵士的肖像
LORE_Viaducts_SirCadogan_desc:
Sir Cadogan was allegedly friends with Merlin himself, and as such became a sworn Knight of the Round Table – although he is only really known to the wizarding world. He is famous for his defeat of the Wyvern of Wye and now spends his days challenging students to duels.
据传卡多根爵士与梅林本人是好友，也因此成为了一名圆桌骑士，不过只有魔法世界才知晓爵士的存在。卡多根爵士因击败怀伊飞龙的英勇事迹而变得家喻户晓，现在爵士则会充满激情地邀请学生们与自己决斗。
LORE_Waggery_BurntCeiling_desc:
Proprietor Ellie Peck is a fierce protector of beasts, and will give you a fair price for any beasts in need of a safe home. Brood and Peck is the shop to visit for beast byproducts like Fwooper feathers and Niffler fur.
店主埃莉·佩克是野兽的保护者，她会为任何需要安全家园的野兽提供公平的价格。 珍禽异兽是购买恶婆鸟羽毛和嗅嗅毛皮等野兽副产品的商店。
LORE_WelcomeSign_desc:
The only all-wizarding village in Britain, Hogsmeade has been a favourite haunt of Hogwarts students – third-years and up – for centuries.
作为不列颠群岛之上唯一一座纯巫师村庄，霍格莫德数百年来一直是霍格沃茨三年级及以上的学生们的首选。
LORE_Well_desc:
The savvy traveller knows that some water wells may have more to offer than this relatively innocuous water well in the village of Hogsmeade.
聪明的旅人们知道，天底下并非所有的水井都像霍格莫德村庄中的这口普通水井那样平淡无奇。
LORE_Zonkos_Dungbomb_desc:
A favourite among pranksters, the Dungbomb produces a foul odour, causing anyone in the vicinity to evacuate posthaste.
粪弹是恶作剧专家们最青睐的选择之一，这种玩具在命中后将散发出一股恶臭，使得目标附近嗅觉正常之人都会立刻抱头鼠窜。
LORE_Zonkos_FrogSoap_desc:
An amphibious surprise awaits anyone who tries to wash with this particular bar of soap; once submerged in water, a cohort of wriggling tadpoles hatches right out of the suds.
如果想要用这种“肥皂”来清洗自己，那就准备好迎接一大帮“两栖惊喜”吧。沉入水中后，一大群扭动不停的蝌蚪们就会从中孵化并奔涌而出。
LORE_Zonkos_Shop_desc:
Frequented regularly by Hogwarts students and villagers alike, Zonko’s is the place to buy pranks and jokes in Hogsmeade.
佐科家的店铺里面永远能见到络绎不绝的霍格沃茨学生与周遭村民，这里是霍格莫德中购买各类恶作剧与开玩笑道具的最佳选择。
LOSTPAGES: Field Guide Pages|实战指南书页
LostPages_desc:
Collect the hidden Field Guide Pages to learn about the histories and secrets of the magical world
收集隐藏的实战指南书页，了解魔法世界的历史和秘密
LOW_WoundCleaningUpgrade1: Wiggenweld Potency I|振奋魔药效能 I
LOW_WoundCleaningUpgrade1_desc: Wiggenweld heals you to a greater effect.|提高振奋魔药的治疗效果。
LOW_WoundCleaningUpgrade1_requirements: Must be at least Level 10 and to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：至少到达10级
LOW_WoundCleaningUpgrade2: Wiggenweld Potency II|振奋魔药效能 II
LOW_WoundCleaningUpgrade2_desc: Wiggenweld heals you to a greater effect.|提高振奋魔药的治疗效果。
LOW_WoundCleaningUpgrade2_requirements: Must be at least Level 20 and to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：至少到达20级
Lumos_Desc: Allows you to see in dark areas or solve puzzles that require extra light|帮助照亮黑暗的区域，或者是为特定谜题提供额外光芒
Lumos_gameplay_desc: Allows you to see in dark areas or solve puzzles that require extra light|帮助照亮黑暗的区域，或者是为特定谜题提供额外光芒
MahendraKapoor: Mahendra Pehlwaan|马辛德拉·普拉霍瓦
Mallowsweet_Byproduct_desc:
Magical leaves used to open Merlin Trials. Mallowsweet seeds can be purchased from The Magic Neep. Can be grown in pots of any size.
用于开启梅林试炼的魔法叶片。可以在神奇萝卜购买香锦葵种子。可在任何大小的花盆中种植。
Mallowsweet_Desc:
A colourful plant that produces the leaves consumed in Merlin Trials. Mallowsweet seeds can be purchased from The Magic Neep. Can be grown in pots of any size.
颜色鲜艳的植物，产出的叶片能够用于开启梅林试炼。可以在神奇萝卜购买香锦葵种子。可在任何大小的花盆中种植。
Mallowsweet_Seed_Desc: Unlocks the ability to grow Mallowsweet in small pots|解锁使用小型花盆种植香锦葵的能力
Mandrake_Byproduct_desc:
A magical plant that shrieks when unearthed. Mandrakes can be used to stun and harm enemies in a radius. Mandrake seeds can be purchased at Dogweed & Deathcap. Can be grown in pots of any size.
被拔出泥土后会发出刺耳尖叫的魔法植物。曼德拉草能够伤害影响范围内的敌人并使其晕眩。可以在“茱萸和毒菇”购买曼德拉草种子。可在任何大小的花盆中种植。
Mandrake_desc:
A magical plant that shrieks when unearthed. Mandrakes can be used to stun and harm enemies in a radius. Mandrake seeds can be purchased at Dogweed & Deathcap. Can be grown in pots of any size.
被拔出泥土后会发出刺耳尖叫的魔法植物。曼德拉草能够伤害影响范围内的敌人并使其晕眩。可以在“茱萸和毒菇”购买曼德拉草种子。可在任何大小的花盆中种植。
Mandrake_Seed_desc: Unlocks the ability to grow Mandrakes in small pots|解锁使用小型花盆种植曼德拉草的能力
MannequinKL_desc:
Possessed by poltergeist trickery, these animated mannequins are relentless in the pursuit of their targets but are easily destroyed by many spells.
这些被调皮捣蛋鬼附身的人偶将会坚持不懈地追捕目标，不过绝大多数咒语都能够轻松摧毁它们。
Map_AncientMagic: Ancient Magic Hotspots|古代魔法热点
Map_AncientMagicHotspots: Ancient Magic Hotspots|古代魔法热点
MAP_HW_SUB_AstronomyTower_AstronomyStora: Astronomy Storage Room|天文学储藏室
MAP_HW_SUB_FacultyTower_StatueofBorisThe: Statue of Boris the Bewildered|糊涂波里斯雕像
MAP_HW_SUB_GryffindorTower_StatueofGrego: Statue of Gregory the Smarmy|马屁精格雷戈里的雕像
MAP_HW_SUB_RavenclawTower_5thYearDorms: Ravenclaw Fifth-Year Dormitories|拉文克劳五年级宿舍
MAP_HW_SUB_RavenclawTower_CommonRoom: Ravenclaw Common Room|拉文克劳公共休息室
MAP_HW_SUB_RavenclawTower_TowerLanding: Ravenclaw Tower Landing|拉文克劳塔登陆
MAP_HW_SUB_RavenclawTower_UpperclassmenC: Ravenclaw Upperclass Students Common Room|拉文克劳高年级学生公共休息室
MaryPortmanCorpse: Mary Portman's Corpse|玛丽·波特曼的遗体
MasterPoacher_tip_one_desc:
These witches and wizards are masters of Shield Charms and will deflect most attacks back at their opponents. Persistent Protego parries and counterattacks are the key to breaking through their defences and providing an opening to follow up with powerful spell combinations.
这些巫师与女巫精通护盾魔咒，因此能够反弹对手发动的绝大多数攻击。沉着冷静地通过盔甲护身持续招架与反击突破他们的防御，并利用空档机会发动强力咒语连招。
MatRefinerSlot: Material Refiner Budget|材料精炼装置额度
Maxima_Buff: Maxima Potion Buff|终极魔药增益
Maxima_Buff_desc: Your spells are powered up and deal increased damage|你的咒语被强化并造成更多伤害
Maxima_desc: Increases the drinker's spell damage for a limited amount of time|服下后能够暂时提高咒语伤害
Menu_AbandonQuestConfirm: Are you sure you want to abandon this Quest?|确定要放弃这个任务吗？
Menu_AbandonQuestConfirm_Desc: You may lose progress in this Quest if you abandon it|如果你放弃该任务，你可能会失去该任务的进度
Menu_AcceptGraphicsChanges: Accept Graphics Changes|接受图形的更改
Menu_AcceptGraphicsChanges_desc: Apply the graphic changes that have been selected|应用已选择的图像更改
Menu_AccessibilityRevelioBell: Hidden Object Nearby|附近有隐藏的物体
Menu_AccessQuickAction: Access Spell Selection|访问“咒语选择”
Menu_ActionDisabledMissionCritical_Messa: You can't do this right now|现在还不能这样做
Menu_Add_Secret_Ingredient: Add Secret Ingredient|添加神秘原料
Menu_Anti_Aliasing_desc:
Select anti-aliasing (edge smoothing) quality. Higher quality may reduce performance.
选择抗锯齿（边缘平滑）品质。更高的品质可能会降低性能。
Menu_AntiAliasingMode_desc:
Anti Aliasing improves the visual appearance of object edges and the overall quality of the image
抗锯齿可改善对象边缘的视觉外观和图像的整体品质
Menu_AppearanceCollections:
This is a collection of unique appearances that can be used to alter the look of any related gear in the Gear Menu. Only unique appearances earned from special activities are listed here, but the appearance list in the Gear Menu combines this list with basic appearances (automatically accumulated when looting).
这是一组独特的外观，可用于改变装备菜单中任何相关装备的外观。此处仅列出通过特殊活动所获得的独特外观，但装备菜单中的外观列表将该列表与基本外观结合在了一起（拾取时自动累积）。
Menu_ApplySettings_desc: Apply the selected settings to the game|将选定的设置应用到游戏中
Menu_ApplyToPlant: Apply to Plant|使用在植物上
Menu_ArachnophobiaMode_desc:
Swap out spider enemies with less frightening variants. This does not affect gameplay or difficulty.
用不那么吓人的种类来取代蜘蛛敌人。该选项不会影响游戏玩法或难度。
Menu_AudioCueLegend: Audio Visualiser Icon Key|按钮（可视化音频图标）
Menu_AudioCueOpacity: Audio Visualiser Icon Transparency|透明度（可视化音频图标）
Menu_AudioCueSize: Audio Visualiser Size|尺寸（可视化音频图标）
Menu_AutosaveDisclaimer1: Hogwarts Legacy supports and uses an autosave feature.|霍格沃茨之遗支持并使用自动储存功能
Menu_AutosaveDisclaimer2:
Please do not turn off your system or remove selected storage device when the autosave icon is being displayed.
显示自动储存图示时，请不要关闭系统或移除选定的储存设备。
Menu_AutosaveDisclaimer2|PS4:
Please do not turn off your PlayStation®4 Console or remove the selected USB extended storage drive when the autosave icon is being displayed
自动储存图标显示时，请勿关闭您的PlayStation®4主机或移除选定的USB扩充存储设备

Menu_EpilepsyWarning:
WARNING: READ BEFORE PLAYING
A very small percentage of individuals may experience epileptic seizures when exposed to certain light patterns or flashing lights. Exposure to certain patterns or backgrounds on a computer screen, or while playing video games, may induce an epileptic seizure in these individuals. Certain conditions may induce previously undetected epileptic symptoms even in persons who have no history of prior seizures or epilepsy. If you, or anyone in your family, have an epileptic condition, consult your physician prior to playing. If you experience dizziness, altered vision, eye or muscle twitches, loss of awareness, disorientation, any involuntary movement, or convulsions while playing a video or computer game, IMMEDIATELY discontinue use and consult your physician before resuming play.
警告：游玩前请先阅读
极少数人可能会在暴露于特定光线模式或闪光灯时，出现癫痫发作的情形。暴露于电脑屏幕的特定模式或背景，或是进行游戏时，可能会导致此类人士癫痫发作。即便是过往无癫痫发作情形或癫痫史的人士，在某些情况下也可能被诱发出先前未检测到的癫痫症状。若您或您家中的任何成员患有癫痫病，请在进行本游戏前向医生咨询。若您在玩视频或电脑游戏时发生头晕、视力模糊、眼睛或肌肉抽搐、失去意识、丧失方向感、任何不自主运动或惊厥，请立即停止游戏并在继续游戏前先向医生咨询。

Menu_LoreCollections:
This is a collection of lore found in Field Guide Pages discovered using Revelio. These pages can be discovered in Hogwarts, Hogsmeade, and the Highlands.
这是使用原形立现发现的实战指南书页的典故集合。这些书页可以在霍格沃茨，霍格莫德和高地中找到。
Menu_LostPages: Field Guide Pages|实战指南书页
Menu_LostPages_desc:
Field Guide Pages hidden throughout the world contain valuable knowledge. An inquisitive wizard ought to seek these pages out by their tell-tale glint, and with the aid of any number of spells and charms, uncover their scattered secrets.
隐藏在各地的实战指南书页记载着宝贵的知识。热爱刨根问底的巫师与女巫将能够通过一闪而过的光芒找到这些书页，或者也可以凭借各类咒语魔咒的帮助来了解其中的秘密。
Menu_Map_desc: Take a look and see where you are and where you want to go|瞧瞧自己身处何处，以及要迈向何方

Menu_Missions_desc:
Delve into the mysteries surrounding Hogwarts, face dangers, and make your mark on the world and those around you. Completing Quests will shape your story, and mould you into the witch or wizard you want to be.
了解更多霍格沃茨周围的奥秘、面对危险，并在世界和周围的人身上留下自己的印记。完成任务将塑造你的故事，并将你塑造成你想成为的巫师或女巫。

请前往Nintendo eShop免费下载语言DLC，或是继续使用英语音频。

Menu_Nurture_Desc:
Feed and brush this beast and it will release magical materials that can be woven into gear.
喂食并轻刷这只野兽，它便会放出可以编织进装备中的魔法材料。

Menu_Nurturing_SecretIngredient_ChangePo: Changes potion to {potion}|将魔药变更为

Menu_PerfMode_Reboot_Description:
You have made changes that require the title to reboot to take effect. Do you wish to reboot now?
你所做的变更需要重新启动游戏才能生效。要立即重新启动吗？
Menu_PerfMode_Reboot_Description_InGame:
You have made changes that require the title to reboot to take effect. Please reboot via the System Menu.
部分更改将在重启游戏后成效。请在系统菜单中选择重启。
Menu_PerfMode_Reboot_Title: Reboot To Apply Changes|重启以应用更改
Menu_PerfMode_Reset_Description: The games Performance Mode has been reset to a default selection.|游戏性能模式已重置为默认选择。
Menu_PerfMode_Reset_Title: Performance Mode reset to default|性能模式重置为默认
Menu_PerformanceMode_Desc_Fidelity:
Fidelity: A high-fidelity rendering mode favoring resolution and graphical quality.
保真：一种有利于分辨率和图像品质的高保真度渲染模式
Menu_PerformanceMode_Desc_Fidelity40FPS:
Balanced: A rendering mode aiming for a balance between resolution, graphics quality, and performance. Only available on supported output devices.
平衡：旨在平衡分辨率、图形品质和性能的渲染模式。仅可在受支持的输出设备上使用。
Menu_PerformanceMode_Desc_FidelityRT:
Fidelity With Raytracing: A higher-fidelity rendering mode featuring Raytracing.
光线追踪保真：具有光线追踪功能的高保真渲染模式。
Menu_PerformanceMode_Desc_Performance: Performance: A high-framerate mode favoring performance.|性能：有利于性能的高帧数模式。
Menu_PerformanceMode_Desc_PerformanceHFR:
HFR Performance: An ultra-high-framerate mode favoring maximum performance. Only available on supported output devices.
HFR性能：一种支持最高性能的超高帧数模式。仅可在受支持的输出设备上使用。
Menu_PerformanceMode_Desc_RequiresReboot: Requires reboot to apply changes.|需要重启以应用改动。
Menu_PerformanceMode_Fidelity_desc:
Fidelity: A high-fidelity rendering mode favoring resolution and graphical quality

Performance: A higher-framerate mode favoring performance

Fidelity With Raytracing: A higher-fidelity rendering mode featuring Raytracing  (Requires Title Reboot)
保真：一种有利于分辨率和图像品质的高保真度渲染模式

性能：一种有利于性能的高帧数模式

光线追踪保真：具有光线追踪功能的高保真渲染模式（需要重启游戏）
Menu_PerformanceMode_FidelityRT: Fidelity with Raytracing|光线追踪保真度
Menu_PerformanceMode_FidelityRT_desc:
Fidelity: A high-fidelity rendering mode favoring resolution and graphical quality (Requires Title Reboot)

Performance: A higher-framerate mode favoring performance (Requires Title Reboot)

Fidelity With Raytracing: A higher-fidelity rendering mode featuring Raytracing
保真：一种有利于分辨率和图像品质的高保真渲染模式（需要重启游戏）

性能：一种有利于性能的高帧数模式（需要重启游戏）

光线追踪保真：具有光线追踪功能的高保真渲染模式

Menu_PitchSettings: Player Voice Pitch|玩家语音音高
Menu_PlayGoWaitMessage: Please wait for game content installation to complete|请等待游戏内容安装完成
Menu_populationQuality_desc:
Set the quality of non-essential NPCs and creatures in the world. Impacts CPU performance.
设置世界中背景角色和生物的品质。影响CPU性能。
Menu_Popup_AbandonCreature: Return beast to the wild?|将野兽放归自然吗？
Menu_Popup_AbandonCreature_desc: This action cannot be undone|该行为不可撤销
Menu_Popup_ConfirmSwitchingAll: Alter all Architecture?|要变更所有架构吗？
Menu_Popup_ConfirmSwitchingAll_desc:
This will apply the current visuals and colours to all architecture of the Room of Requirement.
这会将目前的视觉效果及色彩应用至“有求必应屋”的所有架构。
Menu_PostProcessQuality_desc:
Set the quality of all post processing effects such as ambient occlusion, depth of field, motion blur and lens flares. Impacts GPU performance.
设置所有后期处理效果的品质，例如环境光遮蔽、景深、动态模糊和镜头光晕。影响GPU性能。
Menu_Potions_desc:
Learn the delicate art of brewing poisons, mixing remedies, and increasing your crafting abilities. Potions class will help any student achieve their ambition of becoming a skilled Potions master.
学习调制毒药、混合药物以及提高你制作技能的精致技艺。魔药课将帮助任何学生实现成为魔药学大师的抱负。
Menu_Potions_Effect_FailedCombination: Effect: Failed Combination|效果：合成失败
Menu_Potions_Effect_FasterBrewing: Effect: Faster Brewing|效果：加快调制
Menu_Potions_Effect_IncreasedYield: Effect: Increased Yield|效果：提升产量
Menu_PotionSteps_desc: The steps and instructions for how to brew the potion|调制魔药的步骤及指南
Menu_PressToStart_Keyboard: Press Any Key to Start|按任意键开始
Menu_PSO_Desc:
Depending on your hardware this may take a few minutes, please wait for the process to complete.
根据你的硬件，这可能需要几分钟，请稍等片刻以完成该过程。
Menu_QuitGameWarning: Are you sure you want to exit?|确定要退出吗？
Menu_QuitGameWarning_Desc:
All unsaved progress will be lost. It has been {0} minutes and {1} seconds since your last save.
所有未储存的进度都将遗失。自上次储存以来已经过了{0}分{1}秒。
Menu_QuitGameWarningFrontend_Desc: Quit to OS|退出至操作系统
Menu_RayTracing_desc: Enable/Disable ray tracing effects. This may reduce performance|启用/停用光线追踪效果。这可能会降低性能
Menu_RaytracingAmbientOcclusion: Ray Tracing Ambient Occlusion|光线追踪环境遮挡
Menu_RayTracingAmbientOcclusion_des: Adjust ray tracing ambient occlusion|调整光线追踪环境遮挡
Menu_RayTracingAmbientOcclusion_desc:
Toggle raytracing ambient occlusion. Impacts GPU and CPU performance. Requires raytracing capable hardware. Enabling/disabling raytracing requires rebooting the game.
切换光线追踪环境光遮挡。影响GPU和CPU性能。需要支持光线追踪的硬件。启用/停用光线追踪需要重启游戏。
Menu_RayTracingGeometry: Ray Tracing Geometry Quality|光线追踪几何品质
Menu_RayTracingGeometry_desc:
Affects the distance that geometry is included in raytraced effects. Higher settings include more detail for higher realism but can greatly impact GPU performance. Meant to be used in tandem with the other raytracing settings
影响几何体包含在光线追踪效果中的距离。较高的设定可包含更多细节，以达到更高的真实感，但会极大地影响GPU性能。旨在与其他光线追踪设定一起使用
Menu_RaytracingQuality: Ray Tracing Quality|光线追踪品质
Menu_RaytracingQuality_desc: Set the overall quality of raytracing effects. Greatly impacts GPU performance.|设置光线追踪效果的整体品质。极大地影响GPU性能。
Menu_RaytracingReflections: Ray Tracing Reflections|光线追踪反射
Menu_RaytracingReflections_DD: Ray Tracing Reflections Quality|光线追踪反射品质
Menu_RayTracingReflections_DD_desc:
Affects the quality of Raytraced Reflections in-game. Higher presets can greatly impact GPU performance.
影响游戏中光线追踪反射的品质。较高的预设值会极大地影响 GPU 性能。
Menu_RayTracingReflections_desc:
Toggle raytracing reflections. Impacts GPU and CPU performance. Requires raytracing capable hardware. Enabling/disabling raytracing requires rebooting the game.
切换光线追踪反射。影响GPU和CPU性能。需要支持光线追踪的硬件。启用/停用光线追踪需要重启游戏。
Menu_RaytracingShadows: Ray Tracing Shadows|光线追踪阴影
Menu_RaytracingShadows_DD: Ray Tracing Shadows Quality|光线追踪阴影品质
Menu_RayTracingShadows_DD_desc:
Affects the quality of Raytraced Shadows in-game. Higher presets can greatly impact GPU performance.
影响游戏中光线追踪阴影的品质。较高的预设值会极大地影响 GPU 性能。
Menu_RayTracingShadows_desc:
Toggle raytracing shadows. Impacts GPU and CPU performance. Requires raytracing capable hardware. Enabling/disabling raytracing requires rebooting the game.
切换光线追踪阴影。影响GPU和CPU性能。需要支持光线追踪的硬件。启用/停用光线追踪需要重启游戏。
Menu_Rebinding: Press any key to rebind|按任意键重新绑定
Menu_Rebinding_AreYouSure: Missing Input Controls|缺少输入操控
Menu_Rebinding_AreYouSure_desc:
Some actions have missing input controls, this may harm your experience. Are you sure you want to leave this screen?
某些动作尚未完成输入控制绑定，这可能将影响游戏体验。确定离开该界面？
Menu_RenderingResolution_Desc:
Select the resolution the game is being rendered. Lower resolutions will increase performance but result in reduced visual quality.
选择游戏渲染的分辨率。较低的分辨率会提升性能，但会导致视觉品质的下降。
MENU_REQUIREDLEVELNOTMET: Required Level not met|未达到所需等级
Menu_ResetSettings_desc: Discard unconfirmed graphic settings and revert to last confirmed values|放弃尚未确认的画质调整，并恢复至之前确认的数值
Menu_RestartFromLastCheckpoint: Restart from Last Checkpoint|从上一个检查点重新开始
Menu_RestartLastSave: Restart from Last Save|从上次储存位置重新开始
Menu_RestartLastSave_desc: Restart from your last save point|从上次储存位置重新开始
Menu_RGBLights_desc:
Turn the RGB lights on your keyboard, mouse, and other supported devices on or off
打开或关闭键盘、鼠标和其他所支持设备上的RGB灯
Menu_SancBonus_AdditionalForaging: Wild Plant Growth|野生植物生长
Menu_SancBonus_BillywigChance: Chance of Billywigs|比利威格几率

Reduce the cooldown after petting or playing with a beast|减少抚摸或与野兽玩耍后的冷却时间
Menu_SancBonus_FeedProcessingSpeed: Feed Processing Speed|饲料加工速度
Menu_SancExpansion_ConjBudget_Bog: Extra Conjuration budget in Bog Vivarium|沼泽饲养所额外的变幻额度
Menu_SancExpansion_ConjBudget_Coastal: Extra Conjuration budget in Coastal Vivarium|沿海饲养所额外的变幻额度

Menu_Sanctuary_desc:
Cultivate your skills in the Room of Requirement. The Room knows what you need and making use of it will allow you to hone your magical abilities.

Menu_UpscaleBrand_Desc:
Upscale technologies provide high resolution frames from lower resolution inputs. This can significantly improve performance. Some upscale technologies may not be available on your device.
上调技术可从低分辨率的输入提供高分辨率帧数，这将可以显著提高性能。你的设备可能无法使用某些上调技术。
MENU_UPSCALEMODE_DESC:
The upscale mode determines the resolution at which the frames are rendered. Quality modes render at a higher resolution, while Performance modes run at a higher framerate at the cost of image quality.
上调模式决定了渲染帧的分辨率。品质模式以更高分辨率的渲染呈现，而性能模式会以更高的帧速率运行，但以牺牲图像质量为代价。
Menu_UpscaleSharpness_Desc:
Control the amount of sharpening applied to the visuals which have been downscaled by the chosen rendering resolution
针对应用于已按所选渲染分辨率缩小的视觉效果，控制其锐化量
Menu_ViewDistance_desc:
Adjust the viewable distance level in the game. Greater distances may impact performance.
调整游戏中的可视距离等级。更远的距离可能会影响性能。
MENU_VIEWDISTANCEQUALITY: View Distance Quality|查看距离品质

Menu_VSync_desc:
Enabling vertical sync will force the graphics card to operate at a rate no higher than the monitor's refresh rate
启用垂直同步将强制显卡以不高于显示器刷新率的速率运行
Menu_VSync_fg_desc:
Enabling vertical sync will force the graphics card to operate at a rate no higher than the monitor's refresh rate, and is required to be disabled for Frame Generation.
启用垂直同步将强制显卡以不高于显示器刷新率的速率运行，并且需要停用“帧数生成”。
Menu_VSync_fg_disabled_desc: This setting is disabled because Frame Generation is enabled.|该设置已停用，因为“帧数生成”已启用。
Menu_Wait_Description: Wait here to advance time from day to night or night to day|在这里等待，将时间从白天快转到夜晚或从夜晚快转到白天
Menu_Wand_Core_Selection: Wand Core Selection|魔杖杖芯选择
Menu_Wand_desc: View your wand|查看你的魔杖
Menu_Wand_Wood_Selection: Wand Wood Selection|魔杖杖木选择
Menu_WandCollections:
This is a collection of wand ornaments purchased at Ollivanders, awarded for completing special activities or found in wand chests. Wand ornaments can be applied to alter the appearance of your wand in the Character screen.
这是在奥利凡德购买的魔杖装饰物的集合，可由完成特殊活动而获得奖励或在魔杖宝箱中找到。你可应用魔杖装饰物来改变魔杖在角色界面中的外观。
Menu_WandCoreDescription:
Over the centuries, a variety of materials have been used as cores of a witch or wizard's wand. Ollivanders uses three core types: phoenix feather, dragon heartstring, and unicorn hair.
好几个世纪以来，人们发现很多材料都可作为女巫或巫师魔杖的杖芯。奥利凡德一般使用三种杖芯类型：凤凰羽毛、龙心肌腱及独角兽毛。
Menu_WandFinalDescription:
Each wand is unique and, from the moment it finds its ideal owner, will teach and learn from them. Furthermore, while the wood and core from which a wand is created will serve to inform its character, the experience and nature of a wand's owner will distinctively influence the magic it produces.
每个魔杖都是独一无二的存在，它们会与自己认定的主人相辅相成。除此以外，尽管使用的木料与杖芯种类将彰显出魔杖本身的个性，但魔杖主人自身的经历与秉性才会对施展的魔法产生决定性的影响。
Menu_WandFlexibilityDescription:
Wand flexibility often reflects the degree of adaptability possessed by the wand and its owner – and is determined by the core, wood type, length, and even style of the wand in question.
魔杖适应性通常反映着魔杖与其主人之间的契合程度，魔杖的杖芯、木料类型、长度乃至款式都会产生影响。
Menu_WandLengthDescription:
Simply matching the length of the wand to the size of the wizard is a crude measure, and fails to take into account many other important considerations.
简单地将魔杖的长度与巫师的高矮相匹配是一种粗略的衡量标准，并且没有考虑到许多其他重要的影响因素。

Menu_WBGames_LinkAccounts_Desc:
To customise your game experience, simply link your Harry Potter Fan Club account and your WB Games account and connect them to Hogwarts Legacy using the QR code or link below. By linking your Harry Potter Fan Club account you can access the House Fan-atic School Robe and by linking your WB Games Account you can access the Beaked Skull Mask.
想要自定义你的游戏体验，只需将你的哈利·波特粉丝俱乐部帐户关联至你的WB Games帐户，然后使用此二维码或下方的链接将其连接至《霍格沃茨之遗》。通过关联你的哈利·波特粉丝俱乐部帐户，你将可以入手“学院粉丝校袍”，而通过关联你的WB Games帐户，你还可以入手“喙头骨面罩”。
Menu_WBGames_LinkAccounts_FollowBrowserL: Alternatively, go to the link below to link accounts through your browser.|或者前往下方链接，以通过浏览器来关联帐户。
Menu_WBGames_LinkAccounts_Shortcode_Desc:
Code will expire after a short time. Stay on this screen while you link accounts. It will update once you are finished.
代码将会很快失效。关联帐户时请停留在此画面，完成后即会更新。
