要取消WB Games帐户与《霍格沃茨之遗》档案的关联，请使用二维码或以下链接访问WB Games帐户网站。
Menu_WBOLSignIn_Success_Desc:
Well done! You've linked your Harry Potter Fan Club account to your WB Games Account and connected them to Hogwarts Legacy.
做得好！已将你的哈利·波特粉丝俱乐部帐户关联至你的WB Games帐户，并将其连接至《霍格沃茨之遗》了。
Menu_WBOLSignIn_Success_RewardsDesc:
Your game experience will be customised and the Beaked Skull Mask and House Fan-atic School Robe will become available as gear appearance options.
你的游戏体验将会个人化，并且“喙头骨面罩”和“学院粉丝校袍”将作为装备外观选项提供。
Menu_WBOLSignIn_Title: WB Online Sign In|WB在线登入
MENU_WBSIGNINBONUS:
Claim Your Rewards!

Link your Harry Potter Fan Club and WB Games account to customise your game and unlock exclusive rewards.

Brings your Wizarding World identity including wand and house into Hogwarts Legacy!

Links some key accomplishments to the Harry Potter Fan Club!

Linking is optional and does not affect gameplay.
领取你的奖励！

将你的哈利·波特粉丝俱乐部账户关联到WB Games账户，定制你的游戏并解锁专属奖励。

将你的魔法世界身份，包括魔杖和学院带入《霍格沃茨之遗》！

将一些关键成就关联到哈利·波特粉丝俱乐部！

关联是可选的，不会影响游戏。
Menu_WitchWizardSelection: This choice will determine your player character's dormitory|该选择将会决定角色的宿舍
Menu_WorldExploration_desc:
Magic can be found in every corner of this world, and fortunes lies in wait for witches and wizards who seek it. Use Revelio to discover hidden treasures and other secrets as you explore different locations in the world.
这个世界的每个角落都能找到魔法，而宝藏正等待女巫和巫师寻得。当你探索世界上的不同地点时，使用“原形立现”发现隐藏的宝藏和其他秘密。

Mission_COM_17_MissionActive_Task: Talk to Eddie Thistlewood|与艾迪·西索伍德交谈
MissionSJ_EVC_01_01_TalkToAnneSolomon:
Sebastian needs a moment to himself. That exchange with his uncle seemed to bother him greatly. In the meantime, perhaps I should talk to his family.
塞巴斯蒂安需要一点时间给自己。与他叔叔的那次交流似乎让他很困扰。与此同时，也许我应该和他的家人谈谈。
MissionSJ_EVC_01_02_TalkToSebastian: I should see how Sebastian is faring|我应该看看塞巴斯蒂安的进展如何
MissionSJ_EVC_01_03_FollowSeb:
Sebastian wants to show me where his sister was cursed. There is more going on in Feldcroft than meets the eye. I need to follow Sebastian to the old Feldcroft Estate and find out more.
塞巴斯蒂安想告诉我他姊妹被诅咒的地方。费德罗特发生的事情比表面上看到的还要多。我需要跟着塞巴斯蒂安到老费德罗特庄园去了解更多。
MissionSJ_EVC_01_04_DefeatGoblins: Ranrok's Loyalists ambushed us. We need to fight them off.|兰洛克的追随者伏击了我们。我们需要击退他们。
MissionSJ_EVC_01_05_TalkToSebastian:
Sebastian wants to tell me more about what happened here in Feldcroft. I should talk with him.
塞巴斯蒂安想告诉我更多关于在费德罗特发生的事情。我应该和他谈谈。
MissionSJ_EVC_01_06_InvestigateEstate:
We managed to fend off the Ranrok's Loyalists. But if they are here searching for something, then it's worth taking a look at what they might be after.
我们设法击退了兰洛克的追随者。但如果他们在这里寻找什么东西，那么值得看看他们可能在追寻什么。
MissionSJ_EVC_01_07_EnterStairwell:
Sebastian said the stairwell into the basement looks different than before. It's been barricaded. We can find a way through and investigate what might be worth hiding down there.
塞巴斯蒂安说通往地下室的楼梯间看起来和以前不一样了。它被封锁了。我们可以找到方法并调查可能值得藏在那里的东西。
MissionSJ_EVC_01_08_InvestigateTriptych:
Passing through the ancient magic door seemed to have revealed a mysterious cabinet in the Undercroft. I should investigate.
穿过古代魔法门，仿佛露出了地穴的一个神秘柜子。我应该调查一下。
MissionSJ_EVC_01_09_ConvinceSebastian:
Sebastian can't see the ancient magic passageway that leads from the Feldcroft basement directly into the Undercroft. I need to convince him it's real and safe to use.
塞巴斯蒂安无法看到从费德罗特地下室直接通往地穴的古代魔法通道。我需要说服他使用它是真实且安全的。
MissionSJ_EVC_01_09_EnterUndercroft:
There's an ancient magic door in the basement that looks like it leads into the Undercroft. I should lead Sebastian through.
地下室有一扇古代魔法门，看起来像是通向地穴。我应该带领塞巴斯蒂安过去。
MissionSJ_EVC_01_MissionAvailable_TalkTo:
Sebastian sent me an owl to let me know he's heading to visit his family in Feldcroft. In the Undercroft, he mentioned his twin sister, Anne, could use some cheering up. I should meet him in Feldcroft.
塞巴斯蒂安传送了一只猫头鹰给我，并跟我说他要去费德罗特探望他的家人。在地穴中，他提到他的双胞胎姊妹安妮需要获得鼓励。我应该在费德罗特见他。
MissionSJ_EVJ_01_05_DefeatGoblinLoyalist:
The Overlook Mine has attracted the presence of goblins. I assume it's Ranrok's Loyalists yet again proving to be a step ahead. We need to get to the mine entrance. Once inside, we can look for the rune symbol we found on the triptych.
俯眺矿坑吸引了妖精。我认为兰洛克的追随者再次证明领先了一步。我们需要到达矿场入口。进去后，我们可以寻找在三联画上找到的符文符号。
MissionSJ_WEK_01_04_FollowWeasley:
Professor Weasley gave me something called a 'Wizard's Field Guide.' I should follow her and see what she can teach me about it.
韦斯莱教授给了我一本名为《巫师的实战指南》的东西。我应该跟着她，并看看她能教我什么。
MissionSJ_WEK_01_06_FollowAgain:
Professor Weasley said she has more to show me. I should follow her to find out what she has in mind.
韦斯莱教授说她还有更多东西要给我看。我应该跟着她去了解她的想法。
MOD_Browser_BuildVersionIncompatModDescW:
This mod does not currently work with the game and needs to be updated by the author.
此模组目前无法与游戏配合使用，需要作者进行更新。

MOD_Browser_ModalAuthorRemovedModDesc:
This mod has been removed due to violation content moderation rules. Please contact WB Games or CurseForge support for further details.
由于违反内容审核规则，该模组已被移除。请联系 WB Games 或 CurseForge 客户支持，以了解详情。
MOD_Browser_ModalCacheWarning:
You can temporarily disable Shader Pre-Caching in the settings menu to significantly reduce reload time after adding or changing Mods. Disabling Shader Pre-Caching may result in temporary hitching in the game. For optimal performance, do not disable.
你可以在设置菜单中暂时禁用“着色器预缓存”，以显著减少添加或更改模组后的重新加载时间。禁用“着色器预缓存”可能会导致游戏暂时卡顿。为获得最佳性能，请勿禁用。
MOD_Browser_ModalCreateNewSave: New Mod Save Creation|新模组存档创建
MOD_Browser_ModalEpiModWarningCheckbox: I have read the above warning.|我已阅读上述警告。
MOD_Browser_ModalEpiModWarningText:
Mods are not created or maintained by WB Games. Please review the description of the content you download prior to play for any warnings regarding possible light patterns or flashing lights that may trigger seizures in people with photosensitive epilepsy or other photosensitivities.
模组并不是由 WB Games 创建或维护的。请在进行游戏之前查看你所下载内容的描述，以了解任何有关可能引发光敏性癫痫或其他光敏性疾病的灯光图案或闪光的警告。
MOD_Browser_ModalEpiModWarningText2:
If you experience dizziness or discomfort while playing, IMMEDIATELY discontinue use and consult your physician. Please also report the mod to Overwolf for review.
如果你在进行游戏时感到头晕或不适，请立即停止使用并咨询你的医生。请将模组报告给 Overwolf 进行审查。
MOD_Browser_ModalEpiModWarningTitle: Warning: Read Before Playing Mods|警告：体验模组前请先阅读

MOD_Browser_ModalTextDcDesc:
Unable to reach CurseForge servers. Please check your connection and try again.

Are you sure you want to delete the Mod Save

MOD_Browser_ModalTextErrorDesc:
Loading may take awhile longer than usual.
载入时间可能比平时要长一些。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextErrorDesc2:
Mod loading failed, please reinstall the mod and try again.
模组加载失败，请重新安装模组并重试。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextErrorDesc3:
Your mods were unable to be deactivated. Please manually delete your mods in the Hogwarts Legacy game folder before trying to load the character.
你的模组无法停用。请先手动删除《霍格沃茨之遗》游戏文件夹中的模组，然后再尝试载入角色。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextExtLinkDesc:
The link will open your system's default browser. You will need to navigate back to the game when you finish.
该链接将打开你系统的默认浏览器。完成后，你需要导航回游戏。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextGameOffline:
You are currently offline. To install or browse mods, you must be online with an internet connection.
你目前为离线状态。若要安装或浏览模组，你必须处于在线状态并具备网络连接。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextGenericError:
Unknown error, please contact support to identify the issue
未知错误，请联系客户支持来识别问题
MOD_Browser_ModalTextLinkFailed:
Unable to get link, please wait a few minutes and try again.
无法获取链接，请等待几分钟然后重试。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextLinkWBCF:
To access your uploaded mods, you need to connect your CurseForge account with your WB Games account. Use the link below to open a new browser window to your Account Connections page.
若要使用你已上传的模组，你需要将你的 CurseForge 帐户连接至 WB Games 帐户。使用下方链接，为你的帐户连接页面开启新的浏览器窗口。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextLinkWBCFLine2:
Stay on this screen while you link accounts, it will automatically refresh once you have finished.
关联帐户时请停留在此画面。完成后，它会自动刷新。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextLoadCharDesc:
The Character you are loading is missing mods. Do you want to continue loading the game or install the missing mods?
你正在加载的角色缺少模组。是否要继续加载游戏，或安装缺少的模组？
MOD_Browser_ModalTextLoadCharDesc2:
The Character you are loading is missing mods. You can continue loading the game, which may cause issues and instability, or download the missing mods to load the modded character.
正在加载的角色缺少模组。你可以继续加载游戏，这可能会导致一些问题和出现不稳定，或者下载缺少的模组来加载模组化角色。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextLoadModSaveSlot:
You are loading a Modded Character. Load times may vary depending on your installed mods. Your game client may close and after a moment will automatically restart.
你正在载入一个模组化角色。载入时间可能会根据你安装的模组而有所不同。你的游戏客户端可能会关闭，片刻之后将自动重启。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextLoadModSaveSlot2:
Achievements will be disabled while playing a Mod Save.
游玩模组存档时，将停用成就。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextLoginWBPNSuccess:
Well done! You've linked your platform account to your WB Games Account and connected them to Hogwarts Legacy. You can now use mods!
做得好！你已将你的平台帐户链接至你的 WB Games 帐户，并将其连接至《霍格沃茨之遗》。你现在可以使用模组了！
Mod_Browser_ModalTextModConflictDetected:
The mods listed below conflict. You can resolve this by disabling conflicting mods. Continuing without resolving may cause issues.
以下列出的模组存在冲突。你可以通过禁用冲突的模组来解决此问题。继续而不解决可能会导致问题。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextModInstallFailed: Mod Installation Failed|模组安装失败
MOD_Browser_ModalTextModInstallFailedDes:
Not enough drive storage space to install this mod. Please free up some drive storage space and try again.
磁盘驱动器储存空间不足，无法安装此模组。请释放一些磁盘驱动器储存空间，然后重试。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextModProgressError:
Mod download progress stalled. Please check your network connection.
模组下载进度停滞。请检查你的网络连接。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextModsActive:
Mods are currently active and will be turned off to play your original characters. Please note that load times may vary for unloading your installed mods.
模组目前处于启用状态，它将被关闭并允许你扮演原始的角色。请注意，解除加载已安装模组的加载时间可能会有所不同。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextOffline:
You are currently offline. To install or browse mods, you must be online with an internet connection.
你目前为离线状态。若要安装或浏览模组，你必须处于在线状态并具备网络连接。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextOrderMod: Mod Configuration Change|模组配置更改
MOD_Browser_ModalTextOrderModDesc:
You have changed your mod configuration, by reordering, adding, or removing mods. Do you want to create a copy or apply changes to the existing save?
你已通过重新排序、添加或删除模组更改了模组配置。是否要创建一个副本，或将更改应用于现有的存档？
MOD_Browser_ModalTextRemovedMod:
One or more mods have been removed from this Mod Save. You may experience instability or other issues if you continue to load the game. 
已从该模组存档中移除一个或多个模组。如果继续加载游戏，可能会遇到不稳定或其他问题。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextRemoveModDesc:
The modded Character you are loading has an unavailable mod. Continuing to load the game can cause issues and instability.
正在加载的模组化角色有一个无法使用的模组。继续加载游戏可能会导致一些问题和出现不稳定。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextRestart:
To activate your mods, you must restart your game.
若要启动你的模组，你必须重新启动你的游戏。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextRestrictDesc:
You cannot access mods at this time, please contact either WB Games or CurseForge support to identify the issue.
你目前无法访问模组，请联络 WB Games 或 CurseForge 支持来识别问题。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextRestrictMods: Restricted Access to Mods|已限制访问模组
MOD_Browser_ModalTextSlotCreate: Mod Save-slot is being created...|正在创建模组储存栏位…
MOD_Browser_ModalTextSlotLimitDesc:
You have reached the Mod Save limit. To create a new Mod Save, an existing Mod Save will need to be deleted to continue.
你已达模组存档上限。若要创建新的模组存档，需要先删除现有的模组存档才能继续。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextTos: You are about to access mods.|你即将访问模组。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextTosCF:
We use CurseForge to support mods in-game. By pressing the {UMGConfirm} <LargeName_Text>Agree</>, you agree to CurseForge's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
我们使用 CurseForge 来支持游戏中的模组。按下{UMGConfirm} <LargeName_Text>同意</>，即表示你同意 CurseForge 的《服务条款》和《隐私政策》。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextUnisntallDesc:
Are you sure you want to uninstall this mod?
确定要卸载该模组？
MOD_Browser_ModalTextUpdateActivateMod:
Please restart your game to apply the update. If you do not restart, this will cause instability or issues when playing your modded save.
请重启游戏以应用更新。如果不重启，这会导致在游玩模组存档时出现不稳定或问题。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextUpdateActivateMod2:
Pressing {UMGConfirm} <LargeName_Text>Restart Game</> will close Hogwarts Legacy and put you back to the Main Menu.
按{UMGConfirm} <LargeName_Text>重启游戏</>将关闭《霍格沃茨之遗》并返回主菜单。
MOD_Browser_ModalTextWBPNLinkScreen:
By linking your PC platform account and WB Games account, you’ll gain access to all Hogwarts Legacy Mods including new quests, dungeons, cosmetics and more!
通过关联你的 PC 平台帐户和 WB Games 帐户，你将可以访问所有《霍格沃茨之遗》的模组，包括新的任务、地牢和装饰品等！
MOD_Browser_ModalTextWBPNLinkScreen2:
To access mods, simply link your game platform account to your WB Games Account and connect them to Hogwarts Legacy using this QR code or link below.
若要使用模组，只需将你的游戏平台帐户关联至你的 WB Games 帐户，然后使用此 QR Code 或下方链接将其连接至《霍格沃茨之遗》。

下载和使用模组可能会导致游戏出现意外问题，包括不稳定或性能不佳。使用模组和所有模组化存档时，成就将被禁用。

All mods have finished installing for the Mod Save
模组存档的所有模组均已完成安装。

Do you want to start playing the Character?
要开始游玩这名角色吗？

MOD_Browser_ToastTextWelcomeMod: Welcome to Hogwarts Legacy Modding!|欢迎来到《霍格沃茨之遗》模组！
MOD_Browser_ToastTextWelcomeModDesc:
Downloading and using Mods may cause unexpected issues with the game, including instability or poor performance. You may disable mods by selecting your Mod Save.
下载和使用模组可能会导致游戏出现意外问题，包括不稳定或性能不佳。你可以通过选择模组存档，来禁用模组。
MOD_Browser_ToastTextWelcomeModDesc2:
If you experience issues, you can also revert back to an original save by loading it from the Unmodded Content screen. Achievements are disabled when using Mods and with all Modded Saves.
如果遇到问题，你还可以通过从“非模组内容”界面加载原始存档，来恢复到原始存档。使用模组和所有模组化存档时，成就将被禁用。
MOD_Browser_ToastTextWelcomeModTitle: Hogwarts Legacy Mods|《霍格沃茨之遗》模组
MOD_Browser_TutorialTextActivateMod1:
You have enabled a Mod! Enable as many as you would like.
你已启用模组！启用任意数量。
MOD_Browser_TutorialTextActivateMod3:
Press {UMGModSaveStartGame} <LargeName_Text>New Game</> to apply your mod to your new character.
按{UMGModSaveStartGame} <LargeName_Text>新游戏</>将你的模组应用到你的新角色。
MOD_Browser_TutorialTextInstallMod1:
Congratulations! You have installed a mod.
恭喜！你已安装模组。
MOD_Browser_TutorialTextInstallMod2: Visit the Enable Mods tab to enable your mod for a new or existing Character. 前往启用模组 分页，为新角色或现有角色启用你的模组。
MOD_Browser_TutorialTextSaveTab1:
This is where you can enable mods and load your Mod Saves to play the game with mods. 
你可以在这里启用模组并加载您的模组存档，以使用模组玩游戏。
MOD_Browser_TutorialTextSaveTab2:
Select an <LargeName_Text>Unmodded Save</> to copy it, in order to add Mods to an existing save, or create a <LargeName_Text>New Character</> to use Mods in a New Game.
选择<LargeName_Text>未模组化的存档</>进行复制，以便将模组添加到现有存档，或创建一个<LargeName_Text>新角色</>以在新游戏中使用模组。
MOD_Browser_TutorialTitleActivateMod: Apply Your Changes|应用你的更改
MOD_Browser_TutorialTitleInstallMod: Enable Your Mods|启用你的模组

Unable to retrieve mod information from CurseForge
无法从 CurseForge 获取模组的信息
MOD_Browser_UnavailableModText:
This mod is no longer available due to violating content moderation rules.
由于违反内容审核规则，该模组已无法再使用。
MOD_Browser_UnavailableModText2:
This mod is not live as it has not been approved by CurseForge.
此模组尚未上线，因为尚未获得CurseForge的批准。
MOD_Browser_UnavailableModText3:
This mod is not available as it requires changes. Please login to CurseForge and view the feedback from CurseForge moderation.
由于需要更改，此模组暂不可用。请登入CurseForge并查看CurseForge审核部门的反馈。
MOD_Browser_UnavailableModText4:
This mod has been rejected due to violating content moderation rules.
此模组因违反内容审核规则而被拒绝。
MOD_Browser_UnavailableModText5:
This mod is unavailable, please contact CurseForge support.
此模组不可用，请联系CurseForge客户支持。
MOD_Browser_UnavailableModText6: Reinstall this mod to use it.|重新安装该模组以使用。
MOD_Browser_UnavailableModText7:
This mod needs to be updated in order to function correctly.
此模组需要更新才能正常运行。
MOD_Browser_UnavailableModText8:
This mod is incompatible with the current version of the game.
此模组与当前游戏版本不兼容。
MOD_Browser_UnavailableTitle4: Mod Not Approved|模组未获批准
MOD_Browser_UnavailableTitle6: Update Pending By Author|正在等待作者更新
MOD_Browser_UploadModsText:
You must login to your CurseForge account to see your uploaded mods.
你必须登入你的 CurseForge 帐户，才能查看你上传的模组。
MOD_Browser_UploadSectionLinkWBCF:
To view your uploaded mods, you need to login to CurseForge. Click the button below to link your WB Games account with CurseForge.
若要查看你的已上传模组，你需要登入 CurseForge。点击下方按钮，将 WB Games 帐户关联至 CurseForge。
MOD_CreatorKit_CongratulationsModalBody1:
Well done! You’ve linked successfully to your WB Games account. You may now start creating Mods!
做得好！你已成功关联你的 WB Games 帐户。你现在可以开始创建模组了！
MOD_CreatorKit_CongratulationsModalBody2: To modify your account settings, visit https|要修改你的帐户设置，请访问：https

In order to upload and share your content you will need to link your CurseForge account to your WB Games Account.
为了上传和分享你的内容，你需要将你的 CurseForge 帐户关联到你的 WB Games 帐户。
MOD_CreatorKit_CurseForgeModalBody2:
The button below will send you to the WB Games website.
下方按钮将把你带往 WB Games 网站。
MOD_CreatorKit_LinkModalBody1:
In order to connect your account, we will send you to the WB Games website. Use the Code below to continue.
为了连接你的帐户，我们将把你带往 WB Games 网站。使用下面的代码继续。
MOD_CreatorKit_LinkModalBody2:
The Code will expire after a short time. Stay on this screen while you link accounts. It will update once you are finished.
代码将在短时间后过期。在关联帐户时请停留在此界面上。完成后它便会更新。
MOD_CreatorKit_LinkModalHeader: Link to WB Games|关联至 WB Games

YOU ARE ABOUT TO ACCESS USER-GENERATED CONTENT

WE USE CURSEFORGE TO SUPPORT USER-GENERATED CONTENT IN-GAME. BY CLICKING “I AGREE' YOU AGREE TO CURSEFORGE’S TERMS OF USE AND PRIVACY POLICY.
我们使用 CURSEFORGE 来支持游戏中的用户生成内容。点击“我同意”，即表示你同意 CURSEFORGE 的《使用条款》和《隐私政策》。
MOD_FrontEnd_TOSModalHyperLink: VIEW TERMS OF USE + PRIVACY POLICY|查看《使用条款》 + 《隐私政策》
MOD_InGame_CongratulationsScreen2Body1:
You have logged into WB Games, you now have access to mods!
你已登入 WB Games，现在可以使用模组了！
MOD_InGame_CongratulationsScreenHeader1: Login to WB Games|登入 WB Games
MOD_InGame_LoginScreenBody1:
To create and experience the new mods feature, simply login to your WB Games account by using the QR code or button below. By logging into your WB Games account you can access the mods page in the main menu and will be able to view and download community created content.
要创建和体验新的模组功能，只需使用下面的 QR Code 或按钮，登入你的 WB Games 帐户即可。登入你的 WB Games 帐户后，你便可以访问主菜单中的模组页面，并可以查看和下载社区创建的内容。
MOD_InGame_LoginScreenBody2:
Code will expire after a short time. Stay on this screen while you link accounts. It will update once you are finished.
代码将在短时间后过期。在关联帐户时请停留在此界面上。完成后它便会更新。

Login to your WB Games accounts for special benefits, such as rewards and access to mods.

MOD_InGame_PromoScreenHeader1: Login to WB Games|登入 WB Games
MOD_ModBrowser_SuccessModalBody1: YOU HAVE SUCCESSFULLY CONNECTED YOUR CURSEFORGE ACCOUNT TO YOUR WB GAMES ACCOUNT: |你已成功将你的 CURSEFORGE 帐户连接至你的 WB GAMES 帐户：
MOD_ModBrowser_TOSModalBody1:
TO ACCESS MY MODS YOU NEED TO CONNECT YOUR CURSEFORGE ACCOUNT TO YOUR WB GAMES ACCOUNT. PRESS CONTINUE TO OPEN YOUR ACCOUNT CONNECTIONS PAGE IN A NEW BROWSER WINDOW.
要访问我的模组，你需要将你的 CURSEFORGE 帐户连接至你的 WB GAMES 帐户。按下继续，在新的浏览器窗口中打开你的帐户连接页面。

STAY ON THIS SCREEN WHILE YOU LINK ACCOUNTS, IT WILL AUTOMATICALLY REDIRECT YOU TO THE MY MODS TAB ONCE YOU HAVE FINISHED.
关联帐户时请停留在此界面上，完成后，系统会自动将你重定向到“我的模组”选项卡。
Mod_Saves_Config_Error_Popup_Desc_1:
Your character cannot be loaded due to an issue with an enabled mod.
由于启用的模组存在问题，无法加载你的角色。
Mod_Saves_Config_Error_Popup_Desc_2:
Try exiting and restarting the game or disabling recently updated mods to resolve this issue.
尝试退出并重启游戏，或停用最近更新的模组来解决此问题。
Mod_Saves_Create_Character_Desc:
Create your modded character and begin a new story
创建你的模组化角色，并开始一个新的故事
Mod_Saves_Disabled_Mod_Popup_Warning:
Disabling existing mods may result in issues or instability.
停用现有模组可能会导致问题或不稳定。
Mod_Saves_Install_In_Progress_Popup_Desc: One or more mods are being installed.|正在安装一个或多个模组。

Please wait until the install process finishes before playing.
请等待至安装过程完成后再开始游戏。
Mod_Saves_Install_In_Progress_Popup_Titl: Install In Progress|安装正在进行中
Mod_Saves_Repair_Error_Popup_Desc_1:
This character save has mod issues that must be resolved before playing.
此角色存档存在模组问题，必须在开始游戏前解决。
Mod_Saves_Repair_Error_Popup_Desc_2: Repairing will automatically disable mods with errors . 修复程序将自动禁用存在错误的模组。
Mod_Saves_Repair_Error_Popup_Desc_3: Warnings will also be resolved by reinstalling or updating applicable mods as part of this process. 在此过程中，重新安装或更新适用的模组也将解决警告问题。
Mod_Saves_Repair_Fail_Toast_Desc: Try again or restart your game|重试或重启游戏
Mod_Saves_Repair_Warning_Popup_Desc_1: One or more mods have warnings and should be updated or reinstalled. 一个或多个模组带有警告，需要更新或重新安装。
Mod_Saves_Repair_Warning_Popup_Desc_2:
Playing without repairing may result in issues or instability.
未修复即开始游戏可能会导致问题或不稳定。
MOD_WBPN_accountPage_string1:
Below you will find a list of accounts associated with your game.
你将在下方找到与你的游戏关联的帐户列表。
MOD_WBPN_accountPage_string2:
To manage your linked accounts, press the button below or scan the QR code, to visit your WB Games Account page.
要管理你的关联帐户，请按下方的按钮或扫描 QR Code，访问你的 WB Games 帐户页面。

MOD_WBPN_WWIDLink_btn: LINK WIZARDING WORLD ACCOUNT|关联“魔法世界”帐户
Mooncalf_Byproduct_Desc:
The fur is shed by the wide-eyed and playful Mooncalves typically inhabiting forested areas. Mooncalf fur can be used to upgrade and assign traits to gear.
长着浑圆大眼睛的好动月痴兽们褪下的毛皮，这些野兽通常居住在森林地区。月痴兽毛皮可用于强化装备和为其分配特质。
Mooncalf_Desc:
The Mooncalf is a small, calf-like beast with enormous eyes and a shy personality. They can be observed dancing when the light of the full moon hits the ground.
月痴兽是一种小型的、像小牛一样的野兽，有着巨大的眼睛和害羞的性格。当满月的光照射到地面时，可以观察到它们跳舞。
Mooncalf_fertilizer_desc: A nutrient-rich compost that can be added to plants to increase their yield|一种营养丰富的堆肥，可以添加到植物中以增加其产量
MooncalfBallToy_desc: A ball that looks like the moon, used to play with beasts|一个形似月亮的球，可用来与野兽一起玩耍
MooncalfDen_desc: A den inhabited by Mooncalves|月痴兽居住的巢穴
MooncalfOffspring_desc: A newly born Mooncalf|一只刚出生的月痴兽
Moonstone_desc:
An ingredient commonly used for conjuration magic. It is found in every region and acquired by breaking crystallised stone.
常用于变幻魔法的原料。遍布于各个地区，还可以通过击碎晶石获取。
Mount_OnyxHippogriff_desc:
You have earned the trust of this beautiful, black Hippogriff and will now be able to soar the skies on its back.
你已经得到了这头美丽的黑色鹰马翼兽的信任，今后将可以骑着它自由遨游天际。
Mount_Thestral_desc:
A tame and gentle female Thestral that will allow you to soar through the clouds on her back
一头温驯的雌性夜骐，可让你在其背上翱翔于云层间
Mountain_Desc: This beast prefers to live in mountain environments.|这种野兽更喜欢生活在山地环境中。
MountainTroll_tip_one_desc:
The troll's forehand-backhand club swing pattern attacks will break through common Shield Charms. Dodging is the safest defence.
巨怪挥舞大棒时的正手与反手动作足以摧毁普通的护盾魔咒。闪躲是最佳的防御选择。
Mouse_CamMove_Longitudinal: Longitudinal Camera Movement|纵向镜头移动
MRT_01_01_CompletedAllTrIals_LineComplet:
I've found and completed all the trials that Merlin set out. According to Nora Treadwell the archaeologist and historian, they were likely a game that Merlin created during his time at Hogwarts.
我已经找到并完成了梅林所设下的所有试炼。根据考古学家和历史学家诺拉·崔德维尔的说法，它们很可能是梅林在霍格沃茨期间创造的一款游戏。
MRT_01_01_CompletedOneTrial_LineComplete: With Nora Treadwell’s encouragement, I've completed one of the trials.|在诺拉·崔德维尔的鼓励下，我完成了一项试炼。
MRT_01_01_DispatchAndHelp_Journal: A person is being attacked by bandits. I should help.|一个人被土匪袭击了，我应该上去帮忙。
MRT_01_01_MissionActive_Journal:
Nora and I successfully defeated the bandits who were actually looking for me. It appears she was researching something before they arrived and I’m curious to know what.
我和诺拉成功地击败了正在寻找我的土匪。看来她在他们到达之前正在研究着什么，我很想知道研究得是什么。
MRT_01_01_TheFirstTrial_Journal:
I found a series of trials left behind by Merlin, as well as the archaeologist studying them. The archaeologist would like me to complete them all in her stead.
我发现了梅林所留下的一系列试炼，以及研究它们的考古学家。考古学家希望我代替她来完成试炼。
MRT_01_02_Mallowsweet_Task: Take mallowsweet from trunk|从大箱子中取出香锦葵
MRT_01_02_TheFirstTrial_ApproachGazebo_J:
After solving the trial for Nora Treadwell, a mysterious gazebo and medallion appeared. How curious.
在完成了诺拉·崔德维尔的试炼后，出现了一个神秘的凉亭和徽章。真让人好奇。
MRT_01_02_TheTraveller_Journal: She thanked me but it seemed like she had more to say.|她感谢我，但似乎她还有更多话要说。
MRT_01_03_ActivatingTheTrial_Journal:
To thank me for helping her, Nora Treadwell asked me to place some Mallowsweet in the gazebo. Apparently, she was protecting it from being discovered by the thieves.
为了感谢我对她的帮助，诺拉·崔德维尔让我在凉亭里放一些香锦葵。显然，她是在保护它不被小偷发现。
MRT_01_03_ActivatingTheTrial_PlaceTheMal: Place the mallowsweet in the stone swirl|将香锦葵放在石阵中
MRT_01_04_TheFirstTrial_Journal:
Nora Treadwell informed me that this gazebo was one of many left behind by the famed wizard Merlin. Mrs Treadwell is an archaeologist studying the trials. She's asked me to solve this one while she studies its transformation.
诺拉·崔德维尔告诉我，这个凉亭是著名巫师梅林留下的众多凉亭之一。崔德维尔夫人是一位研究试炼的考古学家。她让我在其研究试炼的转换时完成该试炼。
MRT_01_05_FirstTrialSolved_Journal:
After solving the trial, a chest appeared. Mrs Treadwell said that I could keep whatever contents I find.
完成了试炼后出现了一个宝箱。崔德维尔夫人说我可以带走所找到的任何东西。
MRT_01_05_SpeakToNora_Task: Speak to Mrs Treadwell|与崔德维尔夫人对话
MRT_01_06_TalkToNora_Task: Speak to Mrs Treadwell|与崔德维尔夫人对话
MRT_01_07_TalkToNora_Task: Speak to Mrs Treadwell|与崔德维尔夫人对话
MRT_01_08_TalkToNora_Task: Speak to Mrs Treadwell|与崔德维尔夫人对话
MRT_01_TheTrialsofMerlin_Journal: Puzzles left behind by famed wizard Merlin|著名巫师梅林留下的谜题
MRT_01_TheTrialsofMerlin_LineDescription: Puzzles left behind by famed wizard Merlin|著名巫师梅林留下的谜题
MRT_01_TrialsOfMerlin_CP2_Journal01:
I saved the woman being attacked by some Ashwinders. Her name is Nora Treadwell. I wonder what they wanted from her.
我救了被火灰蛇袭击的女性。她的名字是诺拉·崔德维尔。我想知道他们想从她那里得到什么。
MRT_01_TrialsOfMerlin_CP2_Journal02: Mrs Treadwell wants me to help her with something regarding Merlin.|崔德维尔夫人希望我帮她处理一些关于梅林的事情。
MRT_01_TrialsOfMerlin_CP2_Journal03:
Mrs Treadwell thinks I should put mallowsweet onto the stone swirls. She believes the mallowsweet has something to do with solving Merlin's puzzle.
崔德维尔太太认为我应该把香锦葵放在石阵上。她认为香锦葵与解决梅林的谜题有关。
MRT_01_TrialsOfMerlin_CP2_Journal04:
Mrs Treadwell instructed me to place mallowsweet onto these stone swirls and the strangest thing happened. I wonder what Merlin could have been hiding behind these puzzles.
崔德维尔夫人让我把香锦葵放在这些石阵上，而最为奇怪的事情发生了。我想知道梅林在谜题背后隐藏了些什么。
MRT_01_TrialsOfMerlin_CP2_Journal05:
After solving Merlin's puzzle by lighting up the stone pillars, the stone swirl transformed into a small pavilion.
在点亮石柱并解开梅林的谜题后，石阵变成了一个小亭子。
MRT_TrialsofMerlin_QuestActive_Journal:
Some shifty looking characters are harassing a woman at the water’s edge near Lower Hogsfield. I think they may be some of Victor Rookwood’s men. I should help her.
一些看起来狡猾的角色在下霍格米村附近的水边骚扰一名女性。我认为他们可能是维克托·卢克伍德的手下。我应该帮助她。
MRT_TrialsofMerlin_QuestActive_StepJourn: A woman needs help just across the water beyond the dock.|码头外的水域有名女性需要帮助。

How dare these thieves harass people right in the shadow of Hogwarts? If they want a fight, I’ll give it to them.
这些盗贼怎么敢在霍格沃茨周围骚扰人？如果他们想打，我就给他们点颜色瞧瞧。

Now that we’ve fought off Rookwood’s men, I should make sure the woman is unharmed.
我们已击退卢克伍德的手下，现在应该确保那名女性没有受伤。

Now, I'm going to obtain some Mallowsweet from Nora Treadwell’s trunk outside of her tent.
现在，我要从诺拉·崔德维尔帐篷外的行李箱里取得一些香锦葵。

First, I need to activate the trial by dropping some Mallowsweet leaves on the stone swirl. Then I have to figure out the mystery of these vine-covered pillars.
首先，我需要通过将一些香锦葵叶子放在石阵上来启动试炼。接着我要弄清楚这些由藤蔓覆盖的柱子的谜团。

I’ve solved Merlin’s Trial! I should speak to Madam Treadwell and discuss what we’ve learned.
我解决了梅林的试炼！我应该和崔德维尔夫人谈谈，并讨论我们所知的内容。

I’ve solved Merlin’s Trial! I should speak to Madam Treadwell and discuss what we’ve learned.
我解决了梅林的试炼！我应该和崔德维尔夫人谈谈，并讨论我们所知的内容。
MRT_TrialsofMerlin_QuestActive_TaskObj03: Speak with the stranger |与陌生人交谈
MRT_TrialsofMerlin_QuestActive_TaskObj04: Get the Mallowsweet from the trunk |从行李箱取得香锦葵
MRT_TrialsofMerlin_QuestActive_TaskObj05: Solve Merlin's Trial|解开梅林的试炼
MRT_TrialsofMerlin_QuestActive_TaskObj06: Speak to Nora Treadwell|与诺拉·崔德维尔交谈
MRT_TrialsofMerlin_QuestAvailable_Journa: Someone seems to be in distress and needs help. I should find out what's wrong.|好像有人遇到了麻烦。我最好去看一眼是什么情况。
MRT_TrialsofMerlin_QuestComplete_Journal:
Nora Treadwell and I defeated some Ashwinders who were looking for me near Lower Hogsfield. Afterwards, Mrs Treadwell showed me her research on something called the Merlin Trials and I was able to help her solve one of the puzzles. Now that we know how they work, I should try to solve the ones I encounter.
诺拉·崔德威尔和我在下霍格米村附近击败了一群火灰蛇党，他们似乎正在该地区找我。之后，崔德威尔女士向我展示了对一种名为“梅林的试炼”的研究，我成功帮助她解决了其中一道谜题。现在我们知道了它的运作方式，我应该尝试解开所找到的任何谜题。
Named_Dugbog_Coastal_1_desc:
Unknown to the villagers who trapped it, this Dugbog had been corrupted with some type of magic.
当初将其抓住的村民们并没有意识到，这只泥怪已经被某种神秘的魔法腐蚀。
Named_Dugbog_Marsh_1: Queen of the Swamp|沼泽女王
Named_DW_Extortionist_Captain_1_desc:
Aster Leigh is an extortionist in the Ashwinders, a faction of Victor Rookwood's criminal enterprise
艾斯特·莉莲是维克托·卢克伍德麾下犯罪组织火灰蛇党的一名勒索者
Named_DW_Extortionist_Soldier_1_desc:
Blackmailed in to compliance, Gwendolyn Zhou was a reluctant Ashwinder informant within the Ministry of Magic. After being found out and fired, Gwendolyn was forced to join Rookwood to protect and provide for her family.
因受到黑料威胁，格温多琳·周在无奈之下成为了火灰蛇党在魔法部中安插的间谍。当东窗事发之后，格温多琳遭到了开除，之后为了保护与照料自己的家人而只得选择了与卢克伍德同流合污。
Named_DW_Poacher_Captain_1_desc:
Clinical and cruel, Tempeste Thorne was trapping and carving up beasts for profit long before she left Hogwarts. One of the first to join Rookwood's criminal empire, under her gaze the poachers have risen from scramblers to a sturdy operation.
坦帕斯特·索恩是个残忍无情的盗猎者，自从离开霍格沃茨之后便做起了狩猎野兽的生意。作为卢克伍德的犯罪帝国中的元老之一，在坦帕斯特的统领下，盗猎者也从最初的小打小闹变成了规模庞大的派系。
Named_DW_Poacher_Mage_1_desc:
Perseus Flint is a poacher in the Poacher Pack, a faction of Victor Rookwood's criminal enterprise
珀修斯·弗林特是维克托·卢克伍德麾下犯罪组织盗猎帮中的一名盗猎者
Named_DW_Poacher_Soldier_1_desc:
After graduating Hogwarts, Iona Morgan was turned out by her emotionally abusive family. Looking to her old friends from school, she found a new family and home in the Poacher Pack.
从霍格沃茨毕业之后，艾欧娜·摩根便选择了逃离让自己受尽情感压抑与折磨的家庭。投靠原来在学校里认识的旧友之后，盗猎者就成了她的新家。
Named_DW_Thief_Captain_1: Silvanus Selwyn|斯尔瓦努斯·塞尔温
Named_DW_Thief_Captain_1_desc:
Born to a life of privilege but not born early enough to inherit it, Silvanus Selwyn was known for his expensive and extravagant lifestyle. It was said that he would do anything to destroy the good reputation of his distinguished family. Silvanus was the one who opened doors to influential people for Rookwood.
斯尔瓦努斯·塞尔温出生优渥，年纪轻轻便以自己奢靡铺张的生活方式而出名。据说他仇恨着自己名门正派的背景，因此想要不惜一切代价毁坏家族的好名声。最初便是斯尔瓦努斯帮助卢克伍德将自己的影响力伸向了上层阶级。
Named_DW_Thief_Mage_1_desc:
A proficient pickpocket, Dunstan has always enjoyed the art of thieving. In fact, it was his light-fingeredness that led him to a friendless existence at Hogwarts.
作为一名老练的扒手，顿斯坦从小便皈依了偷窃的艺术。正是因为这种手脚不干净的秉性，才使得他当年在霍格沃茨受尽唾弃。
Named_DW_Thief_Soldier_1_desc:
Estranged from her brother Pádraic, a local shopkeeper, Catrin Haggarty turned to a life of petty thievery and tricks years ago. It wasn't until recently that she abandoned small scams for a chance at a bigger fortune with the Ashwinders.
在多年以前与经营店铺的兄弟帕德里克·海嘉缇决裂之后，凯特琳便走上了坑蒙拐骗的生涯。但是最近她已经放弃了原先的小打小闹，转而投向了火灰蛇党的怀抱。
Named_Goblin_Chieftain_1_desc:
Pergit is a goblin rebel who fights under Ranrok's banner. He is notorious for his callousness towards everyone except those he truly fears or admires.
佩吉特是兰洛克麾下的一名叛乱妖精。他一向以铁石心肠的作风而臭名昭著，只有在自己真正畏惧或敬仰之人面前才会展露出些许的情感。
Named_Goblin_Chieftain_2: Belgruff the Bludgeoner|棒槌贝格拉夫
Named_Goblin_Chieftain_2_desc:
Now known for his militant approach to goblin rights, Belgruff the Bludgeoner was once a peaceful member of the goblin rights movement. It is said that the taste of power he got being around Ranrok convinced him to change his ways.
虽然现在作为一名不惜付诸暴力的激进分子而臭名昭著，但棒槌贝格拉夫原本其实只是妖精权利运动中的一位温和派成员。据说是兰洛克让他品尝到了权利的滋味，才让贝格拉夫的心境发生了这种天翻地覆的改变。
Named_Goblin_Sorcerer_1_desc:
A young outspoken goblin, Grodbik rose through the ranks quickly and was a trusted guard of Ranrok's mines.
作为一名素来直言不讳的年轻妖精，戈罗德比克很快便平步青云，成为了负责看管兰洛克的其中一处矿井的可靠守卫。
Named_Goblin_Sorcerer_2: Ogbert the Odd|怪胎奥格波特
Named_Goblin_Sorcerer_2_desc:
Ogbert the Odd joined Ranrok's Loyalists after a run-in with a security dragon at Gringotts. Some wonder if he provoked the dragon whilst others bemoan the cruelty of keeping dragons chained up under a bank.
在与古灵阁之下负责守卫的巨龙交锋过后，怪胎奥格波特便选择了加入兰洛克的追随者。有人怀疑当初是他故意挑衅巨龙在先，其他人则质疑着在银行地下圈养被铁链束缚的巨龙的残忍做法。
Named_Inferius_1: Bardolph Beaumont's Corpse|巴多尔芬·比约蒙特的尸体
Named_Inferius_1_desc:
The reanimated corpse that once was Bardolph Beaumont, brother to Upper Hogsfield's Claire Beaumont. Bardolph had gone missing after allegedly connecting with Rookwood's lot, breaking the hearts of the Beaumont family
一具被复苏的阴尸，生前的身份是巴多尔芬·比约蒙特，上霍格米村的克莱拉·比约蒙特的兄弟。在失踪之前，便有人怀疑看见巴多尔芬与卢克伍德手下勾搭到了一起，这种做法早已让比约蒙特家族的其他成员伤透了心
Named_Inferius_2: Restless Unknown Corpse|骚动不安的无名尸体
Named_Inferius_3_desc:
An Inferius who was rich in life, though now the only indication of wealth is his clothing
生前过着富裕生活的阴尸，不过现在已经成了穿着华丽的行尸走肉。
Named_Spider_Acromantula_1_desc:
This beast is an aberration, as it is not native to this region. In its short time here, however, this Acromantula possibly mothered a number of other Acromantulas in the area.
这种野兽是异类，因为它不是该地区的原生动物。然而，在很短的时间里，这只八眼巨蛛可能已经在该地区孕育了许多其他八眼巨蛛。
Named_Spider_Woodlouse_Eggsac_1_desc: The Clutch is a brood of Thornback hatchlings.|一窝幼年刺背蛛。
Named_Spider_Woodlouse_Tank_1_desc:
A horrific, giant arachnid living underneath Mary Portman's cottage in Aranshire
让人不寒而栗的庞然大物，这只巨型蜘蛛一直在阿兰郡的玛丽·波特曼宅邸地窖中徘徊
Named_Troll_Armored_1_desc: An especially mean forest troll who seems to enjoy wandering boggy areas|一只非常邪恶的森林巨怪，似乎喜欢在沼泽地徘徊
Named_Troll_Mountain_1: Alexandra's Troll|亚利桑德拉的巨怪
Named_Troll_Mountain_1_desc:
With a train tunnel as its cave, this troll is tempting fate. If not killed by those wishing to loot its horde of items, it is likely to be the victim of a passing steam engine.
这头巨怪将火车隧道当成寻常山洞的做法无异于自寻死路。就算没有人盯上巨怪积蓄的宝藏，指不定哪天它就会成为呼啸而来的蒸汽机车的牺牲品。
Named_Troll_River_1_desc:
Misunderstanding a common wizard gesture, this troll rampaged through a small hamlet east of Hogwarts.
因为误会了巫师间惯用的常见手势，这头巨怪便在霍格沃茨东边的一处小村庄中横冲直撞。
Named_Wolf_1_desc:
Thought to be an omen of death upon the villagers of Netherwyck, this black wolf was simply a wolf who had been enchanted with some kind of magic. It shared its den with a great white wolf and their kin.
虽然被以为是追捕奈瑟维科村民的死亡凶兆，但这头黑色巨兽的真身其实只是一头被施加了魔法的狼。它与另外一头白色巨狼以及其他同胞们分享着一处狼穴。
Named_Wolf_2_desc: A ferocious beast with striking white fur|长着一身雪白毛皮的凶狠野兽。
NamedEnemy_desc: A formidable and wily enemy|不容小觑的狡猾敌人
NearlyHeadlessNick: Nearly Headless Nick|差点没头的尼克

Neck_010_Rare_desc: A superb necklace set with three turquoise gems |一条优质项链，镶嵌三颗绿松石宝石

Niffler_Byproduct_Desc:
The fur is shed by the gold-coveting Nifflers inhabiting the Hogwarts region. Niffler fur can be used to upgrade and assign traits to gear.
居住在霍格沃茨地区、寻觅黄金的嗅嗅会脱落其皮毛。嗅嗅皮毛可用于强化装备和为其分配特质。
Niffler_desc:
The Niffler is a small, furry and mischievous beast that causes mayhem in its pursuit of shiny objects which it stores in its marsupial-like pouch.
嗅嗅是一种体型小、毛茸茸、淘气的野兽，它在追逐闪亮的物品时会造成混乱，而此类物品会存放在它像有袋动物一样的袋子里。
Niffler_Thief: The Irondale Pilferer|“艾恩代尔大盗”
Niffler_Thief_desc:
A sticky-fingered Niffler that has been burglarising the hamlet of Irondale at night
就是这只手脚不干净的嗅嗅一直在夜晚四处搜刮艾恩代尔居民的财产。
NifflerBallToy_desc: A solid gold ball that can used to play with beasts|可用来与野兽玩的纯金球
NifflerDen_desc: A den inhabited by Nifflers|嗅嗅居住的巢穴
NifflerOffspring_desc: A newly born Niffler|一只刚出生的嗅嗅

NTR_01_HomeSweetHome_QuestActive_Journal:
Poppy and I tracked down the dragon we freed from Horntail Hall, the Poacher Pack's dragon fighting ring. The sooner we find her nest the sooner we can return her egg. 
帕比和我追踪了我俩从盗猎者的斗龙圈树蜂厅中解救出来的龙。我们愈快找到其巢穴，就能愈快归还它的蛋。
NTR_01_HomeSweetHome_QuestActive_StepJou:
Poppy was able to track the dragon we freed to this location. Her nest should be straight ahead.
帕比成功追踪我们所释放的龙到这个位置。其巢穴应该就在正前方。

The dragon sees us, no use in hiding. There must be a way to return the egg without harming her.
龙看到了我们，躲起来也没用。一定有方法可以在不伤害它的情况下归还龙蛋。

Getting past the dragon was no easy task. Just a bit further and we can return her egg.
越过巨龙绝非易事。再往前走一点，我们就可以把它的蛋还回去了。

Poppy and I successfully returned the dragon egg. I wanted to take a moment to catch my breath before leaving.
我和帕比成功归还了龙蛋，我想在离开之前稍微喘口气。
NTR_01_HomeSweetHome_QuestActive_TaskObj: Find the dragon's nest|找到龙巢
Get past the dragon and closer to her nest|越过巨龙，靠近其巢穴
Place the egg in its nest|将龙蛋置于其巢穴中
NTR_01_HomeSweetHome_QuestAvailable_Jour:
Poppy and I rescued a dragon from Horntail Hall, a fighting ring organised by poachers and somehow connected to Ranrok's Loyalists. The dragons wore goblin-made metal collars that may have been controlling them. The dragon we rescued left an egg that we need to return to her. Poppy thinks she knows where the dragon's den is and wants to meet in Hogsmeade town circle.
帕比和我从树蜂厅中救出了一头龙，这是一个由盗猎者组织的非法斗龙场，同时又与兰洛克的追随者妖精有着千丝万缕的关系。被囚禁的龙戴着的项圈似乎是妖精制品，也许就是那些项圈在控制着它们。被救下的龙留下了一颗蛋，需要我们归还给她。帕比说她有可能已经知道了龙穴的位置，她希望我能去霍格莫德镇中心和她见面。
NTR_01_HomeSweetHome_QuestAvailable_Step:
Poppy sent me an owl saying she knows where we need to return the dragon egg we have in our possession. I’m to meet her in Hogsmeade's town circle.
帕比传给我一只猫头鹰，说她知道要将手上拥有的龙蛋归还到何处。我要去霍格莫德镇中心见她。
NTR_01_HomeSweetHome_QuestAvailable_Task: Talk to Poppy in Hogsmeade town circle|在霍格莫德镇中心与帕比交谈
NTR_01_HomeSweetHome_QuestComplete_Journ:
Poppy and I freed a dragon from Horntail Hall, a dragon fighting ring organised by Rookwood's Poacher Pack. Though the dragon was able to escape, she unknowingly left behind her egg which we were able to return to her. 
帕比和我从卢克伍德的盗猎者帮组织的斗龙圈“树蜂厅”救了一条龙。虽　然龙成功逃脱，但它却不自觉地留下了蛋，而我们得以将其归还给它。
NTR_01_HomeSweetHome_QuestComplete_Stay_:
Poppy and I successfully returned the dragon egg. I wanted to take a moment to catch my breath before leaving.
我和帕比成功归还了龙蛋，我想在离开之前稍微喘口气。
NTR_01_HomeSweetHome_ReturnToHogsmeade_T: Talk to Poppy to leave|与帕比交谈并离开
NTR_02: To the Moon and Back|往返月球
NTR_02_MoonAndBack_QuestActive_Journal:
Poppy and I have instructions from the centaur, Dorran to retrieve a moonstone from a cave in the forest. His instructions were as cryptic as one might expect from his kind, but Poppy thinks she may have located the cave in question. 
帕比和我收到马人多兰的指示，要从森林的洞穴中取回月石。它的指示就像众人对其同类的预期一样神秘，但帕比认为她可能已找到相关的洞穴。
NTR_02_MoonAndBack_QuestActive_StepJourn:
The Tomb is near Irondale, to the south of Hogwarts. I've heard most people tend to avoid this place, but nevertheless, we must go inside.
陵墓位于霍格沃茨南部的艾恩代尔附近。我听说大多数人倾向避开这个地方，但无论如何，我们必须进去。
The moonstone we seek is surely hidden away in here somewhere.|我们要寻找的月石肯定就藏在这里的某处。

We have managed to find the moonstone. According to Dorran's instructions, the henge should be our next stop.
我们成功找到了月石。按照多兰的指示，我们的下一站应该是巨石阵。

Now to place the moonstone inside the henge. We have no idea what will happen, but hopefully it will bring us a step closer to finding the Snidgets.
现在要将月石放在巨石阵内。我们不知道会发生什么事，但希望这能让我们更接近找到金飞侠。

That Mooncalf dance was a fantastical sight. Not to mention the symbol they left behind. Probably best to collect the moonstone first and then figure out this mystery. 
月痴兽舞蹈是一个梦幻般的景象，更别提它们所留下的符号了。或许最好先收集月石，然后再弄清楚这道谜团。
NTR_02_MoonAndBack_QuestActive_TaskObj01: Enter the Moonstone Garden|进入月石花园
NTR_02_MoonAndBack_QuestActive_TaskObj04: Place the moonstone inside the henge|将月石放在巨石阵内
NTR_02_MoonAndBack_QuestAvailable_Journa:
Poppy and I saved a dragon from the Poacher Pack, but the poachers identified Poppy and went to her gran's house in search of a dragon egg. They refused to leave empty-handed, so took journals her gran had discovered in her research of rare beasts. Now, Poppy and I must find and protect the rarest of these creatures, the Snidgets, before the poachers can find them. We met a group of centaurs that Poppy believed would help us in our quest. Only one of them, Dorran, was willing to help. He sent us on a cryptic quest to retrieve a moonstone. Poppy thinks she may have found the location of this moonstone and wants me to meet her at the entrance of a cave near Irondale south of Hogwarts.
帕比和我成功的从盗猎者手中救出了一头龙，但是盗猎者们认出了帕比，之后为了拿回龙蛋甚至不惜闯进了帕比的奶奶家。虽然龙蛋不在那里，但是那帮恶棍并不愿意就此善罢甘休，于是便抢走了帕比奶奶的宝贵日志，上面记载着各种关于稀有野兽的信息。帕比和我必须赶在盗猎者之前寻找并保护那些几近濒临灭绝的金飞侠。我们在途中遇到了一群马人，帕比认为他们也许会帮助我们完成任务。没想到只有一位名叫多兰的马人愿意。他派我们执行一场神秘任务并寻找一块特别的月石。帕比认为她有可能已经发现了特殊月石的确切位置，想要我去霍格沃茨南面的艾恩代尔附近的一处洞穴入口跟她会面。
NTR_02_MoonAndBack_QuestAvailable_StepJo:
Poppy sent me an owl saying that she wants to meet near Irondale at a cave south of Hogwarts.
帕比传给我一只猫头鹰，说她想在艾恩代尔附近霍格沃茨南部的一个山洞里见面。
NTR_02_MoonAndBack_QuestAvailable_TaskOb: Meet Poppy near Irondale at the cave|在艾恩代尔附近的山洞中与帕比会面
NTR_02_MoonAndBack_QuestComplete_Journal:
Dorran told us that finding the moonstone and placing it inside the henge would give us further clues as to the whereabouts of the Snidgets. The moonstone in question had been stowed away deep within a cave and afforded every protection. Once we placed it in the henge, a group of nearby Mooncalves began an intricate dance that left a symbol on the ground. We'll need Dorran's help from here. Poppy will be in touch with me once she tracks him down. 
多兰告诉我们，找到月石并将其放置在巨石阵内，会为我们提供更多关于金飞侠行踪的线索。相关的月石被藏在洞穴深处，并带有各式保护。我们将其放在巨石阵上，附近的一群月痴兽开始了一场错综复杂的舞蹈，并在地上留下了一个符号。我们需要多兰的帮助。帕比找到它后会与我联系。
NTR_02_TheCentaurandtheStone_QuestTitle: The Centaur and the Stone|马人与石头
NTR_03_ABirdInTheHand_Journal01a:
I spoke with Poppy who tells me that Dorran is waiting for up ahead. We're to meet up with him and find out once and for all if this is indeed where the Snidgets were hidden. 
我和帕比谈过，帕比告诉我多兰在前面等着。我们要和它会面，并一劳永逸地找出这是否真的是金飞侠的藏身之处。
NTR_03_ABirdInTheHand_Journal02a:
According to Dorran, in order to make our way into the ruin we'll first need to solve the puzzle outside. 
根据多兰的说法，为了进入废墟，我们首先需要解开外面的谜题。
NTR_03_ABirdInTheHand_Journal03:
With Dorran's help we were able to get inside what we suspect might be the Snidgets' long-forgotten hideaway. He left us to look into it, while he saw to another matter.
在多兰的帮助下，我们成功进入疑似是金飞侠长期被遗忘的藏身处。它让我们前去调查，而它则负责另一件事。
NTR_03_ABirdInTheHand_Journal04:
We've been ambushed by poachers who are no doubt here for the Snidgets eggs. We'll need to put up a fight if.
我们被盗猎者伏击了，他们无疑是为了金飞侠的蛋而来。我们或许要展开战斗。
NTR_03_ABirdInTheHand_Journal05:
With Dorran and Elek's help, we were able to defeat the poachers who ambushed us. Our path to the Snidgets is now clear. 
在多兰和阿里克的帮助下，我们成功击败伏击的盗猎者。我们通往金飞侠的道路现在已无阻碍。
NTR_03_ABirdInTheHand_QuestActive_Journa:
The symbol above the entrance is identical to the one left by the Mooncalves. Surely, we're in the right place. Now we just need to find the Snidgets and keep them safe from the Poacher Pack.
入口上方的符号与月痴兽留下的符号相同。当然，我们来对地方了。现在我们只需要找到金飞侠，并让它们远离盗猎者帮。
NTR_03_ABirdInTheHand_QuestActive_Stepjo:
I met Poppy at the ruins that bore the same symbol as the one the Mooncalves left behind. She says Dorran is waiting for us ahead. Best to meet with him now.
我在废墟中遇到了帕比，那里的符号与月痴兽留下的符号相同。她说多兰在前面等我们。最好现在就和它见面。

Dorran is waiting by some strange pillars. It's important that we remember that we will need the moonstone to get inside.
多兰在一些奇怪的柱子旁等着。重要的是我们得记住，需要月石才能进入。
We'll need to solve this puzzle to get inside.|我们需要解开这道谜题才能进入。

We were able to solve the puzzle to enter the Gilded Perch. Now to find those Snidgets.
我们成功解开进入镀金栖息所的谜题。现在要去找那些金飞侠。

The Poacher Pack must have been tracking us this whole time. We need to deal with them as swiftly as possible.
盗猎者帮肯定一直在跟踪我们。我们需要尽快处理他们。

We were able to dispatch the Poacher Pack with the aid of Dorran and Elek. Is it possible the Snidgets are just beyond this door?
在多兰、阿里克的帮助下，我们得以击败盗猎者帮。金飞侠是否就在这扇门之外呢？
NTR_03_ABirdInTheHand_QuestActive_TaskOb: Figure out how to enter the ruins|找出进入废墟的方法
Search for the Snidgets|寻找金飞侠
Unlock the doors to the Snidget Sanctuary|将金飞侠保护区的门解锁
NTR_03_ABirdInTheHand_QuestAvailable_Jou:
Dorran believes he knows where the Snidgets were secreted away. Poppy and I are meeting him there in the hopes of finding the Snidgets before the poachers do. He's waiting for us just southwest of Brocburrow. 
多兰相信自己知道金飞侠被藏在哪里。帕比和我要去那里与它会面，并希望能比盗猎者早一步找到金飞侠。它在布洛克巴罗西南边等我们。
NTR_03_ABirdInTheHand_QuestAvailable_Lea: Learn Glacius from Professor Kogawa|向古川教授学习“寒冰冻结”
NTR_03_ABirdInTheHand_QuestAvailable_Pro: I need to progress in my studies before meeting Poppy south-east of Hogwarts.|现在我得先把精力放在学习上，之后才能去霍格沃茨东南面的地方找帕比。
NTR_03_ABirdInTheHand_QuestAvailable_Ste:
Dorran suspects he knows where the Snidgets were hidden. Poppy and I are meeting him southwest of Brocburrow to investigate it.
多兰认为自己有可能已经知道金飞侠藏在了哪里。帕比和我要去布洛克巴罗西南面和他见面，以调查此事。
NTR_03_ABirdInTheHand_QuestAvailable_Tas: Meet Poppy southwest of Brocburrow|在布洛克巴罗西南方与帕比会面
NTR_03_ABirdInTheHand_QuestComplete_Jour:
Poppy, Dorran, and I successfully found the last remaining Snidgets and were able to keep them out of poacher hands. The Snidgets will remain under the watchful care of the centaurs until they can fend for themselves.
帕比、多兰和我成功找到最后剩下的金飞侠，并让它们远离盗猎者之手。金飞侠会持续受到马人的悉心照料，直到它们能自立为止。
NTR_03_ABirdInTheHand_QuestTitle: A Bird in the Hand|手中之鸟
NTR_03_ABirdInTheHand_SolvePuzzle_TaskOb: Solve puzzle to enter ruins|解开谜题并进入废墟
Search for the Snidgets|寻找金飞侠
NTR_03_ABirdInTheHand_UnlockDoors_TaskOb: Unlock the doors to the Snidget sanctuary|将金飞侠保护区的门解锁
NTR_CONV_02_ADragonDebrief_QuestAvailabl:
Poppy and I discovered Horntail Hall, a dragon fighting ring run by Rookwood's Poacher Pack. While there we were freed a dragon whose egg we now have in our possession. Poppy and I need to find a way to return it. She wants to meet at the Three Broomsticks to figure out our next steps.
帕比和我发现了由卢克伍德的盗猎者组织经营的斗龙场树蜂厅。我们在里面解救了一头被囚禁的龙，并且还找到了她被偷走的龙蛋。帕比和我需要想办法把龙蛋还回去。她希望我去三把扫帚商讨下一步的打算。

After rescuing a dragon from the clutches of the Poacher Pack, Poppy is ready to discuss our next move. She wants to meet in the Three Broomsticks.
在从盗猎者的魔掌中救出一条龙后，帕比准备讨论我们的下一步行动。她想在三把扫帚里见面。
NTR_CONV_02_ADragonDebrief_QuestComplete:
Poppy and I discovered Horntail Hall, a dragon fighting ring run by Rookwood's Poacher Pack. While there we rescued a dragon and found her egg. Poppy noticed that most of the dragons at Horntail Hall were wearing some sort of collar – likely made of goblin silver – that might be controlling them. This indicates some sort of connection between Rookwood's Poacher pack and Ranrok's Loyalists. She'd like to confirm that the dragon we freed wasn't wearing one. She mentioned she'd be in touch once she tracked down the dragon's location. 
帕比和我发现了由卢克伍德的盗猎者组织经营的斗龙场树蜂厅。在那里，我们救出了一条龙并找到了它的蛋。帕比注意到，树蜂厅的大多数龙都戴着某种项圈，可能是由妖精银所制成并用来控制龙。这表明卢克伍德的盗猎者帮和兰洛克的追随者之间存在某种联系。她想确认我们释放的龙没有佩戴。她说若追踪到龙的位置，就会与我联系。
NTR_Conv_02_ADragonDebrief_QuestTitle: A Dragon Debrief|来自巨龙的盘问
NTR_CONV_02_QuestAvailable_Journal:
After our narrow escape from the poachers in Horntail Hall, Poppy thinks it might be safe to regroup and discuss everything that happened. We made a lot of poachers angry by freeing the dragon they'd captured and making off with a dragon egg. 
在我们从树蜂厅的盗猎者那里逃脱后，帕比认为重新集结并讨论发生的一切或许比较稳妥。我们激怒了众多盗猎者，因为我们释放了许多他们所捕获的龙，并带着一颗龙蛋逃走。
NTR_CONV_02_QuestAvailable_StepJournal:
After rescuing a dragon from the clutches of the Poacher Pack, Poppy is ready to discuss our next move. She wants to meet in the Three Broomsticks.
在从盗猎者的魔掌中救出一条龙后，帕比准备讨论我们的下一步行动。她想在三把扫帚里见面。
NTR_CONV_02_QuestTitle: A Dragon Debrief|来自巨龙的盘问
NTR_CONV_03: The Poachers' House Call|盗猎者出没
NTR_CONV_03_BetweenTheLines_QuestAvailab:
Poppy and I discovered Horntail Hall, a dragon fighting ring run by Rookwood's Poacher Pack. Not only did we free a dragon, but we also reunited said dragon with her egg. Despite all our success, Poppy was unnerved that the poachers had let us get away with so much and when we last spoke she seemed to have arrived at a horrifying realisation. Hopefully she'll tell me what she's figured out. 
帕比和我发现了由卢克伍德的盗猎者组织经营的斗龙场树蜂厅。我们不仅解救了一头龙，同时还让她与自己被偷走的龙蛋团聚了。尽管获得了如此大的成功，帕比却看上去忧心忡忡：她认为盗猎者在经历了这些损失之后必然不会按兵不动，离别的时候，她似乎意识到了什么可怕的事情。希望到时候她能够给我解释一下。
NTR_CONV_03_BetweentheLines_QuestAvailab:
I should talk to Poppy and find out why she left so abruptly after we returned the dragon egg.
我应该和帕比谈谈，为何在我们归还龙蛋后，她突然就离开。
NTR_CONV_03_BetweenTheLines_QuestComplet:
Poppy and I were able to save a dragon from the clutches of Rookwood's Poacher Pack, but this heroism came at a price. The poachers identified Poppy and went to her gran's house in search of the dragon egg. They refused to leave empty-handed, so they took valuable journals her gran had discovered in her research of rare creatures. Now, Poppy and I are on a mission to find and protect the most rare of these creatures, the Snidgets, before the poachers can get to them. Luckily, she has a lead. She thinks the centaurs might be able to help us find and protect the Snidgets – just as soon as she can track them down. 
帕比和我成功从卢克伍德的盗猎者帮手中救出一条龙，但这种英雄主义得付出代价。盗猎者认出了帕比，然后去她奶奶家寻找龙蛋。他们拒绝空手而归，所以他们拿走了她祖母在研究稀有生物时发现的珍贵日志。现在，帕比和我的任务是在盗猎者找到它们之前，找到并保护这些生物中最稀有的金飞侠。幸运的是，她握有线索。她认为马人可能会协助我们找到并保护金飞侠，只要她能够找到那些马人的话。
NTR_CONV_03_BetweentheLines_QuestTitle: The Poachers' House Call|盗猎者出没
NTR_Conv_03_ThePoachersHouseCall_QuestTi: The Poachers' House Call|盗猎者出没
NTR_CONV_04_PlanOfAction_QuestAvailable_:
Poppy and I were able to save a dragon from the clutches of Rookwood's Poacher Pack, but this heroism came at a price. The poachers identified Poppy and went to her gran's house in search of the dragon egg. They refused to leave empty-handed, so they took valuable journals her gran had discovered when researching rare creatures. Now Poppy and I are on a mission to find and protect Snidgets before the poachers can get to them. Luckily, she has a lead. She thinks the centaurs might be able to help us find and protect the Snidgets. She wants to meet in the Forbidden Forest where we'll approach them together. 
帕比和我成功从卢克伍德的盗猎者帮手中救出一条龙，但这种英雄主义得付出代价。盗猎者认出了帕比，然后去她奶奶家寻找龙蛋。他们拒绝空手而归，所以他们拿走了她祖母在研究稀有生物时发现的珍贵日志。现在，帕比和我的任务是在盗猎者找到它们之前，找到并保护这些生物中最稀有的金飞侠。幸运的是，她握有线索。她认为马人可能会协助我们找到并保护金飞侠。她想在禁林见面，而我们将一起接近它们。

Last I talked Poppy, she was worried about the Snidgets. She said to meet her in the Forbidden Forest to figure out our rescue plan.
上次我与帕比交谈时，她很担心金飞侠。她要我去禁林会面，并想出救援计划。
Meet Poppy in the Forbidden Forest|在禁林与帕比会面
NTR_CONV_04_PlanOfAction_QuestComplete_J:
I spoke with Poppy about her plan to rescue the Snidgets. It involves the aid of centaurs. One named Dorran seems open to helping us.
我和帕比谈过拯救金飞侠的计划。其中涉及马人的帮助。一位名叫多兰的马人似乎愿意帮助我们。
NTR_Conv_06_ItsintheStars_QuestTitle: It's in the Stars|星星之中
NTR_CONV_06_SignsAndSymbols_QuestAvailab:
Poppy and I are racing to find the hidden Snidgets before the Poacher Pack does. A centaur named Dorran seems to know something about where they may have been hidden. His instructions to retrieve a hidden moonstone culminated in us learning of a mysterious symbol created by Mooncalves. Poppy has tracked down Dorran and wants us to meet him so that we can show him the symbol. 
帕比和我现在争分夺秒，必须赶在盗猎者帮之前找到金飞侠的藏身地。一个名叫多兰的马人似乎知道金飞侠藏在了何处。在循着他的指示搜索秘密月石的过程中，我们发现了一个由月痴兽们创造的神秘符号。帕比找到了多兰，并且想要我和她一起去向多兰讨教符号的含义。

Poppy has shown Dorran the symbol the Mooncalves made at the henge. I should speak with Dorran and hear what he has to say. 
帕比向多兰展示了月痴兽在石碑上制作的符号。我应该和多兰谈谈，听听它要说什么。
Meet Poppy in the Forbidden Forest|在禁林与帕比会面
NTR_CONV_06_SignsAndSymbols_QuestComplet:
I met with Poppy and Dorran in the Forbidden Forest and we are getting close to finding the elusive Snidgets. Dorran explained that he had divined all the events leading to our first meeting. He believes the symbol left behind from the Mooncalves denotes where the Snidgets are hidden: on a rock face in the cliffs of the Forest. Poppy and I are to meet him there.
我在禁林遇到了帕比和多兰，我们快要能找到难以捉摸的金飞侠了。多兰解释说，它已预知了导致我们首次见面的所有事件。他相信月痴兽留下的符号代表了金飞侠的藏身之处：在森林悬崖的岩面上。我和帕比要去那里见他。
NTR_CONV_07_TheEnd_QuestAvailable_Journa:
Poppy and I have been on quite the journey together – saving a dragon, returning her egg, fighting poachers, meeting centaurs, and finally finding the Snidgets. Some time has passed since everything happened and it would be nice to catch up. She said I could meet her in the Great Hall.
帕比和我经历了千辛万苦，从我们解救了一头龙、让一颗龙蛋物归原主、到对抗盗猎者、结识马人，最终还找到了金飞侠。不过那些事结束已经有一段时间了，是时候该叙叙旧了。帕比说我可以在礼堂见她。
NTR_CONV_07_TheEnd_QuestAvailable_StepJo:
Poppy and I beat the poachers and saved the Snidgets. I wonder how she feels about it all. I should meet her in the Great Hall and talk to her.
帕比和我打败了盗猎者并解救了金飞侠。我想知道她对这一切的感觉如何。我该去礼堂找她聊聊。
NTR_CONV_07_TheEnd_QuestAvailable_TaskOb: Meet Poppy in the Great Hall|在礼堂与帕比会面
NTR_CONV_07_TheEnd_QuestComplete_Journal:
Poppy and I rescued a dragon from the Poacher Pack and stole a dragon egg. They retaliated by stealing a journal from her gran with information as to the location of Snidgets, believed to be extinct. Poppy sought the help of the centaurs but only one was willing to help us. He told us to find a special moonstone and the henge in which to place it. Upon doing so, a group of Mooncalves began to dance and left behind a symbol. Dorran said the symbol indicated where the Snidgets were hidden. The poachers tracked our movements and ambushed us, but we were able to prevail with the help of centaurs. We found the Snidgets and they will now be protected by the centaurs.
帕比和我从盗猎者帮手中救出一条龙，并偷走了一颗龙蛋。为了报复，他们从她奶奶的家里偷走了一本日志，其中记载了据信已灭绝的金飞侠的位置资讯。帕比寻求了马人的帮助，但只有一名马人愿意信任我们并帮助我们。他指示我们找到一种特殊的月石及放置它的巨石阵。完成后，一群月痴兽开始翩翩起舞，并留下了一个符号。多兰告诉我们，这个符号代表了金飞侠的隐藏位置。盗猎者一直在跟踪我们的行踪，并伏击了我们，但我们在马人的帮助下取得了胜利。最终我们找到了金飞侠，它们现在在马人的保护下。

nvidiaframegeneration_desc_more:
Generates an additional frame for each rendered frame. Enabling affects both NVIDIA Reflex and VSYNC settings
为每个渲染帧生成一个附加帧。启用将会影响NVIDIA Reflex和垂直同步设置
nvidiaframegeneration_disabled_desc:
If supported by your graphics card, this setting may also be disabled because NVIDIA DLSS isn't enabled, or because Hardware-accelerated GPU Scheduling isn't enabled in Windows Graphics Settings.
如果你的显卡支持，该设置也可能会因为未启用NVIDIA DLSS，或因为Windows图形设置中未启用硬件加速GPU调度而被停用。
nvidiarayreconstruction_desc_more:
Enhances image quality by generating high-quality pixels between sampled rays for intensive ray traced content.
通过在采样光线之间生成高质量像素来增强图像品质，以获得密集的光线追踪效果。
nvidiarayreconstruction_disabled_desc:
If supported by your graphics card, this setting may also be disabled because NVIDIA DLSS Super Resolution isn't enabled (Unsupported on Ultra-Performance and DLAA modes).
如果你的显卡支持，当 NVIDIA DLSS 超分辨率未启用时，该设置也可能被禁用（超高性能和 DLAA 模式不支持）。
nvidiareflex_fg_desc:
NVIDIA Reflex is used to reduce system latency which increases PC responsiveness, and is required to be enabled for Frame Generation
NVIDIA Reflex用于减少系统延迟，从而提高PC的响应能力，并且需要启用“帧数生成”
nvidiareflex_fg_disabled_desc: This setting is limited because Frame Generation is enabled.|该设置受到限制，因为“帧数生成”已启用。
OgbertTheOdd: Ogbert the Odd|怪胎奥格波特
OgbertTheOdd_desc:
Ogbert the Odd joined Ranrok's Loyalists after a run-in with a security dragon at Gringotts. Some wonder if he provoked the dragon whilst others bemoan the cruelty of keeping dragons chained up under a bank.
在与古灵阁之下负责守卫的巨龙交锋过后，怪胎奥格波特便选择了加入兰洛克的追随者。有人怀疑当初是他故意挑衅巨龙在先，其他人则质疑着在银行地下圈养被铁链束缚的巨龙的残忍做法。
OLI_01_01_QuestAvailable_Journal_Natty:
Professor Weasley has arranged for me to visit the nearby village of Hogsmeade and replace my lost supplies. I should be able to navigate to the different shops using my map. Natty Onai will keep me company along the way.
韦斯莱教授已经安排我去附近的村庄霍格莫德，替换之前遗失的学习用品。我应该能借助地图的指引找到对应的不同店铺。娜娜·欧奈将会陪伴我一起前往村庄。
OLI_01_01_QuestAvailable_Journal_Seb:
Professor Weasley has arranged for me to visit the nearby village of Hogsmeade and replace my lost supplies. I should be able to navigate to the different shops using my map. Sebastian Sallow will keep me company along the way.
韦斯莱教授已经安排我去附近的村庄霍格莫德，替换之前遗失的学习用品。我应该能借助地图的指引找到对应的不同店铺。塞巴斯蒂安·萨鲁将会陪伴我一起前往村庄。

OLI_01_01_ToHogsmeade_QuestActive_StepJo:
I have completed Professor Ronen's assignment, learned Reparo, and met up with Natty. Now it's time to head to Hogsmeade!
我完成了罗南教授的作业、学会了“修复如初”，并见到了娜娜。现在该前往霍格莫德了！

I have completed Professor Ronen's assignment, learned Reparo, and met up with Sebastian. Now it's time to head to Hogsmeade!
我完成了罗南教授的作业、学会了“修复如初”，并见到了塞巴斯蒂安。现在该前往霍格莫德了！

I can get spellcrafts from Tomes and Scrolls near the entrance to the village, a new wand from Ollivanders, potion recipes from J. Pippin’s Potions, and dittany seeds at The Magic Neep.
我可以从村庄入口附近的“巨著与卷轴”那里买到幻术配方，从奥利凡德那里得到一根新魔杖，从“J·皮聘魔药店”那里弄到魔药配方，然后在“神奇萝卜”那里找到白鲜种子

Now that I’ve picked up a new wand and replaced all my supplies, I should go meet with Natty at the town circle.

OLI_01_01_ToHogsmeade_QuestTitle: Welcome to Hogsmeade|欢迎来到霍格莫德
OLI_01_02_ToHogsmeade_QuestActive_StepJo:
Moments after I finished gathering supplies for school, Hogsmeade was attacked by armoured trolls. I need to help defend the village.
在我收集完在学校要用的补给品后不久，霍格莫德就遭到了装甲巨怪的袭击。我需要帮助保卫村庄。
The village officer appears to want to have a word with me.|村庄官员似乎想和我谈谈。

I should use the Mending Charm that Professor Ronen taught me to help repair the damage caused by the troll.
我应该使用罗南教授教我的修复咒，以协助修复巨怪造成的伤害。
The shopkeeper in Gladrags wants to speak to me.|风雅牌巫师服装店的店主想和我谈谈。

Natty wants me to follow her to the Three Broomsticks. I’m looking forward to having a Butterbeer.
娜娜要我跟着她去三把扫帚。我很期待喝到黄油啤酒。

Sebastian wants me to follow him to the Three Broomsticks. I’m looking forward to having a Butterbeer.
塞巴斯蒂安要我跟着他去三把扫帚。我很期待喝到黄油啤酒。
It’s been a long day. All I want to do is find my room and crawl into bed.|真是漫长的一天。我只想找到我的房间，然后爬上床。

OLI_01_Natsai: Welcome to Hogsmeade|欢迎来到霍格莫德
OLI_01_Seb: Welcome to Hogsmeade|欢迎来到霍格莫德
OLI_01_ToHogsmeade_QuestComplete_Journal:
What a long day! At the behest of Professor Weasley, I journeyed to Hogsmeade with a friend and replenished my lost school supplies. I even acquired my own wand! What Professor Weasley couldn't have predicted was a troll attack on Hogsmeade, which I helped to fend off. After repairing the damage to the village and learning a few new abilities, I finally got to visit the Three Broomsticks, where I encountered some unpleasant characters
真是漫长的一天！在韦斯莱教授的要求下，我和一位好友一起去了霍格莫德，补充了我遗失的学习用品。我甚至得到了自己的魔杖！韦斯莱教授未料到的是，有巨怪袭击了霍格莫德，而我帮助抵御了这次袭击。在修复了村庄的损坏并学习了一些新技能后，我终于造访了三把扫帚，在那里我遇到了一些令人不快的角色：兰洛克和卢克伍德。但至少我终于可尝尝黄油啤酒了！现在我应该休息一下，谁知道明天会发生什么事呢？

OLI_01_ToHogsmeade_RequirementTask_StepJ:
I need to progress in my studies and complete Professor Ronen's Assignment to earn Reparo before going to Hogsmeade with Natty.
现在我需要先将注意力放在学习上面，完成罗南教授布置的“修复如初”作业之后才能和娜娜一起去霍格莫德。

I need to progress in my studies and complete Professor Ronen's Assignment to earn Reparo before going to Hogsmeade with Sebastian.
现在我需要先将注意力放在学习上面，完成罗南教授布置的“修复如初”作业之后才能和塞巴斯蒂安一起去霍格莫德。

OneEyedWitch_Dungeon: One-Eyed Witch Passage|独眼女巫密道
OneEyedWitch_Dungeon_desc:
A secret passageway, hidden behind the statue of a One-eyed Witch, leading from Hogwarts to the cellar of Honeydukes in Hogsmeade
隐藏在独眼女巫雕像后面的秘密通道，可从霍格沃茨通往霍格莫德的“蜂蜜公爵”地窖
OnyxHippogriffMount_desc:
You have earned the trust of this beautiful, black Hippogriff and will now be able to soar the skies on its back.
你已经得到了这头美丽的黑色鹰马翼兽的信任，今后将可以骑着它自由遨游天际。
Oppugno: Ancient Magic Throw|古代魔法投掷
Oppugno_desc:
Summons and then throws special environmental objects at the targeted enemy. Particularly useful for breaking through Shield Charms. Cast with {OppugnoButton} when that prompt is hovering over an object.
召唤特殊的环境物体，并向目标敌人投掷。这种攻击能够轻松击溃护盾魔咒。当目标上方出现提示标记后按施放。

Outfit_116_Common_desc: A well-appointed ensemble for Saint Patrick's Day festivities|派翠克节庆祝活动的装饰齐全装扮
Outfit_116_Epic_desc: An extraordinary ensemble for Saint Patrick's Day festivities|派翠克节庆祝活动的非凡装扮

Outfit_117_Common_desc: A well-appointed ensemble perfect for witches and wizards with a royal flair|装饰齐全的装扮，适合具有皇家风范的女巫和巫师
Outfit_117_Epic_desc: An extraordinary ensemble perfect for witches and wizards with a royal flair|非凡装扮，适合具有皇家风范的女巫和巫师

A ensemble, for those with poise and refinement, earned by solving the mystery of the empty painting frame

Outfit_117_Rare_desc: A superb ensemble perfect for witches and wizards with a royal flair|优质装扮，适合具有皇家风范的女巫和巫师

A delightful ensemble, including a lavender vest and bowtie, similar to that worn by everyone’s favourite Charms teacher
一套赏心悦目的服装，包括一件浅紫色背心与领结，就好像是那名大家最喜爱的魔咒学老师本人所穿
Outfit_118_Legendary_desc|SWITCH:
A delightful ensemble, including a lavender vest and bowtie, similar to that worn by everyone’s favourite Charms teacher

Outfit_119_Legendary: Azkaban Prisoner Uniform|阿兹卡班囚服
Outfit_119_Legendary_desc:
The tattered, striped clothing worn by those who have been condemned to a life of hopelessness and despair

Outfit_Hidden_desc: This clothing item will appear invisible|一件无影无形的服饰

PerditaStrix: Perdita Strix|佩迪塔·斯特里克斯
PetFrog_desc:
Not one for adventure, Pickles is an older, elegant gentle toad who prefers a quite naps on his lily pad
酱呱不喜外出，这只上了年纪的端庄蟾蜍平日里都会在自己的一隅莲叶上平静歇息
Petrificus_desc:
Powerful enough to bind most enemies permanently, but more dangerous foes will only take some damage and then quickly break free from the effect. Sneak up undetected to an enemy and press {Interact} when prompted to cast.
这种强大的咒语能够使绝大多数敌人进入永久性的束缚状态，但是那些最为凶残的敌人将只会承受部分伤害，之后便能够迅速挣脱咒语的效果。潜行靠近尚未察觉的敌人，接着根据提示按下施放。
PetrificustTotalus_gameplay_desc:
Powerful enough to bind most enemies permanently, but more dangerous foes will only take some damage and then quickly break free from the effect. Sneak up undetected to an enemy and press {Interact} when prompted to cast.
这种强大的咒语能够使绝大多数敌人进入永久性的束缚状态，但是那些最为凶残的敌人将只会承受部分伤害，之后便能够迅速挣脱咒语的效果。潜行靠近尚未察觉的敌人，接着根据提示按下施放。
Phoenix_Byproduct_desc:
The feathers are shed by the immensely powerful phoenix. Phoenix feathers can be used to upgrade and assign traits to gear.
拥有摧枯拉朽之力的凤凰所褪下的羽毛。凤凰羽毛可用于强化装备和为其分配特质。
Phoenix_desc:
The phoenix is an elegant, rare bird that possesses powerful magic. It is reborn from its ashes after bursting into flames. The loyalty of the phoenix is hard won. 
凤凰是一种优雅、稀有的鸟类，拥有强大的魔法。它在燃烧后，会从灰烬中重生。很少有人能赢得凤凰的忠诚。
PhoenixFeatherCore_Desc:
The feather of a phoenix that serves as the core of a wand, capable of producing a great range of magic
被用作魔杖杖芯的凤凰羽毛，能够释放各式各样的魔法
PhoenixOffspring_desc: A newly born phoenix|一只刚出生的凤凰
PhotoMode_TimeOfDay: Time of Day|一天中的时间
Physical_Vul: Vulnerable to physical damage|无力抵抗物理伤害

PIM_AddDrops: Add Horklump Juice|添加霍克拉普汁
PIP01_01: Portrait in a Pickle|肖像的困境
PIP_01_01_OffTheWall_SpeakWithFerdinand_: Find and speak with Ferdinand|找到弗迪南并和他谈一谈
PIP_01_02_PicturePerfect_ReturnFrame_Tas: Return Ferdinand's frame to the Three Broomsticks or the Hog's Head|将弗迪南的画框带回三把扫帚或者猪头酒吧
pip_01_portraitiapickle_questtitle: Portrait in a Pickle|肖像的困境
PIP_01_PortraitinaPickle_QuestActive_Jou:
The portrait of Ferdinand Octavius Pratt in the Hogwarts Library is very upset. Apparently, Astoria Crickett had his second portrait frame removed from the Three Broomsticks in Hogsmeade by Ashwinders, who paid for it. Now the frame is in some ruins in the Southern Coast occupied by Ashwinders, and Ferdinand wants it returned. If I stumble upon it, I should talk to it.
在霍格沃茨的图书馆中，弗迪南·屋大维·普拉特的画像感到非常伤心。显然是阿斯托利亚·克里奇特雇佣了一群火灰蛇党，并命令这些盗贼将弗迪南原本挂在三把扫帚里面的第二幅画框给拿走了。现在画框已经被带去了火灰蛇党在南岸的废墟据点，弗迪南想要画框物归原位。如果我在那里碰巧遇到的话，我可以跟他聊一聊。
PIP_01_PortraitinaPickle_QuestActive_Ste:
Ferdinand mentioned that Astoria, who frequents the Three Broomsticks, was behind the removal of his portrait frame. I should chat with her.
弗迪南提到说，三把扫帚的老常客阿斯托利亚有可能是与画框失窃一事脱不了干系。看来我得去跟阿斯托利亚聊一聊了。

Astoria mentioned that Ferdinand’s alternate portrait is with the Ashwinders who paid for it. They are inhabiting some ruins along the coast far to the south of Hogwarts.
阿斯托利亚提到说弗迪南的另一副画像已经落到了火灰蛇党的手里。他们就盘踞在霍格沃茨南部沿海地带的废墟之中。

I’ve reached the ruins Astoria pointed me to. Now to search around for Ferdinand’s alternate frame. I should beware of Ashwinders as I go. 
我已经找到了阿斯托利亚说的废墟。现在要做的就是寻找弗迪南的另一副画框。我得提高警惕，小心火灰蛇党。

In speaking with Ferdinand in his alternate frame, I decided to return his frame to Hogsmeade instead of destroying it outright. Now to decide whether to return it to the Three Broomsticks like Ferdinand wants, or to present the patrons of The Hog’s Head Inn with the portrait.
在与另一副画框中的弗迪南交谈过后，我决定将他重新带回霍格莫德，而不是直接“就地处理”。现在有一个问题摆在了我面前：是遵照弗迪南的意愿将画框带回三把扫帚，还是为猪头酒吧的顾客们献上一份“惊喜好礼”。

In speaking with Ferdinand in his alternate frame, I decided it would be better to destroy the frame than to return it to Hogsmeade. Incendio should do the trick.
在与另一副画框中的弗迪南交谈过后，我决定直接将其就地毁灭，而不是将其带回霍格莫德。“火焰熊熊”应该就能够轻松搞定。

I can't seem to get the door unlocked with magic. There must be another way in. 
我似乎无法用魔法打开大门。这里一定还有其他的入口。
PIP_01_PortraitinaPickle_QuestActive_Tas: Talk to Astoria Crickett at the Three Broomsticks|在三把扫帚与阿斯托利亚·克里奇特交谈
Find the ruins where Ferdinand’s other frame is being held|找到弗迪南的另一幅画框所在的废墟
Find and speak with Ferdinand in the ruins|在废墟中找到弗迪南的画框并与他谈一谈
Take Ferdinand’s frame to the Three Broomsticks or the Hog’s Head Inn|将弗迪南的画框带回三把扫帚或者猪头酒吧
Burn Ferdinand’s alternate frame|烧掉弗迪南的另一副画框
Figure out a way to open the vault door|设法打开秘库大门
PIP_01_PortraitInAPickle_QuestAvailable_:
Ferdinand Octavius Pratt, a portrait in the Hogwarts library, finds himself in an unfortunate situation and needs help returning one of his frames to its rightful location.
霍格沃茨图书馆中的一副画像，也就是弗迪南·屋大维·普拉特遇到了一个“棘手的问题”，现在急需好心人帮忙将他的其中一副画框带回原本的位置。
PIP_01_PortraitinaPickle_QuestAvailable_:
A portrait in the back of the library is apparently very upset. It might be worth looking into.
在图书馆后面的墙壁上，一副画像正在大吐苦水。也许我该去调查一下。
Speak to the portrait in the back of the library|与图书馆后面的画像交谈
PIP_01_PortraitinaPickle_QuestComplete_J:
I came across a portrait of Ferdinand Octavius Pratt in the library and he was quite beside himself. He wailed as he told me that his frame in the Three Broomsticks had been kidnapped by scoundrels. Astoria told me she paid thieves to take his frame, as she was tired of him telling tales on students to the Headmaster. I managed to find Ferdinand's portrait in the thieves' camp and recover it. Even though Ferdinand is tiresome, his tantrum in the library is worse. I decided the best thing for all of us was to restore the frame to its proper place in the Three Broomsticks. Let's hope that quiets him down a bit, and perhaps he won't be so nosy in the future.
在图书馆里面，我遇到了弗迪南·屋大维·普拉特的画像，他遇到一个人便大发牢骚。在弗迪南的哀叹与抱怨之中，我了解到了真相：他原本挂在三把扫帚的另一幅画框被不知名的恶棍们被掳走了。阿斯托利亚告诉我就是自己花钱雇人把画框偷走的，因为她已经不想再见到弗迪南将学生的事情偷偷告诉校长的无耻行径。我在盗贼们的营地里成功拿回了弗迪南的画像。虽然弗迪南是挺讨人厌的，他在图书馆里大发雷霆的抱怨已经影响到了所有人。所以为了全体师生的身心健康，我决定将画像重新带回三把扫帚的墙壁上。希望这能够让他安静下来，也希望这家伙懂得“知恩图报”，以后不要再做打小报告这种事了。

I came across a portrait of Ferdinand Octavius Pratt in the library and he was quite beside himself. He wailed as he told me that his frame in the Three Broomsticks had been kidnapped by scoundrels. Astoria told me she paid thieves to take his frame, as she was tired of him telling tales on students to the Headmaster. I managed to find Ferdinand's portrait in the thieves' camp and recover it. Ferdinand vexed me so much throughout the entire ordeal that I felt the only course of action was to burn his frame. That solves the problem of him telling tales on students once and for all.
在图书馆里面，我遇到了弗迪南·屋大维·普拉特的画像，他遇到一个人便大发牢骚。在弗迪南的哀叹与抱怨之中，我了解到了真相：他原本挂在三把扫帚的另一幅画框被不知名的恶棍们被掳走了。阿斯托利亚告诉我就是自己花钱雇人把画框偷走的，因为她已经不想再见到弗迪南将学生的事情偷偷告诉校长的无耻行径。我在盗贼们的营地里成功拿回了弗迪南的画像。这一路上我受尽了弗迪南的言语折磨，思考过后，我决定这种唠叨鬼的唯一应有的下场就是灰飞烟灭。随着火焰吞噬弗迪南的画框，学生们永远不用再担心他的告密行为了。

I came across a portrait of Ferdinand Octavius Pratt in the library and he was quite beside himself. He wailed as he told me that his frame in the Three Broomsticks had been kidnapped by scoundrels. Astoria told me she paid thieves to take his frame, as she was tired of him telling tales on students to the Headmaster. I managed to find Ferdinand's portrait in the thieves' camp and recover it. I didn't want to give him the satisfaction of restoring him to the Three Broomsticks, but also didn't have the heart to destroy the portrait. I decided to hang him up in the Hog's Head Inn; hopefully the patrons will give him such a hard time, he'll learn his lesson and stop telling tales on students.
在图书馆里面，我遇到了弗迪南·屋大维·普拉特的画像，他遇到一个人便大发牢骚。在弗迪南的哀叹与抱怨之中，我了解到了真相：他原本挂在三把扫帚的另一幅画框被不知名的恶棍们被掳走了。阿斯托利亚告诉我就是自己花钱雇人把画框偷走的，因为她已经不想再见到弗迪南将学生的事情偷偷告诉校长的无耻行径。我在盗贼们的营地里成功拿回了弗迪南的画像。如果将弗迪南重新放回三把扫帚，那未免太便宜了这个讨厌鬼，不过要是直接毁掉画框，我又有点于心不忍。权衡再三之后，我决定把他放进猪头酒吧里面，希望那里的“贵客”能够让他学到教训，以后不再打学生们的小报告。

Poacher_Captain_tip_one_desc:
Among the quicker agents of Rookwood, these witches will surprise their opponents with back-to-back attacks.
作为卢克伍德麾下身手更为敏捷的爪牙，这些巫师将会使用密不透风的连续攻击让对手们猝不及防。
Poacher_Captain_tip_three_desc:
Their powerful Reductor Curse cannot be blocked by Shield Charms, but interrupting that cast with a Severing Charm will spin them to the point of losing control and hitting one of their own gang.
护盾魔咒无法抵挡强力粉碎诅咒。但如果在对手施法时对其使用切割魔咒，就能使他们失去控制并攻击自己的同伙。
Poacher_Captain_tip_two_desc:
Impacting their Shield Charm with a Stunning Spell will make them retaliate with a Reductor Curse.
如果他们的护盾魔咒遭到昏迷咒语攻击，这些女巫将会立刻使用粉碎诅咒发动反击。
Poacher_Grunt_Tip_one_desc:
These unscrupulous wizards have not mastered Shield Charms, so they are vulnerable to all sorts of attacks.
这些魔法世界中的不法之徒尚未精通护盾魔咒，因此无法有效抵挡各类攻击。
Poacher_Grunt_Tip_two_desc:
Watch out for counterattacks from these shifty wizards; they can catch you off guard by casting spells as they recover from being knocked down.
小心这些狡猾巫师的反击。他们被击倒后，能够在起身过程中出其不意地对敌人迅速施放咒语。
Poacher_Mage_tip_one_desc:
Some poachers in Rookwood's organisation have become Animagi who can transform into the same animal: a ravenous wolf.
卢克伍德的组织不乏拥有阿尼玛格斯身份的盗猎者。他们都能变身为同一种动物：贪婪嗜血的恶狼。
Poacher_Mage_tip_three_desc:
Interrupting their Reductor Curse with a Banishing Charm will cause them to lose control of their spell cast and hit one of their own gang.
使用驱逐魔咒干扰他们的粉碎诅咒便可使这些敌人失去控制并攻击自己的同伙。
Poacher_Mage_tip_two_desc:
When in their Animagus form, they must be weakened and forced back into human form before they can be properly defeated. The Transformation spell, however, can catch them off guard and revert them in an instant.
当他们处于阿尼玛格斯形态时，你必须设法削弱并逼其回到人类形态，之后才可以彻底击败这些敌人。不过，“变形魔咒”倒是可以让他们措手不及，并在瞬间将他们恢复原状。
Poacher_Sniper_tip_one_desc:
These witches have mastered the Levitation Spell as a means of catching the beasts that they hunt. They use it skilfully in duels and battles against anyone who tries to stop them.
这些女巫是飘浮咒语方面的专家，能够轻松抓捕自己盯上的野兽。在决斗时，她们也会毫不犹豫地运用这些魔咒去对付与自己作对之人。
Poacher_Sniper_tip_three_desc:
A Stunning Spell is often enough to knock them totally unconscious, but cleverness and skill are required to successfully cast it at them.
虽然通常一记昏迷咒语便足以让他们不省人事，但首先你得学会看准时机，凭借熟练的技巧成功命中敌人。
Poacher_Sniper_tip_two_desc:
Since they prefer to avoid the heart of a battle, pulling them in close with Accio is an effective way to disrupt their plans.
在战斗中，这些敌人倾向于远离激烈胶着的中心地点，因此你需要反其道而行之，通过“飞来咒”拉近距离并借此打乱他们的计划。
Poacher_soldier_tip_one_desc:
These wizards are skilled at deflecting simple attacks, so their Shield Charms must be broken first in order to defeat them.
这些巫师擅长反弹简单的攻击，因此必须先设法突破护盾魔咒才能打败他们。
Poacher_soldier_tip_two_desc:
As they warm up their Blasting Curse, freezing them with Glacius will have a devastating effect.
当他们在准备爆炸诅咒期间，冰冻魔咒“寒冰冻结”将能够带来毁灭性的效果。
Poacher_Tank_tip_one_desc:
These wizards have mastered the ability to conjure huge columns of fire to incinerate threats, but it is as dangerous to their own gang as it is to their opponents.
这些技艺娴熟的巫师能够变幻出冲天火柱焚烧敌人，但这种咒语同样也会威胁到他们自己的同伙。
Poacher_Tank_tip_three_desc:
Slowing down these wizards with Arresto Momentum while they are conjuring fire will keep that fire raging longer, providing an opportunity to launch enemies into it with devastating results.
恰到好处的迟缓魔咒“减震止速”将会延长这些巫师变幻的火焰持续时间，使你有机会将其他敌人击入火柱中并引发毁灭性的后果。
Poacher_Tank_tip_two_desc:
Disarming them with Expelliarmus as they prepare to cast their fire spell will cause them to lose control of the spell with self-destructive effects.
如果在这些敌人施放火焰咒语期间，使用“除你武器”将其缴械，这将使他们的咒语失去控制并带来致命的自毁效果。
PoacherMage_tip_one_desc:
These witches and wizards are adept with Shield Charms and will successfully defend against most attacks. Surprising them by suddenly Apparating next to them will catch them off guard and allow a follow-up with additional attacks.
这些女巫与巫师擅长护盾魔咒，因此能够抵挡绝大多数攻击。如果想要突破他们的牢固防御，可以通过现影术迅速传送至他们身旁，并趁着他们来不及反应，争取时间发动后续攻击。
PoacherMage_tip_two_desc:
Some poachers in Rookwood's organisation have become Animagi who can transform into the same animal: a ravenous wolf. Each time they take their Animagus form, they must be weakened and forced back into human form before they can be properly defeated.
卢克伍德的组织不乏拥有阿尼玛格斯身份的盗猎者。他们都能变身为同一种动物：贪婪嗜血的恶狼。当他们变身为阿尼玛格斯形态后，你必须设法削弱并逼其回到人类形态，之后才可以彻底击败这些敌人。

Potion_CreatureBreedingHexed_desc:
A foul-smelling substance that encourages beasts to breed, resulting in hexed offspring
可刺激野兽繁殖的恶臭物质，将带来被施毒咒的后代
Potion_CreatureBreedingNormal_desc: A strong smelling substance that encourages beasts to breed|可刺激野兽繁殖的刺鼻物质
