PRC_01_01_01_Speak_To_Percival_Task1: Speak to Percival|与波西瓦尔交谈
PRC_01_CONV_BackOnThePath_QuestActive_St: Professor Fig is in the Map Chamber. I should speak to him about recent events.|菲戈教授就在地图密室里面。我应该跟他谈谈最近发生的事情。
PRC_01_CONV_BackOnThePath_QuestActive_Ta: Talk to Professor Fig|与菲戈教授交谈
PRC_01_CONV_BackOnThePath_QuestAvailable:
Professor Fig sent me an owl requesting we meet in the Map Chamber. He seems eager to hear about my dealings with Lodgok and he wants to plan out our next step.
菲戈教授寄了封猫头鹰信给我，想要我去地图密室和他见面。教授似乎已经迫不及待想要了解我之前跟罗德高克打交道的经历，并且还准备尽快规划好我们下一步的计划。
Meet Professor Fig in the Map Chamber.|在地图密室与菲戈教授见面。
Go to the Map Chamber|前往地图密室
PRC_01_CONV_BackOnThePath_QuestComplete_:
I met with Professor Fig in the Map Chamber and updated him on my dealings with Lodgok. The portrait of Charles Rookwood advised me that the next trial is at his former residence, Rookwood Castle. I told Professor Rookwood that his descendent, Victor Rookwood, is a Dark wizard. He was incensed and needs me to go to the castle. He says there is something beneath it that Victor Rookwood and the goblins cannot find. I’m to go there and complete the trial and view Professor Rookwood’s Pensieve memory. Then he’ll tell me more.
我在地图密室见到了菲戈教授，并且将之前与罗德高克的合作经历告诉了他。查尔斯·卢克伍德教授的画像告诉我说，下一场试炼的地点就在他以前的居所卢克伍德城堡中。我把他的后裔卢克伍德·维克托成为黑巫师的情况告诉了卢克伍德教授。教授听罢气愤不已，并表示我需要立刻前往卢克伍德城堡。卢克伍德教授说城堡之下藏着某种维克托·卢克伍德与妖精们都想要拿到手的东西。我现在需要前往卢克伍德城堡，完成试炼并见证卢克伍德教授留在冥想盆中的回忆。在那之后，他才会告诉我更多事情。
PRC_01_CONV_LighthouseSubGoal: Find the location of the second Keeper trial|找到第二个守护者试炼的位置
PRC_01_LighthouseSubGoal: Explore Charles Rookwood's castle|探索查尔斯·卢克伍德的城堡
PRC_01_RookwoodsTrial_AMHotspot_TaskObj0: Connect with ancient magic|感应古代魔法
PRC_01_RookwoodsTrial_BeginCharlesTrial_: Enter Charles Rookwood's trial|进入查尔斯·卢克伍德的试炼
PRC_01_RookwoodsTrial_DefeatPaladins_Tas: Complete Charles Rookwood's trial|完成查尔斯·卢克伍德的试炼
PRC_01_RookwoodsTrial_EnterCastle_TaskOb: Enter Rookwood Castle|进入卢克伍德城堡
PRC_01_RookwoodsTrial_ExitIceWall_TaskOb: Exit through the crystallised ice wall|通过冰晶墙离开
PRC_01_RookwoodsTrial_FindCharlesPortrai: Find Charles Rookwood's portrait|找到查尔斯·卢克伍德的画像
PRC_01_RookwoodsTrial_Journal01:
Percival Rackham and Charles Rookwood want me to complete Charles's trial as soon as possible. I need to meet Professor Fig at Rookwood Castle.
波西瓦尔·拉克汉姆与查尔斯·卢克伍德希望我尽快完成查尔斯的试炼。我需要前往卢克伍德城堡与菲戈教授会面。
PRC_01_RookwoodsTrial_Journal02:
I found Fig at Rookwood Castle. We need to find a way in without drawing attention to ourselves.
我在卢克伍德城堡外找到了菲戈。我们需要想办法在不被察觉的情况下进入城堡。
PRC_01_RookwoodsTrial_Journal03:
Professor Fig and I made our way into Rookwood Castle. We overheard Ranrok and Victor Rookwood arguing over their failed attempts to find me. I need to locate Charles Rookwood's portrait, and quickly.
我和菲戈教授成功进入了卢克伍德城堡。我们还偷听到了兰洛克与维克托之前的交流，他们大吵了一架，互相指责对方说没能抓住“我”的问题。我需要尽快找到查尔斯·卢克伍德的画像。
PRC_01_RookwoodsTrial_Journal04:
As we were searching for Charles Rookwood's portrait, Professor Fig and I happened upon a container from which the dark mist I've seen before was spilling out. The source or Ranrok's power, perhaps? Charles Rookwood is eager for me to proceed with his trial.
在搜寻查尔斯·卢克伍德的画像的过程中，我和菲戈教授无意间发现了一个奇怪的容器，而且里面正在往外散溢着我之前见到过的那种“黑雾”。也许这就是兰洛克那种不可思议的力量的来源？查尔斯·卢克伍德迫切希望我完成他的试炼。
PRC_01_RookwoodsTrial_Journal05:
I am to complete Charles Rookwood's trial on my own, as Professor Fig will be unable to accompany me.
我需要完全凭借自己的力量完成查尔斯·卢克伍德的试炼，菲戈教授将无法从旁协助。
PRC_01_RookwoodsTrial_Journal06: I must cautiously navigate and survive the dangers of Charles Rookwood's trial.|我必须小心谨慎，竭尽全力在查尔斯·卢克伍德危险的试炼中活下来。
PRC_01_RookwoodsTrial_Journal06b:
I've completed Charles Rookwood's trial. Now I must view his Pensieve memory and discover what he intended for me to know.
我已经完成了查尔斯·卢克伍德的试炼。现在我需要见证他在冥想盆中的回忆，看看他想告诉我什么。
PRC_01_RookwoodsTrial_Journal07:
I've completed Charles Rookwood's trial and viewed his memory. It seems his former student and colleague, Isidora Morganach, developed a spell that enabled her to take her father's pain. But when she performed the spell, a dark mist resulted – the same sort that may be giving Ranrok his power. I need to return to the Map Chamber to discover what's next.
我已经完成了查尔斯·卢克伍德的试炼并见证了他的回忆。在回忆中，他以前的学生与同事伊西多拉·莫佳娜创造出了一种前所未有的咒语，并且声称能够借此“带走父亲的痛苦”。但是当伊西多拉施展咒语的时候，她无意间创造出了一种“黑雾”，很有可能就是这种物质给兰洛克带来了难以想象的力量。我需要返回地图密室并了解下一步要怎么做。
PRC_01_RookwoodsTrial_Journal08:
After completing Charles Rookwood's trial, I returned to the Map Chamber and spoke with the Keepers, including a third Keeper, Niamh Fitzgerald. She wants to ensure that I will be able to reach her trial before she sends me there. It would be wise to realign with Professor Fig on all of this.
在完成查尔斯·卢克伍德的试炼后，我重新回到了地图密室，并且与两位守护者以及第三位新来的守护者尼欧弗·菲兹杰拉德进行了交谈。尼欧弗希望我先确保自己拥有抵达她的试炼所需要的能力。我最好把这些事告诉菲戈教授。
PRC_01_RookwoodsTrial_MeetAtCastle_TaskO: Meet Fig at Rookwood Castle|在卢克伍德城堡与菲戈见面
PRC_01_RookwoodsTrial_QuestTitle: Charles Rookwood's Trial|查尔斯·卢克伍德的试炼
PRC_01_RookwoodsTrial_TalkToFig_TaskObj0: Speak with Professor Fig|与菲戈教授交谈
PRC_01_RookwoodsTrial_ViewPensieve_TaskO: Continue exploring Charles Rookwood's trial|继续探索查尔斯·卢克伍德的试炼
PRC_01_RoookwoodsTrial_QuestActive_StepJ:
The castle is crawling with Victor Rookwood’s people and Ranrok's Loyalists. We’ll need to get past them to get into the castle.
这座城堡已经被维克托·卢克伍德还有兰洛克的追随者侵占了。要想进入，我们就必需设法绕开他们。

Charles Rookwood said he has a portrait in the castle. I need to locate it and find out what he wants me to do next.
查尔斯·卢克伍德提到过城堡中有一副他的画像。我需要找到那副画像，并弄清楚下一步该怎么做。

I’ve found the entrance to Charles Rookwood’s trial. Professor Fig cannot go with me. I must enter alone.
我已经找到了查尔斯·卢克伍德的试炼的入口。菲戈教授不能陪我一起进去。这是只有我一个人能经历的试炼。

These trials are growing progressively difficult. I’ll need to keep my wits about me and rely on my ability to perceive ancient magic.
我感觉每一次的试炼都愈发困难。这次我需要集中精力，依靠自己感应古代魔法的能力。

Charles Rookwood left a Pensieve memory. I need to view it and learn what he wants me to know.
查尔斯·卢克伍德在冥想盆中留下了一段回忆。我需要亲眼看见才能了解他想要告诉我什么。

I’ve completed the trial and viewed the Pensieve memory left by Professor Rookwood. I need to find the way out and return to the Map Chamber.
我已经完成试炼，并且见证了卢克伍德教授留在冥想盆中的回忆。现在我需要想办法离开这里并返回地图密室。
PRC_01_RoookwoodsTrial_QuestActive_TaskO: Enter Rookwood Castle|进入卢克伍德城堡
Find Charles Rookwood’s portrait|找到查尔斯·卢克伍德的画像
Enter Charles Rookwood's trial|进入查尔斯·卢克伍德的试炼
Complete Charles Rookwood’s trial|完成查尔斯·卢克伍德的试炼
View the Pensieve memory|查看冥想盆中的回忆
Exit Charles Rookwood's trial|退出查尔斯·卢克伍德的试炼
PRC_01_RoookwoodsTrial_QuestAvailable_Jo:
The portraits of Percival Rackham and Charles Rookwood want me to complete Charles’s trial as soon as possible. Professor Fig will meet me there. Charles Rookwood’s castle is far to the south of Hogwarts, near Feldcroft, the hamlet Sebastian is from.
波西瓦尔·拉克汉姆与查尔斯·卢克伍德的画像希望我尽快完成查尔斯的试炼。菲戈教授表示将会在那里等我。查尔斯·卢克伍德的城堡位于霍格沃茨南面极远的位置，那里接近塞巴斯蒂安出生长大的村庄费德罗特。
PRC_01_RoookwoodsTrial_QuestAvailable_St: Meet Professor Fig at Charles Rookwood’s castle.|在查尔斯·卢克伍德的城堡与菲戈教授见面。
PRC_01_RoookwoodsTrial_QuestAvailable_Ta: Travel to Rookwood Castle|前往卢克伍德城堡
PRC_01_RoookwoodsTrial_QuestComplete_Jou:
I met Professor Fig at Rookwood Castle. It was crawling with Victor Rookwood’s lot and Ranrok's Loyalists. Once Fig and I made our way inside, we discovered that the Loyalists had broken into some sort of repository and let something out. This was alarming to Charles Rookwood. Ultimately, I completed the trial and viewed Charles Rookwood's Pensieve memory. Upon returning to the Map Chamber, the Keepers introduced me to former headmistress, Niamh Fitzgerald. I am to proceed with her trial as soon as she's sure that I can reach it.
我在卢克伍德城堡外与菲戈教授见面了。那里已经被维克托·卢克伍德还有兰洛克的追随者侵占了。设法进入城堡之后，我和菲戈发现追随者妖精已经破坏了某种“秘库”，并因此释放了保存在里面的物质。这个消息让查尔斯·卢克伍德显得忧心忡忡。最终我成功通过了试炼，并见证了查尔斯·卢克伍德留在冥想盆中的回忆。返回地图密室之后，守护者们给我介绍认识了霍格沃茨以前的校长：尼欧弗·菲兹杰拉德教授。尼欧弗说等确定我拥有足够的能力之后，就会让我接受她的试炼。
PRC_CharlesRookwoodsTrial_QuestTitle: Charles Rookwood's Trial|查尔斯·卢克伍德的试炼
PRC_CONV_01_BackOnPath_GoToHaven_TaskObj: Go to the Map Chamber|前往地图密室
PRC_CONV_01_BackOnPath_Journal01:
Due to the increasing goblin threat, Charles Rookwood wants me to complete his trial as soon as possible. I need to meet Fig at Rookwood Castle.
考虑到叛乱妖精们日益严峻的威胁，查尔斯·卢克伍德希望我尽快完成他的试炼。我需要前往卢克伍德城堡与菲戈教授见面。
PRC_CONV_01_BackOnPath_QuestAvailable_Re: Talk to Professor Fig|与菲戈教授交谈
PRC_CONV_01_BackOnPath_QuestTitle: Back on the Path|回归路途
PreO_01_all: Hogwarts Legacy: Onyx Hippogriff Mount|霍格沃茨之遗：玛瑙鹰马翼兽坐骑
PreO_01_all_desc:
You may soar the Scottish skies on the back of this graceful, black Hippogriff.

New mounts are accessible in the Gear Menu after the default Hippogriff is unlocked in the main questline.
你可以在这只优雅的黑色鹰马翼兽的背上翱翔苏格兰的天空。

在主任务线中解锁默认的鹰马翼兽后，可以在装备菜单中查看新的坐骑。
PreO_02_Amzn_Vchr: Hogwarts Legacy: Astronomer's Hat|霍格沃茨之遗：天文帽
PreO_02_Amzn_Vchr_desc:
This whimsical sorcerer's hat celebrates the moon and the stars.

Cosmetics are accessible in the Gear Menu using the Change Appearance option.
这个异想天开的魔法师帽赞美着月亮和星星。

可在“装备菜单”中使用“更改外观”选项，来查看装饰品。
PreO_03_Sony: Hogwarts Legacy: Felix Felicis Potion Recipe|霍格沃茨之遗：福灵剂魔药配方
PreO_03_Sony_desc:
This recipe allows you to brew 'Liquid Luck', which will grant the drinker success in certain endeavours for one in-game day.

Felix Felicis may be brewed and consumed after the Potions Station and Tool Wheel have been unlocked in the main questline.
该配方允许你调配“幸运药水”，可使饮用者在游戏时间中的一天里，在某些行为上取得成功。

可在主任务线中的魔药台和工具轮解锁后，调配和饮用福灵剂。
PriscillaWakefield: Priscilla Wakefield|普希拉·维克菲尔德
Protego_desc:
Protects against a variety of attacks, including spell casts, weapon strikes, and more. Cast with {AM_Protego}. Waiting to cast Protego until the last moment before an impact results in a Perfect Protego that damages melee attackers and reflects projectiles back, breaking enemy shields.
这种咒语能够抵挡包括咒语以及武器打击等等攻击方式的伤害。按施放。在接触前的最后一刻施放“盔甲护身”会达成完美的“盔甲护身”，对近战攻击者造成伤害并将反弹飞行物，破坏敌人的护盾。
Protego_gameplay_desc:
Protects against a variety of attacks, including spell casts, weapon strikes, and more. Cast with {AM_Protego}. Waiting to cast Protego until the last moment before an impact results in a Perfect Protego that damages melee attackers and reflects projectiles back, breaking enemy shields.
这种咒语能够抵挡包括咒语以及武器打击等等攻击方式的伤害。按施放。在接触前的最后一刻施放“盔甲护身”会达成完美的“盔甲护身”，对近战攻击者造成伤害并将反弹飞行物，破坏敌人的护盾。
Puffskein_Byproduct_desc:
The fur is shed by the hardy Puffskeins inhabiting the area near Hogwarts. Puffskein fur can be used to upgrade and assign traits to gear.
居住在霍格沃茨附近的强健蒲绒绒褪下的毛发。蒲绒绒毛发可用于强化装备和为其分配特质。
Puffskein_Desc:
Puffskeins are round and fluffy beasts, soft enough to cuddle but tough enough to be thrown around. Puffskeins will eat almost anything, but their favourite meal is bogies. They are common household pets for wizarding families because they are easy to maintain.
蒲绒绒是一种圆滚滚又毛茸茸的野兽，它们的毛发柔软至极，但身体却很扎实，甚至可以经受得起被来回投掷的冲击力。蒲绒绒几乎从不挑食，不过它们最喜欢的还是要属人类的鼻屎球。因为照料方便，蒲绒绒也成了诸多巫师家庭的常见宠物。
PuffskeinBallToy_desc: A ball made from mucus, used to play with beasts|由粘液制成的球，用来与野兽玩耍
PuffskeinDen_desc: A den inhabited by Puffskeins|蒲绒绒居住的巢穴
PuffskeinOffspring_desc: A newly born Puffskein|一只新生的蒲绒绒
PUZZLEROOM_ARITHMANCYNOTE: Arithmancy Study Guide Page|《算术占卜学习指南》书页
PUZZLEROOM_ARITHMANCYNOTE_desc:
A page torn from an Arithmancy study guide that contains a list of numbers assigned to various magical beasts
从一本《算术占卜学习指南》中扯下的书页，上面记载着关于各种魔法野兽的一系列数字

QuaffleBallToy_desc: A Quaffle that is made as a toy for beasts|作为野兽玩具所制作的鬼飞球球

Quest_ACS_Note_HealthySpiders_desc: A note from Mary Portman regarding her spiders|玛丽·波特曼关于她蜘蛛的笔记

Quest_Bea_01_Warn: Go back to class|返回课程

A large leaf from a wild Venomous Tentacula|来自一株野生毒触手的巨大叶片
Quest_COM_03_SiggsTreasureMap_desc: A treasure map Arthur Plummly found while searching Professor Binns's office|亚瑟·普拉姆利在“调查”芮斯教授的办公室期间找到的藏宝图。
Quest_COM_04_CressJournal_desc:
Cressida's private diary of scribblings and notes about other students and professors 
奎西达的私人日记，内容是关于其他学生和教授的涂鸦与笔记
Quest_COM_04_Flyingbook_desc: A book that acts more like a bird and is checked out to Cressida Blume|喜欢像鸟儿一样飞来飞去的书，上面的借阅人名字是“奎西达·布鲁姆”
Quest_COM_05_StudentItem: Zenobia's Gobstone|詹诺比亚的高布石
Quest_COM_05_StudentItem_desc:
A small, magical ball from Zenobia's collection. It squirts a putrid liquid when a player loses a point.
詹诺比亚收藏的魔法小球之一。使用这些石头玩游戏时，失败的一方将会被喷上臭汁。
Quest_COM_07_BillywigStings_desc:
Rumoured to be an ingredient in the sweet Fizzing Whizzbees, the sting of the Billywig causes giddiness and levitation. 
传闻是甜美的滋滋蜜蜂糖中的一种原料，比利威格的刺会导致头晕和漂浮。
Quest_COM_07_Fizzingwhizbees: Fizzing Whizzbees Sample|滋滋蜜蜂糖样品
Quest_COM_07_Fizzingwhizbees_Desc: A free sample of Fizzing Whizzbees, requested by Garreth Weasley|加雷斯·韦斯莱要来的一份免费滋滋蜜蜂糖试吃样品
QUEST_COM_08_NOTE1: A Letter to Sirona from her Friend Mirabel|希罗纳的朋友米拉贝尔寄的信
QUEST_COM_08_NOTE1_desc:
A letter to Sirona written by a younger student at Hogwarts named Mirabel to whom Sirona was an inspiration while at school
寄给希罗纳的一封信，写信人是霍格沃茨中一位更为年轻的学生米拉贝尔，她在信中感谢了希罗纳在学校期间成为了激励自己的榜样
QUEST_COM_08_NOTE2: A Letter to Sirona from her Friend Sean|希罗纳的朋友肖恩寄的信
QUEST_COM_08_NOTE2_desc:
A letter to Sirona from a fellow Ravenclaw named Sean thanking her for her support during Quidditch practice
一位名叫肖恩的拉文克劳学生寄给希罗纳的信，她在信里面感谢了希罗纳在魁地奇练习赛期间对自己的支持
QUEST_COM_08_NOTE3: A Letter to Sirona from her Friend Philomena|希罗纳的朋友菲洛米娜寄的信
QUEST_COM_08_NOTE3_desc:
A letter to Sirona from a Slytherin named Philomena thanking her for her hospitality during a break from school
一位名叫菲洛米娜的斯莱特林学生寄给希罗纳的信，菲洛米娜在信中感谢了希罗纳在学校放假期间对自己的热情款待
QUEST_COM_08_NOTE4: A Letter to Sirona from her Friend Bess|希罗纳的朋友贝丝寄的信
QUEST_COM_08_NOTE4_desc: A letter to Sirona from her friend Bess wishing her a happy birthday|希罗纳的朋友贝丝祝她生日快乐的贺信。
QUEST_COM_08_NOTE5: A Letter from Sirona to Mrs Sprottle|希罗纳寄给史波拉特夫人的信
QUEST_COM_08_NOTE5_desc:
A letter from Sirona to Mrs Sprottle thanking her for taking Sirona shopping for a new dress and hat and, interestingly, predicting that she would own a place like the Three Broomsticks one day
希罗纳寄给史波拉特夫人的信，希罗纳在信中感谢了史波拉特夫人带自己一起去购置衣物，除此以外，希罗纳仿佛有先见之明一般在信中表示自己终有一天会开一家类似三把扫帚的酒馆
QUEST_COM_08_SIRONABOX: Sirona Ryan’s Box of Letters|希罗纳·瑞安的信件盒
QUEST_COM_08_SIRONABOX_desc:
A box of letters belonging to Sirona Ryan that Mr and Mrs Sprottle had been keeping for her
属于希罗纳·瑞安的一盒信件，之前多年来一直是史波拉特夫妇在代为保管

QUEST_COM_10_01_Bardolph01Journal_desc:
A diary entry by Bardolph Beaumont. There appears to be more than one. I should keep an eye out for more.
巴多尔芬·比约蒙特写下的日记。似乎总共不止一页。我应该留意其他的部分。

Alexandra Ricketts's personal journal, in which she keeps notes on her progress to domesticate her troll
亚利桑德拉·里基茨的私人日志，里面记载着她在“驯养”巨怪期间的进展

亚利桑德拉·里基茨在试图驯养巨怪期间尝试过的一系列方法

QUEST_COM_22_VENOMOUSTENTACULA_Desc:
Mr Lawley's Venomous Tentacula. It was part of a business deal with Mr Barnes that went sour.
洛莱先生的毒触手。原本是他与巴恩斯先生的失败交易的一部分。

A magical plant that resembles (and writhes around like) a giant slug – and which produces a thick goo, useful in potions
一种魔法植物，外型（以及蠕动方式）类似巨大的蛞蝓，且会产生浓稠的粘液，在魔药中相当实用
quest_com_31_bubotubers_desc: A magical plant that resembles a giant slug – and writhes around like one too|这种魔法植物外形酷似一只巨大的鼻涕虫，而且也会像真的虫子一样扭动不停。

QUEST_COM_36_HEIRLOOM_DESC:
An heirloom of the Haggarty family, Agatha Haggarty's necklace is hundreds of years old and probably quite valuable. 
作为海格尔提家族的传家宝，雅加莎·海格尔提的项链已有数百年历史，可能非常有价值。

A sticky-fingered Niffler that's been burglarising the hamlet of Irondale at night
一只爱偷东西的嗅嗅，会在晚上在艾恩代尔的小村庄偷窃

This Niffler is the infamous thief of Irondale, a nighttime bandit who had been making off with valuables in the hamlet.
这只嗅嗅就是臭名昭著的“艾恩代尔大盗”，每到夜幕降临，它便会肆虐村庄，偷窃财物。
Quest_COM_37_RecipeBook_desc:
A book of potion recipes clearly written by somebody who knows their way around a cauldron
一本记载着大量魔药配方的册子，很明显作者是一位调配炼制方面的专家
Quest_COM_38_SwampMap_desc: A map containing a musical mystery|蕴藏着一个音乐谜团的地图
Quest_COM_39_Treasure_desc: A precious amulet probably worth a lot of gold. I wonder who it belongs to?|看上去十分值钱的华丽项链。不知道是谁的东西？

Quest_DAR_Package_desc: An important package addressed to Briar Banks|寄给布莱尔·班克斯的重要包裹

Quest_EVC_01_Clue1_desc:
A mysterious rune diagram was left on the triptych. I've seen similar rune symbols before from the Keepers' trials, but not like this. It may be an important clue. I shall keep it handy.
在三联画上找到的神秘符文图标。记得之前在守护者的试炼中看见过类似的符文，但细节存在差别。也许是一条重要线索。我还是先好好保管起来。

伊西多拉·莫佳娜留下的一份日志。似乎总共不止一页。我应该留意其他的部分。

Quest_EVC_01_IsidoraJournal2_desc:

Salazar Slytherin's personal book of spells and magic written by his own hand, dating back to the 10th century. Stored within Slytherin's hidden scriptorium inside Hogwarts, the secrets it contains are intriguing, dark and potentially insidious.
萨拉查·斯莱特林的魔法书，里面全是他亲笔写下的咒语与研究，内容能够追溯至十世纪。之前这本书就一直沉睡在斯莱特林在霍格沃茨内部的秘密书房里面，上面记载着无数黑暗的秘密，如果落入错误之人手中后果不堪设想。

许多年前的某位学生无意间落下的笔记。后来被我在费德罗特地下墓穴的祭坛附近找到了。

Quest_TV03_Frantic1_desc:
A note left behind by a Gringotts curse-breaker soon after discovering that she was betrayed by her partner. It is addressed to Head curse-breaker at Gringotts, Grilco Wuthering, as a means to explain the betrayal and what would otherwise be seen as a mysterious death. 
一位古灵阁解咒师在发现自己受到了搭档的背叛之后留下来的第一张字条。收件人写的是古灵阁首席解咒师格里古·沃瑟宁的名字，字条的主人不想要就那么不明不白地枉死，因此想要通过这种方式记录下自己被背叛的经过。

Revelio_desc:
Highlights a variety of useful and interactive targets in the world, including hidden objects, puzzle items, loot, enemies, and more. Cast with {RevelioButton}.
高亮显示周遭环境中的有用目标或可互动物体，这其中包括了隐藏物体、谜题道具、战利品以及目标等等。按施放。

Rococo_Desc:
Agnes Coffey's pet Niffler. True to his species, he loves treasure and shiny objects.
艾格尼丝·科菲的宠物嗅嗅。不负嗅嗅之名，对一切金银珠宝与闪亮物件有着狂热爱好。
RottenFood_desc: A plate of rotten roast beef|一盘烂烤牛肉
RPG_ADDINVENTORY: Increased storage for gear|额外装备储存空间
RPG_BONUSANCIENTMAGICBARS: Additional capacity added to your Ancient Magic Meter|扩充古代魔法能量槽
SacharissaTugwood: Sacharissa Tugwood|萨查莉莎·塔格伍德
SanBakarsMemories: San Bakar's memories|森·巴卡尔的回忆
Sanc_3SeaterSofa_01_Dwiz_desc: A dark sofa for reclining amidst your accumulated artefacts |一张深色沙发，可斜倚在你堆积的制品中
Sanc_3SeaterSofa_01_Hbgst_desc: A botanical sofa for relaxing with a book amongst your plants |植被式沙发，让你在植物间轻松阅读
Sanc_3SeaterSofa_01_Mzoo_desc:
A wooden framed sofa that looks like it was acquired from the far reaches of the globe
木框沙发，看起来像是离地球遥远之处所获得
Sanc_3SeaterSofa_01_Potnr_desc: A blue leather tufted sofa to add a spark of inspiration to your space |蓝色皮革簇绒沙发为你的空间增添灵感
Sanc_Alcove_01_desc: Different styles of alcoves|样式各异的壁龛
Sanc_Alcove_02_desc: Different styles of wall alcoves|不用风格的墙体凹室
Sanc_Alcove_02_Dwiz: Gothic Wall Alcove|哥特式墙体凹室
Sanc_Alcove_02_Hbgst: Botanical Wall Alcove|植被式墙体凹室
Sanc_Alcove_02_Mzoo: Eclectic Wall Alcove|多元式墙体凹室
Sanc_Alcove_02_Potnr: Scientific Wall Alcove|科技式墙体凹室
Sanc_AmbientPainting_01: Niffler and Witch Portrait|嗅嗅与女巫肖像
Sanc_AmbientPainting_01_desc: A vibrant painting depicting a witch and her beloved pet Niffler |一幅充满活力的画，描绘了女巫和她心爱的宠物嗅嗅
Sanc_AmbientPainting_02: Gazing Wizard Portrait|凝视巫师肖像
Sanc_AmbientPainting_02_desc: A mysterious painting depicting a young wizard gazing into a ball |一幅神秘的画，描绘了年轻的巫师凝视着一颗球
Sanc_AmbientPainting_03: Dapper Wizard Portrait|时髦巫师肖像
Sanc_AmbientPainting_03_desc:
A fine painting depicting a wizard in a top hat who looks terribly pleased with himself 
一幅精美的画，描绘了戴着礼帽的巫师，看起来对自己非常满意
Sanc_AmbientPainting_04: Bickering Couple Portrait|争吵的伴侣肖像
Sanc_AmbientPainting_04_desc: A painting depicting a witch who seems rather irritated with a wizard|一幅模棱两可的画，描绘了对一名巫师不满的女巫
Sanc_AmbientPainting_05: Nurse and Baby Portrait|护士与宝宝肖像
Sanc_AmbientPainting_05_desc: A painting of a nurse leaning over a cradle |一幅画，描绘靠在摇篮上的护士
Sanc_AmbientPainting_06: House-elves and Mistress Portrait|家养小精灵与女主人肖像
Sanc_AmbientPainting_06_desc: A bright painting depicting a witch with her two house-elves |一幅明亮的画，描绘了女巫和她的两名家养小精灵
Sanc_AmbientPainting_07: Gazing Witch Portrait|凝视女巫肖像
Sanc_AmbientPainting_07_desc: A portrait of a contemplative witch, gazing into the distance |凝视着远方沉思的女巫的肖像
Sanc_AmbientPainting_08: Lovers Across the Garden Wall Portrait|《跨越篱墙的爱人们》画像
Sanc_AmbientPainting_08_desc: A portrait of two lovers meeting over a garden wall|在一段院墙之上相会的爱人们的画像
Sanc_AmbientPainting_09: Wigged Wizard Portrait|戴假发的巫师肖像
Sanc_AmbientPainting_09_desc: A portrait of a finely dressed wizard in a wig |一幅画，描绘了带着假发且衣冠楚楚的男性
Sanc_AmbientPainting_10: Wizard in Profile Portrait|侧面巫师肖像
Sanc_AmbientPainting_10_desc: A noble painting depicting a contemplative wigged wizard |一幅高贵的画，描绘了带着假发且若有所思的巫师
Sanc_AmbientPainting_11_desc: A portrait of a wizard holding a jar of lionfish spines|手持一罐狮子鱼脊的巫师的画像
Sanc_AmbientPainting_12_desc: A stark painting depicting an austere old witch |一幅严肃的画，描绘了简朴的老女巫
Sanc_AmbientPainting_13: Family of Four Young Witches Portrait|一家四口年轻女巫肖像
Sanc_AmbientPainting_13_desc: A portrait of four young witches at home|四位居家的年轻女巫的画像
Sanc_AmbientPainting_14: Tudor Wizard Portrait|都铎巫师肖像
Sanc_AmbientPainting_14_desc: A regal painting depicting a wizard in Tudor attire |一幅王室画作，描绘身穿都铎王朝装饰的巫师
Sanc_AmbientPainting_LS_01: Mischievous Young Witch Portrait|《调皮小女巫》画像
Sanc_AmbientPainting_LS_01_desc: A painting of a young witch reclining on a chaise lounge|斜靠在躺椅上的年轻女巫的画像
Sanc_AmbientPainting_LS_02: Wizard Couple Portrait|巫师伴侣肖像
Sanc_AmbientPainting_LS_02_desc: A warm painting depicting a couple relaxing at a table |一幅温暖的画，描绘了一对夫妇在桌边放松
Sanc_AnimPaintingLandscape_desc: Portraits of wizarding life|魔法世界居民的画像
Sanc_AnimPaintingPortrait_A_desc: New arrivals to Hogwarts will often find that the paintings are quite lively|初来乍到霍格沃茨之人往往会对“栩栩如生”的绘画们感到诧异。
Sanc_AnimPaintingPortrait_B_desc: An enchanted portrait with a mind of its own|拥有自我思想的魔法肖像
Sanc_AreaFullyExpanded_desc: This area has been fully expanded|该区域已被完全扩张
Sanc_Armchair_desc: A pleasant and cosy chair that comes in different styles|一把舒适惬意的椅子，有不同的风格
Sanc_ArmilarySphere_01_desc: An impressively-sized model of the celestial globe |描绘天体运动轨迹的壮观模型
Sanc_ArmilarySphere_02_desc: A model of the celestial globe |浑天仪模型
Sanc_ArmilarySphere_Desc: Models of the celestial globe |浑天仪模型
SANC_BIOMELANDSCAPE_WALL: Vivarium Landscape Paintings|饲养所景观画
Sanc_BiomeLandscape_Wall_01_desc: A painting of a peaceful, sunlit forest landscape |描绘明媚阳光下的静谧森林的画作
Sanc_BiomeLandscape_Wall_02_desc: A painting of a vibrant, coastal landscape |描绘生机盎然的海岸线的画作
Sanc_BiomeLandscape_Wall_03_desc: A painting of a mysterious swamp landscape |描绘神秘沼泽地形的画作
Sanc_BiomeLandscape_Wall_04_desc: A painting of a wizard standing in a mountain landscape |描绘巫师立于山中的画作
Sanc_BiomeLandscape_Wall_Desc: Landscape paintings inspired by the natural beauty of your vivarium|以饲养所中的自然美景为灵感的景观画
Sanc_Bookcase_01_Dwiz_desc: A dark bookcase for all your sinister and forbidden tomes |一个黑暗的书柜，放着所有的险恶和禁书
Sanc_Bookcase_01_Hbgst_desc: A botanical bookcase for all your favourite Herbology books and almanacs|植被式书柜，可存放你最喜爱的草药学书籍和年历
Sanc_Bookcase_01_Mzoo_desc:
A worldly bookcase for filling with all the books and scrolls from travels around the world 
一个世俗的书柜，可以装满来自世界各地的所有书籍和卷轴
Sanc_Bookcase_01_Potnr_desc:
An academic bookcase for all your ledgers, equations, charts, and encyclopaedias

Settings_AlwaysUseCameraAiming_desc:
ON (default) – selects active targets with the camera

OFF – selects active targets with the movement thumbstick (grants offscreen enemy targeting)
开启（默认）- 通过镜头选择作用中目标

关闭 - 使用移动摇杆选择作用中目标（提供屏幕外敌人瞄准）
Settings_AlwaysUseCameraAiming_desc|PS4:
ON (default) – selects active targets with the camera

OFF – selects active targets with the movement stick (grants offscreen enemy targeting)
开启（默认）- 通过镜头选择作用中目标

关闭 - 使用移动操作杆选择作用中目标（提供屏幕外敌人瞄准）
Settings_AlwaysUseCameraAiming_desc|PS5:
ON (default) – selects active targets with the camera

Shrivelfig_Byproduct_desc:
This sturdy bulb is a key ingredient for Thunderbrew. Shrivelfig seeds can be purchased from The Magic Neep and must be grown in medium or large pots.
这种肉质的鳞茎是调配雷酿的关键原料。可以在神奇萝卜购买无花果种子。只能在中型或大型花盆中种植。
Shrivelfig_Desc:
A hardy plant that produces bulbs used in Thunderbrew. Shrivelfig seeds can be purchased from The Magic Neep. Must be grown in medium or large pots.
这种生存能力强的植物产出的鳞茎能够用于制作雷酿。可以在神奇萝卜购买无花果种子。只能在中型或大型花盆中种植。
Shrivelfig_Seed_Desc: Unlocks the ability to grow Shrivelfig in medium pots|解锁使用中型花盆种植无花果的能力
SilvanusSelwyn: Silvanus Selwyn|斯尔瓦努斯·塞尔温
SilvanusSelwyn_desc:
Born to a life of privilege but not born early enough to inherit it, Silvanus Selwyn was known for his expensive and extravagant lifestyle. It was said that he would do anything to destroy the good reputation of his distinguished family. Silvanus was the one who opened doors to influential people for Rookwood.
斯尔瓦努斯·塞尔温出生优渥，年纪轻轻便以自己奢靡铺张的生活方式而出名。据说他仇恨着自己名门正派的背景，因此想要不惜一切代价毁坏家族的好名声。最初便是斯尔瓦努斯帮助卢克伍德将自己的影响力伸向了上层阶级。
SirGarethSeaford: Sir Gareth Seaford|加雷斯·西福德爵士
SirGregorMcQueen: Sir Gregor McQueen|格雷戈·麦昆爵士
SirNestorAmset: Sir Nestor Amset|奈斯托·埃穆赛特爵士
SirPatrickDelaneyPodmore: Sir Patrick Delaney-Podmore|帕特里克·德波魔先生
SirWensleyDollamott: Sir Wensley Dollamott|温斯莱·朵拉摩特爵士

Successful Protego blocks will contribute to the Ancient Magic Meter. Perfect Protego blocks contribute even more. 
成功使用盔甲护身格挡将填充古代魔法能量槽。完美的盔甲护身格挡将能够进一步填充能量槽。
Skill_FocusGain_requirements: Must be able to cast Protego to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：学习使用盔甲护身
Slytherin_desc: Slytherin house, known for cunning, ambition and a hunger for power|以精明、野心与渴望力量而出名的斯莱特林学院
SNC_01_01_RoomOfRequirement_ConjurePotti: Conjure a Potting Table|变幻一张园艺工作台
SNC_01_01_RoomofRequirement_ExploreROR_T: Explore the Room of Requirement|探索有求必应屋
SNC_01_01_RoomOfRequirement_FollowWeasle: Follow Professor Weasley|跟随韦斯莱教授
Follow Professor Weasley|跟随韦斯莱教授
SNC_01_01_RoomOfRequirement_QuestActive_:
I’ve discovered what Professor Weasley calls the Room of Requirement. I should stay close so as not to get lost in this endless space.
我发现了被韦斯莱教授称为“有求必应屋”的神奇空间。这里看上去无边无际，我得小心不要走丢。

Professor Weasley taught me the Evanesco spell. She wants me to use it to vanish the obstacle in our way.
韦斯莱教授教会了我一种新的咒语：消失不见。她想要我用这种咒语来清除阻挡在前面的障碍物。

Professor Weasley wants to move on. I should keep following her through this maze of oddities.
韦斯莱教授认为我们应该继续前进。我得跟紧教授，要是在这个不可思议的迷宫里迷路就糟了。

Professor Weasley has become distracted by some old memorabilia she found. She wants me to explore ahead and search for Deek the house-elf.
韦斯莱教授似乎是找到了她在过去留在有求必应物的某种纪念品。她希望我先继续前进，还要我记得留意一位叫做“迪科”的家养小精灵。

Professor Weasley wants me to use the Desk of Description to identify any hidden magical properties of the clothing I’m carrying.
韦斯莱教授希望我利用“辨识之桌”分析我带来的衣服中是否蕴含着隐藏的魔法。
I should speak to Professor Weasley and see what she wants me to do next.|我需要跟韦斯莱教授谈一谈，了解接下来的打算。

I’ve learned the Conjuring spell from Professor Weasley, now she wants me to use it to conjure my own Potting Table and Potions Station. Fortunately, I already picked up the spellcrafts needed during my first trip to Hogsmeade.
我已经从韦斯莱教授那里学会了变幻咒语，现在她希望我在有求必应屋中变幻自己的园艺工作台与魔药台。好在之前初次到访霍格莫德的时候，我就已经拿到了需要的幻术配方。
Follow Professor Weasley|跟随韦斯莱教授
Use the Desk of Description|使用辨识之桌
Speak to Professor Weasley|与韦斯莱教授交谈
Conjure a Potions Station|变幻一张魔药台
SNC_01_01_RoomOfRequirement_QuestComplet:
I met with Professor Weasley in the seventh-floor corridor and discovered the Room of Requirement. The Room of Requirement provided me with a private space where I can advance my studies. Professor Weasley taught me Evanesco, the Vanishing Spell, as well as how to conjure items. I conjured my own Potting Table and Potions Station using the spellcrafts I picked up in Hogsmeade. Professor Weasley says she has another spell to teach me when I’m ready. I’m excited to see what more this room must offer. Next time I’m in Hogsmeade, I should shop for more spellcrafts.
在七楼走廊，韦斯莱教授带我发现了有求必应屋。有求必应屋提供了一个让我可以安心学习的私密空间。韦斯莱教授教会了我消失咒语“消失不见”，以及如何变幻物件的方法。利用之前在霍格莫德拿到的幻术配方，我成功在有求必应屋中变幻出了自己的园艺工作台与魔药台。韦斯莱教授说等我准备好之后，她会教我一种新的咒语。我已经迫不及待想要进一步了解这个神奇房间的全部面貌了。等下次经过霍格莫德的时候，我应该购置更多的幻术配方。
SNC_01_01_RoomOfRequirement_VanishObject: Cast Evanesco on the obstacle|对障碍物施放消失不见
SNC_01_02_RoomOfRequirement_LineComplete:
Professor Weasley and a house-elf named Deek introduced me to the Room of Requirement and helped me make it my own. I can now use it as I see fit.
韦斯莱教授与一位名叫“迪科”的家养小精灵带我认识并布置了有求必应屋。现在这里已经是供我自由发挥的空间了。
SNC_01_LighthouseSubGoal: Meet Professor Weasley in the seventh floor corridor|在七楼走廊与韦斯莱教授见面
SNC_01_RoomOfRequirement_Journal: Meet with Professor Weasley.|与韦斯莱教授见面。
SNC_01_RoomOfRequirement_MissionAvailabl: Meet with Professor Weasley|与韦斯莱教授见面
SNC_01_RoomOfRequirement_QuestAvailable_:
Professor Weasley has requested I meet her in the seventh-floor corridor of the Astronomy Tower. This is an odd location for a meeting. I wonder what she wants. 
韦斯莱教授希望我去天文塔的七楼走廊和她见一面。不知道教授为什么会选择那种偏僻的位置。也许是什么特别的事情吧。
Professor Weasley wishes to meet in the seventh-floor corridor.|韦斯莱教授希望我去七楼走廊找她。
SNC_01_TheRoomofRequirement_QuestTitle: The Room of Requirement|有求必应屋
SNC_02_01_BaggingBeasts_SpeakToDeek_Task: Let Deek know you are ready to leave|让迪科知道你已经准备好离开了

I need to talk to Deek about heading out to search for magical beasts to rescue with the nab-sack.
我需要去和迪科谈谈去外面使用拿袋解救魔法野兽的事。
SNC_02_CollectingBeasts_QuestActive_Jour: Deek wants to teach me how to use the nab-sack to rescue magical beasts.|迪科想要教我利用拿袋解救魔法野兽的方法。
SNC_02_CollectingBeasts_QuestActive_Step:
I need to talk to Deek about heading out to search for magical beasts to rescue with the nab-sack.
我需要去和迪科谈谈去外面使用拿袋解救魔法野兽的事。

I need to follow Deek to where he wants me to use the nab-sack. I'm looking forward to seeing how it works.
我需要跟随迪科，他想要教我使用拿袋。我很期待看看它是如何工作的。

Deek wants me to use the nab-sack to rescue a Puffskein. I just need to get close enough to use it before the beast runs off.
迪科想要我使用拿袋解救一只蒲绒绒。趁着野兽还没逃走，我得设法靠近它并使用拿袋。

Now that I’ve rescued a Puffskein, I should talk to Deek and see what he wants me to do next.
现在我已经成功解救了一只蒲绒绒，是时候该去跟迪科聊聊下一步的安排了。

Deek is scouting ahead for the location of a Jobberknoll habitat. He wants me to meet him at a large tree near the edge of a cliff to the West.
迪科已经提前出发去寻找绝音鸟的栖息地。他希望我能去西面的一处悬崖，他就在峭壁附近的一棵大树那里等着我。

Deek wants me to use the nab-sack to rescue a Jobberknoll. I may need to cast Levioso on it to keep it from flying away before I can collect it.
迪科想要我使用拿袋解救一只绝音鸟。为了避免它飞走，我也许需要先使用“啦唯啊萨”。

I’ve rescued a Jobberknoll as Deek asked. I should return to him and see what’s next.
我已经按照迪科的要求解救了一只绝音鸟。现在我需要回去找他，看看下一步计划是什么。

Deek told me of a large tree with a spiral pattern in front of it where I can rescue a Mooncalf.
迪科跟我说有一棵大树的前方刻着螺旋图案，我可以在那里解救月痴兽。

I need to rescue a Mooncalf with the nab-sack, but these beasts will only come out at night. Perhaps I should wait until then.
我需要使用拿袋解救一头月痴兽，但是这些野兽只会在夜间出没。或许我应该等到那时候。

I should speak to Deek and let him know that I’ve successfully rescued a Mooncalf with the nab-sack.
我已经成功使用拿袋解救了一头月痴兽，现在我得把这个消息带给迪科。

Deek wants me to bring the nab-sack and the rescued beasts back to the Room of Requirement.
迪科希望我将拿袋，还有已经解救的野兽带回有求必应屋。

I should investigate the new area created by the Room of Requirement. I’m excited to see what the room has provided.
我应该调查一下有求必应屋制造出来的新区域。我好期待看看屋子为我准备了什么。

The Room of Requirement has provided a vivarium where I can care for my rescued beasts and keep them safe from poachers.
“有求必应屋”为我提供了一处饲养所，我可以在其中照料解救回来的野兽，不用再担心它们被盗猎者伤害了。

According to Deek, if I brush and feed the beasts I’ve rescued, they will provide magical materials that have a variety of uses. I need to collect a Jobberknoll feather, hair from a Puffskein, and some Mooncalf fur.
迪科告诉我说，只要我定期打理与喂食解救的野兽，它们就会提供用处多多的魔法材料。我需要收集一份绝音鸟的羽毛、蒲绒绒的毛发以及一些月痴兽的毛皮。

I’ve collected the magical materials. I should talk to Deek and learn how to use them.
我已经收集到了魔法材料。现在我需要回去找迪科，并了解这些材料的用途。

Deek provided me with a spellcraft to conjure an Enchanted Loom. He says I can use the Loom to weave the magical materials into my clothing. I should return to the Room of Requirement and conjure one.
迪科为我提供了变幻魔法织布机所需要的幻术配方。按照迪科的说法，今后我将可以利用织布机将魔法材料缝入服饰中。我需要返回有求必应屋并变幻一台织布机。
I need to conjure an Enchanted Loom from the spellcraft that Deek provided.|我需要使用迪科提供的幻术配方变幻一台魔法织布机。

I need to acquire a Superior item of clothing so I can upgrade it using the Enchanted Loom.
我需要获取一份优越品质的服饰，并利用魔法织布机对其升级。
I should try using the Enchanted Loom to add magical properties to my clothing.|我需要尝试使用魔法织布机为自己的服饰添加魔法的力量。

Upgrading my clothes with the Enchanted Loom went smoothly. Now I need to try upgrading my clothes to make them more useful.
我已经成功利用魔法织布机升级了我的服饰。现在我需要再接再厉，进一步提升它们的力量。

Upgrading my clothes with the Enchanted Loom went smoothly. I should let Deek know of my success.
我已经成功利用魔法织布机升级了我的服饰。我得把这个好消息带给迪科。

SNC_02_CollectingBeasts_QuestAvailable_J:
Professor Weasley sent an owl telling me she has asked Deek to assist me with my Beasts class studies. I should find him in the Room of Requirement when I can.
韦斯莱教授给我寄了封猫头鹰信，她已经请求迪科来辅导我野兽学课程。等有机会我应该去有求必应屋找迪科。
SNC_02_CollectingBeasts_QuestAvailable_S: Meet Deek in the Room of Requirement.|在有求必应屋与迪科见面。
SNC_02_CollectingBeasts_QuestAvailable_T: Check in with Deek|找到迪科
Let Deek know when you are ready to leave|准备好离开时就去找迪科
SNC_02_CollectingBeasts_QuestComplete_Jo:
In the Room of Requirement, Deek showed me the nab-sack, which I can use to transport magical beasts. We then went to the Highlands and rescued a Puffskein, a Jobberknoll, and a Mooncalf. It was dangerous, as poachers were active in the area. When I returned to the Room, it provided me with a vivarium where I can keep my rescued beasts. I also learned that beasts provide magical materials when properly cared for. After that, Deek gave me a spellcraft for an Enchanted Loom which I can use to enhance my clothing with magical materials. He said many other beasts will provide even rarer materials. I’m glad to have somewhere I can bring beasts to keep them safe from poachers.
在有求必应屋，迪科给我介绍了拿袋，我可以利用这种工具来运输魔法野兽。之后我们去高地分别解救了一只蒲绒绒、一只绝音鸟外加一头月痴兽。因为周围有盗猎者出没，过程还是很危险的。返回有求必应屋之后，房间为我开辟出了一处全新的饲养所，以后我可以在其中照顾被解救的野兽。除此以外，我还了解到获得良好照顾的野兽们能够给我提供魔法材料。之后迪科给了我一份魔法织布机的幻术配方，织布机可以利用野兽们提供的材料来强化我的服饰。迪科还告诉我说解救其他各式各样的野兽，就可以获得更加稀有的材料。很高兴我能为这些野兽们提供安全的居所，以后它们再也不用担心会受到盗猎者的伤害了。
SNC_02_MissionFail_DontLeave: Don't leave Deek behind|不要抛下迪科
SNC_02_MissionFail_LeftDeek: You left Deek behind|你抛下了迪科
SNC_02_TheElftheNabSackandtheLoom_QuestT: The Elf, the Nab-Sack, and the Loom|小精灵、拿袋与织布机
SNC_03b_AHouseElfStory_QuestActive_Journ:
Deek told me about his friend, a house-elf named Tobbs, who is forced by his master to work in a spider-infested cave collecting Leech Juice. He’s concerned about his friend’s general welfare and wants me to check on him. This will give me a chance to put the Loom’s enchantments to the test.
迪科和我说了自己的朋友托布斯的事情，那位家养小精灵被自己的主人逼迫着进入了一处蜘蛛滋生的洞穴去收集蚂蟥汁。迪科担心朋友的安全，希望我去那里检查托布斯的情况。与此同时，我也可以借着这次的机会测试一下织布机提供的附魔是否有效。
SNC_03b_AHouseElfStory_QuestActive_StepJ:
Deek marked the location of the cave where Tobbs can be found on my map. I should head in that direction.
迪科已经在我的地图上标记了洞穴的位置，托布斯就在里面。现在我需要动身去那里。

What a wretched place to work. I feel sorry for Deek’s friend. I should search the cavern and find him.
这个地方的工作环境太恶劣了。迪科的朋友真的很不幸。我应该进入洞穴深处寻找托布斯。

It looks like poor Tobbs didn’t make it. But he did leave a note behind. I should read what it says.
可怜的托布斯已经惨遭不幸。但他留下了一张字条。我应该看看上面写了些什么。
I should return to the Room of Requirement and speak to Deek.|我需要回有求必应屋找迪科。

I need to break the news to Deek and tell him of the fate of his friend Tobbs. As much as it will pain him, he needs to know the truth.
我需要把托布斯的不幸遭遇告诉迪科。无论这是多么痛苦的一件事，迪科都应该知道真相。
SNC_03b_AHouseElfStory_QuestActive_TaskO: Return to the Room of Requirement|返回有求必应屋
Tell Deek about his friend|将托布斯的遭遇告诉迪科
SNC_03b_AHouseElfStory_QuestAvailable_Jo:
Deek wants to speak to me in the Room of Requirement. I should see what he wants.
迪科想要在有求必应屋里面找我谈谈，我应该看看他有什么事。
SNC_03b_AHouseElfStory_QuestAvailable_St: Deek wants to speak to me in the Room of Requirement.|迪科想要在有求必应屋里面找我谈谈。
SNC_03b_AHouseElfStory_QuestComplete_Jou:
I went to the Spider Cave in search of Deek's friend Tobbs. While I did manage to find Tobbs, it was unfortunately too late and he had perished from a swarm of spiders. It's painful to realise just how horribly this house-elf was treated by his master.
为了寻找迪科的朋友托布斯，我进入了蜘蛛洞穴。最后虽然我找到了托布斯，但为时已晚，他已经成为了一群蜘蛛的牺牲品。难以想象这位不幸的家养小精灵生前遭遇过自己主人多少虐待。
SNC_03b_AHouseElfStory_Title: The Plight of the House-Elf|家养小精灵的困境
SNC_03b_TheTragedyoftheHouseElf_QuestTit: The Plight of the House-Elf|家养小精灵的困境

SNC_04_02_SafeandSound_Journal:
Poppy is concerned that the spot she has chosen for Highwing isn't secure. We need to take her to the Room of Requirement.
帕比担心她为疾翼挑选的栖息地并不安全。我们需要将疾翼带回有求必应屋。
SNC_04_03_ClearSkies_Journal: Poppy suggested I give Highwing a chance to fly and ride him back to school.|帕比建议我骑乘疾翼返回学校。
SNC_04_03_TakeBacktoSanc_task1: Fly Back to Hogwarts|飞回霍格沃茨
SNC_04_04_ASuitableHome_Journal: I need to release Highwing into a vivarium. He'll be safe from poachers.|我需要将疾翼放入饲养所，这样她就不用再担心受到盗猎者的威胁了。
SNC_04_04_ASuitableHome_ReleaseHighwing_: Release Highwing into a vivarium|将疾翼放入饲养所
SNC_04_FriendsInHighplaces_Journal: Poppy sent me an owl asking to speak with me.|我收到了帕比的猫头鹰信，她想要跟我谈谈。
SNC_04_FriendsInHighplaces_Title: Friends in High Places|来自天空的问候
SNC_04_MissionComplete: Highwing has a new home and will be safe|疾翼今后将能够在新家中无忧无虑地生活
SNC_04_Stepcomplete_Journal:
I have spoken to Poppy and she has asked me to meet her outside the castle. She’s worried about Highwing.
我和帕比谈过，她希望我去城堡外面与她会合。她担心疾翼有危险。
SNC_05_MissionFail_LeftBossArea: You left the quest area|你离开了任务区域
SNC_05_MissionWarning_LeftBossArea: You are leaving the quest area|你正在离开任务区域
SNC_05_PhoenixRising_QuestActive_Journal:
According to Deek, a phoenix is nesting somewhere in the mountains southeast of Hogwarts. I wonder if it’s the same Phoenix that Natty spoke of, the one Rookwood is hunting. Deek thinks the poachers have heard the same rumour, and the phoenix is in danger. He’s asked me to rescue it and bring it back to the Room of Requirement where it will be safe.
迪科告诉我说，霍格沃茨东南面的山脉中可能存在一处凤凰的巢穴。记得娜娜之前也跟我说过卢克伍德的手下们正在搜捕凤凰，也许就是迪科说的那一只。迪科认为盗猎者有可能已经收到了风声，这意味着那只凤凰有危险。迪科想要拜托我去解救凤凰，并将它带回有求必应屋保护。
SNC_05_PhoenixRising_QuestActive_StepJou: I wonder what Deek wants to talk with me about. I need to speak with him. |不知道迪科找我有什么事。我得去和他谈一谈。

Deek believes the phoenix is nesting in the mountains far to the southeast of Hogwarts.
迪科认为凤凰的巢穴就在霍格沃茨东南面极远山脉地带。

This appears to be the location that Deek heard about – perhaps the phoenix is inside. I should enter the cave and take a look.
这里似乎就是迪科之前听说的地方，也许凤凰就在里面。我需要去调查洞穴内部的情况。

Someone erected a barricade just inside the cave. I bet it was the poachers – they must have gotten here first. I need to stop them from finding the phoenix before I do.
有人在洞穴里面搭设了一道屏障。我敢打赌肯定是盗猎者干的好事，他们一定是提前到了这里。必须阻止他们比我先找到凤凰。

The poachers are everywhere! I need to get rid of them if I want to rescue this phoenix. 
这个地方到处是盗猎者！只有先解决他们，我才能够解救凤凰。

I know the key to this door must be around here somewhere. Let me see if I can find it. 
开启这扇门的钥匙肯定就在附近。我得仔细搜索一番。
Time to continue upward; I need to reach the peak of the mountain. |我得继续向上推进，山顶才是我的目的地。

These poachers have no business being here. I need to show them I mean business and get them to leave this mountain for good. 
绝不能让这些盗猎者的阴谋得逞。我需要让他们见识一下我的厉害，让这些恶棍永远不敢再来山间作乱。

I never imagined I would encounter a phoenix – what a truly magnificent creature. I need to rescue it with the nab-sack before more poachers show up. I just hope the bird realises I’m here to help.
从来没想过我有一天竟然能亲眼见证凤凰的宏伟身姿。趁着盗猎者的增援还未赶到，我需要尽快用拿袋解救这只凤凰。只希望它能够意识到我是来帮它的。

I’ve rescued the phoenix; now I need to get it back to the Room of Requirement and introduce it to its new home. 
我已经成功解救了凤凰，现在我需要返回有求必应屋并让它住进自己的新家。

SNC_05_PhoenixRising_QuestAvailable_Jour:
Deek needs to speak with me in the Room of Requirement. I should find him and see what he has to say. 
迪科在有求必应屋里面等着我。我得去找他谈一谈。
SNC_05_PhoenixRising_QuestAvailable_Step: I should talk to Deek in the Room of Requirement.|我需要去有求必应屋和迪科谈一谈。
SNC_05_PhoenixRising_QuestComplete_Journ:
Deek heard a rumour that a phoenix was nesting in the nearby mountains and that some poachers were tracking it, so he asked me to rescue the bird. I made my way to the Phoenix Mountain Cave, but to my dismay, the poachers had beaten me there. After I fought off the poachers and spiders in the cave, I reached the peak of the mountain and found the phoenix in its roost. I was able to rescue the magnificent bird and bring it back to the Room of Requirement, where it dropped a feather for me in gratitude.
迪科听说有一只在附近山脉间筑巢的凤凰已经成为了盗猎者的目标，他希望我能前去解救凤凰。设法抵达凤凰山洞窟之后我大吃了一惊，没想到盗猎者竟然已经抢先一步进去了。打败洞穴中的盗猎者与蜘蛛后，我前往山顶并找到了巢穴中的凤凰。我成功解决了气势恢宏的魔法飞鸟，并将它带回了有求必应屋，作为报答，它给我留下了一根自己的羽毛。
SNS_01_InteriorDecorating_QuestActive_St: Professor Weasley would like to meet with me in the Room of Requirement.|韦斯莱教授希望我去有求必应屋找她。

Professor Weasley has asked me to gather moonstone, which can be found in the countryside surrounding Hogwarts, or I can use the Vanishing Spell on objects in the Room to reclaim the resources used to conjure them.
韦斯莱教授想要我去收集一些月石来，我可以前去霍格沃茨附近区域寻找，或者我也可以直接对有求必应屋中的物件使用消失咒语以回收用于变幻的资源。

Now that I’ve collected enough moonstone, I should return to Professor Weasley in the Room of Requirement.
现在我已经收集到了足够的月石，我需要回去有求必应屋找韦斯莱教授。

Professor Weasley wants me to use the resources I’ve gathered to conjure items with which to decorate the Room of Requirement.
韦斯莱教授希望我利用收集到的资源变幻物品，并用之装饰有求必应屋。

I have finished conjuring the decorative pieces. I should speak to Professor Weasley and find out what she wants me to do next.
我已经变幻出了装饰品。我需要跟韦斯莱教授谈一谈，了解接下来的打算

Professor Weasley wants me to use the Altering spell to change the size, colour, and identity of a conjured item in the Room of Requirement.
韦斯莱教授希望我在有求必应屋中使用“改变咒语”来改变物件的尺寸、配色与款式。

Professor Weasley has directed me to use the Altering spell to change the architecture of the room. I should try using it on the floor and balcony.
韦斯莱教授希望我利用“改变咒语”来调整有求必应屋中的结构。现在我应该试着改变地板与阳台。

Professor Weasley wants me to consult with Deek to alter the ambiance of the Room of Requirement.
韦斯莱教授希望我向迪科请教调整有求必应屋中的环境氛围一事。

Professor Weasley wants to teach me how to customise the Room of Requirement. I’ll need to gather moonstone to use as a resource for conjuring.
韦斯莱教授想要教我改造有求必应屋的方法。首先我需要收集月石，这是一种用于变幻的资源。
Speak with Professor Weasley in the Room of Requirement.|在有求必应屋与韦斯莱教授交谈。
SNS_01_InteriorDecorating_QuestComplete_:
Professor Weasley taught me the Conjuring and Altering spells, allowing me to customise the Room of Requirement. Conjuring new items requires moonstone; I should keep a look out for it during my travels. Professor Weasley says I can find it in abundance in the countryside around the castle. If I ever want to change the ambiance of the Room of Requirement, all I need to do is speak to Deek.
韦斯莱教授教会了我变幻咒与“改变咒语”，今后我将可以利用这两种咒语自由定制有求必应屋。变幻新的物件需要消耗月石，因此我应该在今后的旅程中留意这些资源。韦斯莱教授说城堡周遭区域中能够找到大量的月石。除此以外，如果想要调整有求必应屋的环境氛围，我就需要和迪科谈一谈。
SNS_03_FoaloftheDead_QuestActive_Journal:
Deek wants me to rescue a male and female Thestral and set up a breeding pen for them in the vivarium. He marked a location on my map where he says they can be found. I’ll also need to drop by Tomes and Scrolls in Hogsmeade and buy a Spellcraft for the breeding pen.
迪科希望我解救一公一母两头夜骐，并且在饲养所中为它们准备好繁殖圈。为此迪科在我的地图上标记了一个位置，他说我可以在那里找到野生夜骐。除此以外，我还需要去一趟霍格莫德的巨著与卷轴，并在那里购买繁殖圈需要的幻术配方。
SNS_03_FoaloftheDead_QuestActive_StepJou:
Deek marked the location on my map where he believes I can find Thestrals. I’ll also need to stop off in Hogsmeade and buy a spellcraft for the breeding pen.
迪科在我的地图上标记了一个位置，他认为我可以在那里找到野生的夜骐。除此以外，我还需要去一趟霍格莫德，并在那里的店铺中购买繁殖圈需要的幻术配方。

Now that I’ve rescued a pair of Thestrals and purchased the spellcraft for the breeding pen, I should return to the Room of Requirement and speak with Deek.
现在我已经成功解救了一对夜骐并购置了繁殖圈的幻术配方，我应该返回有求必应屋与迪科谈一谈。
I should conjure a breeding pen and use it to breed a pair of Thestrals.|我需要变幻一个繁殖圈并利用一对夜骐进行培育。
Now I just need to use the Breeding Pen and get the Thestrals to mate.|现在我需要使用繁殖圈为夜骐们进行配对。

The new-born Thestral could use some brushing. I should also see if it’s hungry.
我需要给新生的夜骐打理一番。除此以外我还要看一看它的饥饿程度。
I should return to Deek and tell him of the arrival of the new-born Thestral.|我需要回去找迪科，并将新生夜骐的好消息告诉他。

SNS_03_FoaloftheDead_QuestComplete_Journ:
Deek suggested I rescue a male and female Thestral and then, with the spellcraft I purchased, I conjured a breeding pen in the vivarium. My attempt was successful and a baby Thestral was born! I'm pleased that I've found a way to save beasts from poachers and create a safe environment to grow their population; I should use the breeding pen to breed any more beasts I find.
遵照迪科的建议，我解救了一公一母两头夜骐，之后又利用购买的幻术配方在饲养所中变幻了一个繁殖圈。经过多番努力过后，我成功见证了一头夜骐宝宝的降生！很高兴知道我已经找到了从盗猎者手中解救野兽的方法，并且也为它们创造了一个繁衍生息的安全环境，以后我可以利用繁殖圈培育自己找到的其他野兽。
SNS_03_FoaloftheDead_QuestTitle: Foal of the Dead|亡灵之驹
SNY_01_MindingYourOwnBusiness_QuestTitle: Minding Your Own Business|创业二三事
SNY_01_OnConsignment_BuyShop_TaskObj02: Collect {1} to purchase the shop from Cassandra Mason ({0}/{1}) 攒够{1}加隆后买下卡桑德拉·梅森手中的店铺
SNY_MindingYourOwnBusiness_QuestActive_J:
I’ve bested Fastidio at his game and we’ve arrived at an agreement that will allow me to run the shop in relative peace. Now I need to confront Cassandra Mason and ask her to explain why she sold me a shop with an ill-behaved poltergeist living beneath it.   
我在烦人精最擅长的游戏中打败了对方，双方达成协议，他会让我能够好好地经营商店。接下来，我必须去找卡桑德拉·梅森对峙，请她解释为什么卖给我的这间商店里面住着一位行为不端正的鬼魂。

I encountered a house-elf named Penny in front of a vacant shop in Hogsmeade. Evidently her mistress is interested in selling the shop at an attractive price. Penny also said that she comes with the shop and will run it for me – insists she can sell anything. The notion of owning a shop is intriguing. I should seek out Cassandra Mason and find out more.
在霍格莫德的一处闲置店面门前 我遇到了叫做潘妮的家养小精灵。潘妮的主人似乎正准备以极低的价格把店铺转让出去。除此以外，买下店铺后潘妮将会帮我经营打理，她还坚持说自己“什么都能卖出去”。实话实说，开店当老板的想法还是挺诱人的。我应该去向卡桑德拉·梅森进一步咨询此事。

I purchased the vacant shop from Cassandra Mason. She agreed to file the relevant paperwork immediately to confirm the sale. In the meantime, she suggested I meet Penny the house-elf at the shop and get started. Mrs Mason only asked that I gather some of her late husband's things from a chest in the back room before I open for business. 
我从卡桑德拉·梅森那边，买下了闲置的商店。她答应会立刻帮我递交书面资料，确认这笔交易的完成。与此同时，她建议我去商店找家养小精灵潘妮，开始打点商店的事务。梅森女士的唯一要求，是请我在开张营业之前，先去商店后面的房间打开一个盒子，帮她整理过世丈夫的遗物并拿出来。

Opening the chest in the back of the shop revealed the entrance to a secret cellar that seems far more expansive than it should be for such a small shop. I sense an ominously mischievous force lurking in the darkness. It's a bit unnerving and I wonder if it has anything to do with why Mrs Mason sold the shop to me for such a good price. I can't seem to go back the way I came, so I suppose the only thing to do is explore what lies below.  
在商店后面开启那个盒子后，我眼前出现通往秘密地窖的入口，而且里面空间之大，感觉并不像是这间小商店能够容纳的地方。我感应到黑暗中有一股调皮捣蛋的力量正在作祟，状况不妙。这有点令人不安，不晓得梅森女士之所以愿意用那么便宜的价格把商店转让给我，跟这件事情是否有关联。我似乎无法顺着原路折返，因此我想唯一的办法就是往前探索。
SNY_MindingYourOwnBusiness_QuestActive_S:
Casandra Mason lives on the northeast side of Hogsmeade. I should speak with her about the vacant shop she’s looking to sell. 
卡桑德拉·梅森生活在霍格莫德的东北边。我应该去找她谈谈她想要转让闲置商店的事情。

Cassandra Mason is willing to sell me her vacant shop for an exceedingly fair price. When I asked her what the catch was, she said she simply wants to be able to buy the shop back at a discount if I fail. All I need to do is scrape together enough gold and the shop is mine. 
卡桑德拉·梅森愿意以相当优惠的价格将自己手上那间闲置的店面转让给我，这种千载难逢的机会几乎好得不像是真的。当我询问她开出这种极低价格的缘由时，梅森夫人只是单纯地表示如果我无法成功经营下去，她愿意以折扣价格将店铺买回来。现在我只需要想办法攒到足够的金币，那间店铺就归我了。

I should speak to Penny the house-elf and tell her that I’ve purchased the shop.  
我应该去找家养小精灵潘妮谈谈，告诉她我已经买下了商店。

The previous tenant left behind quite a mess. I need to put the shop in order before we can open for business. 
上一任商店承租人留下了许多烂摊子需要处理。我必须打点好商店的事务，然后才能开张营业。

Cassandra Mason mentioned a chest of her late husband's belongings would be in the back of the shop. I should open this chest and see what's inside.
卡桑德拉·梅森提到说店铺后面的箱子里面应该放着自己已故丈夫的私人物品。我应该去帮梅森夫人把东西取出来。

Neither Cassandra Mason nor Penny said anything about this hidden cellar. I’m sensing something nefarious afoot, which might explain why the shop was such a bargain. It looks like the only way to find out what's really going on is to explore what lies below. 
之前无论是卡桑德拉·梅森还是潘妮都没有提到过店铺有秘密地窖一事。我有种不好的预感，也许这就是为什么店铺的价格那么低的原因吧。看来只有下去一探究竟，才能弄明白这其中的缘由。

It looks like this atrium has been abandoned for ages. Hopefully whatever spun these webs is no longer around. I should search for more of the floating magic lanterns. They seem to be the key to navigating this maze. 
看样子这个中庭已经被废弃好几年了。希望这些蜘蛛网的主人没有潜伏在附近。我应该继续寻找更多这种飘浮在半空中的魔法灯笼。它们似乎是走出这个迷宫的关键。

This poltergeist fancies himself quite the playmate! Did Cassandra Mason sell me her shop to take my money and leave me to the whims of this mischievous imp? 
这个鬼魂自认是个很棒的玩伴！卡桑德拉·梅森之所以愿意把商店卖给我，难道是为了坑我的钱，同时把这个调皮捣蛋的小鬼丢给我处理吗？

I survived Fastidio’s little game of duck and dodge. I should return to the foyer and see what the poltergeist has in store for me next. 
我在烦人精的躲闪小游戏中存活了下来。我应该回去门厅，看看那个鬼魂接下来还为我准备了什么。

Fastidio has me trapped in some sort of enchanted labyrinth. It's clear that I can’t trust my senses in this place. At any moment up can become down, light can become dark, and the way back can become the way forward. I need to keep my wits about me if I’m going to make it out of here. 
烦人精把我困在了某种被施加魔法的迷宫里面。显然我在这个地方没办法相信我的感官。周遭的环境随时都有可能上下颠倒、明暗转换，而且往后的道路还可能变成往前的道路。我必须提高警觉，才有办法顺利逃出这个地方。

It looks like Fastidio wants to throw more furniture at my head. How long can I keep dodging these projectiles before I get seriously hurt? And what will he do to me once he gets bored with his games?
看来烦人精是想要用家具活活砸死我。不知道我还能坚持多久？要是不及时闪躲，恐怕会造成重伤。不知道等他玩腻了这些游戏之后，又会有什么打算？

I survived another round with Fastidio. I need to return to the foyer and find my way out of here. 
我又陪烦人精玩了一局游戏并存活了下来。我必须回去前厅，在那边找到离开的方法。

The doors are now open. The way out must be through them. I’m sure Fastidio has more challenges waiting for me. He seems to enjoy his games a bit more than most others would. 
门打开了。穿过这些门肯定就能逃出去。我想烦人精肯定还准备了更多挑战在等着我。他似乎很比平常人还要更享受这些游戏。

Fastidio wants to go another round with me. It’s time I show him my mettle and put an end to this farce. 
烦人精想要再跟我玩一局。是时候让他见识一下我的厉害，并终结这出闹剧了。

Fastidio and I have come to an agreement. I can return to the shop by exiting through the mausoleum.  
我跟烦人精达成了协议。我可以走陵墓那边的通道回去商店。

I should talk to Penny and find out how much she knows about Fastidio and why she didn’t tell me about the secret cellar. If I truly am the new owner of the shop and of Penny, she should not have been able to lie to me. Something doesn’t add up. 
我应该去找潘妮聊聊，看看她是否知道有关烦人精的事情，还有她为什么没有告诉我关于秘密地窖的事情。如果我真的是这间商店还有潘妮的新主人，她应该就没办法对我说谎。事情不大对劲。

It’s become evident that Cassandra Mason was attempting to swindle me and doom me to the madness of Fastidio’s labyrinth. According to Penny, it seems I’m not Mrs Mason's first victim. I need to find Officer Singer in Hogsmeade and tell her what I know. She’s usually stationed in the town square. 
很明显，卡桑德拉·梅森是想要扮猪吃老虎，她的目的就是让我在烦人精的迷宫中沦为一介疯子，好让她侵吞店铺转让费。而且按照潘妮的说法，我不是梅森夫人的第一个牺牲品。我需要立刻去找霍格莫德的辛格警官，并把自己掌握到的信息告诉她。辛格警官通常都会在镇中心巡逻。

It’s time to confront Cassandra Mason about her crimes. She must answer for what she’s done, not just to me, but to the others who came before me. How many aspiring shop owners did she send to St. Mungo's? Officer Singer will accompany me to keep the peace and uphold the law.   
是时候找卡桑德拉·梅森对峙，谈谈她的罪行了。她必须为自己所做的事情付出代价，不只是对我，也对在我之前遭遇不幸的受害者。她到底害了几个有志想要创业的商店老板被送去了圣芒戈医院？辛格警官会陪同我一起去，以维持秩序并贯彻法律。

I should return to the shop and tell Penny what happened with Cassandra Mason and that I’m now the legitimate owner of the shop. 
我应该回去商店，告诉潘妮有关卡桑德拉·梅森的下场，同时也让她知道现在我才是商店的合法主人。
SNY_MindingYourOwnBusiness_QuestActive_T: Speak with Cassandra Mason |与卡桑德拉·梅森交谈

SNY_MindingYourOwnBusiness_QuestAvailabl:
I spotted a house-elf outside what appears to be a vacant shop in Hogsmeade. She was trying to get my attention. I should see what she wants.
我在霍格莫德的一间闲置店面外见到了一位家养小精灵。她似乎想要和我交流。也许我该去听听她想说什么。

A house-elf standing outside what appears to be a vacant shop is trying to get my attention. I should see what she wants.
有一名家养小精灵正站在一处闲置店铺外，她似乎有事相求。也许我该去听听她想说什么。
Speak with the house-elf outside the vacant shop in Hogsmeade|与霍格莫德中闲置店铺外的家养小精灵交谈
SNY_MindingYourOwnBusiness_QuestComplete:
I purchased a shop and a house-elf from Cassandra Mason at an exceptionally low price. It seems Mrs Mason was trying to swindle me by trapping me in a labyrinthine cellar below the shop at the mercy of Fastidio, a bored and mischievous poltergeist. Fastidio challenged me to solve puzzles and even to battle him, but in the end we agreed that he would allow me to run my shop in relative peace. I eventually confronted and fought Mrs Mason before she was taken away by Officer Singer to pay for her crimes. Ownership of both the shop and Penny was officially transferred to me, so I was able to grant Penny her freedom. She has gladly chosen to stay on board, and I am excited to open for business.
我以不可思议的优惠价格从卡桑德拉·梅森手中买下了一间店铺与一位家养小精灵。只是我没想到这个看似千载难逢的“好机会”只是梅森夫人一手炮制的骗局：她想要把我困在店铺之下的迷宫地窖中，并让我成为名叫烦人精的调皮捣蛋鬼的牺牲品。烦人精百般刁难，给我布置了各种谜题甚至还和我进行了决斗，但是到最后我们终于达成了共识，他将允许我在相对平静的环境中经营店铺。从地窖中逃出来之后，我前去与梅森夫人对质并成功过将她制服，之后辛格警官带走了她，梅森夫人将会为自己的罪行付出代价。现在店铺与潘妮的所有权都已经正式移交给了我，所以我利用自己的权利解放了潘妮。恢复自由之身的潘妮表示愿意留下来帮忙打理店铺，我也已经迫不及待准备好开店做生意了。

I purchased a shop and a house-elf from Cassandra Mason at an exceptionally low price. It seems Mrs Mason was trying to swindle me by trapping me in a labyrinthine cellar below the shop at the mercy of Fastidio, a bored and mischievous poltergeist. Fastidio challenged me to solve puzzles and even to battle him, but in the end we agreed that he would allow me to run my shop in relative peace. I eventually confronted and fought Mrs Mason before she was taken away by Officer Singer to pay for her crimes. Ownership of both the shop and Penny was officially transferred to me and I am excited to open for business.
我以不可思议的优惠价格从卡桑德拉·梅森手中买下了一间店铺与一位家养小精灵。只是我没想到这个看似千载难逢的“好机会”只是梅森夫人一手炮制的骗局：她想要把我困在店铺之下的迷宫地窖中，并让我成为名叫烦人精的调皮捣蛋鬼的牺牲品。烦人精百般刁难，给我布置了各种谜题甚至还和我进行了决斗，但是到最后我们终于达成了共识，他将允许我在相对平静的环境中经营店铺。从地窖中逃出来之后，我前去与梅森夫人对质并成功过将她制服，之后辛格警官带走了她，梅森夫人将会为自己的罪行付出代价。现在店铺与潘妮的所有权都已经正式移交给了我，我已经迫不及待准备好开店做生意了。
sny_mindingyourownbusiness_questtitle: Minding Your Own Business|创业二三事
SophroniaFranklin: Sophronia Franklin|索夫罗尼娅·富兰克林
Spell_Oppugno: Ancient Magic Throw|古代魔法投掷
Spell_Wingardium: Wingardium Leviosa|羽加迪姆·勒维奥萨
Spells_Vul: Vulnerable to most spells|无力抵抗大多数的咒语
SphinxPuzzle_desc:
Merlin Trials are puzzles allegedly created by Merlin while a student at Hogwarts as a diversion for his fellow Slytherins
据说当年梅林还是霍格沃茨的一位学生时，他为自己的斯莱特林同学创造了一系列富有挑战性的谜题，也就是现在的“梅林试炼”
Spider_Fang_desc:
Fangs gathered from spiders. The residual venom is a key ingredient in Maxima Potion.
从蜘蛛身上采集到的毒牙。上面残留的毒液是终极魔药的重要原料。
SpiderAccromantula_desc:
Though not technically a spider, this beast appears and behaves like other magical arachnids. As it is incredibly aggressive, and its powerful attacks will break Shield Charms, targets should dodge away and strike quickly between attacks. Patience and perseverance just might lead to victory.

As it rears up, ripping it downward will catch it off guard.
尽管严格意义上并不能算作是“蜘蛛”，但是这种野兽无论是外表还是行为都与其他魔法蜘蛛无异。它的攻击性极强，强有力的攻击能够轻松击溃护盾魔咒，建议你尽可能选择闪躲，并在它们的攻击间隙中迅速反击。耐心与毅力将使战胜这些巨兽的关键。

当它抬起身时，将其向下猛砸会让蜘蛛暂时失去还手的能力。
SpiderAccromantula_tip_one_desc:
Though not technically a spider, this beast appears and behaves like other magical arachnids. As it is incredibly aggressive, and its powerful attacks will break Shield Charms, targets should dodge away and strike quickly between attacks. Patience and perseverance just might lead to victory.
尽管严格意义上并不能算作是“蜘蛛”，但是这种野兽无论是外表还是行为都与其他魔法蜘蛛无异。它的攻击性极强，强有力的攻击能够轻松击溃护盾魔咒，建议你尽可能选择闪躲，并在它们的攻击间隙中迅速反击。耐心与毅力将使战胜这些巨兽的关键。
SpiderAccromantula_tip_two_desc: As it rears up, ripping it downward will catch it off guard.|当它抬起身时，将其向下猛砸会让蜘蛛暂时失去还手的能力。
SpiderHatchlings_tip_one_desc:
These deal light damage, but that can add up quickly when a swarm of them attack relentlessly.
虽然单一小蜘蛛无法造成过多伤害，但是成群结队出动的小蜘蛛将带来巨大的威胁。
SpiderHatchlings_tip_two_desc:
These are easily defeated by almost any attack and will even die when they strike a simple Shield Charm.
几乎所有攻击都能够轻松解决这些野兽。甚至是当它们攻击护盾魔咒时也会因为反弹力量而一命呜呼。
SpiderLair_desc: A den inhabited by spiders|蜘蛛居住的巢穴
SpiderLuminousEggsac: Egg Bound Pale Weaver|带卵苍白编织者
SpiderVenomous_desc:
When these spiders begin to burrow, Flipendo will rip them out of the ground, dealing massive damage.

Its venomous attacks will poison the target, dealing damage over time, but Wiggenweld Potion will stop the poison from dealing further damage, allowing you to heal.
当这些蜘蛛开始钻地，使用“退敌三尺”可将它们从地下翻出，造成巨大伤害。

它的剧毒攻击会使目标中毒，并造成持续性伤害，但振奋魔药可阻止毒素造成进一步的伤害，让你获得治疗。
SpiderVenomous_tip_one_desc:
Its venomous attacks will poison the target, dealing damage over time, but Wiggenweld Potion will stop the poison from dealing further damage, allowing you to heal.
它的剧毒攻击会使目标中毒，并造成持续性伤害，但振奋魔药可阻止毒素造成进一步的伤害，让你获得治疗。
SpiderVenomousBaby_desc:
These deal light damage, but that can add up quickly when a swarm of them attack relentlessly.

These are easily defeated by almost any attack and will even die when they strike a simple Shield Charm.

Its venomous attacks will poison the target, dealing damage over time, but Wiggenweld Potion will stop the poison from dealing further damage, allowing you to heal.
虽然单一小蜘蛛无法造成过多伤害，但是成群结队出动的小蜘蛛将带来巨大的威胁。

几乎所有攻击都能够轻松解决这些野兽。甚至是当它们攻击护盾魔咒时也会因为反弹力量而一命呜呼。

它的剧毒攻击会使目标中毒，并造成持续性伤害，但振奋魔药可阻止毒素造成进一步的伤害，让你获得治疗。
SpiderVenomousSniper_desc:
These spiders try to keep as far away as possible and shoot webs to incapacitate their prey.

While airborne, their unprotected bellies are exposed, making them vulnerable to follow-up damage.
这些蜘蛛会尽可能与目标保持距离，并通过发射蛛网束缚猎物。

在空中时，它们缺乏保护的腹部将被一览无余，这时候便是对其造成连续伤害的大好时机。
SpiderVenomousSpitter_desc:
These spiders prefer to attack from a distance, spitting acidic venom.

Striking it with a fire spell as it prepares to attack with acidic venom will ignite the spider.

Its venomous attacks will poison the target, dealing damage over time, but Wiggenweld Potion will stop the poison from dealing further damage, allowing you to heal.
这些蜘蛛喜欢从远距离喷射酸性毒液。

当它准备用酸性毒液攻击时，使用火焰咒语对其攻击将会点燃蜘蛛。

它的剧毒攻击会使目标中毒，并造成持续性伤害，但振奋魔药可阻止毒素造成进一步的伤害，让你获得治疗。
SpiderVenomousSpitter_tip_one_desc: These spiders prefer to attack from a distance, spitting acidic venom.|这些蜘蛛喜欢从远距离喷射酸性毒液。
SpiderVenomousSpitter_tip_two_desc:
Striking it with a fire spell as it prepares to attack with acidic venom will ignite the spider.
当它准备用酸性毒液攻击时，使用火焰咒语对其攻击将会点燃蜘蛛。
SpiderVenomousTank_desc:
This monstrosity rears up as it is about to strike its target with a powerful bite that breaks through Shield Charms. The most obvious defence is to dodge out of the way.

As it rears up, ripping it downward with Descendo will catch it off guard.
这种怪物会站起身来，并准备随时用强大的啃咬穿透目标，突破护盾魔咒。在那种时候，闪躲是你最好的防御选择。

当它抬起身时，使用“应声落地”将其向下猛砸将可以使其失去还手的能力。
SpiderWoodlouse_desc:
All types of magical spiders are quite vulnerable to fire, especially at low health.

Fire attacks will ignite the spider while it is low on health, causing it to skitter about frantically before it dies. If it takes further damage before it dies, it will explode, hitting nearby targets.

When these spiders begin to burrow, Flipendo will rip them out of the ground, dealing massive damage.
所有类型的魔法蜘蛛都怕火，当它们生命值垂危时尤是如此。

火焰攻击将会点燃蜘蛛，使其在死前疯狂地四处乱窜。在这种状态下，如果蜘蛛死亡前遭受了进一步的伤害，它们将会自爆并伤害周遭目标。

当这些蜘蛛开始钻地，使用“退敌三尺”可将它们从地下翻出，造成巨大伤害。
SpiderWoodlouseBaby_desc:
These deal light damage, but that can add up quickly when a swarm of them attack relentlessly.

These are easily defeated by almost any attack and will even die when they strike a simple Shield Charm.
虽然单一小蜘蛛无法造成过多伤害，但是成群结队出动的小蜘蛛将带来巨大的威胁。

几乎所有攻击都能够轻松解决这些野兽。甚至是当它们攻击护盾魔咒时也会因为反弹力量而一命呜呼。
SpiderWoodlouseSniper_desc:
These spiders try to keep as far away as possible and shoot webs to incapacitate their prey.

While they are airborne, their unprotected bellies are exposed, making them vulnerable to follow-up damage.
这些蜘蛛会尽可能与目标保持距离，并通过发射蛛网束缚猎物。

在空中时，它们缺乏保护的腹部将被一览无余，这时候便是对其造成连续伤害的大好时机。
SpiderWoodlouseSniper_tip_one_desc:
These spiders try to keep as far away as possible and shoot webs to incapacitate their prey.
这些蜘蛛会尽可能与目标保持距离，并通过发射蛛网束缚猎物。

当它准备用酸性毒液攻击时，使用火焰咒语对其攻击将会点燃蜘蛛。

StenchOfTheDead_desc: Essence gathered from Inferi. Ingredient for Thunderbrew.|从阴尸身上采集来的浓缩物质。调配雷酿的原料。
Store_01_All_Vchr: Hogwarts Legacy: Kelpie Robe|霍格沃茨之遗：水妖长袍
Store_01_All_Vchr_desc:
This coat in emerald and gold is emblazoned with an interpretation of the majestic water horse.

Cosmetics are accessible in the Gear Menu using the Change Appearance option.
这件祖母绿与金色交织的大衣上点缀有水中骏马的雄伟身姿。

可在“装备菜单”中使用“更改外观”选项，来查看装饰品。
Store_01_All_Vchr_Prchs: Hogwarts Legacy: Dark Arts Pack|霍格沃茨之遗：黑魔法包
Store_01_All_Vchr_Prchs_desc:
You've unlocked the Thestral Mount, the Dark Arts Cosmetic Set, and the Dark Arts Battle Arena. 

New mounts are accessible in the Gear Menu after the default Hippogriff is unlocked in the main questline.

Access cosmetics in the Gear Menu by placing the cursor over gear of the same type and selecting the Change Appearance option.

The Battle Arena is accessible in the Forbidden Forest once you progress the main questline far enough to leave Hogwarts freely.
你已解锁夜骐坐骑、黑魔法装饰品套装和黑魔法战斗竞技场。

在主任务线中解锁默认的鹰马翼兽后，可以在装备菜单中查看新的坐骑。

通过将光标放在相同类型的装备上，并选择“更改外观”选项，即可查看装备菜单中的装饰品。

当你将主任务线推进到足以自由离开霍格沃茨的程度，就可以从禁林中进入“战斗竞技场”。

Stupefy_desc: Deals minor damage to enemies and objects. Tap {Stupefy} to cast.|对敌人与物体造成少量伤害。反复按下施放。
Stupefy_gameplay_desc:
Stuns enemies, making them easy targets for follow-up spells. It deals no direct damage but stunned enemies take extra damage, indicated by gold numbers. It also breaks enemy Shield Charms (except on Hard difficulty). When successfully deflecting an incoming attack with Protego, keep {AM_Protego} held to cast a Stupefy counter-attack at whichever enemy you choose to target.
晕眩敌人，使其更容易受到其他咒语攻击。这种咒语不会造成直接伤害，但被击晕的敌人会受到额外伤害，并以金色数字表示。该咒语还可破坏敌人的护盾魔咒（困难难度除外）。使用“盔甲护身”成功反弹来袭攻击后，长按以对你所瞄准的任何敌人施放“昏昏倒地”反击。
StupefySpecial_Send_desc:
Stuns enemies, making them easy targets for follow-up spells. It deals no direct damage but stunned enemies take extra damage, indicated by gold numbers. It also breaks enemy Shield Charms (except on Hard difficulty). When successfully deflecting an incoming attack with Protego, keep {AM_Protego} held to cast a Stupefy counter-attack at whichever enemy you choose to target.
晕眩敌人，使其更容易受到其他咒语攻击。这种咒语不会造成直接伤害，但被击晕的敌人会受到额外伤害，并以金色数字表示。该咒语还可破坏敌人的护盾魔咒（困难难度除外）。使用“盔甲护身”成功反弹来袭攻击后，长按以对你所瞄准的任何敌人施放“昏昏倒地”反击。

Talent_Core_OppugnoWeak: Ancient Magic Throw Mastery|古代魔法投掷精通
Talent_Core_OppugnoWeak_desc: You can toss weakened enemies with Ancient Magic Throw.|能够对被攻击削弱的敌人使用古代魔法投掷。
Talent_Core_OppugnoWeak_requirements: Must be able to use Ancient Magic Throw to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：学习使用古代魔法投掷
Talent_Core_ProtegoAM: Protego Absorption|能量吸收（盔甲护身）
Talent_Core_ProtegoAM_desc: Successful Protego blocks contribute to the Ancient Magic Meter.|成功使用盔甲护身格挡将填充古代魔法能量槽。
Talent_Core_ProtegoBlast_desc: Perfect Protego releases a damaging blast that breaks enemy shields.|完美的“盔甲护身”可释放破坏性的爆炸，打破敌人的护盾。
Talent_Core_ProtegoBlast_requirements: Must be at least Level 30 to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：至少到达30级
Talent_Core_ProtegoReflect_desc:
Blocking a spell with Perfect Protego will send two projectiles back at enemies.
用完美的“盔甲护身”阻挡咒语，将会向敌人反弹两枚飞行物。
Talent_Core_RevelioUpgrade_desc: Increases the range of Revelio|扩大原形立现的作用范围
Talent_Core_StupefyAOE_desc: Stupefy deals direct damage on impact.|昏昏倒地命中后将造成直接伤害。
Talent_Core_StupefyStun_desc: Enemies struck with Stupefy remain stunned for a longer period of time.|延长遭到昏昏倒地命中的敌人的晕眩持续时间。
Talent_Curse_AvadaKedavra: Avada Kedavra Mastery|阿瓦达索命咒精通
Talent_Curse_AvadaKedavra_desc: Killing an enemy with Avada Kedavra kills all cursed enemies.|使用阿瓦达索命咒击杀一名敌人将同时杀死所有受诅咒的敌人。
Talent_Curse_AvadaKedavra_Requirements: Must be able to cast Avada Kedavra to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：学习使用阿瓦达索命咒
Talent_Curse_Crucio_desc:
Striking an enemy cursed by Crucio releases a projectile that curses a nearby enemy.
攻击遭受“钻心剜骨”折磨的敌人，将会施放一枚诅咒周遭一名敌人的飞行物。
Talent_Curse_Crucio_Requirements: Must be able to cast Crucio to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：学习使用钻心剜骨
Talent_Curse_CurseHealth_desc: Defeating a cursed enemy restores some of your health.|打败一名被诅咒的敌人，将为你恢复一些生命值。
Talent_Curse_CurseHealth_Requirements: Must be able to cast a curse to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：学习施放诅咒
Talent_Curse_CurseLong_desc: A cursed effect remains on an enemy for a longer period of time.|延长敌人承受的诅咒效果持续时间。
Talent_Curse_CurseReflect_desc: Some of the damage dealt to a cursed target is applied to all cursed targets.|攻击单一受诅咒目标时，所有受诅咒目标都会承受部分伤害。
Talent_Curse_CurseStupefy_desc:
Stupefy has the same effect as a curse on enemies. Cursed enemies take increased damage.
昏昏倒地将对敌人们产生等同于诅咒的影响。受诅咒的敌人将会承受额外伤害。
Talent_Curse_Imperio_desc:
An enemy under your control with Imperio curses other targets with each successful strike.
如果一名敌人遭到你使用的魂魄出窍控制，受控制的敌人在每次攻击时都将诅咒其他目标。
Talent_Curse_Imperio_Requirements: Must be able to cast Imperio to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：学习使用魂魄出窍
Talent_Infil_Evasion1: Sense of Secrecy I|神出鬼没 I
Talent_Infil_Evasion1_desc: Enemies' ability to detect you is reduced.|使敌人更难侦测到你。
Talent_Infil_Evasion1_Requirements: Must be able to use Disillusionment to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：学会使用幻身咒
Talent_Infil_Evasion2: Sense of Secrecy II|神出鬼没 II
Talent_Infil_Evasion2_desc: Enemies' ability to detect you is reduced.|使敌人更难侦测到你。
Talent_Infil_Evasion2_Requirements: Must be able to use Disillusionment to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：学会使用幻身咒
Talent_Infil_PetrificusTotalus: Petrificus Totalus Mastery|统统石化精通
Talent_Infil_PetrificusTotalus_Desc: Petrificus Totalus emanates an area of effect that can impact nearby enemies.|统统石化将附带能够影响到周遭敌人的范围效果。
Talent_Infil_PetrificusTotalus_Requireme: Must be able to cast Petrificus Totalus to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：学会使用统统石化
Talent_Sanc_AMPotion: Focus Potion Potency|专注魔药效能
Talent_Sanc_AMPotion_desc:
The duration of the Focus Potion's effect will be extended when any spell from the Spell Set is cast during its use.
使用期间施放任何来自咒语组的咒语时，专注魔药的效果持续时间将延长。
Talent_Sanc_AMPotion_Requirements: Must be able to use Focus Potion to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：能够使用专注魔药
Talent_Sanc_AutoDamagePotion_desc: The range and damage of the potion effect are greatly increased.|大幅提高魔药效果的作用范围与伤害。
Talent_Sanc_AutoDamagePotion_Requirement: Must be able to use Thunderbrew to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：能够使用雷酿
Talent_Sanc_Cabbage_desc:
For each Chinese Chomping Cabbage thrown, a second Chomping Cabbage is generated and released at no cost.
每次投掷中国咬人甘蓝时，免费创造并投掷额外一枚咬人甘蓝。
Talent_Sanc_Cabbage_Requirements: Must be able to use Chinese Chomping Cabbage to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：能够使用中国咬人甘蓝
Talent_Sanc_EdurusPotion: Edurus Potion Potency|艾德鲁斯魔药效能
Talent_Sanc_EdurusPotion_desc:
Edurus Potion makes you invulnerable and deflects projectile attacks back to enemies.
艾德鲁斯魔药将使你进入无敌状态，并将来袭的投射物反弹给攻击者。
Talent_Sanc_EdurusPotion_Requirements: Must be able to use Edurus Potion to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：能够使用艾德鲁斯魔药
Talent_Sanc_InvisibilityPotion: Invisibility Potion Potency|隐形魔药效能
Talent_Sanc_InvisibilityPotion_desc:
The Invisibility Potion's undetectable effect lasts for a longer period of time.
延长隐形魔药的效果持续时间。
Talent_Sanc_InvisibilityPotion_Requireme: Must be able to use Invisibility Potion to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：能够使用隐形魔药
Talent_Sanc_Mandrake_desc:
The damage and duration of the incapacitating effect of Mandrakes are increased.
提高曼德拉草的伤害以及瘫痪效果持续时间。
Talent_Sanc_Mandrake_Requirements: Must be able to use Mandrake to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：能够使用曼德拉草
Talent_Sanc_MaximaPotion: Maxima Potion Potency|终极魔药效能
Talent_Sanc_MaximaPotion_desc:
Maxima Potion causes attacks to have additional increased damage and break enemy shields.
服下终极魔药后，攻击将造成额外伤害并且能够击破敌人的护盾。
Talent_Sanc_MaximaPotion_Requirements: Must be able to use Maxima potion to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：能够使用终极魔药
Talent_Sanc_Venomous_desc: Venomous Tentacula attacks deal additional damage and break shields.|毒触手的攻击将造成额外伤害，并且能够击破护盾。
Talent_Sanc_Venomous_Requirements: Must be able to use Venomous Tentacula to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：能够使用毒触手
Talent_Spell_Accio_desc: Enemies near a target summoned by Accio are also pulled to you.|“飞来咒”将同时拉近目标周遭的敌人。
Talent_Spell_Accio_Requirements: Must be able to cast Accio to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：学习使用“飞来咒”
Talent_Spell_Arresto_desc:
Arresto Momentum has the same effect as a curse on enemies. Cursed enemies take increased damage.
减震止速将对敌人们产生等同于诅咒的影响。受诅咒的敌人将会承受额外伤害。
Talent_Spell_Arresto_Requirements: Must be able to cast Arresto Momentum to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：学习使用减震止速
Talent_Spell_Bombarda_desc: Bombarda causes an explosive blast with a massive area of effect.|“大爆爆”将引发一次影响范围巨大的爆炸。
Talent_Spell_Bombarda_Requirements: Must be able to cast Bombarda to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：学习使用“大爆爆”
Talent_Spell_Confringo_desc: Confringo impacts produce fiery bolts that seek enemy targets.|“霹雳爆炸”命中后将发射追踪敌方目标的火焰矢。
Talent_Spell_Confringo_Requirements: Must be able to cast Confringo to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：学习使用“霹雳爆炸”
Talent_Spell_Depulso_desc: Casting Depulso releases an additional blast directly around you.|施放“统统飞走”时将会在你的周围释放一次额外的冲击波。
Talent_Spell_Depulso_Requirements: Must be able to cast Depulso to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：学习使用“统统飞走”
Talent_Spell_Descendo_desc: A Descendo slam creates a damaging shockwave around your target.|“应声落地”将会在你的目标周围创造一道伤害冲击波。
Talent_Spell_Descendo_Requirements: Must be able to cast Descendo to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：学习使用“应声落地”
Talent_Spell_Diffindo_desc: Diffindo casts slice through impacted enemies to strike additional targets.|“四分五裂”将能够穿透敌人并继续攻击多个目标。
Talent_Spell_Diffindo_Requirements: Must be able to cast Diffindo to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：学习使用“四分五裂”
Talent_Spell_Expelliarmus_desc:
Expelliarmus has the same effect as a curse on enemies. Cursed enemies take increased damage.
除你武器将对敌人们产生等同于诅咒的影响。受诅咒的敌人将会承受额外伤害。
Talent_Spell_Expelliarmus_Requirements: Must be able to cast Expelliarmus to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：学习使用除你武器
Talent_Spell_Fiendfyre_desc:
Fiendfyre increases in size and launches a damaging burst of flame over a broad area.
扩大厉火的作用规模，并且还将喷射一道能够伤害大范围内敌人的火焰。
Talent_Spell_Fiendfyre_Requirements: Must be able to cast Fiendfyre to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：学习使用厉火
Talent_Spell_Flippendo_desc:
Flipendo has the same effect as a curse on enemies. Cursed enemies take increased damage.
“退敌三尺”将对敌人们产生等同于诅咒的影响。受诅咒的敌人将会承受额外伤害。
Talent_Spell_Flippendo_Requirements: Must be able to cast Flipendo to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：学习使用退敌三尺
Talent_Spell_Glacius_desc:
Striking an enemy frozen by Glacius blasts damaging shards outward from the target.
攻击受到“寒冰冻结”影响的冰冻敌人将使目标向外发射具备伤害能力的碎片。
Talent_Spell_Glacius_Requirements: Must be able to cast Glacius to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：学习使用“寒冰冻结”
Talent_Spell_Incendio_desc: Casting Incendio unleashes a ring of flame around you.|施放“火焰熊熊”时将同时在你的周围召唤一圈火焰。
Talent_Spell_Incendio_Requirements: Must be able to cast Incendio to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：学习使用“火焰熊熊”
Talent_Spell_Levioso_desc: Enemies near a target levitated by Levioso are also levitated.|“啦唯啊萨”将对目标周遭的敌人施加飘浮效果。
Talent_Spell_Levioso_Requirements: Must be able to cast Levioso to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：学习使用“啦唯啊萨”
Talent_Spell_Transformation_desc: Enemies struck with the Transformation spell transform into explosive objects.|遭“变形魔咒”命中的敌人将转变为爆炸性物体。
Talent_Spell_Transformation_Requirements: Must be able to cast the Transformation Spell to Unlock this Talent|天赋解锁条件：学习使用“变形魔咒”
TempesteThorne_desc:
Clinical and cruel, Tempeste Thorne was trapping and carving up beasts for profit long before she left Hogwarts. One of the first to join Rookwood's criminal empire, under her gaze the poachers have risen from scramblers to a sturdy operation.
坦帕斯特·索恩是个残忍无情的盗猎者，自从离开霍格沃茨之后便做起了狩猎野兽的生意。作为卢克伍德的犯罪帝国中的元老之一，在坦帕斯特的统领下，盗猎者也从最初的小打小闹变成了规模庞大的派系。
TenAndAHalf: Ten and a half inches|十又二分之一英寸
TenAndAQuarter: Ten and a quarter inches|十又四分之一英寸
TenAndThreeQuarters: Ten and three-quarters inches|十又四分之三英寸
Tent1_desc: A large arena used for illegal dragon fighting|用于非法斗龙的大型竞技场
Tent2_desc: An Ashwinder base of operations|一处火灰蛇党的行动基地
TextHighContrastMode_desc: Adjust the contrast of the text in the game|调整游戏中文字的对比度
TextSize_desc: Adjust the text size on screen|调整屏幕上的字体大小
ThaddeusTravers: Thaddeus Travers|撒迪厄斯·特拉弗斯
TheAstronomyWing_desc:
The wing of Hogwarts comprising the Astronomy tower, the highest spire in Hogwarts, the Defence against the Dark Arts tower and the Transfiguration courtyard
霍格沃茨的侧区包括天文塔、霍格沃茨最高的尖塔、黑魔法防御术塔和变形学庭院
TheEntranceWing_desc:
The Bell Tower Wing of Hogwarts, comprising the Bell Tower Entrance Hall, the Bell Towers and the North Hall
霍格沃茨钟塔区，包括钟塔门厅、钟塔和北厅
TheGrandStaircase_desc: The magnificent staircase of Hogwarts|霍格沃茨宏伟的楼梯
TheGreatHall_desc: The famous Great Hall of Hogwarts|举世闻名的霍格沃茨礼堂
TheLibraryAnnex_desc: The annex of the library|图书馆附属区域
TheophilusHarlow: Theophilus Harlow|修菲利乌斯·哈罗尔
TheRoomOfRequirement_desc: The Room of Requirement and the Map Chamber|有求必应屋和地图密室
TheSchoolGrounds_desc: The ground around Hogwarts|霍格沃茨周遭场地
TheSouthWing_desc: The South Wing of Hogwarts|霍格沃茨的南区
Thestral_Byproduct_desc:
The hair is shed by the winged and skeletal Thestrals inhabiting swampy areas. Thestral hair can be used to upgrade and assign traits to gear.
长着翅膀的嶙峋夜骐褪下的毛发，这种野兽通常居住在沼泽地区。夜骐毛发可用于强化装备和为其分配特质。
Thestral_desc:
The Thestral is a haunting, winged equine beast that is only visible to those who have seen death.
夜骐是一种令人难以忘记的有翼马兽，只有亲眼见过死亡的人才能看到。
ThestralDen_desc: A den inhabited by Thestrals|夜骐居住的巢穴
ThestralMount_desc:
A tame and gentle female Thestral that will allow you to soar through the clouds on her back
一头温驯的雌性夜骐，可让你在其背上翱翔于云层间
ThestralOffspring_desc: A newly born Thestral|一只新生的夜骐。
Thief: The Irondale Pilferer|“艾恩代尔大盗”
Thief_desc:
A sticky-fingered Niffler that has been burglarising the hamlet of Irondale at night
就是这只手脚不干净的嗅嗅一直在夜晚四处搜刮艾恩代尔居民的财产。
ThirdYear_desc: An intermediate level of magic studied by third-year students|三年级学生所学习的中级魔法
ThirteenAndAHalf: Thirteen and a half inches|十三又二分之一英寸
ThirteenAndAQuarter: Thirteen and a quarter inches|十三又四分之一英寸
ThirteenAndThreeQuarters: Thirteen and three-quarters inches|十三又四分之三英寸
THROW: Ancient Magic Throw|古代魔法投掷
TIO_01: The Keepers' Wand|守护者的魔杖
TIO_01_02_MissionComplete: The Keepers' wand has been crafted|守护者的魔杖已经完成。
TIO_01_AncientWand_ExitShop_Journal01:
Mr Ollivander used the artefacts collected above the Pensieves to craft the Keepers' wand. I must return with it to Professor Fig.
奥利凡德先生使用在冥想盆上方收集的材料制作守护者魔杖。我必须回到菲戈那里并展示给他看。
TIO_01_AncientWand_ExitShop_TaskObj01: Return to Fig with the Keepers' Wand|将守护者之杖带给菲戈
TIO_01_AncientWand_LevelUp_TaskObj01: You must be level 28 to continue this story|你必须达到等级28才能继续这个故事
TIO_01_AncientWand_RookwoodFight_Journal:
Victor Rookwood and his lot have brought me to a secluded location and intend to take the Keepers' wand from me. I must fight for my life and escape.
维克托·卢克伍德和他的手下把我带到了一个僻静的地方，并打算从我手中夺走守护者的魔杖。我必须为我的生命而战并逃脱。
TIO_01_LighthouseSubGoal: Craft the Keepers' wand|重铸守护者之杖
TIO_01_MissionJournal: I have all the artefacts I need to craft the Keepers' wand.|我拥有制作守护者魔杖所需的所有组件。
TIO_01_TheFinalIngredient_QuestActive_St:
I need to visit Mr Ollivander in his shop and see if he can craft the Keepers' wand with the artefacts I acquired from their trials.
我需要造访奥利凡德先生的店，看看他能否用我从守护者的试炼中获得的材料制作守护者的魔杖。

I’ve been ambushed by Rookwood and his lot. They’ve taken me to a secure location and are trying to take the wand from me by force. I must fight for my life!
我被卢克伍德和他的人埋伏了。他们把我带到了一个受到监视的地方，并试图强行夺走我的魔杖。我必须为我的生命而战！
It’s time to finish things between Victor Rookwood and me – once and for all.|该了结我与维克托·卢克伍德之间的恩怨了，一劳永逸。
TIO_01_TheFinalIngredient_QuestActive_Ta: Consult with Gerbold Ollivander|咨询格尔博得·奥利凡德
Defend yourself from Rookwood's lot|保护自己免受卢克伍德帮的伤害
Defeat Victor Rookwood|击败维克多·卢克伍德
TIO_01_TheFinalIngredient_QuestAvailable:
The Keepers explained that the repository beneath Hogwarts can only be opened using a special wand made from the artefacts I collected after viewing their Pensieves. I need to visit Mr Ollivander and see if he can use the artefacts to craft the wand.
守护者们说出了我之前从冥想盆之上收集到的法器的真正用途：只有通过这些法器打造而成的特殊魔杖，才能够开启位于霍格沃茨地下的秘库。我需要拜访奥利凡德先生一趟，他也许能够使用法器制作出我需要的魔杖。
I need to consult with Mr Ollivander about the Keepers' wand.|我需要与奥利凡德先生商讨打造守护者之杖一事。
TIO_01_TheFinalIngredient_QuestComplete:
Mr Ollivander was able to use the artefacts I collected from above the Pensieves to craft the Keepers' wand. When I exited the wand shop, however, Rookwood ambushed me and demanded that I hand it over. When I refused, his lot took me to a remote location, where they attempted to take it from me by force. I knew that the fate of the wizarding world was in my hands, so against all odds, I defeated Rookwood and everyone he brought with him. Now, I need to bring the wand to Professor Fig and the Keepers in the Map Chamber.
我把从守护者试炼中收集到的材料带到奥利凡德先生的商店，他为我制作了守护者魔杖。但当我走出魔杖店时，卢克伍德伏击了我，并要求我交出魔杖。当我拒绝时，他的车把我带到了一个偏远的地方，他们试图用武力把它从我身上夺走。我知道魔法世界的命运掌握在我的手中，所以我用尽全力反击。我成功地击败了维克托·卢克伍德和他带来的所有人。现在，我需要回到地图密室，将魔杖展示给菲戈教授和守护者。
Toad_Byproduct_Desc:
The warts shed by the slimy Giant Purple Toads inhabiting the swamp region. Giant Purple Toad warts can be used to upgrade and assign traits to gear.
居住在沼泽地区的黏糊紫色巨蟾褪下的疣。紫色巨蟾的疣可用于强化装备和为其分配特质。
TombProtectorBoss_desc:
The ultimate test for those seeking the deepest secrets of Ancient Magic, these sentries can only be defeated through the same magic that powers them.

As they summon Ancient Magic into a powerful orb attack, the orb can be exploded to neutralise and repurpose that magic for your own benefit.
作为对那些寻觅古代魔法奥秘之人的终极试炼，只有驱动这些守卫的魔法才能够打败它们。

当它们使用古代魔法发动强力的魔球攻击时，你可以引爆魔球，并反过来利用其中蕴含的魔法。
TombProtectorBoss_tip_one_desc:
An exceptional challenge for those wishing to learn the deepest secrets of Ancient Magic, these sentries can only be defeated through the same magic that powers them.
作为对那些寻觅古代魔法奥秘之人的特殊试炼，只有驱动这些守卫的魔法才能够打败它们。
TombProtectorBoss_tip_two_desc:
As it summons Ancient Magic into a powerful orb attack, the orb can be neutralised with a spell of the correct type and its magic absorbed for future use.
当它召唤古代魔法发动强力的魔球攻击时，可用正确类型的咒语将球体中和，并将其魔法吸收以备将来使用。
TombProtectorGruntMelee_desc:
Created to protect the secrets of Ancient Magic, these animated statues strike hard and fast but are vulnerable to a variety of magic.

Disarming them is a useful technique, but the Ancient Magic that animates them will also form a new weapon to keep them fighting.
为守护古代魔法的奥秘而诞生的产物，这些雕像攻击迅猛，但容易受到各类魔法的伤害。

缴械是一种非常好用的技巧，但之后驱动它们的古代魔法将会塑造为全新的武器供它们战斗。
TombProtectorGruntMelee_tip_one_desc:
Created to protect the secrets of Ancient Magic, these animated statues strike hard and fast but are vulnerable to a variety of magic.
为守护古代魔法的奥秘而诞生的产物，这些雕像攻击迅猛，但容易受到各类魔法的伤害。
TombProtectorGruntMelee_tip_two_desc:
Disarming them is a useful technique, but the Ancient Magic that animates them will also form a new weapon to keep them fighting.
缴械是一种非常好用的技巧，但之后驱动它们的古代魔法将会塑造为全新的武器供它们战斗。
TombProtectorGruntRanged_desc:
Ancient Magic ensures that their weapon will always re-form in their hands after being thrown or disarmed, granting them the ability to attack from afar indefinitely.
哪怕是被缴械或者是将武器投掷了出去，古代魔法也能够为这些雕像创造全新的武器，这使得它们拥有了持续发动远程攻击的能力。
TombProtectorGruntRanged_tip_one_desc:
Ancient Magic ensures that their weapon will always re-form in their hands after being thrown or disarmed, granting them the ability to attack from afar indefinitely.
哪怕是被缴械或者是将武器投掷了出去，古代魔法也能够为这些雕像创造全新的武器，这使得它们拥有了持续发动远程攻击的能力。
TombProtectorMini: Pensieve Protector Grunt|冥想盆保护者
TombProtectorMinion_desc:
Use Expelliarmus to disarm these sentinels as they are more vulnerable once their weapons leave their hands.

Hitting a Pensieve Protector with a powerful attack after it has been disarmed will drop it to its knee, making it momentarily vulnerable to further attacks before it regains the strength to summon its weapon.
使用“除你武器”来缴械这些哨兵，因为一旦武器离开他们的手，他们就更容易受到攻击了。

用强力的攻击打中被缴械的冥想盆守卫，会使其跪倒在地，使其在恢复召唤武器的力量前暂时易受到追击。
TombProtectorMinion_tip_one_desc:
Use Expelliarmus to disarm these sentinels as they are more vulnerable once their weapons leave their hands.
使用“除你武器”来缴械这些哨兵，因为一旦武器离开他们的手，他们就更容易受到攻击了。
