Toy_Bogeyball_desc: A slimy ball made from bogeys that will distract any Puffskein for a good while|用鼻屎搓成的黏糊小球，对于蒲绒绒们来说倒是不可多得的玩具
Toy_Boneball_desc: A collection of bones that some beasts use to play|可以给某些野兽当玩具的骨头
Toy_BoneBallToy_desc: A collection of bones that Thestrals enjoying playing with|夜骐喜欢拿来玩的骨头
Toy_Bubble_desc: A bubble that cannot be popped and as such is a favourite toy of the unicorn|无论怎么戳都不会破的泡泡，因此拿来给独角兽玩是再合适不过
Toy_Goldball_desc:
A ball crafted from pure gold that should distract any Niffler for at least a moment
使用纯金锻造的小球，绝对能够吸引嗅嗅们的注意力
Toy_Moonball_desc: A ball that is almost weightless and intrigues every wide-eyed Mooncalf|几乎没有重量的球，并且吸引着每一只睁大眼睛的月痴兽
Toy_Quaffle_desc:
A Quidditch ball that Fwoopers, Jobberknolls and phoenixes seem to enjoy playing with
恶婆鸟、绝音鸟以及凤凰们都很喜欢玩的魁地奇球
Toy_Redball_desc: An old leather football that appeals to all beasts|受到所有野兽青睐的陈旧皮球
Toy_Tumbleweed_desc:
A dead plant that rolls around in the wind and is a favourite toy of the Diricawl
迎风翻滚的枯萎植物，是球遁鸟最喜欢的玩具
Toy_WizardDummy_desc:
A self-righting dummy of a Dark wizard which is a favourite toy of Graphorns and Hippogriffs
能够自动立起的黑巫师假人，紫角兽与鹰马翼兽最喜欢的玩具
Toy_Yarnball_desc: A ball made from yarn that seems to intrigue Kneazles a great deal|一团纱线球，交给猫狸子就能让它们玩得不亦乐乎
TR01_01_02_Defeatgoblins_Task: Defeat the Goblins Occupying Rowland's Camp|击败占领罗兰德营地的妖精
TR01_01_02_FindTheTrail_FindTheTrail_Tas: Find Rowland Oakes's campsite|找到罗兰德·欧克斯的营地
TR01_01_03_InvestigateTheCampsite_FindCl: Investigate the campsite to find a clue|调查营地以寻找线索
TR01_01_04_FindTheCastle_EnterCastle_Tas: Enter the goblin outpost|进入妖精前哨
TR01_01_04_FindTheCastle_FindCastle_Task: Use Rowland's map to follow his trail|使用罗兰德的地图追踪他的行迹
TR01_01_05_CastleBound_ExploreCastle_Tas: Explore the goblin outpost and find Rowland Oakes|探索妖精前哨并找到罗兰德·欧克斯
TR01_01_PostMission_QuestAvailable_TaskO: Talk to Adelaide|与阿德莱德交谈
TR01_01_TaleOfRowlandOakes_QuestAvailabl: Talk to Adelaide Oakes|与阿德莱德·欧克斯交谈
TR01_01_TheTaleofRowlandOakes_QuestTitle: The Tale of Rowland Oakes|罗兰德·欧克斯的故事
TR01_MissionTitle: The Tale of Rowland Oakes|罗兰德·欧克斯的故事
TR01_TaleOfRowlandOakes_QuestActive_Jour:
Adelaide Oakes seems worried about her uncle Rowland. He often does business with goblins and due to the rising tensions with Ranrok's Loyalists she’s worried something's happened to him. She says that his campsite's north of Hogwarts, past the river.
阿德莱德·欧克斯似乎很担心她的叔叔罗兰德。他经常与妖精做生意，由于与兰洛克的追随者的关系日益紧张，她担心他出了什么事。她说他的营地在霍格沃茨以北，且过了河。
TR01_TaleOfRowlandOakes_QuestActive_Step:
Adelaide mentioned that her uncle set up camp north of Hogwarts, past the river. I should start by looking for him there. 
阿德莱德提到她的叔叔在过了河的霍格沃茨以北附近设了营地。我应该从那里找他开始。

It looks as if this site was overrun by Loyalists. There must be a clue as to where they've taken him.
看来这个地点似乎被追随者占领了。肯定有线索可透露他们把他带到何处。

Rowland's map depicts a few key landmarks. Perhaps I can use them to help me work out where the goblins have taken him.
罗兰德的地图描绘了几个关键地标。也许我可以用它们来帮助我弄清楚妖精把他带到了哪里。
It appears the Loyalists have set up in the ruins depicted on the map.|看来追随者已在地图上描绘的废墟中创建起来了。
I've found the room of cells. Now to find which one holds Rowland.|我找到了牢房。现在要找出罗兰德被关在哪一间。

Rowland says that he heard goblins speak of a boiler door. Perhaps that's where I can find his wand.
罗兰德说他听到妖精谈到锅炉门。也许我能在该处找到他的魔杖。
I believe I've found Rowland's wand. Now to return it to him so we can escape.|我认为已找到罗兰德的魔杖。现在把魔杖还给他，这样我们就可以逃跑了。
TR01_TaleOfRowlandOakes_QuestActive_Task: Find Rowland Oakes’s campsite|找到罗兰德·欧克斯的营地
Search Rowland’s camp for clues|搜索罗兰德的营地来寻找线索
Use Rowland’s map to find where he was taken|使用罗兰德的地图找到他被带到的地方
Find Rowland Oakes in Airgidmal Castle|在艾吉模城堡找到罗兰德·欧克斯
Talk to Rowland through his cell door|通过牢房门与罗兰德交谈
Find Rowland’s wand|找到罗兰德的魔杖
Give Rowland his wand|给罗兰德他的魔杖
TR01_TaleOfRowlandOakes_QuestAvailable_S: Adelaide Oakes seems worried about someone. I should speak with her.|阿德莱德·欧克斯似乎很担心某人。我应该和她谈谈。
TR01_TaleOfRowlandOakes_QuestAvailable_T: Speak with Adelaide Oakes|与阿德莱德·欧克斯交谈
TR01_TaleOfRowlandOakes_QuestComplete_Jo:
Rowland Oakes had always traded with goblins, but due to the rise of Ranrok's Loyalists, his niece Adelaide was deeply worried for his safety. Her intuitions were proven correct as Rowland was captured by a group of goblins and brought to a cell hidden within some ruins. I managed to find his confiscated wand and free him from his cell. In the end he told me that this was all a result of a business agreement gone astray. A good lesson as to why one must honour their word.
罗兰德·欧克斯一直在与妖精交易，但由于兰洛克追随者的崛起，他的侄女阿德莱德对他的安全深感担忧。她的直觉果然是正确的，因为罗兰德被一群妖精俘虏，并带到了隐藏在废墟中的牢房。我设法找到他被夺走的魔杖，并将他从牢房中解救出来。最后他告诉我，这都是商业协议误入歧途的结果。对于人必须信守诺言，这是个很好的教训。
TrainingDummyCaptain: Shielded Practice Dummy|带盾的练习假人
TransferringSaveData_desc: We're transferring your save data, please wait…|我们正在传输你的存储数据，请稍候…
TransferringSaveData_Title: PS4™ Console Save Data transfer in progress|PS4™主机存储数据传输中
Transfig_Dugbog_Fail: Scaly Dugbog Creamer|带鳞泥怪奶盅
Transfig_Dugbog_Success: Pristine Dugbog Creamer|原始泥怪奶盅
Transfig_Livestock_Fail: Leathery Livestock Teapot|皮革家畜茶壶
Transfig_Livestock_Success: Pristine Livestock Teapot|原始家畜茶壶
Transfig_Rodent_Success: Pristine Rodent Cup|原始嚙齿动物杯
Transfig_Wolf_Fail: Furry Wolf Sugar Bowl|毛茸茸狼糖碗
Transfig_Wolf_Success: Pristine Wolf Sugar Bowl|原始狼糖碗
Transfiguration_Class_desc:
The class at Hogwarts focusing on transfiguring the physical properties of objects
霍格沃茨这门课程主要教授变幻物体的物理特性
Transformation_desc:
Alter the physical forms and features of items when cast within the Room of Requirement
在有求必应屋施放时，将改变目标物体的外形与功能
Transformation_gameplay_desc:
Transforms objects and enemies into alternate forms, whether puzzle solutions or harmless knickknacks
这种咒语能够将物体与敌人变形为谜题答案或者是人畜无害的小摆件
TransformationOverland_desc:
Transforms objects and enemies into alternate forms, whether puzzle solutions or harmless knickknacks
这种咒语能够将物体与敌人变形为谜题答案或者是人畜无害的小摆件
Troll_A_1_desc:
Mountain Trolls are rather stupid magical beasts that possesses intense strength.
巨怪是相当愚蠢的魔法野兽，他们拥有着强大的力量。
Troll_Amored_desc: An armoured troll|一头装甲巨怪
Troll_Armored_2_desc:
Watch out for the Fighter Troll's forehand-backhand club swing pattern, as both attacks will break right through common Shield Charms. Dodging is the safest defence from such attacks. 

Distance will not keep one safe from an angry troll, as they will ferociously charge at their targets. 

After the troll slams its club on the ground, flipping it upward will have greater leverage than usual, sending the club into the troll's face for a powerful blow. 

Hitting a troll with its own boulder will catch it off guard and make it more vulnerable to follow-up attacks.
与巨怪斗士战斗时一定要小心它们挥舞大棒时的正手与反手动作，这两种攻击都足以摧毁普通的护盾魔咒。闪躲是应对此类攻击的最佳防御选择。

愤怒的巨怪将会不顾一切地朝目标发起冲锋，因此一味地后退并无法幸免于难。

当巨怪对着地面狠砸大棒之后，使其上下翻转将发挥奇效，受到魔咒影响的大棒将反过来痛击巨怪的脑袋。

如果巨怪被自己的石块击中，它们将暂时无法进行防御，这时候便是发动后续攻击的最佳时机。
Troll_Armored_3_desc:
The troll's forehand-backhand club swing pattern attacks will break through common Shield Charms. Dodging is the safest defence.

Distance will not protect against an angry troll, as it will tear up chunks of earth and throw them at its targets.

After the troll slams its club on the ground with both hands, flipping it upward with Flipendo will have greater leverage than usual, sending the club into the troll's face for a powerful blow.

Hitting a troll with its own boulder will catch it off guard and make it more vulnerable to follow-up attacks.
巨怪挥舞大棒时的正手与反手动作足以摧毁普通的护盾魔咒。闪躲是最佳的防御选择。

怒不可遏的巨怪将会原地抓起巨大的土块并朝目标投掷，因此一味地后退并无法幸免于难。

当巨怪使用双手对着地面狠砸大棒之后，通过“退敌三尺”使其上下翻转将发挥奇效，受到魔咒影响的大棒将反过来痛击巨怪的脑袋。

如果巨怪被自己的石块击中，它们将暂时无法进行防御，这时候便是发动后续攻击的最佳时机。

Troll_Crate_desc:
A rather violent combination of crates, barrels, and bits of furniture conjured up for fun by Fastidio the poltergeist
箱子、桶子还有其他乱七八糟的家具的胡乱组合，调皮捣蛋鬼“烦人精”变幻出来的搞坏道具
Troll_Death_desc:
These monstrosities are conjured by Death himself. Only the most powerful magic can overcome them.
死神亲自变幻来的庞大怪物。只有最强大的魔法才能打败这些敌人。

TrollLair_desc: A den inhabited by Trolls|巨怪居住的巢穴
TrollMucus_desc:
Thick mucus gathered from trolls. The mucus is used as a thickener for Invisibility Potion.
从巨怪身上采集来的浓稠黏液。调配隐形魔药时会将这种黏液作为增稠剂使用
TTR_01_01_ReturnFamilyCrest_Journal:
Samantha asked me to return the Dale Family Crest to its rightful resting place on a sarcophagus belonging to her ancestor, the great Marmaduke Gilbertus Dale, a famed Herbologist from the 1300s. Unfortunately, her brother, William, didn't believe her when she said the tomb containing Marmaduke's sarcophagus was cursed and venturing inside, found himself with beets for feet. She believes replacing the crest is the only way to restore her brother's feet. I offered to help her.
萨曼莎请我将戴尔家族徽章归还到它应有的安息之地，也就是她的祖先暨1300年代著名的草药学家，即伟大的马默杜克·吉尔伯特斯·戴尔的石棺上。不幸的是，她的兄弟威廉不相信她说装有马默杜克石棺的坟墓受到诅咒，并在冒险进入里面时发现自己的脚变成甜菜。她认为更换徽章是恢复她兄弟双脚的唯一方法。我主动提出要帮助她。
TTR_01_01_ReturnFamilyCrest_Task: Return Marmaduke's crest to the Dale Family Tomb|将马默杜克的徽章归还至戴尔家族坟墓
TTR_01_02_ReporttoSamantha_Task: Speak with Samantha Dale|与萨曼莎戴尔交谈
TTR_01_ADescendantsRequest_QuestActive_S:
Samantha noted that her ancestral family tomb is located east of Brocburrow. I should look there. 
萨曼莎指出，她的家族墓穴位于布洛克巴罗以东。我应该看看那里。

I’ve found the Dale ancestral tomb. Now to go in and replace the family crest to remove the curse.
我找到了戴尔家族墓穴。现在进入并更换家族徽章以粉碎诅咒。

Luckily, entering the tomb did not turn my feet to beets. I should search the tomb for where this crest belongs.
幸运的是，进入坟墓并没有把我的脚变成甜菜。我应该在坟墓里寻找这个徽章所属的地方。

I was able to return the Dale family crest to its rightful place within the tomb, even with a terrible troll nearby. Time to update Samantha.
纵使附近有个可怕的巨怪，我还是成功将戴尔家族的徽章放回坟墓中的应有位置。该告知萨曼莎了。
TTR_01_ADescendantsRequest_QuestActive_T: Find the Dale Family Tomb|找到戴尔家族的坟墓
Enter the Dale Family Tomb|进入戴尔家族的坟墓
Return Marmaduke's Crest|归还马默杜克的徽章
Return to Samantha|回到萨曼莎那边
TTR_01_ADescendantsRequest_QuestAvailabl:
Samantha Dale is distraught about something regarding her brother. I've heard she's looking for me. I should find her and see what she needs.
萨曼莎·戴尔因为自己兄弟的事情而忧心忡忡。听说她在找我。也许我该去和她见一面。

Rumour has it Samantha Dale is having a problem with her brother William. I ought to see if I can help her.
有传言说萨曼莎·戴尔与她的兄弟威廉之间有困难。我该看看是否能协助她。
Talk to Samantha Dale|与萨曼莎·戴尔交谈
TTR_01_ADescendantsRequest_QuestComplete:
After venturing inside the tomb belonging to Samantha's ancestor, Marmaduke Gilbertus Dale, I was able to replace the crest. Of course it took bypassing a troll and a bit of Devil's Snare to do it. Yet Samantha was overjoyed when she found out the curse had been reversed. Hopefully having beets for feet will teach her brother a lesson.
在进入属于萨曼莎祖先马默杜克·吉尔伯特斯·戴尔的坟墓后，我成功更换徽章。当然，这需要绕过巨怪和一些魔鬼网才能做到。不过，当萨曼莎发现诅咒被逆转时，她欣喜若狂。希望脚变成甜菜可以给她兄弟一个教训。
TTR_SamanthaCrying_Task: Find Samantha Dale|找到萨曼莎·戴尔
TUT_alohomora1_desc: Approach and interact with a lock to cast the Unlocking Charm, Alohomora . 靠近并与锁互动，以施放解锁魔咒“阿拉霍洞开”㉿。
TUT_ArrestoMomentum_desc:
Arresto Momentum slows the motion of enemies and objects. The larger the target, the less effect the spell will have on it.
“减震止速”会减慢敌人和物体的运动速度。目标越大，法术对其的影响就越小。
TUT_BulletinBoard_desc: The basic function of the notice board|公告栏的基本功能
TUT_Combat_desc: The basics of combat|战斗基础
TUT_Conjuration_desc: How to conjure objects in the Room of Requirement|如何在有求必应屋中变幻物体
TUT_Descendo_desc:
Descendo is a Force spell that moves objects downwards and slams enemies to the ground, causing a shockwave.
“应声落地”是一种强力咒语，可将物体向下移动并将敌人猛击到地面，从而产生冲击波。
TUT_Diffindo_desc:
Diffindo slashes enemies and objects within a short range in front of the caster.
“四分五裂”将会切割施法者面前近距离范围内的敌人与物体。
TUT_DismountBroom_desc: {Mount_Dismount} to dismount and descend from your broom.| 以下降并解除扫帚的骑乘。
TUT_Display_AccioBlue_desc: Break through Violet Shields with Force spells like the Summoning Charm, Accio . Target lock {LockOn} lets you track enemies without aiming. Use {UMGMapScreenMove_X} to change targets while locked. 使用强力咒语㉿ 来打破淡紫色护盾，例如召唤魔咒“飞来咒” ㉿。 目标锁定 可让你无需瞄准即可追踪敌人。使用 在锁定时变更目标。
TUT_Display_AccioBlue_desc2: Hold {SpellModifierButton} to bring up your Spell Set and cast Accio . 长按 唤出咒语组并施放飞来咒㉿。
TUT_Display_AccioBlue_desc|SWITCH: Hold {SpellModifierButton} to bring up your Spell Set and cast Accio . 长按 唤出咒语组并施放飞来咒㉿。
TUT_Display_AccioBluePC_desc: Break through Violet Shields with Force spells like the Summoning Charm, Accio . Target lock {LockOn} lets you track enemies without aiming. Use {CameraMove_X} to change targets while locked. 使用强力咒语㉿ 来打破淡紫色护盾，例如召唤魔咒“飞来咒” ㉿。 目标锁定 可让你无需瞄准即可追踪敌人。使用 在锁定时变更目标。
TUT_Display_AccioBluePC_desc2: Tap the assigned key to cast Accio .|点击所分配的的按键来施放“飞来咒”㉿。
TUT_Display_AccioBluePC_desc|SWITCH: Tap the assigned key to cast Accio .|点击所分配的的按键来施放“飞来咒”㉿。
TUT_display_AccioCombat: Accio in Combat|战斗中的飞来咒
TUT_display_ActionDiamond_desc1:
To cast additional spells, press and hold {SpellModifierButton}. With {SpellModifierButton} held, press the face button {SpellButton_Right}{SpellButton_Left}{SpellButton_Top}{SpellButton_Bottom} associated with the spell you would like to cast.
要施放更多咒语，请按住。按住后，再按下要施放的咒语所对应的按键。
TUT_display_ActionDiamond_desc1|PS4:
To cast additional spells, press and hold {SpellModifierButton}. With {SpellModifierButton} held, press the face button {SpellButton_Right}{SpellButton_Left}{SpellButton_Top}{SpellButton_Bottom} associated with the spell you would like to cast.
要施放更多咒语，请按住。按住后，再按下要施放的咒语所对应的按键。
TUT_display_ActionDiamond_desc1|PS5:
To cast additional spells, press and hold {SpellModifierButton}. With {SpellModifierButton} held, press the face button {SpellButton_Right}{SpellButton_Left}{SpellButton_Top}{SpellButton_Bottom} associated with the spell you would like to cast.
要施放更多咒语，请按住。按住后，再按下要施放的咒语所对应的按键。
TUT_display_ActionDiamond_desc1|SWITCH:
To cast additional spells, press and hold {SpellModifierButton}. With {SpellModifierButton} held, press the face button {SpellButton_Right}{SpellButton_Left}{SpellButton_Top}{SpellButton_Bottom} associated with the spell you would like to cast.
要施放更多咒语，请按住。按住后，再按下要施放的咒语所对应的按键。
TUT_display_ActionDiamond_desc1|XBOXONE:
To cast additional spells, press and hold {SpellModifierButton}. With {SpellModifierButton} held, press the face button {SpellButton_Right}{SpellButton_Left}{SpellButton_Top}{SpellButton_Bottom} associated with the spell you would like to cast.
要施放更多咒语，请按住。按住后，再按下要施放的咒语所对应的按钮。
TUT_display_ActionDiamond_desc1|XSX:
To cast additional spells, press and hold {SpellModifierButton}. With {SpellModifierButton} held, press the face button {SpellButton_Right}{SpellButton_Left}{SpellButton_Top}{SpellButton_Bottom} associated with the spell you would like to cast.
要施放更多咒语，请按住。按住后，再按下要施放的咒语所对应的按钮。
TUT_display_ActionSelectionMenu_desc1:
To equip and use other spells and items on your Spell Set, press and hold {UI_NextActionBar} to open the Spell Selection Menu.
若要装备并使用咒语组上的其他咒语及物品，按下并按住以打开“咒语选择”菜单。
TUT_display_ActionSelectionMenu_desc2:
From this menu you can also change your common actions for Adventure Mode, Social Mode, and Room of Requirement Mode to make sure you have quick access to your preferred actions. 

To cycle between the different modes, press {UMGLeftShoulder} or {UMGRightShoulder}. Some actions and items are only available in certain modes.
在这个菜单里，你还可以将你的普通行动改为冒险模式、社交模式以及“有求必应屋”模式，确保自己能在需要的时候迅速做出想要的反映。

若想在不同模式下循环，按下或即可。某些行动和物品仅能在特定模式下可用。
TUT_display_ActionSelectionMenu_desc3: To assign an action to a common action slot, select which mode you would like to assign it to using . Then, hover over the desired action and press {UMGRightTrigger}. You can reassign and change these at any time. 若要将一个行动分配给一个普通行动栏位，通过㉿选择你想要分配的模式。然后，挑选想要的行动并按下。 任何时候你都可以重新分配及更改该设置。
TUT_Display_AimAndShoot_desc: {AM_AimMode} to free aim.| 以自由瞄准。
TUT_display_Alohomora_desc: Approach and interact with a lock to cast the Unlocking Charm, Alohomora . 靠近并与锁互动，以施放解锁魔咒“阿拉霍洞开”㉿。
TUT_Display_AlohomoraMinigame:
Use {Generic_Move} and {Generic_CamMove} to move the sparks and rotate the dials until both corresponding gears are activated to release the lock.
使用和来移动火星并旋转刻度盘，直到两个相应的装置均被激活，得以开锁。
TUT_Display_AlohomoraMinigamePC:
Use {Alohomora_KB_Outer_Left}{Alohomora_KB_Outer_Right} and {Alohomora_KB_Inner_Left}{Alohomora_KB_Inner_Right} to move the sparks and rotate the dials until both corresponding gears are activated to release the lock.
使用和来移动火星并旋转刻度盘，直到两个相应的装置均被激活，得以开锁。
Tut_Display_Alteration_Desc:
The Altering Spell can be used to alter the physical form and features of items within the Room of Requirement.
“改变咒语”可用于改变“有求必应屋”内物品的物理形态和特征。
TUT_display_AMBar_desc1:
Performing actions such as striking enemies and deflecting attacks will slowly fill your blue Ancient Magic Meter at the bottom right side of the screen. A fully-filled meter will allow you to cast powerful Ancient Magic.
执行打击敌人与弹开攻击等动作时，将会慢慢填满屏幕右下角的蓝色古代魔法计量。计量充满时可让你施展强大的古代魔法。
TUT_Display_AMMeter: Ancient Magic Meter|古代魔法计量
TUT_Display_AMMeter2: Combo & Ancient Magic Meters|连击与古代魔法计量
TUT_Display_AMMeter2_desc:
When at least one segment of your Ancient Magic Meter is full, you can cast devastating Ancient Magic attacks that deal massive damage and break Shield Charms.

Tap {UMGLeftShoulder} + {CM_Gamepad_RightShoulder} when you see the prompt over an enemy's head.
当你的古代魔法计量至少有一段已满时，你就可以施放毁灭性的古代魔法攻击，造成巨大伤害并打破护盾魔咒。

当你看到敌人头上出现提示时，点击 + 。
TUT_Display_AMMeter2PC_desc:
When at least one segment of your Ancient Magic Meter is full, you can cast devastating Ancient Magic attacks that deal massive damage and break Shield Charms.

Tap {AM_CriticalFinisher} when you see the prompt over an enemy's head.
当你的古代魔法计量至少有一段已满时，你就可以施放毁灭性的古代魔法攻击，造成巨大伤害并打破护盾魔咒。

当你看到敌人头上出现提示时，点击。
TUT_Display_AMMeter_desc:
Your gift of Ancient Magic accumulates by successfully attacking or taking damage.

Successful 10+ hit combos will begin generating Ancient Magic Powerups. Collecting these will greatly fill your Ancient Magic Meter and recover a small amount of health.
你的古代魔法能力会通过成功的攻击或受到伤害来获得增强。

成功的连击十次以上将开始产生古代魔法充能。收集它们将会极大的填充你的古代魔法能量槽并恢复少量的生命值。
TUT_display_AMSpells_desc1:
When the Ancient Magic Meter is full, an icon will appear above a highlighted target. Tap {UMGFaceButtonLeft} to strike the foe by invoking powerful Ancient Magic.
古代魔法计量充满时，高亮的目标上方会出现一个图标。点击  来召唤强大的古代魔法打击敌人。
TUT_Display_AMSpellTriggering_desc: Tap {UMGFaceButtonLeft} Ancient Magic |点击 古代魔法 ㉿
TUT_Display_AncientMagicSystemic_desc: Discover more Ancient Magic Hotspots and complete their challenges to increase your Ancient Magic Meter capacity. 发现更多古代魔法热点㉿并完成其挑战，以增加你古代魔法计量的容量。
TUT_display_AncientMagicThrow_desc1: {OppugnoButton} Ancient Magic Throw| 古代魔法投掷
TUT_Display_Assignments_desc1: Speak to Professor Ronen to receive your first assignment . Assignments are types of quests given to you by Hogwarts Professors that, when completed, reward you with new spells. The reward for completing your first assignment will be the Mending Charm, Reparo , which is required to complete other quests. You can track assignments and their progress in the Quests Menu of your Field Guide. 与罗南教授交谈，获得第一份作业㉿。 作业是霍格沃茨教授交给你的各种类型的任务，完成后会获得新的咒语作为奖励。完成首个任务的奖励将会是修复咒“修复如初”㉿，同时这也是完成其他任务所必须的咒语。 你可以在实战指南的任务菜单中追踪作业及其进度。
TUT_Display_AutoAim_Desc1: Use {Generic_CamMove} to direct yourself and change your focused target.|通过定位你的方向，并更改你所聚焦的目标。
TUT_display_AutoTargetConsole2_desc:
Use your camera {Generic_CamMove} to select an active target.

Some players prefer to select targets and move the avatar with the same thumbstick, by disabling Camera-Relative Targeting in settings.
使用你的镜头  选择一个作用中的目标。

有些玩家偏好通过在设定中禁用“基于镜头瞄准”来选择目标，并使用相同的摇杆移动角色形象。

使用你的镜头  选择一个作用中的目标。

有些玩家偏好通过在设定中禁用“基于镜头瞄准”来选择目标，并使用相同的操作杆移动角色形象。

有些玩家偏好通过在设定中禁用“基于镜头瞄准”来选择目标，并使用相同的操作杆移动角色形象。

使用你的镜头  选择一个作用中的目标。

有些玩家偏好通过在设定中禁用“基于镜头瞄准”来选择目标，并使用相同的摇杆移动角色形象。

Some players prefer to select targets and move the avatar with the same thumbstick, by disabling Camera-Relative Targeting in settings.
使用你的镜头  选择一个作用中的目标。

有些玩家偏好通过在设定中禁用“基于镜头瞄准”来选择目标，并使用相同的摇杆移动角色形象。

Use your camera {Generic_CamMove} to select an active target.

Some players prefer to select targets and move the avatar with the same thumbstick, by disabling Camera-Relative Targeting in settings.
使用你的镜头  选择一个作用中的目标。

有些玩家偏好通过在设定中禁用“基于镜头瞄准”来选择目标，并使用相同的摇杆移动角色形象。
TUT_Display_AutoTargetConsole_desc: Point {Generic_Move} towards onscreen targets to rapidly select between them.|将  指向屏幕上的目标以在它们之间快速选择。
TUT_Display_AutoTargetPC_desc: Use your camera {Generic_CamMove} to select an active target.|使用镜头来选择一个活动目标。
TUT_display_BasicCastReminder_desc: Tap {Stupefy} repeatedly to use Basic Cast to attack and defeat your enemies.|反复点击  以使用基础施法攻击并打败你的敌人。
TUT_Display_BeastBrush_desc: The Beast Petting Brush is used to nurture magical beasts. Tap {UMGActionScreenToggle} and then assign the Beast Petting Brush to your Spell Set. 野兽抚摸刷是用来照料魔法野兽的道具之一。 点击 ，然后将野兽抚摸刷㉿分配给你的咒语组。
TUT_Display_BeastBrush_desc|SWITCH: The Beast Petting Brush is used to nurture magical beasts. Tap {UMGActionScreenToggle} and then hover over the Beast Petting Brush , hold {Stupefy}, and drag it to your Spell Set. 野兽抚摸刷用来照料魔法野兽。 点击，然后将光标停留在野兽抚摸刷㉿上，按住并将其拖曳至你的咒语组。
TUT_Display_BeastBrushPC_desc: The Beast Petting Brush is used to nurture magical beasts. Tap {UMGActionScreenToggle} and then hover over the Beast Petting Brush , hold {Stupefy}, and drag it to your Spell Set. 野兽抚摸刷用来照料魔法野兽。 点击，然后将光标停留在野兽抚摸刷㉿上，按住并将其拖曳至你的咒语组。
TUT_Display_BeastCapturing_desc2: Use the nab-sack while in range of a Puffskein to rescue the beast.|靠近蒲绒绒后使用拿袋解锁野兽。
TUT_Display_BeastDens_desc: Beast habitats can be found at different locations in the world. Wherever there is a beast habitat, you can be sure to find magical beasts nearby. 野兽栖息地 ㉿ 可以在世界各处找到。哪里有野兽栖息地，就一定能在附近找到魔法野兽。
TUT_Display_BeastFeed_desc: Beast Feed is used to feed and nurture magical beasts. Tap {UMGActionScreenToggle} and then assign the Beast Feed to your Spell Set. 野兽饲料用于喂养和照料魔法野兽。 点击 ，然后将野兽饲料 ㉿ 分配至你的咒语组。
TUT_Display_BeastFeed_desc|SWITCH: Beast Feed is used to feed and nurture magical beasts. Tap {UMGActionScreenToggle} and then hover over the Beast Feed hold {Stupefy} and drag it to your Spell Set. 野兽饲料用来喂养和照料魔法野兽。 点击，然后将光标停留在野兽饲料㉿上，按住并将其拖曳至你的咒语组。
TUT_Display_BeastFeedPC_desc: Beast Feed is used to feed and nurture magical beasts. Tap {UMGActionScreenToggle} and then hover over the Beast Feed hold {Stupefy} and drag it to your Spell Set. 野兽饲料用来喂养和照料魔法野兽。 点击，然后将光标停留在野兽饲料㉿上，按住并将其拖曳至你的咒语组。
TUT_Display_BeastMaterials_desc: When magical beasts are nurtured, they provide materials with magical properties. Your Beast Feed and Beast Petting Brush are some of the ways to nurture your beasts. Tap {UMGActionScreenToggle} and then assign the Beast Feed and the Beast Petting Brush to your Spell Set. 魔法野兽被照料时，会提供具有魔法属性的材料。 你的野兽饲料㉿和野兽抚摸刷㉿均是照料野兽的方式。 点击 ，然后将野兽饲料 ㉿ 和野兽抚摸刷㉿分配至你的咒语组。
TUT_Display_BeastMaterialsPC_desc: When magical beasts are nurtured, they provide materials with magical properties. Your Beast Feed and Beast Petting Brush are some of the ways to nurture your beasts. Tap {UMGActionScreenToggle} and then hover over the Beast Feed and the Beast Petting Brush hold {Stupefy} and drag them to your Spell Set. 照料魔法野兽的时候，它们会提供具有魔法属性的材料。 你的野兽饲料㉿和野兽抚摸刷㉿是照料野兽的其中两种方式。 点击，然后将光标停留在野兽饲料㉿和野兽抚刷㉿上，按住，然后分别将其拖曳至你的咒语组。
TUT_Display_BeastsFullSystemic_desc:
Your beast inventory is full. Visit the Room of Requirement or Brood and Peck in Hogsmeade to release beasts safely.
你的野兽库存已满。访问“有求必应屋”或霍格莫德的“珍禽异兽”，来安全地释放野兽。
TUT_Display_BlueShieldCharms: Violet Shield Charms|淡紫色护盾魔咒
TUT_Display_Bombarda_desc: The Exploding Charm, Bombarda , is a heavy damage spell that causes an explosive blast in a large area. 爆炸魔咒“大爆爆”㉿是一种重度伤害咒语，可在大范围内造成爆炸。
TUT_display_BroomFlight_desc1:
{Generic_Move} to move in a direction.

{MountVertical} to ascend and descend.
来向某个方向移动。

来上升和下降。
TUT_display_BroomFlight_desc2: Fly up and down with {MountVertical}.|通过向上和向下飞。
TUT_display_BroomFlight_desc3: Move camera left and right with {Generic_CamMove_X}.|通过向左和向右移动镜头。
TUT_display_BroomFlight_desc4: Hold {BroomAcceleration} to go faster and enter forward flight.|按住加速，并向前飞行。
TUT_display_BroomFlight_desc5: {BroomBoost} for a burst of speed while in forward flight.|通过可在向前飞行时速度爆发。
TUT_Display_BroomRaceLeaderboard_desc:
Return to the podium to challenge other racers and advance your way through the ranks of the leaderboard. 
回到领奖台挑战其他选手，并在排行榜中节节攀升。
TUT_display_CallYourBroom: Calling Your Broom|召唤你的扫帚
TUT_Display_CharacterStats_desc: Your current defence and offence are displayed at the top right of the screen. 你目前的防御㉿ 和进攻 ㉿会显示在屏幕的右上角。
TUT_display_CharmedCompass_desc: The Charmed Map summons a guide. This guide will take the shortest route to your current objective. To summon the guide, equip the map to your Spell Set and activate it. Activate your guide to find your destination. 魔法地图㉿可为你召唤一位向导。该向导将会以最短的路程把你带到你的当前目标处。若想召唤向导，在咒语组中装备地图并将其启用。 启动你的向导，从而找到你的目的地。
TUT_display_CharmedCompass_desc1: You can also manually activate your Charmed Map by equipping and casting it from your Spell Set. 你也可以手动启动你的魔法地图㉿，通过将其装备并从咒语组中施放即可。
TUT_display_Climb_desc: Tap {ClimbButton} near walls and ledges to climb.|在靠近墙壁和壁架时，点击进行攀爬。
TUT_display_Climb_desc1: Tap {ClimbButton} near walls and ledges to climb.|在靠近墙壁和壁架时，点击进行攀爬。
TUT_display_CompanionAssign_desc1:
In addition to unlocking Fast Travel points on your map, Floo Flames allow you to assign companions when you interact with them.
除了解锁地图上的快速穿梭点外，飞路之焰还允许你在与其互动时分配同伴。
TUT_display_CompendiumTracking: Wizard's Field Guide|巫师的实战指南
TUT_display_CompendiumTracking_desc1: Any Field Guide entries you unlock are kept in your Wizard's Field Guide.|你解锁的任何实战指南条目都将保存在《巫师的实战指南》中。
TUT_display_CompendiumTracking_desc2:
You can reference your new or updated Field Guide entries by navigating to the Wizard's Field Guide section in the Start Menu at any time.
任何时候，你都可通过开始菜单中的《巫师的实战指南》处，查看你新获得或更新过的实战指南条目。
TUT_display_CompendiumTracking_desc3:
Press {UMGFaceButtonLeft} when hovering over someone's Field Guide entry or select Location when within someone's Field Guide entry to begin tracking them.
当悬停在某人的实战指南条目时按下，或在其实战指南条目内选择“地点”，即可开始对其追踪。
TUT_Display_Confringo_desc:
The Blasting Curse, Confringo, fires an explosive blast. Certain Talents can alter its effect on enemies.
爆炸诅咒“霹雳爆炸”可发射爆炸性的冲击。某些天赋可以改变它对敌人的效果。
TUT_display_ConvertMoon_desc:
Hold [LT icon] to aim at objects and then cast Evanesco [conjuration icon] to convert them to moonstone.
按住 [LT icon] 瞄准物体，然后施放“消失不见” [conjuration icon] 将其转化为月石。
TUT_Display_CreatureManagement_desc1: Tap {CreatureManagementButton} to open the Beast Management Menu.|点击  来打开野兽管理菜单。
TUT_Display_CreatureManagement_desc2: Select a Puffskein, Jobberknoll, and Mooncalf to add to the vivarium.|选择蒲绒绒、绝音鸟以及月痴兽并将它们添加至饲养所。
TUT_Display_CrossedWands_desc2: Engaging in Side Quests and Activities like Crossed Wands Club provide opportunities to gain XP, find more Field Guide Pages and unlock new Floo Flames. 参与支线任务 ㉿ 与“决斗之杖俱乐部” ㉿ 等活动来获得经验值，找到更多实战指南书页 ㉿ 并解锁新的飞路之焰 ㉿。
TUT_display_CustomSpellLoadouts_desc1:
Customise your Spell Set with the spells that best favour your particular combat preferences. Press {UMGActionScreenToggle} to open the Spell Selection Menu. 
使用最适合你特定战斗偏好的咒语，来自定义你的咒语组。按下  来打开咒语选择菜单。
TUT_Display_DepulsoUnlocked_desc: The Banishing Charm, Depulso , is a Force spell that pushes enemies and objects away from the caster. 驱逐魔咒“统统飞走”㉿是一种强力咒语，可将敌人和物体推离施法者。
TUT_Display_Disillusionment_desc: Use Disillusionment avoid being detected in off-limit areas. 使用“幻身”㉿，避免在禁区被发现。
TUT_Display_DodgeUnblockable: Dodging Unblockable Attacks|躲避不可格挡的攻击
TUT_Display_DodgeUnblockable_desc: {DodgeAndBlinkButton} Dodge unblockable attacks.|闪避不可格挡的攻击。
TUT_Display_DodgeUnblockable_desc2: Unblockable attacks require you to dodge and cannot be parried.|不可格挡的攻击需要进行闪避，并且无法被招架。
TUT_display_DWMages: Dark Wizard Sorcerers|黑巫师魔法师
TUT_display_DWMages_desc1:
The Sorcerer is the most unique class of the Dark wizard ranks as they utilise special skills and attacks. They protect themselves with Violet Shield Charms which can be broken with Force spells such as Accio, Depulso or Descendo. 
魔法师是黑巫师领域中最独特的职业，因为他们使用较为特殊的技能与攻击。他们用“淡紫色护盾魔咒”保护自己，可用如“飞来咒”、“统统飞走”或“应声落地”等强力咒语打破。
TUT_display_DWSnipers_desc1:
Dark Wizard Snipers prefer to attack from afar with distinct spells. Accio is a great way to remove them from their positions of safety.
黑巫师狙击手更喜欢用不同的法术从远处攻击。“飞来咒”是将他们从安全位置处移开的好方法。
TUT_display_DWSoldiers_desc1:
Dark Wizard Soldiers are a slightly stronger wizard class who use Yellow Shield Charms. Control spells such as Levioso will break these shields as will a successful Parry-Counterattack. Ancient Magic will always break any shield type as well.
黑巫师士兵是一种使用“黄护盾魔咒”稍强一些的巫师职业。像“啦唯啊萨”这样的控制咒语可打破这类护盾，成功的“招架反击”也同样适用。古代魔法则必定会破坏任何类型的护盾。
TUT_Display_EnemyCollections_desc: Visit the Collections Menu to learn about enemy abilities and weaknesses. |查看收藏菜单，了解各个敌人的能力与弱点。
TUT_display_EquippingGear_desc1: Highlighting a piece of gear will display its stats.|高亮一件装备将显示其统计数据。
TUT_display_EquippingGear_input: Equip a Robe with the {UMGFaceButtonBottom}.|通过穿上一件长袍。
TUT_Display_EquippingSpells_desc1:
You have learned enough spells that you'll need to equip Incendio to your Spell Set. To do this, you need to swap it with a different spell.
你已经学会了足够的咒语，而你还需要将“火焰熊熊”装备到你的咒语组上。为此，你需要将其换成不同的咒语。
TUT_Display_EquippingSpells_desc2:
You have learned enough spells that you'll need to equip Incendio to your Spell Set. To do this, you need to swap it with a different spell.

Hover over Incendio and hold {Stupefy}.
你已经学会了足够的咒语，而你还需要将“火焰熊熊”装备到你的咒语组上。为此，你需要将其换成不同的咒语。

悬停在“火焰熊熊”上并按住 。
TUT_Display_EquippingSpellsGamepad_desc:
To use a spell or item, you must first add it to your Spell Set. Add Incendio now.

Hover over Incendio, hold {Stupefy} and tap the corresponding face button of where you would like to place it.
要使用咒语或物品，你必须先将其添加到你的咒语组中。现在让我们来添加“火焰熊熊”。

悬停在“火焰熊熊”上，按住  并点击你想要放置的按钮。
TUT_Display_EquippingSpellsPC_desc:
To use a spell or item, you must first add it to your Spell Set. Add Incendio now.

Hover over Incendio, hold {Stupefy} and drag it to your Spell Set.
要使用咒语或物品，你必须先将其添加到你的咒语组中。现在让我们来添加“火焰熊熊”。

悬停在“火焰熊熊”上，按住  并将其拖进你的咒语组。
TUT_display_FastTravel_desc1: You must return to your common room for the night. Access the map.|你必须回到你的公共休息室过夜。请前往地图。
TUT_display_FastTravel_desc2: Select the Hogwarts Map button to switch to the Hogwarts map.|选择霍格沃茨地图按钮，以切换到霍格沃茨地图。
TUT_display_FastTravel_desc3: Fast Travel to your Common Room|快速穿梭至你的公共休息室
TUT_display_FastTravel_desc4: Fast travel to your Common Room {UMGFaceButtonLeft}|快速旅行至你的公共休息室
TUT_Display_FastTravel_WEK_desc1: You've discovered a Floo Flames Fast Travel point. You can open the Map at any time to Fast Travel to any discovered Floo Flames . 你发现了一个飞路之焰 ㉿ 快速穿梭点。 你可以随时打开地图，快速前往任何已发现的飞路之焰 ㉿。
TUT_Display_FastTravel_WEK_desc10: On the left side of the map, you'll find the student living quarters. The purple marker is your current location. 在地图的左侧你可以找到学生生活区。紫色标记 ㉿ 是你当前的位置。
TUT_Display_FastTravel_WEK_desc2:
Hogwarts is divided into two main areas. The left side of the map is where students and professors live, and includes the house common rooms and the Great Hall.
霍格沃茨分为两个主要区域。地图左侧是学生和教授居住的地方，包括各学院公共休息室和礼堂。
TUT_Display_FastTravel_WEK_desc3: Professor Weasley has unlocked the Central Hall Floo Flames for you. Use {UMGMapScreenMove_X} to rotate the map and Fast Travel to the Central Hall Floo Flames with {UMGMapScreenFastTravel}. 韦斯莱教授已经为你解锁了主厅飞路之焰㉿。 通过来旋转地图，并使用以快速旅行至主厅飞路之焰㉿。
TUT_Display_FastTravel_WEK_desc3|SWITCH: Select the South Wing region to continue.|选择南区 ㉿ 以继续。
TUT_Display_FastTravel_WEK_desc4: Select the South Wing region to continue.|选择南区 ㉿ 以继续。
TUT_Display_FastTravel_WEK_desc4_1: Select the Great Hall region to continue.|选择礼堂区域 ㉿ 以继续。
TUT_Display_FastTravel_WEK_desc4_2: Select the Grand Staircase region to continue.|选择大理石楼梯区域 ㉿ 以继续。
TUT_Display_FastTravel_WEK_desc5: In this view, you can see the Floo Flames available in that region. Green Floo Flames represent flames you have discovered, including your own house common room. Grey Floo Flames reveal the location of undiscovered flames. 在此视图中，你可以看到该地区可用的飞路之焰。 绿色飞路之焰㉿ 代表你已发现的火焰，包括你所属学院的公共休息室。 灰色飞路之焰㉿代表未发现火焰的位置。
TUT_Display_FastTravel_WEK_desc6:
The right side of the map is where you'll find academic points of interest, including the Astronomy Tower, Library, and greenhouses.
地图的右侧找到各个学术兴趣点，包括天文塔、图书馆和温室。
TUT_Display_FastTravel_WEK_desc7: Select the Library Annex region to continue.|选择图书馆附属区域 ㉿ 以继续。
TUT_Display_FieldGuideChallenges_desc1:
You've just unlocked a Field Guide Challenge. Your progress towards completing Challenges appears here.
你刚刚解锁了实战指南挑战，完成挑战的进度将会显示在此处。
TUT_Display_FieldGuideChallenges_desc2: Field Guide Challenges are the ONLY way to acquire Experience Points or XP.|实战指南挑战是获得经验值或XP的唯一途径。
TUT_Display_FieldGuideChallenges_desc3:
Your Field Guide tracks your current Challenge progress.
Select the Challenges Menu to continue.
你的实战指南将记录你当前的挑战进度。
选择挑战菜单并继续。
TUT_Display_FieldGuideChallenges_desc4:
Collecting your first guide page unlocked a new Challenge category. New Challenges you unlock throughout your adventure will appear here.

Select Field Guide Pages to continue.
你收集到的第一份指南书页已为你解锁了一份全新的挑战类别。随着冒险之旅的推进，新解锁的挑战也将会出现在这里。

选择实战指南书页以继续。
TUT_Display_FieldGuideChallenges_desc5:
This is your Wizarding Level. XP earned from challenges increases your level and power.
这是你的巫师等级。从挑战中获得的经验值可以提高你的等级与战力。
TUT_Display_FieldGuideChallenges_desc6:
Each challenge has tiers. Special rewards unlock at each tier you complete – from appearances to critical upgrades.
每个挑战都拥有不同层级。完成每一层都会解锁特殊奖励——从外观到重要的强化道具。
TUT_Display_FieldGuideChallenges_desc7:
This is your Challenges progress. Completing Challenges earns you experience, which will raise your level.
这里是你的挑战进度。完成挑战即可获得经验，并将提高你的等级。
TUT_Display_FieldGuideChallenges_desc8: Select the Hogwarts Guide Page challenge.|选择霍格沃茨指南页面挑战。
TUT_Display_FieldGuideChallenges_desc9:
Rewards must be claimed from the Challenges Menu. Come back often to collect rewards you have unlocked.
必须从挑战菜单中领取奖励。记得经常回来领取你已解锁的奖励。
TUT_display_FlightRemind_desc: Take flight by equipping your broom found in the Tool Wheel {ItemMenuButton}.|装备工具轮  中的扫帚，开始飞行。
TUT_display_ForcefulSpells_desc1:
Force spells such as Accio, Depulso and Descendo use powerful magic to quickly move objects or enemies about. Force spells can also break through Violet Shield Charms such as those used by the Dark Wizard Sorcerer.
“飞来咒”、“统统飞走”及“应声落地”等强力咒语可使用强大的魔法快速移动物体或敌人。强力咒语也可以打破“淡紫色护盾魔咒”，例如黑巫师魔法师使用的那些。
TUT_Display_FullInventoryPostMRT01_desc: Your gear slots are full. Complete Merlin Trial Challenges to increase your gear slot capacity or sell excess gear at vendors . 你的装备栏已满。完成梅林试炼以提高你的装备存储上限，或者你也可以选择在商人处㉿出售多余装备。
TUT_Display_FullInventoryPostOLI_desc: Your gear slots are full. You can sell excess gear at Vendors located in Hogsmeade or Hamlets . 你的装备栏已满。你可以在霍格莫德或者其他村庄㉿的商贩㉿处售卖多余的装备。
TUT_Display_FullInventoryPretOLI_desc: Your gear slots are full. You can discard unwanted gear in the Gear Menu.|你的装备栏已满。你可以在装备菜单中丢弃不需要的装备。
TUT_Display_GainingXP_desc: Complete Field Guide Challenges or Side Quests to earn XP and gain levels. 完成实战指南挑战或支线任务 ㉿ 以获得经验值并提升等级。
TUT_display_Gear_desc1: You've received a new piece of gear . Time to equip it. 你获得了一件新装备 ㉿。是时候装备它了。
TUT_Display_GearAppearanceSubMenu_desc: The Appearance Menu allows you to assign a different visual to pieces of gear you own. Your selection includes basic appearances automatically collected from gear you discover, as well as unique appearances found in your Collections. 外观菜单允许你为拥有的装备分配不同的视觉㉿。你的选择包括从发现的装备中自动收集的基本外观，以及在收藏中发现的独特外观。
TUT_Display_GearEquip_desc1: Equip a Robe|装备一件长袍
TUT_Display_GearSlots_desc: There are six gear slots – Headwear, Facewear, Neckwear, Cloaks and Robes, Outfits, and Trinkets. 共有六个装备栏：头饰㉿、面部穿戴㉿、领饰㉿、斗篷及长袍㉿、服装㉿和饰物㉿。
TUT_Display_GearSlots_desc1: Select the Cloaks and Robes gear slot and press {Default_Select}.|选择“斗篷及长袍”装备栏并按下 。
TUT_Display_GearSlots_desc1|SWITCH: Equipping better gear with higher stats will help you fight higher-level enemies. 更好的装备将会提供更高的属性㉿㉿并帮助你对抗高等级的敌人。
TUT_Display_GearStats_desc: Equipping better gear with higher stats will help you fight higher-level enemies. 更好的装备将会提供更高的属性㉿㉿并帮助你对抗高等级的敌人。
TUT_Display_Glacius_desc: Glacius is a Control spell that freezes enemies in their tracks.|“寒冰冻结”是一个控制咒语，可以将敌人冻结在他们的轨迹上。
TUT_display_Graphorn_desc:
The Graphorn has a powerful charge attack that deals a large amount of damage to enemies and certain barricades. Hold [Charge Button] to initiate. Keep an eye on the Graphorn's stamina meter as charging will drain it.
紫角兽具有强大的冲锋攻击，可对敌人和某些路障造成大量伤害。按住[Charge Button]以发动。密切注意紫角兽的耐力计量，因为冲锋将消耗耐力
TUT_Display_GraphornCharge_desc:
The Graphorn has a powerful charge attack that deals a large amount of damage to enemies and certain barricades. Hold {BroomBoost} to initiate. Keep an eye on the Graphorn's stamina meter as charging will drain it.
紫角兽具有强大的冲锋攻击，可对敌人和某些路障造成大量伤害。按住  以发动。密切注意紫角兽的耐力计量，因为冲锋将消耗耐力。
TUT_display_GrowingPlants_desc:
Select the available seeds to begin planting.
Once the seeds have been planted, the plant will take time to grow before being ready to harvest.

Plant the dittany seeds to continue.
选择可用的种子开始种植。
播下种子后，植物在准备收获之前需要一段时间才能生长。

种植白鲜种子以继续。
TUT_display_GrowingPlants_desc1:
Select the available seeds to begin planting.
Once the seeds have been planted, the plant will take time to grow before being ready to harvest.
选择可用的种子开始种植。
播下种子后，植物在准备收获之前需要一段时间才能生长。
TUT_display_Heal: Health and Healing|生命值与治疗
TUT_Display_Highwing_desc:
Highwing can be mounted again through the Tool Wheel, by holding {ItemMenuButton}.
可以通过在工具轮中按住  来再次骑乘疾翼。
TUT_Display_HogsmeadeMap_desc1: The Hogsmeade Map shows Shops and Points of Interest . You can track any of these by highlighting an icon and pressing {UMGMapScreenWaypoint}. Press {UMGBack} to exit the Hogsmeade Map. 霍格莫德地图 ㉿ 可显示商贩 ㉿㉿㉿和兴趣点 ㉿。 你可以通过高亮显示图标并按下 来追踪其中的任何一个。 按下 以退出霍格莫德地图。
TUT_Display_HogsmeadeMap_desc1|SWITCH: Hogsmeade Village is brimming with different sights, shops, and other points of interest that you can navigate using your Field Guide's map. 霍格莫德村 ㉿ 到处都是不同的景点、商店和其他兴趣点，你可以使用“实战指南”的地图进行导航。
TUT_Display_HogsmeadeMap_desc2: Hogsmeade Village is brimming with different sights, shops, and other points of interest that you can navigate using your Field Guide's map. 霍格莫德村 ㉿ 到处都是不同的景点、商店和其他兴趣点，你可以使用“实战指南”的地图进行导航。
TUT_Display_HogsmeadeMap_desc3: Press {UMGBack} to exit the Hogsmeade Map.|按下  以退出霍格莫德地图。
TUT_Display_IdentificationStation_desc1:
You have unlocked the Desk of Description. Use it to reveal the magical properties of any Unidentified Gear that you've collected.
你已解锁辨识之桌，可用它来揭示你所收集的任何未识别装备的魔法属性。
TUT_display_Incendio_desc1: Incendio is a Heavy Damage Spell that unleashes destructive flames at a short range. “火焰熊熊”㉿ 是一种高伤害咒语，可在短距离内释放出毁灭性的火焰。
TUT_Display_IncendioRed_desc1: Break through red shields with Damage spells like the Fire-Making Spell, Incendio . Target lock {LockOn} lets you track enemies without aiming. Use {UMGMapScreenMove_X} to change targets while locked. 使用伤害咒语 ㉿ 打破红色护盾，例如生火咒语“火焰熊熊” ㉿。 目标锁定 可让你无需瞄准即可追踪敌人。使用 在锁定时变更目标。
TUT_Display_IncendioRed_desc1|SWITCH: Hold {SpellModifierButton} to activate your Spell Set and cast Incendio . 按住 以开启咒语组并施放“火焰熊熊”㉿。
TUT_Display_IncendioRed_desc2: Hold {SpellModifierButton} to activate your Spell Set and cast Incendio . 按住 以开启咒语组并施放“火焰熊熊”㉿。
TUT_Display_IncendioRedPC_desc1: Break through red shields with Damage spells like the Fire-Making Spell, Incendio . Target lock {LockOn} lets you track enemies without aiming. Use {CameraMove_X} to change targets while locked. 使用伤害咒语 ㉿ 打破红色护盾，例如生火咒语“火焰熊熊” ㉿。 目标锁定 可让你无需瞄准即可追踪敌人。使用 在锁定时变更目标。
TUT_Display_IncendioRedPC_desc2: Tap the assigned key to cast Incendio .|点击所分配的按键来施放“火焰熊熊”㉿。
TUT_Display_InferiTutorial_desc:
Inferi must be struck with fire spells to make them vulnerable to other attacks. Visit the Collections Menu to learn about enemy weaknesses.
阴尸必须被火焰咒语击中以使其容易受到其他攻击。访问收藏菜单，了解敌人的弱点。
TUT_Display_Interact_desc: Press and hold {AM_Interact} to pick up or interact with an object.|按下并按以进行拾取或与目标交互。
TUT_display_Interact_desc1: Press and hold {AM_Interact} to pick up or interact with an object.|按下并按以进行拾取或与目标交互。
TUT_Display_InteriorDecoratingSNS01_desc: Cast Evanesco to vanish objects within the Room of Requirement.|“消失不见”可以清除有求必应屋中的物件。
TUT_display_Intrusion_desc1:
Some areas have restricted access and are off-limits to you. If you are caught intruding, you will be removed from the area.
某些区域的访问受到限制，你不得进入。如果你被发现闯入，你将被移出该区域。
TUT_Display_Inventories_desc1:
Your Backpack holds items and gear, and has a limited capacity. 

Beasts, Quest Items, Notes, Recipes, and Resources each have their own separate inventories.
你的背包可容纳物品和装备，并且容量有限。

野兽、任务物品、笔记、配方和资源都有各自独立的库存。
TUT_Display_InventoryCreatures_desc: Here is where you can find any Magical Beasts you have rescued.|在这里，你可以找到你所拯救的任何魔法野兽。
TUT_Display_InventoryMissionItems_desc:
Here is where you can find important items that are used in Quests. These items cannot be sold.
在这里你可以找到任务中所使用的重要物品。这些物品不能出售。
TUT_Display_InventoryNotes_desc: Letters, books, journals, and notes can be found here.|在这里可以找到信件、书籍、日志和笔记。
TUT_Display_InventoryResources_desc: Moonstone, forageables, and non-combat plants can be found here. |在这里可以找到月石、可采集物和非战斗植物。
TUT_display_KnowledgeXP_desc2:
Press {UMGSpecialRight} and navigate to your Student Journal and view your Knowledge Cards.
按下并找到你的“学生日志”，然后查看你的知识卡。
TUT_display_LargeEnemies_desc2:
Certain special types of impacts, like those of objects launched by Ancient Magic Throw, can interrupt Large Enemies in their tracks and allow you time to attack with other spells.
某些特殊类型的冲击，例如古代魔法投掷的发射物，可以打断大型敌人的移动，为你争取时间使用其他咒语进行攻击。
TUT_Display_LeviosoCombat: Levioso in Combat|战斗中的“啦唯啊萨”
TUT_display_LockOnOff_desc1: Press {LockOn} to lock on to a target. Press again to stop targeting.|按下以锁定目标。再次按下便可停止锁定。
TUT_Display_LoomStats: Gear features one primary Offence or Defence stat by default. Magical materials can be used with the Loom to add and upgrade a secondary stat, or apply Traits to your gear. Multiple small upgrades can yield a meaningful boost in combat power. New beasts can be rescued at Beast Dens or unlocked in quests. New Trait recipes can be collected in Bandit Camps . 默认情况下，装备具有一个主要的进攻或防御属性。 魔法材料可以与织布机一起使用，来追加和强化次要属性，或者将特质施加于你的装备。多次的小幅强化可以显著提高战力。 新的野兽可以在兽巢㉿中解救或在任务中解锁。新的特质配方可以在“强盗营地”㉿中收集。
TUT_Display_LostPagesScreen: Guide Pages Screen|指南书页界面
TUT_Display_Lumos: Lumos and your Spell Set|荧光闪烁及你的咒语组
TUT_Display_Lumos_desc1: You've acquired the Wand-Lighting Charm, Lumos , which has automatically been slotted to your Spell Set. Lumos creates a light at the tip of your wand to help you see in dark areas. 你已获得魔杖发光魔咒“荧光闪烁”㉿，该魔咒已自动置入你的咒语组。“荧光闪烁”可在你的魔杖尖端创造一道光，帮助你在黑暗中获得视野。
TUT_Display_Lumos_desc2: Hold {SpellModifierButton} and tap {AM_SpellButton1} to cast or extinguish Lumos . 按住 并点击 以施放“荧光闪烁” ㉿。
TUT_Display_LumosPC_desc1: You've acquired the Wand-Lighting Charm, Lumos , which has automatically been slotted to your Spell Set. Lumos creates a light at the tip of your wand to help you see in dark areas. 你已获得魔杖发光魔咒“荧光闪烁”㉿，该魔咒已自动置入你的咒语组。 “荧光闪烁”可在你的魔杖尖端创造一道光，帮助你在黑暗中获得视野。
TUT_Display_LumosPC_desc2: Tap {AM_SpellButton1} to cast or extinguish Lumos .|点击施放或熄灭“荧光闪烁”㉿。
TUT_display_MapIconStack_desc: If you see this icon at a location, hover over it to reveal any hidden icons that may be at the same location. 如果你在某个地点看到该图标 ㉿，请将光标停留在其上，来显示可能位于同一位置的所有隐藏图标。
TUT_display_MaterialRefiner_desc: The Material Refiner produces moonstone required for conjuring items.|材料精炼装置可生产月石，用于变幻物品。
TUT_display_MaterialRefiner_desc1: The Material Refiner produces moonstone required for conjuring items.|材料精炼装置可生产月石，用于变幻物品。
TUT_display_MerlinTrial_desc:
Merlin Trials require Mallowsweet, which can be grown at a potting table in Hogwarts.
梅林的试炼需要香锦葵，可以在霍格沃茨的园艺工作台上种植。
TUT_Display_MerlinTrialsReward_desc: Different challenges offer different rewards. Complete Merlin Trial challenges to increase your gear capacity. 不同的挑战提供不同的奖励。完成梅林的试炼 ㉿ 挑战，以增加你的装备容量。
TUT_Display_Minimap_desc: The Minimap shows your surroundings, with you in the middle. This is your current objective. Press and hold {AM_Navigation} to toggle quest objective details. 小地图可显示你周围的环境，你自己 ㉿ 位于中间。 这㉿是你当前的目标。 按住 可前往切换任务目标详情。
TUT_Display_MissionRequirements_desc1: Quests may have level or tool requirements in order to activate them. Check the Quest Log or your current task {UMGPauseMenu} to remind you what is required for each Quest to be activated. 任务可能有等级或工具方面的要求才能被激活。查看任务日志 ㉿ 或当前的任务 ，以提醒自己激活对应的任务都需要什么。
TUT_Display_MRTEnemyCollections_desc:
The Collections section of your Field Guide has been updated with a new enemy type. You may learn valuable insights on enemies, such as their weaknesses to certain spells.
实战指南的收藏部分已更新了一条新的敌人类型。你可以查询有关敌人的宝贵建议，例如他们对某些咒语的弱点。
TUT_Display_NabSack_desc:
The nab-sack is used to rescue magical beasts.

Press {UMGActionScreenToggle} and then assign your nab-sack to your Spell Set.
拿袋可以用于解救魔法野兽。

按  然后将拿袋分配至咒语组。
TUT_Display_NabSackPC_desc:
The nab-sack is used to rescue magical beasts.

Tap {UMGActionScreenToggle} and then hover over your nab-sack, hold {Stupefy} and drag it to your Spell Set.
拿袋可以用于解救魔法野兽。

按  然后悬停在拿袋上， 按住并将其拖进你的咒语组。
TUT_display_NoFly_desc: Hogsmeade, and certain other areas, prohibit flying. Look for the no flying icon near the Minimap to learn where and when you can fly. 霍格莫德和某些地区禁止飞行。查小地图附近的禁飞标志㉿ 以了解你在何时何地可以飞行。
TUT_Display_OpenObjCompass:
Some quests have open objectives with no compass path. Set a personal waypoint from the map to track your own locations.
部分任务中的开放式目标将不会提供罗盘路径引导。前往地图自行设置路径点，追踪你目前所在的位置。
TUT_Display_Oppugno: Ancient Magic Throw|古代魔法投掷
TUT_Display_Overland_desc1: Natty just sent you an Owl Post requesting to meet her in Lower Hogsfield, a Hamlet . 娜娜刚刚给你发了一封猫头鹰邮递，希望能在下霍格米村与她见面，下霍格米村是一个小村庄 ㉿。
TUT_Display_Overland_desc2: Select the World Map button to switch to the World Map.|选择世界地图按钮以切换至世界地图。
TUT_Display_Overland_desc3:
This is the World Map. Most of the map is covered by fog, limiting what you can see.
这里是世界地图。目前大部分地图都被迷雾所覆盖，限制了你能看到的内容。
TUT_Display_Overland_desc4: Hamlets are small communities throughout the world.|小村庄 ㉿ 是位于世界各地的小型社区。
TUT_Display_Overland_desc5: This is the Hamlet , Lower Hogsfield. Hamlets provide new opportunities for vendors , Floo Flames , Side Quests and collectibles. 这里是小村庄 ㉿ “下霍格米村”。 小村庄 ㉿ 可为商贩 ㉿、飞路之焰 ㉿、支线任务 ㉿ 及收藏提供新的内容。
TUT_Display_Overland_desc6: As you explore, you will remove fog and reveal more of the map, unveiling new opportunities like Hamlets , Dungeons , Bandit Camps , and many other locations. 随着探索的推进，你将消除迷雾并显示更多的地图，同时发现新的内容，例如小村庄 ㉿、地牢 ㉿、强盗营地 ㉿ 以及许多其他地点。
TUT_Display_Overland_desc6|SWITCH: Protego / Parry|盔甲护身 / 招架
TUT_display_ParryCounter: Protego / Parry|盔甲护身 / 招架
TUT_display_ParryCounter_desc1: Look for the yellow attack indicator and cast the Shield Charm, Protego , to parry certain incoming attacks. Press {Protego} to cast Protego. 寻找黄色的攻击指示并施放护盾魔咒“盔甲护身”㉿，以招架某些来袭的攻击。 按下 施放“盔甲护身”。
TUT_display_ParryCounter_desc2:
Cast Protego and parry this attack.

Tap {Protego} to cast Protego.|施放“盔甲护身”并招架该攻击。

点击  施放“盔甲护身”。
TUT_display_Petrificus_desc: After casting Disillusionment, approach enemies from behind to perform the Full Body-Bind Curse, Petrificus Totalus . For certain stronger enemies, the binding effect may not be permanent. 施放“幻身”后，从背后接近敌人，以施展全身束缚诅咒“统统石化” ㉿。 对于某些更强大的敌人，束缚效果可能无法永久存在。
Tut_display_Petrificus_desc1:
Reaching an enemy undetected allows you to cast Petrificus Totalus. This will permanently incapacitate a weaker enemy or significantly damage a stronger one.
靠近尚未察觉的敌人身边可以施放“统统石化”。这将使较弱的敌人永久丧失行动能力，或显著伤害较强的敌人。
TUT_display_PlantingStations_desc: To grow magical and non-magical plants, you will need seeds and a planter box.|要种植魔法和非魔法植物，你需要种子与栽培箱。
TUT_display_PlantingStations_desc1: To grow magical and non-magical plants, you will need seeds and a planter box.|要种植魔法和非魔法植物，你需要种子与栽培箱。
TUT_Display_PlantReminder1_desc:
Seeds take time to grow. Return to your Potting Table in the Herbology classroom later to harvest your plants. 
种子需要时间才能生长。稍后返回草药学教室的园艺工作台，再收割植物吧。
TUT_Display_PlantReminder2_desc: Your plants are ready. You may harvest them at your Potting Tables in the Room of Requirement or the Herbology classroom. 你的植物已经成熟。你可以在有求必应屋的园艺工作台 ㉿ 或者是草药学教室进行采集。
TUT_display_PotionBrewing_desc1:
Brew potions from unlocked recipes at the Potions Station. Recipes and ingredients can be purchased from select shops. Ingredients may also be grown and found in the wild.
在魔药台用解锁了的配方调制魔药。配方和原料可以从相应商店购买。原料也可以在野外种植和发现。
TUT_display_PotionBrewing_desc1|SWITCH: You can return to collect your potion after it has finished brewing.|调制完成后，你可以返回以领取魔药。
TUT_display_PotionBrewing_desc2: You can return to collect your potion after it has finished brewing.|调制完成后，你可以返回以领取魔药。
TUT_display_PotionStations_desc1: With the proper ingredients, potions can be brewed at Potions Stations.|使用适当的原料，可以在魔药台调制魔药。
TUT_display_QuestBeacon_desc1: Follow the Quest Icon on your radar to activate new quests. 跟随㉿雷达上的任务图标，启动新的任务。
TUT_display_QuestHUD_desc1: Press and hold {UMGDPadUp} to select an available quest to track.|按下并按住以选择一个可用的任务进行追踪。
TUT_Display_Reparo_desc1: The Mending Charm, Reparo can be used to mend broken objects and pieces of the environment. 修复咒“修复如初” ㉿ 可用于修复破碎的物体和环境碎片。
TUT_Display_Revelio_desc: {RevelioButton} cast Revelio .| 施放“原形立现” ㉿。
TUT_Display_Revelio_desc1: Casting Revelio reveals authority figures and enemy locations, allowing you to scout ahead and remain undetected. 施放“原形立现”㉿会显示高阶人员或者敌人的位置，让你可以侦察前方并保持不被发现。
TUT_display_RollDodge_desc1: Press {DodgeAndBlinkButton} when moving to dodge and roll.|在需要进行闪避及翻滚时，按下。
TUT_Display_SearchAreas_desc1: Search Areas on the Minimap represent areas you should explore to find your quest objective. 迷你地图上的“搜索区域”㉿代表着你需要探索以找到任务目标的区域。
TUT_Display_SellingGearOLI01_desc: Visit Vendors to sell gear.|拜访商人㉿以出售装备。
TUT_Display_ShieldBreaks_desc1:
Shockwaves that emanate from successful Descendo and Bombarda impacts will break ALL types of enemy Shield Charms within range of the blast. And don’t forget, Ancient Magic will always break any shield type as well.
成功发动“应声落地”与“大爆爆”创造的冲击波将击溃影响范围内敌人们的所有护盾魔咒。除此以外还要记住，古代魔法也能够击溃任意类型的护盾魔咒。
TUT_display_SideQuestJournal_desc1:
After activating a side quest, you can access your quest log at any time to view your active quests and change your current focus by pressing {UMGPauseMenu}.
激活支线任务后，你可以随时开启自己的任务日志查看当前任务，并且按  即可切换当前聚焦的任务。
TUT_Display_SideQuests_desc: Side Quests are now available. Available Side Quests can be found inside regions of Hogwarts marked as and discovered by exploring the world. These quests reward XP, but do not advance the main story. 支线任务㉿㉿ 现在可用。 可用的支线任务㉿ 可以在被标记为 ㉿ 的霍格沃茨区域内找到，也可以在探索世界的过程中被发现。这些任务能够奖励经验值，但是并不会推进主线剧情。
TUT_display_Spell_Protego_desc1: Press and hold {AM_Protego} to cast Protego to protect yourself from damage.|按下并按住以施放“盔甲护身”，保护自己免受伤害。
TUT_display_Spell_Stupefy_desc1: Tap {Stupefy} to perform a Basic Cast .|点击以进行基础施法㉿。
TUT_Display_SpellMiniGameAdvanced_desc:
Steady your wand with {PIM_LeftStick} and guide it along the symbol's path to learn the spell. 

Press the corresponding input when prompted to accelerate your wand's motion along the symbol's path.
用固定你的魔杖，并引导它沿着符号的行进，以学习咒语。

当系统提示你沿着符号路径加速魔杖的运动时，请按下相应的输入。
TUT_Display_SpellMiniGameBasic_desc:
Steady your wand with {PIM_LeftStick} and guide it along the symbol's path to learn the spell.
 遵照符号路径平稳移动魔杖以学习咒语。
TUT_display_StealthDistraction_desc1: Use Basic Cast while undetected to lure authority figures and enemies to a desired location. Aim Mode {AM_AimMode} grants precision spell targeting, and reveals additional spell targets. 在未被发现的情况下使用基础施法 ㉿ 将高阶人员和敌人 ㉿ 引诱到所需位置。 瞄准模式 可提供精确的咒语瞄准，并显示额外的咒语目标。
TUT_display_StunningSpell_desc1: Hold {Protego} during Protego to stun enemies with a Stupefy counter-attack. Stunned enemies take extra damage, indicated by gold numbers. 在“盔甲护身”㉿期间按住，用“昏昏倒地”㉿的反击来晕眩敌人。 被击晕的敌人将会受到额外的伤害，并以金色数字表示。
TUT_display_StunningSpell_desc1|SWITCH: Hold {Protego} during Protego to stun enemies with a Stupefy counter-attack 在“盔甲护身”㉿期间按住，用“昏昏倒地”㉿的反击来晕眩敌人。
TUT_display_StunningSpell_desc2: Hold {Protego} during Protego to stun enemies with a Stupefy counter-attack 在“盔甲护身”㉿期间按住，用“昏昏倒地”㉿的反击来晕眩敌人。
TUT_display_StunningSpell_desc2|SWITCH: Tap {Protego}: Protego Hold {Protego}: Protego and counter with Stupefy . 点击：施放“盔甲护身”㉿。 按住：施放“盔甲护身”和“昏昏倒地”㉿进行反击。
TUT_display_StunningSpellReminder_desc2: Tap {Protego}: Protego Hold {Protego}: Protego and counter with Stupefy . 点击：施放“盔甲护身”㉿。 按住：施放“盔甲护身”和“昏昏倒地”㉿进行反击。
TUT_Display_StupProtReminder:
Perform a Basic Cast using {Stupefy}.

Tap {Protego} to cast Protego and parry incoming attacks.
使用执行“基础施法”。

点击以施放“盔甲护身”并招架袭来的攻击。
TUT_Display_SwimmingFasterSystemic_desc: Press {SprintButton} to swim faster. |按  加速游泳。
TUT_Display_SystemicAlohomora_desc:
Return additional Demiguise Moons to Gladwin Moon to learn higher levels of Alohomora.
为格拉德温·莫恩带去更多月亮，以学习更高等级的阿拉霍洞开。
TUT_display_Talents2_desc1: You've earned Talent Points starting at level 5. You may spend these Talent Points as you wish to enhance your spells to increase your combat powers, stealth, and more. Choose wisely: Talent Points may only be spent once, so the number of Talents you acquire will be limited. Return here often to see what new and powerful Talents await you. 从5级开始，你将获得天赋点㉿。你可以利用天赋点自由提升咒语，并借此强化自己的战斗能力，隐蔽能力以及其他能力。不过在选择时一定要谨慎：天赋点使用后将无法返还，因此你能够学习的天赋数量有限。 记得经常返回此界面，查看可以学习什么强大的新天赋。
TUT_display_Talents_desc1: Your connection to Ancient Magic has unlocked Talents . You will receive 1 Talent Point each time you increase your Wizarding Level. You have new Talent Points to spend in the Talents Menu in your Field Guide. 你与古代魔法的联系解锁了天赋㉿。每次提高巫师等级时都会获得1个天赋点数。 你获得了新的天赋点数，可在你的实战指南天赋菜单中花费。
TUT_display_Talents_desc2: You have a Talent Point to spend.|你有天赋点数可以花费。
TUT_Display_TombSoldierVulnerability: Pensieve Protector Vulnerability|冥想盆保护者弱点
TUT_Display_TombSoldierVulnerability_des: Pensieve Protectors are more vulnerable once they've been disarmed.|被缴械后，冥想盆保护者将无法有效保护自己。
TUT_Display_ToolWheel_desc:
Hold {ItemMenuButton} and tap {Generic_CamMove_X} to open the Tool Wheel and assign the Chinese Chomping Cabbages.
 
Then tap {ItemMenuButton} to use your assigned tools.
长按  并点击  开启工具轮，然后在其中分配咬人甘蓝。

之后点击  使用分配的工具。
TUT_Display_ToolWheelCombat_Desc:
The Tool Wheel {ItemMenuButton} is useful for dealing with higher-level combat situations. Combat plants and potions can give you an advantage against tougher enemies.
工具轮  是你在应对高等级战斗时的好帮手。战斗植物以及魔药将帮助你对抗更为强大的敌人。
TUT_Display_TravelBetweenMaps: Fast Travel Between Maps|在地图之间快速穿梭
TUT_Display_UnblockableAttack_desc:
Incoming attacks with a red attack indicator cannot be blocked or parried. Press {DodgeAndBlinkButton} to dodge these unblockable attacks.
红色标志意味着攻击无法被格挡或招架。按  闪躲这些无法格挡的攻击。
TUT_Display_UnlockingTools_desc: To unlock more Tools, grow combat plants from seeds or brew potions from recipes. Visit Hogsmeade for new seeds and recipes. Seeds can be purchased at Dogweed and Deathcap, and recipes can be purchased at J. Pippin's Potions. 若要解锁更多工具，使用种子种植战斗植物，或者是利用配方制作魔药。 拜访霍格莫德 ㉿ 购买新的种子与配方。“茱萸和毒菇”可以买到种子，而J·皮聘魔药店则出售配方。
TUT_Display_UsingLoom_desc: The Enchanted Loom can be used to weave magical properties into gear.|你可以利用魔法织布机为装备编织魔法之力。
TUT_Display_Vanishment_desc1:
The Vanishing Spell, Evanesco, can be used to vanish objects within the Room of Requirement.
消失咒语“消失不见”可以用来清除有求必应屋中的物件。
TUT_display_Vault_desc1: Press {AM_Jump} near obstacles to vault over them.|在靠近障碍物时，按下以跨越它们。
TUT_Display_Waiting_desc1: You can advance time by accessing the map and pressing {UMGMapScreenWait}. 你可以访问地图并按下来加速时间流逝㉿。
TUT_Display_WingardiumUnlocked: Wingardium Leviosa|羽加迪姆·勒维奥萨
TUT_Display_WingardiumUnlocked_desc: The Levitation Charm, Wingardium Leviosa , can levitate and move objects. Control its position with your movement, and use {WingardiumFurther} {WingardiumNearer} {WingardiumRotateLeft} {WingardiumRotateRight} to fine-tune its distance and rotation. 飘浮魔咒“羽加迪姆·勒维奥萨”㉿可以漂浮和移动目标。 用你的移动来控制它的位置并通过 来微调它的距离与旋转。
TUT_Display_YellowShieldsZZD_desc: Break through Yellow Shields with Control Spells like the Levitation Spell, Levioso . 利用类似飘浮咒语或者是“啦唯啊萨” ㉿ 等控制类咒语 ㉿ 击溃敌人的黄色护盾
TUT_Display_YellowShieldsZZD_desc|SWITCH:
You have entered an area that allows flight.

Press {ItemMenuButton}, then tap {UMGGadgetWheelMountSlot3} to equip the broom on your Tool Wheel.
你进入了一个允许飞行的区域。

按  ，然后按  将扫帚装备至你的工具轮。
TUT_display_YesFly_desc:
You have entered an area that allows flight.

Press {ItemMenuButton}, then tap {UMGGadgetWheelMountSlot3} to equip the broom on your Tool Wheel.
你进入了一个允许飞行的区域。

按  ，然后按  将扫帚装备至你的工具轮。
TUT_EndGame:
Congratulations! You have completed the story of Hogwarts Legacy and reached the end of your school year!

With your O.W.L. exams fast approaching, now is a good time to review your field guide progress. Explore the world, finish any remaining relationship storylines and side quests, and complete your field guide as you see fit!
恭喜！你已完成了《霍格沃茨之遗》的剧情，你的学年结束了！

随着你的普通巫师等级考试快要到了，现在是回顾你实战指南进度的好时机。探索世界，完成剩余的关系故事线和支线任务，并在你认为合适的时候完成实战指南！
TUT_EnemyIndicators: Enemy and Authority Figure Perception Icons|敌人和高阶人员的感知图标
TUT_Expelliarmus_desc:
Expelliarmus disarms wands or other weapons out of enemies’ hands. Different types of enemies will react in different ways when disarmed.
“除你武器”能够缴除敌人手上的魔杖与其他武器。缴械将会对不同敌人产生各式各样的影响。
Tut_FirstGuideEntryExplain: Field Guide Entry|实战指南条目
Tut_FirstGuideEntryUnlock: Field Guide Entry|实战指南条目
Tut_FirstGuideEntryUnlock_desc:
Your Field Guide will record new experiences and information gathered throughout your adventures. Press {UMGSpecialRight} to access the Field Guide now.
在冒险过程中，你的实战指南将会持续收录新发现的经历与信息。现在请按  开启实战指南。
TUT_Flipendo_desc:
The Knockback Jinx, Flipendo, like Accio, is a Force spell, capable of dispelling Violet Shield Charms by flipping targets upside down.
与飞来咒一样，击退恶咒“退敌三尺”也是一种强力咒语，能够让目标上下翻飞并借此击溃他们的淡紫色护盾魔咒。
TUT_Legend_DrinkHealthPotion: Drink Health Potion|喝下生命值魔药
TUT_Levioso_Part1_desc: Break through Yellow Shields with Control spells like the Levitation Spell, Levioso . Target lock {LockOn} lets you track enemies without aiming. Use {UMGMapScreenMove_X} to change targets while locked. 利用类似飘浮咒语或者是“啦唯啊萨” ㉿ 等控制类咒语 ㉿ 击溃敌人的黄色护盾。 目标锁定 可让你无需瞄准即可追踪敌人。使用 在锁定时变更目标。
TUT_Levioso_Part1_desc2: Hold {SpellModifierButton} to bring up your Spell Set and cast Levioso . 长按 唤出咒语组并施放“啦唯啊萨”㉿。
TUT_Levioso_Part2_desc2: Perform a Basic Cast using {Stupefy}.|使用，执行基础施法。
TUT_LeviosoPC_Part1_desc: Break through Yellow Shields with Control spells like the Levitation Spell, Levioso . Target lock {LockOn} lets you track enemies without aiming. Use {CameraMove_X} to change targets while locked. 利用类似飘浮咒语或者是“啦唯啊萨” ㉿ 等控制类咒语 ㉿ 击溃敌人的黄色护盾。 目标锁定 可让你无需瞄准即可追踪敌人。使用 在锁定时变更目标。
TUT_LeviosoPC_Part1_desc2: Tap the assigned key to cast Levioso .|点击所分配的的按键来施放“啦唯啊萨”㉿。
TUT_MapMissiontracking_desc1: You can track Available Quests from the Map.|你可以在地图中追踪可用任务。
TUT_MapMissiontracking_desc2: Track a Quest with {UMGMapScreenWaypoint} to continue. 追踪任务㉿，通过以继续。
TUT_MapMissiontracking_desc3: Follow the blue line on your Minimap to the tracked quest . 跟随迷你地图上的蓝线前往正在追踪的任务 ㉿。
TUT_MapMissiontracking_desc4: Press {UMGFaceButtonRight} to exit Map.|按  退出地图。
TUT_MapMissiontracking_desc6: Some quests are locked by spell and/or level requirements . In these cases, you will need to be the required level and/or have the required spell to activate the quest. New spells can be earned by completing Professor's Assignments or as quest rewards. 某些任务将会被特定咒语以及/或等级需求 ㉿ 锁定。如果遇到这种情况，你就需要先达到所需等级并/或学习所需咒语以激活任务。 完成教授们布置的作业或任务奖励以获取新的咒语 ㉿。
TUT_MapMissiontracking_desc7: This represents Main Quests. Completing Main Quests will further the story, unlock new features, and grant XP. ㉿ 代表了主线任务。 完成主线任务 ㉿ 将推动故事发展，解锁新内容并赋予经验值。
TUT_MapMissiontracking_desc8: Side Quests are now available. Available Side Quests can be found inside regions of Hogwarts marked as and discovered by exploring the world. These quests reward XP, but do not advance the main story. 支线任务㉿㉿现已可用。 可用支线任务㉿将会在霍格沃茨地区以㉿标记，并通过探索世界来发现。完成任务即可获得经验值奖励，但不会推动主线故事。
TUT_Oppugno: Ancient Magic Throw|古代魔法投掷
TUT_OwlMail1_desc: You have received an Owl Post.|你已获得一份猫头鹰邮递。
TUT_OwlMail2_desc:
Owl Post will be sent when characters you've met have requests or updates for you. 

Select Professor Fig to see his Owl Post.
当已经见过的角色有请求或者是新的任务信息，他们将会托猫头鹰给你带信。

选择菲戈教授以查看他的猫头鹰邮递。
TUT_PerceptionIcons_desc: Nearby adversaries will sense and then investigate suspicious behaviour. Being caught by authority figures will result in quest failure. 附近的敌人㉿将感知㉿并调查㉿可疑行为。被高阶人员抓到㉿会导致任务失败。
TUT_QuickPathing_desc:
Cast Charmed Compass {AM_Navigation}

The Charmed Compass will lead you to anything you're tracking.
施放魔法罗盘

魔法罗盘将指引你前往正在追踪的一切目标。
TUT_QuickPathing_desc2: The Charmed Compass {AM_Navigation} will lead you to anything you're tracking.|魔法罗盘  将指引你前往正在追踪的一切目标。
TUT_Reparo_desc: This is the tutorial for Reparo.|这里是修复如初的教学。
TUT_SlottingSpells_Part1_desc:
Before you can cast Levioso, you need to equip it to your Spell Set.

Press {UMGActionScreenToggle} to open the Spell Selection Menu.
施放“啦唯啊萨”之前，你首先需要将这种魔咒装备至咒语组。

按  开启咒语选择菜单。
TUT_SlottingSpells_Part2_desc:
To use an action, you must first add it to your Spell Set. Add Levioso to your Spell Set now.

Hover over Levioso and hold {SpellModifierButton}.
若要使用一个动作，你首先必须在咒语组中进行装备。将“啦唯啊萨”添加至你的咒语组。

选择“啦唯啊萨”并长按 。
TUT_SlottingSpells_Part3_desc: Press {UMGFaceButtonRight} to close the Spell Selection Menu.|按  关闭咒语选择菜单。
TUT_SlottingSpellsAccio_Part1_desc:
Before you can cast Accio, first you must equip it to your Spell Set.

Press {UMGActionScreenToggle} to open the Spell Selection Menu.
施放飞来咒之前，你首先需要将这种魔咒装备至咒语组。

按  开启咒语选择菜单。
TUT_SlottingSpellsAccio_Part2_desc:
The Spell Selection screen shows all your available actions. To use an action, you must first place it on your Spell Set.

Hover over Accio and hold {SpellModifierButton}.
咒语选择界面将展示你所有的可用动作。若要使用一个动作，你首先必须在咒语组中进行装备。

选择飞来咒并长按。
TUT_SlottingSpellsAccio_Part3_desc:
Now you're ready to cast Accio.

Press {UMGFaceButtonRight} to close the Spell Selection Menu.
现在你已经可以施放飞来咒。

按  关闭咒语选择菜单。
TUT_StudiesScreen: Studies Menu Screen|学习菜单界面
TUT_Stupefy_desc: Hold {Protego} during Protego to stun enemies with a Stupefy counter-attack. 在“盔甲护身”㉿ 期间按住 ，用“昏昏倒地”㉿ 的反击来晕眩敌人。
TUT_ZZC_AccioSpell_desc: The Summoning Charm, Accio , pulls a target closer to the caster. Hold {SpellModifierButton} and press the assigned button to cast Accio and pull a target closer. Release {SpellModifierButton} to cease casting the spell. 召唤魔咒“飞来” ㉿ 将目标拉向施法者。按住 并按下所分配的按钮将施放“飞来咒”进一步拉近目标。放开可停止施法。
TUT_ZZC_AccioSpell_desc|PS4: The Summoning Charm, Accio , pulls a target closer to the caster. Hold {SpellModifierButton} and press the assigned button to cast Accio and pull a target closer. Press the button again to cease casting the spell. 召唤魔咒“飞来咒”㉿可将目标拉近施法者。按住并按下所分配的按键，以施放“飞来咒”并将目标拉近。再次按下按键可停止施法。
TUT_ZZC_AccioSpell_desc|PS5: The Summoning Charm, Accio , pulls a target closer to the caster. Hold {SpellModifierButton} and press the assigned button to cast Accio and pull a target closer. Press the button again to cease casting the spell. 召唤魔咒“飞来咒”㉿可将目标拉近施法者。按住并按下所分配的按键，以施放“飞来咒”并将目标拉近。再次按下按键可停止施法。
TUT_ZZC_AccioSpell_desc|SWITCH: The Summoning Charm, Accio , pulls a target closer to the caster. Hold {SpellModifierButton} and press the assigned button to cast Accio and pull a target closer. Press the button again to cease casting the spell. 召唤魔咒“飞来咒”㉿可将目标拉近施法者。按住并按下所分配的按键，以施放“飞来咒”并将目标拉近。再次按下按键可停止施法。
TUT_ZZC_AccioSpell_desc|XBOXONE: The Summoning Charm, Accio , pulls a target closer to the caster. Hold {SpellModifierButton} and press the assigned button to cast Accio and pull a target closer. Press the button again to cease casting the spell. 召唤魔咒“飞来咒”㉿可将目标拉近施法者。按住并按下所分配的按钮，以施放“飞来咒”并将目标拉近。再次按下按钮可停止施法。
TUT_ZZC_AccioSpell_desc|XSX: The Summoning Charm, Accio , pulls a target closer to the caster. Hold {SpellModifierButton} and press the assigned button to cast Accio and pull a target closer. Press the button again to cease casting the spell. 召唤魔咒“飞来咒”㉿可将目标拉近施法者。按住并按下所分配的按钮，以施放“飞来咒”并将目标拉近。再次按下按钮可停止施法。
TUT_ZZC_AccioSpellPC_desc: The Summoning Charm, Accio , pulls a target closer to the caster. Tap the assigned key to cast Accio and pull a target closer. Tap the key again to cease casting the spell. 召唤魔咒“飞来咒”㉿可将目标拉近施咒者。点击所分配的按键来施放“飞来咒”并将目标拉近。再次点击该键来停止施咒。
TUT_ZZC_Ball_Aim: Hold {SpellModifierButton} and cast Accio on one of the balls. Release {SpellModifierButton} to stop casting Accio . 按住并在其中一个球上施展“飞来咒”㉿。释放以停止施展飞来咒㉿。
TUT_ZZC_Ball_AimPC: Tap the corresponding key on your Spell Set and cast Accio on one of the balls. Tap it again to stop casting Accio . 点击咒语组上的相应按键并将“飞来咒”㉿施放到其中一个球上。再次加以点击来停止施放“飞来咒”㉿。
TUT_ZZI_InteractObjects:
When you find key objects in Hogwarts, press {AM_Interact} to create an entry in your Wizard's Field Guide. Right afterward, press {UMGFaceButtonRight} to display the Field Guide details.
当你在霍格沃茨中找到关键物品时， 按  将在《巫师实战指南》中创建一个对应条目。之后立刻按  即可显示实战指南中的细节。
TutorialBeastShop_Desc:
Brood and Peck's shopkeeper, Ellie Peck, tries to find good homes for stranded beasts, and is the only vendor that will purchase beasts you've collected in your inventory.
“珍禽异兽”的店主埃莉·佩克试图为无依无靠的野兽寻找好的住处，并且是唯一会购买你在库存中所收集野兽的商贩。
TutorialDarkArtsArena_Desc:
You must rely on the Dark Arts alone. All other spells are forbidden during this combat encounter. 
你必须仅依靠黑魔法。在这场遭遇战中，所有其他咒语都被禁止。
TV_01_01_FindTreasure_Journal:
I have obtained a treasure map from a talking well near Aranshire. I should try to find where it leads.
我从阿兰郡附近的一个会说话的水井处得到一张藏宝图。我应该试着找出它通向的地方。
TV_01_01_FindTreasure_Location_Task: Use the Well's Treasure Map to find the treasure|循着水井中的藏宝图找到宝藏
TV_01_01_MissionActive_Journal:
I investigated the well southeast of Aranshire as a voice was calling from it. To my pleasant surprise, it was a talking well. It even coughed up a treasure map someone had thrown into it. The Well's Treasure Map depicts two sets of ruins separated by a bridge and waterfall. It seems one set of ruins has a large tree in it. Hopefully my curiosity will pay off.
我调查了阿兰郡东南部的一口井，里面传来了声音。令我惊喜的是，这是一个会说话的井。它甚至咳出了一张有人扔进去的藏宝图。井的藏宝图描绘了由一座桥和瀑布隔开的两组废墟。一组废墟中似乎有一棵大树。希望我的好奇心能得到回报。
TV_01_01_MissionActive_Task: Use the Well's Treasure Map to find the treasure|循着水井中的藏宝图找到宝藏
TV_01_02_TakeTreasure_Journal:
I’ve located the ruins with the large tree denoted by The Well's Treasure Map south of Irondale. Now to solve the map’s riddle.
我已在艾恩代尔以南之井的藏宝图上找到带有大树的废墟。现在要解决地图的谜题。
TV_01_AThiefsTreasure_LineComplete_Journ:
The large tree sketched on the Well's Treasure Map was holding a treasure chest within its roots. I figured out that it needed to be magically lifted to reveal the chest, and in turn, its treasure. Whomever concocted this method of hiding their treasure was clever. I’ll certainly put it to good use.
井藏宝图上描绘的那棵大树，其树根处藏着一个盒子。我发现需要通过魔法将其抬起，才能让盒子露出，进而揭露宝藏。想出这种宝藏隐藏方式的人很聪明。我一定会好好利用它。
TV_01_MissionAvailable_Journal:
I came across a well southeast of Aranshire inside some old ruins and heard a voice coming from it. I should investigate it.
我在阿兰郡东南部的古老废墟中发现了一口井，并听到一个声音从井中传出。我应该调查一下。
TV_01_ThiefsTreasure_Task: Find the treasure map|找到藏宝图
TV_02: The Ghost of Our Love|我们的爱幽灵
TV_02_01_FindingHufflepuffsTreasure_Titl: Finding a Hufflepuff's Treasure|找到赫奇帕奇的宝藏
TV_02_01_FindingRavenclawsTreasure_Title: Finding a Ravenclaw's Treasure|找到拉文克劳的宝藏
TV_02_01_FindingSlytherinsTreasure_Title: Finding a Slytherin's Treasure|找到斯莱特林的宝藏
TV_02_01_GRYF_ActiveJournal:
I decided to look at the map in the Hogsmeade Graveyard and it held some cryptic visual clues. A forest scene, bridge and candles were all conveyed. I think this leads to a treasure of some sort. I’ve decided to take this map and see where it leads. 
我决定看一看霍格莫德墓地的地图，里面有一些神秘的视觉线索，包括森林场景、桥梁和蜡烛。我认为这会通往某种宝藏，并决定拿这张地图看看它通向哪里。
TV_02_01_GRYF_AvailableJournal:
I noticed a small map sitting on a gravestone in the Hogsmeade Graveyard. While this may belong to someone, it might not hurt to take a peek at it in case it holds valuable information.
我注意到霍格莫德墓地的墓碑上放着一张小地图。虽然这可能属于某人，但如果它包含有价值的资讯，那么偷看它可能不会有什么坏处。
TV_02_01_HUFF_ActiveJournal:
I opened that unlocked chest behind Claire Beaumont’s stall. In it was a map that appears to lead to something hidden; perhaps even a treasure. The map portrays a forest, bridge and candles. I’ve taken the map and plan to decipher its clues.
我打开了克莱拉·比约蒙特摊位后面那个没有上锁的盒子。里面有一张地图，似乎通向隐藏的东西；甚至可能是宝藏。该地图描绘了森林、桥梁和蜡烛。我拿了地图，打算破译它的线索。
TV_02_01_HUFF_AvailableJournal:
While in Upper Hogsfield, I spied a chest behind Claire Beaumont’s vendor stall that seemed to be unlocked. I wonder what could be in it.
在上霍格米村时，我在克莱拉·比约蒙特的小贩摊位后面发现了一个似乎没有上锁的盒子。我想知道里面可能有什么。
TV_02_01_RAV_ActiveJournal:
I peeked at the map I found in the upper level of the Owlery. It conveys clues that resemble a forest, candles and a bridge. I’m not quite sure what this means, but have decided to take the map for further reference should I decide to decipher its clues.
我偷看了在猫头鹰屋上层找到的地图。它传达了类似于森林、蜡烛和桥梁的线索。我不太确定这意味着什么，但为了破译它的线索，我决定拿这张地图做为进一步的参考。
TV_02_01_RAV_AvailableJournal:
While in the Owlery, I came upon a Treasure Map at the top of the tower. I’m not sure whom it belonged to, but it might not hurt to take a peek.
在猫头鹰屋时，我在高塔顶发现了一张藏宝图。我不确定它属于谁，但偷看一下可能不会有什么坏处。
TV_02_01_SLY_ActiveJournal:
I peered into the small chest and recovered a map full of visual clues. The map portrays a forest, a bridge and candles. I’ve decided to keep the map for further reference should I decide to pursue its leads and see what secrets it hides.
我凝视着小盒子，找到了一张充满视觉线索的地图。地图描绘了森林、桥梁和蜡烛。为了追查它的线索并看看它隐藏了什么秘密，我决定保留这张地图以供进一步参考。
TV_02_01_SLY_AvailableJournal:
I discovered Apollonia’s Hideout underneath Hogwarts from a cave along the coast of Black Lake. Inside it was a small chest tucked behind a larger chest. I wonder what’s left inside it.
我从黑湖沿岸的一个洞穴中发现了霍格沃茨地下的阿博格罗妮亚藏身处。里面是一个小盒子，其藏在一个大盒子后面。我想知道里面还有什么。
TV_02_AGryffindorsGain_Title: A Gryffindor's Gain|格兰芬多的收获
TV_02_AHufflepuffsHoard_Title: A Hufflepuff's Hoard|赫奇帕奇的宝藏
TV_02_ARavenclawsReward_Title: A Ravenclaw's Reward|拉文克劳的奖励
TV_02_ASlytherinsStash_Title: A Slytherin's Stash|斯莱特林的储藏
TV_02_FindingHiddenTreasure_Title: Finding Hidden Treasure|寻找隐藏的宝藏
TV_02_GhostofOurLove_QuestTitle: Ghost of Our Love|我们的爱幽灵
TV_02_Gryff: The Ghost of Our Love|我们的爱幽灵
TV_02_Huff: The Ghost of Our Love|我们的爱幽灵
TV_02_LineComplete_Journal:
The map led to a bridge just outside the Forbidden Forest. Casting Lumos on the bridge at night-time resulted in charmed candles appearing and leading me through the Forbidden Forest to a specific location where a treasure chest appeared! I opened the chest and took its treasure. Whoever did this was quite clever. But why?
地图通向禁林外的一座桥。夜间在桥上施放“荧光闪烁”时，出现了施有魔法的蜡烛，并引导我穿过禁林进而到达宝箱出现的特定位置！我打开盒子，拿走了它的宝藏。想出这方法的人非常聪明。但为什么？
TV_02_MissionActive_Journal: I'm determined to see what treasure the map I found leads to.|我下定决心要看看所找到的地图会通往什么宝藏。
TV_02_MissionActive_StepJournal:
The map portrays a forest, bridge and candles. I’ve put it into my bag for reference. 
该地图描绘了森林、桥梁和蜡烛。我已把它放在我的包里以供参考。
TV_02_MissionActive_Task: Use the Map with Floating Candles to find the treasure|使用带有浮动蜡烛的地图寻找宝藏
TV_02_QuestAvailable_Journal: I found a map while exploring. I should investigate it to see where it leads.|我在探索时发现了一张地图。我应该调查它，看看它通向何方。
TV_02_Rav: The Ghost of Our Love|我们的爱幽灵
TV_02_Sly: The Ghost of Our Love|我们的爱幽灵
TV_02_TreasureWorthHiding_Journal: I've learned that a curious map has yet to be found. I mean to seek it out.|我得知有张奇异的地图尚待发现。我决定要找到它。
TV_02_TreasureWorthHiding_Task: Find the treasure map|找到藏宝图
TV_02_TreasureWorthHiding_Title: A Treasure Worth Hiding|值得隐藏的宝藏
TV_03: A Tale of Treachery|背叛的传说
TV_03_01_MissionActive_Journal01:
The map portrays stone monoliths near a waterfall along with a series of floor tiles that contain symbols on them.
该地图描绘了瀑布附近的巨石，以及一系列带有符号的地砖。
TV_03_01_MissionActive_Task01: Use the Mysterious Map Fragment to find the treasure|使用神秘地图碎片找到宝藏
TV_03_01_MissionComplete:
I reached the location denoted by the Mysterious Map Fragment from the locked chest I found in an old manor. It led me to a crypt in the Southern Coast where I found a chamber containing a series of floor tiles—the same tiles drawn on the map. Casting Flipendo at the tiles revealed symbols on their undersides. I used the Mysterious Map Fragment to reveal the correct symbols, resulting in a treasure chest rising from the floor. Clever way to hide such a valuable ensemble. I’ll wear it proudly.
我到达了古老庄园的上锁箱子里神秘地图碎片所指示的位置。它把我带到了南部海岸的一个地下室，在那里我发现了一个密室，里面有一系列地砖，与地图上绘制的地砖相同。对地砖使用“退敌三尺”会显示出其底部的符号。我按照神秘地图碎片的指示揭露出正确的符号排列，一个宝箱就从地板上升了起来。用这种方式隐藏如此珍贵的装扮还真是巧妙。我会自豪地穿上它。
TV_03_CursedTombTreasure_QuestTitle: Cursed Tomb Treasure|被诅咒的古墓宝藏
TV_03_FindingFortune_Journal: Another antique map. I wonder what treasure it may be hiding.|另一张古董地图。我想知道它可能藏着什么宝藏。
TV_03_FindingFortune_Task: Find the treasure map|找到藏宝图
TV_03_MissionAvailable_Journal:
While exploring the basement of an old manor near the Southern Coast, I came upon a locked chest. I should unlock the chest to see what it holds.
在探索南部海岸附近的古老庄园的地下室时，我发现了一个锁着的盒子。我应该打开盒子看看里面有什么。
TV_03_MissionAvailable_Task: Open the locked chest under the old manor in Manor Glen|打开格伦庄园下锁着的盒子
TV_03_MissionJournal:
I cast Alohomora on the locked chest in the basement of an old manor, revealing a treasure map contained within. The Mysterious Map Fragment depicts a waterfall, some stone monoliths and what looks like a series of floor tiles. I should remember to refer to it in my adventures to discover what secrets it holds.
我对古老庄园地下室锁着的盒子施放了“阿拉霍洞开”，里面的藏宝图随即揭露。神秘地图碎片描绘了一个瀑布、一些巨石和看起来像一系列地砖的东西。我得记得在冒险中参考它，以发掘其中所拥有的秘密。
TwelveAndAHalf: Twelve and a half inches|十二又二分之一英寸
TwelveAndAQuarter: Twelve and a quarter inches|十二又四分之一英寸
TwelveAndThreeQuarters: Twelve and three-quarters inches|十二又四分之三英寸
TwigBallToy_desc: A ball made from twigs, used for playing with certain beasts|用嫩枝制成的球，用来与某些野兽玩耍
UI_LockNotification: You've unlocked something special!|你解锁了一些特别的东西！
Unicorn_Byproduct_desc:
The hair is shed by the swift and beautiful Unicorns inhabiting the Forbidden Forest. Unicorn hair can be used to upgrade and assign traits to gear.
居住在禁林之中，迅捷而又美丽的独角兽褪下的毛。独角兽毛可用于强化装备和为其分配特质。
Unicorn_desc:
The Unicorn is a shy and beautiful equine beast that sports a horn from its head. The foals are said to have shimmering golden coats.
独角兽是一种害羞而美丽的马兽，头上长着一个角。据说小马驹有闪闪发光的金色皮毛。
UnicornBallToy_desc: An enchanted bubble that can be used to entertain certain beats|一个可以用来娱乐某些野兽的魔法泡泡
UnicornDen_desc: A den inhabited by unicorns|独角兽居住的巢穴
UnicornHairCore_Desc:
The hair of a unicorn that serves as the core of a wand, known for producing consistent magic
用作魔杖杖芯的独角兽毛，能够释放极其稳定的魔力
UnicornOffspring_desc: A newly born Unicorn|一只新生的独角兽
Unknown_desc:
You have yet to discover this. Keep exploring the world to unlock all of its secrets.
尚未发现。继续探索以解开所有秘密。
Vanishment_desc: Vanishes items and returns moonstone when cast within the Room of Requirement|在有求必应屋内施放时将消除物体并返还月石
VENDOR_CauldronShop: Suave and knowledgeable shopkeeper of Ceridwen's Cauldrons.|凯丽德温坩埚店的店主，精明而且睿智。
VENDOR_MusicShop: Flutes and Lutes Shopkeeper|丝竹管弦老板
VENDOR_TeaShop: Steeply and Sons Shopkeeper|斯蒂普莱茶馆老板
VendorCategory_GearPatchRecipes: Gear Patch Recipes|装备补丁配方
VendorCategory_SanctuaryItems: Room of Requirement Items|有求必应屋物品
VENDORCauldronShop: Ceridwen's Cauldrons Shopkeeper|凯丽德温的炼药锅店主
VENDORMusicShop: Flutes and Lutes Shopkeeper|丝竹管弦老板
VendorShopName_AlbieWeekes: Spintwitches Sporting Needs|旋转女巫体育必需品
VendorShopName_AugustusHill: Gladrags Wizardwear|风雅牌巫师服装店
VENDORTeaShop: Steeply and Sons Shopkeeper|斯蒂普莱茶馆老板
VenomousSpider_tip_one_desc:
This spider's toxic spit is temporarily poisonous, but can be avoided by using a Shield Charm or getting out of the way. Consuming any magical healing item will reverse the draining effects of the poison.
这只蜘蛛毒液的毒性是暂时的，但可以通过使用护盾魔咒或躲避来保护自己。服用任何魔法治疗品都能逆转毒液的影响。
VenomousSpiderMatriarch_tip_one_desc:
This monstrosity rears up as it is about to strike its target with a powerful bite that breaks through Shield Charms. The most obvious defence is to dodge out of the way.
这种怪物会站起身来，并准备随时用强大的啃咬穿透目标，突破护盾魔咒。在那种时候，闪躲是你最好的防御选择。
VenomousTentacula_Byproduct_desc:
Tenacious Tentacula that when deployed shoot acid at nearby enemies. Venomous Tentacula seeds can be purchased at Dogweed & Deathcap. Must be grown in large pots.
死缠烂打的触手，部署后将对周遭敌人喷射酸液。可以在“茱萸和毒菇”购买毒触手种子。只能在大型花盆中种植。
VenomousTentacula_Desc:
Tenacious Tentacula that when deployed shoot acid at nearby enemies. Venomous Tentacula seeds can be purchased at Dogweed & Deathcap. Must be grown in large pots.
死缠烂打的触手，部署后将对周遭敌人喷射酸液。可以在“茱萸和毒菇”购买毒触手种子。只能在大型花盆中种植。
VenomousTentacula_Seed_Desc: Unlocks the ability to grow Venomous Tentacula in large pots|解锁使用大型花盆种植毒触手的能力
ViewDistanceQuality: View Distance Quality|查看距离品质
ViewDistanceQuality_desc:
Set the view distance quality. Higher quality increases fidelity of objects in the distance and the distance at which small detail appears. Impacts CPU, GPU performance and VRAM requirements.
设置视距品质。较高的品质会增加远处物体的保真度以及小细节出现的距离。影响CPU、GPU性能和VRAM要求。
VioletMcDowell: Violet McDowell|维奥莱特·麦克道维
WayMarker_Desc: This is a waypoint marker placed by the player|玩家放置的路径点标记
WEE_01_LighthouseSubGoal: Speak with Professor Weasley|与韦斯莱教授交谈
WEE_01_WeasleysRecap_QuestAvailable_Jour:
I need to meet with Professor Weasley in her office in the Transfiguration classroom.
我需要在变形学教室的办公室见韦斯莱教授。
Professor Weasley would like to see me in her office.|韦斯莱教授想在她的办公室见我。
WEE_01_WeasleysRecap_QuestAvailable_Task:
I need to meet with Professor Weasley in her office in the Transfiguration classroom.
我需要在变形学教室的办公室见韦斯莱教授。
WEE_01_WeasleysRecap_QuestComplete_Journ:
I visited Professor Weasley in her office and we discussed the death of Professor Fig. Then we went over my performance according to the Field Guide, and she was impressed with how busy I've been keeping myself all year. I will say that she knew a bit more about my activities this year than I suspected.
我在韦斯莱教授的办公室拜访了她，我们讨论到菲戈教授的死亡。然后我们根据实战指南回顾了我的表现，她对我一年来持续保持忙碌印象深刻。我敢说她对我今年行径的了解比我想象的还要多一些。
WEE_01_WeasleysWatchfulEye_QuestTitle: Weasley's Watchful Eye|韦斯莱的警惕之眼
WEE_EndYearReport_QuestAvailable_TaskObj: Talk to Professor Weasley|与韦斯莱教授交谈

WeebleToy_desc: A beast toy that is made to look like a wizard|一种看起来像巫师的野兽玩具
WEK_01_01_LateStart_StepJournal:
I need to head to my common room. Sounds as though there are some voices coming from nearby – perhaps I should follow them.
我需要前往我的公共休息室。好像有一些声音从附近传来——也许我应该跟上去一探究竟。

WEK_01_02_AwkwardIntros_StepJournal:
I should probably introduce myself to some of my fellow students, however uncomfortable it may be.
我可能得向一些同学自我介绍，无论这可能有多令人不自在。

WEK_01_Gryff_03_MeetWeasley_StepJournal:
Professor Weasley is waiting for me outside the common room. I should report to her there.
韦斯莱教授在公共休息室外等我。我应该在那里向她报告。
WEK_01_Gryff_05_CollectPage_StepJournal:
Professor Weasley says the Revelio Charm will uncover the hidden guide page. I should try casting it.
韦斯莱教授说原形立现魔咒会揭开隐藏的指南页面。我应该尝试施展它。
WEK_01_Gryff_06_FollowAgain_StepJournal:
Professor Weasley said she has more to show me. I should follow her to find out what she has in mind.
韦斯莱教授说她还有更多东西要给我看。我应该跟着她去了解她的想法。

今天是我在霍格沃茨的第一天！我应该尽快前往公共休息室并开始今天的日程。
WEK_01_WalkingWithWeasley_QuestComplete_:
Professor Weasley gave me a special book called a Wizard's Field Guide to help me catch up with my fellow fifth-years. She and Professor Fig taught me how to use it. Now I've been directed to my first classes of the day.
韦斯莱教授给了我一本名为《巫师的实战指南》的特别书籍，以帮助我赶上五年级的同学。她和菲戈教授教我如何使用它。现在我已被引导到今天的第一堂课。
