WET_01: Weasley After Class|韦斯莱下课后
WET_01_01_SpellPractice_Journal: Professor Weasley has one more thing she wants to talk with me about.|韦斯莱教授还有一件事要和我谈。
WET_01_LighthouseSubGoal: Meet with Professor Weasley|与韦斯莱教授见面
WET_01_SpellPractice_QuestAvailalbe_Jour:
Professor Weasley wants to see me in her classroom which is off the Transfiguration Courtyard, located between the Library Annex and the Astronomy Wing. Hopefully she has word on replacing my lost supplies.
韦斯莱教授想在她的教室里见我，那间教室就在变形学庭院外，位于图书馆附楼和天文学区之间。希望她有关于更换我遗失的用品的消息。
Professor Weasley wants to see me in the Transfiguration classroom.|韦斯莱教授想在变形学教室见我。
WET_01_SpellPractice_QuestAvailalbe_Task: Meet Professor Weasley in the Transfiguration classroom|与韦斯莱教授在变形学教室会面
WET_01_SpellPractice_QuestComplete_Journ:
I met with Professor Weasley and she's arranged for me to go to Hogsmeade with a companion. I've decided to invite Natty as she seems to be a good witch to have on your side. Before I go, she needs me to complete an assignment for Professor Ronen.
我遇到了韦斯莱教授，她安排我和一个同伴一起去霍格莫德。我决定邀请娜娜，因为她似乎是一个很适合在身边的女巫。在我走之前，她需要我为罗南教授完成一项作业。

I met with Professor Weasley and she's arranged for me to go to Hogsmeade with a companion. I've decided to invite Sebastian as he seems to be a good wizard to have on your side. Before I go, she needs me to complete an assignment for Professor Ronen.
我遇到了韦斯莱教授，她安排我和一个同伴一起去霍格莫德。我决定邀请塞巴斯蒂安，因为他似乎是一个很适合在身边的巫师。在我走之前，她需要我为罗南教授完成一项作业。
WET_01_WeasleyAfterClass_QuestTitle: Weasley After Class|韦斯莱下课后
wet_weasleyafterclass_questtitle: Weasley After Class|韦斯莱下课后

Wingardium: Wingardium Leviosa|羽加迪姆·勒维奥萨
Wingardium_desc:
Levitates and controls a movable object. Control its position with your movement and use {WingardiumFurther} {WingardiumNearer} {WingardiumRotateLeft} {WingardiumRotateRight} to fine-tune its distance and rotation. Wingardium Leviosa is automatically cast on objects summoned to you with Accio.
飘浮并控制一个可移动的目标。用你的移动来控制它的位置并通过     来微调它的距离与旋转。“羽加迪姆·勒维奥萨”将会自动施展在使用“飞来咒”所召唤的物体上。
WingardiumLeviosa: Wingardium Leviosa|羽加迪姆·勒维奥萨
WingardiumLeviosa_Desc:
Levitates and controls a movable object. Control its position with your movement and use {WingardiumFurther} {WingardiumNearer} {WingardiumRotateLeft} {WingardiumRotateRight} to fine-tune its distance and rotation. Wingardium Leviosa is automatically cast on objects summoned to you with Accio.

Wolf_Byproduct_desc:
Tufts of fur gathered from fearsome mongrels. The ingredient is used as part of the Edurus Potion.
从凶狠恶犬身上收集来的毛发。用于调配艾德鲁斯魔药的原料。
wolf_death: Death's Dark Mongrel|死神的黑暗恶犬
Wolf_Death_desc:
These murderous beasts obey only Death, leading souls to him at every opportunity.
这些嗜杀成性的野兽忠心耿耿地遵从着死神的指令，为他带去了源源不断的灵魂。
Wolf_desc:
Keeping as much distance as possible from Dark Mongrels will make dealing with them relatively easy.

If it gets in close, its attacks can be repelled with Shield Charms and then a counterattack with any mastered spells.

As it begins to charge in from afar, blasting it backwards with Depulso is particularly effective.
只需要尽可能与黑暗恶犬保持距离，就能轻松解决这些捕食者。

如果狼群过于靠近，记得使用护盾魔咒抵挡攻击，然后利用自己掌握的各类魔咒发动反击。

当发现它从远处发起冲锋，利用“统统飞走”便能有效击退它。
Wolf_tip_one_desc:
Keeping as much distance as possible from Dark Mongrels will make dealing with them relatively easy.
只需要尽可能与黑暗恶犬保持距离，就能轻松解决这些捕食者。
Wolf_tip_three_desc:
As it begins to charge in from afar, blasting it backwards with Depulso is particularly effective.
当发现它从远处发起冲锋，利用“统统飞走”便能有效击退它。
Wolf_tip_two_desc:
If it gets in close, its attacks can be repelled with Shield Charms and then a counterattack with any mastered spells.
如果狼群过于靠近，记得使用护盾魔咒抵挡攻击，然后利用自己掌握的各类魔咒发动反击。
WolfDeath: Death's Dark Mongrel|死神的黑暗恶犬
WolfDeath_desc:
These murderous beasts obey only Death, leading souls to him at every opportunity.
这些嗜杀成性的野兽忠心耿耿地遵从着死神的指令，为他带去了源源不断的灵魂。
WolvesLair_desc: A den inhabited by mongrels|恶犬居住的巢穴
Wood_Acacia_desc: This sensitive wood is best suited to gifted owners of sufficient subtlety.|这种灵敏的木材最合适那些同样低调敏锐的主人。
Wood_Alder_desc:
This loyal wood makes for a wand that is ideal for an owner who is helpful and considerate.
这种忠诚木材制成的魔杖最适合体贴而且乐于助人之人。
Wood_Apple_desc: This powerful wood often finds its match in an owner of high aims and ideals.|这种强力木材最适合那些有着远大志向之人。
Wood_Ash_desc:
This prestigious wood is best suited to an owner with strong convictions, one who is perhaps even stubborn, but never arrogant.
这种尊贵木材最适合那些拥有坚毅决心之人，哪怕会被别人认为是固执，但也绝不会傲慢。
Wood_Aspen_desc:
This exquisite wand wood is well-suited for Charmwork and duelling, and matches well with a strong-minded and determined owner.
这种精致的魔杖木材最合适用来施放魔咒与参加决斗，而且适合那些内心强大且坚定的主人。
Wood_Beech_desc:
This wood prefers an owner who is wise beyond their years, broad-minded, and tolerant.
这种木材喜好比自身年龄更睿智，心胸开阔又有包容心的主人。
Wood_Blackthorn_desc:
This loyal wood is well-suited to a warrior and bonds well with its owner through hardship and danger.
这种忠诚的木材最适合战士使用且通过艰辛和危险与其主人很好的结合。
Wood_BlackWalnut_desc: This handsome wood requires an owner who is honest and self-aware.|这种美观的木材最适合正直而又自省之人。
Wood_Cedar_desc:
This wand wood is often found in the hands of an owner who possesses great strength of character and exceptional loyalty.
这种魔杖木材通常可在拥有高尚品格并极为忠诚的主人手中找到。
Wood_Cherry_desc:
This rare wand wood requires an owner of exceptional self-control and strength of mind.
这种稀有的魔杖木材需要高度自控与强大心智之人。
Wood_Chesnut_desc:
This multi-faceted wood will do well in the hands of a witch or wizard gifted in Herbology, natural flight, and handling magical beasts.
奇妙而具有多面性的木材，契合那些在植物学，自然飞行和对付魔法野兽方面有天赋女巫及巫师。
Wood_Chestnut_desc:
This multi-faceted wood will do well in the hands of a witch or wizard gifted in Herbology, natural flight, and handling magical beasts.
这种八面玲珑的木材适合那些在植物学，自然飞行和对付魔法野兽方面有天赋的女巫与巫师。
Wood_Cypress_desc:
This noble wood is best for the witch or wizard who is brave, bold, and self-sacrificing.
这种高贵的木料最适合那些勇敢、大胆而且不畏牺牲的女巫与巫师。
Wood_Dogwood_desc:
This wand wood is ideal for an owner who is entertaining, quirky, and mischievous.
这种魔杖木料最适合与众不同的顽皮之人。
Wood_Ebony_desc:
Reputed for its skill with combative magic, this wood is best suited to an owner with the courage to be themselves, even if that means they are labelled as an outsider.
尤其以对于战斗魔法的熟稔而出名，这种木料最适合那些哪怕饱受误解与排挤，也会一往无前展现自我之人。
Wood_Elder_desc:
The rarest of all wand wood types, elder demands an unusual, but powerful master.
天底下最为稀少罕见的魔杖木料，只有非比寻常而又出类拔萃之人才能驾驭接骨木。
Wood_Elm_desc: This dignified wood prefers owners with presence and magical dexterity.|这种高雅的木料偏好那些气质非凡和魔法灵巧之人。
Wood_EnglishOak_desc:
This loyal wood requires a partner who possesses equal fidelity, courage, and intuition.
这种忠诚的木料需要一个同样忠贞不二、勇敢而且直觉过人的搭档。
Wood_Fir_desc:
Harvested from the most resilient of trees, this wood demands an owner with focus and strength of purpose.
采集自最为坚韧的树木，这种木料需要拥有着决心与毅力之人。
Wood_Hawthorn_desc:
Intriguing and complex, hawthorn is well-suited to a master with a conflicted nature who possesses proven magical talent.
引人入胜而又复杂多变，山楂树最适合那些性格矛盾而又拥有着成熟的魔法天赋的大师。
Wood_Hazel_desc:
This sensitive wood type, devoted to its owner, performs best for someone who understands and manages their emotions well.
这种生性敏感的木料，忠诚于主人，最适合那些能够理解与管理自身情绪之人。
Wood_Holly_desc:
This protective wood often chooses an owner who is engaged in a dangerous and frequently spiritual or moral quest.
这种坚强的木料通常会选择那些拥抱危险，踏上灵性或者是俗世寻觅之旅的主人。
Wood_Hornbeam_desc:
This wood type adapts more quickly to its owner's individual style of magic than any other, and selects a mate with a talent for a single, pure passion.
这种木料能够极好地适应各种魔法风格，而且会选择对单一天赋有着专注热情之人。
Wood_Larch_desc:
Reputed for instilling courage and confidence in its owner, larch often chooses a match who doesn't realise the extent of their talents.
以能够为主人带来勇气与自信的特质而闻名，落叶松通常会选择那些尚未完全发掘自身天赋之人。
Wood_Laurel_desc:
Intensely loyal and intolerable of laziness, laurel wood is rarely used in a dishonourable act, but may surprise an owner on a quest for glory.
绝对忠诚而且绝不容忍懒惰，月桂木几乎不会用在不光彩的行为上，却可能会让那些追寻荣耀之人感到惊喜。
Wood_Maple_desc:
Explorers and travellers will often find their match in maple as this wood requires an ambitious, high-achieving master.
探险家与旅行者们的选择，枫木会选择那些志向高远之人。
Wood_Pear_desc:
Best suited to the warm-hearted and generous, pear will often choose a match who is popular and well-respected.
与那些慷慨热心之人最为相配，梨木通常会选择那些备受欢迎，万人敬仰的人。
Wood_Pine_desc:
This wood always chooses an owner who is independent, intriguing, and even mysterious.
这种木料永远会选择独立、有趣而且散发着神秘气质之人做主人。
Wood_Poplar_desc:
A reliable wood of consistency and strength, poplar requires a master with clear moral vision.
坚毅可靠的木料，杨木需要内心拥有着清晰的道德指针之人。
Wood_RedOak_desc:
Red Oak is a wood that prefers an owner who is quick-witted, adaptable, and light of touch.
红橡木喜好那些机智而又温柔细腻的主人。
Wood_Redwood_desc:
Known for bringing its owner good fortune, Redwood is strongly attracted to those who are able to land squarely on their feet and make the right choice in the moment.
红木被认为是一种会给主人带来好运的木料，它们会受到那些脚踏实地并能做出正确选择之人的吸引。
Wood_Rowan_desc:
Rowan matches well with a clear-headed and pure-hearted owner, and is an excellent wand for duelling.
山梨木最适合那些头脑清晰而且心地善良之人，并且是用来决斗的出色魔杖。
Wood_SilverLime_desc:
This unusually handsome wood is a good match for one who is gifted in the mysterious arts, like a Seer or a Legilimens.
这种异常瑰丽的木料最适合对神秘之术有天赋的主人，像是先知或者摄神取念者。
Wood_Spruce_desc:
Spruce wood requires an owner who is firm, bold, and confident and often does well with someone possessed of a good sense of humour.
云杉木需要一个坚定、大胆、自信且常常具有幽默感的主人。
Wood_Sycamore_desc:
A questing wood, eager for new experiences, Sycamore is best suited to an owner who is curious and adventurous.
渴望着见证新事物的好奇木料，悬铃木最适合那些好充满好奇心与冒险精神的主人。
Wood_Vine_desc:
Vine is an uncommon wood type that is attracted to personalities who possess hidden depth, seek greater purpose, and can perceive the extraordinary.
藤木是一种不同寻常的木料，它们会受到那些富有层次的，有更远大目标且可以感知非凡之人所吸引。
Wood_Walnut_desc:
A wood for the highly intelligent and versatile, walnut is most happily placed in the hands of magical innovators and inventors.
智慧与灵活兼并的木料，胡桃木最适合那些魔法世界中的发明家与创造家。
Wood_Willow_desc:
This uncommon wood consistently selects an owner who has great potential yet is not naive enough to presume they have little to learn.
这种不同寻常的木料永远会选中那些拥有巨大潜力却又虚心学习的主人。
Wood_Yew_desc:
This rare wood has a reputation for choosing an owner who is sometimes notorious, but never mediocre or timid and a fierce protector of others.
一种稀有的木料，以选择那些有时恶名昭著却拒绝平庸也从不胆怯，会勇敢挺身保护他人的主人而闻名。
WoodlouseSpider_tip_one: Araneus Thornback Tip One|刺背鬼蛛（提示一）
WoodlouseSpider_tip_one_desc:
All types of magical spiders are quite vulnerable to fire, especially at low health.
所有类型的魔法蜘蛛都怕火，当它们生命值垂危时尤是如此。
WoodlouseSpider_tip_three_desc:
When these spiders begin to burrow, Flipendo will rip them out of the ground, dealing massive damage.
当这些蜘蛛开始钻地，使用“退敌三尺”可将它们从地下翻出，造成巨大伤害。
WoodlouseSpider_tip_two_desc:
Fire attacks will ignite the spider while it is low on health, causing it to skitter about frantically before it dies. If it takes further damage before it dies, it will explode, hitting nearby targets.
火焰攻击将会点燃蜘蛛，使其在死前疯狂地四处乱窜。在这种状态下，如果蜘蛛死亡前遭受了进一步的伤害，它们将会自爆并伤害周遭目标。
WoodlouseSpiderMatriarch_tip_one_desc:
This monstrosity rears up as it is about to strike its target with a powerful bite that breaks through Shield Charms. The most obvious defence is to dodge out of the way.
这种怪物会站起身来，并准备随时用强大的啃咬穿透目标，突破护盾魔咒。在那种时候，闪躲是你最好的防御选择。
WoodlouseSpiderMatriarch_tip_two_desc: As it rears up, ripping it downward with Descendo will catch it off guard.|当它抬起身时，使用“应声落地”将其向下猛砸将可以使其失去还手的能力。
WorkstationSlot_Herb: Potting Table Budget|园艺工作台额度
WormwoodLeaves_Refined_desc: Wormwood leaves can be collected from the Wormwood plant.|可以从艾草植物中收集艾草叶。
WoundCleaning_Desc: Aids in healing and restores a bit of the drinker's health |具有辅助治疗作用，服下后能够恢复少量生命值
YarnBallToy_desc: A ball made of yarn, used to play with beasts|用毛线做的球，用来与野兽玩
ZAB_01: Summoner's Court: Leander Prewett|召唤对决：兰德尔·浦路维特
ZAB_01_QuestJournal:
Leander has challenged me to a match of Summoner's Court. I should see if I can best him.
兰德尔已经对我发起了召唤对决挑战。我应该尝试着打败他。
ZAB_01_SummonersCourt_QuestActive_StepJo: I need to beat Leander Prewett in a single round of Summoner’s Court.|我需要在一轮召唤对决中打败兰德尔·浦路维特。
ZAB_01_SummonersCourt_QuestActive_TaskOb: Win a Round of Summoner’s Court|赢下一轮召唤对决
ZAB_01_SummonersCourt_QuestAvailable_Jou:
Someone is looking for a new opponent at Summoner's Court. I should go and see about a match and work on my Accio casting.
有人正在召唤对决寻找新的对手。我应该去看看比赛，顺便练习一下施放飞来咒。
ZAB_01_SummonersCourt_QuestAvailable_Ste: Someone is looking for a new opponent at Summoner’s Court.|有人正在寻找新的召唤对决对手。
ZAB_01_SummonersCourt_QuestComplete_Jour:
Summoner’s Court is popular at Hogwarts. Students often gather near the board looking for new opponents to challenge. As one would imagine, the competition among the houses is fierce. Having defeated Natty Onai and Leander Prewett, I’ve demonstrated that I’m a capable competitor. I look forward to finding new opponents.
召唤对决是霍格沃茨中的一种热门消遣活动。学生们经常会在场地附近寻找可以挑战的新对手。不难想象，各个学院间都处于白热化的竞争之中。现在娜娜·欧奈与兰德尔·浦路维特都成了我的手下败将，我已经向所有人证明了我的能力。期待着能够找到全新的对手。
ZAB_01_SummonersCourtMatch1_QuestTitle: Summoner's Court: Match 1|召唤对决：第一轮
ZAB_01_TalkTo_TaskObjective: Go to the Summoner's Court board|前往召唤对决场地
ZAB_02_Game_StepJournal:
Samantha has challenged me to a game of Summoner's Court. I should see if I can best her.
萨曼莎已经对我发起了召唤对决挑战。我需要尽可能打败她。
ZAB_02_QuestJournal:
Samantha has challenged me to a game of Summoner's Court. I should see if I can best her.
萨曼莎已经对我发起了召唤对决挑战。我需要尽可能打败她。
ZAB_02_SummonersCourt_QuestActive_StepJo: I need to defeat Samantha Dale in a single round of Summoner's Court.|我需要在一轮召唤对决中打败萨曼莎·戴尔
ZAB_02_SummonersCourt_QuestActive_TaskOb: Win a round of Summoner's Court|赢下一轮召唤对决
ZAB_02_SummonersCourt_QuestAvailable_Jou:
I should go look in at Summoner's Court. I hear there's someone new there for me to challenge. It would be good to practise Accio.
我需要去召唤对决的场地看一看。听说又有人对我发起了挑战。正好有机会练习飞来咒。
ZAB_02_SummonersCourt_QuestAvailable_Ste: Someone is looking for a new opponent at Summoner’s Court.|有人正在寻找新的召唤对决对手。
ZAB_02_SummonersCourt_QuestComplete_Jour:
I can add Samantha Dale to the list of opponents I've defeated at Summoner's Court. I'm enjoying these competitions; each one has been more challenging than the last. I should check back later to see who wants to test their skills against me next.
萨曼莎·戴尔也在召唤对决上败给了我。说实话我很享受这种接二连三的挑战，而且感觉每次的难度都在逐渐上升。我应该晚些再回来看一眼，说不定还有其他人会想要和我比拼飞来咒。
ZAB_02_SummonersCourtMatch2_QuestTitle: Summoner's Court: Match 2|召唤对决：第二轮
ZAB_02_TalkTo_StepJournal:
A new opponent is waiting at the Summoner's Court board in the courtyard. I should see who it is.
一位全新的对手正在庭院里的召唤对决场地旁等待着。我应该去看一眼。
ZAB_02_TalkTo_TaskObjective: Play Summoner's Court|游玩召唤对决
ZAB_03_QuestJournal:
Grace Pinch-Smedley has challenged me to a match of Summoner's Court. I should see if I can best her.
格蕾丝·平斯-史麦德莱已经对我发起了召唤对决挑战。我需要尽可能打败她。
ZAB_03_SummonersCourt3_QuestActive_StepJ: I need to defeat Grace Pinch-Smedley in a single round of Summoner's Court.|我需要在一轮召唤对决中打败格蕾丝·平斯-史麦德莱。
ZAB_03_SummonersCourt3_QuestActive_TaskO: Win a Round of Summoner’s Court|赢下一轮召唤对决
ZAB_03_SummonersCourt3_QuestAvailable_Jo:
Someone is looking for a new opponent at Summoner's Court. I should go and see about a match. It would be good to practise Accio a bit.
有人正在寻找新的召唤对决对手。是时候该去应战了。正好有机会稍稍练习飞来咒。
ZAB_03_SummonersCourt3_QuestAvailable_St: Someone is looking for a new opponent at Summoner's Court.|有人在召唤对决寻找新对手。
ZAB_03_SummonersCourt3_QuestComplete_Jou:
Grace Pinch-Smedley gave me quite a challenge at Summoner’s court, she seemed rather surprised that I bested her. It’s her claim that she’s only ever been defeated by one other student at Hogwarts, a student who will be my next opponent apparently.
说实话格蕾丝·平斯-史麦德莱在召唤对决的能力的确不容小觑，但是她似乎并没有料到自己会输给我。按照格蕾丝的说法，在我之前只有一名学生打败过她，看来“那个人”就是我的下一位对手了。
ZAB_03_SummonersCourt_QuestActive_StepJo:
It turns out that the new opponent is Grace Pinch-Smedley. I need to beat her in a round of this game if I want to advance. 
没想到我的新对手竟然是格蕾丝·平斯-史麦德莱。为了在召唤对决中晋级，我必须打败她。
ZAB_03_SummonersCourt_QuestActive_TaskOb: Win a round of Summoner's Court|赢下一轮召唤对决
ZAB_03_SummonersCourt_QuestAvailable_Jou:
I heard a new opponent is waiting for me at the Summoner's Court board. I'd like to keep practising Accio. I should head over there and find out who it is. 
听说有一位全新的对手正在召唤对决场地旁等待着。正好借着这机会锻炼飞来咒技巧。我应该尽快去那里看一看。
ZAB_03_SummonersCourt_QuestAvailable_Ste: Someone is looking for a new opponent at Summoner’s Court.|有人正在寻找新的召唤对决对手。
ZAB_03_SummonersCourt_QuestComplete_Jour:
Grace Pinch-Smedley gave me quite a challenge at Summoner’s court – she seemed rather surprised that I bested her. It’s her claim that she’ sonly ever been defeated by one other student at Hogwarts, a student who will be my next opponent, apparently.
说实话格蕾丝·平斯-史麦德莱在召唤对决的能力的确不容小觑，但是她似乎并没有料到自己会输给我。按照格蕾丝的说法，在我之前只有一名学生打败过她，看来“那个人”就是我的下一位对手了。
ZAB_03_TalkTo_TaskObjective: Go to the Summoner's Court board|前往召唤对决场地
ZAB_03SummonersCourtMatch3_QuestTitle: Summoner's Court: Match 3|召唤对决：第三轮
ZAB_04_Game_StepJournal:
Charlotte Morrison has challenged me to a match of Summoner's Court. I should see if I can best her.
夏洛特·莫里森已经对我发起了召唤对决挑战。我需要设法打败她。
ZAB_04_QuestAvailable:
A new opponent is waiting at the Summoner's Court board in the courtyard. I should see who it is.
一位全新的对手正在庭院里的召唤对决场地旁等待着。我应该去看一眼。
ZAB_04_QuestComplete:
I beat Charlotte in a game of Summoner's Court. She mentioned that there's one more opponent who'll want to test my mettle – the greatest Summoner's Court player at Hogwarts.
我在召唤对决中打败了夏洛特。她提到说学校里还有一位对手在等待着，据说那是霍格沃茨有史以来最为强大的召唤对决选手。
ZAB_04_QuestJournal:
Charlotte's challenged me to a match of Summoner's Court. I should see if I can best her.
夏洛特已经对我发起了召唤对决挑战。我需要设法打败她。
ZAB_04_SummonersCourtMatch4_QuestTitle: Summoner's Court: Match 4|召唤对决：第四轮
ZAB_04_TalkTo_StepJournal:
A new opponent is waiting at the Summoner's Court board in the courtyard. I should see who it is.
一位全新的对手正在庭院里的召唤对决场地旁等待着。我应该去看一眼。
ZAB_04_TalkTo_TaskObjective: Go to the Summoner's Court board|前往召唤对决场地
ZAB_05_Game_StepJournal:
Professor Ronen's challenged me to a match of Summoner's Court. I should see if I can best him.
罗南教授已经对我发起了召唤对决挑战。我应该尝试着打败他。
ZAB_05_QuestAvailable:
A new opponent is waiting at the Summoner's Court board in the courtyard. I should see who it is.
一位全新的对手正在庭院里的召唤对决场地旁等待着。我应该去看一眼。
ZAB_05_QuestComplete:
I was able to best Professor Ronen at his own game, and became the greatest Summoner's Court player at Hogwarts.
我成功打败了召唤对决的创始人罗南教授，现在我已经接替教授成为了全霍格沃茨中最为强大的召唤对决选手。
ZAB_05_QuestJournal:
Professor Ronen's challenged me to a match of Summoner's Court. I should see if I can best him.
罗南教授已经对我发起了召唤对决挑战。我应该尝试着打败他。
ZAB_05_SummonersCourt5_QuestActive_StepJ: Defeat Professor Ronen in a single round of Summoner’s Court.|在一轮召唤对决中打败罗南教授。
ZAB_05_SummonersCourt5_QuestActive_TaskO: Win a Round of Summoner’s Court|赢下一轮召唤对决
ZAB_05_SummonersCourt5_QuestAvailable_Jo:
Someone is looking for a new opponent at the Summoner's Court board. I should go and see about a match.
有人正在寻找新的召唤对决对手。是时候该去应战了。
ZAB_05_SummonersCourt5_QuestAvailable_St: Someone is looking for a new opponent at Summoner's Court.|有人在召唤对决寻找新对手。
ZAB_05_SummonersCourt5_QuestComplete_Jou:
I can’t believe that my final opponent turned out to be Professor Ronen! It makes perfect sense though, he invented the game, so of course he’s going to be better at it than everyone else. Even so, I’m the first student at Hogwarts to ever beat him! I’m quite proud of the strategy I used, I’m certain that it took Professor Ronen by surprise. I will enjoy seeing the reaction of the other students when the learn that Summoner’s Court has a new master.
没想到最后一轮的对手竟然是罗南教授！不过想想也是情理之中，毕竟最初也是教授自己开发了这种游戏，他自然当仁不让是其中的佼佼者。只是恐怕连教授自己也没有料到，我竟然能够成为全霍格沃茨第一个打败他的学生吧！说实话我对自己采取的战术还是十分骄傲的，罗南教授当时完全是一副措手不及的表情。现在召唤对决终于有了一位全新的“王者“，我已经迫不及待想看看其他同学知道这个消息后的表情了。
ZAB_05_SummonersCourtMatch5_QuestTitle: Summoner's Court: Match 5|召唤对决：第五轮
ZAB_05_TalkTo_StepJournal:
A new opponent is waiting at the Summoner's Court board in the courtyard. I should see who it is. 
一位全新的对手正在庭院里的召唤对决场地旁等待着。我应该去看一眼。
ZAB_05_TalkTo_TaskObjective: Go to the Summoner's Court board|前往召唤对决场地
ZAB_QuestAvailable_StepJournal: I need to be ready to use Accio before I compete in Summoner's Court.|在参与召唤对决的比赛之前，我需要先确保自己能够使用飞来咒。
ZAB_QuestAvailable_TaskObj01: Equip Accio to Spell Set |将飞来咒装备至咒语组
ZFC_01_CrossedWandsRoundOne_QuestTitle: Crossed Wands: Round 1|决斗之杖：第一轮
ZFC_01_DuelingChallange1_QuestActive_Ste:
My opponents are using shields to defend themselves. I should try countering them with Levioso and Accio.
我的对手们会利用铁甲魔咒来保护自己。只有“啦唯啊萨”与飞来咒才能反制这种咒语。
ZFC_01_DuelingChallange1_QuestActive_Tas: Defeat your opponents|打败你的对手们
ZFC_01_DuelingChallange1_QuestAvailable_:
Sebastian Sallow let me in on the existence of an exclusive and unsanctioned duelling club at Hogwarts. He didn’t divulge many details, but said that if I want to get in some extracurricular duelling, I should seek out Lucan Brattleby in the Clock Tower. I know that it’s against the rules, but after duelling Sebastian in Defence Against the Dark Arts, I’m eager for another match.
塞巴斯蒂安·萨鲁跟我透露说，霍格沃茨中其实还存在着一个“地下性质的私人决斗俱乐部”。虽然除此以外没有进一步细说，塞巴斯蒂安表示如果我想要进行额外的决斗练习，我可以去时钟塔找卢肯·布莱特比谈一谈。其实我也明白这种事违反了学校规定，但是在经历了黑魔法防御术与塞巴斯蒂安的决斗之后，我已经迫不及待想要体验更多。
I should speak with Lucan Brattleby about the secret duelling club.|我应该去和卢肯·布莱特比谈一谈“秘密决斗俱乐部”的事。
Talk to Lucan Brattleby|与卢肯·布莱特比交谈
ZFC_01_DuelingChallange1_QuestComplete_J:
I won my first round of Crossed Wands and it was exhilarating. I noticed that Levioso works well against opponents with yellow shields so I should keep that in mind for future battles. I still need to win another round to complete this part of Professor Hecat’s assignment. I wonder if I should fight with Sebastian or Natty? Or should I try to go it alone? That would surely get people talking.
我在决斗之杖赢下了第一轮比赛，这种血脉偾张的感觉太棒了。在比赛中过程中，我发现“啦唯啊萨”能够对依托黄色护盾保护的对手起效，在以后的战斗中我也应该牢记这一点。作为赫卡特教授的作业的一部分，我还需要再赢下一轮。不知道能不能选择和塞巴斯蒂安或者是娜娜一起参加决斗？还是说我该单枪匹马上阵？如果是后者的话，肯定能引发不小的轰动。
ZFC_01_FightClub_Available: Crossed Wands is available. I should see what it is.|现在我可以参加决斗之杖了。我应该去那里看一看。
ZFC_01_FIghtClub_Journal:
After I defeated Sebastian in Professor Hecat's class he told me about a secret organisation that might interest me. I should see what it's about.
在赫卡特教授的课上输给我之后，塞巴斯蒂安跟我提到说学校中存在一个秘密俱乐部，他觉得我也许会感兴趣。我应该去看看那里是怎么回事。
ZFC_01_TalkTo_StepJournal:
Sebastian said I should talk to Lucan Brattleby about extra practice for Defence Against Dark Arts.
如果我想进一步练习黑魔法防御术，塞巴斯蒂安建议我去和卢肯·布莱特比谈一谈。
ZFC_01_TalkTo_TaskObjective: Talk to Lucan Brattleby|与卢肯·布莱特比交谈
ZFC_02_01_StepJournal:
There is another round of duelling available at Crossed Wands. I should see Lucan Brattleby.
我已经可以在决斗之杖参加新一轮的决斗比赛了。我应该抽空去见一下卢肯·布莱特比。
ZFC_02_CrossedWandsRoundTwo_QuestTitle: Crossed Wands: Round 2|决斗之杖：第二轮
ZFC_02_DuelingChallange2_QuestActive_Ste:
My opponents are using shields to defend themselves so this round will be tougher. I should keep a Wiggenweld potion handy.
我的对手们会利用铁甲魔咒来保护自己，所以这一轮会更加艰巨。我最好提前准备一些振奋魔药。
ZFC_02_DuelingChallange2_QuestActive_Tas: Defeat your opponents|打败你的对手们
ZFC_02_DuelingChallange2_QuestAvailable_:
After winning my first round of Crossed Wands, I’m eager for another match. I should check in with Lucan Brattleby at the Clock Tower and see if he’s lined up more duellists to compete against.
在决斗之杖初尝胜利之后，我已经准备好面对接下来的对手了。我应该去时钟塔找卢肯·布莱特比聊一聊，他也许已经给我找到了接下来要挑战的决斗家。

I should check in with Lucan Brattleby and see if another round of Crossed Wands is available.
我应该去和卢肯·布莱特比聊一聊，看看能不能参加新一轮的决斗之杖比赛。
Talk to Lucan Brattleby|与卢肯·布莱特比交谈
ZFC_02_DuelingChallange2_QuestComplete_J:
I just won my second round of Crossed Wands. During my match I learned that violet shielded opponents were vulnerable to Accio, so I should keep that in mind for future battles. This practice also completes the duelling part of Professor Hecat’s assignment. I’m finally starting to feel more comfortable with the spells I’ve learned. Duelling like this keeps you on your toes.
我刚刚在拿下了在决斗之杖的第二轮比赛。在这次的比赛过程中，我发现依托淡紫色护盾的对手都极其容易受到飞来咒影响，我应该在以后的战斗中牢记这一点。与此同时，这次获胜也意味着我已经完成了赫卡特教授的作业中关于“决斗”的部分。我终于感觉自己能够熟练运用迄今为止学到的咒语了。像这样的刺激决斗真的能让一个人的注意力保持高度的集中。
ZFC_02_Fight_StepJournal:
I need to win the second round of Crossed Wands so that I can advance to the finals.
我需要赢下决斗之杖中的第二轮比赛才能获得决赛资格。
ZFC_02_Fight_TaskObjective: Defeat the other duellists|打败其他决斗家
ZFC_03_01_StepJournal:
The final round of duelling is available at Crossed Wands. It will determine the champion of the school. I should see Lucan Brattleby.
我已经可以参加决斗之杖的最后一轮决斗比赛了。这轮比赛将决定谁才是学校的冠军。我应该抽空去见一下卢肯·布莱特比。
ZFC_03_CrossedWandsRound3_QuestActive_St:
This is the final fight. The winner will be declared the best in the school! I should focus on the fight if I want to be the champion.
最后一轮比赛。获胜者将成为霍格沃茨公认的最强者！如果想要成为新一届冠军，我必须在比赛中全力以赴，绝不能松懈。
ZFC_03_CrossedWandsRound3_QuestActive_Ta: Defeat your opponents |打败你的对手们
ZFC_03_CrossedWandsRound3_QuestAvailable:
Lucan Brattleby has organised the final round of duelling for the Crossed Wands championship. Whoever wins will be declared the best duellist in Hogwarts. I’m ready to compete, but who should I fight alongside? Or should I go it alone? It will certainly get the school buzzing if I take on four opponents by myself.
卢肯·布莱特比已经开始组织决斗之杖的最后一轮比赛，这一轮将决出决斗之杖的冠军。最后的胜利者也将成为全霍格沃茨公认的最强决斗家。我已经跃跃欲试，但是这次我该选择与谁并肩作战？还是说……我该单刀赴会？如果我真的选择独自挑战四名对手，整个学校都会为这种惊人之举沸腾的。
I should speak with Lucan Brattleby about Crossed Wands.|我应该去和卢肯·布莱特比谈一谈决斗之杖的事。
Talk to Lucan Brattleby|与卢肯·布莱特比交谈
ZFC_03_CrossedWandsRound3_QuestComplete_:
I did it, I won the final round of Crossed Wands! It was a tough fight, but it feels good to be able to come out on top. All and all this has been great practice for learning all sorts of different spell combinations and when to use them.
我成功了，我赢得了决斗之杖的最后一轮比赛胜利！虽然过程艰巨而又惊险，但是没有什么比得上胜利的滋味。而且客观来说，通过这次的经历，我也很好地领悟到了不同咒语组合的使用时机与用途。
ZFC_03_CrossedWandsRoundThree_QuestTitle: Crossed Wands: Round 3|决斗之杖：第三轮
ZFP_01: Spell Combination Practice 1|咒语组合练习1
ZFP_01_DummyTrainingPractice_QuestActive:
I’m supposed to cast Accio on the dummy to draw it close, and then hit it with a Basic Cast four times in a row. Seems simple enough, let’s give it a try.
我需要用飞来咒将假人拉近，然后使用基础施法连续四次击中假人。听上去挺简单的，来试一试吧。

Now I’m supposed to cast Levioso on the dummy and then hit it with a Basic Cast four times in a row.
现在我需要先对假人使用“啦唯啊萨”，然后使用基础施法连续四次击中假人。

I need to complete the spell combinations without allowing the dummy to hit the ground.
我需要在假人不落地的情况下，一次性完成咒语组合。
Cast Accio followed by four consecutive basic attacks|施放飞来咒，然后连续发动四次基础攻击
Cast Levioso followed by four consecutive basic attacks|施放“啦唯啊萨”，然后连续发动四次基础攻击
Complete spell combinations without allowing the dummy to hit the ground|在假人不落地的情况下，一次性完成咒语组合
ZFP_01_DummyTrainingPractice_QuestAvaila:
Lucan Brattleby has an enchanted training dummy to help duellists in Crossed Wands develop master spell combinations. It would be useful to pick up some new tips and strategies. I should meet with him in the Clock Tower and give it a try.
卢肯·布莱特比的训练假人拥有着独特的魔力，能够帮助决斗之杖中的决斗家们掌握不同的咒语组合。应该可以通过这种方式学到有用的新窍门与战术。我应该去时钟塔找卢肯聊一聊，并尝试使用训练假人练习。

I should see about starting a training regimen for practicing spell combinations.
我应该试着去完成一套针对咒语组合的训练项目。
Talk to Lucan Brattleby|与卢肯·布莱特比交谈
ZFP_01_DummyTrainingPractice_QuestComple:
That training dummy came in handy. It gave me the opportunity to learn how spells can be used together in more nuanced ways. There seems to be certain synergies between different types of magic. Spells used together in just the right way are more powerful than they are by themselves. I'm excited to discover more and more combinations.
没想到那个训练假人还挺有用。多亏了它的帮助，我学会了更多巧妙使用咒语组合的方法。似乎不同类型的魔法之间还存在着“连携效果”。恰到好处的多种咒语组合将能够发挥出比单独魔咒更为强大的力量。我已经迫不及待想要尝试更多组合了。
ZFP_01_TrainingDummyPractice1_QuestTitle: Spell Combination Practice 1|咒语组合练习1
ZFP_01_TrainingRegimen1_CompleteCombos_T: Cast Accio and perform a Basic Cast 4 times in a combo|施放飞来咒，然后连续发动四次基础施法
Cast Levioso and perform a Basic Cast 4 times in a combo|施放“啦唯啊萨”，然后连续发动四次基础施法
Complete spell combination before dummy hits the ground|在假人落地前完成咒语组合
ZFP_01_TrainingRegimen1_Journal01:
Lucan set up a training dummy and a list of specific spell combinations to practise. If I need to quit before I accomplish them I can talk to him.
卢肯已经为我布置好了一个训练假人，还给我准备了一份用于练习的咒语组合清单。如果想要提前离开，我只需要和他当面说即可。
ZFP_01_TrainingRegimen1_QuestAvailable_J:
Lucan has a training regimen available to help me master spells. I should talk with him in the Clock Tower to get started.
卢肯已经为我准备了一系列用于掌握不同咒语的训练项目。如果感兴趣的话，我应该去时钟塔找他谈一谈。
ZFP_01_TrainingRegimen1_QuestComplete_Jo:
I managed to complete the training regimen by using multiple spells together. Lucan said he would notify me once the next regimen is ready.
通过同时组合多种咒语，我已经成功完成了训练项目。卢肯表示等下一批项目准备就绪，他就会通知我。
ZFP_01_TrainingRegimen1_QuestTitle: Spell Combination Practice 1|咒语组合练习1
ZFP_02: Spell Combination Practice 2|咒语组合练习2
ZFP_02_CrossedWandsPractise_QuestActive_:
The Crossed Wands club meets regularly in the Clock Tower. I should be able to find Lucan Brattleby there.
时钟塔是决斗之杖成员们的固定会面地点。去那里应该就能找到卢肯·布莱特比。

Like the previous dummy, I need to chain together the indicated spells to take advantage of the magical synergies that exist between them. My timing will need to be perfect.
与之前的假人一样，我需要组合对应的咒语，发挥出不同类型魔法之间的“连携效果”。为了实现这一目的，我必须精准把握施法时机。
Talk to Lucan Brattleby|与卢肯·布莱特比交谈
Complete the spell combinations before the dummy hits the ground|在假人落地前完成咒语组合
ZFP_02_CrossedWandsPractise_QuestAvailab:
Lucan Brattleby has a new, enchanted training dummy with more advanced spell combinations. I’m discovering there is a lot of nuance to spellcasting – I should drop by the Clock Tower and see if the dummy has something new for me to learn.
卢肯·布莱特比的全新魔法假人将能够帮助我练习更复杂的咒语组合。我已经开始逐渐意识到施放咒语其实存在着大量窍门，有机会的话我应该去时钟塔一趟，看看卢肯的假人有没有给我准备新的学习项目。
Start a training regimen for practising spell combinations.|开始训练项目并练习咒语组合。
ZFP_02_CrossedWandsPractise_QuestComplet:
I'm glad I sought out Lucan Brattleby and got some more training accomplished; that training dummy was certainly useful! I'm learning more advanced spell combinations and I'm better understanding the connections that exist between different spells.
一开始去找卢肯·布莱特比接受额外训练的选择果然没错，训练假人项目让我受益匪浅！现在我已经开始学习更复杂的咒语组合，同时我也能够更好地理解不同咒语类型之间存在的联系。
ZFP_02_CrossedWandsPractise_QuestTitle: Spell Combination Practice|咒语组合练习
ZFP_02_TrainingDummyPractice2_QuestTitle: Spell Combination Practice 2|咒语组合练习2
ZFP_02_TrainingRegimen2_CompleteCombos_T: Cast Accio, Incendio, and Levioso in a combo|连续施放“飞来咒”、“火焰熊熊”以及“啦唯啊萨”
Cast Levioso and perform a Basic Cast 3 times, Accio and Incendio in a combo|按照以下顺序发动连击：“啦唯啊萨”、三次“基础施法”、“飞来咒”和“火焰熊熊”
ZFP_02_TrainingRegimen2_Journal01: I need to complete a set of spell combos for this training regimen.|我需要成功发动咒语连击才能完成训练。
ZFP_02_TrainingRegimen2_QuestAvailable_J:
Lucan has another training regimen available.
Like last time, I should talk to him in the Clock Tower to begin.
卢肯又给我准备了新的训练项目。
和上次一样，准备好之后我就应该去时钟塔找他谈谈。
ZFP_02_TrainingRegimen2_QuestAvailable_T: Talk to Lucan Brattleby|与卢肯·布拉特比交谈
ZFP_02_TrainingRegimen2_QuestComplete_Jo:
I completed Lucan's final training regimen. Now I can use what I learned to become a more powerful spell-caster.
我已经完成了卢肯的最后一批训练项目。在这些训练中学到的技巧将能帮助我成为更加强大的决斗家。
ZFP_02_TrainingRegimen2_QuestTitle: Spell Combination Practice 2|咒语组合练习2
ZSB_01: Professor Howin's Assignment|皓莺教授的作业
ZSB_01_01_AttendClass_Task: Attend Beasts Class during the day|在白天参加野兽学课程
ZSB_01_BombardaSide_Title: Professor Howin's Assignment|皓莺教授的作业
ZSB_01_HowinAssignment_QuestTitle: Professor Howin's Assignment|皓莺教授的作业
ZSB_01_ProfessorHowinsAssignment_QuestAc: I need to rescue a Diricawl and a Giant Purple Toad with my nab-sack.|我需要使用拿袋分别解救一只球遁鸟与一只紫色巨蟾。

Before I can let Professor Howin know I've completed her assignment and learn Bombarda, I need to attend Beasts class.
现在我需要先前往野兽学教室上课，然后才可以把自己已经完成作业的消息告诉皓莺教授并学习“大爆爆”。

Now that I've attended Professor Howin's class, I should speak with her so that she can teach me how to cast Bombarda.
现在我已经上完皓莺教授的课了，我应该和她谈谈，这样她就会教我“大爆爆”了。
Acquire a Diricawl with the nab-sack |使用拿袋收集球遁鸟㉿
Acquire a Giant Purple Toad with the nab-sack |使用拿袋收集紫色巨蟾㉿
Return to Professor Howin|回去找皓莺教授
ZSB_01_ProfessorHowinsAssignment_QuestAv:
I’ve received a supplemental assignment from Professor Howin. After I demonstrate my aptitude by completing the required tasks, she will teach me how to cast the Exploding Charm, Bombarda.
皓莺教授给我布置了一份额外作业。现在我需要完成皓莺要求的任务以证明自己的能力，之后教授将会教我施放爆炸魔咒“大爆爆”。
Professor Howin is waiting for me to complete her Assignment.|皓莺教授正在等待着我完成她布置的作业。
ZSB_01_ProfessorHowinsAssignment_QuestCo:
I rescued a Diricawl and a Giant Purple Toad as Professor Howin instructed. Then, after attending the professor's class, she instructed me on how to cast the Exploding Charm, Bombarda.
我按照皓莺教授的指导，解救了一只球遁鸟与一只紫色巨蟾。下课后，教授教会了我施放爆炸魔咒“大爆爆”的方法。
ZSD_01_01_AttendClass_Task: Attend Potions Class during the day|在白天参加魔药学课程
ZSD_01_PotionsAssignment1_QuestActive_St:
Professor Sharp wants me to test myself while under the influence of both the Maxima and Edurus Potions. He’d also like me to field test a Focus Potion. I know to find potions and recipes at J. Pippins Potions. My Field Guide will not guide me through this assignment, but my map could still prove useful.
夏普教授想要我在服下超级魔药与艾德鲁斯魔药后测试自己的能力。除此以外，教授还希望我在实战中测试专注魔药的效果。J·皮聘魔药店能够提供我需要的魔药与配方。我的实战指南不会指引我完成这项作业，但我的地图仍然可以用得上。

I’ve completed the assignment. I should return to the Potions classroom so I can learn Depulso from Professor Sharp.
我已经完成了教授布置的作业。我现在我需要返回魔药教室，并向夏普教授学习“统统飞走”。
I need to speak to Professor Sharp. He's going to teach me a new spell.|我需要与夏普教授谈一谈。接下来他会教我一种新的咒语。
ZSD_01_PotionsAssignment1_QuestActive_Ta: Acquire Maxima and Edurus Potions, and use them simultaneously 获取终极魔药与艾德鲁斯魔药，然后在实战中同时测试这两种魔药的效果㉿
Acquire and use a Focus Potion |获取专注魔药并在实战中测试魔药效果㉿
Return to Professor Sharp|回去找夏普教授
ZSD_01_PotionsAssignment1_QuestAvailable:
Professor Sharp wants me to complete an assignment outside of the classroom, after which he has promised to teach me the Banishing Charm, Depulso, which repels targets with great force. 
夏普教授希望给我布置了一份额外的课后作业，完成这些作业之后，夏普教授许诺说将会教我驱逐魔咒“统统飞走”，这种咒语能够用强大的力量击飞目标。
I have an assignment to complete for Professor Sharp.|我需要完成夏普教授布置的作业。
ZSD_01_PotionsAssignment1_QuestComplete_:
As directed by Professor Sharp, I successfully field tested the Maxima, Edurus, and Focus Potions. In return, Professor Sharp instructed me on how to cast Depulso, the Banishing Charm that pushes opponents away with tremendous force.
按照夏普教授的要求，我已经成功测试了超级魔药、艾德鲁斯魔药以及专注魔药在实战中的效果。作为奖励，夏普教授教会了我如何施放驱逐魔咒“统统飞走”，这种咒语将能够运用巨大的力量击飞我的对手。
ZSD_01_SharpAssignment1_QuestTitle: Professor Sharp's Assignment 1|夏普教授的作业 1
ZSG_01: Madam Kogawa's Assignment|古川夫人的作业
ZSG_01_Flying_QuestAvailable_TaskObj01: Purchase a broom from Spintwitches in Hogsmeade 在霍格莫德的旋转女巫店购置一把扫帚㉿
ZSG_01_FlyingAssignemnt1_QuestActive_Ste:
Madam Kogawa has conjured a number of balloons around the Hogsmeade Station and the Quidditch pitch. She wants me to use my broom to reach and pop them. 
古川夫人已经在霍格莫德车站与魁地奇球场周遭变幻了许多气球。现在她希望我骑乘扫帚找到并戳破这些气球。

I finished popping all of the balloons conjured by Madam Kogawa. I should return to her now and learn how to cast the Freezing Spell, Glacius. 
我已经戳破了古川夫人变幻的所有气球。现在我需要回去找她，并向古川夫人学习冰冻咒语“寒冰冻结”。

ZSG_01_FlyingAssignemnt1_QuestAvailable_:
Madam Kogawa has sent me an assignment to help me become a better flyer. Once I complete her tasks, she is going to teach me how to cast Glacius, the Freezing Spell, which blasts opponents with extreme cold and temporarily freezes them in place.
为了帮助我提升飞行技术，古川夫人特意准备了一份课后作业。完成这些任务之后，古川夫人将会教我施放冰冻咒语“寒冰冻结”，这种咒语将能够用极度低温冻结对手并使他们暂时动弹不得。

ZSG_01_FlyingAssignemnt1_QuestCompete_Jo:
I flew around the Hogsmeade Station and the Quidditch pitch, popping all of the balloons conjured by Madam Kogawa. When I returned to her, she taught me the Freezing Spell Glacius, used to temporarily freeze and incapacitate opponents. 
我骑乘着扫帚飞向霍格莫德车站与魁地奇球场的上空，并戳破了古川夫人变幻出来的所有气球。之后古川夫人教会了我冰冻咒语“寒冰冻结”，这种咒语能够暂时冻结对手并使他们动弹不得。

Before I can perform any of Madam Kogawa's flying assignments, I'll need to purchase a broom. Spintwitches Sporting Needs in Hogsmeade is certain to have just what I need.
我需要先购置一把扫帚，然后才能完成古川夫人的飞行课作业。霍格莫德的旋转女巫体育必需品肯定能够满足我的需求。

ZSI_01_01_MeetHecat_StepComplete_Journal:
I met with Professor Hecat. She gave me a list of tasks to do. Once I finish them all she will teach me a new spell: Incendio.
我和赫卡特教授见了一面。教授给我布置了一系列任务。完成之后，她将会教我一种全新的咒语：“火焰熊熊”。

ZSI_01_02_HecatsHomework_Journal:
Professor Hecat has given me a list of tasks to accomplish. If I can finish them all I will prove that I am ready to learn a new spell: Incendio.
赫卡特教授给我布置了几项任务。只要尽数完成，我就能够证明自己已经准备好学习新的咒语：“火焰熊熊”。
ZSI_01_03_ReturnToHecat_Journal:
I completed all of the tasks Professor Hecat assigned me. I should report back to her now.
我已经完成了赫卡特教授布置的所有任务。现在我需要回去找她汇报情况。

Professor Ronen has given me a list of extra assignments to supplement my studies in the classroom and accelerate my growth as a wizard. Completing them will prove that I'm ready to learn a new spell: Reparo.
罗南教授给我提供了一系列额外的课后作业，这些任务将能帮助我获得更好的历练。除此以外，完成这些任务也将证明我已经准备好学习新的咒语：“修复如初”。

ZSW_01__GarlickAssignment1_QuestTitle: Professor Garlick's Assignment 1|加里克教授的作业 1
ZSW_01_HerbbologyAssignment1_QuestActive:
Professor Garlick wants me to field test a Venomous Tentacula and a Mandrake. Should I need any seeds or plants, I can visit Dogweed and Deathcap. My Field Guide will not guide me through this assignment, but my map could still prove useful.
加里克教授想要我在实战中测试毒触手和曼德拉草的威力。“茱萸和毒菇”应该能够提供我需要的种子与植物。我的实战指南不会指引我完成这项作业，但我的地图仍然可以用得上。

I’ve completed Professor Garlick’s assignment. I should return to the Herbology classroom so she can teach me how to cast Wingardium Leviosa.
我已经完成了加里克教授的作业。我需要返回草药学教室，并向她学习施放羽加迪姆·勒维奥萨。
Acquire and use a Venomous Tentacula |获取一株毒触手并在实战中进行测试㉿
Acquire and use a Mandrake on multiple enemies simultaneously 获取一株曼德拉草并在与多名敌人的实战中进行测试㉿
Return to Professor Garlick|回去找加里克教授
ZSW_01_HerbbologyAssignment1_QuestAvaila:
Professor Garlick has sent me a supplemental assignment. Once I complete her tasks, she will teach me how to cast Wingardium Leviosa, which will allow me to move and manipulate objects with precision.
加里克教授给我布置了一份额外作业。等我完成这些任务，她将会教我施放羽加迪姆·勒维奥萨，这种咒语将能够允许我精准移动与操纵物体。
Professor Garlick is waiting for me to complete her assignment.|加里克教授正在等待着我完成她布置的作业。
ZSW_01_HerbbologyAssignment1_QuestComple:
As per Professor Garlick’s instructions, I successfully field tested a Venomous Tentacula and Mandrake in combat. In return, she taught me how to cast the Wingardium Leviosa spell, which is highly useful for levitating and moving objects around the environment. 
按照加里克教授的要求，我已经在实际战斗中测试了毒触手与曼德拉草的能力。作为奖励，她教会了我施放羽加迪姆·勒维奥萨，这种咒语将能够方便地抬起并移动周遭环境中的物体。
ZSW_01_ReturnToGarlick_StepJournal:
Now that I've completed Professor Garlick's extra assignments, I should return to her.
现在我已经完成了加里克教授布置的额外作业，我需要回去找她汇报。

ZZC_01_01_AttendCharmsClass_Journal: I'm to attend Charms class and should head there promptly.|我应该立刻前往魔咒教室上课。
ZZC_01_01_AttendCharmsClass_StepComplete: I attended Charms class and participated in Professor Ronen's Accio lesson.|我抵达了魔咒教室，并在罗南教授的指导下学习了飞来咒。
ZZC_01_01_CharmsClass1_Journal:
Professor Weasley has instructed me to attend Charms class, where I’ll be learning from Professor Ronen.
韦斯莱教授希望我前往魔咒教室，罗南教授将负责指导魔咒课。

ZZC_01_02_AccioGame_Journal:
Professor Ronen has set up a Gobstones-inspired game to test the class's Accio abilities. I intend to do my best to win.
在课上，罗南教授组织起了一场类似高布石的小游戏，目的是为了测试同学们对于飞来咒的掌握程度。我应该尽最大努力去赢得胜利。
ZZC_01_02_AccioGame_Round1_Task1: Complete the practice round|完成练习局
ZZC_01_02_AccioGame_Round2_Task2: Compete against Natty in Summoner's Court|与娜娜进行召唤对决比拼
ZZC_01_02_AccioGame_Round3_Task3: Compete against Natty in the second round|与娜娜进行第二轮比拼
ZZC_01_02_AccioGame_StepComplete_Journal: I competed against Natty in Professor Ronen's Accio competition.|我在罗南教授主持的飞来咒比赛中与娜娜进行了比拼。
ZZC_01_03_RonenChat_TalktoRonen_Task: Talk to Professor Ronen|与罗南教授交谈
ZZC_01_ACharmingIntroduction_LineComplet:
I attended Professor Ronen's Charms class, where I learned the Summoning Charm and competed in a friendly Gobstones-inspired game against a fellow student, Natsai Onai.
在罗南教授的魔咒课上，我学会了召唤魔咒，并与另一位同学纳察·欧奈在类似高布石的飞来咒小游戏中进行了友好较量。
ZZC_01_AimC_TaskObj: Practise target selection by highlighting the middle ball|通过高亮显示中间的球，练习目标选择
ZZC_01_AimL_TaskObj: Practise target selection by highlighting the left most ball|通过高亮显示最左边的球，练习目标选择
ZZC_01_AimR_TaskObj: Practise target selection by highlighting the right most ball|通过高亮显示最右边的球，练习目标选择
ZZC_01_CharmsClass_QuestActive_StepJourn:
The Field Guide Map shows Professor Ronen’s class is in the Astronomy Wing. 

This castle is enormous! I may need to use the Charmed Compass {AM_Navigation} in the Field Guide to help me find the way.
按照实战指南地图的指示，罗南教授的教室应该在天文学区。

没想到霍格沃茨里面竟然会这么大！看来我得利用实战指南中的魔法罗盘来寻找方向。

The goal of Summoner's Court is to cast Accio on the spheres and pull them to the end of the board without causing them roll over the edge.
在召唤对决中，双方选手需要对场上的球体施放飞来咒，并使它们在不掉出边缘的情况下尽可能接近场地尽头。

If I’m going to defeat Natty in a game of Summoner's Court, I’ll need to release the ball at just the right moment for the maximum score. But I can’t hold it too long, or it will roll off the court.
如果想要在召唤对决比赛中打败娜娜，我就需要看准时机放开小球，让其落到高分位置。不能抓住小球太久，否则小球就会被甩出边界。

Professor Ronen isn’t making this easy on us. I must be strategic if I want to win this round.
罗南教授又给我们出了难题。如果想赢下这轮，恐怕我得利用巧劲才行。

It looks like Professor Ronen wants to talk to me. I should speak with him before leaving class.
罗南教授似乎找我有事。离开教室前，我应该先去找他谈一谈。
ZZC_01_CharmsClass_QuestActive_TaskObj01: Go to Charms class|前往魔咒教室
ZZC_01_CharmsClass_QuestActive_TaskObj02: Complete the practice round|完成练习局
ZZC_01_CharmsClass_QuestActive_TaskObj03: Compete against Natty in Summoner's Court|与娜娜进行召唤对决比拼
ZZC_01_CharmsClass_QuestActive_TaskObj04: Compete in Round 2|参与第二轮的比赛
ZZC_01_CharmsClass_QuestActive_TaskObj05: Talk to Professor Ronen|与罗南教授交谈
ZZC_01_CharmsClass_QuestAvailable_Journa:
In Charms class, Professor Ronen is reviewing the basic use of Accio, the Summoning Charm, which summons objects from a distance.
在魔咒课上，罗南教授帮助大家复习了召唤魔咒“飞来咒”的基础要点，这种咒语能够把远处的物体拉到近处。
I need to attend Charms class, taught by Professor Ronen.|我需要前往罗南教授负责的魔咒课教室。
ZZC_01_CharmsClass_QuestComplete_Journal:
That was an exciting class! I attended my first Charms class with Professor Ronen and learned the Summoning Charm, Accio. To practice, Professor Ronen arranged a game called Summoner's Court and matched me against Natty Onai. She got the best of me in the end, but I'm not deterred. Professor Ronen is preparing a special assignment for me and wants me to spend more time with Natty.
没想到魔咒课竟然这么好玩！在罗南教授的第一堂魔咒课上，我学会了召唤魔咒“飞来咒”。为了鼓励大家练习，罗南教授还组织起了被称作“召唤对决”的小游戏，而且还在课上安排我和娜娜·欧奈进行比拼。虽然最后是娜娜赢了，但是我也并不气馁。罗南教授说接下来会为我准备特殊的作业，与此同时还希望我多向娜娜请教。

That was an exciting class! I attended my first Charms class with Professor Ronen and learned the Summoning Charm, Accio. To practice, Professor Ronen arranged a game called Summoner's Court and matched me against Natty Onai. We were well-matched, and it ended in a draw. Professor Ronen is preparing a special assignment for me and wants me to spend more time with Natty.
没想到魔咒课竟然这么好玩！在罗南教授的第一堂魔咒课上，我学会了召唤魔咒“飞来咒”。为了鼓励大家练习，罗南教授还组织起了被称作“召唤对决”的小游戏，而且还在课上安排我和娜娜·欧奈进行比拼。我们势均力敌，最后以平局收场。罗南教授说接下来会为我准备特殊的作业，与此同时还希望我多向娜娜请教。

That was an exciting class! I attended my first Charms class with Professor Ronen and learned the Summoning Charm, Accio. To practice, Professor Ronen arranged a game called Summoner's Court and matched me against Natty Onai – and I won the game! Professor Ronen is preparing a special assignment for me and wants me to spend more time with Natty.
没想到魔咒课竟然这么好玩！在罗南教授的第一堂魔咒课上，我学会了召唤魔咒“飞来咒”。为了鼓励大家练习，罗南教授还组织起了被称作“召唤对决”的小游戏，而且还在课上安排我和娜娜·欧奈进行比拼，最后我赢得了比赛！罗南教授说接下来会为我准备特殊的作业，与此同时还希望我多向娜娜请教。
ZZC_01_EquipAccio_StepJournal:
Professor Ronen has set up a game to practise the Summoning Charm. I need to ensure I'm ready to cast Accio.
罗南教授组织起了一场练习召唤魔咒的小游戏。我需要确保自己已经能够运用飞来咒。
ZZC_01_LighthouseSubGoal: Attend Charms Class|前往魔咒教室
ZZC_01_MissionAvailable_Journal: I need to attend Professor Ronen's Charms class.|我需要前往罗南教授的魔咒教室。
ZZC_01_MissionAvailable_Proximity_Task: Go to Charms class|前往魔咒教室
ZZC_01_QuestAvailable_LevelUp_StepJourna: I need to attend Professor Ronen's Charms class.|我需要前往罗南教授的魔咒教室。
ZZC_01_QuestAvailable_Prox_StepJournal: I need to attend Charms class, taught by Professor Ronen.|我需要前往罗南教授负责的魔咒课教室。
ZZC_01_Round1_StepJournal:
Professor Ronen has set up a Gobstones-inspired game to test the class's Accio abilities, and he's asked me to demonstrate for the class. I need to practise summoning each of the three balls.
在课上，罗南教授组织起了一场类似高布石的小游戏，目的是为了测试大家对于飞来咒的掌握程度，教授还请我来给班上同学们做示范。现在我需要练习分别对三个小球使用召唤魔咒。
ZZC_01_Round2_StepJournal:
I'm facing off against Natty in a friendly game of Summoner's Court. Still, I want to do my best to win.
接下来我要与娜娜进行一场友好的召唤对决比赛。虽说友谊第一，但我并不想输。
ZZC_01_Round3_StepJournal:
I'm facing off against Natty in a friendly game of Summoner's Court. This round will determine the winner.
接下来我要与娜娜进行一场友好的召唤对决比赛。这一轮将决定我们中谁才是胜利者。
ZZC_01_TalkToRonen_StepJournal:
Natty said that Professor Ronen wanted to have a word with me after class. I should speak with him.
娜娜说罗南教授好像有事找我，想要我课后留一下。我应该去找教授谈一谈。
ZZD_01: Defence Against the Dark Arts|黑魔法防御术
ZZD_01_04_Journal:
Professor Hecat told me to speak with Sebastian about additional duelling practise.
赫卡特教授希望我去找塞巴斯蒂安商讨进行额外决斗练习的事。
ZZD_01_04_Task: Speak with Sebastian|与塞巴斯蒂安交谈
ZZD_01_DADA1_QuestActive_StepJournal01: Professor Hecat wants me to attack the training dummy with a Basic Cast.|赫卡特教授想要我使用基础施法攻击训练假人。
ZZD_01_DADA1_QuestActive_StepJournal02:
If I understand Professor Hecat correctly, casting Levioso on the training dummy will break its shield and leave it vulnerable to a Basic Cast.
假如说我没有误解赫卡特教授的指导，那么“啦唯啊萨”应该能够击溃训练假人的护盾，并使其无法防备后续的基础施法攻击。
ZZD_01_DADA1_QuestActive_StepJournal03:
Professor Hecat has organised an impromptu duel between me and Sebastian Sallow. She wants to show us the value of Levioso in combat.
赫卡特教授安排了我和塞巴斯蒂安·萨鲁的即兴决斗。她想向我们展示“啦唯啊萨”在战斗中的价值。
ZZD_01_DADA1_QuestActive_TaskObj01: Perform a Basic Cast on the training dummy|对训练假人使用基础施法
ZZD_01_DADA1_QuestActive_TaskObj02: Cast Levioso on the training dummy, followed by a Basic Cast|对训练假人施放“啦唯啊萨”，接着对其使用基础施法
ZZD_01_DADA1_QuestActive_TaskObj03: Duel against Sebastian|与塞巴斯蒂安决斗
ZZD_01_DADA1_QuestAvailable_Journal:
In today’s lesson, Professor Hecat is teaching us how to combine Control spells with basic attacks to defeat shielded enemies. According to the Field Guide, the Defence Against the Dark Arts classroom can be found in the lower section of the Astronomy Wing.
赫卡特教授今天将教会大家如果利用控制类咒语与基础攻击之间的组合打败依托护盾保护的敌人。按照实战指南的指示，黑魔法防御术的教室应该就在天文学区的下层。
ZZD_01_DADA1_QuestAvailable_JournalRollo:
The Field Guide Map shows Professor Hecat’s class is in the lower section of the Astronomy Wing. 

I could get lost in this castle. I may need to use the Charmed Compass {AM_Navigation} in the Field Guide to help me find the way.
实战指南地图显示，赫卡特教授的教室位于天文学区的下层。

我可能会在城堡里迷路。所以我需要使用实战指南中的魔法罗盘  来帮助找到方向。
ZZD_01_DADA1_QuestAvailable_TaskObj01: Attend Defence Against the Dark Arts Class|参加黑魔法防御术课程
ZZD_01_DADA1_QuestComplete_Journal:
I attended Defence Against the Dark Arts class. It went well. I learned a new spell, Levioso, the Levitating spell. Then I learned how to use Levioso to break an enemy's magical shield. On top of that I participated in my first duel and I'm honestly the natural talent. Perhaps I could give that unofficial duelling club a try?
我参与了黑魔法防御术的课程。这门课感觉挺有意思的。我在课上学会了新的咒语：飘浮魔咒“啦唯啊萨”。我还学会了利用啦唯啊萨击溃敌人的魔法护盾。除此以外，我还参与了生平第一回决斗，说实话我感觉自己在这方面有天赋。也许我该去那个“地下决斗俱乐部”试试？
ZZD_01_DADA_Title: Defence Against the Dark Arts Class|黑魔法防御术课程
ZZD_01_DefenceAgainsttheDarkArtsClass_Qu: Defence Against the Dark Arts Class|黑魔法防御术课程

Professor Hecat is teaching us how to combine Control spells with basic attacks to defeat shielded enemies.
赫卡特教授将教导大家如果利用控制类咒语与基础攻击之间的组合打败依托护盾保护的敌人。

ZZE_01_04_TalkHecat_Journal: I need to speak with Professor Hecat in order to learn Expelliarmus.|我需要向赫卡特教授学习“除你武器”。
ZZE_01_04_TalkHecat_StepComplete_Journal: I spoke with Professor Hecat about Expelliarmus.|我与赫卡特教授谈论了学习“除你武器”的事。
ZZE_01_04_TalkHecat_TalkToHecat_Task: Speak with Professor Hecat|与赫卡特教授交谈
ZZE_02_HecatAssignment2_QuestActive_Step:
When an opponent is under the effect of a Levitation Charm, I need to avoid attacks while dodge rolling.
当一名对手受到飘浮魔咒影响时，我需要利用闪躲翻滚避开他们的攻击。

Professor Hecat wants me to practise avoiding attacks by dodge rolling. She also wants me to cast Incendio on a few enemies. My Field Guide will not guide me through this assignment, but my map could still prove useful.
赫卡特教授希望我练习闪躲翻滚来避开攻击。除此以外，教授还希望我用一道“火焰熊熊”咒语同时打击多名敌人。我的实战指南不会指引我完成这项作业，但我的地图仍然可以用得上。

I’ve completed Professor Hecat’s assignment. Now, I need to return to the Defence Against the Dark Arts classroom so that I can learn the Disarming Charm from her. 
我已经完成了赫卡特教授的作业。现在我需要返回黑魔法防御术教室，并向教授学习缴械魔咒。
ZZE_02_HecatAssignment2_QuestActive_Task: Successfully avoid enemy attacks by dodge rolling ({0}/{1}) 利用闪躲翻滚成功避开敌方攻击㉿
Cast Incendio on enemies ({0}/{1}) |对敌人施放“火焰熊熊” ㉿
Return to Professor Hecat |回去找赫卡特教授
ZZE_02_HecatAssignment2_QuestAvailable_J:
Professor Hecat has assigned me some tasks outside of the classroom to help me catch up with my peers. After I complete them, she will teach me how to cast Expelliarmus, the Disarming Charm, which knocks an object out of an opponent’s hand.
为了帮助我尽快跟上其他同学的进度，赫卡特教授给我布置了一些额外的课后作业。完成这些任务之后，她将会教我施放缴械魔咒“除你武器”，这种咒语将能够击飞对手抓握着的物体。
ZZE_02_HecatAssignment2_QuestAvailable_S: Professor Hecat is waiting for me to complete her assignment.|赫卡特教授正在等待着我完成她布置的作业。
ZZE_02_HecatAssignment2_QuestComplete_Jo:
I successfully tested dodge rolling and Incendio in the field. When I turned in the assignment with Professor Hecat, she instructed me on how to knock objects out of the hands of my opponents using Expelliarmus, the Disarming Charm. 
我已经成功在实战中测试了闪躲翻滚与“火焰熊熊”的效果。向赫卡特教授汇报了作业完成情况之后，她教会了我如何利用缴械魔咒“除你武器”击飞对手抓握的物体。
ZZE_02_HecatAssignment2_QuestTitle: Professor Hecat Assignment 2|赫卡特教授的作业2

ZZF_01_01_HerbologySide_Title: Professor Garlick's Assignment|加里克教授的作业
ZZF_02_GarlickAssignment2_QuestActive_St:
Professor Garlick wants me to field test Chinese Chomping Cabbages, a Mandrake, and a Venomous Tentacula all at once. She also wants me to grow and harvest a Fluxweed plant. Should I need any seeds or plants, I could visit The Magic Neep or Dogweed and Deathcap. My Field Guide will not guide me through this assignment, but my map could still prove useful.
加里克教授想要我在实战中同时测试中国咬人甘蓝、曼德拉草以及毒触手的威力。除此以外，教授还希望我能够种植并采集一株流液草。神奇萝卜或者是“茱萸和毒菇”应该能够提供我需要的种子与植物。我的实战指南不会指引我完成这项作业，但我的地图仍然可以用得上。

I should return to Professor Garlick and turn in the assignment so that she will teach me how to cast Flipendo, the Knockback Jinx, which will put an opponent on their back. 
我需要回去找加里克教授交作业，这样我才能向她学习如何使用击退恶咒“退敌三尺”，这种咒语将能够让对手们上下翻飞。
ZZF_02_GarlickAssignment2_QuestActive_Ta: Acquire all three combat plants and use them simultaneously 获取全部三种战斗植物，并且在实战中同时测试这些植物的威力㉿
Grow and harvest Fluxweed |种植并采摘流液草㉿
Return to Professor Garlick |回去找加里克教授
ZZF_02_GarlickAssignment2_QuestAvailable:
Professor Garlick has another assignment that she’d like me to complete. Once I finish it, she will teach me Flipendo, the Knockback Jinx, which flips an opponent backwards.
加里克教授已经为我准备了一项新的作业。等我完成之后，她将会教我击退恶咒“退敌三尺”，这种咒语将能让对手上下翻飞。
I have another assignment to complete for Professor Garlick.|加里克教授又给我布置了新的作业。
ZZF_02_GarlickAssignment2_QuestComplete_:
Professor Garlick had me simultaneously field test three combat plants, as well as grow and harvest some Fluxweed. She then taught me the proper way to cast Flipendo.
加里克教授希望我在实战中同时测试三种战斗植物的威力，除此以外还要求我种植并采集一些流液草。完成这些任务之后，她教会了我施放“退敌三尺”的方法。
ZZF_02_GarlickAssignment2_QuestTitle: Professor Garlick's Assignment 2|加里克教授的作业 2
ZZH_01_01_AttendHerbologyClass_Task: Go to Herbology Class|去上草药学课程
ZZH_01_01_HerbologyClass1_Journal: I am to attend Herbology class, taught by Professor Garlick.|我需要参加加里克教授负责的草药学课程。
ZZH_01_01_LineComplete:
I attended Herbology class with Professor Garlick. I repotted a Mandrake Root and then learned how to use the Potting Table.
我参与了加里克教授负责的草药学课程。在课上，我成功为曼德拉草进行了移植换盆，并且学会了园艺工作台的使用方法。
ZZH_01_Herbology1_QuestActive_StepJourna:
I should speak to Professor Garlick so I can get started on the assignment she has for me.
加里克教授给我准备了一些作业，我需要去和她谈一谈。
I need to use the Potting Table to plant a dittany seed. Seems simple enough.|我需要使用园艺工作台种植一份白鲜种子。听上去应该不难。

Professor Garlick wants me to meet with one of my classmates, Leander Prewett, for an assignment involving Chinese Chomping Cabbages.
加里克教授希望我与另一位同学兰德尔·浦路维特共同完成关于中国咬人甘蓝的作业。

I need to go with Leander Prewett to the other greenhouse and tend to some Chinese Chomping Cabbages.
我需要和兰德尔·浦路维特一起去前往另一间温室，并照料那里面的中国咬人甘蓝。
I’d better mind my fingers for this one.|这次可不能分神，不然手指不保。

I need to select a Chinese Chomping Cabbage from my Tool Wheel and toss it towards the target dummy.
我需要在工具轮中选择中国咬人甘蓝，然后朝着目标假人投掷出去。

I should return to Professor Garlick and tell her I tended to the Chinese Chomping Cabbages. Hopefully she'll allow me to keep any extras I picked up.
我已经完成了照料中国咬人甘蓝的作业，是时候回去找加里克教授了。希望她会允许我留下找到的额外补给。
ZZH_01_Herbology1_QuestActive_TaskObj01: Talk to Professor Garlick|与加里克教授交谈
ZZH_01_Herbology1_QuestActive_TaskObj02: Plant dittany seeds at the Potting Table|在园艺工作台种植白鲜种子
ZZH_01_Herbology1_QuestActive_TaskObj03: Meet Leander Prewett|与兰德尔·浦路维特见面
ZZH_01_Herbology1_QuestActive_TaskObj04: Go to the other greenhouse|前往另一间温室
ZZH_01_Herbology1_QuestActive_TaskObj05: Harvest a Chinese Chomping Cabbage|采摘一株中国咬人甘蓝
ZZH_01_Herbology1_QuestActive_TaskObj06: Attack the target dummy with a Chomping Cabbage|使用咬人甘蓝攻击目标假人
ZZH_01_Herbology1_QuestActive_TaskObj07: Return to Professor Garlick|回去找加里克教授
ZZH_01_Herbology1_QuestAvailable_Journal: I need to attend Herbology class, taught by Professor Garlick.|我需要参加加里克教授负责的草药学课程。
ZZH_01_Herbology1_QuestAvailale_Journal:
While Professor Fig studies the book I found in the Restricted Section, he wants me to focus on some studies of my own, beginning with Herbology. But first I must find the classroom. I should look for the Greenhouse section near the Central Hall.
菲戈教授接下来将会研究我从禁书区拿回来的书，与此同时，教授希望我先把经历放在学习上，而草药学首当其冲。不过也得等我先找到教室才行。学校的温室应该就在主厅附近。
ZZH_01_Herbology1_QuestAvailale_TaskObj0: Attend Herbology class|参加草药学课程
ZZH_01_Herbology1_QuestComplete_Journal:
I attended my first Herbology class and learned a bit. First, I got into a spot of trouble with an overly ripe Mandrake. Then I learned how to use a Potting Table and planted some dittany. After that I met Leander Prewett, and we tended to some Chinese Chomping Cabbages. After giving the cabbages some proper tending, I learned how to deploy them. I should figure out how to grow even more plants. They are incredibly useful.
在霍格沃茨中的第一堂草药学课上，我学到了不少有用的知识。一开始，一株熟过头的曼德拉草给我带来了不小的“麻烦”。之后我学会了如何使用园艺工作台，并亲自种下了一些白鲜。后来我又认识了兰德尔·浦路维特，我们两个一起照料了另一间温室中的中国咬人甘蓝。在好好打理完甘蓝们之后，我又学会了如何“使用”这些植物。以后我应该尽可能多种植一些植物。感觉它们绝对会有大用处。
ZZH_01_LighthouseSubGoal: Attend Herbology Class|参加草药学课程
ZZH_01_MissionAvailable_Journal: I need to attend Herbology class, taught by Professor Garlick.|我需要前往加里克教授负责的草药学课程。
ZZH_01_QuestActive_Journal:
Professor Garlick is teaching us important Herbology lessons. It will be interesting to find out if I have a talent for getting my hands dirty.
加里克教授即将为同学们教授重要的草药学课程。看来我马上就能知道，自己到底有没有成为“园艺达人”的天赋了。

我需要前往温室参加加里克教授负责的草药学课程。

我需要前往温室参加加里克教授负责的草药学课程。

ZZI_01_HistoryOfMagicClass_QuestActive_S:
Apparently today’s class with Professor Binns has us going out to the bottom of the Bell Tower. I should follow him.
在今天的魔法史课程中，芮斯教授将带领同学们前往钟塔底层。我需要跟着他。

Professor Binns has challenged me to find the Field Guide Page on Grimbald Weft, a hero of Hogwarts. Revelio can help me find Field Guide Pages.
芮斯教授给我出了一道题：找到霍格沃茨英雄“格林包德·维福特“所对应的实战指南书页。原形立现应该能够帮助我找到那些实战指南书页。

Professor Binns has challenged me to find the Field Guide Page on Sir Affpuddle, the waving knight.
芮斯教授给我出了一道题：找到“挥手骑士”阿福帕多爵士所对应的实战指南书页。

I've collected the Field Guide Pages for Sir Affpuddle. Now to update Professor Binns.
我已经找到了阿福帕多爵士的实战指南书页。现在得把这个消息带给芮斯教授。
ZZI_01_HistoryOfMagicClass_QuestActive_T: Follow Professor Binns|跟随芮斯教授
Collect the Field Guide Page for Grimbald Weft|收集对应格林包德·维福特的实战指南书页
Collect the Field Guide Page for Sir Affpuddle|收集对应阿福帕多爵士的实战指南书页
Return to Professor Binns|回去找芮斯教授
ZZI_01_HistoryOfMagicClass_QuestAvailabl:
I’ve made it to History of Magic class and am preparing for one of Professor Binns’s lectures. If I can stay awake, I might learn something of value.
我成功找到了魔法史教室，接下来我需要准备好迎接芮斯教授的课程。如果我能够竭尽全力保持清醒，我应该能在课上学到些有趣的知识。
I need to attend History of Magic class, taught by Professor Binns.|我需要参加芮斯教授负责的魔法史课程。
Attend History of Magic Class |参加魔法史课程
ZZI_01_HistoryOfMagicClass_QuestComplete:
Today's History of Magic class proved to be more helpful than expected. Professor Binns explained to me that Ranrok's ancestor Bragbor was an expert metal worker. I also got to learn the histories of the late tailor Grimbald Weft and Sir Affpuddle, the 'Waving Knight'. 
今天的魔法史课程着实让人获益匪浅。我从芮斯教授口中得知，原来声名显赫的妖精金属匠人布拉格博是兰洛克的祖先。除此以外，我还学习了“拯救魔法世界的裁缝”格林包德·维福特与“挥手骑士”阿福帕多爵士的生平故事。
ZZI_01_HistoryofMagicClass_QuestTitle: History of Magic Class|魔法史课程
ZZI_01_QuestActive_Journal: Professor Binns is teaching us a series of lessons about the History of Magic.|芮斯教授正在指导魔法史的一系列课程。
ZZI_MissionAvailable_Journal: I need to attend History of Magic class, taught by Professor Binns.|我需要参加芮斯教授负责的魔法史课程。
ZZI_MissionAvailable_Proximity_Task2: Go to History of Magic class|去上魔法史课
ZZI_QuestComplete_Journal:
I endured a history lecture with Professor Binns and then followed him on a tour of the Bell Tower Entrance Hall. I learned to keep an eye out for interesting objects.
在芮斯教授的魔法史课上，我跟随教授的指引下参观了钟塔门厅。在那里，我学会了要留意周遭环境中的有趣物件。
ZZM_01: Madam Kogawa's Assignment|古川夫人的作业
ZZM_01_01_FlyingSide_Title: Madam Kogawa's Assignment|古川夫人的作业
ZZM_02_KogawaAssignment2_QuestActive_Ste:
Madam Kogawa wants me to practise flying on my broom near Keenbridge Tower, along the water to the south of Hogwarts. She also wants me to fly around the Spires in the mountains to the southwest.
古川夫人希望我前往霍格沃茨南侧湖边的肯桥塔，并在那里练习飞天扫帚技术。除此以外，她还希望我围绕着西南侧山脉间的尖塔练习转向穿行。

I’ve completed Madam Kogawa’s flying assignments. I should return to her so that I can learn Arresto Momentum.
我已经完成了古川夫人的飞行课作业。现在我需要回去向她学习减震止速。
ZZM_02_KogawaAssignment2_QuestActive_Tas: Practise flying near Keenbridge Tower ({0}/{1}) |在肯桥塔附近练习飞行 ㉿
Practise flying near the Spires ({0}/{1}) |在尖塔附近练习飞行 ㉿
Return to Madam Kogawa|回去找古川夫人
ZZM_02_KogawaAssignment2_QuestAvailable_:
I received another assignment from Madam Kogawa to further hone my flying skills. After I complete her tasks, she will teach me how to cast Arresto Momentum, the Slowing Charm, which reduces the velocity of moving objects.
古川夫人给我布置了新的作业，旨在进一步磨砺我的飞行技术。完成这些任务之后，古川夫人将教我施放迟缓魔咒“减震止速”，这种咒语将能够大幅降低移动物体的速度。
I have another assignment to complete for Madam Kogawa.|古川夫人教授又给我布置了新的作业。
ZZM_02_KogawaAssignment2_QuestComplete_J:
I completed Madam Kogawa’s flying assignments; she then taught me how to cast Arresto Momentum, the Slowing Charm that reduces the velocity of moving objects. 
我完成了古川夫人的飞行课作业，之后她教会了我如何施放迟缓魔咒“减震止速”，这种咒语能够大幅降低移动物体的速度。
ZZM_02_KogawaAssignment2_QuestTitle: Madam Kogawa's Assignment 2|古川夫人的作业 2

ZZN_01_01_PotionsSide_Title: Professor Sharp's Assignment|夏普教授的作业
ZZN_02_SharpAssignment2_QuestActive_Step:
Professor Sharp wants me to use a Thunderbrew Potion against some enemies. He also wants me to test an Invisibility Potion. I should be able to find potions and recipes at J. Pippins Potions. My Field Guide will not guide me through this assignment, but my map could still prove useful.
夏普教授想要我在面对多名敌人时使用雷酿。除此以外，他还想要我测试隐形魔药的效果。J·皮聘魔药店应该能够提供我需要的魔药与配方。我的实战指南不会指引我完成这项作业，但我的地图仍然可以用得上。

I’ve completed Professor Sharp’s assignment. I should return to the Potions classroom so he can teach me Diffindo. 
我已经完成了夏普教授的作业。现在我需要返回魔药教室，并向教授学习”四分五裂“。
ZZN_02_SharpAssignment2_QuestActive_Task: Acquire and use a Thunderbrew Potion against enemies 获取㉿一瓶雷酿，并在与多名敌人的实战中进行测试
Acquire and use an Invisibility Potion |获取㉿一瓶隐形魔药，并在实战中进行测试
Return to Professor Sharp|回去找夏普教授
ZZN_02_SharpAssignment2_QuestAvailable_J:
Professor Sharp has another assignment that he wants me to complete before he will teach me how to cast Diffindo, the Severing Charm, which cuts and slices.
夏普教授给我布置了新的作业，完成之后他将教我施放切割魔咒“四分五裂”，这种魔咒可以切割目标。
ZZN_02_SharpAssignment2_QuestAvailable_S: Professor Sharp is waiting for me to complete my next assignment.|夏普教授正在等待着我完成我的下一个作业。
ZZN_02_SharpAssignment2_QuestComplete_Jo:
I successfully utilised a Thunderbrew Potion against some enemies, and I also field tested an Invisibility Potion. After turning in the assignment, Professor Sharp taught me how to cast the Severing Charm, Diffindo.
我在面对多名敌人时成功使用了雷酿，除此以外也对隐形魔药进行了测试。回去找夏普教授交作业之后，他教会了我如何施放切割魔咒”四分五裂“

ZZO_01_01_DivinationSide_Title: Professor Onai's Assignment|欧奈教授的作业
ZZO_01_03_ReturnToOnai_Journal: I completed Professor Onai's extra assignments. I ought to report back to her.|我已经完成了欧奈教授的额外作业。是时候该回去找她汇报情况了。
ZZO_01_03_ReturnToOnai_StepComplete_Jour:
Having completed Professor Onai's assignments, I reported back to her and learned Descendo.
完成欧奈教授的作业后，我从她那里学会了如何施放“应声落地”。
ZZO_01_03_ReturnToOnai_TalkToOnai_StepJo:
I've completed the tasks that Professor Onai assigned, and now I need to attend her Divination class. I should speak with her after class so she can teach me Descendo.
我已经完成了欧奈教授的作业，现在我需要前往她的占卜课教室。等下课后我应该找她谈一谈，到时候欧奈教授会教我“应声落地”。
ZZO_01_03_ReturnToOnai_TalkToOnai_Task: Attend Divination Class during the day|在白天参加占卜学课程
ZZO_01_03_ReturnToOnai_TalkToOnai_Task2: Talk to Professor Onai|与欧奈教授交谈
ZZO_01_OnaiAssignment_QuestActive_StepJo:
Professor Onai wants me to field test Depulso on a levitated enemy. She also wants me to collect Troll Bogeys, so I will need to find and defeat a troll to complete her assignment. My Field Guide will not guide me through this assignment, but my map could still prove useful.
欧奈教授想要我在实战中对一名处于飘浮状态的敌人使用“统统飞走”。除此以外，她还想要我收集巨怪鼻涕，看来为了完成这份作业，我还得设法找到并打败一头巨怪才行。我的实战指南不会指引我完成这项任务，但我的地图仍然可以用的上。

I’ve completed Professor Onai’s assignment. I should return to her classroom so that I can learn Descendo.
我已经完成了欧奈教授的作业。现在我需要返回占卜课教室学习“应声落地”。
ZZO_01_OnaiAssignment_QuestActive_TaskOb: Cast Depulso on a levitated enemy |在实战中对一名处于飘浮状态的敌人使用“统统飞走”㉿
Collect Troll Bogeys ({0}/{1}) |收集巨怪鼻涕㉿
Return to Professor Onai|回去找欧奈教授
ZZO_01_OnaiAssignment_QuestAvailable_Jou:
Professor Onai has given me an assignment outside of class to accelerate my growth as a student. After I complete the assignment, she has promised to teach me how to cast Descendo, which will allow me to slam an opponent to the ground. 
为了帮助我跟上学习进度，欧奈教授给我布置了一份额外的课后作业。欧奈教室答应我说，完成这些任务之后，她会教我如何施放“应声落地”，这种咒语能够允许我将对手狠狠砸向地面。
ZZO_01_OnaiAssignment_QuestAvailable_Ste: Professor Onai is waiting for me to complete her assignment.|欧奈教授正在等待着我完成她布置的作业。
ZZO_01_OnaiAssignment_QuestComplete_Jour:
I successfully field tested Depulso and managed to collect some Troll Bogeys for Professor Onai. As promised, she taught me how to cast the Descendo spell, which I can use to slam my opponents to the ground.
按照欧奈教授的要求，我在实战中成功测试了“统统飞走”的威力，并且还收集到了一些巨怪鼻涕。教授也遵守承诺并教会了我施放“应声落地”，这种咒语能够将对手狠狠砸向地面。

ZZP_01_02_GetIngredients_Journal: I need to collect the ingredients for my potion.|我需要收集调配魔药的原料。
ZZP_01_02_GetIngredientsAndFeather_Journ:
I need to collect the ingredients for my potion, as well as a Fwooper Feather for Garreth Weasley.
我需要收集调配魔药的原料，除此以外还要为加雷斯·韦斯莱找到一份恶婆鸟的羽毛。
ZZP_01_02_RetrieveFwooperFeather_task: Get a Fwooper Feather for Garreth|为加雷斯找到一份恶婆鸟的羽毛
ZZP_01_02_ReturntoGarreth_task: Return to Garreth with the Fwooper Feather|将恶婆鸟的羽毛带给加雷斯

ZZP_01_02_UsePotionsTable_BrewaPotion_Ta: Brew an Edurus Potion|调配一份艾德鲁斯魔药
ZZP_01_02_UsePotionsTable_Journal: I need to brew the Edurus Potion at my Potions Station.|我需要在魔药台调配一份艾德鲁斯魔药。
ZZP_01_LighthouseSubGoal: Attend Potions Class|参加魔药学课程
ZZP_01_PotionClass1_QuestAvailable_Journ:
As a new fifth-year, I've got some catching up to do, especially when it comes to Potions. I reckon Professor Sharp is the only one who can help me get up to speed. His lessons are certain to be enlightening.
作为一名“五年级新生”，我还有很多要学习的地方，在魔药学方面尤是如此。为了跟上进度，我需要虚心向夏普教授请教才行。相信我一定能够在这门课上学到许多。
ZZP_01_PotionClass_LineComplete_Journal:
I attended Potions class with Professor Sharp and used ingredients to brew an Edurus Potion.
在夏普教授的魔药学课上，我利用教授提供的原料调配出了一份艾德鲁斯魔药。
ZZP_01_QuestActive_Journal:
Professor Sharp is teaching us about Potions. His intensity makes me wonder how I'll get along with him, but I suppose every potioneer has to start somewhere.
夏普教授是霍格沃茨的魔药学老师。虽然教授严肃认真的个性让我不知道以后该如何和他相处，但是我相信每个魔药师都得想个办法起步。
ZZP_01_RequirementTask_StepJournal: I need to progress in my studies before I can attend Potions class.|我需要先精进学业才能参加魔药学课程。
ZZP_01_ReturnToGarreth_StepJournal: I should finish brewing my potion and bring this feather to Garreth.|我需要调配好魔药，并将羽毛带给加雷斯。
ZZP_01_ReturnToSharp_StepJournal: I need to present my Edurus Potion to Professor Sharp.|我需要把自己调配的艾德鲁斯魔药交给夏普教授鉴定。
ZZS_01_02_FindTelescope_GetAmitsTelescop: Find Amit's Telescope in the Storage Area|在仓库寻找阿米特的望远镜
ZZS_01_02_FindTelescope_Journal:
Amit offered me his old telescope. Its somewhere in the storage area under the observation deck.
阿米特表示想将自己以前的望远镜送给我。按照他的说法，那架望远镜应该就在瞭望台下方的仓库中。
ZZS_01_03_AasimTalk_Journal:
Amit wanted to speak to me after I picked up his telescope. I should talk to him now.
拿到望远镜之后，阿米特似乎有事找我。我应该去找他谈一谈。
ZZS_01_03_AasimTalk_TalktoAasim_Task: Find Amit on the lower deck|在下层找到阿米特
ZZS_01_07_UseTable_CompleteStarChart_Tas: Use the Astronomy Table|使用天文台
ZZS_01_07_UseTable_Journal:
We've discovered the Astronomy Table that Amit had read about. Now to see how it works.
我和阿米特一起找到了他以前在书中看到过的“天文台”。正好来试试有没有书里写得那么神。
ZZS_01_AstronomyClass_FindTable_TaskObj0: Find the Astronomy Table|找到天文台
ZZS_01_AstronomyClass_Journal03:
Amit says that one of the ancient Astronomy Tables can be found on the Hogwarts grounds.
He would have gone in search alone but has heard chilling rumours.
He wants me to accompany him. I should follow Amit and help him find the table. 
阿米特说霍格沃茨校区就有一张古老的天文台。
他原本想独自去调查，但是因为听见了不好的传闻而只好作罢。
现在他希望我能陪他一起去。我应该跟着阿米特，帮助他找到天文台。
ZZS_01_AstronomyClass_Journal04:
It appears that the ancient Astronomy Table is located on the castle walls.
Amit and I will need to travel through the castle turrets to reach it.
I should lead the way to help Amit get over his fears.
似乎那张古老的天文台就位于城堡高墙之上。
我和阿米特需要穿越城墙塔楼才能到达那里。
我应该以身作则，帮助阿米特克服恐惧。
ZZS_01_LighthouseSubGoal: Attend Astronomy Class|参加天文学课程
ZZS_01_MissionAvailable_LevelUp_Task1: You must be level 16 to begin this story|达到等级16后才可以开始这段故事
ZZS_01_RequirementTask_StepJournal: I need to progress in my studies before I can attend Astronomy class.|我需要先精进学业才能参加天文学课程。
ZZS_AstronomyClass_QuestActive_Journal:
During Astronomy class, Professor Shah mentioned ancient Astronomy Tables scattered throughout the nearby land. Amit seems particularly keen on these tables. We should definitely find out more. 
在天文学的课上，萨哈教授提到说学校周遭的区域里遍布着许多古代天文台。阿米特似乎十分热衷那些天文台。有机会的话我们应该去调查一下。
ZZS_AstronomyClass_QuestActive_StepJourn:
Professor Shah’s class is at the top of the Astronomy Tower, upstairs from the entrance to the Room of Requirement. I should head there now.
萨哈教授的教室位于天文塔最顶部，就在有求必应屋入口的正上方。我现在得动身去那里。

Amit Thakkar has been kind enough to lend me his spare telescope. He says I can retrieve it from the storage area one floor down.
阿米特·萨卡哈慷慨地表示愿意把自己以前的望远镜借给我。按照他的说法，望远镜就存放在楼下的仓库中。

I’ve collected Amit’s telescope. I should meet with him on the lower observation deck.
我已经拿到了阿米特的望远镜。现在我应该去瞭望台下层找他。

Amit’s showing me where the Astronomy Table is located. He says to look for a large wooden platform.
阿米特给我指出了天文台的位置。他要我到时候记得留意一处大型木头平台。

Amit’s eager to look at the stars, but he seems a bit timid. He wants me to lead the way.
阿米特热衷于观察星辰，但是他似乎有点胆怯。阿米特希望这次我来带路。

We found the Astronomy Table. I should use the telescope Amit lent me and see what I can observe with it.
我们终于找到了天文台。这时候阿米特借给我的望远镜就能派上用场了，不知道能看见什么东西。
ZZS_AstronomyClass_QuestActive_TaskObj01: Attend Astronomy Class|参加天文学课程
ZZS_AstronomyClass_QuestActive_TaskObj02: Retrieve the telescope from the storage area|取回存放在仓库中的望远镜
ZZS_AstronomyClass_QuestActive_TaskObj03: Meet Amit on the Lower Deck|在下层与阿米特见面
ZZS_AstronomyClass_QuestActive_TaskObj05: Find the Astronomy Table|找到天文台
ZZS_AstronomyClass_QuestActive_TaskObj06: Use the Astronomy Table|使用天文台
ZZS_AstronomyClass_QuestAvailable_Journa:
I need to attend Professor Shah’s Astronomy class to learn what the wizarding world knows about the stars.
接下来我需要参与萨哈教授负责的天文学课程，了解魔法世界的人们从星辰之间掌握到的知识。
ZZS_AstronomyClass_QuestAvailable_StepJo: I need to go to Astronomy class, taught by Professor Shah.|我需要参加萨哈教授负责的天文学课程。
ZZS_AstronomyClass_QuestComplete_Journal:
I attended Astronomy class this evening and Professor Shah was displeased that I still don't have my own telescope. Luckily, another student, Amit Thakkar, was nice enough to lend me his spare. Amit told me about an ancient Astronomy Table on the Hogwarts grounds. Once we had found it, I used the Astronomy Table to observe several hidden constellations. Amit was excited and said that I could keep his telescope. Apparently, more of these tables are hidden across the Highlands. I should keep an eye out for them.
今天晚上我参与了天文学的课程，只是因为我没有准备自己的望远镜，萨哈教授似乎对我有点不满。幸好一位名叫阿米特·萨卡哈帮我解围，他好心得把自己的备用望远镜借给了我。阿米特跟我说霍格沃茨的校区中存在着一张古老的天文台。找到天文台之后，我用它观察到了好几处隐秘的星座。这让阿米特很是激动，他还大方地表示我可以留下他的望远镜。按照阿米特的说法，高地之上应该还遍布着不少类似这样的天文台。以后我应该记得留意。

ZZT_LineComplete_Journal:
I attended Professor Weasley's Transfiguration class, and afterward, she assessed my abilities and progress in the school year.
我参与了韦斯莱教授的变形学课程，教授在课后评估了我的能力以及我今年的学习进度。
ZZT_TransfigurationClass_Journal:
Professor Weasley gave me a couple of tasks to complete in order to fill out my Field Guide. Once they're done, she'll teach me the Transformation spell and assess my midterm progress.
韦斯莱教授希望我能够尽快完成实战指南的内容，因此给我布置了一些任务。完成这些任务之后，她将会教我“变形魔咒”并对我进行期中评估。
